text: GENESIS 1: 1Thilsiam Thu 2Lei tuh lim leh mel nei lou in, avuak kia ahi a, tui thukpi tung mial in amial hi. Pathian Kha in tuite tung a-opkhum hi. 3Pathian in, “Vak om hen,” achi a, huchi in vak ahong omta hi. 4Pathian in vak a-en a, hoih asa hi. Huchi in Pathian in mial a pan vak akhenkheta hi. 5Pathian in vak, “Sun” achi a, mial, “Zan” achi hi. Huchi in ani khatna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. 6Pathian in, “Tuite kikal ah vansin om henla, huai in tuite a pan tuite khenkhia hen,” achi hi. 7Pathian in vansin abawl a, vansin tung a tui omte a pan vansin nuai a tui omte akhenkhia a; huan huchibang ahong hita hi. 8Pathian in vansin, “Van” achi hi. Huchi in ani nihna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. 9Pathian in, “Van nuai a tuite mun khat ah omkhawm uh henla, gamkeu hong dawk hen,” achi a; huchibang ahong hita hi. 10Pathian in gamkeu, “Lei” achi a; tui omkhawmte Tuipite achi hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi. 11Pathian in, “Lei in loupate, anteh chi neite, thei sing lei a amau chi omdan ding bang zel a gah, agah sung a chi omte omsak hen,” achi a, huchibang ahong hita hi. 12Huchi in lei in loupate, anteh amau chi omdan ding bang a chi neite, sing amau chi omdan ding bang a gah, agah sung a chi omte a-omsak hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi. 13Huchi in ani thumna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. 14Pathian in, “Sun leh zan khenna ding in vansin ah tanvakte om uhenla, huaite chiamtehnate, hunbite, nite leh kumte theihna hi uhen.

GENESIS 1: 15Lei tanvak ding in van a vansin ah vakte om uhen,” achi a, huchibang ahong hita hi. 16Pathian in tanvak thupi nih abawl a; tanvak thupizaw pen sun a vaihawm ding in, tanvak thupi louzaw pen zan a vaihawm ding in abawl hi. Aksite leng abawl hi. 17Pathian in huaite lei tanvak ding in van a vansin ah akoih a; 18sun tung leh zan tung a vaihawm ding leh vak leh mial khen ding in. Huchi in Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi. 19Huchi in ani lina ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. 20Pathian in, “Tuite'n thilsiam tang thei hinna neite tampi pawtsak uhenla, vasate leng leitung a vansin hawm heuhou ah leng uhen,” achi hi. 21Pathian in ngapi liante asiam a, ganhing tang thei chiteng tui in apawtsak a, amaute chi omdan ding bang leh kha nei vasa chiteng amaute chi omdan ding bang in asiam hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi. 22Pathian in, “Chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, tuipi tuite dimsak unla, vasate leng lei ah pung uhen,” chi in avualzawl hi. 23Huchi in ani ngana ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. 24Pathian in, “Lei in ganhing amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in; gante, bokvak a pai ganhingte, gamsate, amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in pawtsak uhen,” achi a; huan huchibang ahong hita hi. 25Pathian in gamsa amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in, gante amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in, lei a thil bokvak a paite tengteng amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in abawl hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi.

GENESIS 1: 26Pathian in, “I kibatpih in, eimah bang in mihing i bawl dia, tuipi a ngasate tung ah, tung a leng vasate tung ah, gante tung ah leh leitung tengteng tung ah thu i neisak ding,” achi hi. 27Pathian in ama kibatpih inmihing asiam a, akibatpihmah in ahi asiam;pasal leh numei asiamta hi. 28Pathian in amaute avualzawl hi. Pathian mah in akiang uah, “Chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, leitung luahdim unla, na thuthu un omsak un. Tuipi a ngasate tung ah, tung a leng vasate tung ah, thil hing leitung a bokvak a pai tengteng tung ah thu nei un,” achi hi. 29Pathian mah in, “Ngai un, leitung tengteng a anteh chi nei om teng leh sing chiteng, sing chi nei gah omnate, ka hon pia hi; na an ding uh ahi. 30Lei a gamsa chiteng kiang ah, tung a leng vasa chiteng kiang ah, leitung a bokvak a pai chiteng kiang ah, hinna nei chiteng kiang ah a-an ding un loupa hing chiteng ka pia hi,” achi a; huan huchibang ahong hita hi. 31Pathian in athilsiam tengteng a-en a, ngai in, hoih asa mahmah hi. Huchi in ani gukna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi.

GENESIS 2: 1Huan lei leh vante leh asung a om tengteng siam zoh ahita hi. 2Pathian in ani sagih ni in anasep azou a; huchi in ani sagih ni in anasep tengteng akhawlsanta hi. 3Huai ni a Pathian in asiam leh abawl, anasep tengteng akhawlsan tak ziak in, Pathian in ani sagih ni vualzawl in, atangta hi.Eden Huan 4 Toupa Pathian in lei leh vante asiam ni a, lei leh vante siam ahih ua akisuansawndan uh hiai bang ahi. 5Leitung ah gamlak loupa himhim a-om nai kei a, sing-le-louhing leng apou nai kei hi. Toupa Pathian in leitung ah vuah azusak nai kei a, lei let ding in mihing leng a-om nai kei hi. 6Himahleh lei a pan tuihu ahong pawttou a, leitung tengteng anomsak hi. 7 Toupa Pathian in lei a leivui in mi abawl a, anakvangte ah hinna hu ahalut a; huai mi, hinna nei mihing ahong hita hi. 8 Toupa Pathian in suahlam a Eden ah huan abawl a; huai ah abawl pasal a-omsak hi. 9Toupa Pathian in lei a kipan sing mit hiptak leh nek tuak chiteng apousak hi. Hinna sing leh asia leh apha theihna sing leng huan laizang ah apousak hi. 10Eden a pan huan nomsak ding in lui aluang paisuak a; huai a kipan akazak a, ka li ahong hita hi. 11Akhatna min Pishon ahi a, hiai Havilah gam tengteng kualkhum lui ahi a; huai dangka-eng omna ahi. 12Huai gam a dangka-eng hoihtak ahi a, huai ah bedeli leh onik suang leng a-om hi. 13Lui nihna min Gihon ahi a; huai lui in Kush gam tengteng akualkhum hi. 14Lui thumna min Hiddekel ahi a; hiai Assuria gam suahlam a luang ahi. Lui lina bel Euphrates ahi. 15 Toupa Pathian in pasal api a, Eden huan ah akem ding leh aveng ding in akoihta hi.

GENESIS 2: 16Toupa Pathian in pasal kiang ah, “Huan a singgah chiteng na ut-ut na ne thei hi. 17Asia leh apha theihna singgah bel na ne ding ahi kei. Na nekleh na nek ni mah in na si ngeingei ding hi,” chi in thu apia hi. 18 Toupa Pathian in, “Pasal amah kia a-om ahoih kei. Amah panpihtu dia kilawm ka bawlsak ding,” achi hi. 19Toupa Pathian in leitung a kipan gamsa chiteng leh tung a leng vasa chiteng abawl hi. Amin ding ua bang sak ding ahia chih theihna ding in Adam kiang ah apikhawm hi. Ganhing chiteng amin uh Adam in ana phuah, huai amin uh ahi denta hi. 20Adam in ganhing tengteng, tung a leng vasa tengteng leh gamsa chiteng min aphuak chiat hi. Himahleh Adam panpihtu ding muh in a-om kei hi. 21 Toupa Pathian in nuamtak in Adam a-ihmusak a, huchi in a-ihmuta a; anakguh khat alakhia a, alakkhiakna mun sa in adimsak hi. 22Toupa Pathian in Adam a pan alak nakguh a kipan in numei abawl a, Adam kiang ah apita hi. 23Adam in,“Hiai pen zaw ka guh a kipan guh,ka sa a kipan sa ahi.Pasal a kipan lakkhiakahih ziak in,Numei, chih ding ahi,” achi hi. 24Huaiziak in pasal in anu leh apa apaisan ding a, azi ah abelh ding. Huchi in sa khat ahong hita ding uh. 25Adam leh azi vuaktang ahi tuak ua, azum tuan kei uhi.

GENESIS 3: 1Huan Toupa Pathian in gamsa abawl tengteng lak ah gul agitlouhpil pen hi. Ama'n numei kiang ah, “Pathian in, ‘Huan a singgah himhim na ne ding uh ahi kei chi ahi maw?’ ” achi hi. 2Numei in gul kiang ah, “Chi lou e, huan a singgahte ne thei mah ung, 3himahleh huan laizang a singgah pen ahihleh Pathian in, ‘Na ne ding uh ahi kei, khoih leng na khoih ding uh ahi kei, huchi lou in zaw na si ding uh chi aka,’ ” achi hi. 3Mihing Thumanlouhna 4Gul in numei kiang ah, “Si zenzen lou e. 5Na nek ni ua pat na mit uh ahong vak dia, asia leh apha thei in Pathian na hong bang ding uh, chih Pathian in thei kilkel ei ve,” achi hi. 6Numei in singgah nek theih ahi chih leh mit hiptak ahi chih leh mi pilsak ding a singgah etlahhuai ahi, chih atheih in agah alou a, aneta hi. Akiang a om apasal leng apia a, ama'n leng aneta hi. 7Anih un amit uh ahong vakta a, vuaktang ahih lam uh hong kithei ua; theipi nah khuikhawm in, puan akibawltawm uhi. 8 Toupa Pathian, nitaklam ninem a huan a vak thawmging aza ua; Adam leh azi in huan a sing lak ah Toupa Pathian ana kibuksan uhi. 9Toupa Pathian in Adam asam a, akiang ah, “Koi a om na hia?” achi hi. 10Ama'n, “Huan ah na thawmging ka za a, vuaktang ka hih ziak in ka lau a; ka na kibuta,” achi hi. 11Ama'n, “Vuaktang na hih kua'n hon hilh ahia? Singgah nek louh ding ka chih ne na hita maw?” achi hi. 12Adam in, “Hon ompih dia na hon piak numei in singgah hon pia a, ka neta hi,” achi hi.

GENESIS 3: 13 Toupa Pathian in numei kiang ah, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Numei in, “Gul in hon zekhem a, ka neta hi,” achi hi.Pathian Vaihawmna 14 Toupa Pathian in gul kiang ah, “Hichibang a na hih ziak in ganhing tengteng leh gamsa chiteng lak ah hamsiat na hi tuanse ding a, bokvak in na pai gigeta ding a, na damsung in leivui na neta ding. 15Nang leh numei ka hon kidousak ding a, na suante leh asuante leng ka kidousak lai ding. Huai in na lutang asidupsak ding a, nang akhetul na sidupsak ding,” achi hi. 16Numei kiang ah, “Na haksatna leh na naupaina nakpi in ka pungsak ding a; haksatak in tate na nei ding. Huan na lunggulh na pasal a ahi ding a, ama'n na tung ah thu anei ding,” achi hi. 17Adam kiang ah, “Na zi thu na man a, singgah na ne ding ahi kei, chi a, ka hon thupiak na nek ziak in nang ziak in leitung hamsiat in a-omta. Na damsung teng in gimtak a sem in agah na neta ding. 18Ling leh louling neite leng ahon omsak ding a, lei a anteh na neta ding hi. 19Lei a na kik nawn masiah na mai a kho-ul luang puappuap in an na neta ding. Lei a pan lakkhiak na hi; leivui na hi a, leivui ah na kik nawn ding,” achi hi. 20Adam in azi, mihing tengteng' nu ahih ziak in, amin Evi asa hi.

GENESIS 3: 21Toupa Pathian in Adam a ding leh azi a ding in savun puanaktual bawlsak in, asilhsak hi.Huan A Kipan Adam Leh Evi Hawlkhiakna 22 Toupa Pathian in, “Ngai un, mihing in asia leh apha thei in eite bang ahong hita, tu in akhut ua sawk in hinna singgah lou a ne in, tangtawn in ahing kha ding uh,” achi hi. 23Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in amah alakkhiakna lei let ding in Eden huan a kipan ahawlkheta hi. 24Mihingte adelhkheta a; hinna sing lampi veng ding in Eden huan suahlam pang ah cherubte leh mei namsau kilek zualzual a-omsakta hi.

GENESIS 4: 1Huan Adam in azi Evi athei a; huchi in agai a, Kain anei a, “Toupa panpihna in ta pasal ka neita,” achi hi. 2Asanggampa Abel ahon nei nawn hi. Abel belamchingmi ahi a, Kain bel leiletmi ahi. 3Anung in hichi ahong hi a, Kain in Toupa kiang a lat ding in lou a piang leigahte ahon tawi hi. 4Kain Leh Abel 5Himahleh Kain leh athillat akipahpih kei. Kain aheh mahmah a, amel aliap hi. 6Toupa'n Kain kiang ah, “Bangziak a heh na hia? Bangziak a na mel liap ahia? 7Hihhoih lechin pahtak na loh kei dia hia? Na hihhoih keileh kongkhak bul ah khelhna akual nilouh a, adeihlam nangmah ahi dia, atung ah thu na nei ding ahi,” achi hi. 8Kain in anau Abel ahoupih a, hichi ahong hi a, lou a a-om lai un Kain in anau Abel asual a, athatta hi. 9 Toupa'n Kain kiang ah, “Na sanggampa Abel koi a om ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka thei kei, ka sanggampa dontu ka hi a hia?” achi hi. 10 Toupa'n, “Bang hih na tamai a? Na sanggampa' sisan aw in lei a kipan hon sam ahi. 11Huaiziak in na khut a kipan na sanggampa' sisan sang ding a kam ana ka, lei a pan hamsiat na hita hi. 12Lei na leh in leng ahoihna ahon pe nawn kei ding a, leitung ah galtai leh vakvai na hita ding,” achi hi. 13Kain in Toupa kiang ah, “N'on gawtna ana mahmah a, ka thuakzou kei ding. 14“Ngai in, tuni in leitung a kipan na hon delhkheta a, na mitmuh phak louh a sel a om ding ka hita. Lei ah taimang leh vakvai hi ding ka hita hi. Hichi ahong hi ding a, kuapeuh kei hon mu in ahon that mai ding uh,” achi hi.

GENESIS 4: 15 Toupa'n akiang ah, “Huchi ahihleh, Kain that kuapeuh amun sagih in atung ah phu lak ahi ding,” achi hi. Huan mi amah mu kuahiam in athahlouhna ding in Toupa'n Kain achiamtehta hi. 16Toupa kiang a kipan Kain apawt a, Eden suahlam a Nod gam ah atengta hi.Kain Suante 17Kain in azi athei a; huchi in agai a, Enok anei hi. Khua asat a, akho min atapa tamsak in Enok asa hi. 18Enok in tapa Irad anei a; Irad in tapa Mahujael anei hi. Mahujael in tapa Methusael anei a; Methusael in tapa Lamekh anei hi. 19Lamekh in zi nih anei a; khat min Adah ahi a, akhat pen min Zillah ahi. 20Adah in Jabal anei a; amah puanin a om ganvulmite suangpa ahi. 21Asanggampa' min Jubal ahi a, amah kaihging leh tamngai tummi tengteng suangpa ahi. 22Zillah in leng Tubal-kain, dal leh sik, tuzat-heizat chiteng sekmi anei hi. Tubal-kain sanggamnu Naamah ahi. 23Lamekh in azite kiang ah,“Adah leh Zillahte aw, ka aw za unla;Lamekh zite aw, ka thugen ngaikhia un.Ahon liamsak ziak in mi khat ka that a,ahon sidupsak ziak in valnou khat ka that hi. 24Kain' phu bawn amun sagih a lak ding ahihleh,Lamekh' phu amun sawmsagih-le-sagih a lak ahi ding,” achi hi.Seth Leh Enosh 25Adam in azi athei nawn a; tapa anei nawn a; amin Seth asa hi, “Pathian in Abel sik in chisuan ding ahon sehsakta; Kain in lah amah athatta ngal a,” achi hi. 26Seth in leng tapa anei a; amin Enosh asa hi. Huai a kipan mite'n Toupa min alou panta uhi.

GENESIS 5: 1Hiai Adam suante khangthubu ahi. Pathian in mihing asiam ni in Pathian batpih in amah abawl hi. 2Pasal leh numei in amaute asiam a; avualzawl a, siam a a-om ni un amin uh Adam asa hi. 3Adam in kum za-le-sawmthum ahih in amah mah bang, akibatpih ngei tapa anei a; amin Seth asa hi. 4Seth aneih nung in Adam kum zagiat adam lai a; tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. 5Adam Suante 6Seth in kum za-le-nga ahih in, tapa Enosh anei hi. 7Enosh aneih nung in Seth kum zagiat-le-sagih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. 8Seth damsung tengteng kum zakua sawm-le-nih ahi a; huchi in asita hi. 9Enosh in kum sawmkua ahih in tapa Kenan anei hi. 10Kenan aneih nung in Enosh kum zagiat sawm-le-nga adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. 11Enosh damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-nga ahi a, huchi in asita hi. 12Kenan in kum sawmsagih ahih in, tapa Mahalalel anei hi. 13Mahalalel aneih nung in Kenan kum zagiat-le-sawmli adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. 14Kenan damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-sawm ahi a; huchi in asita hi. 15Mahalalel kum sawmguk-le-nga ahih in tapa Jared anei hi. 16Jared aneih nung in Mahalalel kum zagiat-le-sawmthum adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. 17Mahalalel damsung tengteng kum zagiat sawmkua-le-nga ahi a, huchi in asita hi. 18Jared in kum zakhat sawmguk-le-nih ahih in tapa Enok anei hi. 19Enok aneih nung in Jared kum zagiat adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. 20Jared damsung tengteng kum zakua sawmguk-le-nih ahi a, huchi in asita hi. 21Enok in kum sawmguk-le-nga ahih in, tapa Methuselah anei hi. 22Methuselah aneih nung in Enok kum zathum sung Pathian toh atonkhawm ua, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. 23Enok damsung tengteng kum zathum sawmguk-le-nga ahi.

GENESIS 5: 24Pathian toh Enok atonkhawm ua, amah a-omta kei a; Pathian in alata hi. 25Methuselah in kum zakhat sawmgiat-le-sagih ahih in tapa Lamekh anei hi. 26Lamekh aneih nung in Methuselah kum zasagih sawmgiat-le-nih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. 27Methuselah damsung tengteng kum zakua sawmguk-le-kua ahi a, huchi in asita hi. 28Lamekh in kum zakhat sawmgiat-le-nih ahih in tapa anei hi. 29“Hiai ngei in Toupa hamsiatkhum leitung ziak a i nasepna leh khut a i sepgimna ah hon lungmuan ding,” chi in amin Noah asa hi. 30Noah aneih nung in Lamekh kum zanga sawmkua-le-nga adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. 31Lamekh damsung tengteng kum zasagih sawmsagih-le-sagih ahi a; huchi in asita hi. 32Noah kum zanga a upa ahi. Noah in Shem, Ham leh Japheth anei hi.

GENESIS 6: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, leitung a mite ahong pun ua, tanute ahon neih un, 2Pathian tapate'n mite tanute melhoih in amu ua; adeihlam chiat uh zi in anei uhi. 3Toupa'n, “Ka Kha in tangtawn in mi asual nilouh kei ding, amah lah sa ahi ngal a, himahleh kum za-le-sawmnih adam ding,” achi hi. 4Huai hun lai in lei ah miliante a-om ua; huai nung in leng Pathian tapate'n mite tanute thei a, amau toh tate aneih zel lai un, huaite mah nidanglai a mihat, miminthangte ahi uhi. 5 Toupa'n lei ah mite gitlouhdan nasa ahi chih leh alungtang lunggeldan uh gilou ngen ahi ngitnget chih amu hi. 6Gitlouhna 7Toupa'n, “Leitung a kipan ka misiam ka hihmang mai ding. Mite, sate, ganhingte leh tung a leng vasate tan in; ka bawl ziak in ka kisik,” achi hi.Noah 8Noah in bel Toupa mitmuh in deihsakna atang hi. 9Noah suan hiaite ahi uh: Noah midik ahi a, adam tonpihte lak ah gensiatbei ahi a; Pathian toh Noah atonkhawm uhi. 10Noah in tapa thum Shem, Ham leh Japheth anei hi. 11Pathian' mitmuh in lei asia a, hiamgamna in lei adim khin hi. 12Huan Pathian in lei a-en a, ngai in, asegawp a; sa tengteng in leitung ah a-omdan uh ahihse khinta uhi. 13Pathian in Noah kiang ah, “Sa tengteng beina ka ma ah ahong tungta; amaute ziak in hiamgamna in leitung adim khinta ngal a. Ngai in, leitung toh amau ka hihmang ding. 14Nang a ding in meilah sing in long bawl inla; long ah dantante na bawl ding ahi. Asunglam leh apolam meilah nai in na zut vek ding hi. 15Hiai na bawldan ding ahi. Long dunglam tong zathum hi henla, availam tong sawmnga hi henla, asanlam tong sawmthum hi hen.

GENESIS 6: 16Long ah tohlet na bawl ding a, atunglam tong khat chiang a na zoh ding ahi. Apang ah long kongkhak na bawl ding a; chial nuainung leh chial nihna leh chial thumna nei in na bawl ding ahi. 17Ngai in, kei mahmah in, sa tengteng hinna hatna pai khempeuh, van nuai a kipan hihmangthang ding in leitung ah tuichim ka tungsak ding a; lei a thil chih omte asi vek ding uh. 18Himahleh nang toh ka thukhun ka kipsak ding a, long ah na lut ding ahi. Nang na lut ding a, na tapate leh na zi leh na tapate' zite leng na kiang ah alut ding uh ahi. 19Sa tengteng a thil hing chiteng lak a kipan, chi chih nihnih in, na kiang ah hinsak ding in long ah na pilut ding ahi. Amaute anu leh apa zel ahi ding uhi. 20Vasate amau chi omdan bang chiat in, gante amau chi omdan bang chiat in, chi chih nihnih in na hinsak ding in na kiang ah ahong pai ding uh ahi. 21Nek theih an chi tuamtuam kaikhawm inla, na kiang ah koih in. Nang leh amaute a ding in an ahi ding uh,” achi hi. 22Huchibang in Noah in ahih a; Pathian in akiang a thu apiak tengteng ahi bangbang in ahihta hi.

GENESIS 7: 1Huan Toupa'n Noah kiang ah, “Nang leh na inkuanpih tengteng long ah lutta un. Nang zaw hiai khang a ka ma ah midiktat na hih ka hon mu hi. 2Sa siang chiteng lak ah anu leh apa, kop sagih zel; sa siang lou lak ah anu leh apa chiat toh kop nih zel, na kiang ah na pi ding ahi. 3Tung a leng vasa lak ah leng, anu leh apa chiat, kop sagih zel in; leitung a chi khah ding a hinsak ding in. 4Ni sagih in asam lai a, huai khit chiang in leitung ah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli sung vuah ka zusak ding a; ka bawl thil hing chiteng leitung a kipan ka hihmang ding,” achi hi. 5Noah in Toupa'n akiang a thu apiak tengteng ahi bangbang in ahihta hi. 6Leitung a tuichim ahong tun lai in, Noah kum zaguk a upa ahita hi. 7Tuichim 8Sa siang lak ah leng, sa siang lou lak ah leng, vasa lak ah leng, leitung a bokvak a pai chiteng lak ah leng, 9Pathian in Noah kiang a thu apiak bang in, anu leh apa chiat, akopkop in, Noah kiang ah long ah alut uhi. 10Huan ni sagih nung in leitung ah tuichim atungta hi. 11Noah kum zaguk ahih kum, akha nihna, ani sawm-le-sagih ni in, huai ni mah in tui thuk zapi nak tengteng ahong puakzak a, van tohlette leng hong kihongta uhi. 12Ni sawmli leh zan sawmli sung teng leitung ah vuahpi azuta hi. 13Huai ni mah in long ah Noah leh Noah tapate Shem, Ham, Japheth leh Noah zi alut ua, atapate zi thumte leng akiang ah alut uhi.

GENESIS 7: 14Amaute alut ua, sa chiteng amau chi omdan dungzui zel in, ganhing leitung a bokvak a pai chiteng amau chi omdan dungzui zel in, vasa chiteng, amau chi omdan dungzui zel in, vasa chiteng, kha nei chiteng leng alut uhi. 15Sa tengteng hinna hatna pai himhimte, akopkop in Noah kiang ah long ah alut uhi. 16Alutte Pathian in akiang a thu apiak bang in, sa tengteng lak a anu leh apa zel in alut uhi. Huchi in Toupa'n amah akhakkhumta hi. 17Leitung ah ni sawmli sung teng tuichim atung a; tui ahong khang a, long alam a, leitung ah adomkangta hi. 18Tui ahong om zuazua a, leitung ah akhan in ahong khang a, tui tung ah long akilam hi. 19Leitung ah tui nakpi in ahong om zuazua a; van nuai a tang sang tengtengte atum khin vekta hi. 20Tong sawm-le-nga hial a sang in tui ahong om a; tangte tupmang in a-omta uhi. 21Lei a tang thei sa chiteng, vasate, gante, gamsate, ganhing lei a bokvak a pai chitengte, michih tengte toh asi khin vek uhi. 22Anak ua hinna kha hatna omna tengteng, gam a om tengteng asi khin vek uhi. 23Leitung a thil hing chiteng omte, mite, gante, ganhingte, tung a leng vasate toh hihmang in a-om ua; lei a kipan hihman in a-omta ua, long sung a om Noah leh akiang a omte kia hawi in a-om uhi. 24Ni za-le-sawmnga sung teng leitung ah tui avung hi.

GENESIS 8: 1Huan Pathian in Noah leh long sung a akiang a thil hing chiteng leh ganta om tengteng atheigige a; Pathian in leitung ah huih anungsak a, tui ahong dai panta hi. 2Tui thukpi nakte leh van tohlette hong kikhakta ua, van a kipan vuah leng theusak ahita. 3Lei a kipan tui akiam giaigiai a; ni za-le-sawmnga nung in tui hong tawm deuhta a, 4akha sagihna ani sawm-le-sagih ni in Ararat tang ah long ahong kinga hi. 5Akha sawmna tan in tui akiam giaigiai zel a; akha sawmna ani khat ni in mualvumte akimuta hi. 6Ni sawmli nung in hichi ahong hi a, Noah in abawl long tohlet ahongta hi. 7Va-ak khat akhahkhia a, leitung a kipan tui akan khit masiah huai va-ak avial lenlen hi. 8Tuichim Tawpna 9Himahleh vakhu in tukna ding himhim amu kei a, akiang ah long ah akik nawn a; tui lah leitung pumpi ah a-om lai ngal a. Polam ah akhut agolhkhia a, long sung ah akiang ah ana lalut nawn hi. 10Ni sagih dang angak lai a; long a kipan vakhu akhahkhe nawn hi. 11Nitaklam in akiang ah vakhu ahong lut nawn a; ngai in, amuk in olive nah khat ahon tuah hi. Noah in leitung ah tui atawmta chih atheita hi. 12Ni sagih dang angak nawn a; vakhu akhahkhe nawn a; akiang ah hong kik nawn kei hi. 13Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum zaguk-le-khatna, akha khatna, ani khat ni in, leitung a kipan tui akangta hi. Noah in long khuhna akoihsuan a, a-en a; ngai in, leitung ahulta hi. 14Akha nihna ani sawmnih-le-sagih ni in leitung ahulta hi. 15Pathian in Noah kiang ah thu agen a; 16“Long a kipan nang pawt inla, na zi leh na tapate leh na tapate' zite leng na kiang ah pawt uhen.

GENESIS 8: 17Sa tengteng lak a thil hing chiteng na ompihte, vasate, gante, leitung a bokvak a pai ganhing chitengte toh na kiang ah pikhia in, leitung a chiphatak a chi tampi suang a ahong puntheihna ding un,” achi hi. 18Noah apawt a, atapate leh azi leh atapate' zite leng akiang ah apawt uhi. 19Sa chiteng, ganhing chiteng, vasa chiteng, leitung a tang thei peuhmahte amau chi omdan dungzui zel in long a kipan apawtta uhi.Noah Kithoihna 20Noah in Toupa a ding in maitam adoh a; sa siang chiteng lak leh vasa siang chiteng lak a kipan ala a, maitam ah halmang pumpiaknate alanta hi. 21Toupa'n huai gim namtui aza a; Toupa'n alungsim in, “Mite ziak in leitung ka hamsiat nawn kei ding, mite lungsim ngaihtuahnate lah tuailai ahih a kipan gilou ahi ngal ua. Tua ka gawt bang in thil hing chiteng leng ka gawt nawn kei ding. 22“Leitung a-om lai tengbuhtuh leh buhlakte, khovot leh kholumte,nipi leh phalbite, sun leh zanteabei kei ding,” achi hi.

GENESIS 9: 1Huan Pathian in Noah leh atapate avualzawl a, akiang uah, “Chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, lei hon luahdim un. 2Leitung a sa chiteng leh tung a leng vasa chiteng in nou kihtakna leh lauhna anei ding uh. Hiaite leh lei a bokvak a pai tengteng leh tuipi a ngasa tengteng na khut ua piak ahita uhi. 3Thil hing tang thei chitengte nou a ding in nek ding ahi ding ua; anteh hing ka hon piak bang in bangkim ka hon pe vek hi. 4Himahleh sa, ahinna sisan toh zaw na nekhawm ding uh ahi kei. 5Na hinna sisan phu ka la ngeingei ding. Sa chiteng lak ah ka la ding a; mi lak ah leng. Michih asanggamte uh lak ah, mite hinna phu ka la chiat ding. 6“Mi sisan suahmi kuapeuh,huai mi mah in ama sisan asuah ding,Pathian batpih amihing bawl ahi ngal a. 7“Nou chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, ta leh nau tampi nei unla, leitung ah hong pung un,” achi hi. 8Pathian in Noah kiang leh akiang a om atapate kiang ah, 9“Ngai un, kei mahmah in na kiang uah leh na nung ua na suante uh kiang ah leng ka thukhun ka hihkip hi. 9Noah Toh Pathian Thukhun 10Na kiang ua om thil hing chiteng, na ompih uh vasate, gante, na ompih uh lei a sa chitengte kiang ah leng; long a kipan hong pawt tengteng, lei a sa chiteng kiang nangawn ah. 11Na kiang uah ka thukhun ka hihkip ding; sa tengteng leng tuichim a hihman in a-om nawn kei ding ua; lei hihse ding in tuichim atung nawn kei ding,” achi hi.

GENESIS 9: 12Pathian mah in, “Kei leh nou leh na kiang ua thil hing chiteng omte kal a, suan tawp nei lou a omte a ding in, hiai ka thukhun chiamtehna ahi ding hi. 13Meipi ah ka sakhituihup ka zamsak a, huai kei leh lei kal a thukhun chiamtehna ding ahi. 14Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, leitung a meipi ka kaisak in meipi ah sakhituihup akimu ding hi. 15Kei leh nou leh sa tengteng lak a thil hing chitengte kal a, ka thukhun om ka theigige ding. Sa tengteng hihmang ding in tui alet nawn kei ding hi. 16Meipi a sakhituihup azam chiang in, Pathian leh leitung a sa om tengteng lak a thil hing chiteng kal a tangtawn thukhun om ka theihgige theihna ding in ka en zel ding,” achi hi. 17Pathian mah in Noah kiang ah, “Hiai kei leh leitung a sa om tengteng kal a ka thukhun hihkip chiamtehna ahi,” achi nawn hi.Noah Leh Atapate 18Noah tapa long a kipan pawtte Shem, Ham leh Japheth ahi uhi (Kanaan pa Ham ahi). 19Hiai mi thumte Noah tapate ahi ua, amaute a kipan pawtte'n leitung pumpi azelsuak uhi. 20Louneimi in Noah ahong om pan a, grephuan abawl hi. 21Uain adawn a, akham a; apuanin ah alumkhialta hi. 22Kanaan pa Ham in apa lumkhial amu a, inpua a om a-unau nihte ava hilh hi. 23Shem leh Japheth in puan ala ua, aliang ua kizawn in anung pai ua, apa uh lumkhial ava khuh uhi. Amai uh lehlam nga in apa uh lumkhial amu kei uhi. 24Noah, uain kham ahong halh a, atung a atapa naupangpen in ahihdan ahon theita hi. 25“Kanaan hamsiat in om hen.Asanggamte sikhate sikhaahi ding,” achi hi. 26“Shem ToupaPathian phat in om hen.Asikha in Kanaan om hen. 27Pathian in Japheth hihlian henla,Asikha in Kanaan om hen,” achi lai hi. 28Tuichim tun nung in Noah kum zathum-le-sawmnga adam hi. 29Noah damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-sawmnga ahi a; huchi in asita hi.

GENESIS 10: 1Hiaite Noah tapa Shem, Ham leh Japheth suante ahi uh. GENESIS 12: 12Pathian In Abram Asam 13Nang ziak a hoihtak a ka omtheihna ding in leh nang vang a ka hintheihna ding in, hehpih in asanggamnu ka hi chi zel in,” achi hi. 14Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta a Abram alutleh, Aiguptate'n numei amu ua, amel hoih ana sa mahmah uhi. 15Pharaoh miliante'n leng amu ua, Pharaoh kiang ah ahoihdan agen uhi. Na tung ah thil hoih lou ahihta ngal ua. Tu in hehpih in na pa Pathian sikhate tatlekna ngaidam in,’ achi, chi in va gen un,” achi hi. Akiang a agentak un Joseph akap hi. 18Asanggamte leng ava hoh ua, ama ah abokkhup chiat ua, “Ngai in, na sikhate ka hi uh,” achi uhi. 19Joseph in akiang uah, “Lau kei un. Pathian sik a om ka hi a hia? 20Nou zaw ka tung ah thil gilou hih lungsim na pu ua; himahleh tuni in mi tampi hing leh dam a humbitna ding a thil hoih suahsak Pathian lungsim ahi zaw hi. 21Huaiziak in tu in lau kei un. Nou leh na taneu chikchikte uh ka hon vak ding,” achi hi. Huchi in amau alungmuan a, kamsiamtak in ahoupih hi.Joseph Sihna 22Joseph, amah leh apa inkuanpihte toh Aigupta gam ah ateng ua, Joseph kum za-le-sawmkhat adam hi. 23Joseph in Ephraim ta, tusawn thum chiang amu hi. Manasseh tapa Makir tate leng Joseph phei tung a khanglian ngen ahi uh. 24Joseph in asanggamte kiang ah, “Si ding ka hita hi.

GENESIS 50: Himahleh Pathian in ahong veh ngeingei ding a, hiai gam a kipan hon pikhia in, Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a kichiam a, piak ding achiamsa gam ah ahon pitou ding,” achi hi. 25Joseph in Israel suante akichiamsak a, “Pathian in ahong veh ngeingei ding a, hiai a kipan ka guhte na potou ding uh ahi,” achi hi. 26Huchi in Joseph kum za-le-sawmkhat a upa ahih in asita hi. Aluang muat thei lou ding in abawl ua, Aigupta gam ah hankuang sung ah akoih uhi.

JOSHUA 1: 1Kanaan Gam La Ding In Toupa'n Joshua Thu Apia 3Mosi kiang a ka gensa bang in na khepek ua na sikna peuhmah uh ka hon pe vek ding. 4Gamdai a pan leh hiai Lebanon tang a pan lui lianpi Euphrates Luipi pha a, Hitte gam tengteng, nitumna lam a tuipi zatak pha in na gam uh ahi ding. 5Na damsung teng kuamah himhim in hon nangzou kei ding. Mosi kiang a ka om bang in, nang kiang ah leng ka om ding hi. K'on zuausan kei dia, pai leng k'on paisan sam kei ding hi. 6Hattak leh hangsantak in om in; asuante uh kichiam a piak ka na chiamsa gam, hiaite luahsak ding na hi ngal a. 7Ka sikha Mosi in dan tengteng zui dia thu hon piak zui tinten ding in hattak leh hangsantak in om peuhmah phot in. Na paina teng a na lamzan zel theihna ding in na taklam ah hiam, na veilam ah hiam pialsan het ke'n. 8Hiai Dan Bu in na kam pawtsan het kei hen. Hiai a thu kigelh tengteng na zuih tinten theihna ding in sun leh zan in na ngaihtuah zaw ding ahi. Huchi in na lampite na tuahphasak dia, na hong lamzang ding hi. 9Thu ka hon pia hilou hiam? Hattak leh hangsantak in om in. Lau ke'nla, lunglel sam ke'n, Toupa na Pathian na paina teng ah na kiang a om ding ahi,” achi hi.Joshua In Mipite Thu Apia 10Joshua in mipi heutute thu apia a, 11“Giahphual va sik unla, mipite kiang ah, ‘Nek ding sutuah dih ua, ni thum sung a Toupa na Pathian un gam luah dia ahon piak luah ding a Jordan lui kan ding na hih ziak un,’ ” chi in thu ahon pia hi.

JOSHUA 1: 12Reubente, Gadte leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte kiang ah Joshua in, 13“Toupa na Pathian un khawlna ahon pia a, hiai hon pe ding chi a Toupa sikha Mosi in thu hon piak theigige un. 14Na zite uh, na taneu chikchikte leh na ganhonte uh zaw Jordan lui gal a Mosi in gam hon na piak ah a-om ding uh. Nou mihat leh hangsan teng kigalthuamsa in na pai masa ding ua, na unaute uh na panpih ding ua, 15Toupa'n na unaute uh noute bangmah a khawlna apiak a, Toupa na Pathian un hon gam piak amaute'n leng aluah mateng uh. Huchi in Toupa sikha Mosi in Jordan lui gal, nisuahna lam gam nou a tuam ding a hon na piakna lam ah na kik nawn ding ua, na luah ding uh,” achi hi. 16Amau, “Hih dia na hon thupiak tengteng ka hih ding uh, n'on sawlna teng ah leng ka pai ding uh. 17Bang lam peuh a Mosi thu ka zuih bang un, nang thu leng ka zui ding uh. Mosi kiang a Toupa na Pathian a-om bang in nang kiang ah leng om peuhmah phot hen. 18Kuapeuh na thupiak kalh a, hel a, thu na piak peuhmah zui nuam lou zaw hihlup ding ahi. Hattak leh hangsantak in om peuhmah phot in,” chi in Joshua adawng uhi.

JOSHUA 2: 1Huan Nun tapa Joshua in, “Agam leh Jeriko khua va en mah dih ua,” chi in mi nih Sittim a pan asim a enkhe ding asawl hi. Ava hoh ua, kizuak khat, amin Rahab inn ah ava lut ua, huai ah ava zintung uhi. 2“Ngai in, tuzan in gam enkhe ding in Israel suante ahong uh,” chi in Jeriko kumpipa hilh in a-om hi. 2Joshua In Jeriko Ah Enkhe mite Asawl 3Jeriko kumpipa'n, “Na inn a hong tung mikhualte hon pekhia in. Gam pumpi enkhe ding a hong ahi uh,” chi ding in Rahab kiang ah mi asawl hi.Enkhia Mi Nihte Humbitna 4Numei in huai mi nihte api a, asel a, akiang uah, “Hi, ka kiang ah mite ahong ngei ngut ua, himahleh koi a pan hong pai ahi ua, chih zaw ka thei kei. 5Huan hichi ahong hi a, khomial, kulh kongpi khak hun lai in huai mite apawtkhe nawnta uh. Koilam ah ahia apai uh ka theita kei hi. Delh meng le uchin, na pha lai ding uh,” achi hi. 6Himahleh inn tung ah apitou a, inn tung a ziza kung siatkhawm lak a sel khin lah ahi ngal a. 7Mite'n Jordan lui lam ah, agalkaina tan in ava delh ua; adelh mite apawtkhiaktak un kulh kongpi akhak uhi.Enkhemite Lohchinna 8Alup ma un inn tung ah akiang uah ava hohtou hi. 9Akiang uah, “Hiai gam Toupa'n nou ahon peta, na lauhhuaina un hon delhkhum a, hiai gam a teng tengteng na ma uah azul khin uh, chih ka thei hi. 10Aigupta gam a pan na hong pawtkhiak un Toupa'n Tuipi San ahon hihkangsak a, Jordan lui gal a Amorte kumpi nih: Sihon leh Og tung a na hihdante uh, huchibang a na hihmangdante uh lah ka na zata ngal ua.

JOSHUA 2: 11Huai ka na zaktak un, ka lungtangte uh azul khin a, noute ziak a lau lou himhim a-om kei hi. Toupa na Pathian u lah tunglam van ah leh nuailam lei ah Pathian ahi.Enkhe mite Leh Rahab Thukhun 12“Tu in na tung uah ka hehpihna ka langsakta hi, nou leng ka pa inkote tung ah na hehpihna uh langsak sam un. 13Ka nu leh ka pa, ka sanggam pasalte, ka sanggam numeite leh aneih teng uh hawi unla, sihna lak a pan ka hinna uh hon humbitsak ding in Toupa min in hehpih in ka kiang ah kichiam unla, chiamtehna dik hon pia un,” achi hi. 14Mite'n akiang ah, “Ka thilhih uh na genkhiak kei dingleh na sih tang in ka si ding uh. Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n gam ahon piak hun chiang in, ka hon hehpih ding ua, na tung ah muanhuaitak in ka hih ding uh,” achi uhi. 15Tohlet ah khauhual azankhesuk a; khopi kulhbaang khou a a-inn om ahi a, huan amah kulhbaang tung a teng ahi. 16Akiang uah, “Tang lam zuan in pai un, huchi lou in zaw nou hon delhte'n ahon mu kha ding uh. Huai ah ni thum sung va kibu un; nou hon delhte ahong kik nawn masiah uh. Huai zoh chiang in na pai nawn na ding uh,” achi hi. 17Mite'n akiang ah, “Kichiamna a na hon kichiamsakna ah zaw dembei ka hi ding uh. 18Ngai in, hiai gam ka hong lut chiang un na hon khiakna tohlet ah hiai khau san na gak belh in. Insung ah na kiang ah na pa, na nu, na sanggam teng leh na pa inkote tengteng pilut vek in.

JOSHUA 2: 19Huan hichi ahi ding a, na inn kongpi a pan kholak a pawtkhe peuhmah alutung ah asisan a-om dia, kou ahihleh moh in ka om kei ding uh. Kuapeuh insung a na kiang a om peuhmah atung ua khutkhak ahihleh, ka lutung uah asisan uh a-om ding hi. 20Himahleh ka thilhih uh na genkhiakleh na hon kichiamsakna ah moh in ka om kei ding uh,” achi uhi. 21Ama'n, “Na thu bang zel uh hi hen,” achi a; huchi in amau akhakhia a, apaita uhi. Tohlet ah khau san agakden hi.Enkhe mite Paikikna 22Apai ua, huai tang ava tung ua, huai ah ni thum, amau delhte akik nawn masiah uh ava om uhi. Adelh mite'n lamtawn in azong ua, himahleh amuzou kei uh. 23Huai mi nihte akik nawn ua, huai tang a pan apaisuk ua, agalkah ua, Nun tapa Joshua kiang atung ua; atung ua thil tung tengteng ahilh uhi. 24Joshua kiang ah, “Toupa'n agam pumpi i khut uah ahon na pe petmah ve, huai kia leng hilou, huai gam a tengte i ma uah azul khin uh,” achi uhi.

JOSHUA 3: 1Huan Joshua zingkhang in athou a, Israel suan tengteng toh Shittim a pan akisuan ua, Jordan lui atung uhi. Agalkah ma un huai ah agiak uhi. 2Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni thum nung in heutute'n giahphual ava tawn vialvial uhi. 3“Toupa na Pathian uh thukhun bawm leh siampute, Levi chite'n azawn uh na muh chiang un na omna ua kipan kisuan unla, na zui ding uh ahi. 3Israel Mipite'n Jordan Akan Uh 4Himahleh nou toh akal tehna tong sangnih vel ahi ding ahi. Naih kei unla, huchi in na paina ding lampi na theithei ding uhi. Hiai lampi lah tuma lam in na tawn ngei ngal kei ua,” chi in mipite thu apia uhi. 5Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Kihihsiangthou un, zingchiang a Toupa'n na lak ua thillamdang mahmah hih ding ahi,” achi hi. 6Joshua in siampute kiang ah, “Thukhun bawm zawng unla, mipite ma ah galkah un,” achi hi. Huchi in thukhun bawm azawng ua, mipite ma ah apaita uhi.Joshua Kiang A Toupa Thu 7 Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Mosi kiang a ka om bang in na kiang ah ka om ding, chih atheihtheihna ding un, tuni in Israel tengteng mitmuh in ka hon pahtawi pan ding hi. 8Thukhun bawm zawng siampute, Jordan lui gei na tun chiang un, Jordan lui ah dingden un, chi in thu pia in,” achi hi.Mipite Kiang A Joshua Thu 9Joshua in Israel suante kiang ah, “Hong pai unla, Toupa na Pathian uh thu hong ngaikhia un,” achi hi. 10Joshua in, “Hiai ah Pathian hing na lak uah a-om a, na ma uah Kanaante, Hitte, Hivte, Perizte, Girgaste, Amorte leh Jebuste adelhkhe ngeingei ding hi. 11Ngai un, leitung pumpi Toupa thukhun bawm in na ma uah Jordan lui akan hi.

JOSHUA 3: 12Israel namte lak a mi sawm-le-nih, nam chih sik in mi khat zel telkhia un. 13Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa leitung pumpi Toupa bawm zawng siampute khepek Jordan tui a akingaktak in, saklam a pan Jordan tui hong luangte akitat dia; ahong kiching venvon ding,” achi hi.Jordan Lui Kanna 14Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipite Jordan lui kan dia apuanin ua kipan apawt lai un, mipite ma ah thukhun bawm zawng siampute apai uhi. 15Bawm zawngte Jordan lui ava tung ua, bawm zawng siampute khe in tui gei asiktak in, buhlak sung teng Jordan lui a kuang tengteng ah tui alet gige hi. 16Saklam a pan tuipi luang lai akhawlta a, gamla kuamtak a Zarethan gam chin a Adam ah ahong kiching hi. Arabah tuipi, Chi Tuipi lam a luangsuk lai akitat geih a; huchi in Jeriko khozawntak ah mipite agalkahta uhi. 17Jordan lui lai ah Toupa thukhun bawm zawng siampute leihul ah adingh ua, mipi tengteng Jordan lui agalkah vek uhi.

JOSHUA 4: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, anam pumpi ua Jordan lui agalkah siang nung un, Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, 2“Mipite lak a mi sawm-le-nih, nam chih a mi khat zel telkhia inla, 3akiang uah, Jordan lui lai, siampute dinna laitak a suangte sawm-le-nih la unla, pophei unla, giahphual, tuzan a na giahna ding uah koih un, chi in thu pia in,” achi hi. 4Theihgigena Suangte Phuh Ahi 5Joshua in akiang uah, “Toupa na Pathian uh bawm ma ah Jordan lui lai ah galkah unla, Israel suante anam zah zel in, michih in suang khat chiat pua hen. 6Hiaite na lak uah chiamtehna ahong hi ding a, tunung chiang in na tate un, hiai suangte bang na chihna uh ahia? chi a ahon dot chiang un, 7Nou akiang uah, Toupa thukhun bawm ma a Jordan tuite ahong kan tak ziak in ahi. Jordan akan lai un, Jordan tuite ahong kitat a ahi. Hiai suangte Israel suante'n tangtawn a atheihgigena ding uh ahi, na chi ding uh,” achi hi. 8Israel suante'n Joshua thupiak bang in ahih ua, Israel suante'n anam zah zel in, Jordan lui lai a suang sawm-le-nih ala ua; agiahphual uah, apophei ua, huai ah akoih uhi. 9Thukhun bawm zawng siampute dinna laitak, Jordan lui lai ah Joshua in huai suang sawm-le-nihte aphut a; huaite tuni tan in a-om lai uhi. 10Mosi in Joshua thu ana piak tengteng bang a Toupa'n mipite kiang a hih dia Joshua thu apiak ahihzoh vek mateng uh siampu bawm zawngte Jordan lui lai ah adingh nilouh uhi. Mipite akinoh ua, agalkahta uhi.Jordan Lui Kante Kivolhdan 11Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipi tengteng agalkah siang vek nung un, Toupa bawm leh siampute leng mipi mitmuh in agalkahta uhi.

JOSHUA 4: 12Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte Mosi in akiang ua ana gen khitsa bang in, Israel suante ma ah kigalthuam in agalkah uhi. 13Galvan a kivan dimdiam mi singli vel galdou ding in Jeriko phaizang ah Toupa ma ah agalkah uhi. 14Huai ni in Toupa'n Israel tengteng mitmuh in Joshua atawisang a; Mosi alauh mah bang un adamsung teng in amah alau uhi. 15Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah thu agen a: 16“Siampute, thu theihpihna bawm zawngte Jordan lui a pan hong pawt ding in thu pia in,” achi hi. 17Joshua in siampute, “Jordan lui a pan hong pawtta un,” chi in thu apia hi. 18Huan hichi ahong hi a, siampute, Toupa thukhun bawm zawngte Jordan lui lai a pan ahong pawt ua, siampute khete'n leihul asiktak in, Jordan tuite aluan ngeina bang un ahong luang nawn ua, ama a mah bang in akuang ah aluanglet nawn hi.Gilgal A Giahphual Bawlna 19Mipite akha khatna, ani sawm ni in Jordan lui a pan apawt ua, Jeriko suahlam pang Gilgal ah giahphual asatta uhi. 20Jordan lui a pan suang sawm-le-nih apuakkhiak uh, Joshua in Gilgal ah aphut hi. 21Israel suante kiang ah, “Tunung chiang a na suante un apate uh kiang a, hiai suangte bang chihna ahia? chi a hon dot chiang un, 22‘Israelte'n Jordan lui leihul ah agalkah ua ahi, chi in na suante uh na theisak ding uhi.’ 23Toupa na Pathian un nidanglai a Tuipi San i galkah masiah ua, i ma ua ana kangtatsak mah bang in, Toupa na Pathian un Jordan tuite na galkah masiah uh na ma uah akangtatsak a ahi. 24Lei a nam chiteng in Toupa khut ana hat ngei, chih atheih ua, Toupa na Pathian uh tangtawn a alauhtheihna ding un,” chi in agen hi.

JOSHUA 5: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jordan lui khen suahlam a om Amorte kumpipa tengteng leh tuipi gei a om Kanaan gam kumpipa tengtengte'n, agalkah masiah uh Toupa'n Jordan tuite Israel suante ma ah akangtatsak, chih ana zak un, Israel suante ziak in alungtang uh ana zul khin a, lauthawng lou himhim a-om kei uhi. 2Huai lai in Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Temta hiam kibawl inla, Israel suante zek anihveina ding in sumsak in,” achi hi. 3Joshua in temta hiamte akibawl a, Israel suante Gibeth Haraloth ah azek uh asumsak hi. 4Joshua in azeksumna ziak hiai ahi: Aigupta gam a pan pawt tengteng, pasal galdoumi tengteng Aigupta gam a pan apawtkhiak nung un lamkal a gamdai a asih khit tak ziak uh ahi. 5Gilgal A Zeksumna 6Toupa aw angaihkhiak nop louh ziak ua mipi tengteng, Aigupta gam a pan hong pawt galdou mite tan hihman a a-om vek tan un Israel suante gamdai ah kum sawmli avialvak uhi. Toupa'n amau pi-le-pute kiang a nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam kichiam a piak ana chiam, huai gam mu lou ding in akiang uah Toupa ana kichiamta hi. 7Asuante uh amau sik a akhanletsakte Joshua in azek uh asumsak hi. Lamkal a azek uh sum ahih louh ziak in zeksum louh ana hi him uhi. 8Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipi tengteng zek asum khit un, adam mateng uh amau giahphual chiat uah a-om uhi. 9Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Tuni in Aiguptate'n nou hon muhsitna uh noumau a pan ka khukmangta,” achi hi. Huchi in tuni tan in huai mun Gilgal achi uhi. 10Israel suante'n Gilgal ah giahphual asat ua; Jeriko Phaizang ah huai kha, ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuang alui uhi. 11Paikan khit azing mah in huai gam a tanghou silngou soh louh leh vaimim kan ane uhi.

JOSHUA 5: 12Huai gam a buh anek ni zing ua pan manna aketa kei a; Israel suante'n manna leng amu nawn kei uhi. Huai kum in Kanaan gam a buh-le-bal ane zawta uhi.Joshua Leh Namsau Tawi Pasal Khat 13Huan Jeriko kho kiangchin a Joshua a-om lai in adak a, a-entou a, ngai in, hichi ahong hi a, amazawn chin ah mi khat anamsau phawisa tawi in ana ding hi. Joshua in ava naih a, akiang ah, “Kou lam a pang na hi hia, ka melmate uh lam a pang?” achi hi. 14Ama'n, “Hilou e, Toupa sepaihte heutu dia hong pai ka hi zaw,” achi hi. Huchi in lei ah Joshua abokkhup a, amah abia a, akiang ah, “Ka toupa'n asikha kiang ah bang gen ding nei ahia?” achi hi. 15Toupa sepaihte heutu in Joshua kiang ah, “Na khepek a pan na khedap phel in. Na dinna mun siangthou ahi,” achi a; huchi in Joshua in aphelta hi.

JOSHUA 6: 1Jeriko khua Israel suante ziak in akikhak bikbek a; kuamah apawt kei ua, kuamah leng alut kei uh. 2Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “En in, Jeriko leh akumpipa uh leh amihat hangsante uh na khut ah ka hon pe khinta hi. 3Galdoumi tengteng in khopi kimvel in khatvei na va velsuak phot ding uh. Huchibang in ni guk sung na hih ding uh ahi. 4Siampu sagih in bawm malam ah belampa kii pengkul sagih atawi ding ua, ani sagih ni in khopi sagihvei na velsuak ding ua, siampute'n pengkul amut ding uh. 5Huan hichi ahi ding a, belampa kii amutging uh na zak chiang un, mipi tengteng ngaihtak in kikou uhen. Huchi in khopi kulhbaang achim dia, mipi amau mazawn chiat ah apaitou ding uh,” achi hi. 6Jeriko Kulh Sualna 7Ama'n mipite kiang ah, “Pai zel unla, khopi velsuak un, mi kigalthuamte Toupa bawm malam ah pai zel uhen,” achi hi.Jeriko Kulh Kimvelna 8Hichi ahong hita a, Joshua in mipite kiang a thu agen khit in Toupa ma a belampa kii pengkul sagih tawi siampu sagihte apai zel ua, pengkul amut ua; Toupa thukhun bawm in azui hi. 9Mi kigalthuamte pengkul mut siampute ma ah apai ua, nungdal mite'n bawm amasuan ua, siampute'n pai kawm in pengkul amut uhi. 10Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Kikou kei unla, na aw uh leng zak hi kei hen. Kikou dia thu ka hon piak ni atun mateng na kam ua pan thu pawt kei hen. Huai hun chiang in na kikou ding uh,” chi in thu apia hi. 11Toupa bawm khopi khatvei velh in avelsuaksak a; giahphual ah apai ua, giahphual ah agiak nawn uhi. 12Joshua zingkhang in athou a, siampute'n Toupa bawm azawng uhi. 13Toupa bawm ma ah belampa kii pengkul sagih tawi siampu sagihte apai ua, pengkul amut uhi.

JOSHUA 6: Ama uah mi kigalthuamte apai ua; nungdalte'n Toupa bawm ahon masuan ua, siampute'n apai kawm un pengkul amut uhi. 14Ani nih ni in khopi khatvei avelsuak nawn ua, agiahphual uah akik nawn uh. Huchibang in ni guk ahih uhi. 15Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in zingkhang, phalvak in athou ua, ahihdan ngei mah un sagihvei avelsuak ua; huai ni kia in khopi sagihvei avelsuak uhi. 16Huan hichi ahong hi a, asagihveina a siampute'n pengkul amuttak un Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Kikou un: Toupa'n khopi ahon pe khinta hi. 17Khopi leh asung a thil om tengteng Toupa hamsiat ahi. Rahab kizuaknu kia, amah leh a-insung a akiang a om tengteng bel i misawlte uh ana sel ziak in hinghawi ding ahi. 18Nou zaw hamsiat thilte a pan kihuikhe hiau un, huchi lou in zaw, hamsiat thilte la in noumau mah hamsiat in na omloh kha ding uhi. Israelte giahphual hamsiat a omsak in na buaisak kha ding uhi. 19Dangkasik, dangka-eng, dal leh sik tui-um belsuan teng ahihleh Toupa a tuam ahi vek hi. Toupa sum in akoih ding ahi,” achi hi.Jeriko Kulh Lakna 20Mipite akikou ua, siampute'n pengkul amut uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipite'n pengkul ging azaktak un, ngaihtak in akikou ua, kulhbaang achimta hi. Huchi in mipite amazawn chiat uah apaitou ua, khopi ah alut ua, khopi alata uhi. 21Khopi sung a mi tengteng, numei leh pasal, atek-akhang, bawngtal, belam leh sabiltung teng namsau in asatlum vek uhi.Rahab Inkuan Hotdamna 22Joshua in mi nih, gam va enkhete kiang ah, “Huai kizuaknu inn ah va lut unla, akiang a na kichiamsa bang un huai numei leh aneih teng hon pikhia un,” achi hi.

JOSHUA 6: 23Enkhe mi tangvalte ava lut ua, Rahab, anu leh pa, asangamte leh aneih teng ahon pikhia ua, atanau teng leng ahon pikhia ua; Israelte giahphual polam ah a-omsak uhi. 24Khopi leh asung a thil om teng mei in ahal vek ua; dangkasik, dangka-eng, sum-eng leh sik tui-um belsuan teng kia Toupa' inn a sumkoihna ah akoih uhi. 25Himahleh Joshua in Jeriko khua enkhe dia amisawlte ana humbit ziak in, Rahab kizuaknu leh aneih teng leh apa inkuante Joshua in ahinghawi vek a; Israelte lak ah tuni tan in ateng lai uhi.Jeriko Hamsiatna(1 Kum 16.34) 26Huai lai in Joshua in,Hiai Jeriko khopi hon lam nawn peuhmah Toupa ma ah hamsiat in om hen.Asuangphum phummi ta masa leh akulhbaang kongpitetungkhemi ta tumpen leng hamsiat in om hen,chi in amaute ahilh chiatchiat hi. 27Joshua kiang ah Toupa a-om a; gam pumpi ah amin hong thangta hi.

JOSHUA 7: 1Himahleh Israel suante hamsiat thilte ah ahong talekta ua, Judah nam a Zerah tapa Zabdi, huai tapa Karmi, huai tapa Akan in hamsiat thilte ana la a, Israel suante tung ah Toupa ahehta hi. 2Joshua in Jeriko a pan Bethel suahlam Beth-Aven chin a om Ai ah mi asawl a, akiang uah, “Va hohtou unla, gam va enkhia un,” chi in agen hi. Mite ava hohtou ua, Ai khua ava enkhia uhi. 3Joshua kiang ah akik nawn ua, akiang ah, “Mi tengteng hohtou chitchiat kei uhen. Mi sangnih hiam sangthum hiam va hohtou uhenla, Ai khua dou le uh. Mi tengteng va hihgim chitchiat ding ahi kei; tawmchik kia lah ahi ngal ua,” achi uhi.Israelte Vuallelhna 4Huchi in mipi lak a mi sangthum huai ah ahohtou ua, Aite ma ah ahong taikek uhi. 5Aite'n mi sawmthum-le-guk ana that ua; kulhbaang kongpi chin a pan Sebarim pha hial in adelh ua, akumsukna ah athat uhi. Huaiziak in mite lungtang azul khin a, tui bang ahong hita hi. 6Joshua in apuante abotkek a, Toupa bawm ma ah amah leh Israel upate amai ua lei si in nitaklam tan in abokkhup uhi. Alu uah leivui abuak uhi. 7Akan Khelhna 8Toupa aw, hichi a melmate delh a Israelte ataikek mawk uh bang ka lohta dia oi? 9Kanaante leh hiai gam a tengte'n aza ding ua, ahon um ding ua, lei a pan ka min uh hihmangthang ding ahita ve ua. Na min thupi bang na chihta dia le?” achi hi.Joshua Pathian Dawnna 10 Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Thou in, Bang achia bokkhup nilouh na hia? 11Israelte'n thil ahihkhial ua; zuih dia ka piak ka thukhun ah atalek ua, hamsiat thilte ala ua, agu nalai ua, asim iim behlap ua, amau van lak mahmah ah asimsel uhi.

JOSHUA 7: 12Huaiziak in ahi, Israel suante'n amelmate uh zou lou a, amelmate a pan ataikek uh. Hamsiat in a-omta ua ahi. Hamsiat a om pen na lak ua pan na hihmang keileh ka hon ompih nawn kei ding. 13‘Thou inla, mipite hihsiangthou photmai in’. Akiang uah, zingchiang a ding in kihihsiangthou un. Toupa Israelte' Pathian in, Israelte aw, na lak uah hamsiat thil a-om a ahi. Na lak ua pan hamsiat thil na lakmang masiah uh na melmate uh na zou thei kei ding uh. 14Zingchiang in achichi a, na hong kilat ding uh ahi. Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n huai chi a na mat pen anam anam a ahong kilat ding uh ahi. Toupa'n huai nam a na mat pen a-inkuankuan ua ahong kilat nawn ding uh ahi. Toupa'n huai inkuan a na mat pen amalmal a ahong kilat nawn ding ahi. 15Huan hichi ahi ding a, kuapeuh hamsiat thil na la peuhmah, amah leh aneih tengteng mei a hal vek ding ahi. Toupa thukhun atatleksan ziak leh Israelte lak a thil gilou haihuaitak ahih ziak in, achi,” na chi ding hi.Khelhna Zonna Leh Akan Sihna 16Joshua zingkhang in athou a, Israelte achichi in ahong kilangsak a; Judah namte mat ahong hita uh. 17Judah namte ahong kilangsak nawn a; Zerah namte ana man a; Zerahte inkuante amalmal in ahong kilang nawn ua; Zabdi mat ana hita. 18A-inkuante amalmal in hong kilangsak nawn a; huchi in Judah chi a Zerah tapa Zabdi, huai tapa Karmi, huai tapa Akan mat ahong hita hi. 19Joshua in Akan kiang ah, “Ka tapa, Toupa, Israelte' Pathian thupina pia inla; akiang ah kipuang in. Na thilhih hon hilh in. Kei kiang ah iim ke'n,” achi hi.

JOSHUA 7: 20Akan in Joshua adawng a, akiang ah, “Toupa, Israelte' Pathian tung ah thil ka na hihkhialta, hichibang in ahi ka na hih: 21‘Gallak lak a Babulon puan hoihtak leh dangka shekel zanih leh dangka-eng tang shekel sawmnga buk ka mu a, ka enlah lua a, ka lata mai hi. Ngai in, ka puanin sung a lei a selguk ahi a, dangka pen huai nuai ah a-om,’ ” achi hi. 22Joshua in mite asawl a, puanin sung ah ava tai ua; ngai in, apuanin ah selguk ahi ngei a, anuai ah dangka ana om hi. 23Puanin sung a kipan alakhia ua, Joshua leh Israel suan tengteng kiang ah ahon tawi ua; amau Toupa ma ah akoih uhi. 24Joshua leh Israel tengteng in Zerah tapa Akan dangka, puan, dangka-eng tang, atapate, atanute, abawngtal, asabiltungte, abelamte, apuanin leh aneih tengteng toh api ua; Akor Phaizang ah apaitouhpih uhi. 25Joshua in, “Bangziak a hon hihmangbang na hia? Toupa'n tuni in nang leng ahon hihmangbang ding hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Israel tengteng in suang in adeng ua; suang a aden khit un mei in ahal uhi. 26Atung ah suang achiangvum ua, tuni tan in a-om lai hi. Huchi in Toupa'n aheh petmahna akiheisan hi. Huaiziak in huai mun min tuni tan in Akor Phaizang achi lai uhi.

JOSHUA 8: 1Huan Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Lau ke'nla, lunglel sam ke'n. Galdou thei tengteng tonpih inla, thou inla, Ai ah hohtou in. Ngai in, na khut ah Ai kumpipa, amite, akhua leh agam ka hon peta hi. 2Jeriko leh akumpipa uh tung a na hih bang in, Ai khua leh akumpipa tung ah leng na hih ding hi. Gallak leh gante kia nou a tuam ding in nei un. Khopi nung ah guktan un,” achi hi. 3Joshua leh galdou thei tengteng Ai a hohtou ding in akisata ua, huchi in Joshua in mihat hangsan singthum atelkhia a, zan in asawlkheta hi. 4Akiang uah, “Ngai un, khopi nunglam ah khopi dou ding in guktan un. Khopi a pan gamla lua ah pai kei unla, mansa in om gige un. 5Kei leh ka kiang a om tengteng in khopi ka hon zuan ding uh. Huan hichi ahi ding a, tuma a mah bang in hong dou dia ahong pawt chiang un, ama uah i taikek ding uh. 6Hon delh ding in ahong pawt ding ua, khua a pan gamla sim i kihepkhiak tan in. Amau, ‘Tuma a mah bang in i ma uah taikek uh e,’ achi ding ua; ama uah i taikek ding uh. 7Guktanna a pan na hong pawtkhe ding ua, khopi na la ding uhi. Toupa na Pathian un na khut uah ahon pe ding hi. 8Ai Lakna Leh Hihsiatna 9Joshua in asawlkheta a, guktanna mun ah ahoh ua, Ai kho tumlam ah Bethel leh Ai kho kikal ah a-om uh. Joshua bel huai zan in mipite lak ah agiak hi. 10Zingkhang in Joshua athou a, mipite akaikhawm a, amah leh Israel upate mipite ma ah Ai kholam ah ahohtou uhi.

JOSHUA 8: 11Mi tengteng, akiang a galdou thei omte tan in ahohtou ua, ava zuan ua, khopi chin ah ahohtou ua, Ai kho mallam pang ah agiaktou uhi. Ai khua toh akikal uah phaizang a-om hi. 12Mi sangnga atonpih a, khopi tumlam a Bethel leh Ai kho kikal ah aguktansak hi. 13Mite, khopi mallam a sepaihte panmun leh khopi tumlam a guktan mite panmun hoihtak in asep a; Joshua huai zan in phaizang lak ah apai hi. 14Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ai kumpipa'n huai amuhtak in, kintak in zingkhang in athou a, huai khua a mite leh amah leh alawite tengteng toh, amun seh Arabah zawn ah Israelte dou ding in apawtta hi. Himahleh kho nunglam ah amah dou ding in guktanmi a-om uh chih athei kei hi. 15Joshua leh Israel tengteng zohsa bangtak in a-om ua, gamdai lampi ah atai uhi. 16Khopi a om tengteng amau delh ding in asamkhawm ua; huchi in Joshua adelh ua, khopi a pan gamla sim ah khemkhiak in a-omta uhi. 17Ai ah leh Bethel ah Israelte delh lou khat leng a-om kei ua; khopi bangmah lou kal a pawtsan in Israelte adelhta uhi. 18 Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Na teipi tawi Ai kholam nga in lik in. Na khut a hon pe ding ka hi,” achi hi. Joshua in khopi lam nga in ateipi alikta hi. 19Guktan mite a-omna ua kipan ahong paikhe guih ua, akhut azaktak in atai ua, khopi ah alut ua, alata ua; khua ahal pah uhi. 20Aite'n anunglam uh a-et uleh, ngai in, khopi kang meikhu van lam a khutou amu ua, akoilam lam ah leng taitheihna himhim anei kei ua; gamdai a tai delhte'n ana lehdelh uhi. 21Joshua leh Israel tengteng in guktan mite'n khopi alak ua, khopi meikhu paitou amuhtak un akik nawn ua, Ai mite athat uhi.

JOSHUA 8: 22Midangte amau dou ding in khopi sung a pan ahong pawtkhia ua Israelte'n akaltehta uhi. Akhen alangkhat ah, akhen alangkhat ah a-om uhi. Huchi in athat ua, khat lel leng hawi leh khah anei kei uhi. 23Ai kumpipa ahingmat ua, Joshua kiang ah ahon pi uhi. 24Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israelte'n Ai khomi gamlak a om tengteng, gamdai gam a amau ava delhna mun uah namsau in athat vek uhi. Huai khit in Israelte tengteng Ai ah akik nawn ua, asung a om tengteng namsau in ava that uhi. 25Huai ni a si tengteng numei leh pasal singkhat-le-sangnih ahi ua, Ai a pasal teng asi khin vek uhi. 26Joshua in lah ateipi likna khut Ai khomite tengteng ahihman keuhkeuh masiah akaikik kei hi. 27Toupa'n Joshua thu apiak a, hih dia achih bangbang in huai khopi a gante leh gallakte kia Israelte a tuam ding in atangta uhi. 28Joshua in Ai khua ahal a, tangtawn a ding in leivum in abawl a, tuni tan in loihsan ahita. 29Ai kumpipa nitak tan in sing dawn ah akhai a; nitum kuan in Joshua in thu apia a, huchi in aluang sing dawn a pan alakhia ua, khopi kulhbaang kongpi lutna ah apai ua, atung ah suang avum ua, tuni tan in a-om lai hi.Ebal Ah Dan Sim Ahi(Diu 27.1-16) 30Joshua in Ebal tang ah Toupa, Israel Pathian a ding in maitam adoh hi. 31Mosi Dan laibu a gelhsa bang in, Toupa sikha Mosi in Israel suante ana piaksa bang in, sek louh suangte, kuamah in sik a asek ngei nai hetlouhte in maitam abawl hi. Huai ah Toupa a ding in halmang thillatte alan a, lemna thillatte leng alan uhi. 32Huai ah Israel mite muh mah in Mosi Dan gelhsa huai suangte tung ah ateisawn hi.

JOSHUA 8: 33Israel tengteng, gamdangmi hi in, tualsungmi hitaleh avekpi un, a-upate uh, amakaite uh leh vaihawmte toh Toupa thukhun bawm sik tuak ah adingh uhi. Amau huai bawm zawng Levi siampute mai ah huai bang in adingh uhi. Amau kikimkhen in, akimkhat Gerizim tang mazawn ah adingh ua, akimkhat dang Ebal tang mazawn ah adingh uhi. Toupa sikha Mosi in Israelte vualzawl dia thu ahilh lai in, hiai bang a hih ding in thu ana pe khinta hi. 34Huai khit in Joshua in dan thu teng, vualzawlna thu leh hamse thu tengteng asim a, dan laibu a kigelh tengteng bang in asimkhia hi. 35Mosi thupiak tengteng Israel omkhawm tengteng leh numeite leh naupang neuchikte leh alak ua namdang omte ma ah Joshua in sim louh himhim anei kei hi.

JOSHUA 9: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jordan gal a kumpipa tengteng, mual a omte, phaizang a omte, tuipi zatak dung teng a Lebanon pha a om tengteng, Hitte, Amorte, Kanaante, Perizte, Hivte leh Jebuste'n ana zak un, 2Joshua leh Israelte pheikhai khat a dou tum in akikhawm uhi. 3Himahleh Gibeon khomite'n Joshua in Jeriko khua leh Ai khua abawldan ana zak un, lepchiahpil in agamtang uhi. 4Palai a kibawl in ip lui pipi, uain thawl lui pipi, asesa kithuap nemnum sabiltungte a pua in mi akisawl uhi. 5Khedap lui thuap nennon abun ua, puan lui pipi asilh ua, anek ding tanghoute uh gaw gemgom, ap khetkhut ngen ahi. 6Gilgal giahphual ah Joshua kiang ah ava hoh ua, akiang leh Israelte kiang ah, “Gamlapi a pan hong pai ka hi ua, huaiziak in tu in kou leh nou lemna thu khung ni,” achi uhi. 7Israelte'n huai Hivte kiang ah, “Ka lak ua teng hi kha ni uchia; bangchi in nou toh lemna thu i khung thei dia?” achi uh. 8Amau Joshua kiang ah, “Na sikhate ka hi uh,” achi uhi. Joshua in akiang uah, “Kuate na hi ua? Koilam a pan hong pai na hi ua?” achi hi. 9Gibeon Mite'n Joshua Akhem Uh 10Jordan lui gal a Amorte kumpipa nihte, Heshbon gam kumpipa Sihon, Bashan gam kumpipa Astaroth a om Og tung a athilhih tengteng ka na za uhi. 11Ka upate uh leh ka gam ua tengte'n ka kiang uah, ‘Lampi a nek ding tawi unla, amau va houpih un,’ akiang uah, ‘Na sikha ka hi uh. Nou toh kilem ni, na va chi ding uh,’ ” chi in ahon sawl uhi. 12“Hiai ka nek ding uh tanghoute na kiang a hong dia ka hong pawt ni ua ka inn ua kipan asa a ka hon puak uh ahi.

JOSHUA 9: Himahleh tu in en dih, agaw gemgom a a-ap khetkhutta hi. 13Hiai thawl uain ka thunnate uh leng athak ahi. En dih, avang khin vekta hi. Hiai ka puante uh leh ka khedapte uh leng ka hong paina uh agamla mahmah a, aluigawpta hi,” achi uhi. 14Mite'n atawi uh nek-le-dawn dingte achiam ua, Toupa dong in thu akan masa kei uhi. 15Huchi in Joshua in amau toh kilemna abawl a, amaute hawi ding in amau toh thu akhungta hi. Omkhawm miliante leng akiang uah akichiam uhi. 16Huan hichi ahong hi a, akiang ua thu akhun ua kipan ni thum nung in, akhopite uh amau kiangnai a teng sam ahi uh, chih atheikheta uh. 17Israel suante akipankhia ua, ani thum ni in akhopite uh ava tung uhi. Akhopite uh Gibeon, Kephirah, Beeroth leh Kiriath-jearim ahi. 18Omkhawm heutute'n Toupa, Israelte' Pathian min lou a akiang ua ana kichiam tak ziak un, Israel suante'n akhoih kei uh. Huchi in mipi omkhawm tengteng heutute tung ah aphun uhi. 19Himahleh heutu tengteng in mipi omkhawm tengtengte kiang ah, “Toupa, Israelte' Pathian min lou in akiang uah i na kichiamta ngal ua. Huaiziak in amaute i khoih uh siang lou ahi. 20Hichibang in atung uah hih ni. I hinghawi mai ding uh. Huchi lou in zaw i tung uah thangpaihna ahong tung kha ding, akiang uah lah i na kichiam khinta ngal ua,” achi uhi. 21Heutute mah in akiang uah, “Hinghawi in om uhen. Himahleh omkhawm tengteng a dia sing po mite leh tui tawi mite hi uhen,” achi uhi; heutute'n ana chiam khit tak sa bang un. 22Joshua in amaute asamsak a, akiang uah, “Bangdia, gamlapi a pan hong pai ka hi uh, chi a hon khem na hi ua? Ka kiangnai a teng sam lah na hi ngal ua.

JOSHUA 9: 23Huaiziak in tu in hamsiat na hi uh, na lak ua mi kuamah ka Pathian inn a dia sing pomi leh tui tawimi na hihna ua pan asuakta ngei kei ding uh,” achi hi. 24Amau Joshua adawng ua, “Toupa na Pathian un asikha Mosi gam pumpi nou hon pe dia, agam luahmi tengteng na ma ua kipan ahihmang zel ding ahi, chih thu ana piak, na sikhate hon na hilhchian mahmah ua; huaiziak a noute ziak a ka hinna uh mansuah lau mahmah a, hichibang a na gamta ka hi uh. 25Tu in ngai in, na khut a om ka hi ua; na ngaihtuahna a hoih leh dik a na theih bang in ka tung uah hih mai in,” achi uhi. 26Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel suante a pan Joshua in hunkhia in, athatta kei uhi. 27Huai ni in Joshua in aseh bang in omkhawmte leh Toupa maitam a dia sing po mite leh tui tawi mite in asep a, tuni tan in hiaite in apang uhi.

JOSHUA 10: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem kumpipa Adoni-zedek in Joshua in Ai khua ala a, ahihsegawp dimdem a, Jeriko khua leh akumpipa ahihsiat bang in Ai khua leh akumpipa leng ahihsegawp a, Gibeon a mite'n Israelte toh lemna bawl in, alak uah ateng sam uh, chih azak in, alauta mahmah hi. 2Gibeon khua bel lianpi, kumpipa khopite lak a khat bang a lian ahi. Ai khua sang a lianzaw leh amite leng hattak ahih ziak un alau mahmah uhi. 3Huaiziak in Jerusalem kumpipa Adoni-zedek in Hebron kumpipa Hoham, Jermuth kumpipa Piram, Lakish kumpipa Japhia leh Eglon kumpipa Debir kiang ah, 4“Hong pai unla, hong panpih un, Gibeon i va dou ding uh. Joshua leh Israel suante toh lemna abawl ngal ua,” chi in athukhak hi. 5Amorte kumpipa ngate: Jerusalem kumpipa, Hebron kumpipa, Jermuth kumpipa, Lakish kumpipa leh Eglon kumpipa akikhawm ua, asepaih tengteng uh toh ahohtou ua, Gibeon kho zawn ah giahphual sat in adouta uhi.Gibeonte'n Joshua Ngetna 6Gibeonte'n Gilgal giahphual a om Joshua kiang ah mi asawl ua, “Na sikhate hon nuse ke'n. Kintak in ka kiang uah hong tou in, hong panpih inla, hong hondam in. Singtang gam a teng Amor kumpipate kou hong dou ding in akikhawm uh,” chi in ava hilh uhi. 7Joshua leh akiang a gal dou thei mi tengteng leh mihat hangsan tengteng Gilgal a pan ahohtou uhi. 8Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Amaute lau het ke'n. Na khut ah ka hon pe khinta hi. Alak ua mi kuamah na ma ah adingh zou kei ding uh,” achi hi. 9Huaiziak in Joshua in amaute adou guih a; zankhua a Gilgal a pan ana hohtousa ahi.

JOSHUA 10: 10Amorte Zoh Ahi Uh 11Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israelte ma ah ataikek ua, Beth-horon a pan apaisukna mun a a-om lai un, Toupa'n van a pan gial lian pipi atung uah Azekah kho pha in akesak a, asi uhi. Israel suante'n namsau a asatlup sang un gial denlup atamzaw hi. 12 Toupa'n Amorte Israel suante apiak ni in Joshua in Toupa kiang ah thu agen a; Israelte mitmuh in,“Ni, Gibeon kho tung ah dingh nilouh in;kha, nang leng,Aijalon Phaizang ah om nilouh in,” achi hi. 13Mite'n amelmate uh tung a phu alak masiah uh ni adingh kinken a,kha leng a-om nilouh hi.Hiai thu Jasar laibu a gelh hilou hia? Huchi in van lai ah ni a-om nilouh a, ni khat sung vengveng tum thu angaihtuah kei hi. 14Toupa'n huchibang a mihing aw angaihkhiak ni, ama in a-om ngei kei a anung in leng a-om ngei kei; Toupa'n lah Israelte adoupih ngal a. 15Joshua leh Israelte agiahphual uh Gilgal ah akik nawn vek uhi.Joshua In Amor Kumpipate Nga Aman 16Huai kumpipa ngate ataimang ua, Makkedah kokhuk ah akibu uhi. 17“Makkedah kokhuk a kibu, kumpipa ngate muh ahi uh,” chi in Joshua hilh in a-om hi. 18Joshua in, “Kokhuk kam suang lianpi khuk in sin unla, veng mite leng omsak un. 19Noute bel om kei unla; na melmate uh delh unla, anungdalte that unla; akhua himhim uah lutsak kei un. Toupa na Pathian un na khut uah amau ahon peta ngal a,” achi hi. 20Huan hichi ahong hi a, Joshua leh Israel suante'n athah bei khit ua, kulhbaangpi nei khuate a, a-omlaite atailut khit un, 21mi tengteng Joshua kiang Makkedah ah galmuangtak in ahong kik nawn ua. Israel suante dem in kuamah in lei alok ngam kei uh.

JOSHUA 10: 22Joshua in, “Kokhuk kam hong unla, kokhuk a pan ka kiang ah kumpipa ngate hon kaikhia un,” achi hi. 23Hichibang in ahih ua, kumpipa ngate: Jerusalem kumpipa, Hebron kumpipa, Jermuth kumpipa, Lakish kumpipa leh Eglon kumpipa kokhuk a pan akiang ah ahon pikhia uhi. 24Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipate Joshua kiang a ahon pitak un, Joshua in Israel tengteng asamkhawm a, amah toh kuan galdou thei mite lak a heutute kiang ah, “Hong pai nai unla, hiai kumpipate ngawng sik un,” achi hi. Huchi in ahong pai nai ua, angawng uh ahong siksak uhi. 25Joshua in akiang uah, “Lau kei unla, lunglel sam kei un. Hattak leh hangsantak in om un. Na dou uh na melma tengteng tung ah Toupa'n hichibang in ahih ding,” achi hi. 26Huai khit in Joshua in amau asatzan a, athat a, sing dawn ah akhai a; nitaklam tan in sing dawn ah akikhai lai uhi. 27Huan hichi ahong hi a, nitum kuan in Joshua in thu apia a, sing dawn a pan alakhia ua, akibukna kokhuk uah apailut ua, akokhuk kam suang lianpi in asin ua, tuni tan in leng a-om lai hi.Joshua In Amorte Gam Alakbeh Lai 28Joshua in huai ni in Makkedah khua ala a, akumpipa uh tan in namsau in alok a; huai khua a om tengteng asatlum vek a, khat lel leng hawi anei kei. Jeriko kumpipa tung a ahih mah bang in, Makkedah kumpipa tung ah leng ahihta hi. 29Joshua Israel tengteng toh Makkedah a pan Libnah ah apai ua, Libnah khua adou uhi. 30Toupa'n huai khua kumpipa tan in Israelte khut ah apia hi. Huai khua dou in asung a om tengteng athat vek hi. Asung a om mi khat mah leng hinghawi anei kei hi.

JOSHUA 10: Jeriko kumpipa tung a ahih mah bang in akumpipa tung ah ahih hi. 31Joshua Israel tengteng toh Libnah a pan Lakish ah apai ua, panmun khoh in asual uhi. 32Toupa'n Lakish khua Israelte khut ah apia a, ani nih ni in ala ua huai khua dou in asung a om tengteng namsau in athat vek ua, Libnah khote tung a ahih bang in ahihta uhi. 33Bezer kumpipa Horam, Lakish khua panpih ding in akuantou a; Joshua in amah leh aheute nangawn khat mah leng hawi lou in athatgam vek hi. 34Joshua Israel tengteng toh Lakish a pan Eglon ah apai ua, panmun akhoh ua; adou uhi. 35Huai ni in ala ua, huai ni mah in huai khua dou in asung a om tengteng namsau in athat bei sipsip hi. Lakish kho tung a ahih bang in ahihta hi. 36Joshua, Israelte tengteng toh Eglon a pan Hebron ah apai ua adou uhi. 37Ala ua, huai khua, akumpipa, akhopel tengteng leh asung a om tengteng namsau a dou in athat vek ua, Eglon kho tung a hih bang in khat mah leng hinghawi anei kei hi. Akhua nangawn hihse vek in asung a om tengteng athat bei sipsip hi. 38Joshua leh Israel tengteng Debir ah akihei nawn ua adou ua; 39huai khua, akumpipa leh akhopel tengteng ala ua; namsau in adou ua, asung a om tengteng athat bei sipsip ua; khat mah leng hawi anei kei uh. Hebron kho tung leh Debir khua leh akumpipa uh tung a ahih bang in ahihta hi. 40Huchi in Joshua in agam pumpi, tanggamte, simlam a phaizang leh mual gamte hihse vek in akumpipa tengteng uh athat vek a; khat mah hinghawi anei kei hi. Toupa, Israelte' Pathian thupiak bang in anak thei peuhmah ahihchimit vek hi. 41Joshua in Kadesh-barnea a pan Gaza pha in, Goshen gam tengteng toh Gibeon pha in ahihse vek hi. 42Huai kumpipate tengteng leh agam uh Toupa, Israelte' Pathian in Israelte adoupih ziak in, Joshua in hun khat a alak vek ahi uhi. 43Joshua leh Israel tengteng a giahphual Gilgal ah akik nawn vek uhi.

JOSHUA 11: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, Hazor kumpipa Jabin in huai azak in, Madon kumpipa Jobab, Shimron kumpipa leh Akshaph kumpipa, 2Mallam tanggam kumpipate, Kineroth simlam a Arabah kumpipate, Phaigam kumpipate leh tumlam pang a Dor kumpipate, 3suahlam leh tumlam a om Kanaan mite, tanggam a om, Amorte, Hitte, Perizte, Jebuste, Mizpah gam Hermon tang nuai a om Hivte kiang ah mi asawl hi. 4Huan asepaih tengteng uh toh mi tampi, atamdan uh tuipi a piaunel zah mahmah sakol leh kangtalai tampi toh akisa uhi. 5Huai kumpipa tengteng akimukhawm ua Israelte dou ding in Merom tuite ah agiakkhawm uhi. 6 Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Amaute lau ke'n. Zingchiang in hichih hun in amaute hihlupsa vek in Israelte ka hon pe mai ding hi. Asakolte khukguh na kilawisak dia, akangtalaite uh na halsak ding uh,” achi hi. 7Joshua leh gal dou thei mi tengteng Merom tuite ah ava kuan guih ua adou uhi. 8Toupa'n Israelte khut ah apia a adou ua, Zidon lianzaw pha in, Misrephoth-maim munte pha in, suahlam pang a Mizpeh Phaizangte pha in adelh ua, khat leng hawi nei lou in athat vek uhi. 9Toupa'n asawl bang in Joshua in atung uah ahih a; asakolte khukguh akilawisak ua, akangtalaite uh ahalsak uhi. 10Huai hun in Joshua akilehhei a, Hazor khua ala a, akumpipa uh namsau in athat hi. Tuma in Hazor khua huai lai a hiai gamte tengteng lak a khopi pen ahi. 11Joshua In Jabin Leh Alawite Azou 12Huchi in Kumpipate khopi tengteng leh akumpipa tengteng uh Joshua in aman vek a, namsau a dou in athat a, ahihchimit vek a; Toupa sikha Mosi in thu apiak bang in. 13Mual pawng a khopi a na om khinsate, Hazor khua chih louh, Israelte'n khat mah leng ahal kei uh. Huai khua bel Joshua in ahal hi.

JOSHUA 11: 14Hiai khopite a gallak tengteng leh gante Israel suante'n amau a tuam ding in anei ua; mihing bel ahihman vek masiah uh namsau in athat zel ua, ahing peuhmah hawi anei kei uhi. 15Toupa'n a sikha Mosi thu apiak bang in, Mosi in huai thu Joshua apesawn a; Joshua in huai bang in ahih zel hi. Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak tengteng hih louh himhim anei kei hi.Joshua Gam Lakte 16Huai bang in Joshua in huai gam tengteng, tanggamte, sim gam tengteng, Goshen gam tengteng, phaizang leh phaizang teng leh Israelte tangte leh phaizang teng toh ala vek hi. 17Seir va suntou Halak tang a pan Hermon tang nuai a Lebanon Phaizang a Baal-gad pha in akumpipate tengteng uh aman a that in ahihlum hi. 18Joshua in huai kumpipa tengteng sawtpitak adou hi. 19Gibeon a om Hivte kia chih louh Israelte toh lemna bawl khua a-om kei uh. Dou a lak vek ahi uhi. 20Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang a, ahihchimit vek a, deihsakna nei het lou a, ahihman theihna dia alungtang uh hihkhauhsak a Israelte dou sakpa Toupa ahi. 21Huai lai in Joshua akuan a, tanggamte a pan, Hebron a pan, Debir a pan, Anab khua leh Judia tanggam tengteng leh Israel tanggam tengteng a pan Anakte ahihmang vek hi. 22Israel suante gam ah Anakte khat lel leng atengta kei ua; Gaza, Gath leh Ashdod khuate kia ah bel a-om lai uhi. 23Huchi in Toupa'n Mosi kiang a, agen tengteng bang in Joshua in gam pumpi alata hi. Joshua in Israelte anam uh kikhendan bang zel in agouluah ding un gam ape chiat hi. Huchi in gam galmuang in a-omta hi.

JOSHUA 12: 1Hiaite ahi uh huai gam kumpipate, Israel suante'n ahihman ua, agam uh Jordan lui gal, nisuahna lam gamte, Arnon Phaizang a pan Hermon tang tan, suahlam pang a Arabah tengteng toh aneihsak uh kumpipate: 2Amorte kumpipa Sihon, Heshbon a teng in Arnon Phaizang pang a om Aroer a pan vai ahawm a, phaizang laitak a khopite, Ammon suante gamgi Jabok lui pha in Gilead gam kimkhat tung ah vai ahawm hi. 3Suahlam ah Arabah ah Kineroth Tuipi tan in ahi a; suahlam ah Beth-jeshimoth hohna lampi lam ah Arabah Tuipi, Chi Tuipi tan in ahi a; simlam ah Pisgah tang nuai pha in ahi. 4Astaroth leh Edrei a om Rephaim nam khosuaksunte lak ah Bashan kumpipa Og in vai ahawm hi. 5Amah Hermon tang, Salkah khua leh Bashan tengteng, Geshurte leh Maakathte gamgi pha leh Heshbon kumpipa Sihon gamgi chiang Gilead gam kimkhat pha in vai ahawm hi. 6 Toupa sikha Mosi leh Israel suante'n huaite athat ua; Toupa sikha Mosi in Reuben chite, Gad chite, Manasseh nam kimkhatte agouluah ding un ahawm hi.Joshua In Azoh Kumpipate 7Hiai gam kumpipate ahi, Joshua leh Israel suante'n Jordan lui gal tumlam pang a, athahte uh, Lebanon Phaizang Baal-gad a pan Seir tang suntou Halak tang pha in. Joshua in Israel suante akikhendan bang zel un, huai gam agouluah ding un ape chiatta hi. 8Tanggam a, phaizang gamte, Arabahte, tanggamte, gamdai gamte, sim gamte; huaite bel Hit mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Periz mite, Hiv mite, Jebus mite gam ahi. 9Jeriko kumpipa khat; Bethel kho kiang a Ai kumpipa, khat; 10Jerusalem kumpipa, khat; Hebron kumpipa, khat; 11Jarmuth kumpipa, khat; Lakish kumpipa, khat; 12Mosi In Azoh Kumpipate 13Debir kumpipa, khat; Geder kumpipa, khat; 14Hormah kumpipa, khat; Arad kumpipa, khat; 15Libnah kumpipa, khat; Adullam kumpipa, khat; 16Makkedah kumpipa, khat; Bethel kumpipa, khat; 17Tappuah kumpipa, khat; Hepher kumpipa, khat; 18Aphek kumpipa, khat; Lasaron kumpipa, khat; 19Madon kumpipa, khat; Hazor kumpipa, khat; 20Shimron-meron kumpipa, khat; Akshaph kumpipa, khat; 21Taanak kumpipa, khat; Magiddo kumpipa, khat; 22Kedesh kumpipa, khat; Karmel tang a Jokneam kumpipa, khat; 23Dor tuipang a Dor kumpipa, khat; Gilgal a Goiim namte kumpipa, khat; 24Tirzah kumpipa, khat; kumpipa tengteng sawmthum-le-khat ahi uh.

JOSHUA 13: 1Joshua ahong upata a, ahong tek mahmahta hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na hong upa in na hong tek mahmahta a, gam lak ding lah atam lai mahmah ngal a. 2Hiai gamte ahi lak louh: Philistia gam tengteng leh Geshur gam tengteng. 3Aigupta gam chin a om Shihor a pan mallam pang a Ekron gamgi tan in, huai tuh Kanaan mite gam a sim ahi; Philistiate vaihawmtu ngate, Gaza mite, Ashdod mite, Ashkelon mite, Git mite leh Ekron mite; simlam a Avi mite. 4Kanaan mite gam tengteng leh Zidon mite gam a Mearah, Amorte gamgi Aphek kho pha in. 5Gebal mite gam leh nisuahna lam Lebanon gam tengteng Hermon tang nuai Baal-gad a pan Hamath kholutna pha in. 6Lebanon a pan Misrephoth-maim mun pha in, tanggam a teng tengteng, Zidon mi tengteng. Amaute Israel suante ma ah ka delhkhe dia; ka hon thupiak bang in Israel gouluah ding in bawlsak in. 7Huchi in hiai gam nam kuate leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte gouluah ding in hawmsak in,” achi hi.Jordan Suahlam Gam Hawmna 8 Toupa sikha Mosi in amau a dia asehsak bang in Reuben suante leh Gad suante'n Manasseh nam kimkhat dangte toh Mosi piaksa Jordan suahlam gam ah goutan aneita uhi. 9Huai gam ahihleh Arnon Phaizang gei a om Aroer a pan leh phaizang laitak a khopi leh Medeba phaigam tengteng, Dibon tan ahi. 10Amorte kumpipa Sihon, Heshbon a vaihawm a tu khopi tengteng Ammon suante gamgi tan ahi. 11Gilead gam leh Geshurte leh Maakathte gamgi chiang leh Hermon tang tengteng leh Bashan gam tengteng Salkah kho tan ahi. 12Astaroth leh Edrei a kumpipa a tu Bashan gam kumpipa Og gam tengteng toh, huaite Rephaim nam milian khosuaksunte ahi uh; huaite Mosi in ana dou a, ana delhkheta hi.

JOSHUA 13: 13Gam Lak Lai Ding 14Levi namte kia ahi gouluah ding a piak louh. Akiang ua ana gensa bang in Toupa, Israelte' Pathian a dia mei a thillatte amau gouluah ahi.Reuben Gam Tan 15Reuben suante nam a-inkuan dungzui in Mosi in gam ana peta hi. 16Agamgi uh Arnon Phaizang a om Aroer a pan phaizang laitak a khopi leh Medeba phaigam tengteng a pan, 17Heshbon leh huai phaigam a khopi tengteng; Debon, Bamoth-baal leh Beth-baal-meon; 18Jahaz, Kedemoth leh Mephaath; 19Kiriathaim, Sibmah leh phaizang a tang a om Zereth-sahar; 20Beth-peor leh Ashdot-pisgah leh Beth-jeshimoth; 21Phaigam khopi tengteng, Heshbon a vaihawm Amorte Kumpipa Sihon lalgam teng, Mosi in ana thah khitsa Midiante kumpipate Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur leh Reba omna gam toh ahi. 22Beor tapa Balaam, aisan siam leng a-inkuante toh Israel suante'n athat uhi. 23Reuben suante gam chiang bel Jordan leh apang teng ahi. Hiai gam leh akhopite leh khuate ahi Reuben suante a dia a-inkuan omdan bang zel a gouluah dia asehsak uh.Gad Gam Tan 24Mosi in Gad suante a-inkuan dungzui un gam apia hi. 25Agamgi uh Jazer khua leh Gilead gam khopi tengteng leh Ammon suante gam kimkhat, Rabbah kho kiang a om Aroer pha in; 26Heshbon a pan Ramath-mizpeh leh Betonim pha in; Mahanaim a pan Debir gamgi pha in; 27Guam ah Beth-aram, Beth-nimrah, Sukoth, Zaphon, Heshbon kumpipa Sihon gam teng, Jordan leh agei a gamte, Jordan gal suahlam pang a Kinereth Tuipi tawp chiang tan in ahi. 28Hiai Gad suante a dia a-inkuan omdan bang zel a agouluah ding ua seh, akhopite uh leh akhuate uh ahi.Suahlam A Manasseh Gam Tan 29Mosi in Manasseh nam kimkhatte gam apia hi. Manasseh nam kimkhatte a dia a-inkuan omdan bang zel a piak ahi uh.

JOSHUA 13: 30Agamgi uh Mahanaim a pan Bashan gam tengteng, Bashan gam kumpipa Og gam tengteng leh Bashan gam a Jair khopi tengteng toh, kho sawmguk ahi. 31Gilead gam kimkhat leh Bashan gam kumpipa Og gam a Astaroth, Edrei; huai Manasseh tapa Makir suan Makir suan kimkhatte a dia a-inkuan uh omdan bang zel a seh ahi. 32Hiaite Moab phai, Jeriko zawn, Jordan gal lehlam a, Mosi in gouluah dia a piak gamte ahi uh. 33Levi chite Mosi in gouluah ding ape kei hi. Akiang ua ana gensa bang in Toupa, Israelte' Pathian agouluah uh ahi.

JOSHUA 14: 1Hiaite ahi Israel suante'n Kanaan gam alak ua, siampu Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua leh Israel suante nam inkuan lupente'n agouluah ding ua ana hawm uh. 2Nam kuate leh nam kimkhatte a tuam dia Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu ana piak bang in aisan in agouluah uh piak ahi. 3Mosi in nam nih leh nam kimkhatte Jordan gal ah agouluah ding uh ana peta hi. Levi chite bel alak uah gouluah ding ape kei hi. 4Joseph suante nam nih ahi ua, Manasseh leh Ephraim. Levi chite huai gam ah tantuam ape kei uh, a-omna ding uh khopite leh adaikim ua gantatna ding mun leh a-inn leh alou uh bawlna ding lou ngal piak ahi kei uhi. 5Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in Israel suante'n ahih ua, gam ahawm uhi.Kaleb Kiang Ah Hebron Piak Ahi 6Judah suante Gilgal ah Joshua kiang ah ava hoh ua; Keniz mi Jephunneh tapa Kaleb in akiang ah, “Kadesh-barnea mun a Pathian mipa Mosi kiang a Toupa'n ka tungtang leh na tungtang thu ana gen na thei hi. 7Toupa sikha Mosi in Kadesh-barnea mun a pan gam va enkhe dia ahon sawl lai in kum sawmli a upa ka na hita a; ka lungsim a om bangtak akiang ah ka tun nawn hi. 8Himahleh ka unau ka kiang a pai samte'n mipite lungtang azulsuaksak ua; ke'n bel Toupa ka Pathian ka zui hi. 9Mosi in huai ni in, Toupa ka Pathian na zuih ziak in na khe in ana siksa gam tangtawn in nang leh na suante gouluah ahi ngeingei ding, chi in akichiam hi. 10Huchi in ngai in, Toupa'n Mosi kiang a huai thute agen nung Israelte gamdai a, avakvaih sung un Toupa'n agensa bang in kum sawmli-le-nga tak ahon damsak lai hi. Ngai in, tu in kum sawmgiat-le-nga ka hita.

JOSHUA 14: 11Hichi pipi in leng Mosi in ahon sawl lai mah bang in ka hat lai a, nidanglai a kidouna ding leh nasep silbawlna dia thagui ka neih mah bang in tu in leng ka nei lai hi. 12Huaiziak in hiai tang, Toupa'n huai ni a agensa pen hon pia in, Anakte a-om ua, akhopite uh athupi a, kulhbaang a umsuak ahi uh, chih huai ni in na za a; Toupa'n ahon ompih dia, amaute ka delhkhe thei ding, Toupa'n ana gensa bang in,” achi hi. 13Joshua in avualzawl a; Jephunneh tapa Kaleb gouluah ding in Hebron khua apeta hi. 14Jordan Tumlam Gam Hawmna 15Hebron kho min ama in Kiriath-arba ahi. Arba ahihleh Anakte lak a mithupipen ahi. Huai khit in agam ahong galmuangta hi.

JOSHUA 15: 1Hiai Judah suante a-inkuan dungzui a amau a tuam dia seh a om ahi: Edom gamgi chiang, simlam pang Zin gamdai tan hial in, simtawp tanpha in akizalhsuk hi. 2Simlam gamgi bel, chi Tuipi simtawp a tuipi gam geng a pan simlam doh ahi. 3Simlam zuan in Akrabbim tan in apai zel a, Zin ava tung hi. Kadesh-barnea simlam ah atungkah a, Hebron ava tung a, Adar ah atoupai a, Karka akualkhum hi. 4Azmon ah apai zel a, Aigupta luita ah atuakkhia a; tuipi ah gamgi atawp hi. Hiai bel simlam pang gamgi ahi. 5Suahlam pang gamgi bel Chi Tuipi ahi a, Jordan ah atawp hi.Mallam pang gamgi bel tuipi tuimeng a pan Jordan tun tawp chiang ahi. 6Beth-hoglah ah atoupai a, Beth-arabah mal ah apai zel a; Reuben tapa Bohan suang ah apaitou zel hi. 7Akor Phaizang a pan Debir ah apaitou a, lui simlam a om Adummim atungkahna chin ah Gilgal lam zuan in mallam ah apai zel a; En-shemesh tuite ah apaipai a, En-rogel ah asuakkhia hi. 8Hinam tapa phaizang ah Jebuste gam pang simlam, huai tuh Jerusalem ahi, pha in apaitou a; Hinnom tang lam pang phaizang chin a om tang vum ah apaitou a, huai tuh Rephaim mallam pang phaizang tawp mahmah ahi. 9Mualvum a pan Nephtoah a luituite pha in apaisuak a, Ephron tang a khopite ah apai zel a; gamgi Baalah, huai tuh Kiriath-jearim ahi, lam ah apaisuk hi. 10Baalah a pan tumlam pang ah Seir tang pha in akihekkual nawn a, mallam pang ah Jearim, huai tuh Kesalon ahi, Beth-shemesh ah apaisuk a, Timnah tawn in apai zel hi. 11Mallam pang Ekron zul ah apaikhia a, Shikron ah apaisuak a, Baalah tang ah apai zel a, Jabneel ah apawt a; tuipi ah atawp hi.

JOSHUA 15: 12Tumlam pang gamgi bel tuipi azat a za leh apiau chiang teng ahi.
