Huai gam chiang ahi Judah suante a dia a-inkuan uh dungzui a sehsak a om.Kaleb In Hebron Leh Debir Azou(Vai 1.11-15) 13Jephunneh tapa Kaleb Toupa'n Joshua thu apiak bang in Judah suante lak ah tantuam abawlsak a, huai tuh Kiriath-arba ahi, Arba bel Anan pa ahi a, akhopi ahihleh Hebron ahi. 14Kaleb in huai khua a pan Anak tapate thum Sheshai, Ahiman leh Talmai adelhkhia hi. 15Judah Gam Tan 16Kaleb in, “Kuapeuh Kiriath-sepher va dou a, va la zou peuhmah, azi ding in ka tanu Aksah ka pe ding,” achi hi. 17Kaleb unaupa Kenaz tapa Othniel in ava la zou a; huchi in azi ding in atanu Aksah aneisakta hi. 18Huan hichi ahong hi a, akiang ava tun in, apa gam ngen ding in akuan a; asabiltung a pan akumkhia hi. Kaleb in akiang ah, “Bang na deih a?” ana chi hi. 19Ama'n, “Hon vualzawl in. Simlam gam lah na hon peta ngal a. Tui nak neite leng hon pe tel lai in,” achi hi. Huchi in tui nak nei saknungte leh khangnungte apeta hi.Judah Khopite 20Hiai ahi Judah suante nam, a-inkuan uh dungzui a agouluah uh. 21Simlam a Edom gamgi zul a Judah suante aneih khopi hiaite ahi uh: Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur, 22Kinah, Dimonah leh Adadah; 23Kadesh, Hazor leh Ithnan; 24Ziph, Telem, Bealoth, 25Hazor, Hadattah, Kerioth, Hezron (huai Hazor ahi,) 26Amam, Shema, Moladah, 27Hazar-gaddah, Hesmon, Beth-palet, 28Hazar-shual, Beer-sheba, Bizjothjah, 29Baalah, Ijim, Ezem, 30Eltolad, Kesil, Hormah. 31Ziklag, Madmannah leh Sansannah. 32Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain leh Rimmon ahi ua; khopi tengteng, akhotate uh toh sawmnih-le-kua ahi. 33Phaigam lam ah Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah, 34Zanoah, En-gannim, Tappuah, Enam, 35Jarmuth, Adullam, Sokoh, Azekah, 36Shaaraim, Adithaim, Gederah leh Gederothaim ahi ua, akhotate uh toh khopi teng sawm-le-li ahi uh. 37Zenan, Hadashah, Migdal-gad;

JOSHUA 15: 38Dilean, Mizpah leh Joktheel; 39Lakish, Bozkath, Eglon; 40Kabbon, Lahmas, Kitlish; 41Gederoth, Beth-dagon, Naamah, Makkedah. Akhopel teng uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-guk ahi uh. 42Libnah, Ether, Ahsan, 43Iphtah, Ashnah, Nezib, 44Keilah, Akzib leh Mareshah. Akhopel teng uh toh khopi tengteng kua ahi uh. 45Ekron leh akhopite leh akhotate toh, 46Ekron a pan tuipi tanpha in Ashdod zul a om tengteng, akhotate uh toh. 47Ashdod leh akhopite leh akhotate: Gaza leh akhopite leh akhotate; Aigupta lui leh tuipi za leh agei chiang pha in. 48Singtang gam lam ah Shamir, Jattir, Sokoh, 49Dannah leh Kirjath-sannah, huai tuh Debir ahi, 50Anab, Eshtemoh, Anim leh Gosen, 51Gosen, Holon leh Giloh; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-khat ahi. 52Arab, Dumah, Eshean, 53Janum, Beth-tappuah, Aphekah, 54Humtah leh Kiriath-arba, huai tuh Hebron ahi, huan Zior; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng kua ahi. 55Maon, Karmel, Ziph, Juttah, 56Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah, 57Kain, Gibeah leh Timnah; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm ahi. 58Halhul, Beth-zur, Gedor, 59Maarath, Beth-anoth leh Eltekon; akhotate uh toh khopite tengteng guk ahi. 60Kiriath-baal, huai tuh Kiriath-jearim ahi, leh Rabbah; akhotate uh toh khopi nih ahi. 61Gamdai a Beth-arabah, Middin, Sekakah, 62Chi khopi Nibshan leh En-gedi; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng guk ahi. 63Jerusalem a teng Jebuste ahihleh Judah suante'n adelhkhe zou kei ua, tuni tan in Jerusalem ah Judah suante leh Jebuste atengkhawm uhi.

JOSHUA 16: 1Joseph suante tantuam, Jeriko zawn a pan gamdai kiang, suahlam pang Jeriko tuite ah asuak a, Jeriko a pan singtang gam ah Bethel pha in apaitou zel hi. 2Bethel a pan Luz ah alut a, Arki mite gamgi a Ataroth pha in apai zel hi. 3Tumlam pang ah Japhlet suante gamgi, Beth-horon gamgi khangnungzaw, Gezer pha in apaisuk zel a; tupi ah asuak hi. 4Huchi in Joseph suante Manasseh leh Ephraim suante'n tantuam in alata uhi.Ephraim 5A-inkuan uh dungzui zel a Ephraim suante gamgi hiai ahi: Suahlam pang atantuam uh gamgi Ataroth-addar ahi a, Beth-horon saknungzaw apha hi. 6Mikmethath maltum lam pang ah asuak a, suahlam pang ah Taanath-shiloh pha in akihei nawn a, Janohah suahlam ah apai zel hi. 7Janohah a pan Ataroth ah, Naarah ah apaisuk a, Jeriko atung a, Jordan ah asuak hi. 8Tappuah a pan tumlam pang ah Kanah luita pha in apai a; tuipi ah asuak hi. Huaite ahi Ephraim suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a atantuam uh. 9Manasseh suante tantuam lak a Ephraim suante a dia khopi asehtuamsakte toh; akhopi tengteng leh akhotate leng. 10Gezer a teng Kanaante adelhkhe kei ua; Ephraimte lak ah Kanaante tuni tan in a-om lai ua, asikha un a-om uhi. 16Ephraim Leh Tumlam Manasseh Gam Tan

JOSHUA 17: 1Manasseh suante tantuam hiaite ahi. Manasseh Joseph tapa masa ahi a, Gilead pa, Manasseh tapa masa Makir galhat ahih ziak in Gilead leh Bashan gam atang hi. 2Manasseh suan dang tengteng a ding in a-inkuan uh dungzui in tantuam leng a-om hi. Abiezer suante a ding, Helek suante a ding, Shekem suante a ding, Hepher suante a ding leh Shemida suante a ding. Huaite a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a Joseph tapa Manasseh suan pasalte ahi uhi. 3Manasseh tapa Makir, huai tapa Gilead, huai tapa Hepher, huai tapa Zelophehad in tapa nei lou in tanu ngen anei hi. Atanute min Mahlah, Noah, Hoglai, Milkah leh Tirzah ahi. 4Siampu Eleazar ma ah leh Nun tapa Joshua ma ah leh miliante ma ah ahoh ua, “Ka unaute uh lak a tantuam hon pe sam ding in Toupa'n Mosi thu apia hi,” chi in agen uhi. Toupa thupiak bang in apa uh unaute lak ah tantuam ape samta hi. 5Jordan gal ah Gilead leh Bashan gam sim louh in, Manasseh tantuam ding in mun sawm apuk a; 6Manasseh tanute'n atapate uh lak ah tantuam aneih sam ziak uh ahi. Gilead gam bel Manasseh tapa dangte'n atang uhi. 7Manasseh gamgi Shekem suahlam a om Asher a pan Mikmethath pha in ahi a; taklam pang ah En-tappuah mite tenna pha in apai hi. 8Tappuah gam Manasseh a ahi a; himahleh Manasseh gamgi chin a Tappuah ahihleh Ephraim suante a ahi. 9Gamgi kan in luita simlam pang ah apaisuk a, Ephraim suante gamgi asun hi. Ephraim suante khopite khenkhat Manasseh suante khopite lak ah a-om hi. Himahleh Manasseh suante gamgi bel Kanah kuam mallam pang ah apai a, tuipi ah atawp hi. 10Simlam pang Ephraim a ahi a, mallam pang pen Manasseh a ahi. Tuipi a gamgi ahi.

JOSHUA 17: Mallam ah Asher pha in ahi a, suahlam ah Issakar pha in ahitou hi. 11Issakar leh Asher gam ah Manasseh in Beth-shean leh akim a khuate, Ibleam leh akim a khuate, Dor a tengte leh akim a khuate, Endor a tengte leh akim a khuate, Taanak a tengte leh akim a khuate, leh Meggiddo a tengte leh akim a khuate zou in, kho seh thum anei uhi. 12Kanaan mite'n huai gam luah asawm teitei ziak un, Manasseh suante'n huai khopi a tengte adelhkhe zou kei uhi. 13Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel suante ahong hat hiaihiai un, Kanaante nasem a goih ding in a-omsak ua, adelhkhe siang vek kei uhi.Ephraim Leh Tumlam Manasseh In Gam Angetbeh Uh 14Joseph suante'n Joshua kiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia gouluah ding tantuam seh khat, tan khat kia na hon piak tuam, Toupa'n lah tutan in hon nak vualzawl mahmah ngal a?” achi uhi. 15Joshua in akiang uah, “Tam na hih uleh, Perizte leh miliante gammang na tenna ding un va vat un. Ephraim tanggam pen nou a dia aneu luatleh,” achi hi. 16Joseph suante'n, “Tanggam kou a ding in ahun kei. Phaigam a teng Kanaan tengteng, Beth-shean leh akhopi a tengte leh Jezreel phaizang a tengte'n sik kangtalai anei chiat tuamse uh,” achi uhi. 17Tumlam Manasseh

JOSHUA 18: 1Huai nung in Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng Shiloh ah akikhawm ua, huai ah kihoupihna biakbuk akai uhi. Huai gam teng azou khinta uhi. 2Israel suante lak ah atantuam uh tang nai lou nam sagih a-om lai uhi. 3Joshua in Israel suante kiang ah, “Toupa na pipute uh Pathian in nou hon piaksa gam, bang tan ahia luah lou a na awltat lai ding uh? 4Nam chih a kipan mi thum zel telkhia unla; amau akuan ding ua, gam ava en vialvial ding ua, atantuam hun ding uh bang chiat zel in ava gelh ding ua; ka kiang ah ahong nawn ding uh. 5Mun sagih in akhen phot ding ua; Judah pawl simlam ah atantuam uah a-om ding ua, Joseph inkuante mallam ah atantuam uah a-om ding uh. 6Gam mun sagih in va khen unla, huai gelhna hon pia un. Huchi in hiai ah Toupa i Pathian ma ah ai ka hon sansak ding hi. 7Levi teng in na lak uah tantuam anei kei ding uh. Toupa mai a siampu nasep amau goutan ahi. Gad pawl, Reuben pawl leh Manasseh nam kimkhat bel Jordan gal suahlam ah amau tantuam Toupa sikha Mosi in apiak ana tangta uh,” achi hi. 8Huchi in huai mite apawtkheta ua, Joshua in, “Gam va en vialvial unla, hon gelhkhia unla, ka kiang ah hon tun nawn unla, hiai ah Shiloh ah Toupa ma ah ai ka hon sansak ding,” chi in thu apia hi. 9Mite akuan ua, gam ava en vialvial ua, mun sagih in akhen ua, laibu ah akhuakhua in agelhkhia ua, giahphual Shiloh ah Joshua kiang ah akik nawn uhi. 10Joshua in Shiloh ah Toupa ma ah ai ana sansak a;

JOSHUA 18: huai ah Joshua in Israel suante akikhendan bang zel un gam ahawmta hi.Benjamin Gam Tan 11Aisan a-inkuan uh dungzui in Benjamin suante tung ah aketa a; agamgi chiang uh Judah suante leh Joseph suante kikal ahi. 12Mallam pang a agamgi chiang uh Jordan a pan ahi a; Jeriko sik ah mallam pang ah apaitou a, tumlam pang ah tanggam ah apaitou zel a; Beth-Aven gamdai ah atawp hi. 13Hiai a pan Luz lam ah, Luz, huai tuh Bethel ahi, sik ah, simlam pang ah apai zel a; Beth-horon khang simlam pang a mual zul ah Ataroth-addar ah apaisuk hi. 14Apai zel a, Beth-horon simlam pang a tangchin a pan tumlam ah simlam pang ah akualphei a; Kiriath-baal, huai Kiriath-jearim ahi, Judah suante khopi ah atawp a; huai tumlam pang gamgi ahi. 15Simlam pang a gam Kiriath-jearim tawp a pan ahi a; tumlam ah apawt a, Nephtoah luituite ah apai zel hi. 16Rephaim mallam pang phaizang a Hinnom Tapa phaizang chin a tangmong ah apaisuk a; Jebuste sik ah, simlam pang a Hinnom Phaizang ah apaisuk a, En-rogel ah apaisuk hi. 17Mallam zuan in apai a, En-shemesh ah apai a, Adummim kahtouhna chin Geliloth ah apai a; Reuben tapa Bohan suang ah apaisuk a; 18Gam Om Lai Teng Hawmna 19Beth-hoglah sik, mallam pang ah apai zel a; atawpna bel Jordan simtawp, Chi Tuipi mallam tuipi meng ah ahi. Huai simlam gamgi ahi. 20Jordan suahlam pang, agamgi chiang ahi. Huai ahi Benjamin suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a atantuam gam in akolhkhum sung. 21Benjamin suante a-inkuan dungzui un akhopite uh, Jeriko, Beth-hoglah, Emek-keziz, 22Beth-arabah, Zemariam, Bethel, 23Avim, Parah, Ophrah, 24Kephar-haammonai, Ophni leh Geba; akhopel tengteng toh akhopi tengteng sawm-le-nih ahi. 25Gibeon, Ramah, Beeroth, 26Mizpeh, Kephirah, Mozah, 27Rekem, Irpeel, Taralah; 28Zelah, Eleph, Jebus, huai Jerusalem ahi, Gibeah leh Kiriath, akhotate toh khopi sawm-le-li ahi. Hiaite ahi Benjamin suante a-inkuan uh dungzui ua atantuam ding ua kisepte.

JOSHUA 19: 1Aisan nihveina Simeon suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. Atantuam uh Judah suante tantuam lak ah atel hi. 2Atantuam ding ua pukte Beer-sheba, Sheba, Moladah, 3Hazar-shual, Balah, Ezem, 4Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah, 5Ziklag, Beth-markaboth, Hazar-susah, 6Beth-lebaoth leh Sharuhen; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-thum ahi. 7Ain, Rimmon, Ether leh Ashan: akhotate toh khopi li. 8Huai khopi kim akhopel tengteng Baalath-beer simlam a Ramah apha hi. Huaite Simeon suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a amau tantuam dia seh ahi. 9Simeon suante tantuam Judah suante tantuam lak a ahi. Judah suante tantuam amau a ding in aza lo ngal a; huaiziak in Simeon suante tantuam lak ah atel hi.Zebulun Gam Tan 10Aisan thumveina Zebulun suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. Atantuam gamgi uh Sarid tan ahi. 11Agamgi uh tumlam pang ah Maralah pha in apai a, Dabeseth ava tung a; Jokneam kiang a luita tan ava tung hi. 12Sarid a pan suahlam pang nisuahna lam ah Kisloth-tabor gamgi pha in akawitou a; Daberath ah apawt hi. 13Huai a pan suahlam pang ah Gittah-hepher leh Eth-kazin ah apai zel a, Neah lam zuan in Rimmon ah apawt hi. 14Mallam ah Hannathon ah akualphei nawn a, apawtna Iphtah-el Phaizang ah ahi. 15Katath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah leh Bethlehem; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-nih ahi. 16Hiaite ahi Zebulun suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a, atantuam ding ua seh; huai khopite leh khopelte toh.Issakar Gam Tan 17Aisan liveina Issakar suante tung ah a-inkuan uh omdan dungzui in apuk hi. 18Agamgi chiang uh Jezreel, Kesuloth, Shunem, 19Simeon Gam Tan 20Rabbith, Kishion, Abez, 21Remeth, En-gannim, En-haddah leh Beth-pazzez tan ahi. 22Tabor, Shahazimah leh Beth-shemesh ava pha a; apawtna Jordan ah ahi a, akhopel teng toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-guk ahi. 23Hiaite ahi Issakar suante nam a-inkuan uh dungzui a, atantuam ding ua seh;

JOSHUA 19: khopite leh akhotate toh.Asher Gam Tan 24Aisan ngana Asher suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. 25Gamgi chiang Helkath, Hali, Beten, Akshaph, 26Allammelek, Amad leh Mishal ahi a; tumlam pang ah Karmel tang leh Shihor-libnath aphasuk hi. 27Nisuahna lam pang ah Beth-dagon akualtou a, Zebulun leh mallam pang ah Jiphthah-el Phaizang ah Beth-emek leh Neiel ava pha a; veilam ah Kabul pha in apai a, 28Ebron leh Rehob, Hammon leh Kanah, Zidon thupi pha in apai zel hi. 29Gamgi Ramah leh Tura khopi kulhbaang nei ah akualphei a, Hosah ah akualphei nawn a, Akzib gam tuipi ah apawt hi. 30Ummah, Aphek leh Rehob; akhopel teng toh khopi tengteng sawmnih-le-nih ahi. 31Huaite ahi Asher suante nam a-inkuan uh dungzui a, khopite leh akhotate atantuam uh.Naphtali Gam Tan 32Aisan gukna Naphtali suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. 33Agamgi chiang uh Heleph leh Zaananim a singkung lianpi a pan Adami-nekeb, Jabneel leh Lakkum pha in apai a, Jordan ah atawp hi. 34Tumlam pang ah Aznoth-tabor ah apaisuk a; huai a pan Hukok ah apai a, simlam ah Zebulun ava tung a, tumlam ah Asher atung a, nisuahna lam ah Judia gam a Jordan aphatou hi. 35Khopi kulhbaang neite: Ziddim, Zer, Hamath, Rakkath, Kinneret, 36Adamah, Ramah, Hazor, 37Kedesh, Edrei, En-hazor, 38Iron, Migdal-el, Horem, Beth-anath leh Beth-shemesh ahi a, akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm ahi. 39Hiaite ahi Naphtali suante nam a-inkuan dungzui ua khopite leh akhotate atantuam uh.Dan Gam Tan 40Aisan sagihna Dan suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. 41Atantuam gamgi uh Zorah, Estaol leh Ir-shemesh, 42Shaalabbin, Aijalon leh Jethlah, 43Elon, Timnah, Ekron, 44Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath, 45Jehud, Bene-berak, Gath-rimmon, 46Me-jarkon, Rakkon leh Joppa kiang a gamgi toh. 47Dan suante gamgi in huaite ava kheng a;

JOSHUA 19: Dan suante'n Lesem adou ua, ala ua, namsau in ahihmang ua, atangta uh. Huai ah ateng pah ua, apu uh Dan min tam in Lesem, Dan ana chi uhi. 48Hiaite ahi Dan suante nam a-inkuan uh dungzui a, huai khopi leh akhotate toh atantuam uh.Gam Hawmna Nanung 49Huchi in atantuam ding ua gamgi bawl bang zel a gam ahawm khit un, Israel suante'n Nun tapa Joshua alak uah tantuam abawlsak uhi. 50Toupa thupiak bang in Ephraim singtang gam a, akhopi ding in anget mah Timnath-serah apia ua; ama'n khopi asat a, huai ah ateng hi. 51Hiaite ahi siampu Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua leh Israel suante nam inkuan a lupente'n Shiloh a Toupa ma a kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak a ai san a, agoutan ding ua ana hawmte uh. Huchi in gam kihawm azouta uhi.

JOSHUA 20: 1Huan Toupa'n Joshua ahoupih a, 2“Israel suante kiang ah, ‘Kihumbitna khuate bawl in, Mosi zang a na kiang ua ka gen khitsa ahi. 3Kuapeuh thei lou leh tumloupi a mi that kha, huai ah atailut thei ding hi. Huchi in sisan phulami a pan nou a ding in kihumbitna ahi ding. 4Huai khopite lak a akoi hiam pen a, atailut chiang in, khopi kulhbaang kongpi lutna ah ava dingh ding a, huai kho upate bil a zak in atanchin ava tun ding. Amau khopi sung ah akiang uah apilut ding ua, alak ua aten sam theihna ding in a-omna ding asehsak ding uhi. 5Sisan phulami in ahon delhleh athatmi pen akhut ah na pe ding uh ahi kei. A-invengte thei lou a, athah ahi; ama in aho ngal kei hi. 6Omkhawmte ma a vai hawmsak dia adin ma leh siampu lianpen a pangpa asih mateng, huai khopi ah ateng ding hi. Huai nung in mithat mi pen amah khosung mahmah, ataikhiaksan khua, amah mah insung ah alut nawn ding ahi,’ chi in gen in,” achi hi. 7Huchi in Naphtali tanggam a Galili a Kadesh, Ephraim tanggam a Shekem leh Judia singtang gam a Kirath Arba, (huai tuh Hebron ahi) asep uhi. 8Suahlam ah Jordan gal a Jeriko ah Reuben nam gam a gamdai phaizang a Bezer, Gad nam gam a Gilead gam a Ramoth, Manasseh nam gam a Bashan a Golan asepta uhi. 9Hiai khuate ahi Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng leh alak ua namdang tengte a dia seh a om. Kuapeuh mi that kha, hiai khuate a tailut in mipi mai a adin mateng sisan phulami khut ah si lou in a-om thei ding hi. 20Kihumbitna Khopite

JOSHUA 21: 1Huchi in Levi chi inkuan a lupente siampu Eleazar kiang ah leh Nun tapa Joshua kiang ah leh Israel suante nam inkuan a lupente kiang ah ahoh uhi. 2“Kanaan gam a Shiloh khua ah, Toupa'n Mosi zang in ka tenna ding uh khopite, ka gante uh tatna ding akimvel toh na hon piak ding uh thu ana peta,” achi uhi. 3Huchi in Israel suante'n Toupa thupiak bang in atantuam ua kipan hiai khopite akimvel toh Levi chite apia uhi. 4Aisan Kohath suan tung ah apukta hi. Huchi in siampu Aaron suan Levi chi a mite'n Judah nam tantuam a pan, Simeon nam tantuam a pan leh Benjamin nam tantuam a pan khopi sawm-le-thum aisan in atangta uhi. 5Kohath suan dangte'n Ephraim nam suante tantuam a pan, Dan nam tantuam a pan leh Manasseh nam kimkhat tantuam a pan khopi sawm aisan in atangta uhi. 6Gershon suante'n Issakar nam suante tantuam a pan, Asher nam tantuam a pan, Naphtali nam tantuam a pan leh Bashan gam a Manasseh nam kimkhatte tantuam a pan, khopi sawm-le-thum aisan in atangta uhi. 7Merari suante'n a-inkuan uh dungzui in Reuben nam tantuam a pan, Gad nam tantuam a pan leh Zebulun nam tantuam a pan khopi sawm-le-nih atangta uhi. 8Israel suante'n Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu apiak bang in Levi mite khopite leh akimvel a gantatna ding gamte aisan in apia uhi. 9Huchi in Judah suante nam tantuam a pan leh Simeon suante nam tantuam a pan hiai khopi minlohte apia uhi. 10Huaite Levi suan Kohath pawl a namte, Aaron suan pawl a ding ahi; amau tung ah aisan apuk masapen hi. 11Amau a ding in Judah tanggam a Kiriath-arba leh akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh apia uhi. Kiriath-arba Hebron kichi ahi a, Arba ahihleh Anak pa ahi.

JOSHUA 21: 12Khopi kimvelte leh akhotate Jephunneh tapa Kaleb tantuam ding in apia uhi. 13Siampu Aaron suante Hebron, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Libnah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; 14Jattir khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Eshtemoa khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; 15Holon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Debir khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; 16Ain khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Juttah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Beth-shemesh khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; huai nam nihte tantuam a pan khopi kua apia uhi. 17Benjamin nam tantuam a pan Gibeon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Geba khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; 18Anathoth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Almon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li ape lai uhi. 19Aaron suan siampute khopi tengteng khopi sawm-le-thum ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh. 20Kohath suante inkuan, Levi pawl leh Kohath suan dangte'n leng atantuam khopite uh Ephraim nam tantuam a pan in ahi atan uh. 21Levite Khopite 22Kibzaim khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Beth-horon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li apia uhi. 23Dan nam tantuam a pan Eltekeh khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Gibbethon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; 24Aijalon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Gath-rimmon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi li. 25Manasseh nam kimkhatte tantuam a pan Taanak khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Gath-rimmon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi nih. 26Kohath suan dangte nam khopi tengteng kho sawm ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh.

JOSHUA 21: 27Gershon suante pawl, Levi namte Manasseh nam kimkhatte tantuam a pan, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, Bashan gam a Golan khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Beeshterah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi nih apia uhi. 28Issakar nam tantuam a pan Kishion khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Daberath khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; 29Jarmuth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, En-gannim khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li. 30Asher nam tantuam a pan Mishal khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; 31Helkath khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Rehob khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi li. 32Naphtali nam tantuam a pan, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, Galili gam a Kadesh khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Hammoth-dor khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Kartan khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi thum. 33Gershon pawl a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a, atantuam uh khopi tengteng sawm-le-thum ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh. 34Merari suante pawl inkuan, Levi pawl dangte bel Zebulun nam tantuam a pan Jokneam khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Kartah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, 35Dimnah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Nahalal khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi li. 36Reuben nam tantuam a pan Bezer khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Jahaz khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, 37Kedemoth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li. 38Gad nam tantuam a pan, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, Gilead gam a Ramoth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Mahanaim khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; 39Heshbon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Jazer khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; avek in khopi li.

JOSHUA 21: 40Hiai tengteng Levi pawl inkuan dangte Merari suante pawl a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a, akhopite uh ahi. Huchi in atantuam uh khopi sawm-le-nih ahi. 41Israel suante pawl tantuam a pan Levi pawl khopi tengteng sawmli-le-giat ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh. 42Hiai khopite'n akimvel anei chiat ua; khopi tengteng huchibang vek ahi uh.Israel In Gam Aluah 43Huchi in Toupa'n apipute uh kichiam a piak ana chiamsa gam tengteng Israelte apia hi. Amau huai gam aluah ua, asung ah atengta uhi. 44Toupa'n apipute uh kiang a kichiam a, ana chiamsa bang ngei in mun chih ah muanna apia a, amelma tengteng uh kuamah ama ua pangzou himhim a-om kei uhi. Toupa'n amelma tengteng akhut uah ape vek hi. 45Toupa'n Israel inkuante kiang a, ahoih lam thu a na gen tengteng vuaksuak khat leng a-om kei a, ahong tung vek hi.

JOSHUA 22: 1Huai khit in Joshua in Reuben pawlte, Gad pawlte leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte asam hi. 2Akiang uah, “Toupa sikha Mosi in hon thupiak peuhmah na zuita ua, ke'n thu ka hon piak peuhmah leng na zuita uhi. 3Tuni tanpha in na unaute uh na taisan kei ua, Toupa na Pathian un hih dia thu ahon piak na zuita uhi. 4Toupa na Pathian un akiang ua ana gensa bang in, na unaute uh muanna apeta hi. Huaiziak in Toupa sikha Mosi in Jordan gal a na tantuam ding ua hon piaksa gam ah, na puanin kaihte uah pai nawnta un. 5Toupa sikha Mosi in Toupa na Pathian uh it a, alampi tengteng tawn a, athupiakte zui a, amah len tinten a, na lungtang tengteng uleh na kha tengteng ua amah nna sem chiatchiat dia hon thupiakte, huai thupiak leh dante pilvangtak in limsak un,” achi hi. 6Joshua in amau avualzawl a, apaisakta hi. Huchi in apuanin lam uah apaita uhi. 7Manasseh nam kimkhatte Mosi in Bashan gam ah tantuam apia a; akimkhat dangte Joshua in tumlam pang ah Jordan gal ah a-unaute lak ah tantuam ape zawta hi. Joshua in a-inn lam ua apaisak dek lai in avualzawl hi. 8Akiang uah, “Na puanin lam uah hauhsakna tamtak toh paita unla, ganta tampi toh, dangka toh, dangka-eng toh, dal toh, sik toh, silh-le-ten tampi toh. Na melmate ua pan na gallakte uh unaute toh kihawm dialdial un,” achi hi.

JOSHUA 22: 9Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte akik nawn ua, Kanaan gam Shiloh a pan Israel suante kiang a pan Gilead gam, Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu a na piak bang in amau tantuam ding mawng a sehsa gam a pai ding in apawtkheta uhi.Jordan Pang A Maitam 10Kanaan gam a Jordan gamgi ava tun un Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte'n Jordan lui gei ah maitam lianpi kholang mahmah khat adoh uhi. 11Ngai in, Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte'n Kanaan gam chin tak, Jordan gamgi, Israel suante gam lam pang ah maitam adoh uh, chih Israelte kiang ah kuahiam khat in ava hilh hi. 12Israel suante'n hiai thu azak un, Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng amaute dou tum in Shiloh ah akikhawm uhi. 13Israel suante'n Gilead gam a Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte kiang ah siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas asawl uhi. 14Milian sawmkhat, Israel nam a inkuan a lupente'n Phinehas azui uhi. 15Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte kiang Gilead gam ah ahoh ua, akiang uah, 16huchi in Toupa mi omkhawm tengteng in, “Bangziak a tuni a Toupa tung a hel tum a maitam doh a, Toupa lehngatsan na hi ua?” achi uhi 17“Peor mun a tatsiatnate, ei a dia neu lua a sim theih ahi maw? Tuni tan in leng huai a i khelhna ua pan silsiang i hi nai kei ua, Toupa mi omkhawmte lak ah hipi alen tanpha in leng. 18Tuni a Toupa lehngatsan na tup maizen uh? Huchi in tuni in Toupa tung ah na na helta maimah ua, zingchiang a zaw Israel mipi omkhawm tengteng tung a amah heh ding ahita ve.

JOSHUA 22: 19Na gam luah uh siang lou ahihleh, Toupa gam, Toupa biakbuk omna mun ah hong pai unla, ka lak uah hong teng un. Himahleh Toupa i Pathian un achih louh maitam dang bawl in Toupa tung ah hel kei unla, kou tung ah leng hel kei un. 20Zer tapa Akan in hamsiat thil ah ana hihkhial a, Israel mipi tengteng tung ah hehna ahong om ahi kei maw? Huai mi tatsiatna ah amah kia amangthang tuam kei hi,” achi uhi. 21Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte'n Israel nam a intekpente adawng ua, akiang uah, 22“Toupa, pathiante' Pathian, pathiante Toupa Pathian in athei. Israel pawl in leng thei hen! Ka maitam doh uh Toupa lehngatsan a, hel tupna hiam thilhihkhelh tupna hiam a ka hih uleh, tuni in leng hon hawi kei un, 23halmang thillatna ding hiam, nek ding thillatna ding hiam, lemna thillatna ding hiam ahihleh, Toupa mahmah in thukhen hen. 22Joshua In Suahlam Namte A-inn Uah Asawl 24Tunung chiang in na suante un ka suante uh kiang ah, Nou Toupa, Israelte' Pathian na zat phakna uh bang om ahia? 25Nou Reuben suante leh Gad suante aw, Toupa'n kou leh nou a ding in Jordan gamgi ding in abawl hi. Toupa ah tantuam na nei sam kei uh, ahon chi kha ding uh, chi a, pilvan ziak a aziak neitak a ka hih uh ahi. Na suante un kou suante Toupa laudan thei lou in abawl kha thei uhi. 26Huaiziak in kisa un, maitam i bawl ding uh, halmang thillatna ding leh kithoihna ding bel hilou in.

JOSHUA 22: 27Kou leh nou leh i nung ua i suante kikal ah theihpihna ahi dia, huchi in ka halmang thillatte uh leh ka kithoihnate uh leh ka lemna thillatte ua Toupa nna ka septheihna ding uh leh na suante un leng tunung chiang a ka suante uh kiang a Toupa ah tantuam na nei sam kei uh ahon chihlouhna ding un, ka chi ua ahi. 28Huaiziak in hichi ahi ding a, tunung chiang a ka kiang uh hiam, ka suante uh kiang uh hiam a huchibang a ahon chih chiang ua kou, ‘En ve ua, ka pipute un Toupa maitam abawl uh omdan, halmang thillatna ding leh kithoihna ding ahi kei a, kou leh nou kikal a theihpihna ahi zaw hi,’ ka chihna ding ua, ka hih uh ahi. 29Toupa tung a hel a Toupa lehngatsan a, Toupa ka Pathian uh maitam, abiakbuk chin a maitam kia lou halmang thillatna ding hiam, nek ding thillatna ding hiam, theihpihna ding hiam a maitam bawl ka hihlouhdan uh,” achi uhi. 30Siampu Phinehas leh akiang a omkhawmte' miliante, Israel pawl nam intekpente'n Reuben suante leh Gad suante leh Manasseh suan kimkhatte thugen azak un akipaksak mahmah hi. 31Siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas in Reuben suante leh Gad suante leh Manasseh suan kimkhatte kiang ah, “Toupa tung a thil na hihkhelh louh ziak un, tu'n zaw Toupa i lak ua om ngeina ahi, chih ka theita ve ua. Huchi in Israel suante Toupa khut a pan na hunkheta uh,” achi uhi. 32Huchi in siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas leh milian pawl, Reuben suante leh Gad suante a pan leh Gilead gam a pan Kanaan gam ah Israel suante kiang ah akik nawnta ua, thu ava tun nawn uhi. 33Huai thute'n Israel suante akipaksak mahmah a; Israel suante'n Pathian aphatta uh. Huchi in Reuben suante leh Gad suante dou a, atenna gam uh suksiatsak ding in kuankhiak atum nawn kei uhi. 34Reuben suante leh Gad suante'n huai maitam pen, “theihpihtu,” achi uhi. “Toupa, Pathian a na hi ngei chih i kikal ua theihpihtu ahi ngal a,” achi uhi.

JOSHUA 23: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa'n Israelte amelma tengteng a pan galmuanna apiak nung hun sautak a pai nung in Joshua ahong upa in, ahong tekta hi. 2Joshua in Israel tengteng, a-upate leh a-intekpente, avaihawmte leh aheutu teng uh asamsak a, akiang uah, “Ka upa in, ka tekta hi. 3Toupa na Pathian un noute ziak a hiai nam tengteng tung a athilhihte na muta ua; Toupa na Pathian un, amah mah in noute a ding in gal ahon dousak hi. 4Ngai un, Jordan lui leh tumlam Tuipi Lian kikal a nam omlaite zou in, aisan in na tantuam ding un ka hon pia hi. 5Toupa na Pathian un na ma uah amau adelhkhe dia, na muhbatlouhna uah ahawlmang vek ding. Toupa na Pathian un na kiang ua agensa bang in agam uh na luah ding uhi. 6Huaiziak in Mosi Dan laibu a gelh tengteng taklam ah hiam veilam ah hiam a na pialsan hetlouhna ding un hangsantak in zui un. 7Hiai nam na lak ua omlaite toh tengkhawm kei un. Apathiante uh min gen kei unla, aminte un kichiam kei unla, a-nna uh leng sem kei unla, ama uah leng kun in a-nna uh sem kei un. 8Himahleh tuni tan a na hih gige bang un, Toupa na Pathian uh lenkip un. 9Toupa'n na ma uah nam thupitak leh hattakte adelhkhe khinta hi. Na ma uah tuni tan in kuamah pangzou himhim a-om kei uhi. 10Na lak ua mi khat in mi sangkhat adelh ding, na kiang ua agensa bang in, Toupa na Pathian un nou a ding in gal ahon dousak ngal a. 11Toupa na Pathian uh it ding in pilvang mahmah un.

JOSHUA 23: 12Pilvang lou a, na lehngatsan himhim ua, hiai namte lak a khosuaksun, na lak ua omlaite ngei, na pawlmat ua, amaute toh pasal leh zi a na kineih ua, amaute na kithuahpih ua, amau leng nou ahon kithuahpih uleh zaw, 13Toupa na Pathian un hiai namte na mitmuh un ahon delhkhiaksak nawn kei ding hi. Toupa na Pathian un hiai gam hoihtak a hon piak a pan na manthat vek masiah uh amaute nou a ding in pial leh thang leh na pang ua ding in khetna chiang leh na mit ua ding in ling ahong hi zaw ding uh, chih teltak in thei un. 14“Ngai un, tuni in leitung pumpi dan bang in ka paita ding hi. Toupa na Pathian un na tungtang uh, ahoih lam, ana gensa tengteng vuaksuak khat lel leng a-om kei, chih na lungtang tengteng uh leh na lungsim tengteng un na thei uhi. Na tung uah ahong tungvekta a, khat lel leng vuaksuak a-om kei hi. 15Huaiziak in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa na Pathian un na kiang ua thil hoih agen tengteng na tung ua ahong tun vek tak mah bang in, Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak hiai gam hoihtak a pan ahon manthatsak vek masiah Toupa'n thil hoihloute na tung uah atungsak ding hi. 16Toupa na Pathian un ahon thupiak thukhun na tatlek san ua, pathian dangte nna sem a, kun a na biak uleh, Toupa hehna na tung uah a-om dia, ahon piak gam hoihtak a pan na mangthang pah ding uhi,” achi hi. 23Joshua Kikhakna Thugen

JOSHUA 24: 1Huan Joshua in Israel nam tengteng Shekem ah asamkhawm a, Israel upate, a-intekpente, avaihawmte leh aheutute uh asamsak a; Pathian ma ah ahong kimusak chiat uhi. 2Joshua in mi tengteng kiang ah, “Toupa, Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Na pipute uh nidanglai in lui khen lam ah ateng ua, Abraham pa leh Nahor pa Terah hialte leng, amaute'n pathian dangte nna asem uhi. 3Na pu uh Abraham huai lui gal a pan ka pikhia a, Kanaan gam teng tawnsuak in ka pi a, asuante ka pungsak a, Isak ka pia hi. 4Isak kiang ah Jakob leh Esau ka pia a; Esau tantuam ding in Seir tang ka pia a; Jakob leh atate Aigupta ah apaisuk uhi. 5Mosi leh Aaron ka sawl a, alak ua thillamdang hih in Aigupta ka gawt a: huai khit in amaute ka hon pikhia hi. 6Na pipute uh Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhia a, tuipi na hong tung ua; Aigupta mite'n na pipute uh kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite toh Tuipi San tan in anungdelh uhi. 7Amau Toupa asam ua, Aigupta mite toh na kikal uh amialsak bikbek a, amaute tuipi tuamsak in akhuhkhumsak a; Aigupta gam a ka thilhih na mit un amu a; gamdai ah sawtpi na teng uhi. 8Jordan lui gal a om Amorte gam ah ka hon pi a; amau ahon dou uh. Na khut uah amaute ka hon pia a, agam uh na luahta uhi. Amau ka hon hihmangsakta hi. 9Moab kumpipa Zippor tapa Balak ahong kisa a, Israel adou a; Beor tapa Balaam nou hon hamsiat ding in asamsak hi. 10Himahleh Balaam thu ka ngaikhe kei hi. Huaiziak in nou ahon vualzawl zosopta hi. Huchi in akhut a pan ka hon hunkheta hi. 11Jordan lui na kan ua, Jeriko khua na tungtou ua;

JOSHUA 24: Jeriko khomite'n hon na dou ua, Amorte, Perizte, Kanaante, Hitte, Girgaste, Hivte leh Jebuste toh; amau na khut uah ka hon peta hi. 12Na ma uah tunpi ka sawl a, huai in na ma uah amau adelh a, Amorte' kumpipa nihte tan in leng. Himahleh na namsau un hiam, na thal un hiam in ahi kei hi. 13“Na sepkhiak het louh uh gam leh na bawl het louh uh khopite ka hon pia a, huaite ah na teng ua; na suan louh uh grephuan leh olive huan a pan na ne uhi. 14“Huaiziak in Toupa laudan siam unla, chitak leh thutak in ama nna sem un. Na pipute un Lui gal leh Aigupta gam a, a-nna asep uh pathiante koihkhia unla; Toupa nna sem un. 15Toupa nna sep hoih lou a na theih uleh tuni in kua nna ahia na sep ding uh, tel un. Na pipute un Lui gal a, a-nna asep uh pathiante hia, na luah uh gam a Amorte pathiante? Kei leh inkuante'n zaw Toupa nna ahi ka sep ding uh,” achi hi. 16Mipite'n, “Toupa Pathian paisan a, pathian dangte nna ka sep louh ding dan uh. 17Toupa i Pathian ngei ahi, i pipute toh Aigupta gam saltanna inn a pan hon pikhia a, i mitmuh a chiamtehna thupi taktak hih a, i paina teng leh mipi tengteng i nawk paisuakna ah leng hon vengbit hi. 18Toupa'n i ma ngei uah mi chih, huai gam a om Amorte ngei adelhkhe vek hi. Huaiziak in kou leng Toupa nna ahi ka sep ding uh; amah lah ka Pathian uh ahi ngal a,” chi in adawng uhi. 19Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Toupa nna na sem thei kei ding uh. Amah lah Pathian siangthou ahi ngal a. Mullit hat Pathian ahi a;

JOSHUA 24: na tatleknate uh leh na khelhnate uh angaidam kei ding hi. 20Toupa na paisan ua, namdang pathiante nna na sep uleh, na tung ua thil hoih ahih khit nung in ahong kihei dia, hon hih na in ahon hihmangthang ding,” achi hi. 21Mipite'n, Joshua kiang ah, “Hilou e, Toupa nna ka sem kinken zaw ding uh,” achi uhi. 22Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “A-nna sep tum in Toupa na telta uh, chih atheihpihtute noumau mah na hi uh,” achi hi. Amau, “Theihpihtute ka hi uh,” achi uhi. 23Amah mah in, “Huchi ahihleh na lak ua namdang pathian omte koihmang unla, na lungtangte uh Toupa, Israelte' Pathian lam ah awnsak un,” achi hi. 24Joshua In Shekem Ah Mipite Kiang Ah Thu Agen 25Huai ni in Joshua in mipite toh kikal ah thu akhung a, Shekem ah dan thuseh leh thuseh asehsak hi. 26Joshua in hiai thu Pathian Dan Laibu ah agelh a; suang lianpi ala a, Toupa Mun Siangthou chin a tosaw nuai ah aphut hi. 27Joshua in mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Ngai un, hiai suang i thu hon theihpihtu hi hen. Toupa'n i kiang ua thu agen tengteng aza vekta hi. Huaiziak in na thu uh hon theihpihtu ahi ding hi, huchi lou in zaw Pathian na kitheihmohbawl kha ding uh,” achi hi. 28Huchi in Joshua in mipite atantuam gam chiat uah apaisakta hi.Joshua Leh Eleazar Sihna 29Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai thilte khit in Nun tapa Joshua, Toupa sikha kum za-le-sawmkhat a upa ahih in asita hi. 30Gaash tang mallam pang, Ephraim tanggam a amah tantuam gamgi sung Timnath-serah ah avuita uhi. 31Joshua damsung leh amah khup a dam, Toupa'n Israelte a dia thil ahih tengteng theihpih mite damsung in Israelte'n Toupa nna asem uhi. 32Israel suante'n Aigupta gam a pan Joseph guhte apuaktouh uh Shekem a Shekem pa Hamor tapate a pan Jakob in dangka zakhat a aleina mun ah avui ua; huai mun Joseph suante tantuam ahita hi. 33Huan Aaron tapa Eleazar asi a; atapa Phinehas tantuam dia apiak Ephraim tang ah avui uhi.

RUTH 1: 1Moab Ah Elimelek Leh A-inkuan Apem Uh 2Huai mi min Elimelek ahi, azi min Naomi ahi, atapate nih min Mahlon leh Kilon ahi. Amau Judah gam a Bethlehem, Ephrath mi ahi uh. Moab gam ah ahoh ua, huai ah a-om nilouh uhi. 3Elimelek, Naomi pasal asi a, amah leh atapate nih kia ahita uh. 4Amau Moab gam numei zi in anei ua, akhat pen min Orpah ahi a, akhat pen min Ruth ahi. Huai ah kum sawm a-omta uhi. 5Mahlon leh Kilon asi tuaktuak ua; huchi in huai numei atapate nih leh apasal in asihsanta uhi.Naomi Leh Ruth Jerusalem Kik Nawnna 6Huchi in amoute toh Moab gam a pan kik nawn ding in akisa uh; Toupa'n nek ding pia a mite avehdan Moab gam a pan ana zak ziak in. 7Huchi in a-omna a pan amoute nih toh apawt ua; Judah gam a kik nawn ding in apaita uhi. 8Naomi in amou nihte kiang ah, “Na nute uh inn tuak ah pai nawnta un. Misi tung leh ka tung a siamtak a na hih bang un Toupa'n na tung uah hih hen. 9Toupa'n na nih un na pasalte uh inn a khawlna na muhtheihna ding un hon hehpih hen,” achi hi. Huchi in atawp a, aw suah hial in akapta uhi. 10Amau akiang ah, “Pai kei ni ung, na chite kiang a na paina ah ka tel sam ding uh,” achi uhi. 11Naomi in, “Ka tanute aw, pai nawn zaw un. Bangziak a ka kiang a hong pai lai mahmah ding na hi ua? Na pasal ding uh tapate ka pai thei nawn dia hia? 12Ka tanute aw, kisa unla, pai un; pasal nei ding in lah ka upa lota ngal a.

RUTH 1: Lametna ka nei chi mah leng, tuzan mahmah in leng pasal nei in tapate leng nei mah leng, 13apichin tan ua om ding na hi ding uam? Pasal lou in na om nilouh ding ua hia? Hi tel lou e, ka tanute aw; nou ziak in ka lungkhamna a-uang semsem hi. Toupa khut ka tung a tu ahita ve,” achi hi. 14A-aw uh suah in akap nawn leuleu uhi. Huchi in Orpah in api atawp a; Ruth in bel alen tinten hi. 15Ama'n, “Ngai in, na moupihnu achite kiang leh apathian kiang ah apaikik nawnta. Nang leng na moupihnu delh inla, pai nawnta in,” achi hi. 16Ruth in, “Nang khen ding leh nang zui lou a kik nawn ding in hon kun ke'n. Na paina peuh ah ka pai dia; na giahna peuh ah ka giak dia; na chite ka chite ahi ding ua, na Pathian ka Pathian ahi ding. 17Na sihna peuh ah ka si dia, huai ah na hon vui sam ding ahi. Nang leh kei sihna lou ngal thil dang in ahon khenleh Toupa'n ahihhih in hon hih henla, hiai sang a thupizaw in leng,” achi hi. 18Huchi in akiang a pai atum tinten chih atheih in adaihsanta hi. 19Huchi in Bethlehem tan apaikhawmta uh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Bethlehem atun un, akhozang un aling ua, numeite'n, “Hiai Naomi ahi maw?” achi uhi. 20Ama'n akiang uah, “Naomi hon chi kei un. Mara hon chi zaw un, Bangkim hihtheipa'n lah khatak in ahon hihta ngal a,” achi hi. 21“Buchingtak in ka pawt a, Toupa'n avuak in hon pi nawn hi. Toupa'n ka tung ah alungkimlouhna ahihlang a, Bangkim hihtheipa'n ahon hihgentheihdan theigige napi a bangziak a Naomi hon chi lailai na hi ua?” achi hi. 22Huchi in Naomi ahong kik a, amounu Moab mi Ruth toh Moab gam a pan ahong kik uhi. Barli buhlak pat tung lai in Bethlehem atung uhi.

RUTH 2: 1Huan Naomi in apasal tanau, Elimelek beh, mineizoutak tanau anei a; amin Boaz ahi. 2Ruth In Boaz Lou Ah Asem 3Huchi in ahohta a, buh la mite lakmaih ava zong a; huchi in Elimelek beh Boaz lou ah ava hoh kha geih hi. 4Huchi in ngai in, Bethlehem a pan Boaz ava hoh a, buh la mite kiang ah, “Na kiang uah Toupa om hen,” achi hi. Amau, “Toupa'n nang hon vualzawl hen,” chi in adawng uhi. 5Huchi in Boaz in asikha, buh la mite tung a heutu kiang ah, “Hiai kua nungaknou ahia oi?” achi hi. 6Abuh la mite tung a heutu asikha in, “Moab nungaknou, Moab gam a pan Naomi toh hong pai ahi. 7Ama'n, ‘hon hehpih inla, na buhsang ka zong dia, buh la mite'n abuhphal uh alakkhawm khit chiang un ka zong zel ding aw’ achi hi. Huchi in ahong pai a, inn a tomchik a-om chih louh zingsang a pan a-om nilouh hi,” chi in adawng hi. 8Huchi in Boaz in Ruth kiang ah, “Ka tanu, ngai dih, buhsang zong in lou dang ah hoh ke'nla, hiai a pan paisuan ke'n. Ka sikha nungakte kiang ah om gige in. 9Abuhlak uh en gige inla, anung uh sui zel in. Tangvalte nang bangmah hon chih lou ding in thu ka pevekta hi. Na dangtak peuh chiang in tuibel a tangvalte tui tawisa dawn zel in,” achi hi. 10Huchi in akun a, lei si in abokkhup a, akiang ah, “Namdang hinapi ing a, nang hichibang a na hon theihnop a, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. 11Boaz in adawng a, akiang ah, “Na pasal sih nungsiah na pi tung a na thilhihdan tengteng mi'n ahon hilh vek uh.

RUTH 2: Na nu leh na pa leh na pianna gam paisan atum a lam a na mi theih ngeilouhte kiang a na hong paidante leng. 12Toupa'n na thilhih hon din henla, Toupa, Israelte' Pathian, kihumbitna dia akha nuai na muan in kipahman tampi hon pia hen,” achi hi. 13Ama'n, “Ka toupa, na mitmuh in deihsakna ka tang a, na hon lungmuan a, na sikha nungakte lak a mi hi kei mah leng, na sikhanu hoihtak in na hon houpihta ngal a,” achi hi. 14An nek hun in Boaz in akiang ah, “Hong pai inla, tanghoute hong ne sam inla, tanghou themte uain thuk ah hong diah in,” achi hi. Huchi in buh la mite kiang ah atu a; buhkan apia a; ane a, anek nung in leng akhamval lai hi. 15Buhsang zong dia adin nawn in, Boaz in atangvalte kiang ah, “Buhphalte lak ah leng tawmsak zel unla, tai kei un. 16Alomte leng dohkhiaksak unla, nutsiat zel unla, tom henla, tai kei un,” chi in thu apia hi. 17Huchi in lou a buhsang nitaklam tan in azong hi. Azonsa akhen a, barli buh ephah khat hiamtak apha hi. 18Avan kisuan in khopi ah apaita hi. Api in abuhsang zon ana mu a; ama'n anek kham val asitte asuahkhia a, apia hi. 19Api in akiang ah, “Tuni a koilam a buhsang zong na hia? Koi ah ahia na va sep? Ahon na theinuampa vualzawl in om hen,” achi hi. Ama'n kua kiang ah ahia ava sep chih api ahilh hi. “Tuni a nna ka va sepna pa min Boaz ahi,” achi hi. 20Naomi in amounu kiang ah, “Toupa, mihing leh misi tung a ahehpihna tawp tuan ngei lou in amah vualzawl hen,” achi hi. Naomi in akiang ah, “Huai mi, i kinaihpih, i tanau bul ei ve,” achi hi. 21Moab mi Ruth in, “Kei kiang a leng hon chi ei ve,” achi hi. 22Naomi in amounu Ruth kiang ah, “Ka tanu, lou dang a ahon muh hetlouhna ding in asikha nungakte lak ngen ah pai lechin ahoih ding,” achi hi. 23Huchi in barli buh leh buhpi lak khit mateng Boaz sikha nungakte lak kia ah buhsang zong in ahoh a, api kiang ah ateng hi.

RUTH 3: 1Huan api Naomi, apasal nu'n akiang ah, “Ka tanu, nang a ding in khawlna ka hon zonsak kei dia hia, huchi in nang a ding in ahoih ding hi. 2I tanaupa Boaz, asikha nungakte toh nna na sepna pa om hilou hia? Ngai in, tuzan in phual ah barli buh azapsiang ding hi. 3Ruth In Pasal Amu 4Huan hichi ahi ding a, alup chiang in alupna chiamteh inla, lut inla, akhe lem inla, va lum in. Ama'n na hih ding ahon hilh ding,” achi hi. 5Ama'n akiang ah, “Na gen teng ka hih ding,” achi hi. 6Huchi in phual ah ahohsuk a, api hilh bang in ava hihta hi. 7Boaz in an ne a, adawn khit in alungtang akipak a, buhvum bul a lum ding in apaita a, huan, minu leng awlawl in ahong pai a, akhe alem a, alumta hi. 8Huan hichi ahong hi a, ngai in, akhe kiang ah numei khat ana lumta mai a, zan lai in huai mipa kiguih in akihei hi. 9Ama'n, “Kua na hia?” achi hi.Ama'n, “Na sikhanu Ruth ka hi. Huchi in na sikhanu na puan hon zawn in, ka tanau bul lah na hi ngal a,” achi hi. 10Ama'n, “Ka tanu, Toupa'n nang hon vualzawl hen. Tangval zawng hiam, hausa hiam na zuih louh in atung lai sang in anunglam ah hoihna na hihlang zaw hi. 11Huchi in ka tanu, lau ke'n. Na gen bang in na tung ah ka hih ding. I khua a mi tengteng in numei kizentak na hi chih athei vek ngal ua. 12Kitanau nai i hi ngut hi. Himahleh kei sang a naizaw a-om hi. 13Tuzan zaw om peuhmah inla, zingchiang zingsang in na tung a ama'n atanau hih ding ahihnopleh ahoih hi.

RUTH 3: Himahleh tanau hih ding na tung a ahihnop keileh, tanau hih ding pen Toupa ahin bang in ke'n ka hih ding. Zingsang tan lum nilouh in,” achi hi. 14Huchi in zingsang tan in akhebul ah alum hi. Kuamah akimuh chet theih ma in athoukhia hi. Ama'n, “Phual ah numei a hong chih himhim kuamah in thei kei hen,” achi hi. 15Akiang ah, “Na puansilh la inla, doh in,” achi hi. Huchi in adoh a, barli buh tehna guk atehsak a, asuan a; huchi in khua ah apaita hi. 16Api kiang atun in, “Ka tanu, bang na hong chi a?” ana chi hi. Ama'n, huai mipa in atung a thil ana hih tengteng ahilhta hi. 17“Hiai barli buh tehna guk ahon pia a, ‘na pi kiang ah avuak in pai ke'n,’ ahon chi,” achi hi. 18Ama'n, “Ka tanu, bangchibang in ahia thil ahong om ding na theih ma in tu maimai in. Tuni a hiai thil ahih khit mateng huai mipa dai mai lou ding ahi,” achi hi.

RUTH 4: 1Huchi in Boaz kulh kongpi ah ahohtou a, huai ah atu hi. Ngai in, atanau bul uh atungtang thu Boaz in agen ahong pai hi. Huai mi kiang ah, “Eh! Nang na hi maw! Hong pai inla, hong tu dih ve,” achi hi. Amah hong pai in atuta hi. 2Huai khua a upate lak a mi sawm api a, akiang uah, “Hiai ah tu dih ua,” achi a, huchi in amau atuta uhi. 3Atanau bul uh kiang ah, “Moab gam a pan hong kik Naomi in i unaupa Elimelek gam azuak hi. 4Boaz In Ruth Akitenpih 5Boaz in, “Naomi khut a pan huai gam na lei ni'n, misi zi, Moab numei Ruth a pan misi min bei lou a, agouluah ding mi a-om zel theihna ding in na lei tel ding ahi,” achi hi. 6Atanau bulpa in, “Kei a ding in zaw ka tan thei kei. Huchi lou in zaw keimah gouluah ka mansuah kha ding. Ka tattheihna nang tang mai in. Ke'n zaw tan thei lou ka himai hi,” achi hi. 7Nidanglai a Israelte lak a thil bangkim ahihkipna ding ua akitatdan uleh akikhendan uh hichi ahi. Khedap aphel ua, avengte uh apia ua, huai Israelte lak a ahihdan uh ahi. 8Huchi in atanau bulpa un Boaz kiang ah, “Nang a ding in lei zaw in,” achi hi. Huchi in akhedap aphelta hi. 9Boaz in upate leh mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Tuni in noute Elimelek thil neih tengteng leh Kilon leh Mahlon thil neih tengteng Naomi khut a pan ka lei chih theihpihtute na hi uh. 10Huai kia hilou in misi min amanlouhna ding in Moab numei Ruth, Mahlon zi ka zi ding in ka lei a, huai, tuni in noute atheihpihtute na hi uh,” achi hi. 11Kulh kongpi a mipi tengteng leh upate'n, “Theihpihtute ka hi uh.

RUTH 4: Na inn a numei hong lut Rakil leh Leah, Israel inkuan dingsak nihte bang in Toupa'n bawl hen. Nang Ephrathah ah suanhuaitak in hong om inla, Bethlehem ah minthangtak in hong om in. 12Toupa'n hiai nungaknou a pan suan ahon bawlsak ding ziak in na inkuan uh Tamar in Judah asuansak Perez inkuan bang hong hi hen,” achi uhi.Boaz Leh Asuante 13Huchi in Boaz in Ruth api a, azi ahong hita hi. Huchi in akithuahpih a, Toupa'n nau apaisak a, tapa anei hi. 14Numeite'n Naomi kiang ah, “Tuni mahmah a tanau nai bei a hon omsak lou, Toupa phat in om hen. Israelte lak ah amin hong thang hen. 15Amah na hinna tungdingpa leh na tek lam a hon vakpa ahong hi dia; na mounu nang hon itnu, tapa sagihte sang a nang a dia hoih in amah lah asuangta ngal a,” achi uhi. 16Naomi in nau ala a, apom a, adonta hi. 17A-inveng numeite'n amin aphuak ua, “Naomi a ding in tapa ahong piangta,” chi in amin Obed asa uhi. Amah, David pa Jesse pa ahi. 18Hiaite Perez suante ahi uh. Perez in Hezron asuang; 19Hezron in Ram asuang; Ram in Amminadab asuang; 20Amminadab in Nashon asuang a, Nashon in Salmon asuang; 21Salmon in Boaz asuang a, Boaz in Obed asuang; 22Obed in Jesse asuang a, Jesse in David asuang hi.

1 SAMUEL 1: 1Elkanah Leh A-inkuan Shiloh Ah 2Ama'n zi nih anei a, akhat min Hannah ahi, akhat min Peninnah ahi. Peninnah in tate anei a, Hannah in bel tate anei kei hi. 3Huai mi akhua ua kipan Shiloh ah Sepaihte' Toupa houpih ding leh kithoih ding in kum teng in ahohtou hi. Huai ah Eli tapate nih, Hophni leh Phinehas, Toupa siampute a-om uhi. 4Elkanah kithoih ni ahong tun in, azi Peninnah leh atapate leh atanute tengteng tantuan abawlsak hi. 5Hannah tan nih abawlsak a, Hannah lah a-it mahmah ngal a. Himahleh Toupa'n asul akhaksak hi. 6Toupa'n asul akhaksak ziak in alangnu'n alungkhamsak nak hi. 7Huchibang a kum teng a ahih ziak in Toupa inn ahohtouh teng in alungkhamna atokthou nak hi. Huchi in akapkap a, an leng ane kei. 8Apasal Elkanah in akiang ah, “Hannah, bang achia ahia na kah? Bang achia an ne lou na hia? Bang achia lungkham na hia? Tapa sawm sang in nang a ding in ka hoihzaw kei a hia?” achi hi.Hannah Leh Eli 9Huchi in Shiloh a anek ua adawn khit un Hannah adingh a, siampu Eli Toupa tempul kong khuambul a atutna ah atu hi, 10Hannah lungsim haksa mahmah in a-om a, Toupa kiang ah athum a, khase mahmah in akap hi. 11Thu achiam a, “Sepaihte' Toupa aw, na sikhanu gimna en a, na hon theihgige a, na sikhanu na hon mangngilh louh a, na sikhanu tapa na piakleh adamsung teng Toupa ka pe dia, alu ah mulmetna zat ahi kei ding,” achi hi. 12Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa ma a athum san lai in Eli in amukphun ana chiamteh hi. 13Hannah in alungtang in agen a, amuk kia atangsak a, a-aw bel zak ahi kei hi. Huaiziak in Eli in zukham asa hi.

1 SAMUEL 1: 14Huchi in Eli in akiang ah, “Bang tan ahia kham a na om nilouh ding? Na uain koihmang in,” achi hi. 15Hannah in, “Kham kei veng e, ka toupa. Lungsim lungkham mahmah numei ka hi. Uain leng, zu chik leng ka dawn kei, Toupa ma ah ka lungsim ka suahkhia ahi zaw. 16Na sikhanu Belial tanu in hon ngoh het ke'n. Ka lungsim a dimlet lunggimna leh ka lungkhamna genkhia ka hi zaw hi,” chi in adawng hi. 17Eli in, “Lungmuangtak in pai in, Israelte' Pathian in na thilnget nang hon pia hen,” chi in adawng hi. 18Ama'n, “Na sikhanu na mitmuh in deihsakna musak in,” achi hi. Huchi in numei apaita a, an ane a, lungkham mel aputa kei hi.Samuel Pianna Leh Latna 19Zingsangpi in athou ua, Toupa abia ua, apai ua, Ramah a a-inn uh atung nawnta uh. Elkanah in azi Hannah akithuahpih a, Toupa'n amah atheigige hi. 20Huan hichi ahong hi a, Hannah in nau apai a, ahun ahong tun in tapa anei hi. “Toupa ka nget ziak in,” chi in amin Samuel asa hi. 21Huchi in Elkanah leh a-inkote tengteng Toupa ma a kum teng a akithoihna uh lan ding leh athuchiam uh tangtun ding in ahong paitou uhi. 22Hannah bel ahohtou kei hi. Apasal kiang ah, “Kei zaw naupang in nawinek atawp masiah ka hohtou kei ding. Huai hun chiang in Toupa ma a akilat theihna ding in ka pi ding. Huai ah a-om nilouhta ding,” achi hi. 23Apasal Elkanah in akiang ah, “Hoih ding na chih bang zel in hih in. Anawinek na tawpsak tan in om in. Himahleh Toupa'n athu hihkip lel hen,” achi hi. Huchi in nawinek atawp masiah huai ah numei a-om a, atapa nawinek atawp masiah nawi anesak hi.

1 SAMUEL 1: 24Nawinek atawptak in, tangbuang ephah khat leh uain thawl khat tawi in bawngtal kum thum a upa toh Shiloh a Toupa inn ah ata naupang chik paipih in, apitou hi. 25Bawngtal khat gou in, naupang Eli kiang ah api uhi. 26Ama'n, “Toupa, na hin bang in ka gen ahi, kei zaw, aw toupa, hiai lai a na kiang a dingh a Toupa kiang a thum numei ka hi. 27Hiai naupang ngen in ka thum a, Toupa'n ka nget ahon peta. 28Huaiziak in ke'n leng Toupa kiang ah ka lan hi. Adamsung teng Toupa a dia lat ahi,” achi hi.Huai ah ama'n Toupa abia hi.

1 SAMUEL 2: 1Huan Hannah athum a, hichi in achi,“Ka lungtang Toupa tung ahakipak mahmah, Toupa ah ka kii pahtawi in a-om.Ka melmate tung ahka kam letsak in a-om;na hotdamna a ka kipah mahmah ziak in. 2Hannah Thumna 3Huchi tel a kisathei in thugen nawn kei unla; na kam ua pan pau uang himhim pawt kei hen. Toupa lah pilna Pathian ahi ngal a,ama'n thilhihte hoihtak in abuk zel hi. 4Mihat thalpeute akitansak a,akisuite taihatna a gak in a-om hi. 5Niang leh tai a omte nek dingzong in alohtawm ua,gilkialte kial nawn lou uhi.Achiingnu'n ta sagih aneita a,ta tampi neinu abahta hi. 6 Toupa'n athat a, ahingsak hi.Han ah apaisuksak a, apikhetou hi. 7 Toupa'n azawngsak a,ahausasak a,ahihniam a, ahihsang hi. 8Leivui a pan azawngte adingtousak a,ekvu a pan khutdohte adomtou hi.Miliante kiang a a-omsak theih a,thupina laltutphahatantheihna ding un.Lei kingaknate Toupa a ahi a,ama'n atung uah khovel angata ngal a. 9Amisiangthoute khe akem ding a,migiloute bel mial lak ahdaihsak in a-om ding uh.Hatna a kuamah inzou lou ding ahi ngal a. 10 Toupa melmate a i tamgawp ding ua,van a pan vanpiging bang inamaute adou ding. Toupa'n kawlmong pha invai ahawm ding a;akumpipa kiang ah hatna ape dia,athaunilhpa kii apahtawi ding,” achi hi. 11Huchi in Ramah ah a-inn ah Elkanah apaita hi. Huchi in naupang in siampu Eli ma ah Toupa nna asemta hi.Eli Tapate 12Eli tapate Belial tapate ahi ua; Toupa athei kei uh. 13Mite lak a siampute hihdan ngeina ahihleh mi'n kithoihna ahong lat chiang un, sa huan laitak in siampu sikha sa thukna sikkhut zum thum nei tawi in ahong pai zel hi. 14Belgongza hiam, belgong nei hiam, bel khaina nei hiam, bel hiam sung asunsuk a, huai sa thukna zum in ahon thukkhiak tengteng siampu in ala zel hi.

1 SAMUEL 2: Huchibang in Israel mi huai a hong pai tengteng a pan Shiloh ah ana hihsak zel uhi. 15Huai ban ah, thau akhul ma un siampu sikha ahong pai a, kithoihmi kiang ah, “Siampu a ding haimin ding sa hon pia in. Na sa huanmin adeih kei, asial adeih hi,” achi hi. 16Mi'n akiang ah, “Athau pen khul phot uhenla, huai khit chiang in na hinna in adeih zahzah na la ding,” ana chih chiang un ama'n, “Hilou e, tu mah a na hon piak pah ding ahi. N'on piak keileh thagum in ka la ding,” achi hi. 17Huchi in Toupa mitmuh in tangvalte khelhna athupi mahmah a, mite'n lah Toupa kiang a kithoihna lat thilkihhuai in angaita uhi.Shiloh Ah Samuel 18Himahleh Samuel in bel naupang chik in, puanmalngat siampu puanak silh in Toupa ma ah nna asem hi. 19Huai lou leng anu'n puanaktual neu akhuisak a, kum teng kithoihna uh lan dia apasal toh ahoh chiang un kum teng in atawisak zel hi. 20Eli in Elkanah leh azi avualzawl a, “Toupa a dia na thillat uh mun luah ding numei suan Toupa'n hon pia hen,” achi hi. Huchi in a-inn uah apaita uhi. 21 Toupa'n Hannah aveh a, nau apai a, tapa thum leh tanu nih anei hi. Toupa ma ah naupang Samuel ahong khanglianta hi.Eli Leh Atapate 22Eli bel atek mahmahta hi. Israel mi tengteng tung a atapate thilhih tengteng leh kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak bul a nasem numeite ana kithuahpih zel thute uh aza hi. 23Huchi in akiang uah, “Bangziak a hichibang thilhih na mai ua? Hiai mi tengteng a pan na thilhihdan hoihloute uh ka na za ngal a. 24Hichi ding hilou ahi, ka tapate aw, na tanchin uh ka zak ahoih lou lam ngen ahi. Toupa mite na taleksak uhi.

1 SAMUEL 2: 25Mi khat, midang tung a akhelhleh Pathian in vai ahawmsak ding hi. Himahleh Toupa tung a mi akhelhleh kua'n amah a ding in angetsakta dia?” achi hi. Huchi pipi in leng apa uh aw angaikhe kei ua, Toupa'n amaute athah ding ziak in. 26Naupang Samuel akhanglian deuhdeuh a; Pathian leh mihing deihsak in a-om hi.Eli Inkuan Tungtang Genkholhna 27Eli kiang ah Pathian mipa khat ahong a, akiang ah, “Toupa'n hichi in achi, ‘Aigupta gam a Pharaoh inn a na om lai un na pa inkote kiang ah ka kilak kei maw? 28Israel nam tengteng lak a pan ka siampu hi ding, ka maitam a thil lan ding, gimlim hal ding leh siampu puanak silh dia amah ka tel ahi kei maw? Na pa inkote kiang ah Israel mite halmang thillat teng ka pia ahi kei maw? 29Bangziak in ahia ka tenna a na lat ding ua ka thupiak ka kiang a kithoihna leh kei a tuam dia thillat pen lei toh sikden a, kei sang a na tapate na zahtak zawk a, noumau na kisukthauna ding ua ka mi Israelte kithoihna ahoihpente na zat uh?’ 30Huaiziak in Toupa Israelte' Pathian in, ‘Ke'n zaw na inkote leh na pa inkote tangtawn in ka ma ah na om ding uh,’ ka na chi ngei hi. Himahleh tu in Toupa'n, ‘Na om het kei ding uh. Hon zahtak peuhmah ka zahtak dia, hon musit peuhmah ka musit ding,’ achi hi. 31Ngai in, ‘na bante leh na pa inkote bante ka tankhiak ni ahong tung, na inn ah tekkun a dam a-om kei ding uh. 32Ka tenna inn ah, Pathian in Israel hauhsakna apiak teng ah melma na mu dia, tangtawn in na inn ah tekkun a dam a-om kei ding uh.

1 SAMUEL 2: 33Ka maitam a pan ka hihman louh ding na mi pen na mit hihkhamtu leh na lungsim lungkhamsaktu ahi ding. Na inn a hong piang peuhmah adawnsih zel ding uhi. 34Hiai, na tapate nih Hophni leh Phinehas tung a thil tung ding nang a ding in chiamtehna ahi ding. Ni khat in anih un asi tuaktuak ding uhi. 35Kei a ding in siampu muanhuai ka dingkhesak dia, huai in ka lungtang leh ka lungsim toh kituak in nna asem ding. Inkuan kiptak in ka lamsak dia, tangtawn in ka thaunilhmi ma ah a-om ding. 36Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, na inn a om lai tengteng dangka leh tanghou ngen in akiang ah akuan ding ua, tanghou tawmchik bek nek ding ka muhtheihna ding un siampu nna khat bek hon semsak ve aw, chi in ka hong thum hi, achi ding uh,’ ” achi hi.

1 SAMUEL 3: 1Huan naupang Samuel in Eli ma ah Toupa nna asem hi. Huai lai in Toupa thu tung avang mahmah a; alangtang a kilaknate a-om kei hi. 2Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai in, Eli amun a alup lai in, amit amial panta a, khua agina muhthei nawn ngel kei hi. 3Samuel Kiang Ah Toupa Kilak 5Eli kiang ah ava tai a, akiang ah, “Hiai ah ka om, na hon sam a,” achi hi. Ama'n, “K'on sam kei; va lum nawn in,” achi hi. Huchi in apai a, ava lum nawn hi. 6 Toupa'n Samuel asam nawn hi. Samuel athou a, Eli kiang ah ahoh a, “Hiai ah ka om, na hon sam a,” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “K'on sam kei, ka tapa, va lum nawn in,” achi hi. 7Huai lai in Samuel in Toupa athei nai kei a, Toupa thu leng akiang a kilaksak ahi nai kei hi. 8 Toupa'n Samuel asam nawn a, huai athumveina ahita. Amah athou a, Eli kiang ah ahoh a, “Hiai ah ka om, na hon sam a,” achi hi. Huchi in Eli in naupang Toupa'n sam ahi chih atheita hi. 9Huaiziak in Eli in Samuel kiang ah, “Pai inla, va lum nawn inla, ahon sap nawnleh, Toupa, thu gen in, na sikha in angaikhia, na chi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel apaita a, amun ah ava lum nawn hi. 10 Toupa ahong pai a, hong dingh in, ama a asap bang in, “Samuel, Samuel,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel in, “Thu gen in, na sikha in angaikhia hi,” achi hi. 11 Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Ngai in, Israel gam ah aza peuhmahte bil langnih a aphuaitak in thil khat ka hih ding hi.

1 SAMUEL 3: 12Huai ni in a-inkuan tungtang thu ka gen tengteng abul a pan atawp tan in Eli tung ah ka hih ding ahi. 13Atapate'n Pathian agensiatna khelhna uh theigige napi a, akham louh ziak in a-inkuan tangtawn a ding in ka hawmsak ding hi, chih ka hilh khinta ngal a. 14Huaiziak in Eli inkuan kiang ah Eli inkuan bohsiatna kithoihna in hiam, thillat in hiam, chikchiang in leng siansak theih ahi kei ding, chi in ka kichiam khinta hi,” achi hi. 15Zingsang tan in Samuel alum a, Toupa' inn kongkhakte ahong hi. Samuel in huai kilakna Eli theihsak alau hi. 16Huchi in Eli in Samuel asam a, “Samuel, ka tapa,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. 17Ama'n, “Bang thil ahia Toupa'n na kiang a agen? Ka kiang ah bangmah iim ke'n aw. Na kiang a agen tengteng ka kiang a iim na neihleh na tung ah Pathian in ahihhih in hih henla, huai sang a thupizaw in leng,” achi hi. 18Samuel in thil tengteng ahilh sipsip a, akiang ah bangmah iim anei kei. Huchi in ama'n, “Toupa thuthu ahi mah ve, hoih asak bang in hih hen aw,” achi hi. 19Samuel ahong khanglian deuhdeuh a, akiang ah Toupa a-om a, athu himhim lei lak ah akesak kei hi. 20Huchi in Dan a pan Beer-sheba tan in Israel mi tengteng in Toupa zawlnei dia Samuel hihkip ahi, chih ana theita uhi. 21Shiloh ah Toupa akilak nawn a; Toupa thu in Samuel kiang ah Shiloh a kilak lah ahi ngal a.

1 SAMUEL 4: 1Huan Samuel thu Israel mi tengteng lak ah athangkheta hi. Israel mite Philistia mite dou ding in akuankhia uhi. Ebenezer kiang ah panmun akhoh ua, Philistia mite'n Aphek ah panmun akhoh uhi. 2Philistia mite Israel mite na dal ding in ana kiphalh uh. Ahong kidou uleh Philistia mite ma ah Israel mite azahlakta ua, kidouna mun ah sepaih sangli vel athat uhi. 3Mipite agiahmun ua ava pai uleh Israel upate'n, “Bangziak in ahia tuni a Toupa'n Philistia mite ma a hon zahlaksak mahmah? I kiang ua om a i melmate khut a pan hon hondam ding in Shiloh a pan Toupa thukhun bawm i va la ding uh,” achi uhi. 4Thukhun Bawm Suhsakna 5Huchi in Toupa thukhun bawm agiahmun uh ahong tun in, Israel mi tengteng ngaihtak in akikou zuazua ua, lei nangawn athawn ging zuazua hi. 6Philistia mite'n akikou husa uh azak un, “Hebrute giahmun a kikou husa gingta zuazua mai bang chihna ahia le?” achi uh. Agiahmun uah Toupa thukhun bawm ahong tung ahi, chih atheita uhi. 7Philistia, “Giahmun ah Pathian ahong hi,” achih ziak un mite'n alau uhi. “I tung agik hi! Tuma lam in huchibang a-om ngei ngal kei a, achi uhi. 8I tung agik hi! Huai Pathiante khut hattak a pan kua'n ahia hon hondam ding? Huai Pathiante ahi, Aigupta mite gamdai a hipi chiteng a that. 9Aw, nou Philistia mite aw, nou sikha ua a-om bang ua nou Hebrute sikha a na omlouhna ding un hattak in om unla, kipasalsak un. Kipasalsak unla sual un,” achi uhi. 10Huchi in Philistia mite'n asual ua, Israel mite azahlaksak ua, michih apuanin lam chiat uah ataikek uh. Anak thah mahmah ua, Israelte sepaih singthum asi uhi.

1 SAMUEL 4: 11Pathian bawm alaksak ua, Eli tapa nih, Hophni leh Phinehas leng athat uhi.Eli Sihna 12Sepaih lak a Benjamin suan mi khat atai a, apuan khawng kikek nengnung in leh alu a lei kai niaunuau in huai ni mahmah in Shiloh ava tung hi. 13Ahong tun in, ngai in, Eli in lampi gei a tutna a tu kawm in ana en nilouh a, Pathian bawm ziak in alungtang aling ngal a. Mipa'n khua atun a tanchin agenleh akhomi teng akapkhia uhi. 14Eli in akikou husa uh azak in, “Tua thawm ging vengvung bang chihna ahia?” achi hi. Mi khat kintak in ava hoh a, Eli ava hilh hi. 15Eli bel kum sawmkua-le-giat a upa ahi a, amit amialta a, khua amu thei nawn kei. 16Huai mipa'n Eli kiang ah, “Sepaih lak a pan hong paikhia ka hi. Tuni a sepaih lak a pan hong taikhia ka hi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka tapa, bangchibang in thil a-om a oi?” achi hi. 17Tanchin hon tunpa'n adawng a, “Israel mite Philistia mite ma ah ataikek ua, mipi lak ah kithahna thupitak a-om lai a, na tapate nih Hophni leh Phinehas leng asi ua, Pathian bawm leng alaksak uh,” achi hi. 18Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian bawm thu agentak in kongpi bul a tutphah a pan athalpuk a, amah tekta a kikhouh zou nawn lou ahih ziak in, angawng akitan a, asita hi. Israel tung ah kum sawmli sung vai ahawm hi.Phinehas Zi Sihna 19Amounu, Phinehas zi in nau apai a, neih ahun mahmahta hi. Ama'n Pathian bawm laksak ahih thu leh apu leh apasal si uh ahi chih azak in akunsuk a, nauvei nat in apha a, ta aneita hi. 20Asih dek lai in akiang a dingh numeite'n akiang ah, “Lau ke'n, tapa na neita,” achi uhi. Himahleh adawng het kei a, alimsak sam kei hi. 21“Thupina in Israel apawtsanta,” chi in nau min Ikabod asa hi. Pathian bawm lah alaksakta ua, apa leh apasal lah asita ngal ua. 22“Thupina in Israel apawtsanta, Pathian bawm lah alaksakta ngal ua,” achi hi.

1 SAMUEL 5: 1Huan Philistia mite'n Pathian bawm ala ua, Ebenezer a pan Ashdod ah apaipih uhi. 2Philistia mite'n Pathian bawm ala ua, Dagon inn ah alalut ua, Dagon kiang ah akoih uhi. 3Ashdod khomite zingkhangpi a athoh uleh, ngai in, Toupa bawm ma ah Dagon amai a lei si in ana puk vialvual mawk hi. Dagon ala ua, a-omna mun ah akoih nawn uhi. 4Azing nawn zingkhangpi a athoh uleh, ngai in, Toupa bawm ma ah Dagon amai a lei si in ana puk vialvual mawk a; Dagon lu leh akhutpek bawm langnih kitankhia kongpi bul ah ana kikham hi. 5Philistiate Lak Ah Thukhun Bawm 6Huchi in Toupa khut Ashdod khua mite tung ah agik a, amaute ahihsia a, Ashdod khua leh akiang vel a omte zaangtan hipi in agawtta hi. 7Huchi in Ashdod a mite'n huchibang thil tung amuh un, “Israelte' Pathian bawm i kiang uah om gige kei hen, eimah leh i pathian Dagon tung ah akhut khak ana tel mai,” achi uhi. 8Huaiziak in Philistia hausa tengteng akiang uah asamkhawm ua, “Israelte' Pathian bawm bang i lohta dia?” achi uh. Amau, “Israelte' Pathian bawm Gath ah puak hi hen,” chi in adawng uhi.Huchi in Gath ah Israelte' Pathian bawm apaipihta uhi. 9Hichi ahong hi a, apaipih lai un Toupa khut in huai khua ahihseta hi. Kho mite aneu leh alian agawt vek a, atung uah zaangtan hipi alengsak hi. 10Huchi in Pathian bawm Ekron ah atun ua, Ekron khomite'n Israelte' Pathian bawm eite leh i mite that ding in i kiang ahon tunta uh, chi in akikou vengvung uhi. 11Huchi in Philistia hausa tengteng asamkhawm ua, “Israelte' Pathian bawm paimangsak unla, koute leh ka mite ahon thahlouhna ding in a-omna mun ngei ah pai nawn hen,” achi uh. Kho pumpi ah sihna khop siatna a-om a; Pathian khut lah huai khua ah agik mahmah ngal a. 12Asiloute'n zaangtan avei chiat ua, van ah huai kho kikou husa atungtou hi.

1 SAMUEL 6: 1Huan Toupa bawm Philistia mite gam ah kha sagih sung a-om hi. 2Philistia mite'n, “Toupa bawm bang i loh ding ua? Akiang ah tatlek kithoihna lan ngeingei un. Huchi in hihdam in na om ding uh. Huchi in bangziak a akhut nou a pan lakkhiak a om lou ahia chih na thei ding uh,” achi uhi. 4Huchi in amau, “Akiang a ka tatlekna thillat ding bang ahia?” achi uh. 1 SAMUEL 6: bawngpi anawi suk lai nih api ua, kangtalai ah akhih ua, anoute uh bel inn lam ah akhum uhi. 11Sansim lim dangka-eng leh zaangtan lim koihna singlem toh kangtalai ah Toupa bawm akoih uhi. 12Bawngpite'n Beth-shemesh lam zuan in lampi azui vengveng ua; huchi in ham kawmkawm in lampi azui ua, taklam ah hiam, veilam ah hiam apial het kei uh. Philistia hausate'n Beth-shemesh gamgi pha in azui uhi. 13Beth-shemesh khomite'n phaizang ah buh ana la ua, adaktou ua, bawm amu ua, akipahpih mahmah uhi. 14Huai kangtalai Beth-shemesh a mi Joshua lou ah alut a, suangpi lian mahmah omna tak ah akhawlta hi. Kangtalai sing a-ek ua, Toupa kiang ah bawngpite halmang thillat in alan uhi. 15Levi chite'n Toupa bawm dangka-eng thil omna singlem toh alakhia ua, suangpi tung ah akoih uhi. Beth-shemesh khomite'n huai ni mah in halmang thillatte leh kithoihnate Toupa kiang ah alan uhi. 16Huai Philistia hausa ngate'n amuh nung un, huai ni mahmah in Ekron kholam ah apai nawnta uhi. 17Philistia mite'n dangka-eng zaangtan lim Toupa kiang a tatlek thoihna dia alat uh, Ashdod kho tuam a ding in khat, Gaza kho tuam a ding in khat, Ashkelon kho tuam a ding in khat, Gath kho tuam a ding in khat, Ekron kho tuam a ding in khat ahi. 18Dangka-eng sansim lim ahihleh kho tengteng kulh nei khua leh singtang lam khua leng sim vek a hausa ngate a Philistia mite kho zah ahi. Toupa bawm angakna suangpi mahmah uh Beth-shemesh khomi Joshua lou ah tuni tan in a-om nilouh lai hi. 19 Toupa bawm sung a-et ziak un Beth-shemesh khomite ama'n agawt a, alak ua mi sangnga-le-sawmsagih tak athat hi. Toupa'n anak thah ziak in mite'n asuun uhi. 20Beth-shemesh khomite'n, hiai Pathian siangthou Toupa ma ah kua adingh thei in ei a pan kua kiang ah ahia apaitouh ding? achi uh. 21Huchi in Kiriath-jearim khomite kiang ah, “Philistia mite'n Toupa bawm ahong koih nawn ua, hong suk unla na kiang uah latou dih ua,” chi a hilh ding in thupo mite asawlta uhi.

1 SAMUEL 7: 1Huchi in Kiriath-jearim a mite ahohsuk ua, Toupa bawm alatou ua; mual a Abinadab inn ah alalut ua, atapa Eleazar Toupa bawm kemtu in aseptuam uhi.Samuel In Israel Tung Ah Vai Ahawm 2Huan hichi ahong hi a, Kiriath-jearim a bawm a-om sung sawtpi, kum sawmnihtak ahi. Huchi in Israel inkuan tengteng in Toupa alungzuan nawnta uhi. 3Samuel in Israel inkuan tengteng kiang ah, “Na lungtang tengteng uh toh Toupa lam hong nga na hih taktak uleh, gamdang pathiante leh Ashtaroth na lak ua kipan koihmang unla, na lungtang uh Toupa a ding in kisakholsak un. Amah kia nna sem un; huchi in Philistia mite khut a pan nou ahon tankhe ding hi,” chi in agen hi. 4Huchi in Israel mite'n Baal leh Ashtaroth akoihmang ua, Toupa nna kia asemta uhi. 5Samuel in, “Israel mi tengteng Mizpah ah samkhawm vek unla, Toupa kiang ah ka hon thumsak ding,” achi hi. 6Huchi in Mizpah ah apaikhawm ua, tui atawi ua, Toupa ma ah asungbua uh. Huai ni in an angawl ua, huai ah Toupa tung ah i na khialta uh, achi uhi. Samuel in Mizpah ah Israel mite vai ahawmsak hi. 7Thukhun Bawm Kiriath-jearim Ah 8Huchi in Israel mite'n Samuel kiang ah, “Philistia mite khut a pan hon hondam dia Toupa i Pathian na hon sapsak tawp ke'n,” achi uh. 9Samuel in belamnou nawi ne lai ala a, halmang thillat in Toupa kiang ah alan hi. Israel mite a ding in Samuel in Toupa asam a, Toupa'n adawng hi. 10Samuel in halmang thillat alat laitak in Philistia mite'n Israel mite sual ding in ahon naih uhi. Himahleh huai ni in Toupa'n Philistia mite tung ah ngaihtak in van agingsak a, abuaisakgawp a, Israel mite ma ah zoh in a-om uhi.

1 SAMUEL 7: 11Mizpah a pan Israel mite apawt ua, Philistia mite adelh ua, Beth-kar nuai atun tan un athat zel uhi. 12Huchi in Samuel in suang ala a, Mizpah leh Shen kikal ah aphut a, “Hiai tan Toupa'n hon panpih hi,” chi in amin “Ebenezer” asa hi. 13Huchi in Philistia mite azahlakta ua, Israel gam ah ahoh nawnta kei uh. Huchi in Samuel damsung tengteng Toupa khut in Philistia mite adou hi. 14Philistia mite'n Israel mite khua alakte uh Ekron a pan Gath tan in Israel mite ape nawn vek uh. Agam Israel mite'n Philistia mite khut a pan atankheta uhi. Israel mite leh Amor mite kal ah kilemna a-om hi. 15Huchi in adamsung teng Samuel in Israelte vai ahawmsak hi. 16Kum teng in Bethel leh Gilgal leh Mizpah aveh zel a; huai mun teng ah Israelte vai ahawmsak hi. 17A-inn omna ahih ziak in Ramah ah apai nawn zelzel hi. Huai ah Israel mite vai ahawmsak hi. Huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam khat adoh hi.

1 SAMUEL 8: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, Samuel a-upata a, Israel mite tung a vaihawmmi in atapate abawl hi. 2Ata masapen min Joel ahi a, azom min Abijah ahi. Namdang tengteng bang a ka tung ua vaihawm ding kumpipa hon bawlsak in,” achi uhi. 6Himahleh akiang a, “Ka tung ua vaihawm ding kumpipa hon pia in,” achih un Samuel akipaksak kei hi. Huchi in Toupa kiang ah Samuel athum hi. 7Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Mite'n na kiang a agen tengteng uh ngaikhia in. 1 SAMUEL 9: 1Huan Benjamin gam a Benjamin suan a mi khat mihat leh hangsan mahmah a-om a, amin Kish ahi. 1 SAMUEL 9: Ka ma ah mun sang lam zuan in pai inla, tuni in ka kiang ah an na ne ding hi. Zingchiang zingsang in ka hon paisak ding. 1 SAMUEL 16: 1Huan Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Israel mite kumpipa dia ka deih louhsa Saul ziak in bang tan ahia na lungkham ding? Na kii ah sathau thundim inla, kuan in.
