1 SAMUEL 18: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul kiang a thu agen khit in Jonathan hinna leh David hinna ahong kipeh geih a, huchi in Jonathan in ama hinna a-it bang in amah a-it hi. 2Saul in huai ni in a-omsak ngal a, apa inn ah apaisak nawnta kei hi. 3Huchi in ama hinna bang geih a amah a-it ziak in Jonathan in David toh thu akhung hi. 4Jonathan in apuansilh lai asuah a, David apia a, akivatna leh anamsau leh athalpeu leh ataigakna nangawn apia hi. 5Saul in asawlna peuh ah David ahoh zel a, kizentak in agamtang hi. Saul in sepaihte heutu in amah abawl a, hiai tuh mi tengteng ngaih in leh Saul sikhate ngaih in ahoih hi.Saul In David Ahaza 6Ahong pai un hichi ahong hi a, Philistia mi that David ahong pai in Israel kho teng ah numeite lasa leh lam kawm in khuangta leh thil gingtheite toh, nuamsatak in kumpipa Saul dawn ding in ahong pawtkhia uhi. 7Numeite'n lam kawm ala a kidawngtuah in, “Saul in asang asang athat, David in asing asing,” achi uhi. 8Hiai lasak in Saul akipaksak kei a, aheh mahmah hi. David bel asing asing that in angai ua, kei ka hihleh asang asang kia that in ahon ngai uh. Kumpigam lou ngal atan ding dang bang ahia om? achi hi. 9Saul in huai ni a pan David ahazat bawlta hi. 10Huan hichi ahong hi a, azingsang in Saul tung ah Pathian sawl kha gilou ahong tung a, insung ah thu agen hi. David in nidang a ahih mah bang in kaihging atum hi. Saul in ateipi atawi hi. 11Saul in ateipi akhoh a, “Huai baang ah David ka khohden ding,” achi hi. David in nihvei akihepkhiaksan hi.

1 SAMUEL 18: 12Akiang a Toupa a-om ziak leh Saul apaisan ziak in Saul in David alau hi. 13Huaiziak in Saul in amah a pan akisuansak a, asepaih sangkhat tung a heutu in abawl hi. Huchi in mipi lak ah David lut in apawt zel hi. 14David bel ahih peuhmah ah piltak in agamtang zel a; akiang ah Toupa a-om hi. 15Saul in piltak in agamtang chih amuh in alau hi. 16Himahleh Israelte leh Judahte tengteng in David a-it uh; alak ua lut a pawt zel lah ahi ngal a.David In Saul Tanu Akitenpih 17Saul in David kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka tanu upazaw Merab na zi ding in ka hon neisak ding. Hangtak in hon gum peuhmah lechin. Toupa kidounate dou in,” achi hi. Saul in, “Ke'n zaw atung a khut kha lou in Philistia mite'n atung ah khut kha zaw uhen,” achi hi. 18David in Saul kiang ah, “Kua ahia ka hih a, ka hinna leh Israelte lak a ka pa inkuante leng bang ahia ahih uh, kumpipa makpa ka hihna ding?” achi hi. 19Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, David toh Saul tanu Merab kitensak ahong hun in, Meholath mi Adriel zi ding in ape mawk hi. 20Saul tanu Mikal in David a-it a; Saul ahilh ua; huai in akipaksak hi. 21Saul in, “A-awkna ding thang ahong hihtheihna ding leh Philistia mite'n atung a khut akhaktheihna ding un amah ka pe ding,” achi hi. Huaiziak in Saul in David kiang ah, “Tuni in ka makpa na hihna ding hunlem anihveina na nei,” achi hi. 22Huchi in Saul in asikhate thu apia a, “Asimtham in David houpih unla, ngai in, kumpipa na tung ah akipak mahmah a, asikhate tengteng in leng nang ahon it uh. Huchi in kumpipa makpa in om in, chi un,” achi hi.

1 SAMUEL 18: 23Saul sikhate'n huai thu David bil ah agen uhi. David in, “Mizawng leh kuamah theih phak ngel louh kei a ding in kumpipa makpa hih thil namai in na sep ua hia?” achi hi. 24Saul sikhate'n, “David in huchibang in achi,” chi in ahilh uh. 25Saul in David kiang ah hichibang in na chi ding uh, “Kumpipa'n kumpipa melma phulakna ding in Philistia mite zekvun zakhat chih louh man bangmah adeih kei achi, chi un,” achi hi. Saul in David lah Philistia mite khut a sihsak lungsim in anei bikbek hi. 26Asikhate'n huai thu David ahilh uleh kumpipa makpa hih David akipak mahmah hi. 27Huchi in ni chiamte abei ma in, David leh amite athou ua, Philistia mite zanih ava that uhi. David in azekvun uh ahon pua a, kumpipa makpa ahihtheihna ding in kumpipa kimtak in apia hi. Huchi in Saul in atanu Mikal azi ding in apeta hi. 28Saul in David kiang ah Pathian a-om chih atheitelta hi. Saul tanu Mikal in amah a-it hi. 29Huchi in Saul in David alau semsem a, Saul bel David melma ahi denta hi. 30Philistia' miliante ava kuankhe zel uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, akuankhiak peuhmah chiang ua Saul sikha tengteng sang a piltak a David agamtat ziak in amin athang semsem hi.

1 SAMUEL 19: 1Huan Saul in atapa Jonathan leh asikha tengteng kiang ah David thah ding thu agen hi. 2Himahleh Saul tapa Jonathan in David adeihthoh mahmah hi. Jonathan in, “Ka pa Saul in thah ding in hon zong hi, huaiziak in, zingchiang zingsang in pilvang inla mun-guk ah bu nilouh in. 3Ka pawtkhe dia, na omna gamlak ah ka pa kiang ah ka va dingh dia, na tungtang thu ah ka pa ka houpih ding. Huchi in ka muhdan ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi. 4Jonathan in apa Saul ma ah David aphat a, akiang ah, “Asikha David tung ah kumpipa khial het kei hen. Na tung ah lah akhial kei a, athilhihte lah nang a dia hoih pipi ahi zaw ngal ua. 5Sih khawk sa lou in Philistia mi asual a, Toupa'n Israel tengteng a ding in hotdamna thupitak asepkhiaksak hi. Huai nang ngei in na mu a, na kipak mahmah hi. Huaiziak in sisan poi khoih lou tung ah bang ding in ahia na khelh ding, aziak bangmah om lou a David na thah ding?” achi hi. 6Huchi in Saul in Jonathan thugen azui hi. Saul in kichiam in, “Toupa ahin lai teng amah thah ahi kei ding,” achi hi. 7Jonathan in David asam a, huai thil tengteng ahilh hi. Jonathan in Saul kiang ah David api a, tuma lam mah bang in akiang ah a-om nawnta hi. 8Kidouna ahong om nawn a, David akuankhia hi. Philistia mite ava sual a, tamtak ava that a, ama ah ataikek uhi. 9Saul bel a-inn a teipi tawi a, atut lai in atung ah Toupa sawl kha gilou ahong tung hi. David in kaihging atum hi. 10Saul in ateipi in David baang toh khohden atum hi. Himahleh Saul kiang a pan akitholhkhe geih a, teipi pen baang ah akhohtal hi.

1 SAMUEL 19: Huchi in David ataikhia a, huai zan in asuakta hi. 11Saul in azingsang a David tang a that ding in mi asawl hi. David zi Mikal in, tuzan a na hinna na humbit keileh zingchiang in hon that ding uh, chi in ahilh hi. 12Mikal in David tohlet ah akhaikhesuk a; huchi in ataimang a, asuakta hi. 13Mikal in milim ala a, lupna ah alumsak a, alulam ah kel mul lukham akoih a, puan in akhuh hi. 14David pi dia Saul in mi ahon sawl kiang ah, “Achi ana,” ana chi hi. 15Saul in David va en ding in mi asawl nawn a, “Alupna toh hon zawngtou le uchin ka na that ding,” achi hi. 16Amisawlte ava lut uleh, ngai in, lupna ah milim alulam a kel mul lukham kham in ana om hi. 17Saul in Mikal kiang ah, “Bangziak a hichibang a hon khem a, bitna dia ka melma pawtsak na hia?” achi hi. Mikal in Saul adawng a, “Hon paisak in, bangziak a nang hon that ding ka hia? ahon chi,” achi hi. 18Huchi in David ataimang a, asuakta hi. Ramah a Samuel kiang ava tung a, Saul in atung a athilhih tengteng ava hilh hi. Amah leh Samuel akuan ua, Naioth ah a-om uhi. 19Saul In David Asawi 20Huchi in David pi ding in Saul in thupotu asawl hi. Zawlnei pawlte thugenkhol a a-om lai uh leh Samuel atung ua heutu a om ava muh un Saul in amisawl thupote tung ah Pathian Kha ahong tung a, amau leng thugenkhol in a-om sam uhi. 21Huai Saul ahilh uleh, thupotu dang asawl nawn a, amau leng thugenkhol in ava om zel uhi. Saul in athumveina ding in thupotu dang asawl nawn a, amau leng thugenkhol in ava om nawn zel uhi.

1 SAMUEL 19: 22Amah leng Ramah ah ava hoh a, Seku mun a tuileh lian mahmah ava pha hi. “Samuel leh David koi a om ahi ua?” chi in adong hi. Mi kuahiam khat in, “Ngai in, Ramah a Naioth ah a-om uh,” achi hi. 23Ramah a Naioth ah ahoh a; Pathian kha atung ah ahong tung samta a, apai zel hi. Ramah a Naioth atun matan thugenkhol in a-om lai hi. 24Ama'n apuansilhte leng asuah a, Samuel ma ah thugenkhol in a-om a, huai ni nitum leh huai zankhua in vuaktang in alum hi. Huaiziak in “Saul leng zawlnei lak a tel sam ahi maw?” achi uhi.

1 SAMUEL 20: 1Huan David bel Ramah a Naioth a pan atai a, Jonathan kiang ava tung hi. “Bang ka hih a ahia? Bang ahia ka tatsiatna? Na pa tung ah bang ahia ka hihkhelh, hichitak a hon thah atup maizen?” achi hi. 2Ama'n, “That lou e. Na si het kei ding. Ngai in, ka pa'n kei hon theisak lou in bangmah himhim lian in neu taleh, ahih ngei kei hi. Bang ding in ahia hiai thute kei ahon iim ding? Ahon iim kei hial ding,” achi hi. 3David in, “Na mitmuh in deihsakna ka tang chih na pa'n atheichian mahmah ngal a, alungsim in, hiai zaw Jonathan in thei dah hen, huchi lou in zaw alungkham lo kha ding, chi ahi ding. Himahleh Toupa hinna leh na hin bang in ka gen ahi, sihna toh ka kikal uh kal khat lel ahi,” chi in uangtak in agen hi. 4Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Na hinna in adeih peuhpeuh ka hon hihsak zel ding,” achi hi. 5David in Jonathan kiang ah, “Ngai in, zingchiang a kha thak ding ahi. Kumpipa kiang a ankuang um ngeingei ding ka hi. Himahleh ani thum ni nitaklam tanpha in gamlak a kibu ding in ka kuan zaw ding. 6Na pa'n ka om louh lam ahon theihkhiakleh, David in akhua Bethlehem a va hoh zual ding hon ngen ngutngut a; a-inkuan ua dia kum teng a akithoih hun uh ahi,” na chi in. 7“Ahoih vo oi, achihleh na sikha alungmuang ding. Himahleh ahehleh thil hoih lou hih atum, chih thei mai in. 8Huaiziak in na sikha hoihtak in hih in. Na sikha lah Toupa thukhun ah na lutpihta ngal a. Himahleh tatsiatna nei ka hihleh nangmah in hon that mai in. Bangziak a na pa kiang a hon pi chitchiat ding na hia?” achi hi.

1 SAMUEL 20: 9Jonathan in, “That lou e. Ka pa'n na tung a thil hoih lou hih atum chih ka theih peuhmah leh nang hilh lou in ka om mahmah dia hia?” achi hi. 10Huchi in David in Jonathan kiang ah, “Na pa'n hehngoh in hon na dawng taleh kua'n ahon hilh dia?” achi hi. 11Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Pai dih, gamlak ah i va hoh peuhmah ding,” achi hi. Huchi in gamlak ah ava hohkhawm uhi. 12Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Toupa Israelte' Pathian atheihpihtu hi hen. Zingchiang hichih hun hiam, ani thum ni hiam a ka pa ka va dawp hun a, ngai in, David tungtang thu ahoih lam ahihleh na kiang a mi hon sawl in ka hong hilh kei dia hia? 13Ka pa'n na tung ah thil hoih lou hih ut bang hitaleh, ka hon hilh louh a, lungmuangtak a na paitheihna dia ka hon khah keileh, Toupa'n Jonathan abawlbawl in bawl henla, huai sang a thupi in leng. Ka pa kiang a a-om zel bang in Toupa na kiang ah om hen. 14Ka sihlouhna dia ka damsung kia a Toupa hehpihna hon musak hilou in, 15tangtawn in ka inkote leng na hehpih tawp ke'n. Toupa'n David melma leitung a pan ahihman khit vek pha in leng tawp ke'n,” achi hi. 16Jonathan in David inkote toh thukhun bawl in, “David melmate khut tan in leng Toupa'n phut hen,” achi uhi. 17Huchi in Jonathan in David akichiamsak nawn hi; amah hinna a-it bang geih in lah a-it ngal a. 18Huchi in Jonathan in akiang ah, “Zingchiang a kha thak ding ahi. Na tutna avuak ding ziak in na om louh akilang ngei ding hi.

1 SAMUEL 20: 19Ni thum na om nung in paisuk pah inla, tuma a thil ahong om lai a na kibukna mun ah hoh inla, Ezel suang chin ah ana om gige in. 20Jonathan In David Apanpih 21Ngai in, kuan inla, thaltangte va mukhia in, chi in naupang ka sawl ding hi. Naupang kiang a, en in, thaltangte na nunglam ah a-om, la inla hong pai in, ka chihleh Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, nang a ding in agalmuanhuai in lauh ding om lou ahi ding. 22Himahleh naupang kiang a, en in, thaltangte na pamlam ah a-om uh, ka chihleh paimang mai in. Toupa'n ahon paimangsak ahi ding. 23Nang leh ke'n thil i gensa tungthu ah ngai in, nang toh i kikal ah Toupa a-om tawntung hi,” achi hi. 24Huchi in David gamlak ah akibu a; kha ahong thak a, kumpipa ankuang um in atu hi. 25Hun dang a atutna ngei bang in atutna ah kumpipa atu hi. Jonathan adingh a, Saul kiang ah Abner atu a; David mun bel avuak hi. 26Himahleh Saul in huai ni in bangmah agen kei, “Atung ah thil banghiam a-om a, siang lou hiam ahi ding, siang lou ahi ngei ding,” achi hi. 27Huan hichi ahong hi a, khadet zing ani nih ni in David mun avuak lailai hi. Huchi in Saul in atapa Jonathan kiang ah, “Bang achia Jesse tapa zan leh tuni a ankuang um dia hong pai lou ahia?” achi hi. 28Jonathan in Saul adawng a, “David in Bethlehem a hoh ding ahon ngen ngutngut hi. 29Hon hohsak teitei in, ka inkote'n khua ah kithoihna nei ding in ahon thukhak tinten uh. Huchi in na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh hon hohsak inla, ka unaute ka va veh ding, achi hi. Huaiziak in kumpipa dohkan ah ahong kei hi,” achi hi.

1 SAMUEL 20: 30Huchi in Jonathan tung ah Saul aheh guih a, akiang ah, “Nang, numei genhak leh helhat tapa, Jesse tapa na zahlakna ding leh na nu vuaktanna zahlaksak ding in na tel chih thei lou hon sa na hi hiam? 31Jesse tapa hiai a a-om sung teng hihkip na hi kei dia, na gam leng. Huaiziak in samsak pah inla, ka kiang ah hon pisak in, asih ngeingei ding ahi,” achi hi. 32Jonathan in apa Saul adawng a, akiang ah, “Bang ding in maw thah ding ahih? Bang ahih a ahia?” achi hi. 33Saul in thah tum in teipi in akhoh a, huchi in Jonathan in apa'n David thah atum ngei, chih achian hi. 34Jonathan bel dohkan a pan heh mahmah kawm in adingh a, huai kha ani nih ni in an a-um kei hi. Apa'n David azahlaksak mahmah ziak in alungkhampih hi. 35Huan hichi ahong hi a, zingsang in Jonathan in naupang khat pi in gamlak ah David toh amun sehsa uah ahoh uhi. 36Anaupang kiang ah, “Tai inla, ka thaltang kapkhiakte va zong in,” achi hi. Naupang atai lai in, apam lam ah thaltang akap hi. 37Jonathan in akapkiakna mun a naupang ava tun in Jonathan in naupang asam a, “Thaltang na pamlam ah ahi kei maw?” achi hi. 38Jonathan in anaupang asam a, “Hong pai meng in, kin in, zekai ke'n,” achi hi. Jonathan naupang in thaltangte atawmkhawm a, apu kiang ah ahong paita hi. 39Himahleh, naupang in bangmah athei kei, Jonathan leh David kia in thil omdan athei uhi. 40Jonathan in anaupang kiang ah athal leh avante apia a, akiang ah, “Pai inla, khua ah ana paipih in,” achi hi.

1 SAMUEL 20: 41Jonathan in apaitak in David omna mun simlam pang a pan adingh a, amai a lei si in thumvei akunsuk a, akitawptuah ua, akikahkhum ua, David anak kahzaw hi. 42Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Lungmuangtak in pai in aw, nang toh kei kikal ah leh ka suante leh na suante kikal ah tangtawn in Toupa om hen, chi in Toupa min in i kichiam tuak khinta hi,” achi hi. Huchi in adingh a, apaita a, khua ah Jonathan alutta hi.

1 SAMUEL 21: 1Nob a siampu Ahimelek kiang ah David ahong hi. Ahimelek in ling kawm in David ana dawn a, akiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia tangtat na chia, kuamah tonpih na neih louh?” achi hi. 2David in siampu Ahimelek kiang ah, “Kumpipa'n thilhih ding in thu ahon pia a, ka kiang ah, ka hon thilhihsak tup leh ka hon thupiak kuamah in thei kei heh, achi bikbek hi. Ka sikhate amun ding uh ka sehsakta,” achi hi. 3Huaiziak in tu in, “Na khut ah bang a-om a? Tanghou beu nga ahihkeileh na neih lamlam hon pia in,” achi hi. 4Siampu in David adawng a, “Tanghou vantang ka nei kei a, himahleh tanghou siangthou bel ka nei hi, tangvalte numei a pan akihepkhiak nak uleh,” achi hi. 5David in siampu adawng a, akiang ah, “Tu ni thum sung numei a pan ka kihemkhe vek taktak uhi. Ka hong pawtkhiak dek lai in leng tangvalte tui-um belsuan asiangthou a, tanghou leng vantang ahi a, ahi, tuni tui-um belsuan sung asiansak mah bang in,” achi hi. 6Huchi in siampu in tanghou siangthou apeta hi. Huai ah lah tanghou koih alak ni ua tanghou lum a khen dia Toupa ma a pan lak pen kia lou ngal tanghou dang a-om ngal kei hi. 7Huai ni in Saul sikhate lak a mi khat Toupa ma a zekaisak a-om a; amin Doeg ahi. Amah Edom mi, Saul ganchingmi lak a heutupen ahi. 8David in Ahimelek kiang ah, “Teipi hiam, namsau hiam na kem kei maw? Kumpipa hon sawlna thukin ahih ziak in ka namsau leh ka galvan bangmah ka hon tawi man kei hi,” achi hi. 9Siampu in, “Philistia mi Goliath, Elah Phaizang a na thahpa namsau, ngai in, siampu puanak nung ah puan a tuam in a-om hi. Huai na laknopleh la in.

1 SAMUEL 21: Huai lou ngal adang a-om kei,” achi hi.David in, “Huai val a-om ding hia, hon pe dih ve,” achi hi. 10Huchi in David adingh a, huai ni in Saul lau in ataimang a, Gath kumpipa Akish kiang ah apaita hi. 11Akish sikhate'n akiang ah, “Hiai mi huai gam kumpipa David ahi kei maw? Saul in asang asang athat, David in asing asing, chih lou kawm in atungtang la in asa zuazua uh ahi kei maw?” achi uhi. 12David in huai thute alungsim in apai a, Gath kumpipa Akish alau mahmah hi. 13Huchi in ama ah a-omdan ahihlamdang a, amitmuh un akihaisak hi. Akhut in kongkhakte aham ekek a, akhamul ah achil aluangsak zengzung hi. 14Huchi in Akish in asikhate kiang ah, “Enta unla, mihai ahih na thei ua, bangziak a ka kiang a hon pi na hi ua? 15Mihai ka kitaksap ziak in hia hiai mi ahaidan hihlang dia ka ma a na hon pi uh? Hiai mi ka inn ah ahong lut tel mahmah ding maw?” achi hi. 21Saul A Pan David Ataimang

1 SAMUEL 22: 1Huchi in David bel huai a pan apawtkhia a, Adullam kokhuk ah a-omta hi. Asanggamte leh apate inkote tengteng in azak un huai ah akiang ah ahohsuk uh. 2Lungkham peuhmah, leiba nei peuhmah leh lungkim lou peuhmahte akiang ah akikaikhawm uh. Huchi in aheutu un a-omta hi. Akiang ah mi zali hiamtak a-om uhi. 3David bel huai a pan Moab gam a Mizpah ah ahoh hi. Moab kumpipa kiang ah, “Pathian in ahon hihsak ding thil ka theih masiah ka nu leh ka pate na kiang ah na om le uh,” achi hi. 4Moab kumpipa ma ah amaute api a; huchi in kokhuk a David a-om lai teng akiang ah a-om uhi. 5Zawlnei Gad in David kiang ah, “Kokhuk ah om nilouh ke'n. Pawt inla Judah gam ah pai in,” achi hi. Huchi in David apawt a, Hareth gammang ah alutta hi. 6Saul in, “David leh akiang a omte amuta uh,” chih ana za hi. Saul bel Gibeah a Ramah a tamarisk sing nuai ah teipi tawi in atu hi. Akim ah asikha tengteng adingh uhi. 7Saul in akim a dingh asikhate kiang ah, “Nou Benjamin mite aw, ngaikhia un; Jesse tapa in loute leh grephuante hon pia in asepaih sangkhat heutu leh asepaih zakhat heutu in ahon bawl dia hia? 8Na vek un na hon sawm ua, ka tapa in Jesse tapa kiang a thu akhun ka kiang a hihlang himhim na om kei uh. Ka tapa in ka sikha kei hon dou ding leh tuni nangawn a kei hon tang dia ahanthawn thu ka kiang a hihlang na om louh uh?” achi hi. 9Huchi in Saul sikhate kiang a ding Edom mi Doeg in adawng a, “Jesse tapa Nob a Ahitub tapa Ahimelek kiang a, ahong lam ka mu hi.

1 SAMUEL 22: 10Ama'n Toupa adotsak a, nek ding apia a, Philistia mi Goliath namsau leng ape lai hi,” achi hi. 11Huchi in kumpipa'n Ahitub tapa Ahimelek leh Nod a siampu a pang apa inkote tengteng asamsak hi. 12Saul in, “Nang, Ahitub tapa, na ngaikhia in,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka toupa, hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. 13Saul in akiang ah, “Tanghou leh namsau na pia a, Toupa bang dotsak a, tuni a kei hon dou ding leh hon tang dia bang ding a nang leh Jesse tapa in hon guksawm na hi ua?” achi hi. 14Ahimelek in kumpipa adawng a, “Kumpipa makpa, na thumang, na inkuan sung ua mizahtakhuai David bang a muanhuai na sikhate tengteng lak ah kua a-om ua? 15Amah a dia Pathian thu ka dotsak amasapen ahi a hia? Ahi kei. Kumpipa'n asikha hiam, ka pa inkote kuapeuh hon ngoh mahmah kei hen. Na sikha in hiai thu bangmah ka thei kei hi,” achi hi. 16Kumpipa'n, “Ahimelek, na sih ngeingei ding ahi, nang leh na pa inkote tengteng toh,” achi hi. 17Kumpipa'n akiang a dingh sepaihte kiang ah, “Kihei unla, Toupa siampute that un, David lam a apan ua, taimang ahi chih thei napi a ka kiang a agen louh ziak un,” achi hi. Himahleh kumpipa sikhate'n Toupa siampute sual ding in khut azak nuam kei uhi. 18Kumpipa'n Doeg kiang ah, “Nang kihei inla, siampute sual in,” achi hi. Edom mi Doeg akihei a, siampute asual a, huai ni in puanmalngat siampu puanak silh, mi sawmgiat-le-nga athat hi. 19Nob, siampu khua namsau in asual a; numei leh pasal naupang leh nawi ne laite nangawn, bawngte, sabiltungte leh belamte toh namsau in asatlum hi. 20Ahitub tapa Ahimelek tapate lak a khat, amin Abiathar ataikhia a, David kiang ah ataitung hi. 21Abiathar in Saul in Toupa siampute athah thu David ahilh hi. 22Siampute Thahna 23Nang ka kiang ah om inla, lau ke'n. Kei thah hon tumte'n nang leng thah ahon tum ding uh. Ka kiang ah om lechin na bit ding hi,” achi hi.

Huaiziak in Ziklag tuni tan in Judah gam kumpipate a ahi nilouh hi. 7Philistia gam a David a-om sung kum khat pumpi leh kha li ahi. 8David leh amite ava hohtou ua, Geshur mite, Girzi mite leh Amalek mite ava dou uhi. Huai namte Telam a pan Shur gam lam pang Aigupta gam pha a om ahi uhi. 9David in gam asual a, numei leh pasal hawi himhim anei kei. Belamte, bawngte, sabiltungte, sangawngsaute leh apuansilhte uh alaksak hi. Apai nawn a, Akish kiang ah ahoh hi. 10Akish in, “Tuni in koilam na dou a?” achi hi. 1 SAMUEL 29: 1Philistia mite'n asepaih tengteng uh Aphek ah akaikhawm vek ua, Israel mite'n Jezreel a tuikhuk kiang ah panmun akhoh uhi. 2Philistia makaite azaza in, asangsang in apai ua, David leh amite'n Akish toh anung uh azui uhi. 3Philistia makaite'n, “Hiai Hebrute'n bang ahia ahih uh?” achi uhi. Hiai mite lu ding in hiai mipa leh apu kilem nawn ve un teh aw? 5Hiai David mah ahi kei maw, Saul in asang asang athat, David in asing asing, chi a, atungtang thu la a asak uh?” achi uhi. 6Huchi in Akish in David asam a, akiang ah, “Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Midik mahmah na hi a, sepaihte lak a ka kiang a na kuan leh na hong leltak ka mitmuh in ahoih mahmah hi. Ka kiang a na hong ni a pan tuni tan in na tung ah bangmah hoihlouhna himhim ka mu het kei hi. 1 SAMUEL 29: Na kiang a ka om sung teng tuni tan in, ka toupa kumpipa melma dou lou a ka kik nawn maimah ding, na sikha tung ah bang mu na hia oi?” achi hi. 9Akish in adawng a, David kiang ah, “Ka mitmuh in Pathian angel bang in na hoih chih ka thei hi. Hiaite anekleh ahong halh nawn a;

1 SAMUEL 30: ni thum leh zan thum an ne lou leh tui dawn lou lah ahita ngal a. 13David in akiang ah, “Kua na hia? Koi a kipan a hong na hia?” achi hi. 1 SAMUEL 31: 1Huan Philistia mite'n Israelte asual ua; Philistia mite a pan Israelte ataikek ua, Gilboa tang ah thah in a-om zelzul uhi. 2Philistia mite'n Saul leh atapa adelhzui vengveng uh. 2 SAMUEL 2: 13Zeruiah tapa Joab leh David sikhate apaikhia ua, Gibeon dil ah akituak uhi. Himahleh Asahel in amah adelh apialsan nuam tuan kei hi. 22Abner in Asahel kiang ah, “Hon pialsan in. Bangziak a lei a hon satpuk ding ka hia? Na unaupa Joab mel ka mu ngam dia hia?” achi nawn hi. 23Himahleh apial nuam tuan kei. Huaiziak in Abner in ateipi tolam in anakguh ngana nuaitak asun a, anunglam ah teipi apaisuak a, huai mun a puk in asita hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Asahel puk a, asihna mun a hong pai teng huai mun ah akhawl zel uhi.

2 SAMUEL 2: 24Himahleh, Joab leh Abishai in Abner adelhzui ua; Gibeon gamdai lampi a Giah chin a Ammah mual atun un ni atumta hi. 25Benjamin suante Abner kiang ah akikaikhawm ua, pawl khat in akibawl ua, mualvum ah ava dinghta uh. 26Abner in Joab asam a, “Namsau in hon negai den ding hia? Atawplam in ahong kha mahmah ding, chih na thei kei maw? Bang tan ahia a-unaute uh delh tawpsan a kik nawn dia mipite hilh lou a na om ding?” achi hi. 27Joab in, “Pathian ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Bangmah na gen lou hi lechin zingchiang a pan mite paimang khinta ding ua, a-unaute uh delh lou ding hi ve un,” achi hi. 28Joab in pengkul amut a, mite adingh depdup uh. Israel mite adelhta kei ua, kuamah asual nawnta kei uhi. 29Abner leh amite zankhua in phaizang tawnsuak a pai in Jordan akan ua, Bithron akantan ua, Mahanaim atung uhi. 30Joab bel Abner delh akik nawnta a, mipi tengteng akaihkhawm vek leh David sikhate sawm-le-kua leh Asahel akimta kei uhi. 31Himahleh David sikhate'n Benjamin mite leh Abner mite zathum-le-sawmguk athat uhi. 32Asahel luang ala ua, Bethlehem a apa han ah avui uh. Joab leh amite zankhua in apai ua, khovak in Hebron atung uhi.

2 SAMUEL 3: 1Saul inkuante leh David inkuante sawtpi akidou ua; David in hatlam amanoh a, Saul inkuante'n hat louh lam amanoh uhi. 2David in Hebron ah tapate anei a, ata masapen, Amnon, Jezreel mi Ahinoam lak a ahi. 3David Tapate 4Alina Adonijah, Haggith tapa ahi a; angana Shephatiah, Abital tapa. 5Agukna Ithream, David zi Eglah lak a ahi. Hiai teng David tapa Hebron a piangte ahi uh.David Lam Ah Abner Ahong Pang 6Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul inkuante leh David inkuante akidou sung un Saul inkuante a ding in Abner akihatsak semsem hi. 7Saul in mei anei a, amin Rizpah ahi. Amah Aiah tanu ahi. Ishboshet in Abner kiang ah, “Bangziak a ka pa mei kithuahpih na hia?” achi hi. 8Ishboshet thugen in Abner ahehsak mahmah hi. Judahte ui lutang leltak ka hi a hia? Tuni tan in na pa Saul inkuante leh a-unaute leh alawmte tung ah zahngaihna ka hihlang a, David khut ah ka hon pe kei hi. Hinapi a nang hiai numei tung a khial a na hon ngoh mawk! 9Pathian in Abner alohloh in loh henla, huai sang a sezaw in leng. David kiang a Toupa akichiam bang a, huchibang ngei atung a ka hih keileh. 10Saul inkuante lak a pan agam laksak ding, Israel leh Judahte tung a Dan a pan a Beer-sheba tan a David laltutphah tunding ding. 11Huchi in ama'n Abner alau mahmah ziak in dawn himhim leng adawng thei kei hi. 12Abner in amah sik in David kiang ah mi asawl a, “Hiai gam kua a ahia? Ka kiang ah thu khung in. Huchi in ngai in, Israel mi tengteng na lam a pang ding in ka khut nang lam ah apang ding,” chi in ava gensak hi. 13Ama'n, “Hi hen. Na kiang ah thu ka khung ding.

2 SAMUEL 3: Himahleh na tung ah thil khat ka hon phut hi. Huai tuh hiai ahi. Hong mu ding a na hong pai chiang in Saul tanu Mikal na hon pi phot keileh ka mel na mu thei kei ding,” achi hi. 14David in Saul tapa Ishboshet kiang ah, “Philistia mite zekvun zakhat a ka leisa, ka zi Mikal hon pia in,” chi ding in mi asawl hi. 15Ishboshet in mi asawl a, apasal Laish tapa Paltiel mahmah a pan apita hi. 16Apasal in kap kawm in Bahurim tan anung azui zel hi. Abner in akiang ah, “Pai in, kik nawn in,” achi hi. Huchi in akik nawnta hi. 17Abner in Israel upate ahoupih a, “Tuma siah David na kumpipa ding un na zong uh. 18Tu in na kumpipa un bawl un. Toupa'n David tungtang thu ah, ka sikha David khut in ka mi Israelte Philistia mite khut a pan leh amelma teng khut a pan ka hunkhe ding ana chi,” achi hi. 19Abner in Benjamin mite bil a zak in agen hi. Israel mite leh Benjamin inkuan tengteng in hoih asak bangbang un Hebron a David bil a zak dia gen ding in Abner ahoh hi. 20Abner leh amite sawmnih Hebron a David kiang ah apai uhi. David in Abner leh akiang a mi sawmnihte a ding in ankuang alui hi. 21Abner in David kiang ah, “Ka thou ding a, na kiang a thu akhuntheihna ding un leh na deihthusam bangtak a vai na hawmtheihna ding in Israel mi tengteng ka toupa kiang a kaikhawm ding in ka kuan ding,” achi hi. David in Abner asawlkhia a, lungmuangtak in akuanta hi.Abner Thah In A-om 22Ngai in, David mite leh Joab galdou zou ahong tung ua, gallak tampi ahon pua uh.

2 SAMUEL 3: Himahleh Abner bel Hebron a David kiang ah ana om nawn kei hi. Ana paikiksak khinta a, amah leng lungmuangtak in ana paita hi. 23Joab leh akiang a mipi tengteng ahong tun un, Ner tapa Abner kumpipa kiang ah ahoh hi. Ama'n ana paisak nawn khin a, “Lungmuangtak in apai nawnta,” chi in Joab ahilh uhi. 24Kumpipa kiang ah Joab ahoh a, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia oi? Ngai in, Abner na kiang ah ahong a, bangziak a paimangsak a, apaimang vengveng mawk? 25Ner tapa Abner na thei a, nang hong khem ding a na pawt lam leh na lut lam leh na thilhih peuhmah theih tum a hong pai ahi,” achi hi. 26David kiang a pan Joab ahong pawtkhiak in Abner delh ding in mi asawl hi. Sirah a tuileh a pan ava pikik uh. Himahleh David in athei kei hi. 27Hebron a Abner ahong tun in Joab in sim houpih ding in kulh kongpi ah apituam hi. A-unaupa Asahel sisan pawt thukna ding in anakguh ngana nuaitak ah adawt a, huchi in asita hi. 28Anung a David in azak in, “Ner tapa Abner sisan thu ah kei mahleh ka gam Toupa mitmuh in tangtawn in ka siang uh. 29Joab lutung ah kia henla; apa inkote tengteng tung ah toh. Joab inkote lak ah meima sia vei hiam, phak natna nei hiam, chiangkhun ngai a pai hiam, namsau a si hiam, kial thuak hiam kitatlak lou in hong om hen,” achi hi. 30Huchi in a-unaupa uh Asahel Gibeon a kidouna a athah ziak in Joab leh a-unau Abishai in Abner athat uhi.Abner Vui In A-om 31David in Joab leh akiang a mi om tengteng kiang ah, “Na puante uh botkek unla, sai-ip puan silh unla, Abner suun in ama ah pai un,” achi hi. David in leng siluang azui hi.

2 SAMUEL 3: 32Hebron ah Abner avui ua, kumpipa'n a-aw suakkhesak in Abner han ah akap a, mipi tengteng leng akap uhi. 33Kumpipa'n Abner akah a:“Abner, mihai sih in asi dia hia? 34Na khut hen ahi kei a,na khete leng sikkol butsak ahi sam kei.Migiloute ma a mi apuk bang a na puk maizen? achi hi.”Mi tengteng in akah nawn uhi. 35Huchi in sun ahih lai in mi tengteng David an nesak ding in ahong pai uh. Himahleh David in, “Nitum ma a an nek hiam, thil dang hiam leng ka nekleh Pathian in alohloh hon loh hen; huai sang a sezaw in leng,” chi in akichiam hi. 36Mi tengteng in huai atheih un akipak mahmah uh. Kumpipa thilhih peuhmah in mite akipaksak hi. 37Mi tengteng leh Israel mi tengteng in huai ni in Ner tapa Abner thah ahih kumpipa thu ahi kei chih athei uhi. 38Kumpipa'n mite kiang ah, “Tuni in Israel milian, mithupitak asi, chih thei lou na hi uh maw? 39Kumpipa dia thaunilh himah leng, tuni in ka hat kei hi. Hiai Zeruiah tapate kei a ding in athuakhak lua uh. Toupa'n thil hoih lou hihmi agitlouh dungzui zel in thuk hen,” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 4: 1Huan Saul tapa Ishboshet in Hebron ah Abner asi chih ana zak in akhutte ahong hat kei ua, Israel mi tengteng apatau uhi. 2Saul tapa Ishboshet in sepaih pawl heutu nih anei hi. Khat min Baanah ahi a, adang min Rekab ahi. Amau Benjamin suan Beeroth mi Rimmon tapate ahi uh. Beeroth bel Benjamin nam a simtel a ngaih ahi. 3Beeroth a mite Gittaim ah atai ua, tuni tan in huai ah ateng uhi. 4Ishboshet Thah In A-om 5Beeroth mi Rimmon tapate Rekab leh Baanah apai ua, Ishboshet inn ah sun nisat laitak a lupna a alup lai in akiang ah ahoh uhi. 6Huit buh la ding hileh kilawm in insung lam ah alut ua, anakguh ngana nuaitak ah adawt ua, huchi in Rekab leh a-unaupa Baanah ataimang uhi. 7Inn ava lut un alupna dantan a lupna a lum lai ava dawt ua, athat ua, alu atan ua, alu ala uh. Arabah kantan in zankhua in apaimang uhi. 8Ishboshet lu Hebron ah David kiang ah ahon pua ua, kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, nang hon thah tum, na melma Saul tapa Ishboshet lu hiai ah a-om; Toupa'n ka toupa phu Saul leh asuante tung ah tuni in alaksakta,” achi uhi. 9David in Beeroth mi Rimmon tapa Rekab leh a-unaupa Baanah adawng a, akiang uah, “Toupa ka mangbatna tengteng a hon tanpa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. 10Tanchinhoih hon tun akisep in, ‘Ngai in, Saul asita, chi a mi khat in ahon hilh lai in, amah ka man a, Ziklag ah ka that hi’. Huai atanchinhoih hon puakman a ka na piak ahi. 11Midiktat, ama insung a ama lupna tung ngei a lum, migilou in athah uh sisan man na tung uah ka hon phut nawn sem dia, leitung a pan alamang kei dia hia?” achi hi. 12Huchi in David in atangvalte thu apia a, amaute athat uh. Akhutte uleh akhete uh atansak ua, Hebron a dil tung ah akhai uhi. Ishboshet lu bel ala ua, Hebron a Abner han ah avui uhi.

2 SAMUEL 5: 1Huchi in Israel chi tengteng Hebron a David kiang ah ahong pai ua, “Ngai in, na guh leh na sa ka hi uh. 2Hun paisa in leng Saul ka tung ua kumpipa ahih lai a leng Israelte pikhia leh pilutpa na hi. Toupa'n na kiang ah, ka mi Israelte na vak dia, Israelte tung ah heutu in na om ding, achi,” achi uhi. 3Israel upa tengteng Hebron ah kumpipa kiang ah ahoh uh. Kumpipa David in Hebron ah Toupa ma ah amau toh thu akhung hi. Huchi in Israelte tung a kumpipa ding in David thau anilh uhi. 4Vai ahawm pat tung in David kum sawmthum a upa ahi a, kum sawmli sung vai ahawm hi. 5Judah Leh Israel Kumpipa In David Apang(1 Kro 11.1-9; 14.1-7) 6Kumpipa leh amite huai gam a teng Jebus mite sim ding in Jerusalem ah ahoh uhi. Huai mite'n David ahong lut theih louh gingta in, David kiang ah, “Hiai ah na hong lut het kei ding. Mittaw leh khebaite'n hon na dal ding uh,” achi uhi. 7Himahleh David in Zion kulhpi alazou a, huai tuh David khopi ahi. 8David in huai ni in, “Jebus mi sual peuhmahte tuiluanna ah paitou uhenla, David mudah khebai leh mittawte that uheh,” achi hi. Huaiziak in ahi, “Mittaw leh khebaite inn ah ahong lut kei ding uh,” achih uh. 9Huchi in David kulh ah ateng a, David khua achi uhi. David in Millo a pan akimvel leh asunglam ah kulh abawl hi. 10David in Toupa, Sepaihte' Pathian akiang a a-om ziak in thupi lam amanoh zel hi. 11Tura kumpipa Hiram in David kiang ah mi asawl a, sidar singte akhak a, khutsiamte leh suangseksiamte asawl a, David a ding in inn alamsak uhi.

2 SAMUEL 5: 12David in Toupa'n amah Israel mite tung a kumpipa ding in akipsak a, ami Israelte ziak in alalgam atawisang chih athei hi. 13David in Hebron apawtsan nung in Jerusalem a pan mei leh zi aneih behlap hi. Huchi in David in tapate leh tanute anei nawn lai hi. 14Jerusalem a aneihte min hiaite ahi: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan leh Solomon, 15Ibhar, Elishua, Nepheg leh Japhia, 16Elishama, Eliada leh Eliphalet.Philistiate Tung A Vualzohna(1 Kro 14.8-17) 17Himahleh Israel mite kumpipa ding in David thau anilh uh chih Philistia mite'n azak un Philistia mi tengteng David zong ding in ahohtou uh. David in ana za a, kulh sung ah apaisuk hi. 18Philistia mite Rephaim Phaizang ah akiphalh uhi. 19David in, “Philistia mite sual ding in ka hohtou diam? Amaute ka khut ah na hon pe diam?” chi in Toupa adong hi. Toupa'n David kiang ah, “Hohtou in. Philistia mite na khut ah ka hon pe ngeingei ding,” achi hi. 20Huchi in David Baal-perazim ah ahoh a, huai ah David in amaute asual a, “Toupa'n ka melmate tuichin khah bang mai in ka ma ah ahon hihdalhsakta,” achi hi. Huaiziak in huai mun min, “Baal-perazim,” asa hi. 21Huai ah amilimte uh anusia ua, David leh amite'n ahal uhi. 22Philistia mite apaitou nawn ua, Rephaim Phaizang ah akiphalh uhi. 23David in Toupa adotleh Ama'n, “Hohtou ke'n. Anunglam uah khelh inla, singtheimi kung zawn ah sual in. 24Hichi ahi ding, singtheimi lek a pai husa na zakleh gamtang in. Philistia sepaihte sual ding in na ma ah Toupa akuankheta chihna ahi,” achi hi. 25Huchi in Toupa'n thu apiak bang in David in ahih a; Philistia mite Geba a pan Gazer tan in asual hi.

2 SAMUEL 6: 1David in Israel mite lak a mi teltuam singthum akaikhawm nawn hi. 2Huchi in David athou a, Judah gam a Baale a pan cherubte tung a tuang sepaihte' Toupa min aputsak uh Pathian bawm latou ding in akiang a mi om tengteng toh akuan uhi. 3Pathian bawm kangtalai thak ah akoih ua, mual tung a om Abinadab inn a pan alakhia uh. Abinadab tapa Uzzah leh Ahio in kangtalai thak ahawl uhi. 4Abinadab inn a pan Pathian bawm alakhia ua; Pathian bawm ma ah Ahio apai hi. 5David leh Israel mi tengteng in Toupa ma ah thil ging thei chi tuamtuam meilah sing a bawl leh kaihgingte, pekgingte, khuangtate, pengkul bineite, dakkhutbette atum uhi. 6Jerusalem A Thukhun Bawm Laklutna(1 Kro 13.1-14; 15.25—16.6,43) 7Uzzah tung ah Toupa hehna akuang a, athilhihdiklouh ziak in Pathian in huai ah athat a, Pathian bawm kiang ah asita hi. 8Toupa hehna Uzzah tung a apuahzak ziak in David alungkim kei a, huai mun Perez-uzzah asa a, tuni tan in ahi lai hi. 9Huai ni in David in Toupa alauta hi. “Bangchi in Toupa bawm ka kiang ahong tung theita dia?” achi hi. 10David in Toupa bawm David khua a amah kiang ah asuan nuam kei hi. Himahleh David in Git mi Obed-edom inn ah akoih zawta hi. 11Git mi Obed-edom inn ah kha thum Toupa bawm a-om hi. Huchi in Obed-edom leh a-inkuan tengteng Toupa'n avualzawl hi. 12“Pathian bawm ziak in, Obed-edom inkuan leh aneih-le-lam tengteng Toupa'n avualzawl,” chi in kumpipa David ahilh uh. Huchi in David in Obed-edom inn a pan Pathian bawm, David ah kipaktak in ava lata hi. 13Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa bawm zawng mite'n kal guk asuantak un bawngtal leh gan vak thau alan hi. 14Toupa ma ah atheihtawp in David alam a, puanmalngat puanak asilh hi.

2 SAMUEL 6: 15Huchi in David leh Israel mi tengteng in kikou zuazua leh pengkul mut kawm in Toupa bawm alatouta uhi. 16Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa bawm David khua a alut lai in, Saul tanu Mikal in tohlet a pan ana en a, Toupa ma a David tawm leh lam amu a, alungtang in asimmohta hi. 17Huchi in Toupa bawm alalut ua, akoihna dia David in akaih, puanin sung a amun ding ah akoihta uhi. David in Toupa ma ah halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alan hi. 18David in halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alat khit in sepaihte' Toupa min in mite avualzawl hi. 19Mi tengteng anumei apasal michih tanghou phel khat leh sa bak khat leh grep gah phoukeu bawm khat chiat apia hi. Huchi in michih ama inn lam chiat ah apaita uh. 20Hiai zoh in a-inkuante vualzawl ding in David apaikik hi. David dawn ding in Saul tanu Mikal ahong pawt a, “Tuni in Israel kumpipa thupi hi na mai e, migina lou, zumna thei lou kisuahkhete bang mai in tuni in asikha nungakte mitmuh in akisuahkhia a,” ana chi hi. 21David in Mikal kiang ah, “Na pa leh a-inkuante tengteng sang a kei hon tel, Toupa, Israelte tung a kumpipa dia hon seppa Toupa ma ah ahi ka lam. Huaiziak in Toupa ma ah nuamsa in ka om ding hi. 22Hiai sang mah in leng ka zumpihhuai lai ding. Keimah mitmuh in leng ka sithuai lai ding. Himahleh huai sikha nungak na gente pahtawi in ka om ding,” achi hi. 23Huchi in Saul tanu Mikal in asih ni tanpha in ta anei kei hi.

2 SAMUEL 7: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa a-inn a om a, Toupa'n akimvel a melmate tengteng a pan galmuang a a-omsak nung in; 2Kumpipa'n zawlnei Nathan kiang ah, “Tu in en in kei sidar sing inn ah ka teng a, himahleh Pathian bawm puanin ah a-om,” achi hi. 3Nathan in kumpipa kiang ah, “Na lungsim a om bangtak in va hih in, na kiang ah Toupa a-om hi,” achi hi. 4Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai zan mah in Nathan kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. 5“Ka sikha David va hilh in, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Ka tenna ding inn na hon lamsak ding maw?’ ” 6Israel suante Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhiak a pan tuni tan in inn ah ka teng kei a, puanin ah leh biakbuk ah ka teng zaw hi. 7David Kiang A Nathan Thugen(1 Kro 17.1-15) 8Huaiziak in ka sikha David kiang ah, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Belam tatna mun a pan belam na ven lai in ka mi Israel mite tung a heutu ding in ka hon la hi. 9Na hohna peuh ah na kiang ah ka om zel a, na ma ah na melmate ka hihmang zel hi. Lei a mithupitakte bang in min thupitak ka hon bawlsak hi. 10Hiai ban ah ka mi Israelte a ding in mun ka sep dia, amau ka suan ding a, amau mun mah ah ateng ding ua, tuma lam bang in gitlouhna tate'n ahihbuai nawn kei ding uh. 11Na melmate tengteng lak a pan ka hon khawlsak hi. Huai lou him in Toupa'n inn ka hon bawlsak ding, chi in ahon hilh hi. 12Na ni abei a na pute kiang a na lup chiang in, na nung a na suan na gil a gah ding ka tungding ding a, agam ka hihkip ding.

2 SAMUEL 7: 13Ama'n ka min a ding in inn alam dia, agam laltutphah tangtawn a ding in ka hihkip ding. 14Apa ka hi ding a, amah ka tapa ahi ding. Thil ahihkhelhleh, mihing chiang leh mihing tapate khetna in ka thunun ding. 15Himahleh, na ma a ka suanmang Saul kiang a pan ka lakmang bang in ka zahngaihna in ahon paisan kei ding hi. 16Na inkuan leh na gam tangtawn a hihkip ngiungeu ahi dia, na laltutphah lah tangtawn in hihkip ahi ding,” chi in. 17Huai thute tengteng bang zel leh huai kilakna bang geih in Nathan in David kiang ah agen hi.David Kipahthugen Thumna(1 Kro 17.16-27) 18Huchi in kumpipa David alut a, Toupa ma ah atu hi, “Toupa Pathian aw, kua ahia ka hih a, ka inkuante bang ahia ahih uh, hiai tantan na hon pi? 19Toupa Pathian aw, huaite leng nang mitmuh in thil bangmah tham ahi kei uh. Himahleh na sikha inkuan omdan ding thu kum tampi sung a ding in leng na gen khinta hi. Toupa Pathian aw, hiaite mihing hihdan ahi a hia? 20David in na kiang ah bang agen nawn tuan dia? Toupa Pathian aw, na sikha lah na thei vek ngal a. 21Na sikha theih ding in na thu ziak leh nangmah lungtang bang zel in hiai thil thupi tengteng na hihta hi. 22Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian aw, nang na thupi hi. Ka bil ua ka zak bang un nang bang kuamah a-om kei a, nangmah lou ngal Pathian a-om kei hi. 23Aigupta gam a pan leh namte leh apathiante ua pan tankhia a, min bawlsak ding leh na gam a dia na mite ma a thil thupitak leh thil lauhuaitak hih ding na mi Israelte bang leitung ah namdang kua a-om a?

2 SAMUEL 7: 24Huchi in Israel mite tangtawn a na mite ahong hihtheihna ding un nang a ding in na hihkipta hi. Toupa, nang a Pathian uh na hong hita hi. 25“Huchi in Toupa Pathian aw, na sikha tungtang thu leh a-inkuante tungtang thu na gen tangtawn a ding in hihkip inla, na gensa bang in hih in. 26Sepaihte' Toupa Israelte' Pathian ahi, chi in na min tangtawn in pahtawi in om hen. Huchi in na sikha David inkuante na ma ah hihkip in a-om ding uhi. 27Sepaihte' Toupa aw, Israel Pathian, na sikha kiang ah, inkuan ka hon phuhsak ding, chi in lah na puangta ngal a. Huaiziak in na sikha in hiai thumna na kiang ka hon tun ngam hi. 28“Tu in Toupa Pathian aw, nang huai Pathian na hi a, na thu dik hen, hiai thil hoih na sikha kiang ah na chiamta hi. 29Huaiziak in tu in na sikha inkuante na ma a tangtawn a a-om gige theihna ding un vualzawl in. Toupa Pathian aw, nang lah na genta ngal a. Na vualzawlna in na sikha inkuante tangtawn in vualzawl in om uhen,” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 8: 1Huan huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, David in Philistia mite sual in azou hi. Huchi in David in Philistia mite khut a pan Metheg-ammah alaksak hi. 2Moab mite asual a, lei a lumsak in khau in ateh a; vual nih athat a, vual khat bel ahinghawi hi. Huchi in Moab mite David sikhate ahong hita ua, thilpiakte ahon tawi uhi. 3David in Euphrates Luipi a, gam la nawn dia hoh in Zobah kumpipa Rehob tapa Hadadezer leng athat hi. 4Huchi in David in asakol tungtuangmi sangkhat-le-zasagih leh lei sepaih singnih amatsak hi. Huchi in kangtalai kai ding zakhat chih louh sakol tengteng athagui uh asattansak hi. 5Damaskas a Siria mite Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer huh dia kuante David in Siria mite lak a mi singnih-le-sangnih athat hi. 6Huchi in David in Siria gam a Damaskas ah sepaih akoih hi. Siria mite David sikhate ahong hita ua, siah aliau uhi. Toupa'n ahohna peuh ah David avualzousak zel hi. 7David in Hadadezer pawlte dangka-eng lumte alaksak a, Jerusalem ah apaipih hi. 8David Vualzohnate(1 Kro 18.1-17) 9Hamath kumpipa Toi in Hadadezer sepaih tengteng David in azou chih azak in, 10Hadadezer asual a, azou chih azak in chibai buk ding leh vualzawl ding in Toi in David kiang ah atapa Joram asawl a; David in lah Hadadezer dou in ana that khinta hi. Huchi in Joram in dangka belte, dangka-eng belte leh dal belte ahon tawi hi. 11Huaite leh namdang azoh tengteng a pan alak dangka leh dangka-eng kumpipa David in Toupa kiang ah alan hi: 12Siriate, Moabte, Ammon suante, Philistiate, Amalekte leh Zobah kumpipa Rehob tapa Hadadezer a kipan agallakte. 13David in Chi Phaizang ah Siria mi singkhat-le-sanggiat ava that a, apailam in aminthangta hi. 14Edom ah sepaih akoih a; Edom gam teng ah sepaih akoih hi.

2 SAMUEL 8: Huchi in Edom mi tengteng David sikha ahong hita uh. Huchi in Toupa'n David apaina peuh ah avualzousak hi. 15Huchi in David in Israel mi tengteng tung ah vai ahawm a; David in ami tengteng tung ah diktattak in vai ahawm hi. 16Zeruiah tapa Joab sepaih heutupen ahi. Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat bel tanchin gelhpa ahi. 17Ahitub tapa Zadok leh Abiathar tapa Ahimelek siampute ahi ua; Seraiah bel laigelhmi ahi. 18Jehoiada tapa Benaiah Kereth mi leh Pelet mite heutu ahi ua, David tapate bel vaihawmtu liante ahi uh.

2 SAMUEL 9: 1David in, “Jonathan ziak a hehpihna ka latsak theihna ding in Saul inkote lak a mi om lai a-om hia?” achi hi. 2Saul inkote sikha khat amin Ziba a-om hi. David kiang a hoh ding in asam uhi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Ziba na hi hia?” achi a; ama'n, “Na sikha amah ka hi,” achi hi. 3Kumpipa'n, “Pathian hehpihna ka latsak theihna ding in Saul inkote lak a mi om lai om lou uhia?” achi hi.Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Jonathan in tapa khat anei lai a, amah khebai ahi,” achi hi. 4Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Koi a om ahia?” achi hi.Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, Lo-debar ah Amiel tapa Makir inn ah a-om,” achi hi. 5Huchi in kumpipa David in mi asawl a, Lo-debar a pan Ammiel tapa Makir inn a pan mi ava pisak hi. 6David kiang ah Saul tapa Jonathan tapa Mephibosheth ahong hi. Amai a lei si in zahtakna apia hi. David in, “Mephibosheth,” achi a; ama'n, “En in, na sikha,” chi in adawng hi. 7David in akiang ah, “Lau ke'n. Na pa Jonathan ziak in hehpihna ka hon musak ngeingei ding. Na pu Saul gam tengteng ka hon pe nawn dia, ka dohkan ah an na ne gige ding,” achi hi. 8Huchi in akun a, “Ui sisa bang lel na hon limsak, kei na sikha bang ka hi a?” achi hi. 9David Leh Mephibosheth 10Amah a ding in lei na lehsak dia, nang leh na tapate leh na sikhate teng in na pu tapa in nek ding aneihtheihna ding in na sepkhiakte na hon la ding. Na pu tapa Mephibosheth in bel ka dohkan ah an a-um gige ding,” achi hi. Ziba in tapa sawm-le-nga leh sikha sawmnih anei hi.

2 SAMUEL 9: 11Huchi in Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa ka toupa'n asikha thu apiak bang zel in na sikha in ahih ding,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Mephibosheth in ka dohkan ah kumpipa tapa bang in an a-um ding,” achi hi. 12Mephibosheth in tapa naupang anei a, amin Mika ahi. Ziba inn a om tengteng Mephibosheth sikhate ahi uh. 13Huchi in kumpipa dohkan a an a-um gige ziak in Jerusalem ah Mephibosheth atengta hi; amah akhe lang tuak bai ahi.

2 SAMUEL 10: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai nung in Ammon suante kumpipa asi a, atapa Hanun in amun ah vai ahawm hi. 2David in, “Apa'n hon na hehpih bang in ke'n leng Nahash tapa Hanun ka hehpih sam ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David in apa tungtang thu a lungmuan ding in amah mite asawl a, huchi in David mite Ammon suante gam ava tung uhi. 3Himahleh Ammon suante makaite'n atoupa uh Hanun kiang ah, “David in na pa azahtak ziak a na kiang a lungmuanmi hon sawl hi in na um a hia? David in na mite khuate ahong hihsiatna dia zongkhe ding leh enkhe dia hon sawl ahi kei a hia?” achi uhi. 4Huchi in Hanun in David mite aman a, akhamul langkhat uh ametsak a, apuansilhte uh alaitak ah ataw uh phazou lel in atansak a, asawlkheta hi. 5David ahilhtak un, amau dawn ding mi asawl hi; amau lah azum mahmah ngal ua. Kumpipa'n, “Na khamul uh asau nawn ma in Jeriko ah om tadih unla, huai nung in hong paikik un,” achi hi. 6Ammon suante'n David huat lam ana hihta uh, chih atheih un, Ammon suante'n Beth-rehob a Siriate leh Zobah a Siriate sepaih singnih leh kumpipa Maka mi sangkhat, Tob mite singkhat-le-sangnih toh thukhak in aguai uhi. 7David in huai azak in Joab leh sepaih hangsan tengteng asawl hi. 8Ammon suante ahong kuan ua, kholutna kongkhak lam ah panmun akhoh uh. Zobah a mite leh Rehob a Siriate leh Tob leh Maakahte bel atuam in loubuk ah a-om uhi. 9Huchi in amalam uh leh anunglam uah ahon sual ding uh chih Joab in atheih in, Israel mite lak a mihoih tata atelkhia a, Siria mite sual ding in panmun ana khoh hi.

2 SAMUEL 10: 10David In Ammonte Leh Siriate Azou(1 Kro 19.1-19) 12Hangtak in om unla, i mite leh i Pathian khua hum in i kipasalsak ding uh. Toupa'n hoih asak bangbang in hih hen,” achi hi. 13Huchi in Joab leh akiang a mite'n Siria mite sual ding in kidouna mun anaih ua; ama uah ataikek uhi. 14Ammon suante'n Siria mite ataikek uh chih atheih un amau leng Abishai ma ah ataikek samta ua, khosung ah alut uhi. Joab in Ammon suante akiksan a, Jerusalem ah apaita hi. 15Siria mite'n Israelte ma ah thah in a-om uh chih akitheih un akikaikhawm uhi. 16Hadadezer in mi asawl a, Lui khen lam a Siria mite apikhia a, Hadadezer sepaih heutu Shobak in ma kai in lehlam ah ahong pai uhi. 17Huai David ahilh ua, ama'n Israel mi tengteng asamkhawm a, Jordan lui kan in Helam ah apai uhi. David dou ding in Siria mite'n panmun khoh in ahong dou uhi. 18Israelte ma ah Siria mite ataikek ua, David in Siria mi kangtalai zasagih tung a tuang leh sakol tungtuangmi singli athat a, asepaih heutu uh Shobak leng athat a, huai ah asita hi. 19Huchi in Hadadezer sikha a om kumpipa tengteng in Israelte ma ah tamtak thah ahi uh chih atheih un, Israelte toh kilemna abawl ua, asikha un a-omta uh. Huchi in Siria mite'n Ammon suante apanpih ngam nawn kei uhi.

2 SAMUEL 11: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, kum ahong kivei a, kumpipate galdou dia akuankhiak lai un, David in Joab leh asikhate tengteng asawl a, Ammon suante ahihmang ua, Rabbah khua a-umkhum uhi. Himahleh David bel Jerusalem ah a-om nilouh hi. 2Huan hichi ahong hi a, nitaklam ninem in alupna a pan David athoukhia a, kumpipa' inn tung ah akahtou hi. Inn tung a pan numei khat kisil lai amu hi. Huai numei bel melhoihtak ahi. 3David in huai numei tanchin dongtel ding in mi asawl hi. Huai mi in, “Eliam tanu, Bathsheba, Hit mi Uriah zi ahi kei maw?” achi hi. 4David in thupote asawl a, ava pita uh. Akiang ahong tung a, ana kithuahpihta hi. Asianlouhna a pan siansak khit ahita hi, huchi in a-inn ah paikikta hi. 5Huchi in numei ahong gaita a, “Nau ka paita,” chi in David atheisak hi. 6David in Joab kiang ah, “Hit mi Uriah ka kiang ah hon sawl in,” chi in athukhak hi. Joab in David kiang ah Uriah asawlta hi. 7Uriah akiang atun in David in, “Joab leh mite bang achi ua, kidouna ah bang achi ua?” chi in adong hi. 8David in Uriah kiang ah, “Na inn ah pai inla, na khete va sil in,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa' inn a pan Uriah apawtkhia a, kumpipa'n an nek ding thawnpiak azuisak hi. 9Himahleh atoupa sikha tengteng lak a kumpipa' inn kongkhak bul ah Uriah agiak a, a-inn ah apai kei hi. 10“A-inn ah Uriah apai kei,” chi a David ahilhtak un, David in Uriah kiang ah, “Khualzin hong tung hilou na hi maw? Bangziak a na inn a pai lou na hia?” achi hi. 11David Leh Bathsheba 12David in Uriah kiang ah, “Tuni leng hiai ah om lai inla, zingchiang in na pai na ding,” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 11: Huchi in Uriah huai ni leh azingchiang leng Jerusalem ah a-omta hi. 13David in amah asam a, ama ah ne in adawn hi. Adawn khamsak hi. Nitaklam in a-inn a pai lou in atoupa sikhate lak ah agiak hi. 14Huan hichi ahong hi a, azingchiang in David in Joab lai akhak a, Uriah aposak hi. 15Huai laikhak ah, “Gal khawkna pen ah Uriah ma phusak inla, athah ua asihna ding in kikhinsan un,” chi in agelh hi. 16Huan hichi ahong hi a, Joab in khua a-um lai in, mihangsante omna hi a atheihna ah Uriah apangsak hi. 17Khua a mite apawtkhia ua, Joab asual ua, David sikhate khenkhat asi ua, Hit mi Uriah leng asi hi. 18Huchi in Joab in mi asawl a, kidou tungtang thil tengteng David ahilhsak hi. 19Amisawl kiang ah, Kumpipa kiang a kidou tanchin tengteng na gen khit in, 20ahong heh guih a, “Bangziak a dou dia huchibang a khobul chin a hoh na hi ua? Kulh a pan a hon kap ding uh chih thei lou na hi uh maw? 21Jerubeseth tapa Abimelek that kua ahia? Buh gawizanna suang tungnungpen numei in kulhbaang tung a pan atung ah akhesuk a, Thebez a si ahi kei maw? Bangziak a hichibang a kulh kiangchin a pai na hi ua?” achihleh, “Na sikha Hit mi Uriah leng si ei ve, na chi ding uh,” chi in thu apia hi. 22Huchi in amisawl akuanta a, ava tung a, Joab in asawlsan tengteng David ahilh hi. 23Amisawl in David kiang ah, “Mite'n ahon na zou ua, loubuk ah hon sual ua, kou akho lutna kongkhak tanpha in ka nohkik uhi. 24“Thalkap mite'n kulh a pan na sikhate ahon kap ua, huchi in kumpipa sikha khenkhatte asi ua, na sikha Hit mi Uriah leng asi,” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 11: 25Huchi in David in misawl kiang ah, Joab kiang ah huchi in va gen in, “Hiaite'n na lungsim kipaklousak kei hen. Namsau in kuamah akhentuam ngal kei a, naksem in khua sual unla hihsia un, chi in hanthawn in,” achi hi. 26Uriah zi in apasal Uriah asi chih azak in apasal asuun hi. 27Asuun hun abei nung in David in a-inn ah api a, azi ahong hita a, tapa khat aneihsak hi. Himahleh David thilhih in Toupa akipaksak kei hi.

2 SAMUEL 12: 1Huan Toupa'n David kiang ah Nathan asawl hi. Akiang ah ava hoh a, hichi in achi, “Khua khat ah mi nih a-om ua; khat pen mihausa ahi a, khat pen mizawng ahi. 2Mihausa in belamhon tampi leh ganhon tampi anei hi. 3Mizawng in bel belamnou anu neuchik khat lei a, avulh kia lou ngal bangmah dang anei kei hi. Amah leh atate toh khangliankhawm in akuang sawkpih leh anou kikoppih, a-angsung a om, atanu bang geih a angaihtuah ahi. 4Mihausa kiang ah khualzinmi khat ava tung hi. Akiang a mikhual tung ama belam leh gan goh ding phal lou in mizawngpa belamnou leh ganhon a pan agohsak zawta hi,” achi hi. 5Huchi in huai mi tung ah David aheh mahmah a, Nathan kiang ah, “Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, huai thilhihmi asih ngeingei ding ahi. 6Hichibang thil ahih ziak leh hehpihna aneih louh ziak in abelamnou amun li a adit ding ahi,” achi hi. 7Nathan in David kiang ah, “Huai mipa nangmah na hi. Toupa, Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Israelte kumpipa ding in thau ka hon nilh a, Saul khut a pan ka hon hunkhia hi. 8Na pu in ka hon luahsak a, na pu zite na angsung ah ka koih hi. Israel leh Judah inkote ka hon pia a; huaite atawm luat uleh thil dangte leng hon piakbeh lai ding ka hi. 9Bangziak a Toupa thupiak ngaineu a, amitmuh a thil hoih lou na hih maizen? Hit mi Uriah namsau in na that a, azi na zi ding in na neihsak a, Ammon suante namsau in amah na that hi. 10Huaiziak in namsau in na insung anuse ngei nawn kei ding. Kei hon ngaineu a, Hit mi Uriah zi na zi dia na lak ziak in.

2 SAMUEL 12: 11Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, nangmah inkote mah nang kalh ding thil hoih lou ka tungkhe dia, na mitmuh mahmah in na zite ka hon laksak dia, na inveng ka pe dia, ama'n hiai sun khovak in na zite akithuahpih ding. 12Nathan Thugen Leh David Kisikna 13David in Nathan kiang ah, “Toupa tung ah ka khialta,” achi hi. Nathan in David kiang ah, “Toupa'n leng na khelhna akoihmangta. Na si kei ding. 14Himahleh hiai na thilhih a Pathian gensiatna dia hun lemtang thupitak Toupa melmate na piak ziak in nang a pan hong piang ding naupang asi ngeingei ding,” achi hi.David Tapa Sihna 15Huchi in Nathan in a-inn ah apaisanta hi. Uriah zi in David asuansak naupang tung ah Toupa'n akhut kha in, achi ana mahmahta hi. 16Huaiziak in David in naupang a ding in Pathian kiang ah angen ngutngut a, an angawl a, alut a, zankhua in lei ah alum hi. 17A-inkote lak a upate athou ua, lei a pan kaithou ding in akiang ah adingh uhi. Himahleh athou nuam kei a, akiang uah leng ane sam kei. 18Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in naupang asita hi. David sikhate'n naupang asita chih ahilh ngam kei uh, “Ngai in, naupang adam lai in akiang ah thu i gen ua, angaikhe nuam kei a. Naupang asita chih bangchi in i hilh ngamta ding ua? Bangchi hiam in thil hoih lou akihih kha ding,” achi uhi. 19Himahleh David in asikhate kisimhou amuh in naupang asita chih atheita hi. David in asikhate kiang ah, “Naupang sita hia?” achi a, amau, “Asita,” achi uh. 20Huchi in David lei a pan athou a, akisil a, sathau akinilh a, apuante akheng a; Toupa' inn ah ahoh a, Pathian abia hi.

2 SAMUEL 12: A-inn ah apai nawn a, an akan a, ama ah alui ua, aneta hi. 21Huchi in asikhate'n akiang ah, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia? Naupang adam lai in an na ngawl a, na kap a, himahleh naupang asihtak in na thou a, an na ne a,” achi uhi. 22Ama'n, “Naupang adam lai in an ngawl in ka kap hi. Naupang adamna ding in Toupa'n hon hehpih khamoh kei ding chih kua ahia thei? Ka chi hi. 23Himahleh tu in asita ngal a, bang ding in an ka ngawl dia? Ka pikik nawn thei dia hia? Akiang ah ka pai dia, himahleh amah ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn kei ding,” achi hi.Solomon Pianna 24Huchi in David in azi Bathsheba alungmuan a, akiang ah alut a, akithuahpih a, tapa asuang a, amin Solomon asa hi. Toupa'n amah a-it hi. 25Huchi in zawlnei Nathan athukhak a, ama'n Toupa ziak in amin Jedidiah asa hi.David In Rabbah Ala(1 Kro 20.1-3) 26Huchi in Joab in Ammon suante khopi Rabbah sim in alata hi. 27Joab in David kiang ah mi asawl a, “Rabbah ka sim a, tuite khopi ka lata hi. 28Tu in mi om lai teng kaikhawm inla, khopi sual tum in zuan inla, la in. Ke'n khopi la leng ka min apu kha ding,” achi hi. 29Huchi in David in mi tengteng akaikhawm a, Rabbah ah ahoh ua, ava sim ua, alata uhi. 30Akumpipa uh lallukhu khuk lai alaksak a, agikdan dangka-eng talent khat ahi a, suangmantamte leng atel hi. David akhusak ua, khopi ah gallak tampi ala uhi. 31Huchi in asung a om mipite apikheta a, sing-atnate, leilehna sikzumte leh sik heipite zang in nna asemsak hi. Lei haltakte abawlsak a; Ammon suante khopi tengteng ah huchibang in ahih hi. Huchi in David leh mi tengteng Jerusalem ah apaikik nawnta uhi.

2 SAMUEL 13: 1Huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, David tapa Absalom in sanggam numei melhoih khat anei a, amin Tamar ahi. David tapa Amnon in amah a-it hi. 2Huchi in asanggamnu Tamar ziak in Amnon abuai mahmah a; achi ana hi. Amah lah nungak siangthou ahih ziak in atung a thil banghiam hih haksapi ahi chi in Amnon in angaihtuah hi. 3Himahleh Amnon in lawm anei a, amin Jonadab ahi. Amah David unaupa Shimea tapa ahi. Jonadab migitlouhpil mahmah mi khat ahi. 4Ama'n Amnon kiang ah, “Aw, nang kumpipa tapa bangchidan ahia, aniteng a na gawn hulhul mawk? Hon hilh lou ding maw?” achi hi. Amnon in akiang ah, “Ka unaupa Absalom sanggamnu Tamar ka it a ahi,” achi hi. 5Jonadab in akiang ah, “Na lupna ah lumlum inla, kichinasak in. Na pa'n ahong veh chiang in akiang ah, Hehpih in ka sanggamnu Tamar ka kiang ah hong hoh henla, tanghou nek ding hong pia hen. Ka muh theih in ka mitmuh mahmah in nek ding hon bawlsakleh, akhut ngei ah ka na ne ding, na chi in,” achi hi. 6Huchi in Amnon alum a, akichinasakta hi. Kumpipa'n amah ava et in Amnon in akiang ah, “Hehpih in ka sanggamnu Tamar hong pai henla, ka mitmuh mahmah in tanghou pek nih hiam hon bawlsak henla, amah khut mahmah ah ka ne ding,” achi hi. 7Huchi in David in Tamar kiang ah, “Na sanggampa Amnon inn ah hoh inla, nek ding va bawlsak dih ve,” chi ding in a-inn ah mi asawl hi. 8Huchi in Tamar, asanggampa Amnon inn ah ahoh hi. Amah ana lum hi. Tangbuang ala a, amek a, amitmuh a tanghou pek bawl in akang hi. 9Akanna bel ala a, ama ah abungkhia hi. Himahleh ama'n ane nuam kei hi.

2 SAMUEL 13: Huan Amnon in, “Mi tengteng in hon pawtkhiaksan uhen,” achi hi. Huchi in apawtkhiaksan vek uhi. 10Huan Amnon in Tamar kiang ah, “Na khut mahmah a ka nektheihna ding in nek ding dantan ah hon la in,” achi hi. Tamar in atanghou pek bawl ala a, asanggampa Amnon kiang ah dantan ah alalut hi. 11Nesak dia akiangnai a ava paipih in ana len a, akiang ah, “Ka sanggamnu, ka kiang ah hong lum in,” achi hi. 12Ama'n adawng a, “Hilou e, ka sanggampa, hon chi teitei ke'n. Israelte lak ah hichibang thilhih ding ahi kei. Hiai thil gilou haihuaitak hih ke'n. 13Ammon Leh Tamar 14Himahleh athu azui kei a, amah sang in ahatzaw ngal a, thagum in akithuahpih teiteita hi. 15Huchi in Amnon in huat chihtak in ahota a, a-itna sang in ahuatna alianzaw hi. Huchi in Amnon in akiang ah, “Thou inla, paimang in,” achi hi. 16Ama'n akiang ah, “Huchi ding ahi kei. Hichibang a dikloutak a na hon delhkhiak ka tung a na gamtatsa sang in ahoih kei zaw hi,” achi hi. Himahleh azui nuam tuan kei hi. 17Huchi in anasem sikha asam a, “Hiai numei ka kiang a pan pawtsak inla, kong khak bikbek in,” achi hi. 18Minu'n puanaktual ze tuamtuam a gial asilh hi. Huchibang puanaktual kumpipa nungak siangthoute'n asilh uh ahi. Huchi in asikha in apikhia a, kong akhak bikbekta hi. 19Tamar in alu ah meivu akoih a, apuanaktual silh ze tuamtuam abotkek a, asip ah akhut akoih a, ngaihtak a kap kawm in apaita hi. 20Asanggampa Absalom in akiang ah, “Na sanggampa Amnon na kiang a om ahi maw? Himahleh tu in dai mai in, ka sanggamnu, na sanggampa aka, limsak dah in,” achi hi. Huchi in Tamar asanggampa Absalom inn ah nguitak in akikhumta hi.

2 SAMUEL 13: 21Himahleh kumpipa David in huai tengteng azak in aheh mahmah hi. 22Absalom in Amnon kiang ah asia-apha hitaleh bangmah agen nuam kei hi. Asanggamnu Tamar achih teitei ziak in Absalom in Amnon aho mahmah hi.Absalom Phulakna 23Kum nih vengveng abei nung in hichi ahong hi a, Ephraim kiang a Baal-hazor ah Absalom in belam mul ametsak hi. Hiai ah kumpipa tapa tengteng achial hi. 24Kumpipa kiang ah Absalom ahoh a, “Ngai in, na sikha in belam mul ametsak a, kumpipa leh asikhate na sikha kiang ah hoh le uh akei dia,” achi hi. 25Kumpipa'n Absalom kiang ah, “Hilou e, ka tapa, ka vek un hoh lou e, ka hon hihtuailuai lo kha ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in ama'n chial teitei mahleh a-ut tuan kei a, himahleh avualzawl hi. 26Huchi in Absalom in, “Ahihkeileh ka unaupa Amnon bek ka kiang uah hong hohleh ake,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bang ding in ahong hoh tuamse dia?” achi hi. 27Himahleh Absalom in angen teitei a, huchi in Amnon leh kumpipa tapa tengteng azuisak hi. 28Absalom in, asikhate kiang ah, “Ngai un, Amnon uain dawn a nuam asak lai in na kiang ua Amnon that un, ka hon chihleh, that unla, lau kei un, thu ka hon pe khin hilou hia? Hangsantak in om unla, kipasalsak un,” chi in thu apia hi. 29Huchi in Absalom sikhate'n Amnon tung ah Absalom thupiak bang in ahih uhi. Huchi in kumpipa tapa tengteng athou ua, asabiltung uah atuang chiat ua, ataimangta uhi. 30Huan hichi ahong hi a, lampi a a-om lai un, Absalom in kumpipa tapate tengteng athat vek a, khat lel leng ahawi kei, chi in David kiang ah thu ana tung hi. 31Huchi in kumpipa athou a apuansilhte botkek in lei ah alumta hi.

2 SAMUEL 13: Asikha tengteng in leng apuansilhte uh botkek in akiang ah adingh uhi. 32David unau Shimea tapa Jonadab in adawng a, “Ka toupa'n kumpipa tapa tangval tengteng athat vek uh chih gingta kei hen. Amnon kia ahi asi. Asanggamnu Tamar achih teitei nungsiah Absalom in hichibang a hih atup him ahi. 33Huaiziak in tu in ka toupa, kumpipa'n kumpipa tapa tengteng asi uh chih gingta in lunghimoh kei hen. Amnon kia ahi asi,” achi hi. 34Huai sung in Absalom ataimangta hi. Galvil tangval adak a, a-en a, ngai in, anunglam a tang pang a lampi ah mi tampi ahong pai uhi. 35Jonadab in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, kumpipa tapate ahong pai uh, na sikha in agen bang geih ana hi na,” achi hi. 36Huan hichi ahong hi a, agen khittak in ngai in, kumpipa tapate ahong tung ua, a-aw uh suah in akap uhi. Kumpipa leng asikhate toh kah petmah in akapta uhi. 37Himahleh Absalom ataimang a, Geshur kumpipa Ammihud tapa Talmai kiang ah ahoh hi. David in niteng in atapa asuun hi. 38Absalom ataimang a, Geshur gam atung a, huai ah kum thum ava om hi. 39Absalom kiang ah kumpipa David hoh a-ut mahmah a, Amnon tungtang thu ah alung amuangta hi. Amah lah asi khinta chih athei ngal a.

2 SAMUEL 14: 1Huchi in Zeruiah tapa Joab in kumpipa lungsim Absalom tung ah a-om chih ana thei hi. 2Huchi in Joab in Tekoa ah mi asawl a, huai a numei pil khat ava pisak hi. Akiang ah, “Lusuun bang in kibawl inla, lusuun puan silh inla, sathau leng kinilh lou in numei sawtpi misi suun bang in om in. 3Kumpipa kiang ah hoh inla, akiang ah hichibang in thu va gen in aw,” achi hi. Huchi in Joab in akam ah thute amuam hi. 4Tekoa a numei in kumpipa kiang a thu gen ding in amai a lei si in abokkhup a, zahtakna pia in, “Kumpipa aw, hon huh in,” achi hi. 5Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Meithai petmah ka hi a, ka pasal asita hi. 6Na sikhanu'n tapa nih anei a, anih un lou ah akisual ua, kuamah phelh ding lah a-om kei a, akhat pen in adang asat a, athatta hi. 7Ngai in, a-inkuan tengteng in na sikhanu adoukhawm ua, a-unaupa thatpa, a-unaupa athah ziak a ka thah sam theihna ding un hon pekhia in, huchi in gouluah dingpa leng ka that pah ngal ding uh, achi uh. Huchibang in ka mei-am omsun amitsak ding ua, ka pasal min nei lou leh leitung a suan himhim nei lou in a-om mai ding,” achi hi. 8Kumpipa'n numei kiang ah, “Na inn ah pai inla, na tungtang thu ah thu ka pe mai ding,” achi hi. 9Tekoa a numei in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, huai gitlouhna moh ka tung leh ka pa inkote tung ah ke mai hen. Kumpipa leh alaltutphah in moh po kei hen,” achi hi. 10Kumpipa'n, “Kuapeuh na tung a banghiam gen peuhmah ka kiang ah hon pi inla, ahon khoih nawn het kei ding uh,” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 14: 11Ama'n, “Sisan suah mite tung a phula mite'n hihmang nawn lou ding in kumpipa'n Toupa na Pathian theigige hen aw, huchi lou in zaw ka tapa ahihmang kha ding uh,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, na tapa samzang khat lel leng lei ah ake kei ding,” achi hi. 12Huchi in numei in, “Na sikhanu in toupa ka kumpipa kiang ah thu kam khat kia ka hon gen nawn peuhmah ding aw,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Gen ve,” achi hi. 13Numei in, “Ahihleh bangziak in ahia Pathian mite dou a hichibang a hih tum na hia? Hiai thu a pan kumpipa moh in akilang ahi, kumpipa'n adelhmangpa apikik nawn louh ziak in. 14Joab In Absalom Hong Kikdan Ding Agel 15Huchi in toupa ka kumpipa kiang a hiai thu gen dia ka hong leng mite'n ahon lauhsak ziak uh ahi. Na sikhanu'n, kumpipa kiang ah ka gen phot dia, kumpipa'n asikhanu nget ahihsak khakleh, ka chi a ahi. 16Kumpipa'n kei leh ka tapa Pathian gouluah lou dia hihman tum mi lak a na sikhanu hunkhe ding in ana ngaikhe ding, ka chi hi. 17Huchi in na sikhanu a ding in, toupa ka kumpipa thu lungmuanhuaitak hi henla; asia-apha na khen ding in toupa ka kumpipa lah Pathian angel bang mai ahi ngal a. Toupa Pathian na kiang ah om hen, ka chi ahi,” achi hi. 18Kumpipa'n adawng a, numei kiang ah, “K'on dot peuhmah bangmah hon iim ke'n aw,” achi hi. Numei in, “Toupa ka kumpipa'n genleh ake,” achi hi. 19Kumpipa'n, “Hiai thu himhim ah Joab in panna anei hia?” achi hi. Numei in adawng a, “Toupa ka kumpipa, na kha ahin bang in ka gen ahi, toupa ka kumpipa'n agensa kuamah in taklam hiam, veilam ah hiam apel thei kei ding uh.

2 SAMUEL 14: Na sikha Joab in hon sawl a, hiai thu tengteng na sikhanu ahon muam vek hi. 20Thil omdan hihlamdang ding in hiai thil na sikha Joab in ahih ahi. Ka toupa bel leitung a thil om tengteng theithei Pathian angel bang a pil ahi,” achi hi. 21Kumpipa'n Joab kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka hih samta hi. Huaiziak in pai inla, tangval Absalom va pi nawn lechin maw,” achi hi. 22Joab in amai a lei si in abokkhup a, kumpipa kiang ah kipahthu agen hi. Joab in, “Toupa ka kumpipa aw, toupa'n asikha ngetna alohchinsak ziak in tuni in na sikha in na mitmuh in deihsakna atang chih ka na theita hi,” achi hi. 23Huchi in Joab athou a, Geshur ah ahoh a, Jerusalem ah Absalom ahon pita hi. 24Kumpipa'n, “Ama inn ah pai henla, ka mel hong mu kei hen,” achi hi. Huchi in ama inn ah Absalom apai a, kumpipa mel amuta kei hi.Kumpipa Toh Absalom Kilem Nawn 25Israel tengteng lak ah Absalom bang a melhoih a phat loh kuamah a-om kei uh. Akhenuai a pan alusip pha in gensiatna himhim a-om kei hi. 26Asam amet chiang in, kum kivei teng in ametsak a, asam lah agik ziak in amet zel hi, abuk zel a, kumpipa bukna shekel zanih apha hi. 27Absalom in tapa thum leh tanu khat anei a, amin Tamar ahi a, melhoihtak ahi. 28Absalom kum nih hilhial Jerusalem ah a-om a; himahleh kumpipa mel himhim amu kei hi. 29Absalom in kumpipa kiang a amah sawl ding in Joab athukhak hi. Himahleh ahoh nuam kei a, athukhak nawn in leng ahoh nuam tuan kei hi. 30Huchi in asikhate kiang ah, “I aw, Joab lou, kei lou kiang ahi a, barli buh anei a, va hal un,” achi hi. Huchi in Absalom sikhate'n lou ava hal uhi.

2 SAMUEL 14: 31Huchi in Joab athou a, Absalom kiang ah a-inn ah ahoh a, “Bangziak a na sikhate'n ka lou hal ahi ua?” achi hi. 32Absalom in Joab adawng a, “Ngai dih, bang ding a Geshur a pan hong pai ka hia? Huai ah omden leng kei a dia hoihzaw mah ding hiven. Kumpipa kiang a sawl dia hon thukhak ka hi. Huaiziak in tu in kumpipa mel hon musak in. Tatlekna nei ka hihleh hon that maileh ake,” achi hi. 33Kumpipa kiang ah Joab ahoh a, ahilh hi. Ama'n Absalom asam a, kumpipa kiang ah ahoh a, kumpipa ma ah amai a lei si in abokkhup a; huchi in kumpipa'n Absalom atawp hi.

2 SAMUEL 15: 1Huai khit in hichi ahong hi a, Absalom in kangtalai leh sakolte leh mi sawmnga ama a tai ding in abawlkhol hi. 2Absalom zingkhang in athou a, kulh kongkhak lampi nawl ah ana dingh hi. Thubuai khensak dia kumpipa kiang a hong pai peuhmah ana sam a, “Nang koi khopi a kipan na hia?” ana chi zel hi. Amau, “Na sikha Israel namte lak a khat ka hi,” achi zel uh. 3Absalom in, “I aw, na thu ahoih in adik hi. Himahleh angaikhe ding mi kumpipa'n kuamah asep kei,” ana chi zel hi. 4Absalom mah in, “Michih thubuai gen ding nei hiam, nget ding nei hiam peuhmah ka kiang a ahong paina ding un, gam vaihawmpa in bawl in om leng chi na tel ing e aw! Huchi in diktak in vai ka na hawmsak ding,” ana chi zel hi. 5Hichi leng ahi lai a, kuapeuh amah zahtakna pe dia hong paitou peuhmah akhut a sawk in alen a, ana tawp hi. 6Israel mi kumpipa kiang a thugen dia hong kuan peuhmahte Absalom in huchibang in ana hih zel hi. Huchi in Absalom in Israel mite lungtang aguksak hi. 7Huan hichi ahong hi a, kum li ahong bei in Absalom in kumpipa kiang ah, Hebron a Toupa kiang a ka thuchiam tangtun ding in hon hohsak in. 8“Na sikha in Siria gam a Geshur a ka om lai in Jerusalem a ahon pikik peuhmahleh Toupa nna ka sem ding, chi in thu ka chiam khinta ngal a,” achi hi. 9Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Khamuangtak in kuan in,” achi hi. Huchi in athou a, Hebron ah ahohta hi. 10Himahleh Absalom in, “Pengkul ging na zak peuhmah chiang un, Hebron ah Absalom kumpipa ahita, na chi ding uh,” chi in Israel nam tengteng kiang ah mi asimsawl khinta hi.

2 SAMUEL 15: 11Jerusalem a pan asap mi zanih in Absalom azui uhi. Amau bel lungsim siangtak pu in ahoh ua, thil omdan bangmah athei kei uh. 12Absalom in kithoihnate alat lai in Gilon mi Ahithophel, David thudotmi, Giloh a pan athukhak hi. Athusawmguk uh athupi mahmah a; Absalom lam ah lah mipite apung hulhul uhi.Jerusalem A Pan David Ataikhia 13David kiang ah, Israel mite lungtang Absalom lam ah a-awn mahmah, chih thupotu khat in ahong hilh hi. 14David in Jerusalem a om, asikha tengteng kiang ah, “Thou unla i taikhe ding uh. Kuamah lah Absalom a pan suakta lou ding i hi ngal ua. Pawtkhe meng un. Huchi lou in zaw ahon pha pah mai dia, i tung uah thil hoih loutak ahon tun dia, namsau in khua ahong sual kha ding,” achi hi. 15Absalom Hel Sawmna 16Kumpipa apawt a, a-inkote tengteng in azui uhi. Kumpipa'n inn ngak ding in numei sawm, ameite akoih hi. 17Kumpipa apawt a, mi tengteng in azui uh. Gamla kuam mun khat, inn tawpna ah akhawl tadih uhi. 18Asikha tengteng in apaikheng ua; Kerit mite, Pelet mite, Git mite, mi zaguk Gath a pan amah hon zuite kumpipa ma ah apai uhi. 19Huchi in kumpipa'n Git mi, Ittai kiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia nang na hong tel? Paikik nawn inla, kumpipa kiang ah om in. Nang zaw mikhual gamdangmi leng na hi ngal a, nangmah mun lam ah kik nawn mai in. 20Zan zek a hong na hi a, tuni a ka kiang ua asuk atou a hon zui sam ding in ka hon chi ding maw? Ka pai theihtheihna a pai ding ka hi, nang zaw kik nawn inla, na unaute tengteng pikik nawn in. Hehpihna leh thutak na kiang ah om hen,” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 15: 21Ittai in kumpipa kiang ah, “Toupa hinna leh kumpipa, ka toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Kumpipa, ka toupa na omna peuh ah, sih leh sih, dam leh dam, na sikha a-om sam ding,” achi hi. 22David in Ittai kiang ah, “Pai inla, va galkai in,” achi hi. Huchi in Git mi Ittai, amite tengteng leh ataneute tengteng toh agalkai uhi. 23Ngaihtak in huai gammi teng akap ua, mipite apai vek uhi. Gamdai lampi zuan in apai ua, kumpipa'n leng Kidron lui akan a, mipi tengteng in leng akan uhi. 24Huan ngai in, Pathian thukhun bawm zawng in Zadok leh Levite tengteng akiang ah ahong pai uhi. Pathian bawm anga ua, mipi in khua apawtkhiaksan vek tan in Abiathar ahohtou hi. 25Kumpipa'n Zadok kiang ah, “Pathian bawm pen khopi sung ah zawnglut nawn un. Toupa mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh ahon pikik nawn dia, Pathian bawm leh a-omna ahon musak nawn ding. 26Himahleh, nang ah kipahna mahmah ka nei kei achihleh, ngai in, hichi mai ka hi a, hoih asak bangbang in ka tung ah hih mai hen,” achi hi. 27Kumpipa'n siampu Zadok kiang ah, “Mutheipa na hi kei a hia? Na tapate nih, na tapa Ahimaaz leh Abiathar tapa Jonathan toh lungmuangtak in khopi ah pai nawn un. 28Ngai in, kei zaw tanchin ahong theihsak masiah uh gamdai a lui kannate ah ka na om ding,” achi hi. 29Zadok leh Abiathar in Jerusalem ah Pathian bawm apaipih nawn ua; huai ah a-omta uh. 30Olive tang paitouhna ah David akahtou a, apaitouh kawm in akap kawmkawm hi. Alu akhuh a, khevuak in apai hi. Akiang a mi om tengteng in alu uh akhuh chiat ua, kap kawmkawm in apaitou uhi. 31Kuahiam khat in Ahithophel, Absalom lam a pang in thusawm mite lak ah apang sam, chih David ahilh hi.

2 SAMUEL 15: David in, “Toupa aw, Ahithophel lemtheihna haina suaksak ding in ka hon ngen hi,” achi hi. 32Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian biakna tang vum a David akahkhiak touhleh, ngai in, Arki mi Hushai apuanak bohkek silh a, alu a lei kai niaunuau in amah dawn ding in ahong pai hi. 33David in akiang ah, “Ka kiang a na hong samleh zaw, kei a ding in puakgik na hi ding. 34Himahleh khopi a na kik nawn a, Absalom kiang a, toupa aw, na sikha in ka om ding. Tuma lam a na pa sikha a ka om bang in, tu in na sikha in ka om leuleu ding, na va chihleh Ahithophel lemtheihna hon dalsakpa na hi zaw ding hi. 35Huai ah na kiang ah siampu Zadok leh Abiathar leng a-om sam uh ahi kei maw? Huan hichi ahi ding a, kumpipa' inn a thupawt na zak peuhmah siampu Zadok leh Abiathar na hilh zel ding. 36Ngai in, atapate uh nih Zadok tapa Ahimaaz leh Abiathar tapa Jonathan leng akiang uah a-om uhi. Na thil zak peuhmahte hon theisak ding in amau na hon sawl zel ding,” achi hi. 37Huchi in David lawm, Hushai khopi ah alut a; huchi in Jerusalem ah Absalom alutta hi.

2 SAMUEL 16: 1Huan David in tang vum kahkhiakna akhen zek nung in, ngai in, Mephibosheth sikha Ziba in sabiltung nih toh ana dawn hi. Sabiltung nihte'n tanghou beu zanih, grep phoukeu bawk zakhat, nipithei zakhat leh uain thawl khat apua uhi. 2Kumpipa'n Ziba kiang ah, “Hiaite bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Ziba in, “Sabiltungte kumpipa inkuanpihte tuanna ding ahi. Tanghou leh nipitheite tangvalte nek ding; uain bel gamdai a bah peuhmahte dawn ding ahi,” achi hi. 3Kumpipa'n, “Ahihleh na pu tapa koi ah?” achi hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, Jerusalem ah a-om. ‘Tuni in Israel inkote'n ka pa lalgam ahon pekik nawn ding uh, chi a angaihtuah ziak in,’ ” achi hi. 4Kumpipa'n Ziba kiang ah, “Ngai in, Mephibosheth thil neih tengteng nang a ahi vekta,” achi hi. Ziba in, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, na mitmuh a deihsakna mu ding in kingainiamtak in ka hon ngen,” achi hi.David Leh Shimei 5Kumpipa David, Bahurim atun in, ngai in, Saul inkote lak a mi Gera tapa, amin Shimei ahong pawtkhia a; hamsia lou kawmkawm in ahong paitou hi. 6Suang in David adeng a, kumpipa David sikha tengteng leng; mi tengteng leh sepaih hat tengteng ataklam leh veilam ah a-om uhi. 7Shimei in hamsiat in hichi in achi, “Paimang vengveng in, paimang vengveng in, nang sisan suah hat leh Belial mipa: 8Asik a vai na hawm Saul inkote tengteng sisan Toupa'n na tung ah ahon kiksak nawnta. Toupa'n gam na tapa Absalom ana pe khinta. Ngai in, sisan suah hatmi na hih ziak in nangmah siatna na kitun ve,” achi hi. 9Huchi in Zeruiah tapa Abishai in kumpipa kiang ah, “Bangziak a hiai ui sisa in toupa, ka pu hamsiat mawkmawk ahia? Ka kuantou ding a alu ka tansak mai ding?” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 16: 10Kumpipa'n, “Nou Zeruiah tapate aw, nou na hon theihsak ding uh bang a-om a? Toupa'n akiang a, David hamsiat in, achihleh ahamsiat ahi mai kei dia. Bangziak a huchibang a hih kua'n achi dia?” achi hi. 11David in Abishai leh asikhate tengteng kiang ah, “Ngai un, ka tapa, ka gil a gah mahmah in hon thah atum. Hiai Benjamin mi'n nak tup sem na'n chia! Bangmah loh kei unla, hamsia ahihleh loh hen. Toupa hihsak ahi. 12Toupa'n ka haksatna ahon mu dia, Toupa'n tuni a hon hamsiat ahoih lam in hon thuk nawn kha maithei hi,” achi hi. 13Huchi in David leh amite lampi ah apai zel uh. Shimei bel agal tang pang ah apai zel a, apai kawm in ahamsiat zom zel a, suang in adeng a, leivui in atheh hi. 14Huchi in kumpipa leh akiang a mi om tengteng Aiphim atungta uh. Huchi in huai ah akhawl tawldam uhi.Jerusalem Ah Absalom 15Absalom leh Israel mi tengteng Jerusalem ah ahoh ua, alak uah Ahithophel leng atel hi. 16David Leh Ziba 17Absalom in Hushai kiang ah, “Hichibang ahi maw na lawm na hehpihna dan? Bangziak a na lawm kiang a hoh lou?” achi hi. 18Hushai in Absalom kiang ah, “Ka hoh kei ding. Toupa leh hiai mite leh Israel mi tengteng atelpa uh thuthu in ka om dia, akiang ah ka om zaw ding. 19Kua nna ka sem dia? Atapa ma ah nna ka sem ding ahi kei maw? Na pa ma a ka sep bang in nangmah ma ah ka sem ding,” achi hi. 20Absalom in Ahithophel kiang ah, “Bangchi in i hih diam aw, na ngaihdan gen dih ve,” achi hi. 21Ahithophel in Absalom kiang ah, “Na pa mei, inn ngak a akoihte kithuahpih in. Israel mi tengteng in na pa'n nang hon mudah chih ana za ding ua; nang lam a pang tengteng khut ahat ding,” achi hi. 22Absalom a ding in inn tung ah puanin akai uh. Huchi in Israel mi tengteng mitmuh in apa meite akithuahpih hi. 23Huai lai in Ahithophel lemtheihnate, Pathian thu dongpa lemtheihna bang ahi a; huchi mah bang in David leh Absalom in leng Ahithophel ana ngai uhi.

2 SAMUEL 17: 1Huai lou leng Ahithophel in Absalom kiang ah, “Mi singkhat-le-sangnih ka telkhe dia, tuzan in David delh ding in ka kuan ding. 2Abah lai leh hat louh laitak ka va phanon dia, ka va lausak ding. Huchi in akiang a mi tengteng ataimang ding uh. Huchi in kumpipa kia ka va that mai ding. 3Na kiang ah mipite ka hon pikik nawn vek ding. Na mizonpa mi tengteng hong kik toh kibang ahi. Huchi in mi tengteng khamuang in a-om ding uh,” achi hi. 4Huan hiai thugen in Absalom leh Israel upate akipaksak hi. 5Huchi in Absalom in, “Arki mi Hushai sam peuhmah phot inla, amah gendan i ngaikhe peuhmah ding uh,” achi hi. 6Absalom kiang a Hushai ahong tun in Absalom in, “Ahithophel in hichibang in agen a, agen bang a hih ding i ding uam? Hih lou ding hi leng nang hon gen himhim dih,” chi in ana houpih hi. 7Hushai in Absalom kiang ah, “Tutung a Ahithophel lemtheihna ahoih kei,” achi hi. 8Hushai in, “Na pa leh amite na thei a, sepaih hangsantak, gam a vompi anou laksak bang mai ahi uh. Na pa lah galdoumi ahi a, mipi lak ah agiak khol kei ding. 9Ngai in, tu in leng koi lai leihawm hiam ah, koi lai mun ah hiam a kibu ahi ding. Huan hichi ahi ding a, akisual tung ua mi khenkhat apuk ualeh aza peuh in, Absalom zuite athat ek uh, achi mai ding uh. 10Huchi in mihangsantak, humpinelkai lungsim bang pumi hial leng ahong lungke mahmah ding uh. Israel mi tengteng in lah na pa sepaih hangsantak ahihdan leh akiang a mi omte mihangsan taktak ahihdan uh athei vek ngal ua.

2 SAMUEL 17: 11Kei hoihsak sam dan, Israel mi tengteng Dan a pan Beer-sheba pha in tuipi a piaunel zah hial ding na kiang ah samkhawm vek lehang; kidouna ah nang nangawn kuan lechin. 12Huchi in koi lai mun peuh ah i kituahna na ah lei a daitui kia bang mai in i boh ding ua; amah leh akiang a mi om tengteng khat lel leng i hawi kei ding uh. 13Huai lou leng, khua a alutleh Israel mi tengteng, khauhual tawi in huai ah i va hoh ding ua, suang neuchik leng om lou hial khop in lui ah i kaikhe vek ding,” achi hi. 14Huchi in Absalom leh Israel mi tengteng in, “Ahithophel thuhilhna sang in Arka mi Hushai thuhilhna ahoihzaw,” achi uhi. Toupa'n Absalom tung a thil hoih lou atunsak theihna ding in Ahithophel thuhilhna hoihtak nuaisiah ding in ana sep khin him hi.David Hilhkholh In A-om A, Asuakta 15Huchi in Hushai in siampu Zadok leh Abiathar kiang ah, “Huchibang khachibang in Ahithophel in Absalom leh Israel upate hoih ding in angaihtuahpih a; ke'n huchibang khachibang in hoih ding in ka ngaihtuah hi. 16Huaiziak in tuzan in gamdai lui kainate a giak nawn lou in kan ngeingei un. Huchi lou in zaw kumpipa leh akiang a om tengteng ahihmang vek kha ding uh chi in David hilhsak zok un,” achi hi. 17Hushai In Absalom Apikhial 18Himahleh naupang in ana mu a, Absalom ahilh hi. Himahleh anih un ataimang pah ua, Bahurim a mi khat, a-intual a tuileh nei inn ah ava hoh ua, tuileh sung ah alutsukta uhi. 19Numei in tuileh asitna in asin a, atung ah buh aphou a, kuama'n athei kei hi.

2 SAMUEL 17: 20Absalom sikhate numei kiang ah ava hoh ua, “Ahimaaz leh Jonathan koi a om ahi ua?” achi uhi.Numei in akiang uah, “Luita tui akanta ding uh,” ana chi hi. Ava zong ua, amu kei ua, Jerusalem ah akik nawn uh. 21Huan hichi ahong hi a, apaitum khit un tuileh a pan ahong pawtkhia ua, kumpipa David ava hilh uhi. David kiang ah, “Pawtkhia unla, tui kan pah un, huchi in Ahithophel in ahon tum hi,” achi uh. 22Huchi in David leh akiang a mi om tengteng apawtkhia ua, Jordan lui akan uh.
