Khua ahong vak in Jordan lui kan lou khat lel leng a-om kei uh. 23Ahithophel in ahoihsakdan azui kei uh, chih atheih in asabiltung avan a, apawtkhia a, akhua ah apai hi. A-inkuante khosakna ding abawlsak sipsip a, huchi in a-awklumta hi. Amah asita a, apa han ah avui uhi. 24Huchi in David, Mahanaim ava tung hi. Absalom in akiang a Israel mi tengteng toh Jordan lui akan uhi. 25Absalom in Joab sik in Amasa sepaih heutu ding in akoih hi. Amasa bel mi khat amin Ithra tapa ahi. Ithra ahihleh Israel mi, Joab nu sanggam Nahash tanu Abigail zi a neipa ahi. 26Israel mite leh Absalom in Gilead gam ah panmun akhoh uhi. 27Huan hichi ahong hi a, Mahanaim a David atun in, Ammon suan Rabbah a mi Nahash tapa Shobi, Lo-debar a mi Amiel tapa Makir leh Rogelim a Gilead mi Barzillaite'n 28lupnate, maiphiat kuangte, leibelte, huit buh, barli buh, tangbuang, be kankeu, 29khuaizu, mokhon, belamte, ganhon a pan nawikhalte, David leh akiang a om mite nek ding ahon tawi uhi, “Gamdai ah mite agilkial ua, atawl ua, adangtak uh,” achih ziak un.

2 SAMUEL 18: 1Huan David in akiang a om mite asim a, sepaih sangkhat tung a heutute, zakhat tung a heutute abawl hi. 2David in mite asawlkhia a, mun thum a khen mun khat Joab in aheu a, mun thum a khen mun khat Joab unaupa Zeruiah tapa, Abishai in aheu a, mun thum a khen mun khat Git mi Ittai in aheu hi. Kumpipa'n mite kiang ah, “Keimah leng nou toh ka kuan ngeingei ding,” achi hi. 3Himahleh mipite'n, “Kuan lou e. Koute zaw na taimang hita le ung leng, khawk asa kei ding uh. Akimkhat hiam va si le ung leng khawk asa kei lai ding uh. Nang koute singkhat sang in na manphazaw hi. Huaiziak in khopi a pan hon panpih dia na na om ahoihzaw hi,” achi uh. 4Kumpipa'n akiang uah, “Hoih na sak bangbang un ka hih ding,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa kulh kongpi bul ah adingh a, mipi tengteng azaza in leh asangsang in apaikhe zungzung uhi. 5Kumpipa'n Joab, Abishai leh Ittai kiang ah, kei ziak in tangval Absalom tung ah nemtak in hih un aw, chi in thu apia hi. Mipi tengteng in Absalom tungtang thu a kumpipa'n sepaih heutute tengteng thu apiak lai aza uhi. 6Huchi in mipite Israel mite dou ding in kidouna mun ah ahohta ua; akidouna uh Ephraim gammang ahi. 7Huai ah David mite ma ah Israel mite avuallel ua, huai ni in sepaih singnih athat uhi. 8Akidouna un huai gam tengteng a-uap vek ngal a. Huai ni in namsau sang in leng gammang sung a mang a si atamzaw hi. 9Absalom in David mite abingtuah guih hi. Absalom asabiltung tung a tuang ahi a, tosaw singhiang bawkphatak nuai ah sabiltung alut a, tosaw sing ah alu a-awkta hi. Lei leh van kikal ah aluai nilouh hi. Sabiltung ataisuak hi.

2 SAMUEL 18: 10Kuahiam in mu in, Joab ahilh a, “Ngai in, tosaw sing ah Absalom kikhai nilouh ka mu,” achi hi. 11Joab in ahilhpa kiang ah, “Ngai in, huai lah na mu ngal a, bangziak a hihlum a lei a kesak pah ngal lou? Huchibang a hih hi lechin dangka sawm leh kawnggak hon pe pah ding hi veng in,” achi hi. 12Huai mi'n Joab kiang ah, “Dangka sang mu ding hi leng le kumpipa tapa tung ah ka khut ka kha kei himhim ding, i bil ua i zak mahmah in kumpipa'n nang leh Abishai leh Ittai kiang ah, tangval Absalom kuamah in khoih het kei un, chi in thu ahon pe ngal a. 13Ginom huai loutak in na that mawk leng, kumpipa lak ah lah bangmah sel theih ahi ngal kei a, nang lah na kihulsak nawn maimah tuak ngal a,” achi hi. 14Huchi in Joab in, “Hichibang in na kiang ah ka om nilouh thei het kei,” achi hi. Teipi thum atawi a, tosaw sing lak a na hing lai Absalom lungtang adawt pailet hi. 15Joab galvan tawi tangval sawm in ahong um ua, Absalom asun ua, athatta uhi. 16Joab in pengkul amut a, Israelte delh mipite ahong kik nawn ua; Joab in mite ana nang bikbek hi. 17Absalom luang ala ua, gammang ah leihawm thukpi ah apai ua, atung ah suang asekhawm venvon uhi. Huchi in Israel mi tengteng amau puanin chiat ah ataikekta uhi. 18Absalom Zoh Leh Thah In A-om 19Huchi in Zadok tapa Ahimaaz in, “Ka va tai dia, Toupa'n amelma phu alaksakdan tanchin kumpipa ka va hilh ding,” achi hi. 20Joab in akiang ah, “Tuni in zaw tanchin va hilh nai ke'n.

2 SAMUEL 18: Nidang chiang in tanchin va hilh zaw in, kumpipa tapa asih ziak in, tuni in zaw tanchin bangmah va hilh dah in,” achi hi. 21Joab in Kush mi kiang ah, “Kuan inla, na thil muh kumpipa va hilh dih ve,” achi hi. Huchi in Kush mi akun a, ataikhe pah hi. 22Zadok tapa Ahimaaz in Joab kiang ah, “Akoi abang hitaleh, Kush mipa ka va delh ding,” achi hi. Joab in, “Ka tapa aw, tanchin hilh man lah na mu kei dia, bangziak a tai ding na hia?” achi hi. 23Himahleh ama'n, “Akoi abang hitaleh ka tai ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Tai mai ve leh,” achi hi. Huchi in Phaizang lampi ah Ahimaaz atai a, Kush mipa amakhelh hi. 24Kulh kongpi chial kikal ah David ana tu hi. Galvilpa kulh kongpi ponungzaw pen tunglam ah apaitou a, adak vialvial hi. Ngai in, mi khat amah kia in ahong tai hi. 25Galvilpa akikou a, kumpipa ahilh hi. Kumpipa'n, “Mi khat kia ahihleh tanchin hong gen ding nei ahi ding,” achi a; ahong tai mengmeng a, ahong naih hiaihiai hi. 26Galvilpa'n midang hong tai amu nawn hi. Galvilpa'n kongkhak vilpa asam a, “Ngai in, midang amah kia in ahong tai nawn,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Ama'n leng tanchin hong tun sam ding nei ahi ve,” achi hi. 27Galvilpa'n, “Amasapen taidan Zadok tapa Ahimaaz taidan bang mahmah in ka thei,” achi hi. Huan kumpipa'n, “Amah mihoih mahmah ahi, tanchinhoih hon tun ding ahi,” achi hi. 28Ahimaaz in asam a, kumpipa kiang ah, “Bangkim ahoih e,” achi hi. Amai a lei si in kumpipa ma a kun in, “Toupa, ka toupa sual a khut khak tum mite daltanpa Toupa na Pathian phat in om hen,” achi hi. 29Kumpipa'n, “Tangval Absalom adam na maw?” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 18: Ahimaaz in adawng a, “Joab in kumpipa sikha, kei na sikha mahmah ahon sawlkhiak lai in abuai nuainuai uh ka mu a, himahleh bang ahia chih ka thei kei,” achi hi. 30Kumpipa'n, “Ka pam ah hong dingh tadih in,” achi hi. Huchi in apam ah ana dingh hi. 31Ngai in, Kush mi ahong tung hi. Kush mi'n, “Toupa ka kumpipa a ding in tanchin ka hon tun hi. Na tung a helte tengteng phu tuni in Toupa'n ahon laksak hi,” achi hi. 32Kumpipa'n Kush mi kiang ah, “Tangval Absalom adam na maw?” achi hi. Kush mi in adawng a, “Toupa, ka kumpipa melmate leh na siatna zong mite tengteng huai tangval bang in om vek uheh,” achi hi. 33Huchi in kumpipa alungdong mahmah a, kulh kongpi tung a dantan ah ahohtou a ava kap hi. Apaitouh kawm in, “Aw, ka tapa Absalom, ka tapa Absalom, na sih sik in si zaw mai leng maw, Aw Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa,” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 19: 1Huan Joab ahilh ua, “Ngai in, kumpipa'n kap in Absalom asuun hi,” achi uh. 2Huai ni a avualzohna uh mi tengteng a ding in suunna ahong hi zawta hi. “Atapa ziak in kumpipa alungkham mahmah,” achih uh huai ni in mite'n lah ana zata ngal ua. 3Mite kidouna a mi taimang azum ziak a aguk a paimang bang in huai ni in aguk in khopi ah alut uhi. 4Kumpipa'n amai ahum a, “Aw, ka tapa Absalom, aw Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa!” chi in kumpipa akap huphup hi. 5Inn ah kumpipa kiang ah Joab alut a, “Na hinna, na tapate hinna, na tanute hinna, na zite leh na meite hinna humbit mite tuni in zumtak in na bawlta hi. 6Nang hon hote na it a, nang hon itte na hua hi. Heutute leh sepaihte nang a dia bangmah hilou bang in tuni in na hihlangta hi. Absalom dam in, kou midang tengteng tuni in si zaw vek le ung, na kipah lamtak hileh kilawm in ka thei hi. 7Huaiziak in thou inla, pawtkhia in. Na mite lungmuansak ding lam thu gen in. Na pawtkhiak keileh Toupa min lou in ka kichiam hi. Mi khat lel leng tuzan in na kiang ah a-om kei ding. Huai lah nang a ding in na tuailai a pan tutan a na tung a thil hoih lou hong tung teng sang in ahoih kei zaw ding,” achi hi. 8Huchi in kumpipa athou a, kulh kongpi ah ava tu hi. “Ngai un, kumpipa kulh kongpi ah atu hi,” chi in mipi tengteng ahilh uhi. Mipi tengteng kumpipa ma ah ava hoh uhi.

2 SAMUEL 19: Israelte bel amau puanin chiat ah ataikek uhi.Jerusalem Ah David Akik nawn 9Israel nam a mi tengteng akisel vengvung ua, “Kumpipa'n i melmate khut a pan hon hunkhia a, Philistiate khut a pan hon hondamta. Tu in Absalom ziak in gam ataikhiaksan hi. 10Absalom i kumpipa dia thau i nilhpa uh lah kidouna ah asita a; bang achia kumpipa pikikna ding kam khat bek na gen louh uh?” akichi uh. 11Kumpipa'n siampu Zadok leh Abiathar kiang ah asawl a, Judah upate kiang ah, “Bangziak a kumpipa a-inn a pikik thu a, azekaipen a pang na hi ua? Israel mite'n kumpipa pikik thu agen uh lah kumpipa kiang atungta ngal a. 12Ka unaute na hi ua, ka guh leh ka sa lah na hi ngal ua, bang achia azekaipen a pang peuhmah na hi ua? chi in va gen un,” achi hi. 13Amasa kiang ah, “Ka guh leh ka sa na hi kei a hia? Joab sik a ka ma a sepaihte heutu a ka hon bawl keileh, Pathian in alohloh hon loh mai henla, huai sang a thupizaw in leng, achi,” chi ding in mi asawl hi. 14Huchi in Judah mi tengteng lungtang mi khat lungtang bang mai in a-awnsakta hi. Huchi in kumpipa kiang ah, “Na mi tengteng toh hong kik nawn un,” chi ding in mi asawl uhi. 15Huchi in kumpipa apai nawn a, Jordan ahong tung hi. Kumpipa dawn a, Jordan a na pi galkai ding in Gilgal ah Judahte ahoh uhi. 16Hahurim a Benjamin mi Gera tapa Shimei leng kintak in kumpipa dawn ding in Judahte mah toh kiton in apawtkhia hi. 17Akiang ah Benjamin mi sangkhat toh, Saul inkote sikha Ziba, atapa sawm-le-nga leh asikha sawmnih toh ahi ua, kumpipa ma in Jordan agalkah uhi.

2 SAMUEL 19: 18Kumpipa inkote pi galkahna ding leh hoih asak bangbang a hih ding in long apaipih uh. Jordan lui agalkahleh kumpipa ma ah Gera tapa Shimei abokkhup hi.David In Shimei Tung ah Itna Alangsak 19Joab In David Amohsa 20Na sikha in thil ka hihkhial chih ka kithei hi. Huaiziak in ngai in, Joseph inko tengteng lak a ka toupa kumpipa mu dia tuni a hong pawt masapen ka hi,” achi hi. 21Himahleh Zeruiah tapa Abishai in adawng a, “Toupa thaunilhpa ahamsiat ziak in Shimei pen thah ding ahi kei dia hia?” achi hi. 22David in, “Nou Zeruiah tapate aw, nou na hon na theihsak ding uh bang ahia om? Tuni a kei hon doute na hi ding uh maw? Tuni a Israelte lak a mi thah ahi dia hia? Tuni in Israel mite tung a kumpipa ka hihthei lou ka hi maw?” achi hi. 23Huaiziak in kumpipa'n Shimei kiang ah, “Na si kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Kumpipa akiang ah akichiamta hi.David In Mephibosheth Itna A-ensak 24Kumpipa mu ding in Saul tapa Mephibosheth ahong hi. Kumpipa apawtkhiak ni a pan galmuang a ahong pai nawn ni tan in akhete azun kei a, akhamul atan kei a, apuan leng asawp sam kei. 25Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa mu dia Jerusalem ahong tun in kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Mephibosheth, bangziak a ka kiang a hong sam lou?” achi hi. 26Ama'n adawng a, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, ka sikha in ahon khem a; na sikha in, kumpipa kiang a hoh ding in ka tuanna ding sabiltung ka van ding, ka chi a; na sikha lah akhe abai ngal a. 27Kumpipa ka toupa kiang ah na sikha ahek hi. Himahleh toupa ka kumpipa Pathian angel ahi. Huaiziak in hoih na sak bangbang in hih in.

2 SAMUEL 19: 28Ka pa inkote tengteng toupa ka kumpipa ma a thah vek dia kilawm ahi uh. Himahleh na sikha na an umpihte lak ah na pangsak hi. Huaiziak in kumpipa kiang ah thil dang phut ngam lai dia kilawm ka hi maw?” achi hi. 29Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Na tungtang thu bangziak a gen nawn nak na hia? Nang leh Ziba gam kihawm un ka chi hi,” achi hi. 30Mephibosheth in kumpipa kiang ah, “Eh, ama'n tang vek hen, toupa ka kumpipa lah ama inn mah ah galmuang in ahong pai nawnta ngal a,” achi hi.David In Barzillai Tung Ah Itna Alangsak 31Rogelim a pan Gilead mi Barzillai ahong suk a; kumpipa Jordan a pi galkai ding in amah toh Jordan ah ahoh hi. 32Barzillai upapi ahi a, kum sawmgiat a upa ahita. Mahanaim a kumpipa om sung in nek ding apia a, amah mineizoutak ahi. 33Kumpipa'n Barzillai kiang ah, “Ka kiang ah hong inla, ka kiang ah Jerusalem ah ka hon vak ding,” achi hi. 34Barzillai in kumpipa kiang ah, “Jerusalem a kumpipa toh hohtou ding in bang tan ka dam lai dia? 35Tu in kum sawmgiat ka hita a; asia leh apha ka khen thei a hia? Na sikha in ka nek-le-dawn, a lim leh lim louh leng a theikak thei a hia? Pasal leh numeite lasak ging leng ka za thei nawn a hia? Huaiziak in na sikha bang ding a toupa ka kumpipa a dia puakgik ka hih maizen ding? 36Na sikha in kumpipa toh Jordan galkah lel ka tup ahi. Bang ding in kumpipa'n huchibang in hoih man ahon thuk chitchiat dia? 37Hehpih in na sikha hon paisak nawn mai in, ka hon ngen ahi. Ka nu leh ka pa han omna koumau kho ngei ah ka si ding. Himahleh en in, na sikha Chimham;

2 SAMUEL 19: toupa ka kumpipa toh hong galkah henla, atung ah hoih na sak bangbang in hih in,” achi hi. 38Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Chimham ka kiang ah agalkah sam dia, hoih na sak bang zel in atung ah ka hih ding. Thil na hon nget peuhmah ka hon hihsak ding,” achi hi. 39Huchi in mi tengteng Jordan gal akah ua, kumpipa leng agalkah hi. Kumpipa'n Barzillai atawp a, avualzawl hi. Huchi in amah amun ah apai nawnta hi.Judah Leh Israel Kumpipa Tungtang Ah Akisel Uh 40Huchi in Gilgal ah kumpipa agalkah a, amah toh Chimham agalkah sam hi. Juda mi tengteng in kumpipa api galkah ua, Israel mi leng akimkhat apang uhi. 41Ngai in, Israel mi tengteng kumpipa kiang ah ahong ua, kumpipa kiang ah, “Bang achia ka unau uh Judah mite'n nang hon gukhia a, kumpipa leh a-inkote leh David mite teng Jordan gal a apikhawm vek mawk uh?” achi uhi. 42Judah mi tengteng in Israel mite adawng ua, “Kumpipa ka kinaihpih uh ahih ziak ahi. Bangziak a hiai thu a heh mawk? Kumpipa neih muang a om ka hi mahmah uh maw? Thilpiak banghiamte leng ahon nei a hia?” achi uh. 43Israel mite'n Judah mite adawng ua, “Kumpipa ah tan sawm ka nei ua, David ah noute sang in anglaitanna ka nei zaw uh. Bangziak a hon ngaineu maw? Kumpipa pikik nawn sawm masate ka hi kei uh maw?” achi uh.Huchi in Judah mite thu Israel mite thu sang in akhauhzaw hi.

2 SAMUEL 20: 1Huan Benjamin mi Bikri tapa Sheba, Belial mi khat ana om hi. Ama'n pengkul amut a, “David ah tantuan i nei kei ua, Jesse tapa ah leng gouluah ding i nei sam kei, Israel mite aw, na puanin lam chiat uah pai un,” achi hi. 2Huchi in Israel mi tengteng in David azuih uh alehngatsan ua, Bikri tapa Sheba azuita uhi. Judah mite'n Jordan a pan Jerusalem pha in akumpipa uh alen tinten uhi. 3Jerusalem a a-inn ah David ahong pai hi. Kumpipa'n numei sawm ameite inn ngak dia akoihte api a, inn khat ah akhum a, anek ding uh pia in avak a, himahleh amaute akithuahpih kei hi. 4Kumpipa'n Amasa kiang ah, “Ni thum sung in Judah mite hon sapkhawmsak inla, nang leng hong om sam in,” achi hi. 5Huchi in Amasa leng Judah mite samkhawm ding in akuan hi. Himahleh ahun sehsak sang in ava tam sawt zawta hi. 6David in Abishai kiang ah, “Bikri tapa Sheba in Absalom sang in i poi uh akhoihzaw dia hia? Na toupa mite pi inla delh un. Huchi lou in zaw khokulh nei ah alut man dia, muh phak louh in i khahsuah kha ding,” achi hi. 7Huchi in Joab mite, Kereth mite, Pelet mite leh amihat tengteng un amah azuikheta uh. Jerusalem a pan Bikri tapa Sheba delh ding in apawtkhia uhi. 8Gibeon a suangpi omna ava tun un, Amasa in amaute ana dawn hi. Joab in kidouna van asilh a, atung ah namsau apai toh kawnggak ah akuah hi. Mailam a apai kawm in huai namsau aphawi hi. 9Joab in Amasa kiang ah, Unaupa, “Na hoih tadih na maw?” achi hi. Huai khit in Joab in Amasa tawp ding in akhut taklam in akhamul aman hi. 10Himahleh Amasa in Joab in atawi namsau alimsak kei hi.

2 SAMUEL 20: Joab in agil ah adawt a, agilzangte lei ah atolhkhe zelzul a, adawt tuan nawn kei hi. Huchi in asita hi. Joab leh a-unaupa Abishai in Bikri tapa Sheba adelh uhi. 11Akiang ah Joab mite lak a tangval khat adingh a, “Joab lam a pang leh David lam a pang peuhmah in Joab zui hen,” achi hi. 12Amasa bel lamlian laitak ah si a kidiah in ana lum hi. Huai mi'n mi tengteng dingh dide amuh in lamlian a pan Amasa luang gamlak ah asuan a, akiang a hong pai peuhmah khawl zel a amuh ziak in puan in atuam hi. 13Lamlian a pan suankhiak ahih nung in Bikri tapa Sheba delh ding in mi tengteng in Joab azui uhi. 14Abel leh Beth-maaka pha in Israel nam tengteng leh Ber mi tengteng atawn vek a; amau akikaikhawm ua amah azuita uhi. 15Beth-maaka a Abel ah amah a-um ua; kho zulzul ah lei achiang ua, kulh zul ah adingh uhi. Joab kiang a mi om tengteng in chimsak ding in kulh akhoh ok-ok uhi. 16Huchi in khua a pan numei pil khat ahong kikou a, “Ngai un, ngai un; Joab kiang ah, hong pai nai in, na kiang ah thu ka gen ding, va chi un,” achi hi. 17Akiang ava naihtak in numei in, “Joab na hi hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hi e,” chi in adawng hi. Huchi in akiang ah, “Na sikhanu thugen ngaikhe dih,” achi a, ama'n, “Ka ngaikhia hi,” chi in adawng hi. 18Huai numei in, “Nidanglai in Abel ah akikum ngeingei ding uh,” achi zel uh. Huchibang in thu atawpsak zel uhi. 19Kei Israel lak a kituah ut leh muanhuai mite lak a khat ka hi. Nang zaw Israel khua, akho bulpi pen hihsiat tum na hi lim ve. Bangziak a Toupa gou nawmvalh tum na hia?

2 SAMUEL 20: achi hi. 20Sheba Helna 21Huchibang thu ahi kei. Ephraim tanggam a mi Bikri tapa amin Sheba in kumpipa kalh in, David hilhial kalh in akhut alik hi. Amah hon pekhe le uchin khua ka pawtsan mai ding,” achi hi. Numei in Joab kiang ah, “Ngai in, kulh a pan alutang lotkhiak ahi ding,” achi hi. 22Huchi in numei in apilna in mi tengteng kiang ah ava pai a, Bikri tapa Sheba lutang atan ua, Joab kiang ah alawnkhia uhi. Huchi in pengkul amut a, amau puanin chiat zuan in khua a pan apaita uhi. Jerusalem ah kumpipa kiang ah Joab apaikikta hi.David Miliante 23Israel sepaih tengteng heutu Joab ahi a; Jehoiada tapa Benaiah ahihleh Kereth mi leh Pelet mite heutu ahi. 24Adoram phutluih nasem dia goih a omte heutu ahi a, Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat tanchin gelhmi ahi. 25Sheva, laigelhmi ahi a; Zadok leh Abiathar ahihleh siampute ahi uh. 26Jair mi Ira leng David vaihawmtu lian ahi.

2 SAMUEL 21: 1Huan David dam lai in kum kizom in kum thum kial akia hi. David in Toupa adong a, Toupa'n, “Saul leh sisan suahmi a-inkote ziak ahi. Amau Gibeon mite athat ngal ua,” achi hi. 2Kumpipa'n Gibeon mite asam a, akiang uah, Gibeon mite Israel suante ahi kei ua, Amor mi khosuaksunte ahi zaw uh. Israel suante amau kiang ah ana kichiam khin ua; Saul in Israel suante leh Judah suante a dia phatuam angaih ziak in thah atum nak hi. 3David in Gibeon mite kiang ah, “Bang ahia ka hon hihsak ding? Toupa gou na vualzawl theihna ding un bangchibang in hihdik thak nawnna ka bawl dia?” achi hi. 4Gibeon mite'n akiang ah, “Saul leh a-inkote dangka leh dangka-eng ka la kei ding uh. Kou ziak in Israel ah mi kuamah na that kei ding uh,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Na gen peuhmah uh ka hon hihsak ding,” achi hi. 5Amau kumpipa kiang ah, “Hon hihmangpa leh Israel gamsung himhim a om lou dia hihmang hon sawmpa, 6tapa sagihte hon pia inla, Toupa miseh Saul omna Gibeah ah Toupa ma ah ka khailum ding uh,” achi uh. Kumpipa'n, “Hon pe leng ake,” achi hi. 7Himahleh kumpipa'n, David leh Saul tapa Jonathan kikal a, anih ua kal a Toupa kichiamna ziak in Saul tapa Jonathan tapa Mephibosheth ahawi hi. 8Kumpipa'n Aiah tanu Rizpah in Saul tapa nih aneihsak Armoni leh Mephibosheth api a, Meholath mi Barzillai tapa Adriel, Saul tanu Mikal in tapa nga aneihsakte toh 9Gibeon mite khut ah apekhia a, mual a Toupa ma ah akhailum uhi. Huchi in asagih un asikhawm uhi. Buh lak hun, barli buhlak pat lai in athatta uhi. 10Aiah tanu Rizpah in sai-ip puan ala a, amah a ding in suangpi tung ah aphah hi.

2 SAMUEL 21: Buh lak kipat tung a pan huai siluangte tung a van vuahtui in abuah tan in, sun chia siluangte tung a vasate atuk ding uh leh zan chia gamsate khoih ding aphal kei hi. 11Aiah tanu, Saul meinu Rizpah thilhih David ahilh uhi. 12Huchi in David akuan a, Philistia mite'n Gilboa a Saul athah ni ua Philistia mite'n Beth-shan mun lian a akhai uh aguhte uh, Jabesh-gilead mite'n ava guklak uh, Saul guh leh atapa Jonathan guhte ala hi. 13Huai a pan Saul guhte leh atapa Jonathan guhte alatou a; akhailupte uh guhte leng alakhawm hi. 14Saul guhte leh atapa Jonathan guhte Benjamin gam a Jelaha apa Kish han ah avui uh. Kumpipa thupiak dungzui in ahih uhi. Huai khit in huai gam tung ah Pathian alungkimta hi.Philistia Miliante Douna(1 Kro 20.4-8) 15Philistia mite'n Israel mite adou nawn uhi. David, amite toh ava kuansuk ua; Philistia mite ava sual ua, David abah mahmah hi. 16Ishbi-benob, milian tapate lak a khat, ateipi gikdan dal shekel zathum, namsau thak kuah in David thah atum hi. 17Himahleh Zeruiah tapa Abishai in ahong hunkhia a, Philistia mi sual in athatta hi. David mite'n, “Israelte khawnvak na mihsaklouhna ding in kidou ding in ka kiang uah nang zaw na kuan nawn kei ding,” chi in akiang ah akichiam uhi. 18Huan hichi ahong hi a, Gob ah Philistiate toh kidouna dang khat a-om nawn hi. Huai hun in Hushat mi Sibbekai in milian suante lak a khat Saph kichi athat hi. 19Philistia mite toh Gob ah akidou nawn uh. Bethlehem mi Jaar oregim tapa Elhanan in Git mi Goliath unaupa athat a, huai mi teipi tuh siam kolpi bang ahi. 20Gath ah kidouna a-om nawn hi. Huai ah mi khat asan a sang, akhut langkhat tuaktuak a khutzung guk, akhe langkhat tuaktuak a khezung guk, avek a sawmnih-le-li nei a-om hi. Amah leng milian suan ahi. 21Saul Suante Thah In A-om Uh 22Huai lite Gath a milian suante ahi ua, huchi in David leh amite khut in asita uhi.

2 SAMUEL 22: 1Huan amelma tengteng khut a pan leh Saul khut a pan Toupa'n ahutkhiak ni in David in hiai la thu Toupa kiang ah agen hi. 2Ama'n, “Toupa tuhka suangpi leh ka kulhpi leh hon humbitpa ahi. 3Ka suangpi Pathian,amah ka muang ding a;ka phaw leh ka hotdamna kii,ka insang leh ka bukna ahi.Ka hondampa,hiamgamna a pan na hon hondam hi. 4Phat tak Toupa ka sam ding a;huchi in hon doute lak a pan hotdam in ka om ding hi. 5“Sihna tuikihot in hon umkimvel a,Pathian limsak loumite tui lian in ahon lausak hi. 6Sheol khauhualte'n hon gaksuak a;sihna thangte'n hon awksak uh. 7Ka lungzin in Toupa ka sam a, ahi,ka Pathian ka sam hi:Atempul a pan ka aw aza a,ka kikou husa abil ah alut hi. 8“Huaitak in lei aling a, akisat hi.Aheh ziak in van kingaknatenangawn kisat in alingta uhi. 9Anak a pan meikhu azamtou a,akam a kipan katmang hat meikuang apawt a,huai in meihol akuangsak hi. 10Ama'n vante akunsak a,ahong suk ua; akhenuai ah mialna a-om hi. 11“Cherub tung ah atuang a,alengta hi, huih khate tung ah amah muh in a-om hi. 12Khomial in aki-umkimvel a,tui vomte, van meipi sah miuhmeuhte abawl hi. 13Ama a vakna tawn inmeiholte akuang hi. 14“Toupa van a pan ahong ging a,Tungnungpen in a-aw asuaksak hi. 15Thaltangte akapkhia a,amau adalhzaksak a;khua aphesak a, abuaizaksak hi. 16 Toupa salhna,anakvangte a hu in tuipi lampite ahong kilang a,lei kingaknate hihlat in a-omta hi. 17“Ama'n tunglam a pan honsawksuk a, ahon len a;tuipi a pan hon kaikheta hi. 18Kei hon dou hattak a panhon humbit a,kei hon hote a pan leng;kei a ding in lah ahat lo ngal ua. 19Ka tuahsiat ni in ahon sual ua,himahleh Toupa ka kingakna ahi. 20Ama'n mun awngthawltak ah hon pikhia a;ka tung a akipah ziak in hon humbitta hi.

2 SAMUEL 22: 21“Toupa'n ka diktatna dungzui in ka tung ah ahih a;ka khutte sianthoudan dungzui in hon thuk hi. 22David Vualzohna La(Sam 18) 23Avaihawmna tengteng ka ma a a-om ziak in:adan thusehte ka kilehheisan ngei kei hi. 24Ama ah leng gensiatbei ka hi lai a, ka thulimlouhna a pan ka kihuikhia hi. 25Huaiziak in Toupa'nka diktatdan bang zel inhon na thukta a;amitmuh a ka sianthoudan bang zel in. 26“Chingtheite kiang ah chingthei in na kilang ding a,mihoihkimte kiang ah hoihkim in na kilang ding hi. 27Misiangthoute kiang ahsiangthou in na kilang ding a;migenhakte kiang ahgenhak in akilang ding. 28Haksa thuak mite na hondam ding a;mikisatheite na niamsak theihna ding in atung uah na mit atu gige hi. 29“Toupa aw,ka khawnvak na hi ngal a. Toupa'n ka mialna avaksak ding. 30Nang panpih in sepaihhon toh ka tai a,ka Pathian panpih mah in kulh ka tawmkan hi. 31“Pathian lampi ahoihkim a; Toupa thu etchetsa ahi;amah muangte tengteng a ding inamah lum ahi. 32 Toupa lou kua Pathian a-om a?I Pathian lou kua suangpi a-om a? 33Pathian ka hatna leh thilhihtheihna ahi a,Ama'n ka lampite hoihkim in abawl hi. 34Ka khepekte zukpikhepek bang in abawl a;ka mun sangte ah hon omsak zel hi. 35Ka khutte galdou ding in asinsak a;huchi in ka bante'n dal thalpeu atansak hi. 36“Nang na hotdamna lum na hon pia a;na nunnemna in na hon bawl lianta hi. 37Ka nuai a ka kalsuante na liansak a,huchi in ka khete atolh kei uhi. 38Hon doute ka delhpha a,ka hihmang a;hihmanthat sipsip a a-ommasiah uh ka nungkik kei hi. 39Athohnawn theihlouhna ding un ka hihmang sipsip a,ka satzan ngiingei a; ahi,ka khenuai ah apukta uh. 40Nang galdou ding in hatna in na hon gak a;hon sual mite ka nuai ah na nuaisiahta hi.

2 SAMUEL 22: 41Hon hote ka hihmanthat theihna ding in,kei hon doute ngawng na hon pia hi. 42Amaute adak kimvel ua,himahleh hondam ding kuamah a-om kei uh. Toupa a-en ua,himahleh adawng kei. 43Huaitak in ke'n lei a leivui bang inka khennel dimdem a,kholak buannawi bang mai in ka tuanzak a, ka thehzak vekta hi. 44“Nang ka mite kisualna a pan leng na hon humbit a;namte lutang hi ding in na hon kemhoih hi.Ka theih ngei louh nam in ka nna asemta ding. 45Ka kiang ah namdangte ahong kipe ding ua;ka tanchin azaktak un ka thu azui ding uh. 46Namdangte atulmang ding ua,a-insang ua kipan ling kawm in ahong paisuk ding uh. 47“Toupa ahing hi.Ka suangpi phat in om henla; ka hotdamna suangpiPathian tawisang in om hen: 48Phu hon laksakpa leh ka nuai a mite koihpa Pathian; 49Hon doute a pan hon domtoupa:Kei hon doute tunglam ah na hon domkang a,hiamgammi lak a pan na hon humbit hi. 50“Huaiziak in aw Toupa,namte lak ahkipahthu ka hon hilh ding a,na min phat in la ka sa ding hi. 51Akumpipa a dia amah hotdamna insang ahi a,athaunilh, David leh asuante tung ah tangtawn inhehpihna alangsak,” achi hi.

2 SAMUEL 23: 1Hiaite David thu nanungpen ahi. Jesse tapa David, sangtak a dopsang a ompa, Jakob' Pathian thaunilhpa, Israelte la phuaktu in achi hi. 2 Toupa Kha in kei hon zang in agen a,athu ka lei ah a-om hi. 3Israelte' Pathian in agen a,Israelte' Suangpi'n ka kiang ah agen hi.Mi tung a vaihawmmi adik ngeingei diaPathian lau kawm a vai ahawm ding ahi. 4Amah ni ahong suah a,meipi om het lou zingsang vak bang ahi dia,vuahzuk khit a khua hong siang a lei a loupa selnou mitmet bang ahi ding ahi. 5Pathian a ding in ka inkuan hiai bang hi kei mahleh,kei toh tangtawn thukhun abawl a,bangkim kizentak in ahihkip hi.Ama'n khangsak kei mahleh hiai ka hotdamna leh ka deihlam tengteng ahi. 6Himahleh Belial tate bel avek un ling paihkhiak bang ahi ding uh,khut a lak theih louh ahih ziak un. 7Himahleh amau khoih ding misik leh teipi a, akivat ding ahi.Huchi in amun mah ah hal ahi ding uh.David Sepaih Minthangte(1 Kro 11.10-41) 8Hiaite David sepaih hangsante min ahi. Tekmon mi Joseph Bashebeth sepaih heutute lak a heutupa ahi a; amah khatvei thu a mi zagiat thatpa Eznit mi Adino achih mah uh ahi. 9Ama zom in Ahoh tapa Dodo tapa Eleazar ahi. Amah Philistia mite kidou dia akikaihkhop ua, achou ua, Israel mite a paimang vek lai ua David kiang a sepaih hangsan thumte lak a khat ahi. 10Amah athou a, Philistia mite akhut a kham matan namsau leng khah lou khop in athat hi. Huai ni in Toupa'n nakpitak in azouta a, mite ama nung ah gallak thil la ding lel in ahong kik nawn uhi. 11Amah nung in Harar mi Agee tapa Shammah ahi. Behiang tampi omna lou a Philistia mite akikaihkhop lai un, Israel mite ataikek uhi.

2 SAMUEL 23: 12Himahleh amah huai mun ah adingh a, aveng a, Philistia mite athat a, Toupa'n nakpitak in azohsak hi. 13Sepaih hangsan sawmthum lak a thumte ahohsuk ua, buhlak laitak in David kiang ah Adullam kohawm ah ahoh ua; Philistia sepaihte'n Rephaim Phaizang ah panmun akhoh uh. 14Huchih lai in David insung ah a-om a, huchih lai mah in Bethlehem ah Philistia sepaihte a-om uhi. 15David in tui alunggulh mahmah a, “Bethlehem a tuileh tui, kulh kongkhak kiang a dawn ding hong pia om le uh aw!” achi hi. 16Huchi in sepaih hangsan thumte'n Philistia sepaihte apaltan ua, kulh kongkhak kiang a Bethlehem tuileh ava tawi ua, David kiang ah apaipih uh. Himahleh ama'n ana dawn ngam kei a, Toupa a ding in abungkhe zawta hi. 17“Aw Toupa, hiai ka hih louh ding dan; sih ngap a kuante sisan ka dawn dia hia?” achi hi. Huchi in adawn nuam kei hi. Huai thilte sepaih hangsan thumte'n ahih uh ahi. 18Zeruiah tapa Joab unau Abishai thumte lak a aheutupen uh ahi. Teipi in mi zathum sual in athat a, thumte lak ah minhoih aloh hi. 19Thumte lak ah pahtawi tuak pen ahi kei maw? Huaiziak in aheutu ding un abawl uhi. Himahleh tungnungpen thumte lak atung zou kei hi. 20Kabzeel mihangsan tapa Jehoiada tapa Benaiah thil thupitak hihpa in Moab mi Ariel tapate nih athat a; huchi in ahohsuk a, vuk kiak hun lai in leikohawm ah humpinelkai leng ava that hi. 21Aigupta mi, miliantak athat a; huai Aigupta mi in teipi atawi hi. Himahleh ama'n chiangkhun tawi in ava zuan a, Aigupta mi teipi tawi ava sut a, ama teipi in asunlumta hi. 22Jehoiada tapa Benaiah in huchibang thil ahih ziak in sepaih hangsan thumte lak ah minhoih aloh hi.

2 SAMUEL 23: 23David Thu Nanungte 24Sawmthumte lak a khat Joab unau Asahel ahi: Bethlehem a mi Dodo tapa Elhanan; 25Harod mi Shammah, Harod mi Elika; 26Pal mi Helez, Tekoa mi Ikkesh tapa Ira; 27Anethot mi Abiezer, Hushath mi Mebunnai; 28Ahoh mi Zalmon, Netophah mi Maharai 29Netophah mi Baanah tapa Heleb, Benjamin suan, Gebeah a mi Ribai tapa Ittai; 30Pirathon mi Benaiah, Gaash luite a mi Hidai; 31Arbath mi Abi-albon, Barhum mi Azmaveth; 32Shaalbon mi Eliaba, Jashen tapate lak a Jonathan; 33Harar mi Shammah, Arar mi Sharar tapa Ahiam; 34Mankat mi Ahasbai tapa Eliphelet, Gilon mi Ahithophel tapa Eliam; 35Karmel mi, Hezrai, Arba mi Paarai; 36Zobah mi Nathan tapa Igal, Gad mi Bani; 37Ammon mi Jelek, Beeroth mi Nahari, Zeruiah tapa Joab galvan tawi; 38Ith mi Ira, Ith mi Gareb; 39Hit mi Uriah ahi uh. Avek un sawmthum-le-sagih ahi uh.

2 SAMUEL 24: 1Huan Toupa hehna Israelte tung ah ahong tung nawn hi. Amaute kalh a David tokthou in, “Kuan inla, Israel mite leh Judah mite sim vek in,” achi hi. 2Kumpipa'n akiang a om sepaih heutu Joab kiang ah, “Israel nam tengteng lak ah Dan a pan Beer-sheba pha in vialvak inla, mi bangzah ahi ua ka theihtheihna ding in sim vek in,” achi hi. 3Joab in kumpipa kiang ah, “Toupa na Pathian in mite pungsak in bangzah a tam, amun za leng, toupa ka pu in muta ve, himahleh toupa ka kumpipa'n bangziak a huai thei ut se ahia?” achi hi. 4Himahleh kumpipa thu in Joab leh sepaih heutute thu azouta hi. Huchi in Joab leh sepaih heutute Israel mite sim ding in kumpipa kiang a pan apaikheta uhi. 5Jordan gal ava kah ua, Gad Phaizang laitak taklam a khopi om Aroer ah Jazer pha in om mun akhoh uhi. 6Gilead gam leh Tahtim-hodshi gam atung ua; Dan-jaan leh Zidon kimvel atung uhi. 7Tura kulh leh Hiv mite kho tengteng leh Kanaan mite kho tengteng ava tung ua; Beer-sheba a, Judah simlam ah apaikhia uhi. 8Huchi in gam tengteng atotsuah khit uh, kha kua leh ni sawmnih abei in Jerusalem ahong tungkik uhi. 9Joab in mihing phazah kumpipa apia a; Israel gam ah namsau tawi mihangsan nuaigiat a-om uhi. Judah mi bel nuainga a-om hi. 10Mihing asim khit un David lungtang anuam het kei. David in Toupa kiang ah, “Ka thilhih ah nakpitak in ka na khialta hi. Himahleh tu in aw Toupa, na sikha thulimlouhna koihmang ding in ka hon ngen hi. Haihuai mahmah in ka na hihta,” achi hi. 11Zingsang a David athohleh David zawlnei Gad kiang ah Toupa thu ana tung hi.

2 SAMUEL 24: 12“Kuan inla, David kiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Thil thum ka hon tah a, na tung a ka hih ding in khat tel in, achi,’ ” chi in. 13Huchi in David kiang ah Gad ahoh a, ahilh a, akiang ah, “Na gam a na tung a kum sagih sung kial akiak hia? Na melmate'n hon delh ua kha thum sung amau a pan na taimang hia? Na gam a ni thum sung hipi ahong len? Hon sawlpa bangchi in ka dawng dia? Kingaihtuah inla, hon hilh in,” achi hi. 14David in Gad kiang ah, “Ka lung azing mahmah mai hi. Toupa khut sung ah hon puklutsak in; azahngaihna lah athupi mahmah ngal a. Mihing khut sung ah zaw hon puklutsak ke'n,” achi hi. 15Huchi in Toupa'n Israel mite tung ah zingsang a pan hun seh tan hipi alengsak hi. Huchi in Dan a pan Beer-sheba tan mi singsagih asi uh. 16Angel in hihse dia Jerusalem lam a, akhut alikleh Toupa'n thil hoih lou hih atup alunghei thak a, mite hihmangpa angel kiang ah, “Ahunta; na khut lik nawn ke'n,” achi hi. Toupa angel bel Jebus mi Araunah phual chin ah a-om hi. 17David in mi that angel amuh in Toupa ahoupih a, “Ngai in, ka na khialta, dikloutak in thil ka na hihta hi. Himahleh hiai belamte'n bang ahih ua? Na khut in kei leh ka pa inkote hon khoih zaw hen,” achi hi.Araunah Phual A David Maitam 18Huai ni in David kiang ah Gad ahoh a, akiang ah, “Kuantou inla, Jebus mi Araunah phual ah Toupa a ding in maitam va doh in,” achi hi. 19Huchi in David, Toupa thupiak bang a Gad in ahilh bang in akuantouta hi. 20Araunah in amalam a-etleh, amah lam zuan a kumpipa leh asikhate hong pai amu hi.

2 SAMUEL 24: Huchi in Araunah apawt a, amai a lei si in kumpipa ma ah abokkhup hi. 21Araunah in, “Bang achia ahia toupa ka kumpipa, asikha kiang a ahong?” achi hi. David in, “Mipite lak a hipi akhawltheihna dia Toupa a dia maitam doh ding a na phual lei ding in ahi ka hong pai,” achi hi. 22Araunah in David kiang ah, “Toupa ka kumpipa'n hoih asak bang in la henla, lan hen: En in, halmang a lat ding in bawngtalte a-om ua, sing ding in phual vanzatte leh bawng vante a-om uhi. 23Aw toupa, hiai tengteng Araunah in kumpipa ape vek hi,” achi hi. Araunah in kumpipa kiang ah, “Toupa na Pathian in hon dawng hen,” achi hi. 24David In Kisimpina Abawl(1 Kro 21.1-27) 25David in huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam adoh a, halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alan hi. Huchi in Toupa agam tung ah alungkimta a, Israel gam a pan hipi akhawlta hi.

EZRA 1: 1Kura In Judahte Kik Nawn Ding Thu Apia 2Hichibang in Persia kumpipa Kura in achi,“Toupa, van Pathian in,Lei gam tengteng kei ahon peta hi;Judah a om Jerusalem a amah inn lamsak ding in kei thu ahon pia hi. 3Amite tengteng na lak ua om peuhmah, akiang ahPathian om henla, Judah a omJerusalem ah hohtou henla, Toupa Israel' Pathian,amah Pathian ahi,Jerusalem a om inn lam hen. 4Kuapeuh akhualtamna koi mun peuh a nutsiat a omna mun a mite'n,amah dangka leh dangka-eng,vante leh gantate in panpih uhenla, Jerusalem a om Pathian inn a ding aut thu a thillat chih louh,” chi in. 5Huchi in Judah leh Benjamin intekpate inkuan a lupente, siampute leh Levite, Pathian in Jerusalem a om Toupa' inn lam dia hohtou dia akha uh atohthohte tengteng, athouta uhi. 6Huan akimvel ua omte tengteng in akhut uh dangka tui-um belsuan dangka-engte, vante, gantate leh thil manphate in ahihhat ua, uttak a piakte tengteng sim louh in. 7Kumpipa Kura in leng Toupa' inn a tui-um belsuan Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a kipan alakkhiak, pathiante inn a akoihte alakhe vek hi; 8Huaite Persia kumpipa Kura in sumkempa Mithredath khut in alakhe vek a, Judah vaihawm, Sesbazzar pia in asimsak hi. 9Huchi in hiai amuh zah uh ahi:dangka-eng kuang sawmthum,dangka kuang sangkhat,gimlim halna kuang sawmnih-le-kua; 10Dangka-eng noubem sawmthum,dangka noubem ahoih lou deuhte zali-le-sawmkhat leh tui-um belsuan dangte sangkhat. 11Dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuan tengteng sangnga-le-zali ahi uh. Saltangte lak ate Babulon a kipan Jerusalem a pitouh a a-om lai un, hiai tengteng Sesbazzar in atawitou vek hi.

EZRA 2: 1Hiaite pimang a om koltanna a kipan a paitou, bial a tate, Babulon lam a akumpipa Nebukadnezzar in apimang, Jerusalem leh Judah a, michih ama khua chiat a hong kik nawnte ahi uh. 2Saltang Kik Nawnte Min Gelhkhiakna(Neh 7.4-73) 3Parosh suante sangnih zakhat sawmsagih-le-nih. 4Shephatiah suante, zathum sawmsagih-le-nih. 5Arah suante, zasagih sawmsagih-le-nga. 6Pahath-moab suante, Jeshua leh Joab tate, sangnih zagiat leh sawm-le-nih. 7Elam suante, sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li. 8Zattu suante, zakua sawmli-le-nga. 9Zakkai suante, zasagih-le-sawmguk. 10Bani suante, zaguk sawmli-le-nih. 11Bebai suante, zaguk sawmnih-le-thum. 12Azgad suante, sangkhat zanih sawmnih-le-nih. 13Adonikam suante, zaguk sawmguk-le-guk. 14Bigvai suante, sangnih sawmnga-le-guk. 15Adin suante, zali sawmnga-le-li. 16Ater suante, Hezekiah tate, sawmkua-le-giat. 17Bezai suante, zathum sawmnih-le-thum. 18Jorah suante, zakhat leh sawm-le-nih. 19Hashum suante, zanih sawmnih-le-thum. 20Gibbar suante, sawmkua-le-nga. 21Bethlehem suante, zakhat sawmnih-le-thum. 22Netophah mite, sawmnga-le-guk. 23Anathoth mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-giat. 24Azmaveth suante, sawmli-le-nih. 25Kiriath-arim, Kephirah leh Beeroth suante, zasagih sawmli-le-thum. 26Ramah leh Geba tate, zaguk sawmnih-le-khat. 27Mikmas mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-nih. 28Bethel leh Ai mite, zanih sawmnih-le-thum. 29Nebo suante, sawmnga-le-guk. 30Magbish suante, zakhat sawmnga-le-guk. 31Elam dang suante, sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li. 32Harim suante, zathum-le-sawmnih. 33Lod, Hadid leh Ono tate, zasagih sawmnih-le-nga. 34Jeriko suante, zathum sawmli-le-nga. 35Senaah suante, sangthum leh zaguk-le-sawmthum. 36Siampute: Jedaiah suante, Jeshua inkote, zakua sawmsagih-le-thum. 37Immer suante, sangkhat sawmnga-le-nih. 38Pashur suante, sangkhat zanih sawmli-le-sagih. 39Harim suante, sangkhat leh sawm-le-sagih. 40Levi mite: Jeshua leh Kadmiel suante, Hodaviah suante, sawmsagih-le-li. 41Lasa mite: Asaph suante, zakhat sawmnih-le-giat. 42Kongkhak ngak mite: Shallum, Ater, Talmon, Akkub, Hatita leh Shobai suante, avek un zakhat sawmthum-le-kua. 43Nethinim mite: Ziha, Hasupha lehTabbaoth suante; 44Keros, Siaha leh Padon suante; 45Lebanah, Hagabah leh Akkub suante; 46Hagab, Shalmai leh Hanan suante; 47Giddel, Gahar leh Reaiah suante; 48Rezin, Nekoda leh Gazzam suante; 49Uzza, Paseah leh Besai suante; 50Ashna, Meunim leh Nephusim suante; 51Bakbuk, Hakupha leh Harhur suante; 52Bazluth, Mehida leh Harsha suante; 53Barkos, Sisera leh Thamah suante;

EZRA 2: 54Neziah leh Hatipha suante, 55Solomon sikhate tate:Sotai, Hassopheret leh Peruda suante; 56Jaalah, Darkon leh Giddel suante; 57Shephatiah, Hattil, Zebaim mi Pokereth leh Ami suante. 58Nethinim mite teng, Solomon sikhate tate, zathum sawmkua-le-nih. 59Huchi in hiaite Tel-melah, Tel-harsha, Cherub, Addan leh Immer a kipan a paitoute ahi uh: himahleh apipute inkote, asuan uh, Israel a kipan ahi uhia chih ataklang thei kei uh: 60Delaiah, Tobiah leh Nekoda suante, zaguk sawmnga-le-nih. 61Huan siampute suante: Habaiah, Hakkoz leh Barzillai Gilead mi Barzillai tanute a kipan azi kitenpihpa suante, amau min zui a sak in a-om hi. 62Hiai khangthu sutna a sim mite lak a min gelhna azong ua, himahleh amu kei uh. Huaiziak in buah a sim in a-om ua siamputna a kipan dangkoih in a-om uhi. 63Huan Tirshatha in, siampu Urim leh Thummim toh ahong dinkhiak mateng, thil siangthoupente ne lou ding in amau ahilh hi. 64Omkhawm tengteng avek un singli sangnih zathum-le-sawmguk ahi. 65Apasal sikhate uleh anumei sikhate uh, sangsagih zathum sawmthum-le-sagihte sim louh in pasal lasami leh numei lasami sangnih anei uhi. 66Asakolte uh zasagih sawmthum-le-guk ahi ua; sakol neute, zanih sawmli-le-nga; 67Sangawngsaute, zali sawmthum-le-nga; sabiltung uh, sangguk zasagih-le-sawmnih. 68Huan Jerusalem a Toupa' inn ahong tun un, apipute uh inkuan lak a alupente akhen in, Toupa' inn alamna ding in ut thu a thillat alan uhi. 69Nasepna sumbawm ah ahihtheihdan un dangka-eng darik singguk-le-sangkhat, dangka paun sangnga leh siampute puansilh zakhat. 70Huchi in siampute, Levi mite, mite lak a akhenkhat leh lasa mite, kongkhak ngak mite leh Nethinim mite, akhopite uah ateng ua, Israel mite akhopite uah ateng uhi.

EZRA 3: 1Huchi akha sagihna ahong tun a, khopite a Israel suante a-om lai un, mite Jerusalem ah mi khat bang in akikhawmkhawm uhi. 2Huchi in Jozadak tapa Jeshua leh a-unaute siampute leh Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh a-unaute adingh ua, Pathian mipa Mosi Dan a akigelh bang a, atung a halmang thillatte lan ding in, Israel' Pathian maitam abawl uhi. 3Jerusalem A Biakna Pat Thak Nawnna 4Huan akigelh bang in, biakbukte ankuangluina abawl ua, ahih ding zah in niteng halmang thillatte, dan dungzui in, niteng a sep ding kiphamoh bang in alan uhi. 5Huai nung in halmang thillat ngeinate, kha thakte thillatte leh hihsiangthou a om Toupa ankuanglui sehkhiakte tengteng leh michih a kipan Toupa a dia uttak a ut thu a thillatte alan uhi. 6Akha sagihna ani khat ni a kipan in Toupa a ding in halmang thillatte alan pan ua; himahleh Toupa tempul suangphum akiphum nai kei hi.Tempul Lam Thak Nawnna 7Sumte suangsek mite kiang leh khutsiam mite kiang ah apia ua; Kura Persia kumpipa a kipan aphalna amuh bang ua tuipi a, Joppa tan a Lebanon tang a kipan sidar singte hon la ding in, Zidonte kiang leh Turate kiang ah, sa, dawn ding leh sathau apia uhi. 8Huchi in akha nihna, Jerusalem a Pathian inn ahong tun uh akum nihna in, Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh Jozadak tapa Jeshua leh a-unaute siampute leh Levi mite leh koltanna a kipan a Jerusalem a hong paite akipan ua; Levi mite kum sawmnih a upa leh atunglam Toupa' inn nasepna a heutute hi ding in asep uhi. 9Huchi in Pathian inn a nasem mite heutu ding in, Jeshua atapate leh a-unaute, Kadmiel leh atapate, Judah tapate, Henadad tapate, atapate uh leh a-unaute uh Levi mite toh adingkhawmta uhi.

EZRA 3: 10Inn lam mite'n Toupa tempul suangphum akoih lai un, Israel kumpipa David thupiak bang in, Toupa phat ding in, siampute pengkulte toh apuan uh asilhsak ua, Levi mite Asaph tapate dakkhutbette aguan uhi. 11Huchi in Toupa phatna leh kipahna piakna in la asakhawm chiat ua,“Amah lah ahoih ngal a,azahngaihna tangtawn inIsrael lam ah a-om gige ngal a,” chi in.Huchi in Toupa' inn suangphum akoih ziak un mite tengteng aw ngaihtak a kikou in Toupa aphat uhi. 12Himahleh siampute leh Levi mite leh pipute inkote lak a mi tampi, amit mahmah ua hiai inn suangphum akikoih lai a, tua inn masa mute putekte, ngaihtak in akapkhia ua; mi tampi nuamsa in ngaihtak in akikou uhi. 13Huchi in mite'n nuamsa a kikouna husa, mite kahna husa toh atheikak thei kei ua: mite ngaihtak in akikou ua, ahusa uh gamlapi ah akiza hi.

EZRA 4: 1Huchi a Judah leh Benjamin melmate'n saltangte tate'n Toupa, Israel' Pathian a ding in tempul alam uh chih azak un; 2Zerubbabel leh pipute inko lupente kiang ah ahong pai nai ua, akiang uah, “Hon lampih le ung ake: noute bang in, na Pathian uh lah ka zong ngal ua; Assuria kumpipa Esarhaddon in hiai mun ahon pipa dam lai nite a kipan amah kiang ah ka kithoih uhi,” achi uhi. 3Himahleh Zerubbabel leh Jeshua leh Israel pipu inko lupente'n akiang uah, “Ka Pathian uh a dia inn na hon lampihna ding ziak bangmah na nei kei uh; himahleh Persia kumpipa Kura in kou thu ahon piak bang in, Israel' Pathian, Toupa a ding in koute'n ka lam ding uhi,” achi uhi. 4Tempul Lam Thak Ding Dalna 5Persia kumpipa Kura dam lai tengteng, Persia kumpipa Darias lal lai tanpha in, athiltup uh kalhse ding, amaute siatna ding in thuhilh mite aguai uhi.Jerusalem Lam Thak Ding Dalna 6Ahasueras vaihawm pat tung lai in, Judah leh Jerusalem a tengte hekna lai agelh uhi. 7Huan Artaksarses dam lai in Bishlam, Mithredath, Tabeel leh akithuahpihte'n Persia kumpipa Artaksarses kiang ah lai agelh ua; laikhak gelhdan Siria laimal a gelh a, Siria pau a bawlkhiak ahi. 8Sepaih heutu lian Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai in Jerusalem siatna ding in kumpipa Artaksarses kiang ah hichibang in laikhak agelh uhi. 9Sepaih heutu lian Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai leh akithuahpihte un huchi in agelhta ua; Dinai mite, Apharsatki mite, Tarpe mite, Aphar mite, Arki mite, Babulon mite, Susan mite, Deha mite, Elam mite leh, 10Osnappar lian leh thupi in apikhiak, Samaria khopi leh luipi khen a gamdang leh adangdang a kikoih namte tan in. 11Kumpipa Artaksarses kiang a alaikhak uh teisawn hiai ahi:“Luipi khen lam leh adangdang a na sikhate.

EZRA 4: 12Na kiang a kipan a hong tou Judate Jerusalem ah kou kiang ah ahong uh chih kumpipa kiang ah theih in om hen: Khopi helhat leh hoih lou alam lellel ua, akulhbaangte azouta ua, asuangphumte apuah khinta uh. 13Kumpipa'n thei hen, hiai khopi lam a a-om a, akulhbaangte zoh in omleh zaw, leimante, siahte sumsinna leimante hiam lamlian leimante ape kei ding ua, atawptawp in kumpipa siatna ahi ding. 14Tu in koute kumpi inn a pan huhna ngahte ka hih ziak un, kumpipa zahlakna muh koute ding in akilawm kei a, huaiziak in kumpipa thudik ka hon khak uhi. 15Na pipute chiamtehna laibu sung ah kizong hen: huchi in chiamtehna laibu sung ah na mu ding a, hiai khopi helhat, kumpipate leh bialte a dia poikhoih hat chih leh nidanglai mah in leng huai sung mah a helna ana bawlta uh chih na thei mai ding; huaiziak a hiai khopi kihihsegawp lah ahi ngal a. 16Hiai khopi akilam a, akulhbaangte hichibang a akihih khitleh zaw, luipi khen lam ah tan na nei kei ding chih kumpipa ka hon theitelsak uhi,” chi in. 17Huchi in dansiam Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai leh Samaria leh luipi khen a gam a teng akithuahpih tengteng kiang ah kumpipa'n dawnna akhak hi:Chibai, 18“Laikhak ka kiang a na hon khak uh ka ma ah teltak a sim ahita. 19Huchi in thu ka pia a, akizong khin a, nidanglai in hiai khopi in kumpipate tung ah helna abawl a, huai ah helpina leh helna a na kibawlta chih muhkhiak in a-om hi. 20Huai lou in kumpipa thilhihthei taktak, luipi khen gam tengteng tung a vaihawm, Jerusalem tung a vaihawmte ana om ua; van leimante, sumsinna leimante leh lamlian leimante amau kiang a piak ahi hi.

EZRA 4: 21Huchi in keimah in thupiak ka bawl masiah, huai mite khawl ding leh hiai khopi lam lou ding in, thupiak bawl un. 22Hiai thu a ze-ol lou ding in pilvang un: Bang ding in kumpipate siatna ding in hoihlouhna akhang dia?” chi in. 23Huchi a kumpipa Artaksarses laikhak teisawn Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai leh akithuahpihte ma a asim khit un, kintak in Jerusalem a Judate kiang ah ahoh ua, kihatsakna leh thilhihtheihna zang in amau akhawlsakta uhi. 24Huchi in Jerusalem a Pathian inn nasep akhawl a: Persia kumpipa Darias vaihawm akum nihna tan in akhawl hi.

EZRA 5: 1Huan zawlneite, zawlnei Haggai leh Zekariah Iddo tapa in Judah leh Jerusalem a om Judate kiang ah athu agenkhol ua; akiang uah Israel' Pathian min in thu agenkhol uhi. 2Huchi in Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh Jozadak tapa Jeshua athou ua, Jerusalem a om Pathian inn alam panta ua; amaute panpih in akiang uah Pathian zawlneite a-om uhi. 3Huchih lai mah in akiang uah Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa leh Shethar-boznai leh akithuahpihte uh ahong ua, akiang uah hichibang in, hiai inn lam ding leh hiai kulhbaang zou ding in kua'n thu ahon pia a? achi uhi. 4Huai ban ah ka kiang uah, “Hiai inn lam mite min bang ahia?” chi in ahong dong uhi. 5Tempul Lamna Nasep Pat Nawnna 6Laikhak teisawn Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa leh Shethar-boznai leh akithuahpih Abharsa mite, luipi khen a omte'n kumpipa Darias akhak uhi. 7Akiang ah laikhak akhak uh hichibang a gelh ahi.“Darias kumpipa kiang ah khamuanna kim om hen. 8Kumpipa'n thei hen, Judia bial ah ka pai ua, suang thupite a lam, Pathian thupi inn ah, kulhbaangte singte akikoih a, hiai nasep thanopna toh apai zel a, akhut uah ma asawn zel hi. 9Huai upate thu ka dong ua, hichibang in akiang uah, ‘Hiai inn lam ding leh hiai kulhbaang zou ding in nou kuan thu ahon pia a?’ ka chi uhi. 10Nang kiang a tel mahmah gen thei ding in, aminte uh leng ka dong ua, huchi a amau makaipen a om mite min ka gelhkhiak theihna ding un. 11Huchi in hichibang in kou ahon dawng uhi, ‘Van leh lei Pathian sikhate ka hi ua, hiai inn kum tampi a na kilamsa, Israel kumpipa thupi in alam leh azohsa inn ka lam uhi.

EZRA 5: 12Himahleh ka pipute un van Pathian a na suk heh nung un, amaute Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, Kaldai mi khut ah apia a, ama'n hiai inn ahihsia a, mite Babulon lam ah apimang hi. 13Himahleh Babulon kumpipa Kura akum khatna kum in, kumpipa Kura in hiai Pathian inn lam ding in thupiak abawl hi. 14Dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuan Pathian inn ate leng, Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a om Pathian inn a kipan a alakkhiak a, Babulon tempul a laklutte, huaite kumpipa Kura in Babulon tempul a kipan alakhia a, mi khat Sesbazzar, ukpipa dia abawl kiang ah huaite apekhia hi.’ 15Ama'n akiang ah, ‘Hiai tui-um belsuan la inla, pai in, Jerusalem a om tempul ah koih in, amun ah Pathian inn lam hi hen,’ achi hi. 16Huai lai in Sesbazzar ahong a, Jerusalem a om Pathian inn suangphumte aphum a: huai hun a kipan tutan in lam in a-om a, hinapi in lah zoh ahi kei hi. 17Huaiziak in tu in kumpipa'n hoih asakleh, Babulon a om, kumpipa laigelhte koihchingna insung kizong henla, Jerusalem a hiai Pathian inn lam ding kumpipa Kura in thupiak bawlna hiam abawlleh, hiai thu ah kumpipa'n akipahna kou hon khak hen,” chi in.

EZRA 6: 1Huchih lai in kumpipa Darias in thupiak abawl a, Babulon a goute koihkhawmna, laibute insung azong uhi. 2Huchi in Akmetha ah, Media bial a om inpi ah laizial akimukhia a, huai ah chiamtehna ding in hichibang a gelh ahi. 3“Kumpipa Kura akum khatna kum in, Kura kumpipa'n thupiak abawl hi: Jerusalem a Pathian inn tungtang, a-inn lam hi henla, kithoihnate a latna mun uh leh huai a suangphumte kiptak a koih hi hen; asanlam tong sawmguk, azatlam tong sawmguk; 4Suang thupi taktak vual thum leh sing thak vual khat toh, huan sum sennate kumpipa' inn a kipan piakkhiak hi hen: 5Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem tempul a kipan a alakkhiak, Babulon lam a alak, Pathian inn a dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuan piak nawn vek hi henla, Jerusalem a om Pathian insung ah amau mun chiat ah koih nawn vek hi hen.”Kumpi Darias Laithon 6“Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa, Shethar-boznai leh na kithuahpihte uh Apharsa mite, luipi khen a omte: huai inn lamna a kipan gamla ah om un: 6Kura Thupiak Muhkhiak Thakna 7Hiai Pathian inn nasepna subuai kei un; Judate ukpipa leh Juda upate'n amun ah hiai Pathian inn lam uhen. 8Huai lou in hiai Pathian inn lamna ding a hiai Juda upate kiang ah na hih ding uh thu ka bawl hi: kumpipa vante a kipan, luipi khen a siah a kipan mahmah in, hiai mite kiang a sumzatnate thanopna chiteng toh apiak ding ahi, huchi a dal a a-omlouhna ding un. 9Huan ataksapnate uh, bawngtalnoute, belamtalte, belamnoute, van Pathian kiang a halmang thillat ding huit buh, chi, uain leh thaute, Jerusalem a om siampute thu bang zel in, tatlak lou in niteng in amau piak ding ahi: 10Huchi a van Pathian kiang a gimlim kithoihnate alat theih ua, kumpipa hinna leh atapate hinna a dia athumtheihna ding un.

EZRA 6: 11Thupiak ka bawl lai a, kuapeuh in hiai thu a suklamdan leh a-inn a kipan inkam dohkhiak hi henla, huai ah amah dopkang touh leh henden in om hen; hiai ziak in a-inn ekvum a bawl hi hen. 12Huai mah hihlamdang ding, Jerusalem a om hiai Pathian inn hihse ding a akhut uh kuansak ding kumpipate tengteng leh mite tengteng Pathian huai lai a teng ding a amin omsakpa'n paithal vek hen. Kei, Darias in, thupiak ka bawlta; thanopna tengteng toh sepkhiak in om hen,” chi in.Tempul Latna 13Huchi in Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa, Shethar-boznai leh akithuahpihte un, kumpipa Darias in asawl ziak in, thanopna tengteng toh huchibang in asemkheta uhi. 14Juda upate'n zawlnei Haggai leh Iddo tapa Zekariah genkholhna pansan in inn alam ua ma asawn zel uhi. Israel' Pathian thupiak dungzui leh Kura, Darias leh Persia kumpipa Artaksarses thupiak dungzui in inn alam ua azouta uhi. 15Kumpipa Darias vaihawm akum gukna kum a om, Adar kha ani thum ni in hiai inn zoh ahita hi. 16Huchi in Israel suante, siampute leh Levi mite leh saltanna ta dangte'n, hiai Pathian inn latna nuamtak in aneita uhi. 17Hiai Pathian inn latna ah bawngtal zakhat, belamtal zanih, belamnou zali alan ua; Israel tengteng a dia khelhna thillat ding in, keltal sawm-le-nih, Israel namte zah dungzui in. 18Huchi in Jerusalem a om, Pathian nasepna a ding in, Mosi laibu a kigelh bang in, siampute atan hawmna uah, Levi mite amun tan uah akoih uhi.Paikan Ankuang 19Huan saltanna tate'n akha khatna ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuang alui uhi. 20Siampute leh Levi mite lah akisiangsakkhawm vek ngal ua; avek un asiang uhi: huchi in saltanna tate a ding leh a-unaute uh siampute a ding leh amau mah a ding in, Paikan belamnou agou uhi. 21Saltanna a kipan a hong paikhe nawn, Israel suante leh Toupa, Israel' Pathian zong ding a, gam a khovel mite buahna a kipan amau leh amau kihuikhetuam tengteng in, ane uhi. 22Nuamtak in ni sagih sung Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluina abawl uhi: Toupa'n amaute nuam asasak in, Israel' Pathian, Pathian inn a nasepna khutte uh hatsak ding in amau lam ah Assuria kumpipa lungtang akiheisak hi.

EZRA 7: 1Hiai thilte nung in, Persia kumpipa Artaksarses vaihawm lai in, Seraiah tapa Ezra, Azariah tapa, Hilkiah tapa, 2Shallum tapa, Zadok tapa, Ahitub tapa, 3Amariah tapa, Azariah tapa, Meraioth tapa, 4Zerahiah tapa, Uzzi tapa, Bukki tapa, 5Abishua tapa, Phinehas tapa, Eleazar tapa, Aaron siampu lian tapa: 6Babulon a kipan in hiai Ezra apaitou a; amah Mosi Dan, Toupa Israel' Pathian in apiak, dan theisa ahi a: atung a Toupa a Pathian khut a-om dungzui in, angetna tengteng kumpipa'n aphalsak hi. 7Jerusalem Ah Ezra Ahong Tung 8Huchi in kumpipa akum sagih kum akha ngana in Jerusalem ah Ezra ahong pai hi. 9Babulon a kipan akha khatna ani khat ni in akuantou pan a, akha ngana ani khat ni in a Pathian khut hoih atung a a-om bang zel in, Jerusalem ah ahong pai hi. 10Ezra in bel Toupa Dan zong ding, zui ding leh Israel tua dan thusehte leh vaihawmnate sinsak ding in alungtang akoihkip hi.Ezra Kiang A Kumpipa Artaksarses Lai Piak 11Tu in kumpipa Artaksarses in siampu, laigelhmi, Toupa thupiakte thu gelhmi leh Israel kiang a adan thusehte gelhmi Ezra kiang a apiak laikhak teisawn hiai ahi. 12Artaksarses, kumpipate' kumpipa'n, siampu, van Pathian Dan gelhmi, buching leh huchibang zel in, Ezra kiang ah, 13“Thupiak ka bawl hi, huchi a Israel a mite lak a amaute tengteng, ka gamsung a, asiampute uh leh Levi mite, amau ut thu petmah a Jerusalem a pai ding a theihsakte, nang kiang ah pai uhen. 14“Kumpipa leh athudot mi sagihte'n, na khut a om na Pathian Dan dungzui a, Judah leh Jerusalem tungtang thu kan ding a, nang ahon sawl bang un;

EZRA 7: 15atenna Jerusalem a om, Israel' Pathian kiang a man nei lou a kumpipa leh athudot mite'n apiaksate uh dangka leh dangka-eng po ding in, 16Babulon bial tengteng a dangka leh dangka-eng na muh tengteng, mite leh siampute'n amau ut thu a thillat, Jerusalem a om a Pathian uh inn a dia uttak a alat tengteng uh toh. 17“Huaiziak in thanopna toh hiai sum in bawngtalte, belamtalte, belamnoute na lei ding a, a-anpiak thillatte uleh adawn ding thillatte uh toh, huchi in Jerusalem a om na Pathian uh inn maitam tung ah huaite na lan ding hi. 18Dangka leh dangka-eng om lai hihdan ding nang leh na unaute'n hoih na sak dandan uh, na Pathian uh deihlam bang in hih un. 19Na Pathian inn a nasepna ding a tui-um belsuan ka hon piak uh, Jerusalem Pathian ma ah pia in. 20Na Pathian inn ding a kiphamoh dangdangte, piakna ding na neih dingte, kumpipa gou koihkhawmna a kipan in pekhia in. 21“Kei, kumpipa kei Artaksarses mahmah in luipi khen a om sumkem mite tengteng kiang ah thupiak ka bawl hi, huchi a Ezra siampu, van Pathian Dan, laigelhmi in nou ahon nget, thanuamtak a hih zel ahihtheihna ding in. 22Dangka talent zakhat, huit buh tehna zakhat, uain bath zakhat, sathau bath zakhat leh aphazah gen lou in chi nangawn. 23Bangpeuh van Pathian in thu apiak, van Pathian inn a ding in hih in om zel hen; aziak bel bang ding in kumpipa leh atapate gamsiatna ding in thangpaihna a-om dia? 24Huai lou in leng ka hon chitaktak uh hi, siampute leh Levite, lasa mite, kongkhak ngak mite, Nethinim mite hiam hiai Pathian inn sikhate lak a akuakua tungtang ah, van leimante, sumsinna leimante hiam lamlian leimante amau liausak dan ahi kei ding hi.

EZRA 7: 25Huan nang, Ezra, na khut a om na Pathian pilna zui in, thukhenmi leh vaihawmmi, tuipi khen a omte mite tengteng vaihawm ding in sep in; na Pathian dante tengteng, huaite theiloute nou sinsak un. 26Kuapeuh na Pathian dan leh kumpipa dan zui lou, sihna chiang hizong leh thanuamtak in atung ah vaihawmna bawl in om hen, ahihkeileh, khakmangna hiam, vankhakna hiam, suangkul lutna tan in,” chi in.Ezra In Pathian Aphat 27Jerusalem a om Toupa' inn kilawmsak ding a, kumpipa lungtang a hichibang a thil koih, i pipute Pathian, Toupa nuamsa in om hen; 28Kumpipa leh athudot mite leh kumpipa vaihawmpih thilhihthei tengteng ma a ka tung a zahngaihna hon pepa amah ahi. Huchi in ka tung a Toupa ka Pathian khut dungzui in hihhat in ka omta a, ka kiang a hoh ding in Israel a kipan mikizen tungtuan ka kaikhawmta hi.

EZRA 8: 1Huan hiaite apipute uh inkote lak a alupente ahi ua, kumpipa Artaksarses vaihawm lai a kei hon zuite khangthu suina ahi. 2Phinehas tapate lak ah, Gershom: Ithamar tapate lak ah Daniel: David tapate lak ah, Hattush, 3Shekaniah tapate lak ah; Parosh tapate lak ah, Zekariah: amah toh pasalte khangthu suina a suikhawmte zakhat-le-sawmnga ahi. 4Pahath-moab tapate lak ah, Elihoenai Zerahiah tapa; huan amah toh pasal zanihte. 5Shekaniah tapate lak ah, Jahaziel tapa; amah toh pasal zathumte. 6Adin tapate lak ah, Jonathan tapa Ebed; amah toh pasal sawmngate. 7Elam tapate lak ah, Athaliah tapa Jeshaiah; amah toh pasal sawmsagihte. 8Saltanna A Kipan A Hong Kik Nawnte 9Joab tapate lak ah, Jehiel tapa Obadiah; amah toh pasal zanih sawm-le-giatte. 10Shelomith tapate lak ah, Josiphiah tapa; amah toh pasal zakhat-le-sawmgukte. 11Bebai tapate lak ah, Bebai tapa Zekariah; amah toh pasal sawmnih-le-giatte. 12Azgad tapate lak ah, Hakkatan tapa Johanan; amah toh pasal za-le-sawmte. 13Adonikam tapate lak ah, ananungpente; hiaite amin uh ahi, Eliphelet, Jeiel, Shemaiah leh amau toh pasal sawmgukte. 14Bigvai tapate, Uthai leh Zabbud; amau toh pasal sawmsagihte.Tempul A Ding Levi Mi Ezra In Amu 15Huchi in Ahava pha a luang luipi tan in amaute ka kaikhawm a; huai ah ni thum ka giak uhi. Mite leh siampute ka en vialvial a, huai ah Levi tapate kuamah ka mu kei. 16Huan Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Zekariah leh Meshullam, mikizen tungtuante, sinsak mite Joiarib leh Elnathan leng ka thukhak hi. 17Kasiphia mun a Iddo hausapa kiang ah amau ka sawlkhia a; Iddo kiang ah leh Kasiphia mun a a-unaute Nethinimte kiang a agen ding uh ka hilh a, i Pathian inn ua ding a nasemmi ei a dia hon tonpih ding in.

EZRA 8: 18Huchi in i tung ua i Pathian khut hoih a om dungzui in pasal khat lunggelsiam, Mahli tapate lak a, Levi tapa, Israel tapa ei ding in Sherebiah atapate leh a-unaute, sawm-le-giat toh ahon pi uhi. 19Hashabiah, amah toh Merari tapate lak a Jeshaiah toh, a-unaute leh atapate uh, sawmnih toh; 20Nethinimte, David leh avaihawmpihte'n Levi mite nasepna ding a apiakte uh, zanih-le-sawmnih Nethinimte: avek un minkhumna ah akhum uhi.Ezra In Mipite Thumna Leh An Ngawlna Ah Amakaih 21Huchi in huai ah, Ahava lui ah, an ngawl ka puang a, huchi a ei a ding leh i nau neute a ding leh i neih i lamte tengteng a dia lampi tang amah lak a zong ding a i Pathian uh ma a ei leh ei i kiniamkhiak theihna ding in. 22Lampi a melma dou ding a ei hon panpih ding a kumpipa kiang a sepaih pawl leh sakol tungtuangmi nget lah ka zum ngal a: hoihna ding a, amah zongte tung ah i Pathian khut a-om a; himahleh amah mangngilh tengteng siatna ding in athilhihtheihna leh athangpaihna a-om hi, chi a, kumpipa kiang a thu i gen tak ziak in. 23An i ngawl ua hiai ding in i Pathian i ngen ngutngut ua: huchi in ama'n i thumna uh hon dawng hi.Tempul A Dia Thilpiak 24Huai lai in siampute lak a amakai lianpente lak a sawm-le-nih, Sherebiah, Hashabiah leh akiang ua om a-unaute uh lak a sawmkhat ka sehkhen a, 25amau a ding in dangka leh dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuante, kumpipa leh athuhilh mite leh avaihawmpihte'n Toupa' inn a alatte uh huai lai a om Israel tengteng puak ding in ka buksak hi. 26Akhut sung mahmah uah dangka talent zaguk-le-sawmnga leh dangka tui-um belsuan talent za ka buksak a; dangka-eng lak ah talent za;

EZRA 8: 27dangka-eng noubem sawmnih, darik sangkhat lak ah; dal hoih nawttet, dangka-eng bang a manpha bel nih. 28Huan akiang uah, “Toupa a ding in na siangthou ua, tui-um belsuante asiangthou uh; dangka leh dangka-eng Toupa, na pipute uh Pathian a dia ut thu a thillat ahi uh. 29Toupa' inn dantante, Jerusalem a siampute lak a lupente leh Levi mite leh Israel pipute inko vaihawmte ma a huaite na buk masiah uh, pilvan suah in, amaute kem un,” ka chi hi. 30Huchi in siampute leh Levi mite'n i Pathian inn ua Jerusalem a apuak ding un dangka leh dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuan bukkhiakte ala uhi.Jerusalem A Tun Kik Nawnna 31Huai lai in Jerusalem lam a pai ding in, akha khatna ani sawm-le-nih ni in Ahava lui a kipan i pawtkhia ua: huan i Pathian khut i tung uah a-om a, melma khut leh lampi a buk mi a kipan ama'n hon tankheta hi. 32Huchi in Jerusalem i tung ua huai ah ni thum i om uhi. 33Ani li ni in dangka leh dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuan i Pathian inn uah Uriah siampu tapa Meremoth khut ah buk in a-om a; akiang ah Phinehas tapa Eleazar a om; akiang uah Jeshua tapa Jozabad leh Binnui tapa Noadiah, Levi mite a-om uhi; 34aphazah leh agikdan tengteng sim ahi a, huai hun in laibu a chiamteh ahi. 35Pimangna a kipan a hong pai, saltanna tate'n Israel' Pathian kiang ah halmang thillatte, bawngtal sawm-le-nih Israel tengteng a ding in, belamtal sawmkua-le-guk, belamnou sawmsagih-le-sagih, keltal khelhna thillat ding in sawm-le-nih alan uhi: hiaite tengteng Toupa a ding a halmang thillat ahi. 36Kumpipa thukhen mite kiang leh tuipi khen a ukpipate kiang ah kumpipa thupiakte apekhia ua: huchi in mite leh Pathian inn apanpih uhi.

EZRA 9: 1Huchi a hiai thilte hih khit ahih lai in, ka kiang ah vaihawmtute ahong pai nai ua, “Israel mite leh siampute leh Levi mite, gamte a mite a kipan amau leh amau akikoihtuam kei ua, amaute kihhuainate, Kanaan mi, Hit mi, Periz mi, Jebus mi, Ammon mi, Moab mi, Aigupta mi leh Amor mite, dungzui in a-om uhi. 2Amau a ding leh atapate uh a ding in atanute uh ala ua; huchi in chi siangthou gamte mite toh amau leh amau akihelkhawmta hi: ahi, hiai tatlekna ah vaihawmtute khut leh vaihawmte amakai lianpente ahi uhi,” achi hi. 3Huchi a hiai thil ka zak in, ka puansilh leh ka puanak ka botkek a, ka lu a sam leh ka khamul ka botkhia a, lamdang sa in ka tusuk hi. 4Huai lai in saltanna a amaute tatlekna ziak a, Israel' Pathian thute ziak a lau a ling michih ka kiang ah ahong kikhawm ua; nitaklam kithoih hun masiah lamdang sa in ka tu hi. 5Nitaklam kithoih hun lai in ka tunggikna a pan ka thou a, ka puansilh leh ka puanak bohkeksa toh; ka khukdin a, Toupa ka Pathian lam ah ka khutte ka zakkhia a; 6“Aw ka Pathian, na kiang a daktou ding in ka zum in ka zakta hi, ka Pathian: ka thulimlouhnate uh ka lutunglam uah apung deuhdeuh a, ka mohna un vante asunta hi. 7Ka pipute uh dam lai hun a kipan tuni pha in nakpi in ka mohta ua; huchi in ka thulimlouhnate uh ziak in kou, ka kumpipate uh leh ka siampute uh, gamte kumpipate khut ah, namsau ah, saltanna ah, lohna ah leh zahlakna ah, hiai ni bang in piakkhiak in ka omta uhi.

EZRA 9: 8Huan tu in sawt lou sung a ding in Toupa ka Pathian ua kipan in hehpihna hong lang a, suakta ding a om lai dia nutsiat ding in leh amun siangthou a omkipna hon pe ding in, huchi a ka Pathian un ka mitte uh ahon sukvaksak a, ka tanna ua halhna neukha ahon piaktheihna ding in. 9Ezra In Judah Hiloute Toh Kitenpolhna Thu Aza 11Na sikha zawlneite zang in thu na hon pia a: ‘Luah ding a na paina uh, huai gam, gamte a mite nitna ziak a gam nin ahi. Akihhuainate un gam tawp khat lam a kipan khat lam tawp tan ahihdimna ziak in. 12Huaiziak in na tanute uh atapate uh kiang ah pe kei unla, atanute uh leng na tapate uh a ding in la sam kei un, amuanna uhiam ahauhsakna uhiam leng tangtawn in zong sam kei un: huchi a na hat ua, gam a ahoih na nek ua, tangtawn a na tate uh a ding a gouluah dia na nutsiat theihna ding un.’ 13Huchi a ka gamtat giloute uh ziak leh ka mohna thupi mahmah ziak ua, ka tung ua hong tung tengteng zoh in, nang ka Pathian un ka thulimlouhnate uh gunzah sang a hon gawt tawmzaw a, akhosuaksun om lai na hon piak mu in. 14Na thupiakte bohse nawn in, kihhuaite hih mite toh kituak in ka om ding uam? Akhosuak ding hiam, suakta ding himhim leng om lou khop a na bawlgawp matan ka tung uah na heh nilouh dia hia? 15‘Aw Toupa Israel' Pathian, nang na diktat a; hiai ni bang a akhosuak omlaite na hon nutsiat ziak in. Ngai in, ka mohna un na ma ah ka om uhi;’ hiai ziak in lah kuamah na ma ah adingh thei kei ding uhi.”

EZRA 10: 1Huchi a Ezra kap a Pathian inn mai a lei kidenna a nei in, athum a, thupha atawi lai in, Israel a kipan pasal leh numei leh naupang tampi kikhawmte akiang ah hong kikaikhawm ua: mite lah anak kah mahmah ngal ua. 2Elam tapate lak a khat, Jehiel tapa Shekaniah in adawng a Ezra kiang ah, “I Pathian tung ah i talekta ua, gammi numei namdangte i kitenpihta uh: Himahleh hiai thil thu ah Israel a ding in lametna a-om lai hi. 3Huaiziak in tu in zite tengteng leh amau a kipan a huchibang a piangte, ka toupa thuhilh dungzui in leh i Pathian uh thupiak a lau a lingte thuhilh dungzui in, koihmang ding in i Pathian toh thu i khung ding uh; huan dan dungzui a hih hi hen. 4Thou in, athu lah nang a ahi ngal a, kou leng na kiang ah ka om ding uh; hangsantak in om inla, hih in,” achi hi. 5Huchi in Ezra athou a, hiai thu dungzui a ahih ding un, siampute leh Levi mite lak a amakai lianpente leh Israel tengteng akichiamsak hi. Huchi in akichiamta uhi. 6Pathian inn mai a kipan Ezra athoukhia a, Eliashib tapa Jehohanan dantan sung ah alut a: huai lai a ahong pai lai in, tanghou ane kei a, tui lah adawn kei hi; saltanna a tatlekna ziak in asuun hi. 7Judah leh Jerusalem teng a saltanna tate tengteng kiang ah Jerusalem a kikaikhawm vek ding in thu apuangkhia ua; 8kuapeuh ni thum sung a hong pai lou, vaihawmte leh upate thu bang zel in, avan tengteng laksak ahi ding a, amah mah saltanna omkhawmte a kipan a tuamkoih ahi ding hi. 9Huchih lai in Judah leh Benjamin mi tengteng Jerusalem ah ni thum sung in akikaikhawm ua; hiai akha kuana, akha ni sawmnih ni ahi.

EZRA 10: Huchi in mi tengteng Pathian inn kongtual a mun awng ah atu ua, hiai thu leh vuahpi ziak in aling uhi. 10Kitenpolhna Sukbeidan Ding Gelna 11Huaiziak in tu in na pipute uh Pathian, Toupa kiang ah thupha tawi unla, akipah lam hih un; gam a mite a kipan, numei namdangte a kipan kituamseh un,” achi hi. 12Huchi in kikhawmte tengteng in adawng ua, aw ngaihtak in, “Ka tungtang uh na gen bang in, huchibang in ka hih ding uh,” achi uhi. 13Himahleh mite tampi ahi ua, vuah tampi zuk lai ahi a, huchi in inkuan ah ka dingh thei kei ua, hiai lah ni khat hiam nasep ahi kei; hiai thu ah lah nakpitak in i talekta ngal ua. 14Tu in omkhawmte a ding in i vaihawmte ding seh in om henla, i Pathian uh thangpaihna ei a kipan a akihei a, hiai thu hihbei ahih masiah, numei lamdangte kitenpihte i khopite a omte hun sehsate ah, khopi chiteng a upate amau toh, huai lai a vaihawmte toh, hong pai uhen. 15Asahel tapa Jonathan leh Tikvah tapa Jahaziah kia in hiai thu asel uh: huan Meshullam leh Levi mi Shabbethai in amaute apanpih uhi. 16Huchibang in saltanna a kipan kik nawnte'n ahihta uhi. Siampu Ezra, apipute uh inkote dungzui a, pipute inkuan lak a vaihawm makai kuate hiam toh leh aminte ua amaute tengteng, tuam sehkhiak in a-om ua; huchi in athu entel ding in akha sawmna ani khat ni in atuta uhi. 17Huchi in akha khatna ani khat ni in numei namdang kitenpih mite ahih khin uhi.Namdangmi Zi A Neite 18Huchi in siampute tapate lak ah numei namdang kitenpih muh in a-om a: huaite, Jeshua tapate, Jozadak tapa leh a-unaute, Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib leh Gedaliahte. 19Huchi in azite uh koihmang ding in pha asa ua;

EZRA 10: amoh ziak un, amohna a ding in belamhon lak a belamtal alan uhi. 20Immer tapate lak ah: Hanani leh Zebadiah. 21Harim tapate lak ah: Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel leh Uzziah. 22Pashur tapate lak ah: Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad leh Elasah. 23Levi mite lak ah: Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah, huai mah Kelita ahi, Pethahiah, Judah leh Eliezer. 24Lasa mite lak ah: Eliashib: huan kongkhak ngak mite lak ah; Shallum, Telem leh Uri. 25Israel lak ah: Parosh tapate lak ah; Ramiah, Jeziah, Malkijah Mijamin, Eleazar leh Malkijah leh Benaiah. 26Elam tapate lak ah: Mattaniah, Zekariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth leh Eliah. 27Zattu tapate lak ah: Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad leh Aziza. 28Bebai tapate lak ah; Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, Athlai. 29Bani tapate lak ah: Meshullam, Malluk, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal leh Ramoth. 30Huan Pahath-moab tapate lak ah: Adna, Kelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui leh Manasseh. 31Harim tapate lak ah: Eliezer, Isshiah, Malkijah, Shemaiah, Simeon, 32Benjamin, Malluk leh Semariah. 33Hashum tapate lak ah: Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, Shimei. 34Bani tapate lak ah: Maadai, Amram leh Uel; 35Benaiah, Bedeiah, Kelluh, 36Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib; 37Mattaniah, Mattenai leh Jaasau; 38Bani, Binnui, Shimei; 39Shelemiah leh Nathan leh Adaiah, 40Maknadebai, Shasai, Sharai; 41Azarel leh Shelemiah, Shemariah; 42Shallum, Amariah, Joseph. 43Nebo tapate lak ah: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel leh Benaiah. 44Hiai tengtengte'n namdang zite api ua: huchi in alak ua khenkhatte'n hiai zite a kipan tate anei uhi.

NEHEMIAH 1: 1Nehemiah In Jerusalem A-awlmohna 2Hananiah, ka unaute lak a khat ahong a, amah leh Judah a kipan mi kuate hiam; amaute kiang ah saltanna a kipan a nutsiat a omte, Juda suaktate tanchin leh Jerusalem thu ka dong hi. 3Amau ka kiang ah, “Huai lai bial a saltanna a kipan omlaite gimthuakna thupi thuak leh simmoh in a-om uh: Jerusalem kulhbaangte leng achim a, akongpite leng mei in akang,” achi uhi. 4Huan hichi ahong hi a, hiai thute ka zak lai in, ka tu a ka kap a, ni bangzah hiam ka suun a; van Pathian ma ah an ngawl in ka thum hi. 5“Aw Toupa, van Pathian, Pathian thupi leh lauhuai, amah it a, athupiakte zuite tung a thukhun theigige leh zahngaihna nei gige. 6“Tu in na bil in hon ngeingaih henla, na mitte hong kihong hen, huchi a na sikha thumna, huai hun a, sun leh zan a, na sikhate Israel suante a dia, nangmah tung a ka hihkhelh uh, Israel suante khelhna thupha tawi a, ka thumna na hon ngaihkhiaksakna ding in: Ahi, kei leh ka pa inkote ka khialta uhi. 7“Thanghuaitak in na tung ah ka na gamtata ua, na thupiakte ka zuita kei ua, na sikha Mosi kiang a na thupiak, dan thusehte leh vaihawmte. 8“Theigige in, ka hon ngen ahi, na sikha Mosi kiang a thu na piak, na tatlek uh leh mite lak ah ka hon thehzak ding. 9“Himahleh ka kiang a na hong kik ua, ka thupiakte na zuih ua na hih uleh, delhkhiak a na omna uh van tawp mun ah himahleh, huai a kipan in amaute ka kaikhawm ding a, ka min omna dia ka mun telsa ah amaute ka pikhawm ding, chi in. 10“Tu in hiaite, na thilhihtheihna thupi leh na banhat a na tatsa, na sikhate leh na mite ahi uh. 11“Aw Toupa, ka hon ngen ahi, na min laudan siam nuamsa, na sikha thumna leh na sikhate thumna na bil in ngeingaih hen: ka hon ngen ahi, tuni in na sikha lohchingsak inla, hiai mi mitmuh in akiang ah zahngaihna pia in,” achi hi.Kei bel kumpipa nou dompa ka hi.

NEHEMIAH 2: 1Kumpipa Artaksarses vaihawm akum sawmnih, Nisan kha in, ama a uain a-om lai in hichi ahong hi a, uain ka la a, kumpipa kiang ah ka pia hi. Ama ah nidang in dahmel ka pu ngei nai kei hi. 2Jerusalem Ah Nehemiah Ahoh 3Kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa tangtawn in dam hen: ka pipute hante omna, khopi kisegawp a om a, huai a kongpite mei in kangtum hiven bangchi in ka mel adah lou dia?” ka chi hi. 4Kumpipa'n ka kiang ah, “Ahihleh bang ahia na nget?” achi hi. Huchi in van Pathian kiang ah ka thumta hi. 5Kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa kipah lam ahih a, na mitmuh a na sikha in deihsakna atanleh, Judah gam ah, ka pipute han omna khopi ka bawltheihna ding in kei hon sawl in,” ka chi hi. 6Kumpipa'n ka kiang ah, (kumpinu leng akiang a tu ahi a), “Na khualzinna bang tan a sawt ahi dia? Chikchiang in na hong kik nawn dia?” ahon chita hi. Huchi in kei hon sawl ding kumpipa kipah lam ahi a; amah hun ka pia hi. 7Huai lou in kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa kipah lam ahih a, Judah gam tan ka tun mateng a kei ahon paisak zel theihna ding un, luipi khen a ukpipate kiang a piak ding laikhakte hon pe lechin. 8“Inn toh kizom kulh kongpite a ding leh khopi kulhbaangte a ding leh ka lutna ding inn a dia bawl ding inkamte bawlna dia sing ahon piakna ding in, kumpipa gammang kempa Asaph kiang ah laikhak hon khaksak lechin, ka chi hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n ka tung a ka Pathian khut hoih a-om bang in hon phalsak hi. 9“Huchi in luipi khen a ukpipate kiang ka hong tung a, akiang uah kumpipa laikhakte ka pia hi.

NEHEMIAH 2: Huchi in kumpipa'n hon zui ding in sepaih pawl heutute leh sakol tungtuang mite asawl hi. 10“Horon mi, Sanballat leh sikha Tobiah, Ammon mi in azaktak un, Israel suante hoihna zongmi kuahiam khat ahong pai ziak in nakpitak in alungkim kei mahmah uhi.Nehemiah In Kulhbaang Kisia Avelchian 11“Huchi in Jerusalem ah ka hong a, huai ah ni thum ka omta hi. 12“Zan in ka thou a, kei leh ka kiang a om mi tawmchikte; Jerusalem a dia hih ding ka lungtang sung a ka Pathian in bang ahia a koihmi kuamah ka hilh kei a: atung a ka tuanna ganta chih louh ngal ka kiang ah ganta a-om kei hi. 13“Zan in Gulpi Tuileh lam, Ekvum Kongpi lam ah, Phaizang Kongpi a pai in ka pawtkhia a, achimsa, Jerusalem kulhbaangte leh mei a kangsa kongpite ka velta hi. 14“Tuikhuk Kongpi leh Kumpipa Dil ah ka hoh a: himahleh ka nuai a om ganta paina ding mun a-om kei hi. 15“Luita zui in zan in ka paitou a, kulhbaang ka vel a; ka kik nawn a, Phaizang Kongpi ah ka lut a, huchi in ka kik nawnta hi. 16“Huchi in ka paina lam hiam, ka hih hiam vaihawm mite'n athei kei uh; Judate kiang ah leng, siampute hiam, miliante hiam, vaihawmte hiam leh nasep sem midangte kiang ah leng ka gen nai kei hi.Kulhbaang Bawl Dia Thutanna 17“Huan akiang uah, ‘I dinmun uh hoihlouhdan na mu ua, Jerusalem asiat khitdan, huai a kongpite mei a akat khitdan: simmoh a i om nawnlouhna ding in, kisa un Jerusalem baang i lam nawn ding uh,’ ka chi hi. 18“Huchi in ka tung a hoih ka Pathian' khut tanchin ka kiang a agen kumpipa thute leng amau ka hilh a; huchi in amau, ‘Thou ni in lam ni,’ achi uhi.

NEHEMIAH 2: Huchi in nasep hoih sem ding in akhutte uh ahatsakta uhi. 19“Himahleh Horon mi Sanballat leh Ammon mi sikha Tobiah leh Arabia mi Geshem in azak un, ahon nuihsan ua, ahon simmohbawl ua, ‘Bang thil ahia na hih uh? Kumpipa tung a hel sawm na hi uhia?’ achi uhi. 20“Amau ka dawng a, akiang uah, ‘Van Pathian in koute ahon lohchingsak ding, huaiziak in kou asikhate ka thou ding ua ka lam ding uh: himahleh nou Jerusalem ah thuneihna, theihgigena leh tan na nei kei uhi,’ ” ka chi hi.

NEHEMIAH 3: 1Huchi in siampu lianpen Eliashib a-unau siampute toh athou ua, Belam Kongpi abawl ua; ahihsiangthou ua, akongkhakte atung ua; Hameah insang tan in ahihsiangthou ua, Hananel insang tan in. 2Amah zom in Jeriko mite'n alam uhi. Amau zom in Imri tapa Zakkur in alam hi. 3Jerusalem Kulhbaang Lamna 4Amau zom in Uriah tapa, Hakkoz tapa, Meremoth in abawlhoih hi. Amaute zom in Berekiah tapa Meshullam, Meshezabel tapa in abawlhoih hi. Amaute zom in Baana tapa Zadok in abawlhoih hi. 5Amaute zom in Tekoa mite'n abawlhoih ua; himahleh amiliante un a Toupa uh nasepna ah anak pan nuam kei uhi. 6Kongpi lui pen Paseah tapa Jehoiada leh Besodeiah tapa Meshullam in abawlhoih ua, a-inkamte akhung ua, akongkhakte atung ua, akalhnate leh akalhna tawnte toh. 7Amaute zom in Gibeon mi Melatiah leh Meronoth mi, Jadon, Gibeon mite, Mizpah mite, luipi khen a ukpipa laltutphah toh kizomte'n abawlhoih uhi. 8Amah zom in Harhaiah, dangka-eng sek mite tapa Uzziel in abawlhoih hi. Amah zom in gimlim bawl mite tapa Hananiah in abawlhoih a, kulhbaang za tanpha in Jerusalem abubitsak uhi. 9Amaute zom in Jerusalem seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa, Hur tapa Rephaiah in abawlhoih hi. 10Amaute zom in Harumaph tapa Jedaiah in, ama inn sun hial in abawlhoih hi. Huan amah zom in Hashabneiah tapa Hattush in abawlhoih hi. 11Malkijah, Harim tapa leh Pahath-moab tapa Hasub in amun dang leh meipi insang abawlhoih uhi. 12Amah zom in Jerusalem seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa, Hallohesh tapa Shallum in, amah leh atanute toh abawlhoih uhi. 13Guam Kongpi pen Hanun leh Zanoah a tengte'n abawlhoih ua, alam ua, akongkhakte atung ua, akalhnate leh akalhna tawnte leh Ekvum Kongpi lam a kulhbaang tong sangkhat toh. 14Huchi in Beth-hakkerem seh a vaihawmpa, Rekab tapa Malkijah in Ekvum Kongpi abawlhoih a, akongkhakte, akalhnate leh atung a akalhna tawnte alam hi.

NEHEMIAH 3: 15Mizpah seh a vaihawmpa, Kol-hozeh tapa Shallum in tuikhuk kongpi abawlhoih a; alam a, avuk a, kongkhakte, kalhnate leh kalhna tawnte leh kumpipa huan kiang a Shiloah Dil baang, David Khopi a kipan a sukpai leichial tan in abawl hi. 16Amah nung in Azbuk tapa Nehemiah, Beth-zur gam kimkhat a vaihawmpa'n, David han toh kimatuah mun leh dil bawltawm chiang leh mihatte inn tan in abawlhoih hi.Kulhbaang Bawlna A Nasem Levite 17Amah nung in, Levite, Bani tapa Rehumte'n abawlhoih uhi. Huan amah zom in Keilah seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa Hashabiah in ama seh ding in abawlhoih hi. 18Amah nung in a-unaute uh, Keilah seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa, Henadad tapa Bavai in abawlhoih hi. 19Amah zom in Mizpah vaihawmpa, Jeshua tapa Ezer in seh dang, kulhbaang kawina tak a galvan koihkhawmna tan a paitouhna sun in abawlhoih hi. 20Amah nung in Zabbai tapa Baruk in seh dang, kulhbaang kawina a kipan siampu lianpen Eliashib inn kongkhak chiang abawlhoih hi. 21Amah nung in Hakkoz tapa Uriah tapa Meremoth in seh dang, Eliashib in kongkhak a kipan Eliashib inn tawpna chiang abawlhoih hi.Kulhbaang Bawlna A Nasem Siampute 22Amah nung in, phaizang mite, siampute'n abawlhoih uhi. 23Amaute nung in Benjamin leh Hasub in a-inn pha un abawlhoih ua. Amau nung in Ananiah tapa Maaseiah tapa Azariah in amah inn sik ah abawlhoih hi. 24Amah nung in Henadad tapa Binui in seh dang, Azariah inn a kipan kulhbaang kawina tan leh aning chiang abawlhoih hi.

NEHEMIAH 3: 25Uzai tapa Palal in kulhbaang kawina sun chiang abawlhoih a, kumpipa' inn tungnungzaw a kipan a hong dingkhetou insang, venna pisa kiang a om toh, amah nung in Parosh tapa Pedaiah, 26leh tempul nasem Ophel a tengteng suahlam pang Tui Kongpi leh insang lawkkhia zawn tan abawlhoih uhi.Kulhbaang Bawlna A Nasemtu Dangte 27Amah khit in Tekoa mite'n seh dang, Ophel kulhbaang chiang pha, insang thupi dingkhetou sun in abawlhoih uhi. 28Siampute'n Sakol Kongpi tunglam, michih in ama inn tung sun chiat in abawlhoih uhi. 29Amaute nung in Immer tapa Zadok in ama inn tung suntou chiang abawlhoih hi. Amah nung in suahlam kongpi ngakpa Shekaniah tapa Shemaiah in abawlhoih hi. 30Amah nung in Shelemiah tapa Hananiah leh Zalaph tapa gukna Hanun in seh dang abawlhoih uhi. Amah nung in Berekiah tapa Meshullam in adantan tung zawn abawlhoih hi. 31Amah nung in dangka-eng sek mite tapa Malkijah in Nethinimte inn leh sumsin mite inn chiang, Hammipkad Kongpi zawn chiang leh aning a kahtouhna chiang abawlhoih hi. 32Huan aning a kahtouhna leh Belam Kongpi kikal dangka-eng sek mite leh sumsin mite'n abawlhoih uhi.

NEHEMIAH 4: 1Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, kulhbaang i lam uh chih Sanballat in azak in, ahehta a, nakpitak in athangpai a, Judate akouta hi. 2Huchi in a-unaute leh Samari sepaih pawl ma ah thu agen a, “Hiai Juda zawngkhalte'n bang ahia ahih uh? Kihihhat ding uhia? Kithoih ding uh hia? Ni khat a zoh sawm uhia?
