Akangsa ahi chih mu napi in, ninneng sunvum a kipan a suangte bawl thak ding uhia?” achi hi. 3Huai lai in Ammon mi Tobiah akiang ah a-om a, “Ama'n, a-inn lam uh, sihal nangawn va kaltouleh, asuang baang uh alaichim ding,” achi hi. 4Nehemiah In Anasep A Doudalnate Azou 5Aginatlouhna uh khuh ke'nla, na ma a kipan akhelhna uh nulmang in omsak ke'n: inn lamte ma ah nang ahon hehsakta uhi. 6Huchi in baang ka bawl ua; baang tengteng, asandan kim chiang in akizom ta hi: mite'n lah nna sem ding in lungsim anei ngal ua. 7Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mite, Ammon mite leh Ashdod mite'n Jerusalem kulhbaangte bawlphatna in ma asawntou zel a, akichipsiatna akibawlpha, chih azak un, athangpai mahmah uhi. 8Huchi in avek ua hong kuan a Jerusalem dou ding leh huai a buaina omsak ding in akikumkhawmta uhi. 9Himahleh i Pathian kiang ah i thum ua, amau ziak in sun leh zan in amaute vil ding i koih uhi. 10Judah in, “Puakgik pote hatna abahta a,ninneng tampi a-om;huchi in kulhbaang bawl thei lou i hi uh,” achi hi. 11I melmate un, “Alak uh i hong tun ua, amaute i thah ua, nasep i khawlsak matan athei kei ding ua, muh leng amu kei ding uh,” achi uhi. 12Huan hichi ahong hi a, amau kiang a teng Judate ahong pai lai un, “Sawmvei i kiang uah mun tengteng a kipan hon dou ding uh ahi,” ahon chi uhi.

NEHEMIAH 4: 13Huaiziak in kulhbaang nunglam mun a mun niam penpen, mun awngthawlte ah, ka koih a, mite a-inkuankuan uh dungzui in anamsaute uh toh, ateipite uh toh, athalpeute uh toh ka koih hi. 14Huchi in ka en a, ka thou a, miliante leh vaihawmte leh mipi dangte kiang ah, “Amau lau kei un: Toupa thupi leh lauhuai theigige unla, na unaute uh, na tapate uh leh na tanute uh a ding in gal dou un, na zite uh leh na innte uh a ding in,” ka chi hi. 15Huan hichi ahong hi a, i melmate thil sawm i na theita ua, Pathian in athusawm uh bangmah lou asuaksak a, kulhbaang bawl ding in i vek un michih anasepna mun ah i kileh nawnta uh chih aza lai uhi. 16Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, huai hun a kipan in, ka sikhate lak a kimkhat nasepna ah apang ua, alak ua kimkhat in lum, teipi leh thalpeu leh sik puanakte alen ua; vaihawmte Judah inkote nung ah a-om vek uhi. 17Kulhbaang bawlte leh van-gik pote'n apuak lai un, michih in akhutte uh khat nasepna a nna sem in, akhut khat lam a galvan tawi in. 18Inn lam mite'n, michih in anamsau apang ah khaisa a nei in, huchi in alamtou zel uhi. Pengkul mutpa ka kiang ah a-om hi. 19Huchi in miliante kiang leh vaihawmte kiang ah leh mite lak a adangdangte kiang ah, “Nasep athupi in, atam a, kulhbaang tung ah i kikhenzak ua, kigamlattak in: 20Koi lai mun peuh a pengkul ging na zakna uah, i kiang uah huai lam ah kuan un; i Pathian un gal hon dousak ding ahi,” ka chi hi. 21Nna i sem ua: alak ua akimkhat in zingsang kipat a kipan aksite ahong kilat matan teipi atawi uhi. 22Huchi mah bang in huai lai in mite kiang ah, michih asikha toh Jerusalem sung ah giak hen, zan chiang a eite a dia galvil ahih a, sun chiang a nna aseptheihna ding un, ka chi hi. 23Huchi in kei hiam, ka unaute hiam, ka sikhate hiam, kei hong zui galvil mite, i lak ua kuamah in i puante uh sawp ding nasan in i suah man kei uhi.

NEHEMIAH 5: 1Huai lai in a-unaute uh Judate dem a nakpitak a kikouna, mite leh azite ua kipan ahong omta hi. 2Kou, ka tapate leh ka tanute uh, tampi ka hi ua: “Ka nek ua ka hintheihna ding un, buh-le-bal hon pia un,” chi pawl ahong om uhi. 3“Ka loute uh, ka grephuante uh, ka innte uh ka zuak ua; kial ziak in, buh-le-bal hon pia un,” chi kuate hiam leng a-om uhi. 4“Ka loute uh leh ka grephuante ua dit ding in kumpipa siah ding in sum ka leitawi uh, chimi khenkhat leng a-om uhi. 5Migentheite Nuaisiahna 6Huchi a akikouna uleh hiai thute ka zak in ka heh mahmah hi. 7Huchih lai in ka kingaihtuah a, miliante leh vaihawmte ka sal a, akiang uah, “Michih in a-unau lak ah apung na phut uh,” ka chi hi. Huchi in amaute demna kikhawmpi thupi ka nei hi. 8Akiang uah, “Khovel mite kiang a zuak a omsa, i unau Judate i theih bang un i tanta ua; nou na unaute uh zuak in, i lak ua khot a om ding uh ahi maw?” ka chi hi. Amau adai dide ua, thu khat leng anei kei uhi. 9“Na thilhih uh ahoih kei; i melmate khovel mite'n hon simmohna ziak un, i Pathian laudan siam a na om ding uh hilou hia? ka chih behlap hi. 10Huchi mah bang in, ‘ka unaute leh ka sikhate leh ke'n amau kiang ah sum leh buh-le-bal ka leitawisak uhi. K'on ngen ahi, apung omsak kei ni.’ 11‘Pe nawn un, ka hon ngen ahi, akiang uah, tuni mahmah in, aloute uh, agrephuante uh, a-olive huante uleh a-innte uh, asum uh aseh zakhatna leng, buh-le-bal, uain,’ leh sathau, amau a kipan na phutkhia uhi,” ka chi hi.

NEHEMIAH 5: 12Huchi in amau, “Ka pe nawn ding ua, amau a kipan bangmah ka phut kei ding uh; huchibang in ka hih ding ua, na chih mah bang in,” achi uhi. Ke'n siampute ka sam a, akichiamna uh ka la a, huchi a hiai thuchiam bang a ahihna ding un. 13Ke'n leng ka pheipi ka vuangsak a, “Hiai thuchiam bawl lou peuhmah, a-inn a kipan, anasepna a kipan Pathian in hichibang in vuangsak hen; hichibangtak a vuankhiak ahi ding a, ahawm ding,” ka chi hi. Huan khawmpite tengteng in, “Amen, Toupa phat in om hen,” achi uhi. Huchi in mite'n hiai thuchiam dungzui in ahih uhi.Nehemiah Angmasial Louhna 14Huai lou in Judah gam a a-ukpipa ding ua seh a ka om lai a kipan, kumpipa Artaksarses akum sawmnihna leh akum sawmthum-le-nihna chiang, huai bel, kum sawm-le-nih ahi a, kei leh ka unaute'n ukpipa tanghou ka ne kei uhi. 15Himahleh kei ma a ukpipa masate mite tung a mohsak theih ahi ua, amau a kipan in tanghou leh uain ala uh, dangka shekel sawmli sim louh in; ahi, asikhate uh nangawn in mite tung ah vai ahawm uhi. Himahleh ke'n Pathian ka kihtak ziak in huchibang in ka hih kei hi. 16Ahi, huai lou leng hiai kulhbaang nasepna ah ka pang nilouh a, gam himhim leng i lei kei uh: ka sikhate tengteng huai lam ah nasepna ah kaihkhawm in a-om uhi. 17Huai ban ah ka dohkan ah Judate leh vaihawmte lak a mi za-le-sawmnga, i kim i vel ua om khovel mite lak a pan i kiang ua hong paite chih louh, a-om uhi. 18Ni khat a ding a bawlkholhsa bawngtal khat leh belam hoih ngenta guk ahi ua; vasate leng kei dia bawlkholhsa in a-om ua, huan ni sawm sung a khatvei uain chi chih a kipan koih hoih: hinapi in hiai mite tung a tanna agik ziak in, ukpipa tanghou hiaite tengteng ziak in ka phut kei hi. 19Aw ka Pathian, hoihna ding in, hiai mite a dia ka hih tengteng kei lam hon theigige in.

NEHEMIAH 6: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, kulhbaang ka lam khin a, huai ah khangkham a-om nawnta kei chih, Sanballat, Tobiah, Geshem Arabia mi leh i melma dangdangte kiang a akitut lai in; huai hun tan in kongpi kongkhakte tung nai kei mah leng; 2Sanballat leh Geshem in ka kiang ah mi ahon sawl ua, “Hong pai in, Ono Phaizang a khuate lak a khat ah i va kimu ding,” chi in. Himahleh ka tung ah gilou hih angaihtuah uhi. 3Huchi in akiang uah sawltakte ka sawl a, “Nna thupitak sem ka hi, ka hong paisuk thei kei; bangziak a ka nna nusia a, na kiang ua ka hong suk ziak a, nasep khawl ding ahia oi?” ka chi hi. 4Huan hichibang ngen in livei ka kiang ah mi ahon sawl ua; angeingei in amaute ka dawng zel hi. 5Huchi in Sanballat in ka kiang ah hichibang in angaveina ding in asikha akhut a laikhak honsa toh ahon sawl a; 6huai ah, “Namte lak ah akigen a, Gasmu in achi a, nang leh Judate'n hel na tum uh; huai a ding in kulhbaang na lam hi: huchi in nang akumpipa uh hi ding in, hiai thute dungzui in, 6Nehemiah Kalh A Thusawmguk 7Jerusalem a nang tanchin gen ding in zawlneite leng na sep a, Judah ah kumpipa a-om chi in. Huchi in tu in hiai thute dungzui in kumpipa kiang a tut ding ahi; huaiziak in hong kuan inla, kihouna i nei ding,” chi in. 8Akiang ah mi ka sawl a, “Na gen bang a huchibang thilhih a-om kei a, himahleh na lungtang a kipan na phuahtawm ahi,” chi in. 9Amau lah, hih louh ahihna ding in, “Nasepna a kipan akhutte uh hatsak louh in a-om ding,” chi a hon lauhsak a-ut ngal ua.

NEHEMIAH 6: Himahleh tu in, Aw Pathian, nang ka khutte hatsak in. 10Khum a om, Mehetabel tapa Delaiah tapa Shemaiah inn ah ka hoh a, ama'n, “Tempul sung ah, Pathian inn ah i kikhawm dia, huchi in tempul kongkhakte i khak ding, nang that dia hong ding uh lah ahi ngal ua; ahi, zan in nang that ding a hong ding uh ahi,” achi hi. 11Ke'n bel, “Kei bang mi, taise ding hon sa maw? Huan kua ahia, huchi a kei bang a om a, ahinna humbitna ding a tempul sung a hoh nuam ding? Ka lut kei ding,” ka chi hi. 12Ka ngaihtuah a, huchi in ngai in, Pathian in amah asawl kei a; himahleh ka siatna ding in hiai genkholhna agenkheta hi: Tobiah leh Sanballat in amah aguai uhi. 13Hiai a ding a goih ahi, ka launa ding leh huchibang a hih a, khial a, thutut gilou ding a thubuai aneihtheihna ding ua, kei ahon simmoh theihna ding un. 14Aw ka Pathian, Tobiah leh Sanballat anasepte uh bang zel leh zawlneinu Noadiah leh zawlnei dangte, lausak hon tumte, theigige in.Nasep Zohsianna 15Huchi in Elul kha ani sawmnih-le-nga ni, ani sawmnga-le-nih sung in, kulhbaang zoh in a-omta hi. 16Huan hichi ahong hi a, i melmate tengteng in huai azak un, i kim i vel ua om namte teng in alauta ua, amitmuh ngei uah nakpitak in alunglelta uhi; hiai nasep i Pathian hih ahi chih athei ngal ua. 17Huai lou in huai lai in Judah miliante'n laikhak tampi Tobiah kiang ah akhak ua, amau kiang ah Tobiah laikhakte ahong tung hi. 18Amah Arah tapa Shekaniah tanu pasal ahih ziak in, Judah ah mi tampi amah lam a kichiam lah a-om ngal ua; atapa Jehohanan in Berekiah tapa Meshullam tanu zi in anei hi. 19Huai lou leng ka ma ah athil hoih hihte agen ua, amah kiang ah ka thute atun zel uhi. Huchi in Tobiah in kei hon hihlau ding in laikhakte akhak hi.

NEHEMIAH 7: 1Hichi ahong hi a, kulhbaang lam khit ahih a, kongkhakte ka tun khit a, kongkhak ngak mite leh lasa mite leh Levi mite seh ahih khit nung un, 2ka unau Hanani leh Hananiah kulh ukpa kiang ah Jerusalem kepna ka pia a: amah miginom ahi a, tampi sang a Pathian laudan siam ahih ziak in. 3Akiang ah, “Ni asat mateng Jerusalem kongpite hon hi kei hen; galvilmi adin lai un, kongkhakte khak uhenla, amaute kalhkhum un; Jerusalem a tengte vengmi sep inla, michih ama dinmun ah, michih ama inn zawn chiat ah,” chi in.Saltanna A Kipan Hong Kik Nawnte(Ezr 2.1-70) 4Khopi aza in alian a: himahleh huai ah mite atawm ua, innte lah lam ahi kei uhi. 5Huchi in ka Pathian in ka lungtang miliante, vaihawm mite, mipite, khangsutna a sim ahihtheihna ding ua kaikhawm ding in akoih hi. Huan amasapen a hong lang amaute khangsutna laibu ka muta a, huai ah gelh a om ka mu hi. 6Hiaite bial naupangte ahi ua, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in apimangte, huai pimang a omte lak a saltanna kipan a paitoute, Jerusalem leh Judah akik nawn, michih amah khopi a kik; 7Jerusalem Kongpi A Vengmi Sehna 8Israel mite lak a pasal zah:Parosh suante, sangnih zakhat sawmsagih-le-nih. 9Shephatiah suante, zathum sawmsagih-le-nih. 10Arah suante, zaguk sawmnga-le-nih. 11Pahath-moab suante, Jeshua leh Joab tate, sangnih zagiat sawmkhat-le-giat. 12Elam suan sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li. 13Zattu suan zagiat sawmli-le-nga. 14Zakkai suan zasagih-le-sawmguk. 15Binnui suan zaguk sawmli-le-giat. 16Bebai suan zaguk sawmnih-le-giat. 17Azgad suan sangnih zathum sawmnih-le-nih. 18Adonikam suan zaguk sawmguk-le-sagih. 19Bigvai suan sangnih sawmguk-le-sagih. 20Adin suan zaguk sawmnga-le-nga. 21Ater, Hezekiah suan sawmkua-le-giat. 22Hashum suan zathum sawmnih-le-giat. 23Bezai suan zathum sawmnih-le-li. 24Hariph suan zakhat sawmkhat-le-nih. 25Gibeon suan sawmkua-le-nga. 26Bethlehem leh Netophah suan zakhat sawmgiat-le-giat. 27Anathoth mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-giat. 28Beth-azmaveth, mite sawmli-le-nih. 29Kiriath-jearim, Kephirah, Beeroth suante, zasagih sawmli-le-thum.

NEHEMIAH 7: 30Ramah leh Geba mite, zaguk sawmnih-le-khat. 31Mikmas suante, zakhat sawmnih-le-nih. 32Bethel leh Ai mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-thum. 33Nebo dang mite, sawmnga-le-nih. 34Elam dang suan sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li. 35Harim suan zathum-le-sawmnih. 36Jeriko suan zathum sawmli-le-nga. 37Lod, Hadid leh Ono suante, zasagih sawmnih-le-khat. 38Senaah suan sangthum zakua-le-sawmthum. 39Siampute:Jedaiah suante, Jeshua inkuan a kipan, zakua sawmsagih-le-thum. 40Imer suante, sangkhat sawmnga-le-nih. 41Pashur suante, sangkhat zanih sawmli-le-sagih. 42Harim suante, sangkhat sawm-le-sagih. 43Levi mite: Jeshua, Kadmiel suante,Hodevah suante, sawmsagih-le-li. 44Lasa mite: Asaph suante, zakhat sawmli-le-giat. 45Kongkhak ngakte: Shallum, Ater, Talmon, Akkub,Hatita leh Shobai suante,zakhat sawmthum-le-giat. 46Tempul nasem, Nethinim mite:Ziha, Hasupha, Tabbaoth; 47Keros, Sia, Padon; 48Lebana, Hagabah, Shalmai; 49Hanan, Giddel, Gahar; 50Reaiah, Rezin, Nekoda; 51Gazzam, Uzza, Paseah; 52Besai, Meunim, Nephishesim; 53Bakbuk, Hakupha, Harhur; 54Bazlith, Mehida, Harsha; 55Barkos, Sisera, Tamah; 56Neziah leh Hatipha suante. 57Solomon sikhate tate:Sotai, Sophereth, Perida; 58Jaala, Darkon, Giddel; 59Shephatiah, Hattil, Zebaim mi Pokereth leh Ammon suante. 60Nethinim mite tengteng leh Solomon sikhate' suante, zathum sawmkua-le-nih. 61Huan hiaite Telmelah, Tel-harsha, Kerub, Addon leh Immer a kipan paitoute ahi uh, himahleh apipute uh inkote, Israel a kipan ahi hiam chih bel a-ensak thei kei uhi: 62Delaiah, Tobiah leh Nekoda suante, zaguk sawmli-le-nih. 63Siampute a kipan: Habaiah, Koz leh Barzillai suan Gilead mi Barzillai tanute lak a zi neipa min atamsak uhi. 64Hiaite'n khangthu suina a sim a omte lak ah amin gelhna uh azong ua, himahleh muh in a-om kei; huaiziak in nin a sim ahi ua siamputna a kipan koihkhiak ahi uhi. 65Ukpipa in akiang uah, siampu khat Urim leh Thummim toh ahong suah mateng thil siangthoupente lak a nek louh ding chih agen hi. 66Omkhawm tengteng avek un singli sangnih zathum-le-sawmguk, 67Apasal sikhate uh leh anungak sikhate uh, sangsagih zathum sawmthum-le-sagihte sim louh in:pasal lasa leh numei lasa zanih sawmli-le-nga anei uhi. 68Asakolte uh zasagih sawmthum-le-guk;asakolneute uh, zanih sawmli-le-nga; 69Asangawngsaute, zali sawmthum-le-nga;asabiltungte uh sangguk zasagih-le-sawmnih.

NEHEMIAH 7: 70Pipute inkote lak a lupente lak a kipan khenkhatte nasem ding in akipia uhi.Ukpipa'n sumbawm ah dangka-eng darik sangkhat,maiphiat kuang sawmnga,siampute puan zanga-le-sawmthum apia hi. 71Huan pipute inkote lak a lupente lak a khenkhatte'n dangka-eng darik singnih leh,dangka paun sangnih-le-zanih apia uhi. 72Mipite lak a adangdangte piak dangka-eng darik singnih leh dangka paun sangnih leh,siampute puan sawmguk-le-sagih ahi. 73Huchi in siampute, Levi mite, kongkhak ngakte leh lasa mite, mite lak a akhente leh Nethinim mite leh Israel tengteng a khopite uah atengta uhi. Akha sagihna ahong tun in, Israel suante akhopite uah a-om uhi.

NEHEMIAH 8: 1Huchi in mite tengteng Tui Kongpi mai a om mun lian ah mi khat bang in akikhawmkhawmta ua; Toupa'n Israel kiang a apiak, Mosi Dan laibu hon tawi ding in laigelhmi Ezra kiang ah thu ahilh uhi. 2Siampu Ezra in omkhawmte, pasal leh numei, theihsiamna toh za thei ding tengteng ma ah akha sagihna ani khat ni in dan thu ahon lata hi. 3Pasal leh numeite leh theisiam thei dingte ma ah, zingkhang a kipan sun lai tanpha in Tui Kongpi mai a om mun lian ma ah asimta hi; huchi in mite tengteng in Dan Laibu abildoh chiat uhi. 4Huai ding mah a abawl uh, sing dohkang tung ah laigelhmi Ezra adingh a; asik ah Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah leh Maaseiah, ataklam pang ah adingh ua; aveilam pang ah, Pedaiah, Mishael, Malkijah, Hashum, Hashbaddana, Zekariah leh Meshullam. 5Huchi in Ezra in mite mitmuh in laibu ahong a; mite tunglam ah a-om ngal a; huan ahongta a, mite tengteng adingh uhi: 6Ezra in Toupa, Pathian thupi avualzawl hi. Huchi in mipi tengteng in adawng ua, “Amen, Amen,” chi a akhutte uh lik kawm in alute uh akunsak ua amai ua lei si in Toupa abia uhi. 7Jeshua, Bani, Sherebiah, Jamin, Akkub, Shabbethai, Hodiah, Maaseiah, Kelita, Azariah, Jozabad, Hanan, Pelaiah leh Levi mite'n mipite dan theisiam ding in abawl ua: huchi in mite amau mun ah adingh uhi. 8Ezra In Dan Laibu Asim 9Huan Nehemiah, amah Tirshatha ahi a, huan siampu leh laigelhmi Ezra, leh Levite mite sinsakte'n, mite tengteng kiang ah, “Tuni Toupa na Pathian uh a dia ni siangthou ahi; dah kei unla kap kei un,” achi ua. Dan thute azak un lah mite tengteng akap ngal ua.

NEHEMIAH 8: 10Akiang uah, “Pai unla, thaute ne unla, akhumkhum dawn un, amah a dia bangmah bawlkhol a om lou kiang ah tantuante khak un: tuni lah i Toupa uh a dia ni siangthou ahi ngal a. Dah kei unla; Toupa a kipahna na hatna uh ahi,” achi hi. 11Huchi in Levite'n mite tengteng adaisak ua, “Tuni siangthou ahih ziak in, dai sipsip unla; dah kei un,” chi in. 12Huan mite tengteng ne ding leh dawn ding leh vualnopna thupi bawl ding in apaita ua, akiang ua phuankhiak a om thute atheisiamta uhi.Biakbuk Ankuangluina 13Ani nih ni in mite tengteng pipute inko lupente, siampute leh Levi mite, laigelhmi Ezra kiang ah, Dan thute ngaikhe ding in akikhawmkhawm uhi. 14Toupa'n Mosi zang a Israel suante akha sagihna ankuangluina a aidakbuk a atendan ding ua thu apiakdan dan a kigelh amu uhi: 15“Tang ah kuankhia unla, olive hiang, gam olive leh muising hiang, tum hiang, sing vunsah hiang, akigelh bang a, aidakbuk bawlna ding in va la un, akhopi tengteng uh leh Jerusalem a apuankhiak theihna ding un,” achi hi. 16Huchi in mite akuankhia ua, ava la ua, michih in a-inn tung ah, ahuangsungte uah, Pathian huangsungte ah, Tui Kongpi a mun lian ah leh Ephraim Kongpi a mun lian ah aidakbukte akibawlta uhi. 17Huan saltanna a kipan hong pai nawn omkhawmte tengteng in aidakbukte abawl ua, aidakbuk ah ateng uhi. Nun tapa Joshua dam lai a kipan huai ni tanpha in Israel suante'n lah huchibang in ahih nai kei uhi. Huchi in nakpi a kipahna mahmah a-omta hi. 18Huai lou in niteng in ani masapen a kipan ani tawp ni tan in Pathian Dan laibu sung ah asim hi. Huan ankuangluina ni sagih anei ua; ani giat ni in paidan dungzui in kikhopna thupi a-omta hi.

NEHEMIAH 9: 1Hiai kha ani sawmnih-le-li ni in Israel suante an ngawl kawm leh sai-ip puansilh kawm leh atung ua lei kibuak kawm in akikhawm ua. 2Huchi in Israel chite mikhual tengteng a kipan in akikoihtuam ua, adingh ua akhelhnate uleh, apipute uh thulimlouhnate thupha atawi uhi. 3Amun uah adingh ua, Toupa a Pathian uh Dan laibu sung ah ni khat a aseh lina teng asim ua; aseh lina teng thupha atawi ua, Toupa a Pathian uh abeta uhi. 4Huchih lai in Levi mite, Jeshua, Bani, Kadmiel, Shebaniah, Bunni, Sherebiah, Bani leh Kenanite dohkan tung ah adingh ua, Toupa a Pathian kiang uah aw ngaihtak in akikou uhi. 5Huai lai in Levi mite, Jeshua, Kadmiel, Bani, Hashabneiah, Sherebiah, Hodiah, Shebaniah leh Pethahiahte'n,“Dingh unla tangtawn a kipantangtawn pha in Toupa na Pathian uhvualzawl un:huchi in vualzawlna lehphatna tengteng tunglam a tawisang a om,na min thupi vualzawl in om hen.”Khelh Kipuanna Thumna 6“Nang, nang kia mahmah Toupa na hi;van, vante' van a,sepaihte tengteng,lei leh asung a thil om tengteng,tuipite leh asung uaom tengteng na bawl a,avek un na hawi a;van sepaihte'n nang ahon bia uhi. 7Abram tel a, Kaldaite Ur a kipan a amah pikhia a,akiang a Abrahammin pepa, Toupa Pathian na hi; 8Na ma a lungtang ginom na mu a,Kanaan mite, Hit mite,Amor mite, Jebus mite lehGirgas mite gam pe ding aamah toh thukhun bawlpa,achite kiang a pe ding in,na thute bawl piching a;nang lah na diktat ngal a. 9Mipite'n Akhelhna Uh Apuang Uh 10Pharaoh tung leh,asikhate tengteng tung leh,agam a mite tengteng tung ah chiamtehna lehthillamdangte na ensak a;amaute siatna ding in kisatheitak in agamtang uhchih lah na thei ngal hi;tuni a bang in, min na kimuh hi.

NEHEMIAH 9: 11Ama uah tuipi na khen a,huchi in gam hul tung ahtuipi lak ah apaisuak ua;amau delhte nangtui thuk sung ah, tui hattak sung a suang bang in na pailut hi. 12Huai lou in sun in meipi kitung in amaute na pi a; zan in meikuang dingh in,apaina ding lampi ua vaknaamaute kiang a pe ding in. 13Sinai Tang ah leng na hohsuk a,van a kipan in amau na houpih a,vaihawmna dikte leh dan dikte,dan thuseh leh thupiak hoihte na pia hi. 14Amau kiang ah na Sabbathsiangthou na theisak a,na sikha Mosi khut in,thupiakte leh dan thusehte leh dan amaute na thupiak in na pia hi. 15Agilkial un van a kipantanghou na pia a,adangtak un suangpi a kipanamaute a ding in tui na pawtkhesak a,amaute pe ding a na khut na lik a,gam luah ding a kuan ding inamaute thu na pia hi. 16Himahleh amaute leh apipute un kisatheitak in ahih ua,apaupeng ua, na thupiakte angaikhe kei uhi, 17Thu amang nuam kei ua,alak ua na hih na thillamdangte leng alimsak sam kei uh;himahleh aki-uangsak ua,ahelna uah atanna ua kik nawn ding in heutu khat asep uhi;himahleh nang ngaidam dia mansa,lainatna a dim leh hehpihsiam,heh mengmeng lou, zahngaihna hau,amaute lehngatsan lou Pathian na hi. 18Ahi, bawngnou sun abawl lai un,Aigupta a kipan a nang hon pikhepahiai na Pathian ahi, achi ua,nakpitak a thangpaihnate abawl lai un. 19Huchi napi in na zahngaihna tampiteziak in amaute gamdai ahna lehngatsan kei hi:sun in atung ua kipan meipi dingh apaimang kei a,vakna amau pe ding,zan a meikuang dingh leng, apaina lampi uah amaute pi ding in. 20Amaute chil ding in na kha hoihna pia a, akam uah na Manna na phal lou kei a,amaute adangtak un tui na pia hi.

NEHEMIAH 9: 21Ahi, gamdai ah kum sawmliamaute na vak a,bangmah atasam kei ua;apuansilhte uh atul kei a,akhepekte uh abawk kei hi. 22Huai ban ah lalgamte lehmite amau na pia a,atantuante uh dungzui a na piakkhiakte:Sihon gam, Heshbon kumpipagam leh Bashan kumpipaOg gam alata uhi. 23Van aksite bang in atate uhna pungsak a, nei ding inalut ding uh chi a, api-le-pute kiang a na gen bang in,gamsung ah na pilut hi. 24Huchi in tate alut ua gamaneita ua, ama uah gam atengte na satpuk a,Kanaante, akumpite leh,gam a mite, amau khut ah na pia a,huchi a a-utdan ua atung ua ahihtheihna ding un. 25Khopi hatte, gam hoihte ala ua,thil hoih tengteng a dim innteanei ua, tuibel sekte, grephuante,olive huante, atam a tamtheikungte: huchi in ane ua,avah ua, ahong thau ua,na hoihna thupi ziak in akipak mahmah uhi. 26Hinapi'n lah thu amang kei ua,na tung ah ahel ua,na dan anunglam uah apai ua,na kiang lam amaute ngasak nawn ding a,amaute dem a thugen na zawlneite athat ua,thangpaihna thupi mahmah abawl uhi. 27Huaiziak in amelmate uh khut ahamau na pia a,amau ahihgenthei uh:abuai ni ua na kiang aahong kah lai un, van a kipan in na za a;na zahngaihna tampi dungzui in amelmate uhkhut a kipan a amaute hondam ding inakiang uah hondam mite na pia hi. 28Himahleh atawldam nung un,na ma ah gilou ahih nawn zel ua;huaiziak in amelmate uh khut ah amau na nusia a,huchi in amau atung uah thu anei ua:hinapi in ahong kihei ua,na kiang a akah un,van a kipan na za a;na zahngaihnate dungzui in amautetamveipi na hunkhia hi. 29Na dan a na pilut theih nawnna ding in,amau na dem a:himahleh kisatheitak in ahih ua,na thupiakte alimsak kei ua,na vaihawmte tung ahakhial zosop uhi,huai mi'n ahihleh,huai ah ahing ding,liang asawisak ua,aki-uangsak ua,aza nuam kei uhi.

NEHEMIAH 9: 30Himahleh kum tampi amau na thuakzou a,na zawlneite in na kha zang in amaute na dem a,himahleh angaikhe nuam kei ua;huaiziak in gam mite khut ahamaute na peta hi. 31Huchi napi in na zahngaihna tampiteziak in amaute na hihbeikeuhkeuh kei a,na lehngatsan kei;nang lah hehpih thei leh chingthei Pathian na hi ngal a. 32Huaiziak in tu in,ka Pathian uh,thupi Pathian hat leh kihtakhuai,thukhun leh zahngaihna vompa,na ma ah, ka tung uh,ka kumpipate uh tung,ka vaihawmte uh tung,ka siampute uh tung,ka zawlneite uh tung,ka pipute uh tung, na mite,Assuria kumpipate dam lai akipan a tuni tan,na mite tung a,nauveina bangmah tham lou bang in kilang kei hen. 33Akoi abang hitaleh ka tung uahong tung tengteng ah nangna diktat a; nang lah diktak inna hih ngal a,kou bel giloutak in ka hih uhi. 34Kumpipate leh ka vaihawmteuh hiam, siampute uh hiam,ka pipute uh hiam inna dan azui kei ua,na thupiakte leh na thu theihpihnate,amaute dem a na theihpihnate lahangaikhe nuam sam kei uhi. 35Agam uah nang nna asem kei ua,na hoih mahmahna ziak aamau na piak, ama ua na piak gam lian leh hoih,anasep gilou ua kipan akilehhei sam kei uhi. 36Ngai in, tuni in sikhate ka hi ua,agah nekna ding leh huaiahoihte neihna dia ka pipute uh kiang ana piak gam ahihleh, ngai in,asung ah sikhate ka hi uhi. 37Ka khelhna ziak ua ka tung uana koih kumpipate a ding in anak pun mahmah a,athuthu un, ka pumpite uleh,ka gantate uh tung athilhihtheihna anei ua,kou ka nak gim mahmah uhi.” 38Huan hiaite tengteng huchibang hita mahleh thukhun muanhuai ka bawl ua, ka gelh ua; ka vaihawmte uh, ka Levi mite uleh ka siampute un, huai ah suai akai uhi.

NEHEMIAH 10: 1Suaikaite hiaite ahi uh Nehemiah Tirshatha, Hakaliah tapa leh Zedekiah; 2Seraiah, Azariah, Jeremiah; 3Pashur, Amariah, Malkijah; 4Hattush, Shebaniah, Malluk; 5Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah; 6Daniel, Ginnethon, Baruk; 7Meshullam, Abijah, Mijamin; 8Maaziah, Bilgai, Shemaiah:hiaite siampute ahi uh. 9Levi mite: huaite,Jeshua, Azaniah tapa,Henadad tapa Binnui, Kadmiel; 10Mipite'n Kithukimna Suai Akai Uh 11Mika, Rehob, Hashabiah; 12Zakkur, Sherebiah, Shebaniah; 13Hodiah, Bani, Beninu. 14Mite hausate:Parosh, Pahath-moab,Elam, Zattu, Bani; 15Bunni, Azgad, Bebai; 16Adonijah, Bigvai, Adin; 17Ater, Hezekiah, Azzur; 18Hodiah, Hashum, Bezai; 19Hariph, Anathot, Nebai; 20Magpiash, Meshullam, Hezir; 21Meshezabel, Zadok, Jaddua; 22Pelatiah, Hanan, Anaiah; 23Hoshea, Hananiah, Hasub; 24Hallohesh, Pileha, Shobek; 25Rehum, Hasabnah, Maaseiah; 26Huan Ahijah, Hanan, Anan; 27Malluk, Harim, Baanah.Kithukimna Thu 28Huan mipi lak a adangte, siampute, Levi mite, Kongkhak ngakte, Lasa mite, Nethinim mite leh gamte a mite lak a kipan amau leh amau Pathian dan lam a kituamsehte tengteng, azite uh, atapate uh, atanute uh, michih theihna leh theihtheihna neite. 29A-unaute uh, amiliante uh lam ah abelh tinten ua, Mosi Pathian sikha in apiak Pathian Dan a om ding leh Toupa i Toupa uh thupiak tengteng zui ding leh hih ding a, avaihawmte leh adan thusehte hih ding in hamsia leh kichiamna abawl uhi. 30Huan i tanute gam a mite pe lou ding leh i tapate a dia atanute uh la lou ding in. 31Gam a mite'n Sabbath ni a van hiam an nek hiam zuak ding ahon tawi uleh, Sabbath hiam, ni sianthou ni hiam in huaite i lei kei ding uh; huchi in akum sagihna louhaite lak leh leiba chiteng sik i kidek ding uh. 32Huai lou leng i Pathian uh inn a nasepna ding a kum teng a shekel seh thumna kibasak ding in, thupiakte i kibawl uhi.

NEHEMIAH 10: 33Tanghou koihna ding, anpiak thillat gige a ding, halmang thillat gige a ding, Sabbathte, kha thakte, sehsa ankuangte a ding, thil siangthoute a ding, Israel a dia lemna kithoihna bawlna dia khelhna thillatte a ding leh i Pathian inn ua nasepna tengteng a ding in. 34Ai i san ua, siampute, Levi mite leh mite, sing thillat a ding in, dan a kigelh bang a, i Pathian uh Toupa maitam tung a khul ding, kum teng a, hun sehsa, i pipute inkote dungzui a, i Pathian inn ua laklut ding in. 35 Toupa' inn a, kum teng a, i lei theigah masapente, sing chiteng a gah tengteng a kipan gah masapente, tawi ding in. 36Dan a kigelh bang in, i tapate lak a piang masapen leh i gantate lak a leng, i bawnghonte lak leh i belamhonte lak a nou masapente, i Pathian inn ua nasem siampute kiang a i Pathian inn ua tawi ding in. 37I tangbuang mek masakpen uleh, i vei thillatte uleh, sing chiteng gah, uain leh thau, i Pathian uh inn a dantante ah, siampute kiang ah i tawi ding uh; huan i louma a sawm-a-khatte Levi mite kiang ah; amau, Levi mite'n, singtang khopi tengteng uah sawm-a-khat ala uhi. 38Aaron tapa siampu, Levi mite'n sawm-a-khat alak chiang un, Levi mite kiang ah a-om ding: huchi in Levi mite'n sawm-a-khatte' sawm-a-khat i Pathian inn uah, dantante ah, sumbawm inn ah atawitou ding uhi. 39Israel suante leh Levi tate'n buh-le-bal, uain, thau, thillat mun siang tui-um belsuan nasem siampute, kongkhak ngakte leh lasa mite omna, mun siangthou a atawi ding uh ahi.Huchi in i Pathian inn i nuse kei ding uhi.

NEHEMIAH 11: 1Huchi in mite vaihawmte Jerusalem ah ateng ua: midangte'n leng, khopi siangthou Jerusalem a teng ding sawm lak a khat leh khopi dangte a teng dia seh kuate theihna ding in ai asan uhi. 2Mite'n Jerusalem a teng ding a uttak a amau leh amau kipete tengteng avualzawlta uhi. 3Huchi in Jerusalem a teng bial sung a hausate hiaite ahi uh; himahleh Judah khopite ah michih amau khopite uah michih atan chiat uah amau ateng ua, huaite, Israel siampute, Levi mite leh Nethinim mite leh Solomon sikhate tate. 4Jerusalem ah Judah tate lak a leh Benjamin tate lak a kuate hiam ateng uhi. Judah tate lak ah: Athaiah Uzziah tapa, Zekariah tapa, Amariah tapa, Shephatiah tapa, Mahalalel tapa, Perez tate lak ah; 5Maaseiah Baruk tapa, Kol-hozeh tapa, Hazaiah tapa, Adaiah tapa, Joiarib tapa, Zekariah tapa, Shiloni tapa. 6Jerusalem a teng Perez tapate tengteng pasal hangsan ngen zali sawmguk-le-giat ahi uh. 7Hiaite Benjamin tapate ahi uh: Sallu, Meshullam tapa, Joed tapa, Pedaiah tapa, Kolaiah tapa, Maaseiah tapa, Ithiel tapa, Jeshaiah tapa. 8Huai nung in Gabbai, Sallai, zakua sawmnih-le-giat. 9Huan Zikri tapa Joel aheutu uh ahi: huan Senuah tapa Judah khopi tung a nihna ahi. 10Siampute lak ah: Joiarib tapa Jedaiah, Jakin tapa, 11Jerusalem A Tengte 15Levi mite lak ah: Hassub tapa Shemaiah, Azrikam tapa, Hashabiah tapa, Bunni tapa; 16Shabbethai leh Jozabad, Levi mite hausate lak a, Pathian inn polam nasep a heutu; 17Mika tapa Mattaniah, Zabdi tapa, Asaph tapa, thumna a kipahthu genna pankhe pipen ahi. Huan Bakbukiah, a-unaute lak a nihna; huan Shammua tapa Abda, Galal tapa, Jeduthun tapa. 18Khopi siangthou sung a Levi mite tengteng zanih sawmgiat-le-li. 19Huai ban ah kongkhak ngakte, Akkub, Talmon leh a-unaute uh kongpite ngakte, za sawmsagih-le-nih ahi uhi.

NEHEMIAH 11: 20Huan Israel lak a omlaite, siampute lak a Levi mite, Judah khopite tengteng ah a-om ua, michih agouluahna chiat uah. 21Himahleh Ophel ah Nethinim mite ateng uh; huan mite tung ah Ziha leh Gispa Nethinim a-om uhi. 22Jerusalem a Levi mite heutu leng Bani tapa Uzzi ahi, Hashabiah tapa, Mattaniah tapa, Mika tapa, Asaph tapate, Pathian inn a nasepna a lasa mite; 23amau tungtang thu ah kumpipa a kipan a thupiak, niteng a akiphamoh bang in; lasa mite a ding a dan kipsa lah a-om ngal a. 24Huan Pethahiah, Meshezabel tapa, Judah tapa Zerah tate lak a mipite tungtang thu tengteng amah kumpipa khut ah a-om hi.Kholian Leh Khopi Dang A Tengte 25Khuate, aloute uh toh ahihleh, Judah tate lak a akhenkhatte Kiriath-arba leh akhotate ah, Dibon leh akhotate ah, Jekabzeel leh akhotate ah ateng ua; 26Jeshua leh Moladah leh Bethphelet ah; 27Hazar-shual leh Beer-sheba leh akhotate ah; 28Ziklag leh Mekonah leh akhotate ah; 29Enrimmon leh Zariah leh Jarmuth ah; 30Zanoah, Adullam leh akhotate uah, Lakish leh huai aloute, Azekah leh akhotate. Huchi in Beer-sheba a kipan Hinnom Phaizang tan in giahbuk abawl uhi. 31Benjamin tate leng Geba a kipan in atengtou zel ua, Mikmash leh Aija ah, Bethel leh akhotate ah; 32Anathoth, Nob, Ananiah ah; 33Hazor, Ramah, Gittaim; 34Hadid, Zeboim. Neballat; 35Lod leh Ono, khutsiamte phaizang ah. 36Huan Judah a Levi mite sehkhen bangzah hiam Benjamin toh akizom uhi.

NEHEMIAH 12: 1Huan hiaite Joshua leh Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel toh tontou siampute leh Levi mite ahi uh. 2Siampute:Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezra, Amariah, Malluk, Hattush; 3Shekaniah, Rehum, Meremoth; 4Iddo, Ginnetho, Abijah; 5Miamin, Maadiah, Bilgah; 6Shemaiah, Joiarib, Jedaiah; 7Sallu, Amok, Hilkiah, Jedaiah.Hiaite siampute lak leh a-unaute uh lak aJeshua dam lai a makai lianpente uh ahi. 8Levi mite mah leng:Jeshua, Binnui, Kadmiel, Sherebiah, Judah, Mattaniah, kipahthu genna tung a om, amah leh a-unaute. 9Bakbukiah leh Unni leng, a-unaute uh toh venbuk sung ah a-om uh.Siampu Lian Joshua Suante 10Huan Joshua in Joiakim asuang, Joiakim in Eliashib asuang, Eliashib in Joiada asuang, 11Joiada in Jonathan asuang, Jonathan in Jaddua asuang hi. 12Siampute Leh Levite 13Ezra a pan Meshullam;Amariah a pan Jehohanan; 14Meliku a pan Jonathan;Shebaniah a pan Joseph; 15Harim a pan Adna;Meraioth a pan Helkai; 16Iddo a pan Zekariah;Ginnethon a pan Meshullam; 17Abijah a pan Zikri; Miniamin lak ah,Moadiah a pan Piltai; 18Bilgah a pan Shammua;Shemaiah a pan Jehonathan; 19Joiarib a pan Mattenai;Jedaiah a pan Uzzi; 20Sallai a pan Kallai;Amok a pan Eber; 21Hilkiah a pan Hashabiah; Jedaiah a pan Nethaneel.Siampute leh Levite Chiamtehna 22Eliashib, Joiada, Johanan, Jaddua dam lai in Levi mite, pipute inkote vaihawm makai a gelh ahi uh: Persia mi Darias vaihawm lai a, siampute toh in. 23Levi tapate, pipute inkuan a lupente, khangthubu ah, Eliashib tapa Johanan dam lai tan a gelh ahi.Tempul A Nasepdan Ding Guanna 24Huan Levi mite hausate: Hashabiah, Sherebiah, Kadmiel tapa Jeshua, a-unaute uh toh amau hunbi chiat ah Pathian mipa David thupiak dungzui a kipahthu gen ding in kimaituah in adingh uhi. 25Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon, Akkubte kongpite vankoihna dantan kem kongkhak ngakte ahi uhi.

NEHEMIAH 12: 26Hiaite Jozadak tapa, Jeshua tapa, Joiakim hun lai a damte ahi ua, huan huai tuh ukpipa Nehemiah leh laigelhmi, siampu Ezra hun lai ahi.Nehemiah In Khopi Kulhbaang Alan 27Huan Jerusalem kulhbaang latna a ding in a-omna tengteng uah Levi mite azongkhia ua, kipahna toh, kipahthu genna leh lasak, dakkhutbet, tumgingte leh kaihgingte toh Jerusalem a amaute hon pi ding a, kipahna bawl ding in. 28Huchi in lasa mite tapate akikaikhawm ua, Jerusalem kimvel a phaizang a kipan leh Netophah mite khotate a kipan in; 29Beth-gilgal a kipan in leng, Geba leh Azmaveth loute a kipan in; lasa mite'n lah Jerusalem kimvel in khotate ana bawlta ngal ua. 30Huchi in siampute leh Levi mite akihihsiangthou ua, mite leh kongpite leh kulhbaangte ahihsiangthou uhi. 31Huchih lai in kulhbaang tung ah Judah vaihawmte ka pitou a, kipahthugen leh ahon a pai pawlpi nih ka sep a; huai ah pawl khat kulhbaang tung ah Ekvum Kongpi lam ah apai uhi. 32Amaute nung in Hoshaiah leh Judah vaihawmte lak a kimkhat, 33Azariah, Ezra, Meshullam, 34Judah, Benjamin, Shemaiah, Jeremiah, 35leh siampute tapate lak a kuate hiam pengkulte toh, Zekariah Jonathan tapa, Shemaiah tapa, Mattaniah tapa, Mikaiah tapa, Zakkur tapa, Asaph tapa; 36a-unaute, Shemaiah, Azarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethaneel, Judah, Hanani Pathian mipa David tumging theihte toh; ama uah Ezra laigelhmi a-om hi. 37Tuikhuk kongpi kiang ah, amazawntak uah, David khopi dohkang ah apaitou ua, kulhbaang toupaina ah, David inn tunglam ah, suahlam pang a Tui Kongpi pha in. 38Huan alak ua pawl dang kipahthugente amaute tuak ding in apai ua, kei amau nung ah, kulhbaang tung a, meipi insang tunglam ah, kulhbaang lian tanpha in; 39Ephraim kongpi tung ah, kongpi lui kiang, ngasa kongpi kiang a Hananel insang, Meah insang, Belam Kongpi tanpha in Venna Kongpi ah adingh den uhi.

NEHEMIAH 12: 40Huchi in Pathian insung a kipahthugen pawl nihte leh kei leh ka kiang a vaihawmte lak a akimkhatte adingh ua: 41Siampute, Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Mikaiah, Elioenai, Zekariah, Hananiah, pengkulte toh; 42huan Maaseiah, Shemaiah, Eleazar, Uzzi, Jehohanan, Malkijah, Elam leh Ezer. Huchi in lasa mite'n ngaihtak in, aheutupa uh Jezrahiah toh la asa uhi. 43Huai ni in kithoihna thupite alan ua, nuam asa uhi; Pathian in lah nopsakna thupi in amau nuam asasak hi; numeite leh naupangte toh akipak uhi: huchi in Jerusalem kipahna husa gamlapi tan ah leng zak in a-om hi.Tempul A Biakna Thilpiakte 44Huai ni in thilpiakte, vei thillatte, haithak masapente, sawm-a-khatte koihkhawmna dantante a heutu, Dan in aseh bang a, siampu leh Levite tantuan kho chih in ana hihzoh bang zel ua lakhawm ding mite asep uhi. Judahte bel nasemmi siampute leh Levite ziak in akipak mahmah uhi. 45A Pathian uh indan leh siansakna indan akem ua, huchibang in lasa mite leh kongkhak ngak mite'n David leh atapa Solomon thupiak bang in ahihta uhi. 46David leh nidanglai a Asaph dam lai in lasami heutupen leh Pathian kiang a phatna leh kipahthu genna lasate lah a-om ngal a. 47Huan Zerubbabel dam lai leh Nehemiah dam lai in Israel tengteng in, niteng a akul bang in lasa mite leh kongkhak ngak mite tantuan ape zel uhi: Levi mite a ding in thilsiangte asepsiang ua; Levi mite'n Aaron tapate a ding in asepsiangthou uhi.

NEHEMIAH 13: 1Huai ni in mite zak in Mosi laibu asim ua; Ammon mi leh Moab mi tangtawn in Pathian khawmpi sung a alut ding uh ahi kei chih, huai sung a kigelh amu uhi. 2Tanghou leh tui a Israel suante dawn lou a, amaute hamsiat ding a, amaute siatna ding a Balaam alak ziak un: himahleh i Pathian in hamsia vualzawlna asuaksakta hi. 3Dan azak lai un, hichi ahong hi a, gamdangmi suante a pan Israel mite akikhenkhe tuamta uhi.Nehemiah Puahthaknate 4Huan hiai ma in, siampu Eliashib i Pathian inn ua dantante tung a seh a ompa, Tobiah toh kizom in, 5ama a ding in dantan thupi abawlkhol a, huai ah amalam in anpiak thillatte, begaw leh tui-um belsuante leh buh-le-bal, uain leh thaute sawm-a-khatte akoih ua, huaite bel Levi mite leh lasa mite leh kongkhak ngak mite kiang a thupiak a piak ahi a; huan vei thillatte siampute a ding in. 6Himahleh hiai hunte in, Jerusalem ah ka om kei: Babulon kumpipa Artaksarses kum sawmthum-le-nih kum in kumpipa kiang ah ka hoh a, ni bangzah hiam nung in kumpipa phalna ka ngen hi. 7Huchi in Jerusalem ah ka hong a, Pathian inn pisate sung dantan amah a dia abawlsakna ah, Eliashib in Tobiah a dia gilou ahihdan ka theisiam hi. 8Huchi in kei hon dahsak mahmah a: huaiziak in dantan a kipan in Tobiah inn van tengteng ka lawnkhia hi. 9Huan thu ka pia a, dantante ahihsiang ua: huai ah anpiak thillatte leh begaw toh, Pathian inn a tui-um belsuan ka hon la nawn hi. 10Levi mite tante amau kiang ah piak nai louh in a-om chih ka thei a; huchi in Levi mite leh lasa mite, nasep semte michih aloulam ah ataizak uhi. 11Kei tuh vaihawmte toh ka kiselta ua, bang ding a Pathian inn mangngilh a om ahia?

NEHEMIAH 13: ka chi hi. Amau ka kaikhawm a, amun uah ka koih hi. 12Judah tengteng in buh-le-bal leh uain leh thau sawm-a-khat sumbawm ah ahon tawi uhi. 13Namdang Mite Toh Kikhenna 14Aw ka Pathian, hiai thu ah hon theigige inla, ka Pathian inn a ding a ka nasep hoih ka hihte leh huai a zuih dingte nulmang ke'n. 15Huai lai in Judah ah Sabbath ni a kuate hiam uain suknate chil a, buhphalte hon tawi a, huaite toh asabiltungte van guang ka mu a; uain, grep gahte, theipite van puakgik chi chih, Sabbath ni a Jerusalem a hon tawilutte leng; huan an nekte azuak ni uh huai ni in amaute dem in thu ka gen hi. 16Huai ah Tura mite leng a-om ua, ngasa ahon tawi ua, van chi tuamtuam toh, Judah tate kiang leh Jerusalem ah Sabbath ni in azuak uhi. 17Huchi in ke'n Judahte miliante ka kiselpih a, akiang uah, “Bang thil gilou ahia hiai na hih ua, Sabbath na hihnit uh? 18Na pipute un huchibang in ahih ngei ua hia, i Pathian in eite tung leh hiai khopi tung ah hiai hoih lou tengteng hon tun ahi kei maw? Hinapi in nou Sabbath hihnin in Israel tung ah thangpaihna tamsem na tun ua,” ka chi hi. 19Huan Jerusalem kongpite Sabbath ni ma a khua amial pat in, hichi ahong hi a, kongkhakte khak ding in thu ka pia a, Sabbath ni abei matan kihong lou ding in thu ka pia a, ka sikhate lak a akhen kongpi tung ah ka pangsak a, huchi a Sabbath ni a puakgik ahong kilaklutlouhna ding in. 20Huchi in khatvei hiam nihvei hiam sumsin mite leh van chiteng zuak mite Jerusalem polam ah agiak uhi. 21Amaute dem in thu ka gen a, akiang uah, “Bangziak a kulhbaang kim a giak na hi ua?

NEHEMIAH 13: Na hih nawn uleh, na tung uah khut ka kha ding,” ka chi lai hi. Huai hun a kipan in Sabbath ni in ahong pai nawnta kei uhi. 22Kihihsiangthou ding leh hong kuan a kongpite ngak ding, Sabbath ni siangsak ding in, Levi mite thu ka pia hi. Aw ka Pathian, hiai ah leng kei hon theigige in, na zahngaihna letdan dungzui in kei hon hawi in. 23Huai lai in Judate Ashdod, Ammon leh Moab numeite kitenpihte leng ka mu hi: 24Huchi in atate'n Ashdod pau kimkhat leh namdangte pau azang ua, Judate pau in apau thei kei uhi. 25Amaute ka kiselpih a, ka hamsiatkhum a, alak ua kuate hiam ka khen a, amul uh ka bohkhiaksak a, Pathian min lou in ka kichiamsak a, “Na tanute uh atapate uh a ding in na pe kei ding ua, na tapate uh a ding hiam, noumau a ding hiam in leng atanute uh na la ding uh ahi kei chi in. 26Israel kumpipa Solomon hiaite in akhial kei maw? Hinapi in lah nam tampite lak ah amah bang kumpipa a-om kei a, a Pathian it in a-om a, Israel tengteng tung ah Pathian in kumpipa in abawl hi. Himahleh amah nangawn numei lamdangte'n akhialsak uhi. 27Ahihleh hiai gilou mahmah hih ding in, numei lamdangte kitenpih a i Pathian tung a talek ding in, na thu hon zui ding ka hi uh maw?” 28Joiada tapate lak a khat, siampu lianpen Eliashib tapa, Horon mi Sanballat tanu' pasal ahi a; huaiziak in kei a kipan ka delhkhia hi. 29Aw ka Pathian, siamputna, siamputna thukhun leh Levi mite ahihnit ziak un, amaute theigige in. 30Huchi in mikhualte tengteng a kipan in amaute ka hihsiang a, siampute a ding leh Levi mite a ding in, michih anasep uah, nasepdante ka sehsak a; 31hun sehsa a sing thillat a ding leh gah masa a ding in. Aw ka Pathian, hoihna ding in kei hon theigige in.

ESTHER 1: 1Kumpipa Ahasueras In Kumpinu Vasti Azahlaksak 2Huai lai a, Susa Inpi a kumpipa Ahasueras a gam laltutphah tung a atut lai, 3avaihawm kum thum kum in, avaihawmte leh asikhate tengteng a ding in ankuangluina abawl a; Persia leh Media thuneihna, bialte a miliante leh vaihawmte ama ah a-om uhi. 4Agam thupi hauhsaknate leh avaihawmna sang zahtakhuaina ni tampi, ni za-le-sawmgiat a-ensak hi. 5Huchi in hiai nite zoh in, kumpipa'n Susa Inpi a om mite tengteng, aneu leh alian a ding in kumpipa Kulhpi huangsung ah, ankuangluina ni sagih abawl hi. 6Puan kang khaite, ahing, adum, puanmalngat hoih leh sandup khauzangte a dangka zungbuhte leh suangpak khuamte a henden a-om a, tutna nemte dangka-eng leh dangka a bawl, suangchian suangpak san, ngou, eng leh vom a bawl tung ah a-om uhi. 7Dangka-eng noute in dawn ding amau apia ua, noute akibang kei vek uh; kumpipa uain tampi, kumpipa khuttawi letna dungzui zel in. 8Huchi in dan bang zel in uain dawnna a-om a; kuamah phutluih a-om kei; kumpipa'n a-inn heutu tengteng kiang ah, michih in nuam asak bang zel ua ahih ding un atheisak khin hi. 9Kumpinu Vasti in leng kumpipa Ahasueras inn a om numeite a ding in ankuangluina abawl sam hi. 10Ani sagih ni a, kumpipa lungtang uain a kipak a a-om lai in, Mehuman, Biztha, Harbona, Bigtha leh Abagtha, Zethar leh Karkaste, kumpipa Ahasueras omna a nasem michilgehte thu apia hi. 11Kumpipa ma a kumpi lukhu toh Vasti hon tonpih a, akilawmna mite leh vaihawmte ensak ding in, amah et in ahoih hi. 12Himahleh kumpinu Vasti in michilgehte zang a kumpipa thupiak hoh lou ding in asel a, huaiziak in kumpipa aheh mahmah a, asung ah ahehna akuang hi.

ESTHER 1: 13Huchih lai in hunte thei mipilte kiang ah kumpipa'n, huchibang lah kuapeuh dan leh vaihawmna theite lau a kumpipa omdan sek ahi him hi. 14Amah zom in Karsena, Shethar, Admatha, Tarshish, Meres, Marsena leh Memukan, Persia leh Media vaihawmtu sagihte kumpipa mai mute leh gamsung a tu masate ahi uhi. 15“Michilgehte zang a kumpipa Ahasueras chih ahih louh ziak in, dan dungzui in kumpinu Vasti tung ah bang i hih ding ua?” achi hi. 16Kumpipa leh vaihawmte ma ah Memukan in adawng a, “Kumpinu Vasti kumpipa tung ah kia thil diklou hih ahi kei a, kumpipa Ahasueras bial sung a om vaihawmte tengteng tung leh mite tengteng tung ah leng hih ahi. 17Kumpipa Ahasueras in ama a hong pai ding in kumpinu Vasti thu apia a, himahleh ahong pai kei, chih akigenthang chiang in, hiai kumpinu thilhih numei tengteng kiang atung ding a, amit uah apasalte uh simmohna suaksak ding ahi. 18Tuni a kumpinu thilhih na za Persia leh Media vaihawmte'n kumpipa vaihawmte tengteng kiang ah huchi mah bang in agen ding uh. Huchi in nakpi a kisimmohna leh thangpaihna ahong kipankhe ding hi. 19Kumpipa deihlam ahihleh, amah a kipan kumpi thupiak pekhia henla, kumpipa Ahasueras ma ah Vasti hong pai nawn het lou ding chih, hihlamdan theih louh ding in, Persia mite leh Media mite dante lak ah gelh in om hen; huan kumpipa'n amah sang a hoihzaw midang khat amah kumpi mun leh mual peleh. 20Huchi in kumpipa'n thupiak abawl ding a, gamsung pumpi a akithehzak chiang in, athupi ngal a; zi tengteng in apasalte uh, aliante leh aneute kiang ah zahtakna ape ding uh,” chi in. 21Huchi in thugen in kumpipa leh lalte akipaksak a; huchi in Memukan thu dungzui in kumpipa'n ahihta hi. 22Ama'n lah huai a kigelh dungzui in, kumpipa bial tengteng, bial chiteng leh mi chiteng kiang ah apau uh dungzui in, huchi a michih in ama insung mahmah a dante apuaklut theih a, amite pau dungzui a, athehzak theihna ding in laikhakte akhakta hi.

ESTHER 2: 1Hiai thilte zoh in, kumpipa Ahasueras thangpaihna lungkimsak a om in, Vasti bang ahia ahih, asiatna dia bang ahia thupiak chih atheigige hi. 2Esther Kumpinu Hong Hi 4Huchi in nungak kumpipa lungkimsak pen Vasti sik in kumpinu hi hen,” achi uhi. Huai thil in kumpipa alungkimsak a; huchibang in ahihta hi. 5Susa Inpi ah Juda mi kuahiam, amin Mordekai, Jair tapa, Shimei tapa, Benjamin mi a-om a; 6amah bel Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judah kumpipa Jekoniah apimang a om salte toh pimang in a-om uhi. 7Ama'n Hadassah, huai tuh Esther, apaneu tanu akem piching hi; ama'n nu leh pa anei kei. Huai nungak akilawm in amel ahoih hi, anu leh pa asih un Mordekai in atanu ding in ala hi. 8Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl akizak in, nungak tampi Susa Inpi, Hegai in akaihkhawm a-om lai un, Esther leng kumpipa' inn ah, Hegai, numeite kempa nuai ah ahon pi uhi. 9Huchi in nungak in amah alungkimsak a, ama deihsakna angahta a; ama'n siansakna ding in athilte amah ape pah a, atantuante toh, amah piak ding akilawm, kumpipa' inn a kipan nungak sagih toh; amah leh anungakte numeite inn a mun hoihpen ah asuanta hi. 10Esther in ahihna agenkhe kei a, atanaute hihna leng agenkhe sam kei hi; Mordekai in lah genkhe lou ding in amah athuhilh ngal a. 11Huchi in Mordekai bel niteng in numeite inn mai ah Esther in bangchi in ahih zel a, bang ahong chi dia chih thei ding in ahoh zel hi. 12Numeite a dia dan dungzui a kha sawm-le-nih, murrah thau toh kha guk, gimnamtuite toh kha guk leh numeite siansakna ding a thilte toh, huchibang in asiansakna nite hihkim a a-om nung in, nungak chih kumpipa Ahasueras kiang a ava lut hun uh atungta hi.

ESTHER 2: 13Nungakte kumpipa kiang a alut chiang un, kumpipa' inn a hohpih ding in numeite omna a kipan adeihdeih uh piak in a-om uhi. 14Nitaklam in apai a, azing nawn in numeite inn nihna ah, kumpipa michilgeh Shasgaz, meite kempa inn ah ahong kik a, kumpipa amah ah kipak napi in, kumpipa kiang ah ahong lut kei a, amin a sap in a-om hi. 15Huchi a amah atanu ding a lapa, Mordekai paneu Abihail tanu, Esther kumpipa kiang a ava lut hun ahong tun in, Hegai kumpipa michilgeh, numeite kempa a seh chih ngal louh bangmah akan kei hi. Huchi in amah ente tengteng mitmuh in Esther in deihsakna atang hi. 16Huchi in Esther kumpipa Ahasueras kiang a kumpi inn ah akha sawmna, Tebeth kha a avaihawm kum sagihna kum in laklut in a-omta hi. 17Huchi in kumpipa'n numei tengteng sang in Esther a-it a, nungak siangthoute sang in amitmuh in hehpihna leh deihsakna atang hi. Huchi in alutung ah lallukhu akoih a, Vasti sik in kumpinu ding in amah abawlta hi. 18Huchih lai in kumpipa'n avaihawmte tengteng leh asikhate tengteng a ding in ankuang thupi, “Esther Ankuang mahmah,” aluita a; bialte kiang ah khawlna abawl a, kumpipa siamna bang zel in, thilpiakte apia hi.Mordekai In Kumpipa Hinna Ahondam 19Huchi a nungak siangthoute nihveina dia kaihkhawm a-om lai un, Mordekai bel kumpipa kongpi ah atu hi. 20Esther in atanaute leh amite hihna agenkhe kei; amah kiang a khanletsak a om bangtak in Mordekai thupiak bang in ahih hi. 21Huai lai a, Mordekai kumpipa kongpi a atut lai in, kumpipa michilgeh lak a nih, Bigthan leh Teresh, kongkhak ngakte aheh ua, kumpipa Ahasueras tung a khut kha ding in azongta uhi. 22Huai thil Mordekai in athei a, ama'n kumpinu kiang ah atheisak hi. Esther in Mordekai min in huai akumpipa ahilhta hi. 23Huchi in athu akikanleh, huchibang ahi ngei chih akimukhia a, anih un sing dawn ah khailup in a-om uhi. Hiai thu tanchin gelhna laibu ah kumpipa ma ah akigelh hi.

ESTHER 3: 1Hiai thilte nung in kumpipa Ahasueras in Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman akaisangsak a, malam anawtsak a, akiang a om vaihawmte tengteng tunglam ah atutphah akoih hi. 2Huchi in kumpipa'n amah tungtang thu huchibang a apiak bang in kumpipa sikha tengteng, kumpipa kongpi a omte Haman azahna pia in akun uhi. Himahleh Mordekai akun kei a, amah zahna abawl kei hi. 3Judate Thahgamna Dia Haman Thilgel 4Huan hichi ahong hi a, niteng a amah ahoupih lai un, amau angaikhe kei a, Mordekai thu pai ding hia pai lou ding chih thei ding in Haman ahilh ua; amah Juda mi ahi chih amaute ahilhta hi. 5Huchi a Mordekai niamchik a kun lou in, amah azahtak kei chih Haman in atheih in, aheh mahmah hi. 6Himahleh Mordekai tung kia a khut khak bang tham lou in angaihtuah a; Mordekai mite lah amah a-ensakta ngal ua; huchi in Haman in Ahasueras gam pumpi a om Judate tengteng, Mordekai mite, hihgawp ding in azongta hi. 7Kumpipa Ahasueras vaihawm akum sawm-le-nih ni, akha khatna, Nisan kha in, “Pur,” asan ua, huai tuh aisan ahi, Haman ma ah, niteng in, kha teng in, akha sawm-le-nih, Adar kha tan in. 8Huan Haman in kumpipa Ahasueras kiang ah, “Mi kuate hiam kithehzak a na gam bial sung tengteng a mite lak a dalh a-om ua; adante uh mi tengteng dan toh akibang kei a; kumpipa dante azui kei uhi. Huaiziak in amaute thuakzoh kumpipa punna ding ahi kei hi. 9Kumpipa deihlam ahihleh, hihsiat a a-omna ding un lai kigelhleh, kumpipa nasepna a heutute khut ah ke'n dangka talent singkhat ka pe ding, kumpipa sumbawmte a tawilut ding in,” achi hi. 10Huchi in akhut a kipan kumpipa'n azungbuh asuah a, Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman, Judate melmapa kiang ah apia hi.

ESTHER 3: 11Huchi in kumpipa'n Haman kiang ah, “Dangka na kiang a piak ahi, mipi leng, amau tung a pha na saksak hih ding in,” achi hi. 12Huchih lai in akha khatna, ani sawm-le-thum ni in, kumpipa laigelhmite asamlut ua, kumpipa heutu liante leh kumpipa bial chih a omte tengteng leh mi chiteng vaihawmte Haman in thu apiak peuhmah dungzui in akigelhta hi. Bial chih kiang ah huai a kigelh dungzui in, michih kiang ah apau bang zel un; kumpipa Ahasueras min in akigelh a, kumpipa zungbuh in suai akisawn hi. 13Huchi in Adar kha, akha sawm-le-nih, ani sawm-le-thum ni mahmah a, ni khat a, Juda mite tengteng atek-akhang naupang noute leh numeite hihsiat ding, that ding leh mangthangsak ding in, kumpipa bial sung tengteng ah dak in laikhakte akhak ua, asum uh gallak a laksak ding in. 14Laigelh teisawn, thupiak bial teng a piakkhiak ding leh huai ni a dia mansa a om chiat ding in, mi tengteng kiang ah asuah uhi. 15Kumpipa thupiak in dakte kinohtak in asawlkhia ua, Susa Inpi ah thupiak akipekhia hi. Huchi in dawn ding in kumpipa leh Haman atu ua; himahleh Susa khopi ahamhaihsak hi.

ESTHER 4: 1Huchi a thil kihih tengteng Mordekai in atheih in, apuante abotkek a, vut toh sai-ip puan asilh a, khopi laizang ah apaikhia a, ngaihtak leh nakpi in akap hi. 2Kumpipa kongpi mai pha in ahong pai a, sai-ip puansilh mi kuamah lah kumpipa kongpi sung ah alut thei kei hi. 3Huchi in bial chiteng a, koi lai peuh a kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl tunna ah, Judate lak ah nakpitak a suunna, an ngawlna, kahna, mauna a-om hi. Huchi in mi tampi sai-ip puan silh in, vut lak ah alum uhi. 4Mordekai In Esther Panpihna Angen 5Huchi in Esther in Hatak, kumpipa michilgehte lak a khat asam a, amah vil ding a kumpipa'n aseh, Mordekai kiang a hoh ding in thu apia hi, hiai bang thu ahi, bangziak a hichi ahia chih thei ding in. 6Huchibang in kumpipa kongpi mai a om, khopi mun za ah Mordekai kiang ah Hatak ava pawtkhia hi. 7Mordekai in atung a tung tengteng thu amah ahilh a, Judate a dia, amaute hihsiatna ding, kumpipa sumbawmte a Haman in dangka sum piak ding a achiam zah geih ahilh hi. 8Huai lou leng Esther kiang a lak ding leh akiang a puan ding in amaute hihsiatna ding a Susa a thubawl piakkhiak laigelh kiteisawn amah apia a; kumpipa kiang ava hoh ding a hilh ding in, akiang athumna va bawl ding leh amite a dia, ama a ngetna va bawl ding in. 9Huchi in Hatak ahong a Mordekai thute Esther ahilh hi. 10Huchih lai in Esther in Hatak kiang ah thu agen a, Mordekai a ding thukhah apia hi.

ESTHER 4: 11“Kumpipa sikhate tengteng leh kumpipa bialte a mite'n athei kilkel uhi, mi kuapeuh numei, pasal leng, sap louh a, kumpipa pisa sungnungzaw pen a ahoh uleh, amah a ding in dan khat a-om a, ‘Sihsak ding,’ chih leh ‘Ahing ding,’ chi a, kumpipa'n dangka-eng kumpi chiang aletkhumte chih louh ngal, himahleh hiai ni sawmthum sung kumpipa kiang a hong pai ding in sap in ka om nai kei hi,” chi in. 12Huan Esther thute Mordekai ahilh uhi. 13Huchih lai in Mordekai in Esther kiang a dawnna va tun nawn ding in amau achi a, “Juda tengteng sang a, kumpipa insung a nang na suahtak tuan ding kingaihtuah het ke'n. 14Nang hiai hun a bangmah gen lou a na daih dideleh, mun dang a kipan in Judate ding in panpihna leh hutkhiakna ahong om ding a, himahleh nang leh na pa inkote na mangthang ding uh: hun hichibang a dia hong lal na hih mel kua'n athei a?” 15Huchi in Esther in Mordekai kiang a dawnna va tun ding in amau achi hi. 16“Kuan inla, Susa a om Judate tengteng kaikhawm inla kei a ding in an ngawl unla, ni thum, zan hiam sun hiam: nek lah ne kei unla, dawn leng dawn kei un. Huchi mah bang in ke'n leng ka nungakte toh an ka ngawl ding uh; huai chiang in kumpipa kiang ah ka hoh ngeingei ding, dan bang zaw ahi kei a, huchi a ka manleh, mang ka himai ding,” achi hi. 17Huchi in Mordekai akuan a, Esther in amah thu apiak tengteng bang in agamta hi.

ESTHER 5: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni in, Esther in akumpi puansilh asilh a, kumpipa' inn zawn a, kumpipa pisa sungnungzaw pen ah ava dingh a; kumpipa bel inn lutna zawn a, kumpi inn ah alaltutphah tung ah atu hi. 2Hichibang ahi a, kumpipa'n pisa a kumpinu Esther dingh amuh in, amitmuh in deihsakna atangta: kumpipa'n akhut a om dangka-eng kumpi chiang Esther lam ah alik hi. Huchi in Esther ahong painai a, kumpi chiangdawn ahong khoih hi. 3Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bang na deih a, kumpinu Esther? Na ngetna bang ahia? Gam kimkhat tan leng piak na hi ding,” achi hi. 4Huchi in Esther in, “Kumpipa'n hoih asakleh tuni in kumpipa leh Haman amah a dia ka bawl an nekna ah hong pai un,” achi hi. 5Esther In An Ne Ding In Kumpipa Leh Haman Achial 6Huan uain adawn lai un kumpipa'n Esther kiang ah, “Bang ahia na thumna? Phal ahihtheihna ding in bang ahia na ngetna? Gam kimkhat tan in leng piak ahi ding,” achi hi. 7Esther in adawng a, “Ka thumna leh ka ngetna hiai ahi: 8Kumpipa mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh, ka thumna phal ding leh ka ngetna bawl ding a kumpipa alungkimleh, kumpipa leh Haman, amau a dia ka bawl ding an nekna ah hong le uh, kumpipa'n achih bang in zingchiang in ka hih ding,” achi hi.Haman In Mordekai Thah Atum 9Huchi in huai ni in nuamsa leh lung kipak in Haman apaikheta a: himahleh Mordekai kumpipa kongpi a om, Haman in ama a Mordekai dingh lou a tat leng tang lou amuh in, atung ah aheh mahmah hi. 10Huchi in leng Haman aki-ip teitei a, inn ah apaita; huan mi asawl a alawmte leh azi Zeresh ahon tonpih hi.

ESTHER 5: 11Haman in akiang uah, ahauhsakna thupina leh atate tamdan leh kumpipa'n akaisansakna thil tengteng leh kumpipa sikhate vaihawmte tung a amasak tuamdan agen hi. 12Haman in, ahi, “Esther in an nekna abawl ah kumpipa toh kei chih louh ngal mi kuamah ahohsak kei; zingchiang in leng kumpipa toh kei ahon sam hi. 13Himahleh Mordekai huai Juda mipa, kumpipa kongpi a tu ka muh lai teng hiaite tengteng kei a ding in bangmah aphatuam kei,” achi lai hi. 14Huchi in azi Zeresh leh alawmte'n akiang ah, “Khailupna khuam tong sawmnga a sang kibawl henla, zingsang in nang kumpipa kiang ah thu gen inla, huai a Mordekai khailup ahihtheihna ding in; huchi in vualnuamtak in kumpipa toh an nekna ah na hoh ding uh,” achi uhi. Hiai in Haman akipaksak a; huchi in khailupna khuam abawlsakta hi.

ESTHER 6: 1Huai zan in kumpipa a-ihmu thei kei; tanchin chiamtehna laibu hon tawi ding in thu apia a, huaite kumpipa ma ah asim uhi. 2Kumpipa michilgehte lak a mi nih Bigthan leh Teresh, kongkhak vengte'n, kumpipa Ahasueras tung a khut khak sawmte tanchin Mordekai in agen chih kigelhna muh in a-om hi. 3Huchi in kumpipa'n, “Hiai ziak in Mordekai tung ah bang zahtakna leh thupina hih in a-om a?” achi hi. Kumpipa sikha amah nasemte'n, “Amah a ding in bangmah hih a-om kei,” achi uhi. 4Kumpipa'n, “Pisa a om kua ahia?” achi a. Huchi in Haman, kumpipa' inn pisa ponungzaw ah, kumpipa kiang a abawlkholhsa khailupna khuam a Mordekai khai ding thu gen ding in ahong hi. 5Kumpipa sikhate'n akiang ah, “Ngai in pisa ah Haman adingh nilouh hi,” achi ua. Kumpipa'n, “Hong lut heh,” achi hi. 6Kumpipa'n Mordekai Apahtawi 7Haman in kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa'n apahtawi nopmi a ding in, 8kumpipa'n asilh zel kumpi puansilh hon lakhia henla, sakol kumpipa tuan zelna leng, aluzang a lallukhu akoihna zel: 9Huchi in puansilh leh sakol kumpipa vaihawmpih thupi penpente lak a khat khut ah pekheleh, huaite akumpipa'n zahtak a-utpa azeptheihna ding un leh khopi kongzing lak ah sakol tung ah tuangsak henla, ama ah, huchibang in kumpipa'n apahtawi nopte kiang ah hih in a-om ding, chi in puang leng,” achi hi. 10Huai laitak in kumpipa'n Haman kiang ah, “Kin inla, na chih bang in, puansilh leh sakol la inla, kumpipa kongpi a tu zel Juda mi Mordekai tung ah hih in: na gen tengteng bangmah vuaksuak kei hen,” achi hi. 11Huchi in Haman in puansilh leh sakol ala a, Mordekai azem a, khopi kongzing lak ah atuangsak a, ama ah, “Hichibang in kumpipa'n azahtak nopmi tung a ahih ahi ding,” chi in apuangta hi.

ESTHER 6: 12Huan kumpipa kongpi ah Mordekai ahong pai nawn hi. Himahleh Haman bel suun leh alutang khuhsa in a-inn lam ah kintak in apai hi. 13Huchi in Haman in azi Zeresh kiang leh alawmte tengteng kiang ah atung a thil tung tengteng agen vek hi. Huaitak in amipilte leh azi Zeresh in akiang ah, “Ama a na puk patna Mordekai, Juda chi a mi ahihleh, amah na zou kei ding, himahleh ama ah na puk ngei ding,” achi uhi.Haman Kiakniamna 14Amah toh ahoulim san lai un, kumpipa michilgehte ahong pai ua, Esther in an nek ding abawlna a ding in kintak in hong pita uhi.

ESTHER 7: 1Huchi in kumpipa leh Haman kumpinu Esther toh an nekna ah ahong uhi. 2Uain adawn lai un ani nih ni in kumpipa'n Esther kiang ah, “Bang ahia na thumna, kumpinu Esther? Ahon phalsak ding uh bang ahia na ngetna? Gam kimkhat leng piak in na om ding,” achi hi. 3Huchi in Esther kumpinu'n adawng a, “Aw kumpipa, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan a, kumpipa kipahna ahihleh, ka thumna ah ka hinna leh ka mite hinna piak in om hen: 4Zuak in ka omta ua, kei leh ka mite, hihgawp a om ding in, thah a om ding in leh hihmang ding in. Sikhapa ding leh sikhanu ding a zuak a om hi le ung zaw, melma in kumpipa siatna gun bawl theita kei mahleh, dai dide ding hi veng in,” achi hi. 5Kumpipa Ahasueras in thu agen a, kumpinu Esther kiang ah, “Kua ahia, koi a om ahia, huchibang a lungtang sung a tum ngam?” achi hi. 6Esther in, “Melma leh gal, hiai giloupa Haman mah,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa leh kumpinu ma ah Haman alauta hi. 7Huchi in uain dawnkhamna a kipan aheh ziak in kumpipa adingkhia a, inpi huansung ah alut a; huchi in kumpinu Esther kiang a ahinna ngen ding in Haman adingh hi; kumpipa'n asiatna ding in hoih lou a tup a-om chih lah athei ngal a. 8Kumpipa Kulhpi huan a kipan uain an nekna mun ah ahong kik a; huchi in Esther omna tutphah nem tung ah Haman apuk hi. Kumpipa'n, “Inn sung a ka ma a kumpinu nangawn sual ding ahi hia?” achi hi. Kumpipa kam a thupawt bang in, Haman maitang atuamsakta uhi. 9Huai lai in kumpipa ma a om zel michilgehte lak a khat, Harbonah in, “En un, Haman in Mordekai, kumpipa gum a thugenpa a dia abawl, khailupna khuam tong sawmnga a sang, Haman inn ah adingh hi,” achi hi. Huan kumpipa'n, “Huai ah amah khailum un,” achi hi. 10Huchi in Mordekai a dia abawlkholhsak khailupna khuam ah Haman akhailumta uhi. Huchi in kumpipa thangpaihna adaita hi.

ESTHER 8: 1Huai ni in kumpipa Ahasueras in kumpinu Esther kiang ah Judate melmapa Haman inn apia hi. Kumpipa ma ah Mordekai ahong a; Esther in amah a ding in kua ahia chih agen khinta hi. 2Huchi in kumpipa'n azungbuh asuah a, Haman a kipan alak, Mordekai kiang ah apeta hi. Esther in Haman inkote tung ah Mordekai akoihta hi. 3Esther in kumpipa ma ah thu agen lai a, akhebul a puk in, Agag mi Haman gilou bawl leh Judate siatna ding a alunggel khitsa a lunggelna koihmang ding in khitui toh amah angen ngutngut hi. 4Huchi in kumpipa'n Esther lam ah adangka-eng kumpi chiang alen a. Huchi in Esther athou a kumpipa ma ah adingh hi. 5Ama'n, “Kumpipa lungkimna ahih a, amitmuh a deihsakna ka tan a, kumpipa ma a thil dik a alat a, amuh a lungkimhuai ka hihleh, Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman in laikhak abawlte kumpipa bial a om Judate hihsiatna ding a agelh sut in om hen. 6Huchi lou in ka mite tung a gilou tung ding ke'n bangchi in ka en ngam dia? Ahihkeileh ka tanaute siatna bangchi in ka mu ngam dia?” achi hi. 7Kumpipa Ahasueras in kumpinu Esther kiang leh Juda mi Mordekai kiang ah, “Ngai un, Judate tung a akhut akhak ziak in, Haman inkote leh khailupna khuam a akhailuppa uh amah Esther kiang ah apeta hi. 8Kumpipa Ahasueras Thuseh Thak 9Huchi in kumpipa laigelhmite asam ua, akha thumna Sivan kha a, ani sawmnih-le-thum ni in;

ESTHER 8: Judate tungtang thu Mordekai in thu apiak bang in gam heutute kiang leh India a kipan Ethiopia pha a om bialte ukpipate leh vaihawmte, bial zakhat sawmnih-le-sagih, huai a kigelhdan bang zel a bial chiteng kiang, mi chih apau uh dungzui zel in, alaigelh uh bang zel a Judate, apau uh bang zel in akiang uah gelh in a-omta hi. 10Kumpipa Ahasueras min in agelh a, kumpipa zungbuh in asawn a, kumpipa nasepna a kizangsek sakol man-gang, hoihtak a vulhte a tuang in sakol tung ah dak in laikhakte akhakta hi. 11Huai ah kumpipa'n khopi chiteng a om Judate kikhawmkhawm a, ahinna ua dia pang a, amaute sual ding a anau neute uleh anumeite uh, asum uh gallak a la ding a kisa mite leh bial thilhihtheihna hihse ding leh mangthangsak ding in phalna apia hi. 12Kumpipa Ahasueras bial tengteng ah ni khat in, huai bel, akha sawm-le-nih, Adar kha ahi a, ani sawm-le-thum ni geih in. 13Bial chih a piak ding chi a thupiak, kigelh a teisawn mite tengteng kiang ah suah in a-om a, huai ni chiang a Judate'n amelmate uh tung a phu la dia mansa a a-om chiat theihna ding un. 14Huchi in dak kumpipa nasepna a zat sakol man-gangte tung a tuangte apaikhia ua, kumpipa thupiak in amau anoh in akhawksak ngal ua; thupiak pen Susa Inpi a piakkhiak ahi. 15Huchi in Mordekai bel kumpi puandum leh kang, dangka-eng lallukhu thupitak toh, puanaktual puanmalngat hoih leh sandup toh kumpipa ma a kipan apaikheta hi: Susa khopi akikou a, akipak hi. 16Huchi in Judate'n kouzanna leh kipahna, nopna leh zahna anei uhi. 17Bial chih leh khopi chih a koi lai peuh a kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl paina peuh ah, Judate'n ankuangluina leh ni hoih kipahna leh nopna anei uhi. Huchi in gam a mite lak a tampite Judate ahong hi ua; Judate launa lah atung uah ahong omta hi.

ESTHER 9: 1Huan akha sawm-le-nih, Adar kha, huai mah ani sawm-le-thum ni, kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl tangtunna ding ahong nai lai in, Judate melmate'n atung ua vaihawmna neih akilamet ni uh; hinapi a, ahilou lam a hong kilehbut a, Judate'n amau mudahte tung a vaihawmna ahon neih lai un; 2Kumpipa Ahasueras bial tengteng akhopite uah Judate, amau siatna zongte tung a khut kha ding in, akikhawmkhawm ua: kuamah in lah amaute anangzou kei uhi; mite tengteng tung ah lah amaute launa ahong omta hi. 3Huchi in bialte a vaihawmte leh gamuk mite leh ukpipate leh kumpipa nasemte'n, Judate apanpih ua; Mordekai launa lah atung uah ahong om ngal a. 4Kumpipa' inn ah Mordekai athupi a, bial tengteng ah amin athangkheta hi: hiai mipa Mordekai lah ahong thupi semsem hi. 5Huchi in namsau a sat in Judate'n amelmate tengteng athat ua, thahna leh hihsiatna in, amaute mudahte tung ah ahih ding uh ahihta uhi. 6Susa Inpi ah Judate'n mi zanga athat ua ahihgawp uhi. 7Parsandatha, Dalphon, Aspatha, 8Poratha, Adalia, Aridatha, 9Judate'n Amelmate Uh Ahihsia Uh 10Judate melmapa Hammedatha tapa Haman tapate, athat ua; himahleh gallak ah akhut uh anga kei uhi. 11Huai ni in Susa Inpi a thah a om zah kumpipa ma ah ahon tawi uhi. 12Huan kumpipa'n kumpinu Esther kiang ah, “Judate'n Susa Inpi sung ah mi zanga athat ua ahihsia uh, Haman tapa sawmte toh; kumpipa bial dangte ah bang achi bawlta phet ding uam ah: Khai le, bang ahia na nget? Na kiang ah phal ahi ding; ahihkeileh bang ngetbeh na nei lai a? Suk pichin ahi ding,” achi hi. 13Esther in, “Kumpipa' lungkimna ahihleh, zingchiang a tuni a thupiak bangbang a gamtang ding in Susa a om Judate phal inla, Haman tapa sawmte khailupna khuam ah kikhai le uh,” achi hi.

ESTHER 9: 14Huchi in huchibang a hih ahi ding chi in kumpipa'n thu apia hi: Susa ah thubawl akipekhia a: huchi in Haman tapa sawmte akhaita uhi. 15Adar kha mah ani sawm-le-li ni in Susa a om Judate akikhawmkhawm ua, Susa ah mi zathum athat uh; himahleh gallak tung ah akhut uh anga kei uhi. 16Huchi in kumpipa bialte a om Juda dangte akikhawmkhawm ua, ahinna uh ahum ua, amelmate ua kipan khawlna anei ua, amau mudahte lak ah mi singsagih-le-sangnga athat ua; himahleh gallak tung ah akhut uh anga kei uh. 17Adar kha ani sawm-le-thum ni in hiai tuh hih ahi; huai mah ani sawm-le-li ni in akhawl ua, ankuanglui ni leh kipahna ni in azang uhi. 18Himahleh Susa a om Judate akikhawm ua, ani sawm-le-thum ni in leh ani sawm-le-li ni in; huai mah ani sawm-le-nga ni in akhawlta ua, ankuanglui ni leh kipahna ni in azang uhi. 19Huaiziak in khoneute a Judate, kho kulhbaang nei lou a tengte'n, Adar kha ani sawm-le-li ni kipahna ni leh ankuanglui ni in, ni hoih, khat-le-khat tantuan kikhaktuahna ni in azang uhi.Purim Kut Kipatna 20Huan Mordekai in hiai thilte agelh a, kumpipa Ahasueras bial tengteng a om Judate, gamla leh nai a omte kiang ah akhak hi. 21Kum teng a, Adar kha ani sawm-le-li leh ani sawm-le-nga ni, kum teng a tan ding ahilhna ding in, 22Judate amelmate ua kipan akhawl ni uh, amau a dia lungkhamna kipahna ahong hihna kha, misi suunna ni hoih ahong hihna kha bang in: huai nite ankuangluina leh kipahna ni a a-om ua, tantuante khat-le-khat akikhaktuah uhi; gentheite kiang a thilpiakte piakna aneihtheihna ding un. 23Huchi in Judate'n apatkhitsa bang un leh Mordekai in amaute kiang a agelh khitsa bang in hih ding in atheisiam uhi.

ESTHER 9: 24Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman, Juda tengteng melmapa'n Juda tengteng siatna ding amau hihse ding, angaihtuah a, amaute hihgawp ding leh amaute hihse ding a, Pur, (huai tuh aisan ahi) ana paih ziak in. 25Himahleh athu kumpipa ma ahong tun in, angaihtuah gilou, Judate siatna ding a angaihtuah, ama lutung mahmah a kibung ding in laikhakte in thu apeta a; huchi a amah leh atapate khailupna khuam a khai a a-omna ding un. 26Huchibang ahih ziak in hiai nite Pur min zui in Purim asa uhi. Huaiziak in hiai laikhak thute tengteng ziak leh hiai thu tungtang thu amuhsa uh, atung ua ahong tun ziak in. 27Judate'n ahihkip ua, amau tung leh asuante uh tung leh amaute huchibang akizomkhawm bangte tengteng tung ah akisuanta uhi, huchi a pel lou a, huai a laigelh dungzui leh huai a hun sehsa dungzui a, kum chiteng a hiai ni nihte atantheihna ding un. 28Huchi a hiai nite akhang-akhang a, a-inkuankuan a, bial chiteng leh khopi chiteng atheihgigeleh tan a a-omtheihna ding in; huchi a hiai Purim nite Judate lak a kipan a azuau louh a, huaite theihgigena leng asuante uh a kipan amanlouhna ding in. 29Huchi in kumpinu Esther, Abihail tanu leh Juda mi Mordekai in, hiai Purim laikhak nihna sukkipna ding in thuneihna tengteng in agelhta uhi. 30Judate tengteng kiang ah, Ahasueras gam a bial zakhat sawmnih-le-sagihte kiang ah, lungmuanna leh thutak thute, laikhakte akhakta hi. 31Hiai Purim nite a hun asehsa uh, Juda mi Mordekai leh kumpinu Esther in huaite pha asak uh dungzui leh amau a ding leh asuante uh a dia, an ngawlna leh akahna thu ua ana hihkip bang ua hihkip ding in. 32Esther thupiak in hiai Purim thute ahihkip a; laibu ah kigelh ahita hi.

ESTHER 10: 1Huan kumpipa Ahasueras in gam tung leh tuipi tuikulh gam tung ah siah abawlta hi. 2Huchi in athilhihtheihna leh ahatna thilhihte tengteng leh Mordekai, kumpipa'n amah akoihsanna, letna genna kim, Media leh Persia kumpipate chiamtehna laibu a gelh ahi kei uh maw? 3Juda mi Mordekai, kumpipa zom a Judate lak a lian ahi, a-u anau mi tampi in apom uh ahi. Ama'n mite hoihna ding zong a nasem achipihte tengteng kiang ah lemna thu agen hi. 10Mordekai Minthanna

JOB 1: 1Setan In Job Aze-et 2Ama'n tapa sagih leh tanu thum anei hi. 3Aneih-le-lam leng belam sangsagih, sangawngsau sangthum, bawngtal zanga leh sabiltungnu zanga leh inkuan thupi mahmah ahi, huchi in hiai mipa suahlam tate tengteng lak a thupipen ahi. 4Huan atapate akuan ua khat chiat inn ah, ani ni in ankuangluina anei ua; huchi in mi asawl ua asanggam numei thumte uh amau kiang a ne ding leh dawn ding in asamsak uhi. 5Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-ankuanglui san laitak un, Job in mi asawl a amaute ahihsiangthou a, zingsang beltak in athou a, avek ua zah dungzui in halmang thillatte alan a: Job in, “Ka tapate'n thil ahihkhial un, alungtang un Pathian ahamsiat kha ding uh,” achi hi. Hichibang in Job in ahih gige hi. 6Huchi in Toupa ma a Pathian tapate ahong kilak ni uh a-om a, alak uah Setan leng ahong pai hi. 7Huchi in Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Koi a hong kipan na hia?” achi hi. Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Leitung langkhat langkhat tawn a, asung a sukvak-touvak ka hi,” achi hi. 8 Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ka sikha Job na ngaihtuah ngei hia? Amah bang a hoihkim leh mitang, Pathian kihta a hoih lou mudah lei ah lah kuamah a-om ngal kei a,” achi hi. 9Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Bangmah lou dia Job in Pathian kihta ahi maw? 10Amah kimvel in, a-inn kimvel in leh aneih tengteng kimvel in, ning chiteng ah umna na bawl kei maw? Akhut nasep na vualzawl a, gamsung ah aneih-le-lam apung hi. 11Himahleh tu in na khut zankhia inla, aneih tengteng khoih in, huchi in na maitang ah nang ahon gense mai ding hi,” achi hi. 12 Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ngai in, aneih tengteng nang thu ahi;

JOB 1: amah mah tung ah kia na khut kha ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa ma a kipan in Setan akuankhia hi.Job Tate Leh Ahauhsakna Hihsiatsak In A-om 13Huan atapate leh atanute'n a-unaupa uh upapen inn a ne a uain adawn ni uh a-om a, 14Job kiang ah sawltak khat hong pai in, “Bawngtalte'n lei alet ua, sabiltungte akiang ah agamta ua, 15Sheba mite'n amau adelh ua, apimang uh; ahi, namsau hiam in sikhate athat ua; huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi. 16Huchi a thu agen lai in midang khat leng ahong a, “Van a kipan in Pathian mei akia a, belamte leh sikhate akangmang a, amau akangtum hi; huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi. 17Huchi a thu agen lai in, midang khat ahong lai a, “Kaldai mite'n pawl thum abawl ua, sangawngsaute adelh ua, apimang uh, huan namsau hiam in sikhate athat ua; huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi. 18Huchi a thu agen lai in, midang khat mah ahong a, “Na tapate leh na tanute'n a-unaupa upapen inn a anek ua uain adawn lai un, 19ngai in gamdai a kipan in huih thupi ahong nung a, huai inn ning lite ahon nuai a, tangvalte tung ah achim a, asi uh: huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi. 20Huchi in Job athou a, apuanaktual abotkek a, asam ametsiang a, leitual kidenna in anei a, Pathian abeta hi. 21Ama'n, “Ka nu sul a kipan vuaktang in ka hong a, huan vuaktang in ka kik ding, Toupa'n apia a, huan Toupa'n alamangta; Toupa min phat in om hen,” achi hi. 22Hiai tengteng ah Job in ahihkhial kei a, haihuaitak in Pathian leng amohsa kei hi.

JOB 2: 1 Toupa Pathian tapate ahong kilak ni uh a-om nawn a, huan Toupa ma a kilak ding in alak uah Setan leng ahong pai hi. 2Setan In Job Aze-et Nawn 3Huan Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ka sikha Job na ngaihtuah ngei hia? Amah bang a hoihkim leh mitang, Pathian kihta a hoih lou mudah lei ah lah kuamah a-om ngal kei a; ama siatna ding in hon tangsak mah lechin, aginomna alen tinten hi,” achi hi. 4Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Vun sik in vun, ahi, mihing in aneih tengteng hinna sik in ape ding hi. 5Himahleh tu in na khut kha inla, aguh leh asa khoih lechin, na maitang ah nang hon gense ding hi,” achi hi. 6Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ngai in, amah na khut ah a-om hi; ahinna lel hawi in,” achi hi. 7Huchi in Toupa ma a kipan in Setan apawtkhia a, meimatum in akhepek nuai a kipan aluzang tan in Job agawt hi. 8Huchi in ama'n kikhuatna ding in belpei ala a; meivu lak ah atu hi. 9Huai lai in azi in akiang ah, “Na ginomna len tinten lailai na hi hia? Pathian gensia inla, si in,” achi hi. 10Himahleh akiang ah, “Numei hai thugente lak a khat bang in thu na gen a. Bang ahia? Pathian khut ah hoih i mu dia, hoih lou leng i mu kei dia hia?” achi hi. Hiai tengteng ah Job in amuk in thil ahihkhial kei hi.Job Lawmte'n Hong Veh Uh 11Huchi a Job lawm thumte'n atung a hiai hoih lou hong tung tengteng azak un, michih ama mun a kipan in ahong ua: Teman mi Eliphaz, Shuah mi Bildad leh Naaman mi Zophar, amah kah ding leh amah lungmuan ding in hohkhawm ding in hun seh abawl uhi. 12Huchi a gamlapi a pan adaktouh uleh, amah athei kei ua, nakpi in akikoukhia ua, akapta uhi. Apuanaktual uh michih in abotkek ua, alutang uah van lam ah leivui akibuak uhi. 13Huchi in akiang ah leitual ah ni sagih leh zan sagih atu ua, akiang ah kuamah in thu khat leng agen kei uh; alungkhamna anasa mahmah chih amu uhi.

JOB 3: 1Hiai khit in Job in akam aka a, ani ahamsiat hi. 2Job in adawng a, hichi in achi.Job 3“Ka pian ni leh zan,pasal naupang pai in a-om,akichihna mangthang hen. 3Pathian Kiang A Job Phunna 4Huai ni mialna hi hen;tunglam a kipan Pathian in ngaihsak kei hen, atung ahleng khovak tang kei hen. 5Khomial leh sihna lim in amau a ding in huai ngen uhen;atung ah meipi kai hen;khua nimsak tengteng in huai tuh lausak uhen. 6“Zan ahihleh, mial sahbikbek atung ah tu hen;kum nite lak ah telsak kei hen;khate simna ah tel kei heh. 7Ngai in, huai zan hut henla;huai ah kipah aw ging kei hen. 8Huai ni hamsiatte amau hamsiat uhen,Leviathan tokthou ding amansa a omte. 9Huai a khomui aksite mial uhen; khovak zong henla,himahleh bangmah nei kei hen;zingsang mitvunte leng mu sam kei hen. 10Ka nu sul kongkhakte akhak louh ziak in,ka mit a kipan abuaina asel louh ziak in. 11“Sul a kipan bangziak a si lou ka hia?Gil a kipan ka hong paikhiak lai a bangziak a kha khah lou ka hia? 12Bangziak a khukte'n kei hon dom ahia?Ahihkeileh bangziak a ka tep ding nawi na om ahia? 13Tu a na lum khin a,na dai mai ding lah ka hi ngal a;ka na ihmuta dia;huchi in ka na khawlta ding hi. 14Lei kumpipate leh thudot mite,amau a ding a mun sia bawlte toh. 15Ahihkeileh dangka-eng nei kumpite,a-innte uh dangka a dimsakte toh. 16Ahihkeileh muh louh a ahun lou a piang bang na hilou ka hia,naungek khovak mu ngeiloute bang? 17Huai ah migiloute'n sukbuai atawpsan ua;huai ah mitawlte akhawl uhi. 18Huai ah salmatte nuam ina-omkhawm uh;nasem heutute aw aza kei uhi. 19Huai ah aneu leh alian a-om ua;apu a kipan in sikha anuamlen.

JOB 3: 20“Bangziak a dah a omte kiang a khovak piak ahia,kha a haksa sa kiang ah hinna; 21Sihna deih a,atunlouhnate kiang ah;gou selguk zon sang a thupi azong mite kiang ah. 22Han atun lai ua,nakpitak a kipakte kiang ah? 23Bangziak a mi alampi sel a om kiang lehPathian in a-umsuak kiang a khovak piak a om ahia? 24An ka nek ma in ka thumna ahong tung a,ka maunate tui bang a leihbuak in a-om hi. 25Ka kihtak thil lah ka tung ah ahong tung ngal a,ka laulau ka tung ah ahong tung hi. 26Nuam ka sa kei a, ka lung amuang kei, khawlna leng ka nei kei hi;himahleh buaina ahong pai hi.”

JOB 4: 1Huai lai in Eliphaz, Teman mi in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Mi'n nang hon houlimpihtumleh na zadah diam?Himahleh pau lou in kua a-om thei dia? 3Ngai in, mi tampi na hilhta a,khut hatloute na hihhatta hi. 4Kihoulimna Masa(Job 4.1—14.22)Eliphaz Thugen Masa 5Himahleh tu in na tung ahahong tung a, na bah a;nang ahon khoih a, na buaita hi. 6Pathian na kihtakna, na muanna hilou hia,na lametna na lampite muanhuaina? 7Theigige in, ka hon ngen ahi,hoih hinapi a,mangthang ngei kua ahia?Ahihkeileh koi lai ah ahia midik satkhiak a a-om? 8Kei muh in,thulimlouhna lei lette ahi ua,buaina tuh a huai mah atte. 9Pathian hu in amangthangua, hehna a mut a hihmang in a-om uhi. 10Humpinelkai humham leh,humpinelkai hangsan aw leh,humpinelkai tuailai hate,akitanta hi. 11Samat taksap ziak in humpinelkai tek amangthang a,huan humpinelkaipi nouteadalhzak uhi. 12“Tu in aguk in thil ka kiang a hong tung ka bil in huai a huauna asangta hi. 13Zan mengmuhna a kipan angaihtuahnate ah,mite nakpitak a a-ihmut san lai un, 14ka tung ah launa ahong tung a,linna in ka guhte tengteng asing hi. 15Huai lai in ka mai ah kha apai a;ka chimul adinghta hi. 16Ka dingh kinken a,himahleh huai a kilatdan ka theikak theita kei a;alim tuh ka mit ma ah a-om a;daihna a-om a, aw ka za hi, 17Pathian sang in sithei mihing dikzaw ding hia?Abawlpa sang in mihing siangthouzaw ding hia? chi in. 18Ngai in, asikhate ah muanna akoih kei a;angelte hai in angoh hi: 19Tungman inn a tengamaute hi sem na un chia,asuangphum leivui a om a,leikha ma a chimsia. 20Zingsang leh nitak kikal in hihsiat in a-om ua;theih louh hial in tangtawn in amangthang uhi. 21Amau sung a apuanin khau uh bohkhiak touh hilou hia?Pilna tel lou in asi uhi.”

JOB 5: 5 1“Tu in sam in;nang hon dawng kua a-om a?Misiangthoute lak ah akua lam na nga dia? 2Lungzinna in lah mihai athat a,huan thikna in mimawl athat sek hi. 3Mihai zungkai ka muta a;himahleh thakhat in atenna ka hamsiat hi. 4Bitna a kipan gamlapi ah atate a-om ua,kongpi ah hihgawp in a-om uh,kuamah amaute hunkhe ding a-om kei uhi. 5Agilkial in ling lak a kipan nangawn a-an kaihkhawm agaihsak a,suamhat in aneih-le-lam anawmvalhsak hi. 6Gimthuakna leivui a kipan inahong pawt kei a,lei a kipan in buaina leng ahong dawnkhe sam kei hi. 7Himahleh mihing buai ding mah apiang ahi,mei-ekte atoulen bang in. 8“Himahleh ke'n ahihleh,Pathian lam ah ka zong ding a,Pathian kiang ah ka thu ka koih ding hi. 9Thil thupite hihpa lehzonkhiak theih louh;sim zoh louh thillamdangte, 10leitung a vuah pepa leh,loute tung a tui sawlpa. 11Huchi in ama'n aniamsatetungsang ah akoihtou a;misi suunte muanna ah atawisang hi. 12Zekhem hatte lunggeltebangmah lou asuaksak a,huchi in akhutte unathiltup uh ahihthei kei uhi. 13Mipilte akhemhatna un aman a,mihoihloute thilgel athalpaihsak hi. 14Sun lai in khomialna athuak ua,zan lai bang in suntang lai in amai maimah uhi. 15Himahleh ama'n gentheite mihatte kamleh khut a kipan leh tasamte mahmah namsau a kipan ahondam hi. 16Huchi in mizawng in lametna anei a,thulimlouhna in akam ahumsak hi. 17“Ngai in, Pathian in abawlhoihmi in nuam asa hi;huaiziak in Bangkim hihthei sawina musit ke'n. 18Ama'n lah meima abawl a,atuam a, aliamsak a,akhut in adamsak hi. 19Buaina guk ah ahonsuaktasak ding a;ahi, sagih ah gilou in nangahon khoih kei ding hi. 20Kial chiang in nang sihna akipan ahon tan ding;namsau thilhihtheihna a kipan, kidou chiang in. 21Kam sung a leizepna a kipanahon sel ding a;siatna ahong tun chiang in na lau sam kei ding hi.

JOB 5: 22Siatna leh kialna ah na nui ding a,lei gamsate na kihta kei ding hi. 23Gam a suangte toh na kithuahtheih ding ziak un;huan gam a gamsate nang toh na kituak ding uhi. 24“Na puanin muang in a-omchih na thei ding a;na ganhuang na veh ding a,bangmah kim lou a-om kei ding hi. 25Na chite leng athupi ding a,na suante lei a loupa bang ina-om ding uh chih na thei ding hi. 26Kum ching in na hankhuk na zuan ding a,ahun a buhlak a-om bang in. 27Ngai in, hiai thu i zongta ua,adik mah ahi,za in na hoihna ding in thei in.”
