JOB 6: 1Huchi in Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Aw ka lungzinna kibuk thei hi henla,ka tuahsiatna selbukna ah kikoihkhawm thei hileh! 3Tu in tuipite a piaunel sang inagikzaw ding: huaiziak inka thugente leng akhauh hi. 4Bangkim hihthei thalte lahka sung ah a-om ngal a,agu uh huai a kipan a ka kha in adawnvek;kei dou ding in Pathian mulkimhuainate akivual uhi. 5“Anek ding loupa mu, gam sabiltung aham a hia?Ahihkeileh gan an mu bawngtal aham a hia? 6Job Thugen Masa 7Ka kha in amaute akhoih nuam kei;kei a ding in an kihhuai bang ahi uhi. 8“Aw ka nget tang thei leng zaw;ka thil deih Pathian in hon phalleh zaw. 9Kei hon hihgawp ding inPathian deihlam hi lai henla;akhut zan in,kei hon satkhe maileh. 10Huchi in lungmuanna ka nei lai dia;ahi, damlou natna ah ka kipak ding hi;Mi Siangthou thute ka kitheihmohbawl ngal kei a. 11Ka hatna bang ahia,ka ngak ding?Huan ka beina bang ahia,ka kuhkal ding? 12Ka hatna suangte hatna hi hia?Ahihkeileh ka sa dalsik hia? 13Kei ah panpihna a-om het kei a,kei a kipan theihsiamna hawlmang in. 14“Bah dia mansa a om kiang ah alawm in siamna a-etsak ding ahi kei maw;huchi lou in Bangkim hihthei kihtakna tawpsan ahi kei ding maw. 15Luita bang in ka unaute alepchiah uh;luita mangthang luanna bang in. 16Huai tui khal ziak a vom a;huai a vukkhal akisel. 17Alum hun chiang in atuimang ua,asat chiang in amun ua kipan amangthang uhi. 18Huai lampi a khualzinte apial ua,bangmah omlouhna mun ah apaitou ua,amangthang uh. 19Tema khualzinte'n azong ua,Sheba pawlte'n alamen uh. 20Akilamet hang unazahlak uh; huai lam ahava pai ua azahlak uh. 21Tu in bangmah na hi ngal kei ua;mulkimhuaina na mu ua, na lau uhi. 22Kei hon pia un?Ahihkeileh na neih-le-lam ua kipan in kei a ding in thilpiak lan un, ka chi hia?

JOB 6: 23Ahihkeileh, melma khut a pan hon tan un,mihat khut a pan hon hukhia un ka chi hia? 24“Hon sinsak in, huan ka dai ding:ka diklouhna hon theisiamsak un. 25Thudikna thute hat hi nah e:himahleh miselna in bang aselphou a? 26Thute selphou ding a um na hi uhia?Chimoh mi thugente huih bang ahi chih thei in. 27Ahi, pa neiloute tung ah ai na san ua,na lawm uh sumsinna van in na bawl uh. 28Tu in hehpih in hon en un;na ma uah thuzuau ka gen kei a. 29Kik nawn un ka hon ngen ahi,diklouhna om kei hen; ahi,kik nawn un, ka thu adik ahi. 30Ka lei ah diklouhna a-om hia?Ka lei in thil hoih louatheikak thei kei dia hia?”

JOB 7: 7 1“Leitung ah mihing a ding inkidouna a-om kei maw?Anite kilohmi nite bang ahi kei a hia? 2Limliap deih mahmah sikha bang in, aloh lamenkilohmi bang in. 3Huai bang in bangmah lou khate nei ding a bawl ka hi,huan kei a ding in zan chimhuaite seh ahi. 4Ka lup chiang in, chikchiang in ka thou dia? ka chi a;himahleh zan asawt hi; lehlam lehlam ah nisuah matan kilumlet in ka om hi. 5Ka sa than leh leivui khal in atuam a;ka vun kimat in apuakkham hi. 6Ka nite siamganmi khohthei sang in akinzaw a,lametna bei a zatbei ahi. 7“Aw ka hinna huih ahi chih theigige in;ka mit in hoih amu nawn kei ding hi. 8Kei hon mu mit in ahon en thei nawnta kei ding a;ka tung ah na mitte a-om ding ua himahleh ka omta kei ding hi. 9Meipi mangthang a-om nawn louh bang in,huchi in kuapeuhSheol a paisuk ahong paitou nawnta kei uhi. 10A-inn ah akik nawn kei ding a,amun in amah athei nawn kei ding hi. 11Huaiziak in ka kam ka khou kei ding a;ka lungsim gimna ah thu ka gen ding;haksatna ah ka kha ka phun ding hi. 12“Tuipi ka hi hia, ahihkeileh tua tuipi ngapi lian ka hi a hia,huchi a kei na hon chin nak? 13Ka lupna in hon lungmuan ding a,ka tutna nem in ka phunna azangkhaisak ding,ka chih chiang in. 14Huai chiang in mang inna hon lausak a,mengmuhna in na hon mulkimsak hi. 15Huchi in ka kha in heklup leh sihna atel a,hiai ka guhte sang in. 16Ka hinna ka chimtak a;ka hing gige kei ding, hon omsak maimai un;ka nite lah bangmah lou ahi ngal a. 17“Mihing bang ahia,hichi tel a na pahtawi ding a,amah tung a na lungtang na koih ding?

JOB 7: 18Zingsang teng a amah na veh a,mitphiat kal chih a amah na ettel ding? 19Bang tan vei kei hon lehngatsan lou ding na hia,bang tan vei ka chil ka nawmvalh matan hon omsak maimai lou ding na hia? 20Na khial hi taleng,na tung ah bang ka hih a,Aw mite chingpa nangmah?Bangziak a nang a diachiamtehna bang a hon koih na hia,huchi a keimah a dia puakgik ka hih maimah? 21Bangziak a ka tatlekna ngaidam lou a,ka thulimlouhna lamang lou oi?Kei tu in leivui a lum ding ka hi a;kuhkaltak in na hon zong dia,himahleh ka omta kei ding hi.”

JOB 8: 1Huchi in Shuah mi Bildad in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Bang tan hiai thilte gen ding na hia?Bang tan na kam a thute huih hat bang ding ahi ua? 3Pathian in vaihawmna ahekkawi a hia?Ahihkeileh Bangkim hihthei in dikna ahekkawi ahia? 4Atung ah na tate akhial ua,huai tatlekna ziak a akhut a amaute apikhiakleh, 5Pathian lam kuhkaltak a na zon a, huaiBangkim hihthei kiang a na thilnget na bawlleh; 6Na sianthou a na dikleh;nang ziak in tu in ka khanglou dia,na diktatna omna alohchingsak ding hi. 7Na kipatna neu mahleh,na tawpna nanung lam nakpi in athupi ding hi. 8“Huaiziak in ka hon ngen hi,hun masa thu kan inla,apipute un ana zonkhiak uh lam ah kisuk in. 8Bildad Thugen Masa: 9Ei lah zan a lel i hi ua,bangmah i thei kei uh,leitung ah i nite uh lah limliap ahi a. 10Amaute'n nang ahon sinsak un, ahon hilh un,alungtang ua kipan in thute agen kei ding ua hia? 11Buannawi lou in phaiphekakhangkhe thei a hia?Tui lou in loupa akhangthei a hia? 12Hing a om a,satpuk louh ahih lai in,loupa dangte ma in avuai nak hi. 13Huai bang mah inPathian mangngilhte tengteng lampi ahi;Pathian limsakloumi lametna amangthang ding: 14Amuanna akitan ding a,akingakna maimomlen ahi hi. 15A-inn tung ah akingai dia,himahleh adingh kei ding; huai ah alen tinten ding a,himahleh apang sawt kei ding hi. 16“Nisuah ma in ahing a,ahuan ah aselte amengkhia uhi. 17Azungte leivum kim ah azam ua,suangte omna mun ah ahing hi. 18Amun a kipan lakmang hileh,huchi in amah akitheihmohbawl ding a,Ka hon mu ngei kei, chi in. 19Ngai in, hiai alampi kipahna ahi a,lei a kipan adangte ahong suak ding uh. 20Ngai in, Pathian in mihoihkim apaikhe kei ding,gilou hih mite leng atungding sam kei ding hi. 21Na kam nuih in ahon dimsak lai dia,na mukte kikouna in. 22Hon mudahte zumna in akhuh ding a;gilou puanin a-omta kei ding hi.”

JOB 9: 1Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Chihtaktak in huchi ahichih ka thei hi, himahlehPathian lak ah mihing bangchi in adik thei dia? 3Amah kiselpih a-utlam ahihleh,sangkhat lak a khatvei zongamah adawng thei kei ding hi. 4Amah lungtang in apil a,hatna in thil ahihthei ahi,amah dou in kua akikhauhsak in,alohchingta a oi? 5“Mualte asuan a, athei kei ua,heh a amaute alumleh lai in. 6Amun a kipan in lei asing a,huan huai a khuamte aling uhi. 7Nisa thu apia a, asuak kei;aksite abilhkhum ngiungiau hi. 8Amah kia'n vante aphalhkhia a,tuipi kihot tung ah apai hi. 9Job Thugen Nihveina 10Ama'n sui theih vual louhthil thupite sim zoh louhthillamdangte ahih hi. 11“Ngai in, ka kiang ah apai a,amah ka mu kei, apai lailai a,himahleh amah ka mu kei hi. 12Ngai in, alamang a,amah kua'n akham thei dia?Bang hih na hia?Kua'n akiang ah achi dia? 13Pathian in ahehna alakik kei ding;Rahab panpih mite amah nuai ah akun petmah uhi. 14Bangchi phet a tawmzaw inamah ka dawng in,amah toh ngaihtuah ding in ka thute ka telkhe dia hia? 15Diktat himah leng amah ka dawng kei ding hi;ka thukhentu kiang ah thilngetna ka bawl thei lel ding hi. 16“Amah sam in hon dawng mahleh;ka aw angaikhia chih ka um kei ding hi. 17Huihpi in ahon kitamsak a,asan om lou in ka liamnate apungsak hi. 18Ka nak ahon phal kei a,himahleh thangpaihna in hon dimsak hi. 19Hatna thu gen leng, ngai in,Amah ahat hi,vaihawmna thu,kua'n hun ahon pe dia? 20Kidiktatsak leng, ka kam mah in ahon mohpaih hi,hoihkim ka hi, kichi taleng,hoih lou in ahon telsak ding hi. 21Hoihkim mah leng,ka kilimsak kei;ka hinna ka musit hi. 22“Akibang ahi vek a;huaiziak in ke'n,hoihkim leh gilou ahihse tuak, ka chi hi. 23Jepna in thakhat in thatleh,mihoih thuakna anuihsan ding hi.

JOB 9: 24Lei migilou khut a piak a a-om chiang in huai a vaihawmte amaituam a;amah ahihkeileh, kua ahita dia? 25Tu in ka nite laihawmmi sang in akinzaw a ataimang ua,hoih amu kei uh. 26Long kinte bang in apaimangua, muvanlai samat tung angumkiak bang in. 27Ka phunna ka mangngilh dia,ka mel lungkham ka pai dia,ka kipak ding, chi leng. 28“Ka lungkhamna tengteng ka lau a,hoih na hon sa kei ding chih ka thei hi. 29Mohpaih in ka om dia;bangziak a athawn a semgim ka hia? 30Vuk tui in kisil in,ka khutte siangsak kei leng; 31Hinapi in phaizang ah na hon pailutdia, keimah puante'n ahon kih ding uhi. 32“Kei bang in amah lah mihing ahi kei a,amah ka dawn theih a,vaihawmna a ka hohkhawm theihna ding un. 33Ka kikal uah kou gel honmattheihna ding in,thulai genmi a-om kei hi. 34Kei a pan in achiang lamang henla akihtakhuaina in kei hon lausak kei hen. 35Huai chiang in thu ka gen dia,amah ka lau kei ding:keimah ah huchibang ka hi ngal kei hi.”

JOB 10: 10 1“Ka kha in ka hinnaachimtak a,ka utdan dan in ka phun ding;ka kha thangpaihna in thu ka gen ding. 2Pathian kiang ah,Hon mohpaih ke'n;bangziak a hon kinakpih na hia hon theisak in,ka chi ding hi. 3Na nuaisiah nang a diahoih ahi maw,na khutte thilhih na muhsit a,giloute thugen tung a na maitai? 4Sa mitte nei na hi hia,ahihkeileh mihing muh bang amu na hi hia? 5Na nite mihing nite bang hi a,ahihkeileh na kumte mihing kumte bang, 6Ka thulimlouhna na kan a,ka khelhna na nungdelh hi. 7Ka gilou kei chih thei napi a,na khut a kipan hon suaktasak ding a-om louh? 8“Na khutte'n ahon sek un ahonbawl kimvel sipsip ua;tu'n kihei in na hon hihse dia hia? 9Theigige in, ka hon ngen ahi,tungman bang a na hon mekdan;leivui hon tun nawn ding na hi hia? 10Nawitui bang in na hon sungkhia in, nawituidat bang in na hon tok kei maw? 11Vun leh sa in na hon tuam a,guhte leh thagui in na hon phankhawm hi. 12Hinna leh deihsakna na hon phal a,huan na hon vehna in ka kha ahawi hi. 13“Himahleh hiai thilte na lungtang sung ah na sel a;hiai bel na tup ahi chih ka thei hi. 14Thil ka hihkhelhleh na honchiamteh a,ka thulimlouhna a kipan na hon khah kei ding hi. 15Ka gitlouhleh, ka tung agik hi;midiktat himah leng, ka lutang ka sangsak kei ding hi.Lungbuaina in ka dim a, huaiziak in ka gimthuakna en in. 16Ka lutang akiletsakleh,humpinelkai bang in nang na hon beng a,ka tung a na lamdandan na hon ensak nawn hi. 17Kei kalh in na palainate na thaksak a,ka tung a na hehna na khangsak a;hon dou ding sepaihhon thak na hon sawl hi. 18“Bangziak a sul a pan hon lakhia na hia?Na si in kuamah muh louh na hi leng.

JOB 10: 19Om lou mah bangta ding hi ing a;sul a pan a han a puak a om ding hi ing. 20Ka nite atom kei maw? Huchi ahihleh, tawp in,hon omsak maimai in, huchi a neukha a ka lungmuan theihna ding in. 21Ka kik nawnlouhna a ka pai ma in khomialna gam leh sihna limliap gam mahmah ah. 22Mialna mah bang a,mialna sahna gam a: sihna limliap gam,dan himhim omlouhna, khovak khomial bang a a-omna mun ah.”

JOB 11: 1Huan Naamath mi Zophar in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Thu tampite dawn louhding ahi a hia?Mi houlimna a dim siamtansak ding hia? 3Na khemnate'nmite daisak ding hia?na simmoh chiang in,kuamah in nang hon zahlaksak lou ding uhia? 4Ka thuhilh asiangthou a,na mit uah ka siang hi, na chi ngal a. 5Himahleh Pathian inthugen maizenleh zaw,nang dem in amukte hongleh; 6Huchi in pilna thugukte nang ahon ensak ding a,atheihna ah thuah tampi ahi chih,huaiziak in na thulimlouhna sang a tawmzaw na lak ahPathian in nang ahon phut chih thei in. 7“Zon in Pathian na mu thei diam; hoihkimna ahBangkim hihthei na mu thei diam? 8Van bang in asang a; bang na hihthei dia?Sheol sang in athuk a; bang na theithei dia? 9Huai a tehna lei sang in asauzaw a,tuipi sang in azazaw hi. 10Paisuak henla, man henla,vaihawmna ah samleh, huchi in kua'n amah adal thei dia? 11Zophar Thugen Masa 12Mihing theihsiamna bei intheihsiamna anei ding,mihing a sabiltungnou apian chiang in. 13“Na lungtang na koih dik a,amah lam a na khutte na zakleh; 14Na khut a thulimlouhna a-om a, gamlapi a na koihkhiak a,gitlouhna na puanin a na tensak keileh; 15Gensiatna ding om lou in na mai na daksak ding a;ahi, na kip ding a,na lau kei ding. 16Na haksatna na mangngilh ding ziak in;tui luangmang bang in na theigige ding hi. 17Sun lai sang in na hinna achiangzaw ding a;khomial om mahleh,zingsang bang in na tangkhe ding hi. 18“Lametna a-om ziak in,na kipta ding hi; ahi, ama tanchin na zong ding a,muang in na khawlta ding hi. 19Lup leng na lum ding a, kuamah in nang hon lausak kei ding uhi;ahi, mi tampi'n nang hon zong ding uhi. 20Himahleh gilou mitte azuausuak ding a,asuakta kei ding ua, alametna uh kha khah ahi ding hi.”

JOB 12: 1Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Ginlelh vual louh in mite zaw na hi peuhmah ua,nou toh pilna asi ding hi. 3Himahleh noute bang in theihsiamna ka nei;nou sang in ka niamzaw kei, ahi, hiaite bang thilte kuan athei kei a? 4Kei zaw mi invengte a dia nuihzabuk ka hi a, kei,huai Pathian sam a, huai ama'n amah adawnpa,midik, mihoihkim, nuihzabuk ka na hi. 5Om nuam a om ngaihtuahna ah vangsiatna muhsitna a-om a;himahleh akhe uh teute a ding in mansa in a-om hi. 6Suamhatte puaninte alohching a, Pathian hehsakte abit ua;akhut a pathian tawite Pathian in tampi apia hi. 7“Himahleh gamsate dong in, huchi in amau nang ahon sinsak ding uh;huan huihkhua a vasate'n, nang ahon hilh ding uhi. 8Ahihkeileh lei kiang ah thu gen in nang ahon sinsak ding ua;tuipi a ngasate'n na kiang ah apuang ding uhi. 9Hiai tengteng ah, Toupa khut in ahih khin chih kua ahia thei lou? 10Amah khut ah thil hing chiteng kha leh,mihing tengteng hatna a-om hi. 11Bil in thute enchian in,Kam in ana chiam kei maw? 12“Mi upate kiang ah pilna a-om a nite sauna ah theihsiamna a-om hi. 12Job Thugen Thumveina 13Amah kiang ah pilna leh hatna a-om;ama'n thupha leh theihsiamna anei. 14Ngai in, akaipuk a,akilam nawn thei kei ding; mihing akhakbing a,kuama'n ahong thei kei ding. 15Ngai in, tui aching a akang hi;akhahkhia a, lei atum vek hi. 16“Akiang ah hatna leh pilna a-om a;khem a omte leh khempa amah a ahi. 17Thuhilh mite loh sam in apimang a,huan vaihawmte mihai in abawl hi. 18Kumpipate kolte asut a,kawnggak in akawng uh agak hi. 19Siampute loh sam in apimang a, mihatte azou hi. 20Muan mite thugen asuan a,upate theihsiamna alamang hi. 21Lalte tung ah muhsitna abuak a mihatte kawnggak aphel hi. 22“Mial a kipan in thil thukte amukhia a,sihna limliap khovak ah ahon lakhia hi. 23Namte apungsak a, amau hihsia in,namte athehzak a, alakhawm nawn hi. 24Lei a mite hausate lungtang alamang a,gamdai a lampi omlouhna ah amau avakvaisak hi. 25Vakna bei in khomial ah amai ua,huchi in zukhammi bang in amaute ahoisak hi.”

JOB 13: 13 1“Ngai in, ka mit inhiai tengteng amu a,ka bil in huai za in atheisiamta hi. 2Na thei uh,huai mah ke'n leng ka thei a,nou sang in ka niamzaw kei hi. 3Bangkim hihthei kiang ah thu ka gen mahmah ding,Pathian toh houlim ka ut hi. 4Himahleh nou zuau phuakte na hi ua, phattuamna beidamdawisiam na hi vek uhi. 5Aw na vek un dai sipsip le uchin maw;na pilna uh hi ding hiven. 6“Tu in ka thusut za un,ka mukte ngetna ngaikhia un. 7Pathian a ding in dikloutak inthu na gen ding uam,amah a ding in khemhattak inna houlim ding uam? 8Ami na zahtak ding uam?Pathian a ding in na sual ding uam? 9Nou ahon zonkhiak ahoih hia?Ahihkeileh mi'n mi akhem bang in,amah na khem ding uam? 10Nou ahon sal mahmah ding,aguk a mite na zahtak uleh. 11Ahoih tungtuanna in nou ahon lausak kei dia hia,nou tung ah akihtakhuaina ake kei diam? 12Na thupilte uh vut bang lel ahi,manna bei paunak ahi a,na kidalnate uh tungman kidalnate ahi. 13Dai unla,thu ka gentheihna ding in,hon omsak maimai un,ka tung ah ahong tung ding hong tung hen. 14“Bangziak a ka ha in ka sa kei a, ka khut a ka hinna koih ding ahia? 15Ama'n hon that mahleh,amah ka ngak lai ding;ama ah ka lampite ka kemhoih lailai ding hi. 16Hiai leng ka hotdamna ahi ding;Pathian limsakloumi ama ahong pai lou ding ahih ziak in. 17Ka thugen thanuamtak in za un,ka thupuanna na bil sung uah om hen. 18Ngai un, tu in ka thu ka bawlhoihta a;ka diktat ahi chih ka thei hi. 19“Kei hon kiselpih ding amah kua ahia?Kei tu in ka dai dia kha ka khah ding hi. 20Ka tung ah thil nih hih kei phot le uchin,huchi in na mai a kipan ka bu kei ding hi.

JOB 13: 21Kei a pan gamlapi ah na khut kaikik in;na lauhuaina in hon lausak ke'n. 22“Huai chiang in hon sam lechin,ka hon dawng ding;ahihkeileh hon pausak inla,hon dawng in. 23Ka thulimlouhnate leh khelhnate bang ahia?Ka tatlekna leh ka khelhna hon theisak in. 24Bangziak a na mai sel a na melma dia hon bawl na hia? 25Singnah mutleng na hihbuai dia hia?Buhpawl keu na delh dia hia? 26“Nang lah kei dem in khatak in na gelh a,ka tuailai thulimlouhnate na hon luahsak hi. 27Ka khete leng kol na bunsak a,ka lampite tengteng na chiamteh hi;ka khenuai kim ah gi na khung hi. 28Mihing zaw thilmuat leh nget nekgawp puansilh bang in amangthang hi.”

JOB 14: 14 1“Mihing, numei a panpian nite tomchik ahi a,buaina ngen in adim hi. 2Pak bang in ahong dawnkhia a,avuai nawn pah a, limliap bang in atai a, a-om gige kei. 3Mi huchibang tung ah na mit hak in,vaihawmna ah kei na hon pi dia hia? 4Thilnin a kipan kua'n ahia thilsiang lakhe thei?Kuamah in. 5Anite sehsa ahi chih thei in,na kiang ah akhate simna a-om a,akan thei louh ding inagamgite na septa hi. 6Amah en ke'n, akhawltheihnading in, kiloh bang a,ani ahihkim matan. 7“Phukpaih in om mahleh,ahong sel nawn ding a,ahiang nou atawp kei ding,chih sing a ding in lametna lah a-om ngal a. 8Lei ah azung upa mahleh,akungpi lei ah sita mahleh; 9Tuigim ziak in ahong nou thak dia,sing suan bang in bawkte ahon neikhe nawn ding hi. 10Mihing asi a, amang zel hi;ahi, mihing in akha akhah a,huan koi ah a-om a? 11“Tuipi a kipan tuihute alenmang bang in, luipi bel atul a, akang hi. 12Huai mah bang in mihing alum a athou kei hi,vante a-om nawn louh matan,akhanglou kei ding uh,a-ihmu uh leng ahalh khe sam kei ding uhi. 13“Aw Sheol ah hon sel lechin aw, na thangpaihna aman masiahhon na gukkep lechin, hun sehsa hon na pia in,kei hon theigige lechin aw; 14Mi sileh ahing nawn diam?Ka galdouna leh nasepna ni tengteng ka ngak ding a,ka suahtakna ahong tun matan in. 15N'on na sam dia, k'on dawng ding hi,na khut nasep na hon lunggulh ding hi. 16Tu in ka kalsuante na sim a:ka khelhnate na chiamteh hi. 17Ip sung ah ka tatlekna bilh in a-om a,ka thulimlouhna na gonggak hi. 18“Tang kipuk bangmah louahong hi taktak a,amun a kipan in suangpi suan in a-om hi; 19tuite'n suang akiamsak ua;leivui a kibawl mun sangte na taimang a;huan mihing lametna na hihsia hi. 20Tangtawn in amah na zou a,apai a; amel na lamdangsak a,na sawlmang hi. 21Atapate zah in a-om ua,ama'n athei kei;hihniam in a-om ua,himahleh ama'n amau ahi chih athei kei hi. 22Himahleh atung a sa in natna anei a,asung ah akha in asuun hi.”

JOB 15: 1Huchi in Teman mi Eliphaz in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Mipil in theihnabangmah lou toh dawnna abawl in, suahlam huih in agilpi adimsak diam? 3Houlimna phatuam lou thu angaihtuah in, ahihkeilehhoih ahihtheihlouhna ding a thugente angaihtuah diam? 4Ahi, launa na hihmang a,Pathian ma a kipiakzohna na dal lai hi. 5Na kam in na thulimlouhnaasinsak a, khemhatmi lei na tel ngal a. 6Nang mahmah kam in siam louh ahon tangsak a,kei hilou in; ahi, nang dem in nangmah mukte mah inhon theihpih hi. 7“Mihing piang masapen hi hia?Ahihkeileh mualte om ma a lakkhiak na hi maw? 8Pathian thuguk na zata hia?Huan pilna na kikoih hoih hia? 9Ka theih louh uh bang na thei a?kou a om lou bang na theisiam a? 10Ka lak uah samkang lehupa mahmah a-om tuaktuak,na pa sang a nakpi a upazaw. 11“Pathian nepnate lehsiamtak a hon hilhtenang a dia neu lua uhia? 12Bangziak a na lungtang innang hon pimang ahia?Bangziak a na mitte phia ahia? 13Huchi a Pathian dem ana lungsim na hei a,na kam a pan a huai thutena pawtkhiaksak. 14“Mihing bang ahia, asian ding?Numei a pan piang amah kua ahia diktat ding? 15Houlim Nihveina(Job 15.1—21.34)Eliphaz thugen nihveina 16Mikihhuai leh sia,tui bang a thulimlouhna dawnmi,siang kei sem na in chia. 17“K'on ensak ding, hon za in;huan ka muhsa ka puang ding. 18Mipil kuate in ahia apipute uakipan na thu gen a, a-iim louh uh 19Amau kiang kia ah gam piak in a-om a,mikhual kuamah alak uah apai kei uh. 20“Migilou in adamsung niteng in natna athuak a,nuaisiah hatmi a dia kholkhawm kumte zah mah. 21Abil ah launa ging a-om a;hauh lai in lokmi atung ah ahong pai ding hi. 22Khomial a kipan ahong kik dingchih a-um kei a,namsau a ngak in a-om hi. 23Tanghou zong in avakvai a,Koi a om ahia?

JOB 15: chi in.Khomial ni akiangchin ah mansa in a-om chih athei hi. 24Dahna leh haksatna in amah alausak a;kumpipa galdou dia mansa bang in,amah azou uhi. 25“Pathian dou ding a khut alikkhiak ziak in,Bangkim hihthei dou a kisatheitak in, 26alum, atuamna sahtak nei tohamah dou a atai teitei ziak in; 27athau in amaitang akhuh a,agil ah thau akholkhawm hi. 28“Khopi tulsa ah ateng a,kuamah ten tuaklouhna innte ah,segawp ngiingei dingte aluah ziak in. 29Ahau kei ding a, aneih-le-lam a-om gige kei ding a;amah lei ah zung akai kei ding. 30Khomial a kipan asuakta kei ding a, meikuang in aselnoute akangkeu ding a,apaklun laite amutmang ding. 31Amah kikhem in,bangmah lou ah muang kei hen:bangmah lou lah athukna hi ding ahi ngal a. 32“Ahun ma in hihzoh in a-om dia,huan ahiang nou kei ding hi. 33Grepgui bang in agah min louasingpulh dia, olive bang inapak apaikhe ding. 34Pathian limsak loukithuahkhawmna hut ding ahi a,golhna puaninte lahmei in akangmang ding hi. 35Siatna apai ua, thulimlouhna asuakkhesak uh,alungtang un khemna a-opkeuh uhi.”

JOB 16: 1Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Huchibang thil tampi ka zata hi: lungmuanmi chimtakhuai ngen na hi uh. 3Thu bangmah loute'ntawp hun anei ding uam?Ahihkeileh dawng ding a nang hon hihheh bang ahia? 4Nou bang in kei leng ka pauthei sam hi; na kha uh ka kha mun a om hileh,noute dem a thute kaikhawm a,ka lu hon sinkhum thei ding hi veng in. 5Himahleh ka kam in nou ka hon hatsak ding a,ka muk a muanna in na lungkhamna uh ka hon nem ding. 6“Thu gen mah leng,ka dahna nep in a-om kei a:doh mah leng,hihnop in ka om a hia? 7Himahleh ahon chimtaksakta a;ka lawmte tengteng na hihgamta hi. 8Huan kiptak in na hon len a,huai kei demna theihpihna ahi:huchi in ka gawnna kei dem in athou a,ka maitang ah atheisak hi. 9“Ahehna in kei ahon botkek a,ahon sawi hi;aha ahon gawikhum a: ka tung ah ka gal in amit atat-hiam hi. 10Akam uh lianpi in ahon katkhum ua;simmohtak in ka biang ah ahon beng ua; kei douding in akikaikhawm uh. 11Pathian in Pathian limsakloute kiang ah ahon pekhia a,migiloute khut ah ahon paikhia hi. 12Om nuam in ka om a, himahlehahon kitamsak a; ahi,ka ngawng in ahon man a,hon pai nen hi; amuitum ding in ahon tungtou hi. 13Athalkap mite'n ka kimvel ahahon um ua, ka sisan guite abottan a, ahawi kei;lei ah ka sinkha asungkhia hi. 14Siatna tung ah siatna in ahon sesak a;galhat bang in ka tung ah atai hi. 15Ka vun tung ah sai-ip ka khui a,leivui ah ka kingata hi. 16Job Thugen Liveina 17Ka khut ah hiamgamna om kei mahleh,ka thumna siangthou mahleh. 18“Aw leitung, ka sisan khuh ke'n,huan ka kahna in mun nei kei hen. 19Tu mahmah in, ngai in,van ah kei hon theihpihpa a-om a,tungsang ah kei hon genpihpa a-om hi. 20Ka lawmte'n hon nuihsan ua,himahleh ka mit in Pathian ah khituite asungkhia hi. 21“Huchi a Pathian lak a mihing dikna aletkip theih a,invengte lak a mihing tapa dikna aletkip theihna ding in. 22Kum tawmchik ahong tun chiang in,ka kik nawnlouhna ding lampi ah ka paita ding hi.”

JOB 17: 17 1“Ka lungsim hihgawp in a-om a,ka nite abei a, kei a ding in han mansa in a-om hi. 2Ka kiang ah musit mite a-om taktak ua,ahehna uah ka mit a-om gige hi. 3Tu in thuchiam hon pia in,nangmah toh kei a ding in moh khu hong hi in;kei toh khutte beng ding kua a-om a? 4Theihsiamna a kipan alungtang uh na sel ngal a;huaiziak in amau na hihlian kei ding hi. 5“Kuapeuh mat ding a alawmte hek a,aneih-le-lam tan tummi, atate nangawn mit azuausuak ding hi. 6Mite houlimna ding in ahon bawl lai a;huchi in tangpi kih ka hong hita hi. 7Lungkhamna ziak in ka mit leng amial a,ka hiangte tengteng limliap bang ahi. 8Midikte'n hiai ah lamdang asa ding ua, mihoihPathian limsakloute dou ding in akitokthou ding. 9Himahleh midiktat alampi ah apang zouzou dia,kuapeuh khut siangneite ahat semsem ding uhi. 10Himahleh hong kik un,na vek un, tu in hong un;huchi in na lak uah mipil ka mu kei ding. 11“Ka nite abeita,ka thiltupte asegawpta hi,ka lungtang ngaihtuahte tan in. 12Zan, sun in akheng ua;khovak in khomial anaih, achi uh. 13Ka inn bang in Sheol en leng;khomial ah ka lupna phah taleng; 14siatna kiang ah,‘Ka pa na hi,’ chi leng;tangtel kiang ah, ‘Ka nu leh ka sanggamnu na hi,’ chi leng; 15huchi hileh ka lametna koi a om ahia?Lamet nei hi leng kua'n ahon musak dia? 16Sheol mundaite ah paisuk inleivui ah ka kikkhawm ding ua adiam?”

JOB 18: 1Shuah mi Bildad in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Thute zong a bang tan thang kam ding na hi ua?Ngaihtuah in, huai zoh chiang in ka pau ding uh. 3Bangziak a gamsa bang a sim a om a, na mitmuh ua siang lou ka hi ua? 4Nang na hehna kipumpei ziak in lei mangngilh in a-om diam?Ahihkeileh amun a kipan in suangpi suankhiak in a-om diam? 5“Ahi, migilou vakna mihsak in a-om ding a,amei-ek atang kei ding. 6Apuanin ah vakna amial dia,atung a khawnvak mihsak ahi ding. 7Ahatna kalsuante hihtuailuai ahi dia,amah thupha gen in apaikhe ding hi. 8Amah khe mahmah in len sung ah amah apailut ua,len ah a-awksak hi. 9Thang in akhetul ah aman dia,thang in amah alen ding hi. 10Lei ah amah a ding in thangkual sel in a-om a,lampi ah amah a ding in thang. 11“Kihtakhuaite'n ning chiteng ah amah alausak dia,akhetul ah adelhzui ding hi. 12Ahatna gilkial nek in a-om dia,akhawlna ding in mansa in tuahsiatna a-om ding. 13Apumpi hiangte anegai ding a,ahi, ahiangte sihna ta masapen in anegai ding hi. 14Asuan apuanin a kipan zungkalhkhiak in a-om dia lauhuainate kumpipa kiang a pi in a-om ding hi. 15Amah a hilou puanin ahteng a-om ding,atenna ah kat thehzak in a-om ding hi. 16“Nuailam ah azungte akeu dia,tunglam ah ahiang satkhiak ahi ding. 17Lei a kipan in atheihgige amangthang ding;kongzing ah min anei kei ding. 18Bildad Thugen Nihveina 19Amite lak ah tapa anei kei dia,tute leng atenna ah kuamah om lai a-om kei ding hi. 20“Amalam a omte'n ani lamdang asa ding uh;nunglam a omte hihlau a a-om bang un. 21Huchibang midiktatloutetennate ahi petmah a,Pathian theiloumi mun ahi hi.”

JOB 19: 1Huchi in Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Bang tan ka kha hihbuai a,thute a hon hihzan gawp ding na hi ua? 3Hiai sawmvei na hon kouta ua;ka tung a giloutak ana hih uh na zum kei uh. 4Ana paikhial taleng maw,keimah kiang a ka diklouhna a-om gige hi. 5Kei dem in nou kiliansakpetmah ve ni uchin,ka minsiatna ka tung ah na gen ding ua, 6Pathian in ka thu ah hon zoutachih tu in thei un,huchi in alen in ahon umsuak hi. 7“Ngai un, ‘Hiamgamna,’ chi in ka kikoukhia a,himahleh zak in ka om kei,panpih deih in ka kikou a,himahleh vaihawmna a-om kei hi. 8Ka pai theihlouhna ding in ka lampi a-um a,ka paina dingte ah khomial akoih hi. 9Ka thupina hon suahsak a,ka lu a kipan lallukhu alakhia hi. 10Ning chiteng ah ahon hihniam a, ka mangta hi;huchi in sing bang in ka lametna abotkhia hi. 11Ka tung ah ahehna leng asou a,amah a ding in agalte lak akhat bang in ahon sim hi. 12Asepaih pawlte ahong kuankhawm ua,ka siatna ding in alampi uh abawl ua ka puanin kimvel in puanin akai uhi. 13“Kei a pan in ka unaute gamlapi ah akoih a,ka meltheihte kei a pan in atuam vekta uh. 14Ka tanaute'n ahon zuausan ua,ka lawm theihngeite'n ahon mangngilhta uhi. 15Ka inn tengte leh,ka sikhanute'n, mikhual ahon sa ua: amitmuh unnamdangmi ka hi. 16Ka sikha ka sam a, hondawng kei, ka kam in amah khem mah leng. 17Ka zi a ding in ka hu kihhuai ahi a,sanggamte ziak in pumpi hahsiang mah leng ka namsia hi. 18Naupang neute nangawn in hon simmoh ua; ka thohleh,ka siatna ding in thu agen uhi. 19Job Thugen Ngaveina 20Ka vun ah leh ka sa ah ka guh abelh bikbek a,ka ha vun toh ka suakta hi.

JOB 19: 21Hon hehpih un, hon hehpih un,Aw nou ka lawmte;Pathian khut in kei ahon khoihta ngal a. 22Bangziak a Pathian bang a nou hon sawi na hi ua,ka sa a bangziak a lungkim lou na hi ua? 23“Aw ka thute tu in gelh in om le uh aw;Aw laibu ah kigelh lutleh aw. 24Sik leh ngen gelhna zum intangtawn a ding in suangpia gelh hi le uh aw; 25Ka Tanpa ahing chih leh,atawp chiang in leitung ah adingh nawn dingchih ka theih ziak in. 26Ka vun huchibang a hihsiat a a-om khit nung in,himahleh ka sa a kipan Pathian ka mu ding hi. 27Keimah a ding in amah kei mahmah in ka mu dia,ka mitte'n a-en ding, midang hilou in;ka sung ah ka lungtang asidang hial hi! 28“Amah bangchibang in i sawita phet ding uam,na chih uleh, kei ah thubul muh in a-om chih thei in. 29Namsau kihta un;hehna in lah namsau gawtnate ahon tun ngal a,huchi a vaihawmna a-om chih na theihtheihna ding un.”

JOB 20: 1Huan Naamath mi Zophar in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Huaiziak in ka ngaihtuahnate'nkei dawnna ahon pia a,ka sung a om ka kinohna thu ziak mahmah in. 3Kei hon zahlaksak salhna ka zata a, ka theihsiamna kha in ahon dawng hi. 4“Leitung a mihing a-om nungsiah, hun lui thu hiai na thei kei maw; 5Giloute vualzohna atom a,Pathian limsakloute nopsakna mitphiat kal sung lel ahi chih? 6Ahoihkimna in vante suntou in,alu in meipite phatou mahleh; 7Himahleh amah ek bang in tangtawn in amangthangding a, ‘Koi a om ahia?’Amah mute'n achi ding uh. 8Mang bang in alengmang dia,muh in a-om kei ding hi;ahi, zan mengmuh bang in hawlmang in a-om ding hi. 9Amah mu mit in amah amuta kei ding hi;amun in leng amah amuta kei ding hi. 10Atate'n gentheite deihsakna azong ding ua,akhutte'n athil hoih ape nawn ding hi. 11“Atuailai hatna in aguhtedim mahleh, leivui ah amah toh alum ding uhi. 12Akam ah gitlouhna khum in alei nuai ah sel mahleh; 13Sit in, paisak kei in, akam ah kem gige zou mahleh; 14Agil a an akitok a,asung ah gulgu bang in akha hi. 15Hauhsaknate anawmvalh a,alokhe nawn ding hi.Pathian in agilpi a kipan in apaikhe ding hi. 16Sokval gu atawp dia,gulngan in amah athat ding. 17Luipite, khuaizu leh nawituidat lui luangte a-en kei ding hi. 18Sepgim gah ape nawn dia anawmvalhsuk kei ding a;amuhsa ah kipahna anei kei ding. 19Ama'n lah gentheite anuaisiah a, amangngilh hi;alam louhpi inn hiamgamtak in alata uhi. 20Zophar Thugen Nihveina 21Anekgaih louh bangmah om lai a-om kei hi;huaiziak in ahauhna in adaih sawt kei ding. 22Ahauh san lai in haksa sakna anei dia,thulimloumi khut ahong tung ding hi. 23Agilpi hihdim ding a akisak lai in,Pathian in atung ah athangpaihna kihtakhuaina akhe ding a,anek lai in atung ah azusak ding hi.

JOB 20: 24Sik galvan a kipan atai dia,dal thal in amah akap pailet ding. 25Adokkhia a, apumpi a kipan in ahong paikhia;ahi, asinkha a pan amukzumte velvel hong paikhia a launate atung ah ahong tung hi. 26Agou ding in mialna tengteng kholkhawm in a-om;mei mut louh in amah anegai ding; apuanin a nutsiat a om anegai ding hi. 27Vante'n abohsiatna ataklang ding ua, lei amah dou ding in athou ding. 28A-inn a punna apaimang dia,aheh ni in avante aluangmang ding hi. 29“Hiai Pathian a pan a migilou tantuan ahi,agouluah dia Pathian in asehsak.”

JOB 21: 1Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Ka thugen hoihtak in ngaikhia unla, hiai na khamuanna thu uh hi hen. 3Hon thuak teitei unla,ka hon gen ding a,ka gen khit chiang in nuihsan na ni uteh. 4“Kei phunna mihing tung ah hia?Bangziak a kuhkal lou aom lou ding ka hia? 5Hon en unla, lamdang sa unla,khut in na kam uh hum un. 6Ka ngaihtuah in ka lung adong a,linna in ka sa aman nak. 7“Bangziak in ahia migilou ahin a,tekkun a adam a,ahong thupikhiak? 8Asuante uh akiang uah amitmuh uah ahihkip a,agil ua gahte amai ma uah. 9A-inkuante uh lauhuai lak ah abit a,atung uah Pathian chiang ake kei hi. 10Abawngtal un chi akhah a,ahut ngei kei,abawngpi un nou anei a,anou ase ngei kei. 11Ganhon bang in ataneute uhapawtsak ua,atate uh alam uh. 12Apekging uleh kaihgingtoh kituak in la asa ua,atamngai ging uah akipak uh. 13Anite uh lamzangtak in azang ua, lungmuang inSheol ah apaisuk uh. 14“Pathian kiang ah, ‘Hon paisan in,na lampite theih ka kilawp kei uh. 15Bangkim hihthei bang a ahih,a-nna ka sep ding uh,akiang a ka thum un punna bang a ka muh ding uh?’ achi uhi. 16Ngai in, alamzanna uh akhut ua om ahi kei a hia?Migilou lemtheihna kei a kipan a gamlapi a om ahi. 17“Migilou meisel bangzah vei amit a,vangtahna atung ua atun a,Pathian in athangpaihna inlungkhamna apiak chiat? 18Bangzah vei ahia buhpawl huih mut bang ahih ua,buhsi huihpi mutmang bang ahih uh? 19“Pathian in gitlouhnate atate uh a ding in akholkhawm,na chi ua, amau tung ah tungsak le ake; atheihsiamna ding un. 20Amau mit ngei in asiatna uh mu uhenla,Bangkim hihthei thangpaihna dawn uhen. 21Job Thugen Gukveina 22Kua'n ahia Pathian theihna sinsak ding?ama'n sangpi a omte vai ahawmsak ngal a. 23“Alut lai in mi asi a,nuam leh bit lai in.

JOB 21: 24Anawite nawizu in adim a,aguhngekte thau in adim hi. 25Midang lungkhamtak in asi a,Nuamsa a a-an chiam ngei lou in. 26Vut lak ah kibang in alum ua,than in apumtuam hi. 27Ngai in, na ngaihtuah uh ka thei, dikloupi a ka tung a na sawmte uh. 28‘Koi ah ahia kumpi inn a-om,migilou tenna puanin koi ah a-om a?’ na chi uh. 29“Zinzin mite na dong ngei kei ua hia?Agente uh na pom kei ua hia? 30Migilou vangtah ni in hawi in a-om a,thangpaih ni in hotkhiak in a-om, chih. 31Kua ahia amaitang a alampi pulak ding,kua ahia athilhih bang a amah din ding? 32Han lam a puak ahih in,ahan ven ahi. 33Lui phaizang a leitang amah a ding in anuam a;mi tengteng in amah nung azui ua,amah ma a na paite sim seng louh ahi uh. 34Bangchi in thu mumalomloupi a hon khamuan ding na hia?Na dawnnate uah zuauthu lou ngal bangmah a-om kei hi.”

JOB 22: 1Huchi in Teman mi Eliphaz in hichi in achi: 2“Pathian a ding in mihing aphatuam thei diam?Kuapeuh apil amah mah a ding in aphatuam ngei a. 3Na diktat, Bangkim hihthei a ding akipahna ahi a hia?Ahihkeileh na lampite na hoihkimsak,amah a dia punna hia? 4Nang ahon salh a,vaihawmna a nang toh alut,amah na kihtak ziak hia? 5Na gitlouhna alian kei maw?Na thulimlouhna ah lengtawpna a-om sam kei hi. 6“Bangmah lou ding in na unau thuchiamte na la a,vuaktangte puansilh na suahsak hi. 7Bahte a ding in dawn ding tui na pe kei a,gilkial a ding in tanghou na it hi. 8Himahleh mihat in gam anei a;asung ah ami deihthoh ateng hi. 9Khutvuak in meithaitena sawlmang a, pabeitekhutte hihtan in a-om hi. 10Huaiziak in na kim ah thangte a-om ua,lauguihna in nang ahon hihbuai hi. 11Ahihkeileh khomial,na muh theih louh,leh tui tampi in nang ahon khuh hi. 12“Van sang ah Pathian a-om kei a hia?Aksite sandan en in, sang hi na tel uh e; 13Nang, ‘Pathian in bang athei a?Khomial bikbek ah vai ahawm thei dia hia? 14Ama'n hon muhlouhna ding a,meipi sah in liah a,van dum khen a vak ahi,’ na chi hi. 15Migiloute totsa lampi lui na kem ding hia? 16Ahun ma ua lakmang a-om a,akingakna ua tui luang bang a butkhiak a omte. 17Pathian kiang a,‘Hon paimangsan in; huan ei a ding inBangkim hihthei in bang ahihthei a?’ chite. 18Himahleh a-innte uh thil hoih in adimsak ua,himahleh migiloute thugen kei a kipan agamla hi. 19Midiktatte'n amu ua,akipak uh; mihoihte'n amau anuihsan ua, 20Chihtaktak in ei dou ding a thoute satkhiak in a-om ua,amaute lak a khosuaksunte mei in ahulta,” chi in. 21“Tu in amah kimeltheihpih inla,muangtak in om in.Huai ah hoih na kiang ah ahong pai ding hi.

JOB 22: 22Houlim Thumveina(Job 22.1—27.23)Eliphaz Thugen Nanungpen 23Bangkim hihthei kiang ana kik nawnleh, lamkip na hi ding;na puaninte a kipan gamlapi ah diktatlouhna na koihmang ding ahi. 24Huan na gou leivui ah koih inla,luite suangte lak ah Ophir dangka-eng; 25Bangkim hihthei na gou ahi dia,dangka manpha nang a ding in 26Bangkim hihthei ah kipak in,Pathian kiang ah daktou ding na hih ziak in. 27Amah kiang ah na thum ding a,ama'n hon na za ding a, na thuchiam na tangtun ding hi. 28Thil khat tung ah thupuknabawl in thu na pe dia, nang a ding in hihkip in a-om ding;huchi in na lampite ah khovak atang ding hi. 29Ahon sawnpuk chiang un,‘Thohtouhna a-om,’ na chi ding.Hihniam a omte ama'n ahondam ding hi. 30Ama'n ahoih lou nangawn asuaktasak ding a;ahi, na khutte sianna ziak in amah suahtaksak in a-om ding.”

JOB 23: 1Huchi in Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2Tuni mahmah in ka phunna helhuai ahi,ka mauna sang in ka thuakna agikzaw hi. 3Aw amah ka muhna mun thei leng la,atutna mahmah ah hoh thei leng aw! 4Ama ah ka thu ka bawlhoih dia,thugente in ka kam dimsak ding hi veng. 5Ahon na dawnna ding thute ka thei dia,huchi in bang ahia ka kiang aagen ding ka theisiam ding. 6Athilhihtheihna thupina in kei ahon sel diam?Ii, himahleh kei hon hatsak ding hi. 7Huai ah midik in amah thu asutpih thei dia;huchi in ka vaihawmmi a pansuahtaksak in ka om tawntungta ding hi. 8“Ngai in, mailam zuan in ka pai a, himahleh huai ah a-om kei;nunglam zuan in,himahleh amah ka mu kei hi. 9Veilam pang ah, na sep lai in,himahleh amah ka mu thei kei a;taklam pang ah abu,amah ka muh theihlouhna ding in. 10Himahleh ka zuih lampi athei a; ahon ze-et lai in,dangka-eng bang in ka hon suakkhe ding hi. 11Ka khe in akalsuante alenkip a;alampite ka zuita a, ka pial kei hi. 12Amukte thupiak a kipanka paikik kei a,akam a thute akiphamoh ka an sang in ka kholkhawm zaw hi. 13“Himahleh amah lungsimkhek lou ahi a,amah kua'n ahei thei dia?Akha in adeih,huai mah ahih zel hi. 14Kei a dia sehsa ahih ngal a;thil huchibang tampiakiang ah a-om hi. 15Huaiziak in a-omna ah ka buai a;ka ngaihtuah chiang in amah ka lau hi. 16Pathian in ka lungtang abahsakta a,Bangkim hihthei inahon hihbuaita hi. 17Khomial ma in satkhiak in ka om ngal kei a,ka mai a kipan khomial sah leng akhuh sam kei hi.” 23Job Thugen Sagihveina

JOB 24: 24 1“Bangziak a Bangkim hihtheiin vaihawmna hunte bawl lou ahia?Amah theite'n bangziak a anite mu lou uh ahia? 2“Gamgi suan a-om ua;hiamgamtak in ganhon alamang ua,avak uhi. 3Pabeite sabiltung ahawlmang ua,thuchiamna ding inmeithai bawngtal ala uh. 4Lampi a kipan tasamte aheikhia ua;lei a gentheite akiselkhawm uhi. 5“Ngai in gamkeu a sabiltungte bang in athilhihna lam uah,an thanuamtak a zong in apaikhia ua,atate uh a ding in gamdai in amau an asuaksak hi. 6Gam lam ah agan an a-at ua;migiloute grep gah ala uh. 7Zankhua in puan bei in vuaktang in alum ua,khovot ah khuhna nei lou in. 8Tangte vuahpi in amaute akawt ua,belh ding deih man in suangpi akawi uhi. 9“Pa neiloute nawi a kipan kaikhia a-om ua,huan, gentheite thuchiam la in. 10Huchi in tasamte puan bei in vuaktang in avialvak ua,buhphalte gilkial in apua uhi. 11Olive a pan sathau abawl ua;a-uain sukna uh achil ua,himahleh adangtak uhi. 12Khopi a kipan mite amau ua,liamte kha akikoukhia ua;Pathian in alimsak kei hi. 13“Hiaite khovak tung a helte lak a ahi ua;huai lampite athei kei ua,alampite ah a-om gige sam kei uhi. 14Khovak tung in tualthatmi athou a,gentheite leh tasamte athat a; ahi,zan in guta bang in a-om hi. 15Ang kawm mi mit in leng khomui angak a,kuamah in hon mu kei ding, chi in amai abawl lamdang hi. 16Khomial in innte avut pailet ua,sun chiang in akikhumbilh ua;khovak athei kei uh. 17Amaute tengteng a ding in zingsang sihna limliap bangahi a; zan mial lauhuaite lawm in anei uhi.”Zophar Thugen Nanungpen 18“Tuite tung ah kintak a taihmang in a-om ua,atantuan uh lei ah hamsiat in a-om;agrephuante sukmi in anaih kei. 19Khokhal leh nisa in vuk tuite atawpkang a,huai mah bang in thil hihkhialteSheol in ahih hi.

JOB 24: 20Sul in amah amangngilh dia;than in limsatak in amah kivakna in anei ding uh;theihgige in a-omta kei dia,diktatlouhna sing bang a hihtan in a-om ding. 21“Ta nei lou numei ching anegai a;meithai a ding in hoih ahih kei hi. 22Ahi a lah Pathian in athilhihtheihna in mihatteadomkang a, hinna alamet phak louh lai unadingtou uh. 23Bitna Pathian in amaute apia a,huchi in huai ah akhawl uh;alampite uah amitte a-om hi. 24“Hihlet in a-om ua;himahleh sawt lou kal in,abei uhi; ahi, sukniam in a-om ua,midang tengtengbang in lampi a kipan lakkhiak in a-om ua,buhvui bang in atkhiak in a-om uhi. 25Huchibang na hi kei taleh kua ahiazuauthei a hon chian a,ka thugen bangmah lou suah ding?”

JOB 25: 1Shuah mi Bildad in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Pathian kiang ah lalna leh launa a-om;ama'n amun sangte ah muanna abawl hi. 3“Asepaihhonte kua'n asim seng dia?Kua tung ah ahiaavakna tanlouhna a om? 4Huchi ahih chiang inPathian ma ah bangchi in mihing adik thei dia?Ahihkeileh amah numei suan bangchi in asiang thei dia? 5Ngai in, khapi nangawn invakna anei kei a,amitmuh in aksite asiangthou kei hi. 6“Mihing, tangtel sang a bangzah a neuzaw?Pathian mitmuh ah mihing bangchi phet ahi diam,mihing tapa, lungnou leltak!” 25Bildad Thugen Nanungpen

JOB 26: 1Huan Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Thilhihtheihna nei lou amah bangchi a panpih in;hatna nei lou ban bangchidan a hondam thei na hia? 3Pilna nei lou amah bangchi in na thuhilh a,nakpitak a theihna hoih na puangkheta a; 4Kua kiang ah ahia thute na genkhiak?Kua kha ahia nang a kipan hong paikhia?”Bildad 5“Sisate leh huai a tengte tuite nuai a kipan ahi uh. 6Ama ah Sheol vuaktang in a-om a, Abaddon inkikhuhna anei kei hi. 7Ama'n mal mun awng ah aphalhkhia a, bangmah lou tung ah lei akhai hi. 8Ameipi sah in tuite atun a;anuai ah meipi akikek kei hi. 9Ama'n laltutphah mai akhuh a,atung ah ameipi aphalh hi. 10Tuite tung ah, khovak lehkhomial kigitna ah,kawlmong akaikual hi. 11Asalhna ah van khuamte aling ua, lamdang asa uh. 12“Athilhihtheihna in tuipi akhawlsak a, huan atheihsiamna inRahab asat hi. 13Ahu in vante bawlhoih ina-om a; akhut in gulpi kinoh tai lai abawl hi. 14Ngai in, hiaite a thilhih among lel ahi uh.Ngatchik a ahuau siausiau lel!Athilhihtheihna van-ging kua ahia theisiam ding?” 26Job Thugen Giatveina

JOB 27: 1Huchi in Job in agentehna thu apan nawn a,hichi in achi: 2“Pathian ahin bang in, ama'n ka dikna alamang a;Bangkim hihthei in, ama'n ka kha ahihbuai a; 3Ka sung a ka hinna a-om lai teng, Pathian hu ka nakvang a a-om lai teng? 4Ka mukte'n thutak lou agen kei ding,ka lei in leng khemna thu agen kei ding. 5Siam ka hon tangsak kei ding a,ka sih ma kei a pan ka dikna ka koihmang kei ding. 6Ka diktatna ka len tinten a,ka khah kei ding hi,ka dam lai teng ka lungtang in kei hon kou kei ding. 7“Ka melma gilou bang hi henla,kei dou ding a thou midiktat lou bang hi hen. 8Punna muta mahleh, Pathian limsakloumi lametna,Pathian in akha alakmang ngal in, bang ahia? 9Atung a buaina atun in,Pathian in akikou aza diam? 10Bangkim hihthei ah nuam asa in, chik lai peuh inPathian sap nuam asa diam? 11“Pathian khut tungtang ahnang ka hon sinsak ding;Bangkim hihthei kiang a om ke'n ka iim kei ding hi. 12Ngai un, noute tengteng in huai na muta ua;ahih ngalleh, bangziak abangmah lou hong hi na hi ua?”Zophar 13“Hiai Pathian lak a migilou tantuan leh,nuaisiah hat mite goutan,Bangkim hihthei a pan amuh uh ahi. 14Atate apun uleh,namsau a ding ahi;huan asuan tanghou in atai kei ding hi. 15Anung a omlaite hi leng in avui dia,ameithaite un kahna abawl kei ding uh. 16Leivui bang a dangka vum in,tungman bang in puansilh bawl mahleh; 17Abawl thei, himahleh midikte'n asilh ding ua,mihoihte'n dangka pen ahawm ding uh. 18Maimomlen bang in inn alam a,vengmi in abawl aidakbuk bang lel ahi. 19Hausa in alum a, himahleh khop in a-om kei ding;amit ahak a, huan amah a-om kei. 20Tuite bang in launate'n amah apha a;zan in huihpi in amah agumang hi. 21Suahlam huih in amah apomang a, apaimang hi;huchi in amun a kipan in amah amutmang hi. 22“Pathian in amah nakpi in alawn dia, adawm kei ding;akhut a pan ataimang ding hi. 23Mite'n amah akhut uh abetkhum ding ua,amun a kipan in amah anuihsan ding uhi.” 27Job

JOB 28: 2Lei a pan in sik akilakhia a,suang a kipan in dal akisungkhia hi. 3Mihing in khomial phak tawp aneisak a,bukimna azongkhia hi; khomial leh sihna lim phak tawp tan in. 4Mite omlouhna ah kokhuk lutna hawm atouvang ua,mite a pan gamla ah akikhai ua,lehlam lehlam ah akivei uh. 5Lei ahihleh, huai a kipan intanghou ahong suak a;anuai ah mei ahih bang in akilumlet hi. 6Huai suangte sapphir suangmun ahi a dangka-eng nen anei hi. 7Huai lampi sasial ne vasa in athei kei a, mu-akla mit in leng amu ngei sam kei hi. 8Gamsa kisatheite'n asik kha ngei kei ua,humpinelkai lun lai leng huai ah apai kha nai kei hi. 9“Meisah suangpi tung ah akhut akoih a; azung in mualte alumlet hi. 10Suangpite lak ah tuilam ahong a; amit in thil manpha chiteng amu hi. 11Atakkhiaklouhna ding un lui luangte atuam a;thil kisel khovak ah ahon lakhia hi. 12Himahleh koi lai ah apilnaakimu dia?Theihsiamna koi lai a om ahia? 13“Mihing in alampi athei kei;mihing gam ah leng muh in a-om kei. 14Thukna in, ‘Kei ah a-om kei,’ achi a, tuipi in, ‘Ka kiang ah a-om kei,’ achi hi. 15Dangka-eng a lei theih ahi kei a, huai man ding in dangka buk theih ahi kei hi. 16Ophir dangka-eng toh amanphatna teh theihahi kei ding, Onik mantamhiam Sapphir toh hiam. 17Dangka-eng leh limlang in akimpih thei kei ua,huai khenna ding in dangka-eng hoih leh suangmantam lengahi thei kei ding hi. 18Suang dum hiam suang muhpaisuak theih akigen kei ding,Ahi, pilna man rubi suang sang in asangzaw hi. 19Ethiopia topaz suang in apha kei dia,dangka-engtak toh leng amanphatna teh ding ahi kei. 20“Ahihleh pilna koi a kipan ahong pai ahia?Theihsiamna koi a om ahia?

JOB 28: 21Mihing tengteng mit a kipan a sel ahi chih leh,huihkhua a vasate a kipan sitsa a om ahi chih thei in. 22Abaddon leh Sihna in,‘Huai a thuthang ka bil un ka za uh,’ achi uhi. 23Pathian in huai alampiatheisiam a, amun athei hi. 24Lei mong tan in a-en ngal a,van nuai thil tengteng amu hi. 25Huih a ding a gikna apiak lai in leh tuite tehna a ateh lai in; 26Vuah a ding a thupiak abawl a,vanpiging khophia a dia lampi abawl lai in; 27Huai lai in ama'n amu a,apuang a; ahihkip a,ahi, azongkhia hi. 28“Mihing kiang ah, ‘Ngai in, Toupa kihtak, huai pilna ahi;hoih lou a kipan paimang theihsiamna ahi,’ achi hi.” 28Job In Pathian Pilna Thuguk Agen 1“Chihtaktak in dangka a ding in khuk a-om a,ahihsiang uh dangka-eng a ding in mun.

JOB 29: 1Job in agentehna thu agen nawn a, hichi in achi.Job 2“Aw nidanglai khate bang a om hi leng, Pathian inahon veh lai nite bang in; 3Ka lutung a akhawnvak atan a, amah vakna a khomial a ka vak lai; 4Ka tuailai nite a ka om bang a,ka puanin tung a Pathian thuguk a-om lai in; 5Ka kiang a Bangkim hihtheia-om a,ka tate ka kim a-om lai un; 6Ka kalsuante bawngnawi a sawp ahih a,suangpi in sathau luite abutkhiak lai in. 7Khopi a kongpi zuan a ka pai lai in, kongzing a ka tutna ka bawl lai in, 8Tangvalte'n ahon mu ua, abuua; upate athou ua adingh uh. 9Lalte houlim akidek ua,akam uah akhut uh akoih uh. 10Miliante aw adai a, akam dangtawng uah alei uh abelh hi. 11“Bil in ahon zak lai in,hampha ahon chi a;mit in ahon muh lai in,pom ahon chi a; 12Migenthei,panpih ngai a kap,Pa nei lou, panpihtu bei ka hutkhiak ziak in. 13Mangthang ding a mansa a kipan vualzawlna ka tung ah ahong tung a;meithai lungtang kipah ziak a lasa ding in ka omsak hi. 14Diktatna ka silh a,ahon tuam hi; ka dikna puanak thupi leh lukhum bang leh suangmantam bang ahi. 15Mittaw a ding in mitte ka hi a,khebai a ding in khete ka hi. 16Tasam a ding in pa ka hi a;ka theih louh thubul ka zongkhia hi. 17Diktatloumi haizek ka hihtan a,aha a kipan asamat ka khahsak. 18“Huchi in ke'n,ka bu ah ka si ding a,piaunel bang in ka nite ka pungsak ding, ka chi a. 19Ka zungte tuite pha inadalhzak a, ka hiangte ahzankhua in daitui akai. 20Kei ah ka thupinaathak gige a, ka khut ahka thalpeu athak gige. 21Mite'n ahon ngai ua,angak ua, ka thuhilh a ding in adai dide uhi. 22Ka thute zoh in apau nawn kei uh; ka thugen atung uah atakkhia. 23Vuah ngak bang in ahon ngak ua;vuah nanungte a ding bang in lianpi in akamka uh. 24Kimuanna aneih louh chiang un atung uah ka nuihmai a;huchi in ka mel tang apaikhe kei uh. 25“Alampi ding uh ka telsak a,hausa bang in ka tu a; sepaih pawl lak a kumpipa bang in ka leng a,suun mite lungmuanmi bang in.” 29Job In Athubuai Agen Tawpna

JOB 30: 30 1“Huan kei sang a naupang,apate uh, ka ganching uitetoh koih dia ka sitte'n,kei nuihza bawlna in ahon zang uh. 2Ahi, akhutte uh hat a,kei bang ahon loh tak dia, huai ahatna uh beisate'n? 3Taksapna leh kialna in atuikang ua;lei keu leh sia akheuh uh, 4Pawn a anteh alou ua;huan lou kha zungte a-an uh ahi. 5Mite lak a kipan hawlkhiak in a-om ua; guta bang in amau nung ah akikou ua. 6Guam a hengte ah ateng ding ua, lei leh suangpi hawmte ah. 7Pawn lak ah aham ua; lahou nuaite ah akisekhawm uh. 8Mihaite tate ahi ua, ahi,mithulim lou tate; gam a pan in delhkhiak ahi uhi. 9“Huan tu in kei ala uh ka hong hi ahi,amau a ding in houlimna ka hi. 10Ahon kih ua, kei a kipan atuam ding in uh,ka mai a chilsiat akidek kei uh. 11Pathian in ka khau akhah a,ahon hihgim a,huan ka ma ah kamkaihna akhahkhia uh. 12Ka khut taklam ah tuailaiteathou ua; ka khe anawlkhinua, siatna lampi ka ma ah akoih uhi. 13Ka lampi hihsia in,ka tuahsiatna azong ua,kuama'n akham kei uh. 14Awng zapi apaisuak bang in ahong ua, siatna lak ah ka tung ah akikhuk uh. 15Ka tung ah launate ahei ua,huih bang in ka minphatna adelhmang uh;meipi bang in ka hauhna apaimang hi. 16“Huchi in tu in ka sung ah ka kha buakkhiak in a-om;gimthuakna nite'n kei ahon man uhi. 17Zan in ka guhte asawi a,kei hon sun natnate'n khawl chih anei kei uh. 18Ka natna hi hat mahmah ziak in ka puansilh anin a:ka puanak ngawng bang in kei ahon gak hi. 19Buannawi ah ahon pailut a,leivui leh meivu bang ka hi hi. 20“Na kiang ah ka kikou a,na hon dawng kei hi.Ka ding a, kei na hon en maimah a.

JOB 30: 21Ka tung a gilou ding in na kilumlet a, na bantha hatna inkei na hon sawi hi. 22Huih ah na hon domkangtou a,huai tung ah na hon tuangsak;huchi in huih ah na hon lumlet den hi. 23Sihna na hon tun ding chih ka thei hi, mihing tengteng a dia sehsa inn ah. 24Himahleh siatna a pukgawp mi'n aban zak lou ding hia?Atuahsiatna ah panpihna ngen in kikou lou ding hia? 25Buaina a ding in ka kap kei diam?tasam a ding in ka kha adah kei ding a hiam? 26Hoih ka ngak chiang in, hoih lou ahong pai a;khovak ka ngak chiang in, khomial ahong pai. 27“Ka lungtang abuai, khawl hun amu ngei kei;gimthuakna nite ka tung ah ahong tung. 28Hihvom a om in ka vialvak,himahleh ni hihvom hilou in;khawmpi ah ka dingh a panpih deih in ka kikou hi. 29Sehalte unaupa ka hi a,simbute lawm ka hi. 30Ka vun avom a,kei a kipan apilh uh,kholum in ka guhte akang hi. 31Huaiziak in ka kaihging suunna asuak a,ka mutging mikapte aw.”

JOB 31: 31 1“Ka mit toh thukhunka na bawl khinta; bangchi in nungak ka en theita dia? 2“Ahihleh tunglam Pathian akipan in ka tantuan bang ahia,tungsang a Bangkim hihthei a kipan in ka goutan? 3Midikloute tung ah siatna,gitlouh nasemte tung ah gawtna atung kei maw? 4Ama'n ka lampite amu kei a hia?ka kalsuante asim vek kei a hia? 5“Thuzuau toh na om a,huai a ka khe khem ding a kinoh ahihleh; 6bukna diktak ah hon buk dih ua,Pathian in ka thutakna thei hen! 7Ka kalsuan lampi a kipan a na pial hiam,ka lungtang in ka mitte na zui hiam,ka khutte ah nin himhim na belh hiam; 8Huchi ka hihleh, chi tuh ning,midang in ne hen;ahi, ka lou a piang bulkalh khiak hi hen. 9“Ka lungtang numei lam a khem a om a,ka inveng kongkhak ka na ngak takleh; 10huchi ahih takleh ka zi in midang a ding in an su henla,midangte amah tung ah kun uhen. 11Huchibang gitlouhna hoihhet lou ahi; ahi, vaihawm mitegawt ding khelhna ngei, 12siatna ding a Abaddon tan a kangbei leh,ka punna tengteng zungkalh ding mei hi ding lah ahi ngal a. 13“Ka tung a phunna aneih lai ua,ka sikhapa hiam ka sikhanu hiam makhua na musit a,na khualsak lou ka hihleh; 14Pathian athohkhiak chiang inbang ka hihta dia?Thu akan hun chiang in bang in ka dawngta dia? 15Kei sul a pan hon bawlpa'n amah abawl kei maw?Khat in ahon bawl tuak ahi kei maw? 16“Migentheite alunggulh uh ka piak louh a,ahihkeileh vuaksuak ding a meithai mitte ka na omsakleh; 17Ahihkeileh kei kia in ka an ka nek a, huai a pabei in an anek keileh; 18Ii, ka tuailai a kipan in pa bang ka hi, ka kiang ah ana khanglianta;ka nu sul a kipan amah pipa ka hita hi.

JOB 31: 19“Kuapeuh taksap ziak a mangthang hiam,ahihkeileh tasam khuhna nei lou hiam ka na muhleh; 20Akawngte'n kei hon vualzawllou a, ka belam mul a lumsak a ana om keileh. 21“Kongpi a panpihna ka muh ziak a pabeite siatna ding aka khut ka na likleh; 22Huchi ka hihleh, ka liang ka liangzang a kipan kia henla,aguh a kipan ka ban kitan hen. 23Pathian a kipan tuahsia kei ading in launa ahi ngal a,athupina ka tuak ngam kei hi. 24“Dangka-eng lametpen a ka na bawl a, dangka-eng hoih kiang ah, ka muanna na hi,ka na chihtak a; 25Ka hauhna thupi ziak a hiam,ka khut in tam alam ziak a ka kipah a; 26Avak lai a ni ka na et a, khathupitak paikhia ka na et a, 27Ka lungtang guk a khem a a-om a, ka kam in ka khut ana tawp takleh; 28Hiai leng thulimlouhnavaihawmte gawt ding ahi,tung a Pathian kiang a na zuauta hi ding ka hih ziak in. 29“Kei hon mudah siatna a ka na kipah a,ahihkeileh hoih lou atung a atun chiang a ka na kipah luatleh; 30Ka melma hamsiat ding leh ahenna thum ding in ka kam ka na khialsak kei. 31Ka puaninte a,‘A-an a kihihvah lou kua a-om a?’hon na chih kei ualeh; 32Kongzing ah mikhual agiak ngei kei a;khualzin a ding in ka kongte ka na hongta. 33“Adam bang a ka angsung athulimlouhna na sel a,ka tatlekna na khuh ka hih a, 34aziak, mi tampi launa thupitakka neih ziak ahih a, sungtehon muh daina launa ziak ahuchi a dai dide a,popawt lou ka hihleh, 35Aw, kei hon za ding mi nei leng maw.Ngai in, ka deihlam hiai ahi.Bangkim hihthei in hon dawng henla;ka melma in laibu ah gelhkhiak hen. 36“Chihtaktak in ka liangzang ah ka po dia; lallukhu bang inkei ah ka kan den ding hi. 37Akiang ah ka kalsuan zah ka puang ding a;lal bang in akiangnai ah ka hoh ding hi. 38“Ka gam kei dem a akikou a,lei lehsate akahkhawm uleh; 39Sum lou a huai gahte ka na nek tak a, ahihkeileh huai a aneite ahinna uh ka na tansakleh, 40Buh hilou in louling neite,barli buh hilou in loubualte pou zaw hen,”Job thute abeita hi.

JOB 32: 1Huchibang in hiai mi thumte Job dawn atawpta ua, amah mit a diktat ahih ziak in. 2Huai lai in Job tung ah Ram inkuan a Buz mi Barakel tapa Elihu hehna akuangkhia a, Pathian hi zaw lou a amah siam akitansak ziak in. 3Alawm thumte tung ah leng ahehna akuangkhia a, dawnna ding nei lou a, hinapi a lah Job amohpaih ziak un. 4Amah sang a a-upat zawk ziak un, Job kiang a thu gen ding in Elihu in angak hi. 5Hiai mi thumte kam a dawnna a-om kei chih atheih in, ahehna akuangkhia hi. 6“Huchi in Buz mi Barakel tapa.Elihu in adawng hi:Ka naupang a,noute na upa mahmah uh;huaiziak in ka dai a, ka lungsim ka hon ensak ngam kei hi. 7Huchi in ka chi, ‘Nite'n thu agen ding uh,kum tampi in pilna a sinsak ding hi.’ 8Himahleh mihing lungsim a om a, Bangkim hihthei intheihsiamna apia hi. 9Apilte mithupite ahi kei ua,vaihawmna theisiamte upate ahi sam kei uh. 10Huaiziak in hong ngaikhia un;ke'n leng ka lungsim ka ensak ding, ka chi. 11“Ngai un, na thute uh ka ngak a,gen ding na zonkhiak lai un,na thusutte uh ka ngaikhia. 12Ahi, ka hon limsak a,ngai un, kuamah Job thuzohzou na om kei uh,ahihkeileh na lak uah,athute dawng. 13Pilna i muta, chi lou ding in pilvang un; mihing hilou inPathian in amah azou thei hi. 14Ama'n kei siatna ding inathute ahih kei a;ke'n leng nou thugente in amah ka dawng sam kei ding. 15“Lamdang sa in, adawng nawn kei ua,gen ding thu khat leng anei kei uh. 16Thu ging neih louh ziak in adingh kinken ua,adawn nawn louh ziak un ke'n ka ngak diam? 17Ke'n leng ka dawnna ding ka nei hi, ka lungsimka ensak sam ding, ka chi hi. 18Thu in ka dim a;

JOB 32: ka sung a ka kha in hon sawl teitei hi. 19Ngai un, ka gilpi pawtkhiaknanei lou uain thawl bang ahi;uain thawl thakte bang in puakzak ding in mansa in a-om hi. 20Ka halhtheihna ding in,ka pau ding; ka mukte ka hong dia, ka dawng ding hi. 21Mihing mihinna zahtaksakkei un, ka hon ngen hi;kuamah kiang ah leng maitang phatna min ka pe kei ding hi. 22Maitang phatna minte piak ding ka thei ngal kei a;huchi lou in zaw kei hon bawlpa'n ahon lazok ding hi.” 32Elihu Thugen(Job 32.1—37.24)

JOB 33: 2Ngai in, tu in, ka kam ka ka a,ka kam in ka pau hi. 3Ka thute'n ka lungtang dikna agenkhe ding uh;Ka mukte'n atheih ngei uh chihtaktak in agen ding uhi. 4Pathian Kha in ahon bawl a,Bangkim hihthei hu in hinna ahon pia hi. 5“Na theihleh hon dawng in;ka ma ah na thute akizom in koih inla na panna ah dingh in. 6Ngai in, nang bang in Pathian lam ah ka om hi;kei leng tungman a bawl ka hi. 7Ngai in, ka lauhuaina in nang ahon lausak kei ding,ka hahkatna leng na tung ah agik kei ding hi. 8“Chihtaktak in ka zak in na pauta a, huchi in na thute ging ka zata hi. 9Ka siang hi, tatlekna bei;ka hoih a, kei ah thulimlouhna leng a-om kei, chi in. 10Ngai in, kei demna ding ziak amu a melma in ahon simta hi; 11Ka khete kol abunsak a, kalampite tengteng achiamteh hi. 12“Ngai in, ka hon dawng ding,hiai na diklouhna ah; mihing sang in Pathian alianzaw hi. 13Bangziak a amah dou na hia,Ka thute a bangmah mah lah adawng kei ding, chi in? 14Pathian in lah khatvei agen a,ahi, nihvei, mihing in limsak kei mahleh. 15Zan a mang ah, mengmuhna ah, mite tung a ihmut kip akiak lai un,lupna tung a ihmut laite un; 16huai lai in mite bilte ahong a,vaunate in amau ahihlau a, 17Huchi a athiltup a kipan a mihing alakkik a,mihing a kipan akisaktheihna asatkhiak theihna ding in; 18Ama'n kokhuk a kipan akha akepkiksak a,namsau a kipan ahinna. 19“Alupna tung ah natna asawi in leng a-om,aguhte akinakna om gige toh in. 20Huchi in ahinna in tanghou,akha in an lim akih hi. 21Asa atummang a, huchi inmuh theih in a-om kei;Akimu lou a guhte hong dawkkhia uhi. 22Ahi, han kiang ah akha ahong nai a,ahinna hihse mite kiang ah.

JOB 33: 23“Akiang a angel, kamlet,sangkhat lak a khat,mihing kiang a amah a diadik bang ahia chihetsak ding a-omleh; 24Huchi a amah a ding a zahngai thei,Kokhuk a paisukna a kipanamah suaktasak un, tatna ka muta. 25Asa naupang a sang in nou zaw hen;atuailai nite lam ah kik nawnta hen. 26Pathian kiang ah athum a,amah ding in deihsak theih in a-om hi;huchi in nopna toh amai amu a;adiktatna akiang ah ape nawn hi. 27Mite ma ah la asa a,ka khialta a, adik ka nahekkawi a, thuk in ka om kei! 28Kokhuk sung a paisukna akipan akha atanta hi,ahinna in vakna amuta ding hi, achi a. 29“Ngai in, hiai thilte tengtengPathian in, mihing lak ah ahih a, nihvei, ahi thumvei. 30Kokhuk a kipan akhapikik ding in, huchi a mihingvakna ahihvak a a-omtheihna ding in. 31“Chiamteh in, Aw Job, ngaikhia in, dai inla, thu ka gen ding. 32Gen ding na neihleh,hon dawng in, pau in,siam hon tansak ka ut ngal a. 33Elihu In Job Ataihilh 1“Akoi abang hitaleh, Job,ka hon ngen hi, thugen za inlaka thugen tengtengngaikhia in.

JOB 34: 1Huai lou in Elihu in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Ka thute za un,nou mipilte; nou theihna neite,bil hon doh un. 3Dangtawng in an achep bang in,bil in thute a-enchian hi. 4Adik ei a ding in i tel ding uh;i lak ua hoih bang ahia i thei ding uh. 5Job in, ‘Ka dik a, Pathian in ka dikna a lamang,’achi ngal a. 6Ka dikna huchi hita mahlehzuauthei a sim ka hi a; tatlekna bei himah leng,ka liamna hihdam theih louh ahi. 7“Muhsitna tui bang a dawn bei,Job bang mihing kua ahia? 8Thulim lou nasem mite toh ahon a pai, migiloute toh omkhawm mi. 9Ama'n lah, ‘Pathian lak a ka kipahna ding bangmahka loh tak kei,’ achi ngal a. 10Huaiziak in nou theisiam mite,hon ngaikhia un. Pathian in, gilou bangchi in ahih ngei dia;Bangkim hihthei in thulim lou bangchi in ahih mahmah dia. 11Ama'n lah mihing thilhih amah kiang apekik ding a,mi chiteng alampite kiang apekik ding ahi. 12“Ahi, moh khuksakna thu ah,Pathian in giloutak in ahih kei dia,Bangkim hihthei in leng vaihawmna ahihse sam kei ding hi. 13Kua'n ahia amah leitung a heutu hihna pia?Ahihkeileh khovel pumpi kua'n ahia athu a koih? 14Mihing tung a alungtang nga a,ama lam a akha leh ahu lakhawm; 15Sa tengteng amangthang vek ding ua, mihing leivui asuak nawn ding hi. 16“Theihsiamna na neihleh, hiai za in;ka thu aw ngaikhia in. 17Mi thudik hua in vai ahawm ding hia?Dik leh hat amah na mohpaih ding hia? 18Kumpipa kiang a, ‘Na hoih kei’chih akilawm hia?Ahihkeileh miliante kiang a,‘Na gilou uh?’ chih. 19Milalte mihinna zahtak lou a,Genthei sang a mihausate limsak zawte kiang a chihakilawm sem lou ding hia?Amaute lah akhut nasep ahi ngal ua. 20Mitphiat kal lou in asi uazankim lai mahmah in;mite aling ua apaimang ua,mihing khut hilou in mihatte lakmang in a-om uhi.

JOB 34: 21“Amitte mihing lampite tung ah a-om a, apainate amu hi. 22Thulim lou nasem mite buknading khomial hiam limliap hiam a-om kei hi. 23Vaihawmna a Pathian ma apai ding in, mihing angaihtuah lailai akiphamoh kei hi. 24Lamte theih phak vual louh in ama'n mihatte ahihzan vek a,amun uah midang atungkhia hi. 25Huaiziak in anasepte uh athei hi;zan in amau alumlet a,hihsiat in a-om uhi. 26Midang mitmuh mahmah in migiloute bang in amau agawt hi. 27Amah zuihna a kipan apialkhiak ua,alampite a koimah alimsak louh ziak un. 28Huchi in mizawng kahna akiang tung ding in abawl ua,gimthuak kahna aza hi. 29“Amah na pau keileh, kua'n siam louh atangsak dia?Ama'n amai aselleh, kua'n amah amu thei dia?Namte kiang a hih hiam, ahihkeileh mihing kiang a hih hiam akibang hi. 30Huchi a Pathian theiloumi in vai ahawm louh a,amite thang a awksak ding a-omlouhna ding in. 31“Kuapeuh in Pathian kiang ah,Gawtna ka thuakta,ka gilou nawn kei ding, 32Ka muh louh nang hon sinsak in, gilou ka hihleh ka hih nawn kei ding, achi uhia? 33Athukna huchi a na nial na deih bang in a-om diam?Kei hilou in, nang na tel ngeingei ding ahi. 34“Theisiam mite'n ka kiang ah,‘Ahi,’ achi ding uh,aza mipil teng in. 35Job in theihna bei in thu agen a, athute pilna bei ahi uh. 36Mihaite bang a adawnna ah,atawp chiang in Job tungtang ngaihtuah le uh. 37Ama'n akhelhna ah helna abehlap a,i lak uah akhut abeng a, Pathian kalh in athu apungsakta hi.”

JOB 35: 1Elihu in adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Hiai na dikna hi in na ngaihtuah hia, ahihkeileh,kei a mawng ahi,Pathian mai ah na chi hia? 3Kei a ding in bang phattuamna a-om dia?Khial lou a ka om in bang phattuamna ka nei a? na chih. 4Nang leh na kiang a na lawmte ka hon dawng ding. 5“Vante lam en inla, mu in; vante, nang sang a sangzaw, en in. 6Na hihkhelhleh, amah dem a bang hih na hia?Na tatleknate punsak hileh,amah tung a bang hih na hia? 7Diktat na hihleh, amah bang na pia a?Ahihkeileh na khut a kipan bang amu a? 8Na gitlouhna in nang bang in mi ahihna thei a;na diktatna in mihing tapa ahih hampha thei hi. 9Nuaisiahna atam mahmah ziak in akikoukhia ua;mihat ban ziak in panpih deih in akikou uh. 10Kuamah in, ‘Zan chia late hon pia, Pathian kei honBawlpa koi a om ahia; 11Lei a gamsate sang a hon sinsak tamzaw leh,van a vasate sang a hon pilsakzaw?’ achi kei uh. 12Huai ah akikou ua, himahleh,migilou kisaktheihna ziak in,kuamah in dawnna ape kei. 13Chihtaktak in Pathian in bangmah lou aza kei dia,Bangkim hihthei in leng alimsaksak kei ding hi. 14“Nang ngial in houh, ‘Amah ka mu kei, athu ma ah a-om,Amah ka ngak hi,’ na chih vial. 15Himahleh tu in, heh a aveh louh a,ki-otsakna leng alimsak louh ziak in; 16Huaiziak in Job in bangmah lou in akam aka ahi;theihna bei in thu atamsak ahi.”

JOB 36: 1Elihu mah in agenzom zel a, hichi in achi: 2“Hon na thuakzou zek inla,huan ka hon ensak ding;Pathian sik in lah banghiam khat gen ding ka nei ngal a. 3Gamla a kipan ka theihna ka hon la ding a,kei hon Bawlpa tung ah diktatna ka nga ding hi. 4Diktak in ka thute zuau ahi kei a;hoihkim khat ka kiang ah a-om hi. 5“Ngai in, Pathian in thil ahihthei a, kuamah amusit kei;theihsiamna hatna ah thil ahihthei hi. 6Gilou hinna ahawi kei a;himahleh gimthuakte kiang ah adikna uh apia hi. 7Midiktat a kipan amit alakik kei;himahleh laltutphah tung a kumpipa toh amau tangtawn in akoih a,huchi in hihlet in a-om uhi. 8Huan sikkhaute a gak a a-om ua, gimthuakna guite alak a a-om uleh; 9Huchi in athilhih uh amau a-ensak a, atatlekna uh,huchi a kisatheitak a ana omna uh. 10Thuhilhna lam ah abil uh ahonsak a,thulimlouhna a kipan kik ding in thu apia hi. 11Amah thu angaihkhiak ua,a-nna asep uh leh,anite uh hauhsakna in ahihbei ding ua,akumte uh kipahna in. 12Himahleh angaihkhiak kei ualeh,namsau in amangthang ding ua, huchi in theihna bei in asi ding uh. 13“Himahleh amau lungtang aPathian limsaklouhnate'n hehna akholkhawm hi;amau ahen lai in panpih deih in akikou kei uh. 14Tuailai in asi ua,siangloute lak ah ahinna uh amangthang hi. 15Agimthuakna in gimthuakte asuaktasak a, nuaisiahna ah abil uh ahonsak hi. 16Ahi, gakchihna omlouhna,mun lian lam ah dahna a kipan nang ahon pimang ding a;na dohkan tung a kilui thauna in adimta ding hi. 17Himahleh giloute vaihawmna in na dim a; vaihawmna leh diktatna in nang hon len hi. 18Thangpaihna a-om ziak in,pilvang in huchi lou in zaw na hauhna in nang ahon pimang kha ding hi;golhgukna tampi in leng nang hon pialsak kei hen. 19Dahna ana omlouhna ding in,na hauhsaknate ahun diam,ahihkeileh na hatna thilhihtheihna tengteng?

JOB 36: 20Mite tengteng amun uasatkhiak a a-om zan uah lunggulh ke'n. 21Pilvang in, gilou limsak ke'n;gimthuakna sang in hiai lah na telzawta ngal a. 22“Ngai in, Pathian in athilhihtheihna in sangtak in ahih;amah bang sinsakmi kua ahia? 23Kua'n amah alampi thu apia a?Ahihkeileh, ‘Diklouhna na bawlta,’ kua'n achi thei dia? 24Mite'n la asak uh, athilhih hihlian ding in theigige in. 25Huai ah mite tengteng a-en ua;huai mihing in gamlapi ah amu hi. 26Ngai in, Pathian alian a,amah i thei kei;akumte zah zontheih ahi kei. 27“Tui takte ama'n atawi khin a,huai a tuihu a kipan vuah azu. 28Huai vante'n asungkhia ua,mihing tung ah tampi in atak. 29Meipi kiphahte leh a-inn vanpigingte kua'n atheisiam dia? 30Ngai in, akim ah akhovak azak a; tuipi nuai atuam hi. 31Hiaite in mite avai hawmsak a;an tampi apia hi. 32Akhutte in khophia atawi a;chiamtehna khoh ding in thu apia hi. 33Huai husa in atungtang thu agen a,ganhonte'n leng hong kuantou huihpi tungtang thu athei uh.”

JOB 37: 37 1“Hiai ah leng ka lungtangaling a,amun a kipan suan in a-om hi. 2A-aw ging leh akam a kipanavan-ging paikhia noute'n ngaikhia un. 3Van pumpi nuai ah asawlkhia a,akhophia lei tawpnate tan in. 4Huai zoh in aw akikou a;alalna aw in vanpi agingsak a:a-aw zak a a-om chiang in amau alen kei hi. 5Pathian in a-aw in lamdangtakin vanpi agingsak a;i theihtheih louh,thil thupite ahih zel hi. 6Ama'n lah vuk kiang ah,‘Lei ah kia in,’ achi ngal a;huchi mah bang in vuahmal phin kiang ah leng. 7Mi chiteng khut atuambit a;abawlsa mite tengteng inhuai atheihtheihna ding un. 8Huai lai in gamsate amun uah alut ua, akuate uah a-om uhi. 9Simlam dantan a kipan huihpi ahong a;mallam a kipan khovot. 10Pathian hu in tui khal piak ahi;tuite nakna hihhaksat in a-om. 11Ahi, meipi nawnna aposak a;akhophia meipi aphalhsak hi. 12Amah pi in akivial heihei ua,tentheihna khovel maikaih aamaute thu apiak peuhmah ahihna ding un. 13Bawlhoihna ding hiam,agam a ding hiam,ahihkeileh zahngaihna ding hiam a,ahon paisakna ah. 14“Hiai ngaikhia in, Aw Job;dingh kinken inla,Pathian thilhih lamdangte ngaihtuah in. 15Amaute tung a Pathian thupiak akoih a, ameipi khophia atansakdan na thei hia? 16Meipite kibuk diknate,amah theihna hoihkim thilhihlamdangte na thei hia? 17Sim huih ziak a lei adaih sipsip lai a,na puansilhte alumdan? 18Amah toh van, suntawm limlang bang a khauh na phalh thei hia? 19Akiang a ka gen ding uh hon sinsak in;mialna ziak in ka thugen ding uh ka gelkhol thei kei ua. 20Thu ka gen ding chih amahhilh ding ahi diam?Ahihkeileh mihing in valh khit a om ut ding ahi diam? 21“Huchi in mite'n meipi a om khovak amu kei ua:himahleh huih anung a,amaute ahihsiang hi. 22Mal a kipan in dangka-eng bang a thupi ahong pai a;Pathian alalna ah athupi hi. 23Bangkim hihthei thu ahihleh,mu thei kei hang; thilhihtheihna ah athupi petmah hi.Huan vaihawmna leh dikna hauhna ah gim athuaksak kei ding hi. 24Huaiziak in mite'n amah alau ua; lungtang a pil kuamah alimsak kei hi.”

JOB 38: 1Huchi in Toupa'n pingpei a kipan inJob adawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Theihna bei thute a thuhilhhihmial hiai kua ahia? 3Kipasalsak in tu in na kawnggak inla; hon dong ding ka hi,ka kiang a na gen ding ahi. 4Lei kingaknate ka koih lai in nang koi ah na om a?Gen in,theihsiamna nei na hihleh. 5Atehnate kua bawl ahia?Thei na hihleh!Atung a tehna khau kua zan ahia? 6Anuai suangphumtekua phum ahia?Huai aning a suang kua koih ahia? 7Zingsang aksite'n la asakkhawm ua,Pathian tapate tengteng kipak a akikou lai un? 8“Ahihkeileh kua'n kongkhakte in tuipite akhakbing a?Gil a kipan hong pawtkhia bang a,ahong puahkhiak lai in. 9Huai a puansilh meipi leh,khomial bikbek, huai a ding atuamna puan ka bawl a, 10huai a ding a ka thupiak bawl a,kalhnate leh kongkhakte koih a, 11hiai tan na hong pai ding,himahleh aban hilou in, kachih a; hiai lai ah aki-uangsakna tuikihotte kholsak in a-om ding uh, ka chih lai in? 12Na nite akipat nungsiahzingsang thu na pia in,phalvak amun thei ding in na bawlta hia? 13Lei tawpnate amat theih a,huai a kipan a gilou sinkhiakahihtheihna ding in? 14Chiamtehna nuai a tungman lei bang in mel akikheng a;puansilh bang in thil tengteng zenei in adingkhia hi. 15Gilou a kipan a akhovak uhlettangsak ahi a,aban liksang uh akitan hi. 16“Tuipi nak sung ah na lutta hia?Ahihkeileh tui thuk tawp ah na paita hia? 17Sihna kongpite na kiang ah taklat in a-omta hia?Ahihkeileh sihna limliap kongpite na muta hia? 18Leitung zatdan na theisiamta hia?Puangkhia in, huai na theihleh. 19Khovak tenna zotna lampi koi ah a-om a,huan khomial omna mun koisan ahia? 20Huchi a gamgi tan a na tonpih theih a,huai a inn tan a lampite na theihna ding in? 21Thei mah niteh maw,huai lai a piangta hi ding hi chin a?Na nite atam mahmah ngal a!

JOB 38: 22“Vuk koihkhawmna ah na lut ngei hia,ahihkeileh gial koihkhawmna na muta hia? 23Huai buaina hun a ding leh kidou leh kisat ni a dia ka koihkholhte? 24Bang lampi ah ahia khovak akikhen hiam leitung asuahlam huih adalhzak? 25Kua'n ahia tui tampi luanna ding a tuilam khuak a,kekkia a dia lampi sial? 26Mihing omlouhna mun gam tung a vuah zusak ding in;mihing omlouhna,gamdai tung ah. 27Lei kisia leh segawpsalungkimsak ding; loupa hing nou khangkhesak ding? 28Vuah in pa anei hia?Ahihkeileh daitui takte kua suan ahia? 29Kua gil a kipan a tui khal hong pai ahia?Van daitui khal ngou, kua suahsak ahia? 30Suang bang in tuite atak a,tui thuk maite akhal hi. 31“Siguk khaute na khihkhawm thei hia?zuheisuktun khaute na phel thei hia? 32Ama hunbi ah Aksi lamvak achiamtehnate na pikhe thei hia?Ahihleh Zaangkhua leh tate na pi thei hia? 33Van thupiakte na thei hia?Huai lalna lei ah na dingkhesak thei diam? 34Nang tui tampi in akhuhtheihna ding in meipi kiang ah aw na suah thei diam? 35Amau kiang ah,‘Hiai ah om ung,’ chi a apaikhiak theihna ding un khophiatena sawlkhe thei a hia? 36Sunggil lam ah pilna kua'n akoih a?Ahihkeileh lungsim kiang ah kua'n theihsiamna apia a? 37Pilna in kua'n meipite asim thei dia?Van tuithawlte kua'n abokhe thei dia? 38 Toupa'n Job Adawng 40Akua ua aboh ua,buk ding a abukna mun ua a-om nilouh lai un? 41Va-ak a ding a an kua'n pia ahia?Anoute Pathian kiang akikou aan duh man a avakvak lai un?”

JOB 39: 39 1“Suangpi a gam sathakte'nnou asuahsak hun uh na thei hia?Ahihkeileh nou aneih lai uh na chiamteh thei hia? 2Akha chinsak zah uh na thei hia?Ahihkeileh apian hun na thei hia? 3Akun ua, atate uh asuang uh,alungkhamnate uh apaikhia uhi. 4Atate uh deihhuaitak in a-om ua,gamlak ah akhanglian ua; akuankhia ua,ahong kik nawn kei uh. 5“Kua'n gam sabiltung akhahkhia a?Ahihkeileh kua'n gamsabiltunghonte aphel a? 6Kua ahia a-inn ding a gamdai ka piak a,atenna ding a gamkeu ka bawlsak? 7Khopi buai nuanua amusit a,hawltute kikounate aza kei hi. 8Mual dungte agantatna mun ahi a,huan thil hing chiteng azong hi. 9“Na nna sem ding in gam bawngtal alungkim hia?Ahihkeileh na anpiakna kiang ah a-om gige diam? 10Leilehna ah khau in gam bawngtal na khihthei diam?Ahihkeileh na nung ah phaizangte atoktam diam? 11Ahatna athupi ziak in,amah na muang diam?Ahihkeileh akiang ah na sepgimna na khiak diam? 12Na buhchi inn ahon tut a,na buhphual a buh akaihkhawm theihna ding inamah na muang diam? 13“Ostrik kha kisatheitak inakizap a; akhavengte lehamulte amigi hia? 14Atuite lah leitung ah anusia a,leivui ah alumsak a, 15Khe in asikkham thei chih amangngilh a, ahihkeilehgamsa in asikgawp thei, chih. 16Amah a hilou bang in, anoute siatna ding in akhauh a;asepgimna bangmah lou himahleh, alau kei hi. 17Pathian in pilna angolhsakziak in, theihsiamna leng ape sam kei hi. 18Tungsang lam a akitawisangchiang in, sakol lehatungtuangmi anuihsan. 19“Sakol hatna nang piak hia?Mul nem in angawng na tuam hia? 20Khaukhup bang in na tawmsak hia?Ahamna thupi alauhuai ve. 21Guam ah lei akhuat a,ahatna ah akipak a,mi kigalthuamte tuak ding in apaikhia. 22Lauhuai anuihsan a,alungdong kei a,namsau leng anungngat sam kei hi. 23Amah ah thalbawm aging lengleng a,teipite zelzel leh chiangzum. 24Kihtakhuaina leh hehna inlei anawmvalh a;Pengkul aw ahi chih leng agingta sam kei hi.

JOB 39: 25Pengkul agin teng in, ‘Hah’achi a, kidouna, heutute vanpiging leh kikou,gamlapi a pan athei. 26“Na pilna in mu sangpi a lengsak in, akhate simlam ah aphalh hia? 27Nang thupiak in hia muvanlai in tungsang a leng a abu aseh? 28Suangpi tung ah ateng a,huai ah giahna anei a,suanghengte leh kulh muanhuaite ah. 29Huai a kipan in mat ding amu a;amitte'n gamla amu hi. 30Anoute'n leng sisan atawpbei ua;thah a a-omna mun, huai ah a-om hi.”

JOB 40: 1Huai lou in Toupa'n Jobadawng a, hichi in achi: 2“Kuapeuh awlmoh nei lou in thil Bangkim hihthei akiselpih diam?Kuapeuh Pathian kiselpih,huai tuh amah dawngsak un.”Job Thuphatawina 3Job in Toupa adawng a,hichi in achi: 4“Ngai in, bangmah ka hita kei a;bangchi in ka hon dawng dia?Ka kam ah ka khut ka koih. 5Khatvei ka pauta a,ka dawng kei ding;ahi, nihvei himahleh ka pau nawn kei ding.”Pathian In Job Achouna 6Toupa'n pingpei a kipan inJob adawng a, hichi in achi. Toupa' Thugen 7“Kipasalsak inla, tu in na kawng gak in.Nang a kipan ka hon phut dia, kei kiang ah na hon puang ding hi. 8Ka vaihawmna bangmah lou a koih ding na hiam?Siam na tantheihna dia,kei hon mohpaih ding na hi hia? 9Ahihkeileh Pathian bang in ban na nei hia?Amah bang in aw in vanpi na gingsak thei hia? 10Tu in nang hoihkim lehzahna in kizem in;zahna leh lalna in kivan in. 11Na hehna dimlette sungkhia in;michih kisatheite en inla,hihniam in. 12Michih kisathei en inla,kainiam in; adinna uah migiloute tuanchil in. 13Leivui ah amaute selkhawm in;mundai ah amai uh kan in. 14Huchi in na khut taklam in nang ahondam thei chih ka hon thei ding. 15“Ngai dih, nang ka hon siam bang a ka siam,tu in behemoth en in;bawngtal bang in loupa ane hi. 16En in tu in, akawng ah ahatna a-om a, agilpi thate ah ahatna a-om hi. 17Sidar sing bang in amei atangsak a, apheite thaguitephankhawm in a-om hi. 18Aguhte dal lawng ahi a, aguh leh tangte siktawn bang ahi. 19“Pathian lampite amakai lianpen ahi,amah bawlpa kia in anamsau amah kiang lam naih ding in abawl thei ding. 20Chihtaktak in mualte'n amah an apuak ua; gamsate tengteng mawlna mun ah. 21Singbawk limte nuai ah alum a,pumpeng kawm leh chiknawng lak ah. 22Tui lili singte'n alim un akhuh ua; lui gei singnah kaite'n atuam kimvel uhi. 23Ngai in, lui adimletleh,aling kei a; akam chiang pha hial in Jordan khang mahleh, amuang hi. 24Akiven lai in kuapeuh in amah sikkawi in aman diam,thang in anak avut pailet diam?”

JOB 41: 41 1“Ngakuai inLeviathan na kaikhe thei diam?Ahihkeileh akhau in alei na sawntum thei diam? 2Anak sung ah khauhual na thun thei diam?Ahihkeileh sikkawi in ahaizek na vut pailet thei diam? 3Na kiang ah thilnget tampi abawl diam?Ahihkeileh na kiang ah thu nemte agen diam? 4Tangtawn a ding in amah sikha dia na laktheihna ding in,nang toh thukhun abawl diam? 5Vasa toh bang in amah tohna mawl diam?Ahihkeileh na sikhanutea ding in amah na hen diam? 6Ngaman mite'n amah sumsinnading in abawl ding uam?Sumsin mite lak ah amah azuak ding uam? 7Siklen in avun na dimsakthei diam,ahihkeileh alu ngalingte in? 8Atung ah na khut koih in;kidouna theigige in, huchi in na hih nawn kei ding hi. 9“Ngai in, amah lametnabangmah lou ahi; amah muhmahmah in mi paihkhiak in a-om kei dia hia? 10Amah hihhalh ngam khop dingin kuamah ahang kei;ka ma a dingh kua ahia le? 11Amah ka dit ding, ka kiangah kua'n ape masa a le?Van nuai a om peuhmah kei' a ahi. 12“Aguh-le-tang thu ah ka dai kei ding, ahatna mahmah leh,apum kilawmna ah leng. 13Apuansilh tungnung kua'n asuahsak thei dia?Akamkaih thuah nih sung ah kua ahong pai dia? 14Amai kongkhakte kua'nahong thei dia?Aha kimvel ah lauhuaina a-om. 15Alip hattakte akisaktheihna ahi,namkipsa bang a khakkhum ahi. 16Akal ua huihzam alut theihlouhna ding in,khat in adang anaih mahmah. 17Khat leh adang akizom ua,akisoumat ua,khen theih louh in a-om uh. 18Ahahchhiaite'n avaksak a,amitte zingsang mitvunte bang ahi. 19Akam a pan meikuangte apawtkhia,mei-ekte atawmkhia hi. 20Anakvangte a kipan inmeikhu apawt a, halsiannabel leh chiklak loupa kanga kipan bang in. 21“Ahu in suang akuangsak a,akam a pan meikuang apawtkhia hi. 22Angawng ah hatna a-om gige a,ama ah lauhuaina alam hi. 23Asa thate akizomkhawm ua,atung ah akip ua;hihtat theih in a-om kei uh. 24Alungtang suang bang inakip a; ahi, buhgawina suangnuainung bang ahi.

JOB 41: 25Amah athoh chiang in,mihatte alau uh;lauh luatna ziak in omdan ding athei kei uh. 26Mi'n amah namsau in satleh,aphatuam kei hi; teipi hiam,thal hiam, sikmuk zum hiam in leng. 27Buhpawl bang in sik asim a,sing muatsa bang in dalsik. 28Thal in amah ataisak thei kei ding;amah lak ah vaisuanglot suangte buhpawl asuak hi. 29“Khetbukte buhpawl bang a sim ahi.Teipi ging anuihsan hi. 30Anuailam pangte belpei ahi,buannawi tung ah buhkhetna chiang bang in akiphah hi. 31Tui thukte belpi sou bolhbolh ding in abawl a,tuipi nuh theih bawm in abawl hi. 32Anung ah lampi avaksak a;tui thuk samkang nei asa uhi. 33Leitung ah amah bang a lauh nei lou a-om kei a, 34Thil sang chiteng a-en a,kisathei tapate tengteng tung ah kumpipa ahi.”

JOB 42: 1Huchi in Job in Toupa adawng a, hichi in achi.Job Thugen Nanungpen 2“Thil bangkim na hihthei chih leh nang thiltup kham theih ahi kei chih ka thei hi. 3Hiai thuhilhna theihna tel lou a sel kua ahia?Huaiziak in ka theihsiam louh,ka theih louh, kei a dia thillamdang luate ka genkhia hi. 4“Za in, ka hon ngen ahi, ka pau ding;nang ka hon phut ding, kei lam ah nang puang in, na hon chi hi. 5Zakna bil in nang ka hon za a;himahleh tu in ka mit in ka hon mu a, 6Huaiziak in ka kikih a, leivui leh meivu ah ka kisik hi.”Thukhitna Thu 7Huan hichi ahong hi a, huchi a Toupa'n Job kiang a hiai thute agen khit in, Toupa'n Teman mi Eliphaz kiang ah, “Ka hehna nang tung leh na lawm nihte tung ah akuang, ka sikha Job bang a noute'n ka tanchin thil dik na gen louh ziak un,” achi hi. 8“Huaiziak in tu in, bawngtal sagih leh belamtal sagih la unla, ka sikha Job kiang ah hoh unla, nou a ding in halmang thillat lan un; huchi in noute a ding in ka sikha Job athum ding a; amah vang in ka sang dia, huchi in na haina uh dungzui in na tung uah ka hih kei ding; ka sikha Job bang in lah ka tanchin thil dik na gen kei uh,” chi in. 9Huchi in Teman mi Eliphaz leh Shuah mi Bildad leh Naamath mi Zophar akuan ua, Toupa'n thu apiak bang in ahihta uhi. Toupa'n Job asangta hi.Job Lehnih Vualzawlna 10Alawmte a dia Job athum zoh in Toupa'n Job saltanna akiheisak a, Toupa'n Job ama a aneih zahnih apeta hi.

JOB 42: 11Huai lai in akiang ah, a-unaute tengteng leh asanggamnute tengteng leh tuma lam a amel theihsa tengteng leh a-insung a tanghou amah toh nete ahong pai ua, amah anem ua, Toupa'n atung a hoih lou atunsak tengteng tungtang thu ah amah alungmuan uhi. Michih in leng ama sum leh michih in dangka-eng bilbah apia uhi. 12Huchi in Toupa'n Job tawpna lam a kipatna lam sang in anak vualzawl zaw hi. Belam singkhat-le-sangli leh sangawngsau sangguk leh bawngtal sangkhat leh sabengtungnu sangkhat anei hi. 13Tapa sagih leh tanu thum leng anei hi. 14Amasapen, Jemima achi a; anihna min, Kezia; athumna min, Keren-happuk. 15Huchi in gamsung pumpi ah Job tanute bang a melhoih a-om kei uh; apa un a-unaute lak ah goutan amaute apia hi. 16Huai nung in Job, kum za-le-sawmli adam a, atapate leh atapate' tapate, khang lina tan amu hi. 17Huchi in Job atek mahmah a, a-upat tak ziak in asita hi.
