JEREMIAH 1: 1Jeremiah 2Judah Kumpipa, Ammon tapa Josiah hun lai, avaihawm akum sawm-le-thumna ah akiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. 3Judah kumpipa, Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm lai in leng ahong tung a; Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Zedekiah akum sawm-le-khatna tawp, Jerusalem sal a pi akha ngana tan in.Jeremiah Sapna 4 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: 5“Gilsung a ka hon bawl ma in ka hon thei a, sul a kipan a na pawtkhiak ma in leng ka hon koihtuam a, namte kiang a zawlnei hi ding in ka hon sep khin,” chi in. 6Huan ke'n, “Eh, Toupa Pathian, ngai dih, thu ka gensiam kei, ka naupang ngal a,” ka chi hi. 7 Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Ka naupang, chi ke'n, ka hon sawlna peuhmah kiang ah na hoh ding a, ka hon thupiak peuhmah na gen ding ahi. 8Amaute lau ke'nla, nang hon hunkhe ding in na kiang ah ka om hi,” chi in. 9Huchi in Toupa'n ahon sawk a, ka kam akhoih a, Toupa'n ka kiang ah, 10“Ngai in, na kam ah ka thute ka koihta, en dih, namte leh kumpipa gamte tung ah, botkhe ding, phel ding, hihse ding, paikhe ding, bawlhoih ding leh dingkhesak ding in tuni in ka hon koih na hi,” achi hi.Mengmuhna Nihte 11Huai lou leng ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, “Jeremiah, bang na mu?” achi hi. Ke'n, “Vaisuaklu singhiang ka mu,” ka chi hi. 12Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Na mu kha mahmah ve; ka thu tangtun ding in ka kigalging gige ahi,” achi hi. 13Huan anihveina ding in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, “Bang na mu a?” chi in. Ke'n bel, “Bel sou bolhbolh, agong mallam nga ka mu,” ka chi hi.

JEREMIAH 1: 14Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Gam a tengte tung ah mallam a kipan thil hoih lou ahong tung ding. 15Ngai dih, mallam kumpipa gam nam tengteng ka sam ding; chih Toupa thupawt ahi; ahong pai ding ua, Jerusalem kongpi lutna ah, akimvel kulhbaang tengteng chin ah leh Judah khopi teng ah alaltutphah uh atung chiat ding uh. 16Hon paisan in, pathian dangte kiang ah gimlim ahal ua, amau khutsuak mah abia ua; hiai athulimlouhna teng tungtang ua ka thugelte ka puang ding hi. 17Huaiziak in puan teng inla, thou inla, ka hon thupiak teng akiang uah va gen in; ama uah lunglel ke'n, huchi lou in zaw ama uah ka hon lunglelsak kha ding hi. 18Ngai in, tuni in nang, agam pumpite, Judah kumpipate, aheutute, asiampute leh agam mipite dou in khopi kulh a um leh sik khuam leh dalsik khuam in ka hon bawl ahi. 19Hon sual ding ua, himahleh ahon zou kei ding uh; hon hunkhe ding in na kiang ah ka om hi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

JEREMIAH 2: 1Ka kiang ah Toupa thuahong tung a, hichi in achi: 2“Kuan inla, Jerusalem zak in kikou in, Toupa'n hichi in achi,‘Na tuailai a na migitdante,kikham lai a na hon itdante ka theigige hi;gamdai a khoh louh gam a na hon zuihdan bang. 2Pathian In Israel Akepna 3Israel bel Toupa a dia hihsiangthou,agahpung masa ahi,amah negaimi peuhmah amoh ding a,atung uah siatna ahong tung ding,’ ”chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Israel Suangtute Khelhna 4Aw Jakob inkote leh Israel inkote tengteng aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un; 5 Toupa'n hichi in achi,“Na pipute un kei ah diktatlouhna bang ahia amuh uh,kei a kipan gamlapi ahavakmang ua, bangmah loudelh a, ana ki-otsak uh? 6‘Toupa, Aigupta gam a kipan hon pikhia a, gamdai, gamkeu,kokhuk mun, sihna limliap leh gamkeu mun,kuamah paisuak ngeilouhna,kuamah omlouhna mun a hon pi paisuakpa koi a om ahia?’ achi kei uh. 7Gam hoihtak ah, agah leh hoihna ne ding in, ka hon pilut a,himahleh na lut uleh ka gam na hihnin ua, ka goutan thilkihhuai in na bawl uh. 8Siampute'n, ‘Toupa koi a om ahia?’ achi kei ua,Dan zang mite'n ahon thei sam kei uh,vaihawmte ka tung ah ahel ua,zawlneite'n Baal min in thu agen ua,thil phatuam lou dingte adelh uh.”Amite Toh Kal A Toupa Thubuai 9“Huchi in ka hon langbawl ding a, na tate uh ta nawnte leng ka langbawl lailai ding,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 10Kittim tuikulh ah va hoh unla,en un, Kedar ah mi sawl unla,chiktak in ngaihtuah un,hichibang thil a-omngeina hiam chih theihna ding in. 11Namte'n apathian uh akhenguhia, pathiantak hiloupi leng?Ka mite'n bel athupina uh,thil phatuam loutak in akhek uh. 12“Aw vante, lamdang sa unla,hon mulkimsak henla,mau tuaituai un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

JEREMIAH 2: 13Ka mite'n thil nih ahihkhial uhi:kei, hinna tuikhuk ahon paisan ua,tui ching thei lou dingtuivungte atoukhia uhi.Israel Muanhuai Louhna Gahte 14Israel sikha ahi hia?Sikha mawng a piang hia?Bangziak a nuaisiah a om ahia? 15Humpinelkai tuailaite'n hamkhum in,atung ah aw asuah ua,agam ahihgawp khinta uh,akhopite leng luahmi nei lou in akangsiang khin hi. 16Memphis mi leh Tahpanhes mite'n,na luzang agiausak khinta uh. 17 Toupa na Pathian in lampi aahon pi lai a, na taimangsanziak in, huai na tung ana tunsak ahi kei maw? 18Nile tui dawn ding aAigupta lampi na zuih, nang ding a bang aphatuam a?Luipi tui dawn ding aAssuria lampi na zuih,nang ding in bang aphatuam a? 19Na thulimlouhna in honthuaksak ding a,na nungkinna in nang ahon sal ding hi;hon launa nei lou Toupa naPathian na paisan a, thil giloutakleh kha mahmah ahi na hih,na theikhia inla, mu telta in,chih, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupathupawt ahi.Israel In Toupa Biak Ding Anial 20Nidanglai a pan na hakkolhihtan in, na khaute leng nahihtatta hi, ‘Na nna ka sem nawn kei ding,’ na chi a, mual sangte,singbawk nuai ah na kizuak hi. 21Chi dik zang in grepgui hoihmahmah ka hon phut a,bangchidan a kikheng a,kei a dia grep tak lou hong suakta na hia? 22Tangal in kisil in sahbon tampizang mah lechin, na thulimlouhnaka mitmuh in adawk teitei,chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 23‘Ka kihihnin sam a, Baalteka delh sam a, bang achiachi thei na hia, phaizang kuak ana omdante en inla,na thilhihsate thei in;sangawngsaula huk diangngongngong na hi vele. 24Gam sabiltung gamdai a om,ahuk lai a dak uau-uau a dikvutvut bang;a-utna kua'n ahia dalzou ding?Azongmi kihihgim nuam dah hen,ahun in amu na ding uh.

JEREMIAH 2: 25Na khe ah khedap bun lou in omke'nla, na dang leng hul kei heh;nang bel, lamet abeita,pau tuam mite ka ngai a,amau ka delh ding,’ na chi hi.Israel Gawt Tak Him Ahi 26“Guta aphawk ua azum bang in, Israel inkote azumta uh, amau, akumpipate uh, aheutute uh, asiampute uh, azawlneite uh leng. 27Singbul kiang a, ‘Ka pa na hi,’ chi a, suangbul kiang a, ‘Kei hon suangtu na hi,’ chi mite; masuan lou in adekkhuk sah uh ahon suan zaw ua, amangbat hun un bel, ‘Thou in, hon hondam tanla,’ achi ding uh, na pathian, huai na bawlte koi a om ahita ua? 28“Amau thou zaw uhenla, na mangbat lai in ahon hondam thei khamoh ding uhia; aw Judah, na pathiante bel na khopite zah mah ahi ve ua oi! 29Bangziak a ka tung a vui nak? Na vek un ka tung ah thil na hihkhial ngal ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 30Na tate uh ka khen a, aphatuam kei, ahoih loh tuan kei uh; humpinelkai duhgawl bang mai in, noumau namsau in na zawlneite uh ane khin uhi. 31Aw khangthakte aw, Toupa thu thei un, Israel a ding in gamdai gam bang ka hi maw? Mial sah meuhmouh gam ka hi maw? Ka mite'n bangdia, ka pawt kichianta ua, ka hong kik nawn kei ding uh, chi uh ahia? 32Nungak siangthou in akizephoihnate amangngilh thei in, mouthak in akivatna amangngilh thei ding maw? Ka mite'n ni sim seng louh sung in ahon na mangngilhta uhi. 33Deihtakmi muhtheihna ding in na omdan ngentel na chia! Numei gilou kiang ah leng na omdan na sinsakta ve. 34Na nikte ah leng migenthei poi khoihloute hinna sisan alang a; na inn abuluh lai khutmat ahi kei uhi.

JEREMIAH 2: 35“Ka moh kei a, kei a kipan ahehna lakmang ahi, na chi nawn ngal a, ngai in, ‘Ka gilou kei hi,’ na chih ziak in, na tungthu ka ngaihtuah ding. 36Na omdan kheng mengmeng a, bangziak a vialvak vak na hia? Assuria na zumpih mah bang in, Aigupta leng na zumpih lai ding hi. 37Na khutte lukhuk in akiang ua pan na pawtkhe nawn dia, Toupa'n lah na muannate apaikheta ngal a, amau ah na lamzang kei ding hi.”

JEREMIAH 3: 1Mi'n zi ma henla, amah a pan paikhia in pasal dang neileh, ama'n aneikik nawn diam? Agam in nitloh hial lou ding hia? chih a-om. Nang bel tangval tampi kiang ah na hukmang in, huchipi in ka kiang ah na hong kik nawn ding maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 2Tang giau viauvuau lam ah na mitte lengtousak inla, en in, ahon kithuahpihlouhna mun koi ah? Gamdai a Arabia mi bang mai in amau ngak in lampi geite ah na tu nilouh sek, na hukna leh na thulimlouhnate in gam na hihnin khinta hi. 3Amuanhuai Lou Israel 4Ka pa, ka tuailai a hon pipa na hi, chi in tua kipan in na sam kei ding maw? 5Na heh tawntung ding a hia? Athangpaihna a omden ding ahia? Ngai in, huchibang in na pau ngei a, himahleh agilou theipen in thil na hih hi.Israel Leh Judah Akisik Ngeingei Ding Uh Ahi 6Huai lou leng Josiah vaihawm lai in Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi, “Nungkinhat Israel thilhih na mu hia? Tang sang chih a kuantou a, singbawk chih nuaite a ahukna thil ahihte? 7Huan ke'n bel hiai thil tengteng ahih nung in ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn ding, ka chi a; himahleh ahong kik tuan kei; huchi in asanggamnu, khemhat Judah in amu samta hi. 8Ama'n nungkinhat Israel a-angkawm ziak a ka mak a, makna lai ka piak amuh in leng asanggamnu, khemhat Judah in alau tuan kei, huchih nak sang in ava hoh a, hukna thil ava hihteita hi. 9Huan ahuk mawkmawk zenhouh ziak in gam ahihnin khinta a; singbul, suangbul kiang ah ang akawmta hi. 10Huchipi in leng asanggamnu, khemhat Judah lungtangtak a ka kiang a hong kik lou in azuaulel in ahong kik a,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

JEREMIAH 3: 11Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi, “Nungkinhat Israel in asanggamnu, khemhat Judah sang in diktatzaw in akihihlang a. 12Kuan inla, hiai thu mallam ah va puang in; Nungkinhat Israel hong kik in,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Heh melpu in ka hon en kei ding a, zahngaitheitak ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, ka heh tawntung kei ding hi. 13Toupa na Pathian tung a na helnate, singbawk nuai a pau tuam mite kiang a na kiphal gaihnate, ka paukam suak na manlouhnate a na thulimlouhna ah thupha tawi in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 14Aw nungkinhat tate aw, hong kik un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Nou hon honpa ka hi ngal a, na lak ua kipan khopi a mi khat, inkuan a mi nih ka hon la ding a, Zion ah ka hon pi ding hi. 15Ka lung toh kituak belamchingte ka hon pe ding a, amau theihna leh theihsiamnate in noute ahon vak ding uhi. 16Huchi in na hong tam ua, gam a na hong pun chiang un, huai ni chiang in amau, Toupa thukhun bawm, achi ngei nawn kei ding uh; alungsim uah alut kei ding a, theih leng atheigige sam kei ding uh; akhelah nawn kei ding ua, abawl nawn kei ding uh. 17Huai nung in Jerusalem bel Toupa laltutphah achi ding ua, huai ah nam tengteng Toupa min in Jerusalem ah ahong paikhawm ding uh; alungtang gilou khauhna uh bang in apaita kei ding uh.

JEREMIAH 3: 18Huai ni chiang in Judah inkote Israel inkote toh a-omkhawm ding ua, mallam gam a kipan in, na pipute uh kiang a gouluah ding a ka piak gam ah, ahong pawtkhe ding uh.Pathian Mite Milim Biakna 19Ke'n bel, “Nam chih lak a gouluah ding hoihpen,gam nuamtak hon pia in,tate lak a hon koih ka utdan!Ka pa, chi a na hon sap a, na hon zuihna a kipan na pialmang kei ding,chih ka na um hi. 20Zi khemhat pasal ang kawmsan bang in,Aw Israel inkote aw,hon khem na hita ve ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 21Tang giau velvul tung ah husaa-om hi, Israel suante kap leh thil ngen husa, Toupa Pathian amangngilh ua,a-omdan uh ahihgawp ziak un. 22Anungkin hat tate aw, hong kikunla, na nungkin seknate uh ka hihdam ding hi; en dih, na kiang ah ka hong pai uhi, nang Toupaka Pathian uh na hi. 23“Mualte a hotdamna lamet athawn ahi, tang tung a husa chiak vengvungte; Israel hotdamna zaw Toupa i Pathian kia ah ahi a-om. 24Himahleh huai thilkihhuai mahmah in i tuailai a kipan i pipute'n tha asukbeina uh anebeita hi; abelamhonte uh, aganhonte uh, atanute uh, atapate uh tan in. 25Zum in lum ni e, i zahlakna in hon khuh heh; Toupa i Pathian tung ah thil i hihkhial ua, ei leh i pipute'n i tuailai a kipan tuni tan in Toupa i Pathian paukam i mang kei uhi.”

JEREMIAH 4: 2Toupa ahin lai teng, chi a na kichiamleh namte amah ah nuamsa akichi ding ua, amah asuangta ding uh. 3“Judah mite leh Jerusalem kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na lei sit uh let unla, lingte lak ah chi theh kei un. 4Kisik Ding A Sapna 1“Aw Israel, na hong kikleh, ka kiang ngei ah na hong kik ding ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Na kihhuainate ka mitmuh louh a na koihmang a, chihtaktak a, thugel diktak zang a diktattak a; 5Judah gam ah hilh unla,Jerusalem ah puang un,Gam pumpi ah pengkul mut unla, ngaihtak in kikou un.Hong kikhawm unla, kulh neikhopite ah i lut ding uh, chi un; 6Zion lam ah puanzak khai unla,bitna zong in tai unla,zekai kei un, mallam a panthil hoih lou ka hon tungsak ding,nakpi a siatna. 7Gammang nuai ning kitel a kipan in humpinelkai apawt hi,namte hihse ding; amun a kipan apawtta,ahong pai lellel hi, na gam hihse ding leh na khopite teng mi nei lou khop a sugawp ding in. 8Huaiziak in sai-ip puan teng unla,kap un, mau vongvong un;i lak ua kipan in Toupa hehna thupi lah akikaikhe ngal kei a.” 9“Huai ni chiang in hichi ahong hi ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; kumpipa lungtang a lungke khin ding a, heutute lungtang leng; siampute'n gen ding athei kei ding ua, zawlneite'n lamdang asa ding uh.” 10Huan ke'n, “Ah, Toupa Pathian, hiai mite leh Jerusalem nakpitak a khem na hi ve, ‘Muanna na nei ding uh,’ na chi a, namsau in hinna asun zawta,” ka chi hi. 11Huai hun chiang in hiai mite leh Jerusalem kiang ah, “Gamdai tang giau velvul a kipan huih sa, ka tanu, ka mite zapsiang ding hilou; siangsak ding hi sam lou; 12Huih hat lua, ka thu in ahong tung ding ahi;

JEREMIAH 4: tu in leng atungthu uh ngaihtuahpa kei ka hi,” chih ahi ding.Judah, Melmate Umkimvelna 13Ngai dih, ahong paitou ding, meipi bang in, akangtalai pingpei bang maite; asakolte muvanlai sang in ahatzaw uh, i tung gik na e! Buluh a om i hi ve ua. 14Aw Jerusalem, thulimlouhna a kipan na lungtang silsiang inla, hotdam a na omtheihna ding in; bang tan ahia na ngaihtuahna gilou na pai ding? 15Dan gam a kipan aw ahong pawtkhia a, Ephraim tang a kipan in thil hoih lou apuang hi. 16Namte hilh unla, Jerusalem ah puang un, “Ngai dih, gam gamlapi a kipan sual mite ahong tung uh, Judah khopite tung ah a-aw uh asuah uhi. 17Louma veng mite bang mai in akimvel in a-um ua, ka tung a ahel ziak un chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 18“Na omdan leh na thilhihte'n, hiaite na tung ah atun ahi, hiai na siatna ding ahi, ana mahmah a na lungtang sun ei ve.”Amite Ziak A Jeremiah Lungzinna 19Ka lung ana, ka lung ana,ka lungtang mahmah ana,ka sung ah ka lungtang abuaita a, ka om maimai thei kei,aw ka hinna, pengkul ging,kidouna husa ka zak ziak in. 20Siatna tung ah siatna atungta,gam pumpi loh in a-omta,ka puaninte ahihse guih ua,ka puanzakte leng mitphiat kal lou in. 21“Bang tan ahia kidouna puanzakka muh ding a,pengkul ging ka zak ding? 22Ka mite ahai mahmah ua lah athei ngal kei ua,naupang haitak,theihna nei lou bang mai ahi ua,thil gilou hih asiam ua,thil hoih hihdan asiam kei uh.”Siatna Hong Tung Ding Jeremiah In Amuhdan 23Leitung ka etleh, ngai dih,segawp leh vuak in a-om a;vante'n vakna anei kei uh. 24Tangte ka etleh, ngai in,aling uh, mual tengteng leng atang zualzual uh. 25Ka etleh, ngai in,mihing a-om kei ua, tunglengvasate alengmang khinta uh.

JEREMIAH 4: 26Ka etleh, ngai in, louma hoihtegamdai asuak khin a,khopite leng achim khin, Toupa leh ahehna mahmah ah. 27 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Gampumpi asegawp ding, himahleh ka hihtawp tawntung kei ding.” 28“Huaiziak in lei in asuun ding a,tunglam vante leng amial ding;thu ka genta a, ka tumta hi,ka kisik kei a, ka lunghei kei hi. 29Sakol tung a tuang leh thalpeuzang mite husa ah,khopi pumpi ataikek ua,gammang ah alut ua,kho chih anusia ua,luahmi khat lel leng om lou in. 30“Huan nang, loh a na om hun chiang in bangchi in na hih dia?Puan san-au a kizem in,kivatna dangka-eng a kivan in,na mitte nuh mah lechin,na kihih lawm thawn ahi,na tangvalte'n ahon simmoh ding ua, na hinna lak atum uhi. 31Numei nauvei kikou husa ka za,tachil neinu thuak lai,Zion tanu nak ging, akhutte zak a,ka tung gik hi na mai e!Tualthat mite ma ah ka hinna abah khinta,” chi in.

JEREMIAH 5: 1Jerusalem kholakte ah vialtaiunla, chiamteh un! Amualtamte zong unla, mi khat bekdiktattak a hih a, thutak zongmahmah na muh theih uleh,Jerusalem ka ngaidam ding. 2“Toupa ahin a ahin sung,chi mah le uh, zuau inakichiam lel uh ahi. 3Aw Toupa, thutak namuhnop ahi kei a hia?Amau na sat a, himahlehalungkham tuan kei uh,amau na hihmang a,na thuzohna apom nuam tuan kei uh,suangpi sang a tak in atal uh ataksak ua,akilehhei nuam kei bikbek uhi. 4“Ke'n, hiaite miphalou,ahai lai ua, Toupa dan,a Pathian uh thugel athei kei uhi. 5Jerusalem Khelhna 6Huaiziak in gammang nuai ahumpinelkai in amaute akeiding a, gamdai ngia inamaute ane bei ding a,gialbem in akhopite a tang in,huai a hong pawt peuhmah abotzan ding;atatleknate uh atam a, anungkinnate uh athupi mahmah ziak in. 7“Bangchi in ka hon ngaidam thei dia?Na tate'n ahon paisan ua,Pathian hiloupite sam inakichiam ua, taitak a ka vaknung in ang a kawm ua,kizuak innte ah akivel hehu uh. 8Amaute zingsang a sakol vakvahbang mai ahi ua,michih ama invengpa zienlah in aham hi. 9Hiai thilte ziak in ka gawt kei ding maw?chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Hichibang nam tung ahphu ka kilaksak kei ding a hia? 10Abaangte ah kaltou unla,hihsia un, himahleh hihse khinvek kei un, ahiangte lamangun, Toupa a lah ahi ngal kei hi. 11Israel inkote leh Judah inkote'n ka tung ah lepchiahtak in ahih uh,”chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa'n Israel Apampaih 12 Toupa bel zuauthei dia sep in, “Bangmah ahihthei sam kei ding, siatna i tung uah atung kei ding, kial hiam namsau hiam i thuak kei ding. 13Zawlneite leng huihzam lel ahi ding ua, amau ah thu a-om kei a; atung uah hichibang a hih ahi ding,” achi uhi.

JEREMIAH 5: 14Huaiziak in Toupa, Sepaihte' Pathian in achi: “Huchibang thu na gen ziak un, ngai in, na kam a ka thute mei ka suaksak ding a, hiai mipi singte akang khin ding.” 15Ngai un, aw Israel inkote aw, gamlapi a kipan, nam khat na kiang ah ka hon pi ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Nam hattak, nidanglai a kipan a, apau uh na theih louh, athugen uh na theih louh namte. 16Athalbawm uh han kihong ahi a, avek un mihattak ahi khin uh. 17Na buhlaksa leh na nek ding ane khin vek ding uh; na tanute na tapate nek ding mahmah; na ganhonte, na belamhonte ane ding ua, na grep guite, na theipi kungte ane ding ua, na khopi kulh nei, na muanpi pente mahmah namsau in ahihse ding uhi. 18“Himahleh huai nite ah leng ka hon hihchimit kei ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 19Hichi ahong hi ding a, “Bangziak a Toupa i Pathian un hiai thil tengteng i tung ua hih ahia?” Na mite un achih hun chiang un, “N'on paisan ua, na gam ua pathian dangte nna na sep bang un, na gam lou uah, paudang mite nna na sem ding uh, akiang uah na chi ding ahi.” Toupa'n Amite Avauhilh 20“Jakob inkote lak ah hiai genkhia unla, Judah gam ah puang un. 21Aw theihtheihna nei lou, mihaite aw, mit nei a lah mu lou, bil nei a lah zaloute aw, hiai ngaikhia un. 22N'on kihta kei uh maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ka ma ah na ling kei ding uh maw? Kei, tuipi huap chiang a dia piautak, tangtawn a aletlouhna ding a daikaihna, tuipi kihot zou mahleh alet tuan theih louh a, ging honhon mahleh akhen theih louh ding bawlpa ka hi. 23Himahleh hiai mite'n genhakna leh helhat lungtang apu ua, ahel ua, ataimangta uh.

JEREMIAH 5: 24Alungtang un leng, Toupa i Pathian, ahuntak a vuah masa leh vuah nanung zusakpa, buh leh hunbi hon sehsakpa laudan i siam ding uh, achi sam kei uh. 25Hiai thilte na thulimlouhnate un ahihmang a, na khelhnate un thil hoih nou ahon tansak ahi. 26“Ka mite lak ah migilou a-om ngal ua, vasa gemmi in atan bang in atang gige ua, thang akam ua, mite aman uh. 27Bawm vasa a dim bang mai in, a-innte uh khemna in adim a, huaiziak in ahong lian ua, ahong hauhsak lohta uhi. 28Ahong thau ua, ahong zol ua, ahi, agitlouhna thilhihte un hun chiang anei kei, pa neiloute lamzanna ding in amau lam ah apang kei uhi. 29“Hiai thilte ziak in ka gawt kei dia hia?” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. “Hichibang nam tung ah ka hinna in phu ala kei ding a hia? 30Huai gam ah thillamdangtak leh mulkimhuaitak ahong tung hi. 31Zawlneite'n zuauthu agen ua, siampute'n lah amau thuthu in vai ahawm ua, ka mite'n lah huchibang hih a-ut uhi, atawp ah bangchi in na hih ding ua le?”

JEREMIAH 6: 1Benjamin tate aw, Jerusalem sung a kipan na bitna ding un taimang unla; Tekoa ah pengkul mut unla Beth-hakkerem ah theihsakna suaksak un. Mallam a kipan in siatna ahong kuan hi, hihsiatna thupi mahmah. 2Zion tanu melhoihtak leh noutak ka hihmang ding. 3Belampute, abelamhonte uh toh akiang ahong tung ding ua, akim ah apuaninte uh akaihkhum ding ua, amau mun chiat ah ake ding uh. 4Amah dou ding in kisa un, thou unla, sun lai in i sual ding uh, ei a ding in khawk hi na e! Ni akihekta a, nitaklam limliap ana sauta hi. 5Thou unla, zan in i sual mai ding uh! A-inn hoihhoih uh hihsia ni. 6Melmate'n Jerusalem A-umsuak Uh 7Tuileh in tui apawtsak bang mai in agitlouhna apawtsak sek, asung ah hiamgamna leh kilohna a-om chih zak ahi, ka ma ah natna leh kiliamsaknate a-om nilouh hi. 8Ka lungsim in ahon nutsiat vengveng ma in aw, Jerusalem, pilvang in, huchi lou in zaw luahmi nei lou gam dia hon bawl in, ka hon hihgawp kha ding hi.”Helhat Israel 9Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Israel khosuaksunte grep bang in lou siang vek unla, grep lou mi bang in ahiangte ban tuantuan un. 10“Angaihkhiak theihna ding un kua ka houpih in, kua ka theisak dia? Ngai in, bil lam zeksum louh ahi ua, angaikhe thei kei uh; ngai in, Toupa thu amau a ding in thil simmohhuai ahi a, kipahna mahmah anei nawn kei uh. 11Huaiziak in Toupa hehna in ka dim a, ka kidek zou nawn kei; kholak a naupang tung ah ka bungkhe dia; tangval omkhawmte tung ah leng, azi toh kiton in pasal leng lak ahi ding a, upate leh teksiate leng. 12A-innte uh midang kiang a piak ahi ding a, aloumate uleh azite uh toh;

JEREMIAH 6: huai gam a tengte tung ah ka khut lik ding ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 13Aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in leng michih huaihamna in adim ua; zawlneite leh siampute nangawn leng, michih azuautat mahmah uhi. 14Ka mite liamna, awlmoh loutak buaipih in, muanna a-om louh laitak in Muanna, muanna, achi ua. 15Thilkihhuai ahih un leng azum ua hia? Zum lou hial, azum het kei uh, amai uh leng asan sam kei; huaiziak in pukte lak ah apuk tei ding ua; amaute ka gawt hun chiang in paihkhiak in a-om ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.Pathian Lampi Israel In Anial 16 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Lamka thuam ah dingh unla, en un, lampi hoih omna lampi luite tawn un, huai ah pai unla, na kha uh a ding in khawlna na mu ding uh,” amau bel, “Huai ah ka pai kei ding uh,” achi uhi. 17Huan nou a ding in galvil mite ka sep ding a, “Pengkul ging ngaikhia un,” chi in; amau bel, “Ka ngaikhe kei ding uh,” achi uhi. 18Huaiziak in “Aw, namte aw, ngaikhia unla, aw, kikhawmte aw, atung ua hong tung ding thei un. 19Aw, leitung, ngaikhia in, ngai in, hiai mite tung ah siatna ka hon tun ding; angaihtuahna gahte uh; ka thute angaihkhiak louh ziak un; ka dante lah apaikhe hithet ua. 20Bangziak a Sheba a kipan begaw, gamlapi a kipan kawltute ka kiang hong tung nak ahia? Na halmang kithoihnate uh kipahpihtak ahi kei a, na kithoihnate un ahon kipaksak sam kei hi.

JEREMIAH 6: 21Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Hiai mite kiang ah puknate ka koih ding a, huai ah pate atapate uh toh apukkhawm ding ua, inveng leh alawm leng amangthang ding uh,’ ” chi in.Mallam A Kipan A Douna 22Huan Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, mallam gam a kipan mite ahong pai uh, lei mun tawp a kipan nam thupi mahmah ahong kuankhia hi. 23Thalpeu leh teipi atawi ua, hiamgam mahmah, zahngaihna himhim nei lou ahi uhi, ahusa uh tuipi ging honhon bang ahia; sakol tungte ah atuang ua, michih galkapmi bang a kivan in, aw, Zion tanu, nang ahong sual dek uhi,” chi in. 24“Aminthanna uh i za ua, i khutte azaw khinta, numei nauvei lunggimna bangbang lunggimna'n ahon manta hi. 25Gam ah paikhe kei un, lampi ah leng pai sam kei un, huai ah lah melma namsau a-om ngal a, kil chih ah launa a-om hi.” 26“Aw, ka mi, ka tanu, sai-ip puan teng inla, vut lak ah tubial in; tapa tang khat suun bang in suun inla, kap vongvong dih, i tung uah hihsemi ahong tung guih dek ngal ua. 27Ka mite lak a chiamtehmi ding leh ze-etmi ding in ka hon bawl a, a-omdan uh na theih a, na ze-et theihna ding in. 28Avek un genhaktak a helhat, gensiat ching a vialvak, dal leh sik bang ahi uh, hoihloupi in agamtang uhi. 29Pum in azap huhu a, mei ah asuan zulbei a, hihsiangthou tupna athawn lel ahi; migiloute lah paihmang ahi ngal kei ua. 30Mite'n dangkasik ek hoih lou achi ding uh, Toupa'n amaute apampaih ziak in,” achi hi.

JEREMIAH 7: 1 Toupa a pan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung: 2“Toupa' inn kongpi ah dingh inla, huai ah hiai thu puang inla, hichi in chi in; Nou Judah mi tengteng, Toupa be ding a hiai kongpi a lutte'n Toupa thu ngaikhia un.” 3Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na omdan uleh na thilhihte uh bawlhoih unla, hiai mun ah ka hon tengsak ding hi. 4Hiai, “Toupa tempul, Toupa tempul, Toupa tempul ahi,” chih zuauthute gingta kei un. 5“Na omdan uleh na thilhihte uh na bawlhoih petmah ua, mi leh invengte kikal a thu diktak a na vai hawmsak ua, 6namdang mite, pa neiloute, meithaite na nuaisiah louh ua, hiai mun a midiktat sisan na suah louh ua, na hoihlouhna ding ua pathian dangte na delh sam kei ualeh, 7hiai gam, tuma lam a na pipute uh kiang a ka piak ah tangtawn in ka hon tengsak ding hi. 7Tempul a Jeremiah Thugen 8Ngai un, zuauthu, phattuamna om het lou na gingtazaw ua. 9Gukgu in, tualthat in, angkawm in, zuau a kichiam in Baal kiang a gimlim hal in, pathian dang, na theih ngeilouhte uh na delh uhi. 10Hiai inn, ka min mahmah a loh ah ka ma ah hong ding in, hiai thilkihhuai tengtengte hih zel kawm in, hotkhiak ka hita, na chi ding ua hia? 11Hiai inn ka min mahmah a loh, na mitmuh un suamhatte kokhuk bang lel ahi hia? Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in ka mu hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 12Atung a ka min ka tensakna, ka mun Shiloh ah hoh dih ua, ka mi Israel gitlouhna ziak a ka thilhih va en un.

JEREMIAH 7: 13Tu in hiai thil tengteng na hih ua, phalvak a thou a na kiang ua thu ka gengente na ngaihkhiak louh ua, nou ka hon sap a, na dawn louh ziak un; 14Shiloh tung a ka hih bang in hiai ka min lohna inn, noumau leh na pipute uh kiang a ka mun piak, na muan uh tung ah ka hih dek ahi. 15Na unau tengteng uh, Ephraim nam pumpi nangawn ka paihkhiak bang in ka mitmuh a kipan nou ka hon paikhe ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Mipite Thumanlouhna 16“Huaiziak in hiai mite a ding in thum ke'nla, kikoukhia in thum ke'nla, ka kiang ah leng ngetsak sam ke'n; ka hon ngaikhe kei ding hi. 17Judah khopite a leh Jerusalem kholakte a athilhih uh na mu kei a hia? 18Naupangte'n sing atom ua, apate un mei atoh ua, numeite'n van kumpinu kiang a lat ding tanghou amek ua, pathian dangte ding in dawn ding thillat atungkhia ua, ahon hehsakna lel ding un. 19Kei ahi maw hon hehsak uh?” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; amau zumna ding in amau ahi zaw kei uh maw? 20Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai dih uh, hiai mun tung ah ka hehna leh thangpaihna ka sungkhe ding a; akang dia, amit kei ding. 21Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na kithoihnate uah halmang kithoihnate behlap unla, sa ne un. 22Halmang thillat hiam, kithoihnate hiam tungthu ah zaw na pipute uh kiang ah thu ka gen kei a, Aigupta gam a kipan ka pikhiak lai in leng thu ka pe sam kei. 23Ka aw ngaikhia unla, na Pathian uh ka hi ding a, nou leng ka mite na hi ding uh; na hoihtheihna ding un na omdan ding uh ka hon hilh tengteng zui un, chi in thu ka pe zaw hi.

JEREMIAH 7: 24Himahleh angaikhe kei ua, bil adoh sam kei uh; alungtang gilou ua angaihtuah uh zui in a-om zaw uh, malam zot sang in anungtawn zawta uhi. 25Na pipute uh Aigupta gam a kipan apawt ni ua kipan a tuni tan in ka nasemmi, zawlnei tengtengte phalvak a thou in na kiang uah niteng in ka sawl zel a, 26himahleh ahon ngaikhe tuan kei ua, bil adoh sam kei uh; alungsim uh akhauhsak ua, apipute uh sang in agilou zawta uhi. 27“Hiai thu tengteng akiang ua na gen ding ahi; himahleh ahon ngaikhe kei ding ua; amau na sam ding a, ahon dawng kei ding uh. 28Akiang uah, ‘Hiai nam Toupa a Pathian uh aw ngaikhe lou a, thununna tang lou nam ei ve ua, na chi ding a; thudik amangthangta, akam ua kipan paihmang ahita.Hinnom Phaizang A Khelhna Thilhihte 29Na sam tan inla, paimang in,mun sang giaute ah kapkhia in; Toupa'n ahehna khang paikhia in anawlkhinta hi.’ 30“Judah tate'n lah ka mitmuh in thil gilou ahih ngal uh chih Toupa thupawt ahi; ka min lohna inn ninsak ding in athilkihhuaite uh akoih khin uhi. 31Atanute uh, atapate uh hal ding in Ben Hinnom Phaizang ah Taphet mun sangte abawl ua; huaite ka thupiak ahi kei a, ka lungsim ah leng alut ngei sam kei. 32Huaiziak in ngai dih uh, nite ahong tung dek,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huai phaizang pen Tophet, chih ahi nawn kei ding a, Ben Hinnom Phaizang, chih leng ahi sam kei ding a Kithahna Phaizang chih ahita ding; Tophet ah avui ding ua, vuina ding mun a-omta kei ding. 33Mite luang tung a leng vasate leh gamsate an ahi ding; kuamah in adelhmang kei ding uh. 34Judah khopite ah leh Jerusalem kholakte ah nuamsa husate leh kipahna gingte, mouneipa awte, mou awte leng ka daisak ding; agam segawp ding ahi ngal a.

JEREMIAH 8: 1Huai hun chiang in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; Judah kumpipate guhte, aheutute guhte, siampute guhte, zawlneite guhte, Jerusalem a tengte guhte ahan ua kipan alakhe ding ua; 2nite, khate, van a om tengteng, a-it ua, nna asep ua, adelh ua, azon ua, chibai abukte uh ma ah aphoukhe ding uh; lakkhawm ahi nawnta kei ding ua, vui ahi sam kei ding uh; leitung a ekvut lel ding ahi ding. 3Hiai inkuan gilou mahmah om lai sung tengteng, ka hawlzakna mun a omlaite'n hin sang in sih atel zaw ding uh, chih sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi.Khelhna Leh Agawtna 4Huai lou leng akiang uah huchi in na gen ding hi, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Mi apuk un athounawn kei ding ua hia? Mi avakmang in ahong kik nawn kei dia hia? 5Bang achia hiai Jerusalem mite, tangtawn a nungtawn ding a atolhpuk uh? Khemna alenkip ua, kik nawn a-ut kei uh. 6Ka bildoh in ka ngaikhia a, kuamah in thudik agen kei uh, kuamah in, “Bang ahia ka hih?” chi in athulimlouhna uh akisik sam kei uh; michih in amau lampi anga chiat uh; kidouna mun a sakol dianglut bang mai in. 7Ahi, van a tuivapi in ahunbite athei a, vakhute, lensiamte, tuivanelkaite, ahun geihgeih in ahong tung zel uh. Ka mite'n bel Toupa thukhendante athei kei uh. 8Bangchi in ahia, mipil i hi ua, Toupa dan i kiang uah a-om, na chih uh? Ngai un, laigelhmi laigelhna zuauthei in, zuau in asuaksak zaw uhi. 9Mipilte azum un alungdong ding ua, mat in a-om ding uh; ngai un, Toupa thu apaikhia ua, amau ah bang pilna a-om a hia? 10Huaiziak in azite uh midangte kiang ah ka pe ding a, aloute uh leng ahon neimi a dingte kiang ah; michih, aneupen a kipan athupipen tan in en hat ahi uhi.

JEREMIAH 8: Zawlnei a kipan a siampu tan in leng michih khemhat ahi uhi. 11Ka tanu, ka mite liam awlmoh loutak in, muanna om lou napi, “Muanna, muanna,” chi in athoih uhi. 12Thilkihhuai ahih un azum uhia? Ii, azum het kei ua, amel uh leng asan kei. Huaiziak in pukte lak ah apuk tei ding ua, amaute gawt hun chiang in paihkhiak in a-om ding uh chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 13Amau ka hihmang vek ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; grep guite agah kei ding a, theipi kungte agah sam kei ding; anah leng avuai ding a, amaute tummang dingte ka sep khinta hi. 14Bangziak a tulai lai i hi ua? Kikaikhawm unla, khopi kulh neite ah lut unla, huai ah i mangthang diam ding uh; Toupa tung a i gitlouh tak ziak in; Toupa i Pathian un gutui dawn ding hon pia in manthatna ah ahon koih hi. 15Muanna i zong ua, hoihna bangmah ahong tung kei, hihdamna hun ding leng, ngai in, lungdonna lel! 16Asakol nak ging uh Dan a kipan a zak ahi a, asakol uh ham ging in gam pumpi aling a, ahong tung ua, asung a om teng, agai vek ua, khopi leh asung a tengte toh. 17Ngai un, na lak uah gulpi ka sawl ding a, gulgu nei, khoizual vuallouhte; huaite'n nou ahon tu ding ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Amite Ziak A Jeremiah Lungkhamna 18Aw lungkhamna ah kilungmuanthei leng aw! Sunggil ah kalungtang abah khinta hi. 19Ngai un, gam gamlapi a kipan,ka mite tanu kah husa, Zion ah Toupa a-om kei a hia?Asung a akumpipa om lou ahi maw?milim bawltawmte leh namdang milimte'n bang achia hon hehsak ahi ua? 20Buh lak hun akikhelta, nipi abeita,hotdam in i om kei lailai. 21Ka mite, ka tanu natna ah ka na a,ka suun a, lungdonna in ahon len hi. 22Gilead a singnai damdawi om lou hia?huai ah hihdam mi a-om kei a hia?bangziak a ka mite,ka tanu damthei lou ahia?

JEREMIAH 9: 1Ka lu tui hi in, ka mit khituinak hileh aw, ka mi,ka tanu thahte a ding inasun-azan in ka kap ding, 2Gamdai ah khualbuk nei thei leng aw!Ka mite paisan inom mangsan leng aw;angkawm hatmi ahi vek ngal ua,khemhat omkhawm lel ahi uh. 3Alei uh thalpeu bang in zuau in azang ua, gam ah akhanglian ua,thutak a khang lou ingilou lam ah akhang ua,kei hon thei lou in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 4Noumau inveng lak ah pilvang chiat unla,na unaute himhim uh muang kei un;unaute lah khemhat ahi ngal ua;invengte leng gensiat hat ahi uh. 5Amau inveng chiat akhem dingua, thudik agen kei ding uh;alei uh zuaugen akisinsak ua,thulimlouhna sem in agim uhi. 6Khem hat lak ah na teng a,akhemna uh ziak in keiahon thei nuam kei uh,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 7Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:Ngai un, amau ka tuisuaksak ding a,ka ze-et ding;ka mi, ka tanu ziak in bangdang ahia ka hihtak ding aw? 8Alei uh sihna thal ahi a, khemna thu agen zel,mi'n kam in invengte kiang ah kituahna thu gen mahleh,alungtang ah amah atang giugiau hi. 9Zawlnei Thumna 10Tangte a ding in ka kap dia,ka mau vungvung ding,gamdai loupa munte ka suun ding a,kuamah pai nawnlouhna ding a akat khit tak ziak in,mite'n ganta husa aza nawnta kei ding ua, tung a leng vasate leh gamsate leng ataikek ua, apaimangta uh. 11Huan Jerusalem bel thil sia omkhawm lel in ka bawl dek a,sehalte tenna mun ahi ding;Judah khopite tengmi om lou in ka hihgawp ding. 12Hiai theisiam ding in mipil kua ahia? Puangkhe ding a Toupa thugen na sang mi pen kua ahia? Bangziak in ahia gam asiat khit a, kuamah pailouhna ding a gamdai bang a akat khit?

JEREMIAH 9: 13Huan Toupa'n, “Ka dan, ama ua ka koih apaisan ua, ka paukam suak amang kei ua, azui kei uh, 14alungtang khauh uh zui a, apipute un asinsak uh Baalte adelh zawk tak ziak un; 15Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, amau, hiai mite mahmah gamsai in ka vak ding a, tui kha leng ka dawnsak ding. 16Nam, amau leh apipute un leng atheih ngeilouhte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a; ka hihmanthat vek mateng namsau ka delhsak ding.”Panpihtu Ngen In Jerusalem Mipite Akikou Uh 17Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:Ngaihtuah unla, numei kapmite hong pai ding in sam un,numei kahsiamte hong pai ding in sam lai un. 18Hong kin uhenla, hong kahkhum peuhmah le uh,i khitui aluan a, i mitte ua tui apawttheihna ding in. 19Zion a kipan kah husa zak ahi ngal a,i naksiat khit takdan uh; gen ding i thei mahmah kei ua,i gam i paisan ziak uleh, i tennate apaihkhiak tak ziak un. 20Aw nou numeite aw, Toupa thungaikhia unla, akamsuak thu na bil uah lut henla, na tanute uh kah sinsak un; michih in a-invengnu kiang ah suunna la. 21I tawlet uahte sihna kal lut in i kumpipa' inn uahte alutta hi;inn polam a kipan naupang hihmang ding leh,kholak a kipan tangval hihmang ding. 22 Toupa thupawt in hichi in achi:Mi luangte gamlak ah ekvutbang in apuk ding ua,buh lami buhmaih bang in;kuamah in alakhawm kei ding, chi in. 23 Toupa'n hichi in achi:Mipil in apilna suang keihenla mihat in ahatnasuang sam kei hen,mihau in asum-le-pai suang kei hen. 24Asuang peuhmah in hiai suang hen,Kei Toupa, zahngaihna, vaihawmdikna,diktatna lei a zangpa ka hi chih atheih a, atheihsiamnatak;hiai thilte ka kipah lam ahi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 25Ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, zeksum hi ngal, sum louh bang zaw ka gawt ding. 26Aigupta, Judah, Edom, Ammon leh Moab, gamdai a teng, baksam metgiaute; hiai nam tengteng zeksumlouhte ahi ngal ua, Israel inkote tengteng leng lungtang a zeksumlouhte ahi uh.

JEREMIAH 10: 1Aw, Israel inkote aw,na kiang ua Toupa thugen ngaikhia un, 2 Toupa'n hichi in achi:Namte omdan ching kei unla,van a chiamtehnate ziak in leng lunglau sam kei un;huaite ah namte lunglau in a-om nak uhi. 3Mite dante bangmah lou ahi ngal a,Gamnuai ah sing aphuk ua, heipi a mikhutsiam khut in asep ahi. 4Dangkasik leh dangka-eng inazem ua, atatlouhna ding insikkilhna leh sek in akilh uh. 5Tangmai huan a vasa lauh ding milim bang ahi ua, apau thei kei uh.Amau apai theih louh ziak un,puak suan akiphamoh sek uh;amaute lau kei un, thil sia ahihthei kei ua, thil hoih leng ahihthei sam kei uh. 6Aw Toupa, nang bangkuamah a-om kei ua, na thupi a,na min hatna in athanglian hi. 7Aw namte Kumpipa, kua'n ahiahon kihta lou ding?Huai lah na tuakzou him ngal a.Namte mipil tengteng lakte ah,alalgam lak uah leng,nang bang mahmah a-om kei uh. 8Amau khawksak nei lou mihaiahi ua, manna bei sing milimte sinsak ahi uhi. 9Tarshish a kipan dangkasik sekahon la ua, Uphaz a kipandangka-eng, mikhutsiam bawl,dangka-eng sekmi khutsuak,puansilh dumpuang leh sandup,mikhutsiam khutsuak vek ahi uhi. 10Milim Biakna Leh Biakna Dik 11Akiang ua hichibang a na chih ding uh ahi: Pathian, lei leh van bawl hiloupi lei a kipan amangthang ding ua, van nuai a kipan amang vek ding uh.Pathian Pahtawina La 12Athilhihtheihna in lei abawl a,apilna in khovel atungding a,alemtheihna in van akaipalh hi. 13A-aw asuah chiang in, van ah tui aging honhon a, kawlmong a kipan meipi akahtousak a,vuah zukna ding in khua aphesak a,agoubawm a kipan huih anungsak hi. 14Michih amawl ua, theihnaanei kei uh, dangka-eng sekmi inalimsek azumpih a,amilim sun lah zuau lel ahi a,amau ah hinna leng a-om kei hi. 15Bangmah lou ahi ua, khemnanasep lel, agawt hun chiang unamang ding uh. 16Jakob tantuan bel hichibangahi kei, thil tengteng bul ahingal a;

JEREMIAH 10: Israel agouluah namahi a, amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi.Hong Tung Ding Saltanna 17Aw nang, um a om lellel in, lei a kipan na puanthuah lakhawm in, 18Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, tu in gam a tengte ka singkhe ding, aphawk tham un ka hihgenthei ding.” 19Ka natna ziak in ka tung agik hi,ka liamna ana a, himahleh,“Hiai hial haksatna ahi,ka thuak mai ding ahi,” ka chi. 20Ka puanin aseta, ka khautengteng akitat vek a,ka kiang a kipan ka tateapawt ua, a-om nawn kei uh;ka puanin kaipalh ding a-omta kei uh,ka puanzak hon lepsak ding. 21Belamching mite amawl ua, Toupa thudotdan athei kei uh;huaiziak in alamzang kei ua,abelamhonte uh adalhzak khinta. 22Ngai un, mallam a pan husaahong tung, buaina thupi mahmah,Judah khopite hihgawp in,sehal tenna ding a suaksak ding in. 23Aw Toupa, mihing omdan bel,amah thu lel ahi kei chih katheita hi; mihing akalsuanteama kipi hilou hi. 24Aw Toupa, hon thunun inla,ahun lel in, heh lou in,huchi lou in zaw na hon hihmang kha ding hi. 25Nang hon thei ngeiloute tung leh na min lou ngei lou namte tungah na hehna bungkhia in;Jakob ane khin ua, ahi,ane khin ua, anemang ua,atenna gam ahihsia uhi.

JEREMIAH 11: 1Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung: 2Hiai thukhunte ngaikhia unla, Judah mite leh Jerusalem a tengte kiang ah gen un. 3Nang akiang uah, Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Hiai thukhun thute ngaikhe loumi hamsethuak in om hen. 4Huai bel na pipute uh, Aigupta gam, sik haltuina kipan a ka pikhiak ni a, ka paukam suak mang unla, thu ka hon piak tengteng hih un, chi a ka thupiak tak ahi; huchi in ka mite na hi ding ua, kei na Pathian uh ka hi ding; 5Na pipute uh kiang a khuaizu leh nawitui a luang gam kichiam a piak ka chiamtak ka tangtun theihna ding in tuni a a-om bang in, hichi in achi: Huan ke'n, “Amen, Aw Toupa,” chi in ka dawng hi. 6Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Judah khopite ah leh Jerusalem kholakte ah hiai thu tengteng puang inla: Hiai thukhunte ngaikhia unla, zui un. 7Na pipute un Aigupta gam a kipan ka pikhiak ni a kipan tutan in ka paukam suak mang un, chi in ka theisak sek hi. 8Himahleh amang kei ua, bil adoh kei ua, michih, amau lungtang gilou bang zel in a-om zaw uhi. Huaiziak in hiai thukhun thu, hih ding a thu ka piak, ahih louh tengteng uh atung uah ka hon tungsakta ahi,” achi a. 9Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Judah mite leh Jerusalem a tengte lak ah phialgukna a-om. 10Apipute uh, ka thu ngaikhe nuamloute thulimlouhna lam ah akilehhei nawn ua; pathian dangte nna sem ding in akuan ua; Israel inkote leh Judah inkote'n apipute uh kiang a ka thukhun bawl pen ahihseta uh.” 11Jeremiah Leh Thukhun 12Huan Judah khopite leh Jerusalem a tengte'n pathian, akiang ua gimlim ahal seknate uh asam ding ua, himahleh abuai hun chiang un huaite'n amau ahumbit het kei ding hi.

JEREMIAH 11: 13Aw Judah, na pathiante na khopi zah ahi ngal ua; thil zumhuaitak, Baal kiang a gimlim halna ding maitam hial leng Jerusalem kongzing zah in na dingsakta hi. 14Huaiziak in hiaite thumsak ke'nla, amau a ding in ngetna hiam aw hiam suah sam ke'n; abuai hun chiang ua ahon sap uleh ka ngaikhe kei ding hi. 15Thilkihhuai hih kawm in, ka deih mahmah in ka inn ah tantuam bang ahia aneih? Thu kichiamte leh Setan in na siatna ding uh ahon pelsak thei ding ahia? Na suang thei ua hia? 16Toupa'n na min ding in olive sing hing, gah hoih kilawmpi, ahon chi a, lum honhon in atung ah mei atoh a, ahiangte leng akitan khinta. 17Sepaihte' Toupa, nang hon phutpa'n, Israel inkote leh Judah inkote khelhna, Baal kiang a gimlim lan a, hon hehsak thil uh, amau a dia asepkhiak tung ua thil hoih lou ding thu na tung ah apuangkheta hi.Jeremiah Thah Ding A Sawmgukna 18 Toupa'n hon theisak a, ka theita; huchi in nang mahmah in athilhihte uh na hon kawkmuhta. 19“Kei bel belamnou nunnemtak, goh ding a pi bang ka hi, sing pen agah toh, hihse ni e, mihing gam a kipan amah zaw i hihmang vengveng ding uh, amin mawngmawng theih ahihlouhna ding in, chi a ka tung a athil sawm uh ka na thei het kei.” 20Himahleh, aw sepaihte' Toupa, diktak a vaihawmpa, sunggil lam leh lungtang entelpa, atung ua na phulak hon musak in, ka tungthu lah na kiang ah ka hon kemsak hi, chi in.

JEREMIAH 11: 21Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa'n Anathoth mi, na hinna zongpa, “Ka khut ua na sihlouhna ding in Toupa min in thu gen ke'n,” chi mite tungtang ah hichi in achi: 22“Ngai un, amau ka gawt ding a, tangvalte namsau in asi ding ua, atanute uh, atapate uh kial in asi ding uh; 23khosuak kuamah a-om kei ding uh; Anathoth mite tung ah thil hoih lou ka tun dek ngal a; agawtna kum ding uh atun hun chiang in.”

JEREMIAH 12: 1AwToupa, na kiang a kaphun in leng, nang zaw na dik nilouh a;himahleh ka vuina thu pen ka gen ding hi.Bangchi in ahia mithulimloute lam alamzan zel uh?Bangchi in ahia khemhat peuhmah nuamsa a a-om nak uh? 2Amau na phut a, ahi, zungakaita ua, akhang ua, ahi,gah asuahta uhi; amuk unhon naih ua, asunggil unhon gamlat uhi. 3Aw Toupa kei bel na hon thei a,na hon mu a, nang lam ah ka lungtang na entel sek a,amaute goh ding belam bang mai in kaikhia inla,agohna ni ding uh sep in. 4Gam in bang tan ahia asuun ding a,anteh louhingte avuai ding uh?Ateng mite thulim louh ziak ingamsate amang khin ua,vasate leng, “I hun nanung uh amu kei ding uh,” achih ziak un.Pathian Dawnna 5“Khe a pai mite toh na kitaiteh a,nang ahon bahsak khit uleh bangchi in sakolte na kitaitehpih thei dia?Muanna gam ah bittak in omlechin leng, Jordan gammangah bangchi in na hih dia? 6Na unaute, na pa inkuantengei in, amau nang ahon khemta ngal ua;amau nang hon delh in ngaihtak in ahon sam ua,thuhoihtak gen mah le uh taksang himhim ke'n.”Amite Ziak A Toupa Lungkhamna 7“Ka inn-le-lou paisan in ka gouluah ding ka paimangta;ka hinna in a-it mahmah nu,amelma kiang ah ka peta hi. 8Ka gouluah ding gamnuai humpinelkai bang ahong hita,ka siatna ding in a-aw asuah a,huaiziak in ka mudah ahi. 9Ka gouluah ding kei a ding insasial ne vasa gial ahi hia?Sasial ne vasate'n akimvel in asual ua hia?Gamsa teng va kaikhawm unla,nek bei ding in hon pi un. 10“Belamchingmi tampi in kagrephuan ahihsia ua, ka tanasikden ua, ka tantuannuam mahmah mai gamdaigam segawp asuaksakta uh. 11Gamsia in abawlta ua,asegawp a, ka kiang ah avui hi, agam pumpi asegawp a,himahleh kuamah in adonsak kei uh.

JEREMIAH 12: 12Jeremiah In Toupa Adong 13Buhchi atuh ua, ling ala ua,akihihgimgawp ua,punna lah a-om tuan kei, Toupa heh mahmah ziak in gah na suahte uh na zumpih ding uh.”Israel Invengte Kiang A Toupa Thuchiam 14Ka mi Israel kiang a gouluah ding a ka piak khoihsemi, ka inveng giloute tengteng tungtang ah Toupa'n hichibang in achi: “Ngai un, agam ua kipan ka botkhe ding a, alak ua kipan Judah inkote ka phawikhe ding. 15Huan hichi ahi ding a, ka bohkhiak nung in amau ka hehpih nawn ding a, michih gouluah ding leh michih ama gam mah ah ka hon pi ding. 16Huan hichi ahi ding a, Baal kiang a ka mite kichiam a asinsak mah bang un, ka min a, ‘Toupa ahin a ahin sung’, chi a kichiam a akisin ua, ka mite omdan ngenteltak a asin uleh ka mite lak ah ka dingkhesak ding. 17Himahleh angaihkhiak kei ualeh huai nam aboh in ka botkhe ding a, ka hihse ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

JEREMIAH 13: 1 Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Puanmalngat kawnggak lei inla, kawtsak lou in gak in.” 2Huchi in Toupa thu bangbang in kawnggak ka lei a, ka gakta hi. 3Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, 4“Na kawnggak lei, huai na kawng a om pen la in, thou inla, Euphrates Luipi zuan inla, huai a suangheng kal ah sel in,” chi in. 5Huchi in Toupa'n thu hon piak bang in ka kuan a, Euphrates Luipi chin ah ka selta hi. 6Ni tampi nung in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, Euphrates Luipi zuan inla, kawnggak ka hon selsak lakhia in,” achi hi. 7Huchi in Euphrates Luipi ah ka hohta a, ka thai a, ka selna a kipan kawnggak ka pholhkhia hi. Huan ngai dih, kawnggak ana ngot khin vek a; bangmah ding in leng aphatuamta kei hi. 8Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, 9Toupa'n hichi in achi: hichi mah bang in Judah kisathei pipi leh Jerusalem ki-otsakna mahmahte ka hihse dek hi. 10Hiai nam giloute, ka thute ngaikhe nuam lou a, amau lungsim genhak zui a pathian dangte' nna sem leh be ding a delh mite kawnggak bangmah ding a phatuam lou bang ahi ding uh. 11Kawnggakmi kawng a abelh gige bang in Israel inkote pumpi leh Judah inko pumpi ka mite, ka minthanna, ka kilawmna leh ka thupina ahong hihtheihna ding ua ka kiang a belh gige ding a ka bawl ahi uhi; himahleh alimsak kei uh.Uain Thawl 12Hiai thu akiang ua na gen ding ahi: Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi, “Thawl chiteng uain in adim ding,” chi in. Huan amaute'n na kiang ah, “Thawl chiteng uain in adim ding chih ka theih louh uh ahi maw?” achi ding uh.

JEREMIAH 13: 13Puanmalngat Kawnggak 14Amau ka kiphusak ding a, pate atate uh toh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; amau ka hihmanlouhna ding khop in ka hehpih in hiam ka hawi in hiam ka zahngai kei hial ding.”Jeremiah In Kisaktheihna Kalh In Avauhilh 15Ngaikhia unla, bildoh un; kisathei kei un, Toupa'n thu akhahta hi. 16 Toupa na Pathian uh pahtawi unla,mialna atunsak ma a khomui tung ate na khe uh akipal ma in, vak na lamet laitak un mial asuaksak a,mial bikbek ding in abawl ding hi. 17Himahleh na ngaihkhiak kei uleh na kisaktheihna uhziak in mundai ah ka kap nilouh ding a,ka khitui leng nakpitak in aluang gige ding; Toupa belamhon sal a kaih ahih ziak un. 18Kumpipa leh anu kiang ah, “Niam tut un, na lukhute uh aketa hi, na lallukhu thupi uh,” chi in. 19Sim khopite abing khin a, kuamah hon vual louh in; Judah tengteng sal in atang ua, avek un atang khin uhi. 20Na mit uh daktou unla, mallam a kipan ahong kuan en un. Na belamhon neih koi ah, huai na belamhon deihhuaitak? 21Nangmah in lawm ding a na bawlte na tung a akoih hun chiang un bangchi in na chi dia? Numei nauvei bang mai in na na sa ngial kei ding maw? 22Bangziak in ahia hiaite ka tung a ahong tun? Chi sim na hihleh, na thulimlouhna ziak in ahi na nik lem ahih a na vuaktanna akimuh. 23Ethiopia mivom in avun ahihlamdang in gialbem in azia asel thei a hia? Huchi ahihleh nou thil gilou hihhatsekte'n leng thil hoih hihthei na ve uteh! 24Gamdai huih in buhsi amutleng bang mai in amau ka dalhsak ding. 25Hiai na tantuan, na tuam dia ka hon sehsak ahi, na hon mangngilh a, zuau a na kingak ziak in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 26Huchi in kei mahmah in na mai khuh hial in na nik ka hon lemsak ding a, na zumhuaina adawk ding hi. 27Gamlak a mualte a na angkawmnate, na huk kikou husate, na kiphalgaih thupidante, huai na thilhih kihhuaite ka muta. Aw Jerusalem, na tung agik hi; hihsiang na hih ma bang tan hi ding ahia?

JEREMIAH 14: 1Khokheng tungtang a Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung; 2Judah in asuun a, akulhkongpite angui; lei ah puanvom khu in akun ua,Jerusalem kah ging atungkah. 3Amilalte'n asikhate uh tui atawisak ua,tuichin azuan ua, tui amu kei uh,tuibel hawm in akik ua;abeidong ua, gen ding athei kei ua, alu uh akhuh uhi. 4Gam pum a vuahtui a-om louh ziak in lei akhang a,lei let mite alungdong ua, alu uh akhuh uh. 5Ahi, zukpi in leng loubuk ahnou anei a, louhing a-omlouh ziak in ataisan hi. 6Gam sabiltungte mualvum ahadingh ua, sehal bang inhuihkhua ngai in anakhuhu ua; nek ding loupaom louh ziak in amit uh amial dundun hi. 7Ka thulimlouhna un hon hekmahleh na min ziak in aw Toupa hong kuan in;ka puknate uh lah atamta ngal a,na tung mahmah ah thil ka na hihkhial uhi. 8Aw nang Israelte lamet,mangbat lai a hondampa,bangziak a hiai gam a mikhual bang zen a zan khat giak a zin bang lel a om na hia? 9Bangziak a mi lungkegawp bang phet leh pasalpha hondam thei lou bang lel a om na hia?Himahleh nang zaw, aw Toupa,ka lak uah na om lai a, na min ka pu ua, hon paisan ke'n. 10 Toupa'n hiai mite tungtang ah hichi in achi: Vakmang a-ut nak ua, akalsuan uh akidek kei uh; huchi in Toupa'n amau apom kei a, athulimlouhna uh atheigigeta ding a, akhelhna uh agawt ding hi. 11 Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai mite hoihna ding ngetsak ke'n. 12An ngawl mah le uh akikou uh ka ngaikhe kei ding a, halmang leh buh-le-bal thillat lan mah le uh ka dawng kei ding; namsau, kial, hipi in amau ka hihmang zaw ding,” achi hi.

JEREMIAH 14: 13Ke'n, “Eh, Toupa Pathian, ngai dih, akiang uah zawlneite'n, ‘Namsau na tuak kei ding ua, kial leng na thuak kei ding uh, hiai mun ah muan mahmahna ka hon pe zaw ding hi, achi sek ngal ua,’ ” ka chi hi. 14Keuna Mulkimhuai 15Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ka sawl louh a ka min lou a, ‘Hiai gam ah kial leh namsau atung kei ding,’ chi a zawlnei thugen genmi, huai zawlneite namsau leh kial in amangthang ding uh. 16Huan athugenna uh nam leng kial leh namsau ziak in Jerusalem kongzing ah paihkhiak ahi ding ua, atanute uh atapate uh toh, vuimi himhim anei kei ding uh. Athulimlouhna uh amau tung ah ka sung dek ngal a.” 17Huan akiang ua hiai thu na gen ding ahi:“Sun leh zan in ka khitui luang hen,hul himhim kei hen, ka mi,ka tanu nungak siangthou in nakpi a liamna atuak hi,khutkhak na mahmah toh. 18Gam a ka pawtleh, maizen,namsau a thahte!Khopi a ka lutleh, maizen,kialpi a misi!Gam chih ah zawlneite,siampute avakvai chiat ua,adan mahmah athei kei uh,” chi in.Mipite'n Toupa Angen Uh 19Judah paikhe siang na hi hiam?Zion kih na hi maw?Kou a dia hihdamna om lou bikbek a bangziak a hon thuaksak na hia?Muanna ka zong ua, hoihnabangmah ahong tung kei;hihdamna hun ding leng,ngai dih buaina lel. 20Aw Toupa, ka thulimlouhdan uh ka kitheihmohbawl kei uhi,ka pipute uh ginatlouhna toh,na tung ah ka hihkhialta uhi. 21Na min ziak in hon musit ke'n,na laltutphah thupi minsesak ke'nla,ka kiang ua na thukhun theigige in hihse ke'n. 22Namdangte pathiante lak ah vuahzusak thei a-om uhia?Ahihleh, van in vuahpi atungsak thei hia?Aw Toupa ka Pathian uh,huai pen nang na hi kei maw?Hiai thil tengteng na hih ahi a,ka lamet uh nang na hi.

JEREMIAH 15: 1Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Mosi leh Samuel ka ma ah hong dingh mah le uh, ka lungsim hiai mite lam anga tuan kei ding. Ka muh phak louh ah delhkhia inla, paimang uhen! 2Huan koi ah ka pai ding ua chi a nang a hon dot uleh hichi in akiang uah na chi ding hi. Toupa'n hichi in achi:Sihna a si dingte, sihna ah;namsau thuak dingte, namsau ah;kial thuak dingte, kial ah;saltang dingte, saltanna ah. 3Thil li ka sehsak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; that ding in namsau, keizan ding in ui, ne khin leh hihmang ding in tung leng vasate leh gam sahangte. 4Judah kumpipa Hezekiah tapa Manasseh in Jerusalem a athilhih ziak in lei kumpipa gam tengteng lak a vial sepsep ding in ka bawl ding. 5“Kua'n ahon hehpih dia aw Jerusalem?Kua'n hon lungkhampih dia?Na omdan dong ding in kua alampial dia oi? 6Nang na hon paikhia a, na nungtawn tawn a,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.“Huchi in kisik ka chimtak a,na tung ah ka khut ka lik a,ka hon hihmang hi. 7Gam pumpi a kulh kongpite ahkizapna in amau ka zap a,ta bei in ka bawl a, ka mite ka hihmang a; a-omdan uhakiheisan louh ziak un. 8Tuipi piaunel sang a tam in ameithaite uh ka pungsak ding a,suntang lai in tangvalte siatnading in atung uah lokmi katungsak a, mangbatna lehthil mulkimhuai ka tungsak guih hi. 9Sagih suangnu abahgawp a;akha akhahta; sun ahih lai in ani aketa,zahlak in alungbuai a;huan akhosuaksunte, amelmate uh khut ah namsau a thah ding in ka pe ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa Kiang A Jeremiah Thutut 10“Nu ei, gam pumpi a kituahlouhna mi leh kikalhna mi a na hon na suan ka tung gik hi na tel e! Ka leitawisak kei a, mite'n leng ahon leitawisak kei uh;

JEREMIAH 15: himahleh avek un hamsia ahon loh uhi. 11Toupa'n, chihtak ngial in thil hoih a ding in ka hon hihkip ding; chihtak ngial in siatna ni leh haksatna ni in melma na kiang ah khut ka dohsak ding,” achi hi. 12Sik in mallam sik leh ngen akitansak thei dia hia? 13“Gam pumpi a na khelhna tengteng ziak in na hauhsakna leh na goute, aman bei in gallak ding in ka pe ding. 14Na theih ngei louh gam ah na melmate nna ka hon semsak ding. Ka heh ziak a na tung a mei ampha ding akuangkheta hi,” achi hi. 15Judah Mipite Tunggikna 16Na thute hihlat ahia, ka ne a, na thute kei a ding in kipahna leh ka lungtang nopna ahi; aw Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian, na min lah ka puta ngal ua. 17Nopbawl mite lak ah ka tel kei a, ka kipahpih sam kei; nang khut ziak in ka tu tuam a, lungkimlouhna in na hon dimsak hi. 18Bangziak a ka natna dai thei lou a, ka liamna damthei lou ahia, hihdam ut lou bang mai a? Ka tung ah phaizang khemhat tui kang sekte bang na hi ding a hia? 19Huchi in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na kiheileh angei ka hon bangsak ding, ka ma ah na dingh nawn ding. Thil gina lou a kipan thil manpha ngen na genkhiakleh keimah kam bang na hi ding. Amau nang lam hong nga uhenla, nang bel amau lam na nga ding ahi kei. 20Hiai mite lak ah ngen kulhbaang in ka hon bawl ding a, ahon sual ding ua, himahleh ahon zou kei ding uh, nang hon hondam ding leh hunkhe ding in na kiang ah ka om ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 21Migiloute khut a kipan ka hon hunkhe ding a, mi lauhuaite khut a kipan ka hon pawtkhesak ding.

JEREMIAH 16: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: 2“Zi na nei ding ahi kei a, hiai mun ah tanu tapate leng na nei ding ahi sam kei,” chi in. 3Tanu tapa hiai mun a piangte leh hiai gam a nu leh pa amaute suangte tungtang Toupa'n hichi in achi: 4“Hipi in asi ding ua, kuamah vui louh leh kuamah suun louh in a-om ding uh; leitung ekvut bang lel ahi ding uh. Namsaute, kialte in amangthang ding ua, aluangte uh tungleng vasate leh gamsate an ahi ding hi.” 5 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Lusuunna inn ah lut ke'nla, suun ding in hoh ke'nla, amaute kah ke'n; hiai mite lak a kipan ka lungmuanna ka hawkta ngal a, zahngaihna leh lainatnate toh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 6Hiai gam ah milian leh mineu a si ding ua; vui ahi kei ding ua; kuama'n asuun kei ding ua, aki-at un akimetgiau loh kei ding uh. 7Lusuun mite amisi ngaih uh lungmuan ding in kuamah in nek ding alui kei ding ua, anu uh hiam apa uh hiam ziak in leng nepna nou dawn ding kuamah in atun kei ding uhi. 8Huan ne leh dawn ding in alak ua tu ding in ankuangluina inn ah na lut ding ahi kei. 9Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a: “Ngai dih ua, na mitmuh un, na damsung un mou awte, mouneipa awte, nopsakna husate, kipahna gingte hiai mun ah ka daisak ding.” 10Hiai thu tengteng hiai mite kiang a na hilh hun chiang in amau, “Bangziak in ahia Toupa'n ka tung ua hichitak a thil hoih lou ahon genkhiak? Bang ahia ka thulimlouhna uh?

JEREMIAH 16: Toupa ka Pathian uh tung a ka thilhihkhelh bang ahia?” ahon chih uleh, 11hichi in na chi ding hi: “Na pipute un ahon paisan ziak uh ahi, pathian dangte adelh ua, a-nna uh asem ua, abia ua, ahon paisan ua, ka dan azui kei ua; 12huan noute'n na pipute uh sang a lek lua in na hih ua, ngai un, michih in noumau lungtang gilou paupeng na zui ua, kei na hon ngaikhe kei uh. 13Huaiziak in ka gam a kipan noute leh na pipute un leng na theih ngei louh uh gam ah ka hon delhkhe ding, huai ah sun leh zan in pathian dangte nna na sem ding ua, deihsakna ka hon lak dek ngal kei a,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Saltanna A Kipan Kik Nawnna 14Huchi in ngai dih ua, nite ahong tung dek hi, Toupa thupawt in achi, “Israel suante Aigupta gam a kipan a pikhepa ahin a ahin sung, chita lou in, 15mallam gam leh adelhzakna gam tengteng a kipan a Israel suante pikhepa Toupa ahin a ahin sung, achi zawta ding uh,” apipute uh kiang a ka piak, amau gam mahmah ah lah ka pikik nawn ding hi.Hong Tung Ding Gawtna 16“Ngai dih ua, ngamanmi tampi ka thukhak ding a, amau aman ding ua; huai khit in gamvakmi tampi ka thukhak ding a, tang chiteng leh mual chiteng a kipan amaute abengkhe ding ua, suangpi heng kal a kipan in leng. 16Jeremiah Hih Ding A Toupa Thupiak 17A-omdan tengteng uah lah ka mit atu nilouh ngal a; kei a kipan sel in a-om kei ua, athulimlouhna uh leng ka mit a kipan sel in a-om sam kei hi.

JEREMIAH 16: 18Huchi in athilkihhuai luangte ua ka gam ahihnit ualeh akihhuaina ua ka goutan gam adimsak ziak un athulimlouhna uh leh akhelhna uh azahnih in ka thuk ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Jeremiah In Toupa Amuang 19Aw Toupa, ka hatna leh ka kulhpi, mangbat ni a ka kihumbitna, kawlmong a kipan in namte ahong pai ding ua: “Ka pipute un zuau, thil gina lou, punna nei hilou kia lou ngal bangmah gouluah in anei kei uh. 20Mi'n pathiante akibawlsak thei ua hia? Huaite pathian ahi sam ua,” achi ding uh. 21“Huaiziak in ngai dih ua, tutung in amau ka theisak peuhmah ding; ka khut leh ka thilhihtheihna ka theisak ding, ka min Toupa ahi chih athei ding uh.”

JEREMIAH 17: 1Judah khelhna sik laigelhna leh suangmantam hiam mukzum a gelh ahi; alungtang pek ua khuak in a-om a, amaitam uahte leng; 2sing hing bul leh mual pawngte ah atate un amaitamte uleh a Asherahte uh atheigige ngal ua. 3Aw nang gam a ka tang, gam dung tawn a na khelhna ziak in na sum leh na gou tengteng, na mun sangte toh gallak ding in ka pe ding hi. 4Huai na tantuam ka hon piak na tan ding a, na gam theih ngeih louh ah na melmate nna ka hon semsak ding, ka hehna mei, tangtawn a kang ding lah na mut kuangta ngal ua. 5 Toupa'n hichi in achi:Mihing muang a,mihing bantha hatna muang a, Toupa lehngatsan lungtangneimi hamsethuak in om hen. 6Gamdai a loupa keu gaw bang ahi a,thil hoih pawt ding amu kei ding.Gamdai gamkeu, chi gam, kuamah luah louh ah ateng zaw ding hi. 7 Toupa muangmi, alametpen Toupa hi in nuam asa hi. 8Tui kiang a sing suan,lui gei a zungkai, kholumhong tung ding patau lou,anahte hing gige,khokhen kum khawk sa lou,gah suan kikhelsaktuan lou bang ahi ding hi. 9Lungtang bel thil tengteng sangin khemhat pen, hoih lou pumlum ahi a;kua'n ahia theithei ding? 10Kei Toupa bel michih a-omdanbang zel uleh athilhih gah bang zel a pe ding a lungsim enkhepa,lungtang enchianpa ka hi. 11Mi, kilawm lou a hong haubel vengkeng, ama tuiloupikeuhsak dia op bang ahi,adam lai ngei in amah atuansan ding ua,atawp in mihai ahong himai ding. 12Ka mun siangthou omna bellaltutphah thupi mahmah,atung a kipan a tawisang a om ahi.

JEREMIAH 17: 13Aw Toupa Israel lamet, nanghon paisan mi tengteng azahlak ding uh;kei hon lehngatsan mite lei a leivui a gelh bang lel ahi ding uh, Toupa hinna tuikhuk pen lah apaisanta ngal ua.Jeremiah In Toupa Panpihna Angen 14Aw Toupa hon hihdam inla, huchi in ka dam ding a, hon humbit lechin, huchi in ka bit ding, ka phat gige nang na hi. 15“Ngai in, ka kiang ah, Toupa thu koi ah? Hong tung leh ake,” achi sek uh. 16Thil hoih lou tungsak ding ka hon phut kei a, siatna ni lah ka deih het kei chih na thei hi; ka kam a thupawt lah na maima a om ahi ngal a. 17Judah Khelhna Leh Gawtna 18Hon simmohte zahlak uhenla, kei bel zahlak kei leng; amau bel lungzing uhenla, kei bel lungzing kei leng; mangbat ni atung uah tun inla, nakpi in amaute hihmang in.Sabbath Tan Thu 19 Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: Kuan inla, Judah kumpipate lutna zel leh pawtna zel, mipite tate kongpi ah leh Jerusalem kongpite tengteng ah va dingh inla; 20akiang uah, “Nou Judah kumpipate, Judah tengtengte, Jerusalem a teng tengteng hiai kongpi a lut sekte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un.” 21Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na hinna uh pilvang mahmah dih ua, Sabbath ni in puak nei kei unla, Jerusalem kulh kongpi ah lutpih sam kei un. 22Huan Sabbath ni in na inn ua kipan puak na pokhe ding uh ahi kei a, nna na sem ding uh ahi sam kei; na pipute uh kiang a ka thupiak bang in Sabbath na tang siangthou zaw ding uh ahi. 23Amau zaw angaikhe kei ua, bil adoh kei ua;

JEREMIAH 17: thununna azak ua atanlouhna ding un akigenhaksak zaw uhi.” 24 Toupa thupawt in hichi in achi: “Khawksatak a na hon ngaihkhiak ua, Sabbath ni a hiai khopi a kongpi a thil na puaklut louh ua, 25nna na sep louh ua Sabbath na tan siangthou uleh, hiai khopi kongpi ah leh heutute, David tutphah a tu dingte kangtalaite leh sakolte ah tuang in ahong lut ding ua, amau leh amiliante uh Judah leh Jerusalem a tengte toh; huchi in hiai khopi ah mi atengdenta ding uh. 26Judah khopi leh Jerusalem kim a kipan, Benjamin gam a kipan, gam niam gam a kipan, tanggam a kipan leh Sim gam a kipan in ahong pai ding ua, halmang thillat leh kithoihnate buh-le-bal thillat leh gimlimte, kipahna kithoihnate Toupa inn ah ahon tawi ding uh. 27Himahleh Sabbath tang siangthou ding leh Sabbath ni a puak neih louh leh Jerusalem kulh kongpi a lutpih louh ding thu ah na hon ngaihkhiak kei uleh akulh kongpite ah mei ka pawtsak ding a, Jerusalem kumpipa' inn te akangbei ding a, amit kei ding hi.”

JEREMIAH 18: 1 Toupa a kipan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung in hichi in achi: 2“Thou inla, belvelmi inn ah hohsuk inla, huai ah ka thute ka hon theisak ding,” achi hi. 3Huchi in belvelmi inn ah ka hohsukta a, abel bawlna khawl ah nna asem hi. 4Tung a bel abawl lai ahong hoih keileh belvelmi'n hoih asak bang in bel dang ding in abawl nawn zel hi. 5Huchi in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, 6“Aw Israel inkote aw, hiai belvelmi hih bang in nou ka hon hihthei kei a hia? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai dih ua, belvelmi khut a tungman bang lel in ka khut ah na om uhi, aw Israel inkote aw,” 7Chik lai in leng nam hiamgam hiam tungtang thu ah, ka hon dokkhe ding, ka hon phel ding a, ka hon hihse ding, chi in na gen mah leng, 8Huai nam in atungthu ka gen ziak a athil hoih lou hih alehngatsan leh atung a thil hoih lou hih ka tup ka kikhelsak ding. 9Huan chik lai in leng nam hiamgam tungtang thu ah, ka hon bawl ding a, ka hon dingsak ding, chi a na gen hi leng zong, 10ka paukam suak ngaikhe lou a ka mitmuh a thil hoih lou ahihleh ama a ding in thil hoih hih ka tup ka kikhelsak sam ding. 11Huaiziak in Judah mite leh Jerusalem a tengte kiang ah Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, na tung uah thil hoih lou ka ngaihtuah a, nou ka hon sawm lai na hi uh, michih in a-omdan hoih lou uh lehngatsan uhenla, na omdan uleh na thilhihte uh bawlpha un,” va chi peuhmah in. 12Himahleh amau zaw, “Kilawm kei e!

JEREMIAH 18: Koumau phasak bangbang in ka om ding ua, michih koumau lungtang gilou genhak bang zel in ka om ding uh,” achi sek uhi.Mipite'n Toupa Anial Uh 13Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi:Namdangte dong him dih ua,hichibang mahmah kua'n athei a?Nungak siangthou Israel inthil lauhuai mahmah ahihta. 14Lebanon vuk in amualvum anuse ngei a hia?Gamla a kipan a tui vot hong luangsukte akangtat ngei a hia? 15Ka mite'n ahon mangngilh ua,bangmah lou phet kiang ah gimlim ahal ua, huaite'n atuma lamlampi ua kipan akisuisak a, lampi pen hiloulamkhem lam azui uh; 16agam uh hihsiatgawp ahi dia,tangtawn a enghou ding;kivialleh min lamdang sa in alu uh asing ding ua. 17Suahlam huihpi bang in melma ma ah ka thehzak ding,avangtah ni un ka mel hilou,ka dek ka musak ding hi.Jeremiah Kalh A Doudalna 18Belvelpa Inn A Jeremiah 19Hon limsak inla, aw Toupa ka hon ngetna thu limsak in. 20Thil hoih a gilou dit ahi dia hia? Amau lah ka kha a ding in kokhuk atou ngal ua. Amau a kipan a na hehna heimang ding leh amau a dia thil hoih gen ding a na ma a ka din sek theigige in. 21Huchi in atate uh kialpi kiang ah pekhia inla, namsau hatna kiang ah pia in; huan azite uh ta nei lou in, meithai uhen; apasalte uh hipi in si uhenla, atangvalte uh leng kidouna ah namsau in si uhen. 22Sim mite akiang uh na tunsak guih lai in a-inn ua kipan kap husa thangkhia hen; kei a ding in kokhuk atou ngal ua, ka khe awkna ding in thang akam uhi. 23Himahleh nang, aw Toupa kei hon that ding a ahon sawmna tengteng uh na thei hi; athulimlouhna uh ngaidam ke'nla, na mitmuh in akhelhna uh thaimang sam ke'n. Na ma ah kipuk uhenla, na heh ni in amaute soisa in.

JEREMIAH 19: 1 Toupa'n hichi in achi: Kuan unla, belvelmi leibel va lei un; mipite upate leh siampu lak a upate pi inla; 2belvelmi kongpi lutna chin a Ben Hinnom Phaizang ah hoh inla, huai ah na kiang a thu ka hon hilh ding na puang ding hi. 3Hichi in na chi ding hi, “Judah kumpipate leh Jerusalem a tengte aw, Toupa thu za un.” Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, hiai mun ah aza peuhmah bil am khop hial a thil hoih lou ka hon tun ding hi. 4Mite'n ahon paisan ua, hiai mun ahihnin un, amau leh apate uh leh Judah Kumpipate'n leng atheih ngei nai het louh uh, pathian dangte kiang ah gimlim ahal ziak uleh hiai mun mihoih sisan a adimsak ziak un leh Baal kiang a halmang thillat ding a atate uh ahalna ding ua Baal mun sangte alamkhiak ziak un; 5Huai zaw ka thupiak ahi kei a, gen leng ka gen sam kei a, ka lungsim ah leng a-om ngei kei hi. 6Huaiziak in ngai dih, nite ahong tung ding,” Toupa thupawt in achi; huai nite chiang in hiai mun Tophet chih ahita kei ding a, Ben Hinnom Phaizang chih ahi sam kei ding; kithahna Phaizang chih ahi zawta ding. 7Huan hiai mun ah Judah leh Jerusalem thiltupte ka vuaksuaksak ding a; amau pen namsau in amelmate uh ma ah leh ahinna uh lak tum mite khut ah ka puksak ding; aluangte uh tung a leng vasate leh lei a gamsate an ding in ka pe ding. 8Huchi in hiai khopi lamdangsak ding leh enghou ding in ka bawl ding a, avialpai peuh in siatna atuahte ziak in lamdang asa ding ua, a-enghou lai ding uhi. 9Atanute uleh atapate uh sa ka nesak ding a;

JEREMIAH 19: amelmate uh leh ahinna uh lak tum mite'n a-um ua amangbatsak hun chiang un kuapeuh in a-invengte uh sa ane ding uh. 10Huan na paipihte mitmuh in bel na hihtam ding a, akiang uah huchi in na chi ding. 11Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Hichi mah bang in hiai mite leh hiai khua ka hihtam ding; mi'n belvelmi bel akitapsak a, bawlhoih nawn vual ahih louh bang in Tophet ah avui ding uh; vuina ding mun dang a-om louh ziak in. 12Huchi hial in hiai mun ka bawl ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; hichi mah bang in hiai khua Tophet bang a bawl hial in, asung a tengte tung ah leng ka hih ding; 13Jerusalem innte leh Judah kumpipate innte, inn chiteng mahmah atung a van lam thilte kiang a gimlim halkhitna tengteng leh pathian dangte kiang a dawn ding thillat butkhiaknasa tengtengte Tophet mun bang hial a hihnit ahi ding hi.” 14Huan Jeremiah bel, Toupa'n thugen ding a asawlna mun Tophet a kipan in ahong pai a; Toupa' inn um sung ah adingh a, mipi tengteng kiang ah hichi in achi: 15Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, thil hoih lou ka gen tengteng hiai khopi leh akho dang tengteng ah ka hon tungsak ding; ka thu ngaikhe lou ding a alungtang uh akhauhsak ziak un.” 19Tuibel Kitam

JEREMIAH 20: 1Huan Immer tapa, Toupa' inn a heutupa pen, siampu Pashur in Jeremiah in huai zawlnei thugente agen chih ana za hi. 2Huchi in Pashur in zawlnei Jeremiah akhen a, Toupa' inn a Benjamin Kongpi saknung a koltanna ah atangsak a. 3Azing in Pashur in Jeremiah akhahkhia a, huan Jeremiah in akiang ah Toupa'n na min ding in Pashur achi kei a, Magermissabib ahon chi zaw hi. 4Toupa'n lah hichi in achi ngal a: “Ngai in, nang a ding leh na lawmte tengteng a ding in kihtak in ka hon bawl ding; amau amelmate uh namsau in apuk ding ua, nang zaw na mit in na en lel ding. Judahte tengteng Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka pe vek ding; ama'n Babulon ah sal in api ding a, namsau in athat ding hi. 5Huai ban ah, khopi hauhna tengteng, asepkhiak tengteng, athil manpha tengteng leh Judah kumpipate gou tengteng amelmate uh khut ah ka pe ding a, amau alok ding ua, aman ding ua, Babulon ah api ding uh. 6Huan nang Pashur, na insung a om tengtengte toh sal ah na tang ding ua; Babulon ah na pai tei ding; huai ah na si ding a, huai ah vui in na om ding a, nang leh na lawm zuauthu na hilhsekte tengteng toh,” achi hi. Toupa Tung A Jeremiah Phunna 7Aw Toupa, nang na hon khem a, khem a om ka hita ve,nang zaw kei sang in na hat a,na hon zou a; nitum in nuihsanka hita, mi kuapeuh in ahon nuihsan uhi. 8Thu ka gen peuhmah chiang in,ka kikoukhia a, hiamgamna leh siatna, chi in ka kikou; Toupa thu bel kei a ding in,nitum a dem leh muhsit lohna kia ahi.

JEREMIAH 20: 9Amah ka kan kei ding a, aminin leng thu ka gen nawn sam kei ding, chi mah leng,ka guh sung a meikuang kikhum khin bang mai in ka lungtang sung ah a-om a,ka pai kinken zou kei a,ka phazou mahmah kei hi. 10Mi tampi aguk phun uh ka za;kil chih ah lauhuai a-om,hek unla,i hekkhawm ding uh, chi in.Ka lawmte ka puk ding tang gigete'n, “Khem in a-om kha dia,i zou ding, atung ah phu i la kha ding,” achi uhi. 11Himahleh Toupa mihangsankihtakhuai mahmah bang inka kiang ah a-om a,hon simmohte apuk ding ua,ahon zou kei ding uh.Zahlaktak in a-om ding ua,alohchin sin louh ziak un.Tangtawn a aminsiatna uhmangngilh in a-om kei ding. 12Aw sepaihte' Toupa,midiktatte enchianpa,lungtang leh lungsim mu paisuakpa, atung ua na phulak hon musak dih ve,ka tungtang thu ka hon kemsakta hi. 13 Toupa kiang ah la sa unla, Toupa phat un; thil gilouhih mite khut a kipan panpihdeihte hinna ahumbitta hi. 14Ka piankhiak ni hamsethuak in om hen,ka nu'n ahon piansak ni vualzawl in om dah hen. 15Ka pa kiang a, “Tapa na neita,”chih thu hon tun a,hong kipaksakmi pen hamsethuak in om hen. 16Huai mi, Toupa'n hehpih het lou a asukgawp khuate bang in om hen,zingsang lam in kikou husa za henla,sun ahih chiang in galdou husa; 17sul sung a ahon hihlup louh ziak in; huchi hihleh ka nu ka han himai ding hi a,asul in tangtawn a hon pai ding hiven. 18Bangziak a sul a kipan hong pawt chitchiat ka hia,semgim leh lungkham a om ding a zahlak mawngmawng a ka damsung nite zang ding in? 20Jeremiah Leh siampu Pashur Kituahlouhna

JEREMIAH 21: 1Kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang a Malkijah tapa Pashur leh siampu Maaseiah tapa Zephaniah asawl lai a Jeremiah kiang a Toupa a kipan a thu hong tung ahi, 2“Babilon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in ahon dou a, Toupa'n athilhih thupitak ahih sek bang in ahon huh nuam in, akiksak nawn mai kha diam chih Toupa hon dotsak dih ve,” chi in. 3Huan Jeremiah in akiang uah, Zedekiah kiang ah hichibang in va gen un; Israel' Pathian, Toupa'n hichi in achi: 4“Ngai in, Babulon kumpipa leh Kaldai mi, kulh pua a nang hon umbichilhpa na douna galvan zat ka kiksak ding ahi; hiai khopi sung ah amaute ka pikhawm ding. 5Kei mahmah in leng heh leh lungkim lou mahmah leh thangpaitak in ban zak a ban thahat zang in nang ka hon dou ding. 6Hiai khua a teng mihingte leh gante ka that ding a, hipi in asi ding uh.” 7Huai nung in, Toupa thupawt in achi, “Kumpipa Zedekiah leh anungzuite leh midang hiai khua a hipi leh namsau leh kial a siloute, Babulon kumpipa leh amelmate uh khut leh amau thah tum mite khut ah ka pe ding. Namsau hiam in athat ding a, ahehpih het kei ding, ahawi het kei ding a, azahngai sam kei ding.” 8Huan hiai mipite kiang ah huchi in va gen in; Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, sihna lampi leh hinna lampi ka hon koihsak hi. 9Hiai khopi sung a om namsau in hiam kial in hiam hipi in hiam asi ding uh; Kaldai mite nou hon umbichilhpa kiang a pawt a kipete bel ahing ding uh, ahinna uh kidouna kipahman ahi ding hi. 10Hiai khopi hoihna ding hilou, asiatna ding ka tum bilbel ahi;

JEREMIAH 21: Babulon kumpipa khut a piak ahi ding a, ama'n mei in ahal ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Judah Kumpipa Inkuante Tung A Toupa Thukhenna 11Judah kumpipa inkote tungtang thu ah; Toupa thu ngaikhia un, 12Aw David inkote aw! Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Zingsang in vai diktak in hawm unla, simmohmi khut a kipan loh thuakmi hunkhia un, huchi lou in zaw ka hehna mei bang in apawt ding a, kuamah phelh vual louh ding in akang dia, na thilhih giloute uh ziak in.” 13“Ngai dih ua, phaizang zang a tengte aw, nou phaizang zang suangpi a teng a, ‘Kuate ahia i omna ua hong lut ding?’ chite aw, nou ka hon lang ding hi. Toupa thupawt in achi hi. 14Na thilhih uh gah bang zel in ka hon gawt ding a, agam gammang ah mei ka khah ding a, akim tengteng akangmang ding,” Toupa thupawt in achi hi. 21Jerusalem Melmate Zoh A Om Ding Genkholhna

JEREMIAH 22: 1 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Judah kumpipa' inn ah hohsuk inla, hiai thu va gen in. 2‘Aw Judah kumpipa, David tutphah tung a tu, nang leh na nungzuite leh na mi hiai kongkhak a lutte toh, Toupa thu ngaikhia un,’ ” chi in; 3Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Diktak leh hoihtak in vai hawm unla; simmohmi khut a kipan loh thuakmi hunkhia unla; mikhualte, pa neiloute leh meithai tung ah diklouhna hiam hiamgamna hiam ching kei un; hiai mun ah mihoih sisan leng suah sam kei un. 4Hiai thu zui ngei hi le uchin zaw, David tutphah tung a kumpipate kangtalaite leh sakolte tung a tuang in, amaute, anungzuite uh leh amite uh hiai na inn kongkhakte ua lut ngeingei ding uh hiven. 5Himahleh hiai thute na ngaihkhiak kei uleh, hiai inn asegawp ding a, chi in kei-le-kei kilou in ka kichiam ahi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 6 Toupa'n Judah kumpipa inkuan tungtang thu hichibang in agen hi: “ ‘Nang zaw kei a ding in Gilead bang, Lebanon mualvum bang na hi, hinapi in gamdai ka hon suaksak ding; luahmi om lou khopi bang mai in. 7Nang hihmang dingte, galvan nei chiat in, ka bawlkhol ding a; na sidar sing telte aphuk ding ua, mei ah akhul ding uh.’ ” 8“ ‘Huan nam tampite'n hiai khopi apal paisuak ding ua, michih in amau invengte kiang ah “Toupa'n hiai khopi thupi mahmah bangziak a hichitak a hih hi ding ahia eita?” achi ding uh. 9A Pathian uh Toupa thukhun alehngatsan ua pathian dangte abiak ua, a-nna asep ziak uh ahi, chi in adawng ding uh.’ ”Jehoahaz Tungtang A Jeremiah Thugen 10Misi kah kei unla, suun samkei un; paimangmi bel nakpimahmah in kah un,ahong kik nawn kei ding a,apianna gam amuh nawn louh ding ziak in.

JEREMIAH 22: 11Judah kumpipa Shallum, Josiah sik a vaihawmpa, hiai mun a kipan paikheta tungtang thu bel Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Hiai ah ahong kik nawnta kei ding. 12Sal a apina mun uah, huai mah ah asi ding a, hiai gam amu nawnta kei ding.”Jehoiakim Tungtang A Jeremiah Thugen 13“Diktatlouhna a inn lam a,diklouhna a dantan tungnungte bawlmi,athawn a amah invengte tha zang,loh pe nuam lou mite tung agik hi; 14‘Inn thupi mahmah ka kilam ding a,dantan tungnung zapite nei inn,tohlette ka hong ding a,sidar sing in ka thuapsuak ding a,zesan ka nuh ding,’ chimi tung mah. 15Sidar sing a na ten ziak in,kumpipa kisa na hi maw!Na pa'n ne in adawn a,diktak in vai ahawm kei maw?Huai amah a ding in ahoih ahi. 16Migenthei leh tasamtevai ahawmsak a, huai ahoih ahi.Hiaitak na hon theihdan ding ahi maw?chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 17‘Himahleh na huaihamte a ding in,mihoih sisan suahna ding,nuaisiahna ding leh hiamgamna ding lel in na mit leh na lungsim na pu ahi.’ ” 18Huaiziak in Judahte kumpipaJehoiakim, Josiah tapa tungthu bel Toupa'n hichi in agen a;“ ‘Aw ka unaupa,’ chi in hiam,‘Aw ka sanggampa,’ chi in hiam amah asuun kei ding ua,‘Aw toupa,’ chi in hiam,‘Aw thupipen,’ chi in hiam amah asuun sam kei ding uh. 19Jerusalem kulh polam alotkhiak a, paih in,sabiltung vui in avui ding uh.Jerusalem Tuah Ding A Genkholhna 20Lebanon ah paitou inla, kikou in,Bashan ah na aw suah inla,Abarim a pan in kikou in, na itte tengteng amangthangta ua. 21Na lohchin in na kiang ah thu ka gen a, nang lah ka ngaikhe kei ding, na chia, ka kamsuak ngaihkhiak louh na tuailai kipan in hiai na omdan ahi.

JEREMIAH 22: 22Judah Kumpipa Inkuante Kiang A Jeremiah Thupuak 23Aw Lebanon tang a teng, sidar sing lak a buseptu na tung a natna atun a na hong hehpihhuai ding dan mai zaw!numei nauvei na bang mai in.”Jehoiachin Tung A Pathian Thukhenna 24Ahin a ka hin sung, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; Judah kumpipa Koniah, Jehoiakim tapa bel ka khut taklam a sawnna zungbuh himah lechin, huai a kipan ka hon botkhe ngeingei ding. 25Thah ding a nang hon zongmi khut ah, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah leh Kaldaite khut ah ngeingei nang ka hon pe ding hi. 26Na pianna hilou gamdang ah nang leh na nu nang hon suangtu ka hon paikhe ding a, huai ah na si ding uh. 27Alungsim ua kik nawn a-utna mahmah gam uah akik nawn kei ding uh. 28Hiai Koniah pen bel kitamgawp, simmohhuai ahi kei a hia? Bel asung a lungkimna omlouhna ahi kei maw? Bangziak a amah leh asuante paihkhiak a gam atheih ngei louh ua paihkhiak a a-om uh? 29Aw, gam, gam, gam, Toupa thu ngai in, 30 Toupa'n hichi in achi,“Hiai mi ta nei lou, adamsung a lohching lou ding mi ahi,asuante kuamah lohching a,David tutphah tung a tu ding leh Judah gam a vaihawm nawn ding a-om kei ding uh,” chi in gelh in.

JEREMIAH 23: 2Huaiziak in Toupa Israel' Pathian in ka mite chingpa belamching mite tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: “Ka ganhonte na dalhsak ua, na delhmang ua, na veh kei uh, ngai un, na thilhih uh gilou ziak in nou ka hong veh ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 3Huan ka ganhon khosuaksunte ka delhzakna gam tengteng a kipan ka pikhawm nawn ding a, ahuangsung uah ka hawlkhawm ding a, gah nuam mahmah ahi ding ua, apung ding uh. 4Amaute limsak ding, amaute a ding in belamchingmi ka koih ding a, alau nawnta kei ding ua, kuamah amang nawn kei ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 5“Ngai dih ua, David a ding in Hiang diktat ka suahsak hun ding ahong tung dekta hi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; amah kumpipa in atu ding a, piltak in agamta ding a, gam pumpi ah dikna leh diktatna atangtungsak ding. 6Ahun sung in Judah hotdam ahi ding a, Israel bittak in a-om ding. Huai amin ding a asak ding uh hiai ahi, “Toupa i diktatna uh ahi,” chih. 7“Huaiziak in ngai dih ua, ahun atung sinta,” Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Israel mite, “Aigupta gam a kipan a hon pikhepa Toupa ahin a ahin sung, chi nawn lou in. 8Mallam gam leh adelhzakna gam tengteng a kipan Israel inkote suante pikhia a, pikik nawnpa Toupa ahin a ahin sung, achi zawta ding uhi.” Huchi in amau gam ngei ah ateng ding uh.Zawlneite Tungtang A Jeremiah Thugen 9Zawlneite tungtang thu pen,ka sung ah ka lungtangapuakkham hi, ka guh tengaling a, zukham bang mai ka hi,zu in azelh zoh mi bang mai in, Toupa ziak leh athu siangthou ziak in. 10Gam angkawm in adim a,hamsia ziak in gam in asuun a,gamdai louhing munteakeu khinta;alampi uh agilou a,ahatna uh adik kei hi.
