JEREMIAH 23: 11Zawlneite leh siampute'nPathian khawk asa kei ua,ka insung mahmahah leng akhelhna uh ka mu. 12Huaiziak in amaute a ding in apaina lampi uh,zan khomial lampi nal bang ahi ding a, huai ah delh in a-omding ua atolhpuk ding ua,atung uah thil hoih lou ka tungsak ding a, amau gawtna hun, Toupa thupawt in achi hi. 13Samaria zawlneite tung ah kihhuai ka mu,Baal lou in thu agen ua,Israelte apimang uhi. 14Jerusalem a zawlneite tung ah thil mulkimhuai ka mu,ang a kawm ua, zuau in agamta ua, thil gilou hihte khut ahatsak ua, kuamah in agitlouh uh kisik atup louh loh uhi;kei a ding in Sodom a mite bang ahong hi vek ua,akhosung a mite tengteng leng Gomorrah a mite bang hial in. 15Huaiziak in zawlnei hon tungtang thu ahsepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:“Ngai dih ua, gamsai in ka vak ding a,thil kha ka dawnsak ding;Jerusalem a zawlneite kiang a kipan in gam pumpi ah Pathian poisaklouhna lah apawtta ngal a.” 16Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Zawlnei na kiang ua thugente thu ngaikhe kei un; bangmah lou ahon sinsak ua, Toupa kam a kipan hilou amau lungsim geltawmte agen uhi. 17Toupa thu musit mite kiang ah, ‘Nang ding in ahoih ding,’ achi vial ua; amau deihlam engtat a hih teitei mite kiang ah, ‘Thil hoih lou bangmah na tung ah ahong tung kei ding,’ ” achi uh. 18 Toupa thugelna ah kua apang ngei a, athu sang a thei ding kua ahia om? Ahihleh athu pen kua'n ahia limsak a ngaikhia om? 19Ngai dih ua, Toupa huihpi, hehna apawtta, ahi, pingpei huihpi; migiloute lutang anuai ding. 20Toupa hehna amawk kik kei ding, alungsim a atup tinten atangtungsak a, ahih khit phot masiah; ni nanung lam ah na hon theichian ding uh.

JEREMIAH 23: 21Zawlneite bel ka sawl louhpi in atai ua, akiang ua thu ka gen louh in leng thu agen uh. 22Ka thugelna a om tei hi le uh zaw, ka mite kiang a ka thu puang ding hi ve un, athilhihdiklou ua kipan lehngatsak ding hi ve un. 23Hun Hong Tung Ding A Lametna 1“Agantatna mun a belam hihmangthang a dalhzaksak belamching mite atung uh agik hi!” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 24Mun kisel ah ka muh theih louh dia kibu thei mi a-om ua hia? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Lei leh van ah ka dim ahi kei maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 25“Mang ka nei, mang ka nei, chi a ka min a zuaugen zawlneite thugen ka zata hi.” 26Zawlnei zuaugente, amau lungtang kikhem tawm a thu sek mite lungtang ah hiai bang tan ahia a-om ding? 27Amau bel a-invengte uh kiang ah amang uh ahilh ua ka mite ka min mangngilhsak atum ua, apate un Baal ziak a ka min amangngilh khit bang un, 28zawlnei mang nei in amang gen hen aw, ka thuneimi in ka thutak diktak in gen hen. Buhpawl leh buhtang in kibatna bang anei ua? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 29Ka thu mei bang ahi kei maw, sek suang seknenna bang? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 30Huaiziak in ngai un, zawlnei hon, ka thu kiguksak tuah sekte ka dou ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 31Ngai dih ua, zawlnei amah dangnalsak a, Toupa'n achi, chisekte ka dou ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 32Ngai dih ua, mang zuau leltak gen a, hilh a, azuauthute uh leh aki-otsakna thuginaloute uh ziak a ka mite pimang zawlneite ka dou ahi, Toupa thupawt in achi; ka sawl ngal kei a, thu lah ka pe kei a, hiai mipite aloh taksak kei ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

JEREMIAH 23: Toupa Lunggimna 33Hiai mipite lak a mi kuahiam, zawlnei kuahiam in, siampu kuahiam in, “Toupa puakgik bang ahia?” chi a ahon dot leh hichi in na dawng ding hi, “Noumau mah puakgik pen na hi uh, ka hon paimang ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 34Zawlnei hiam, siampu hiam, mi kuahiam, Toupa puakgik, chi a-om uleh, huai mi leh a-inkote ka gawt ding. 35Huchi in mi kuapeuh in a-invengpa kiang ah leh kuapeuh in a-unaupa kiang ah Toupa'n bangchi in adawng a, Toupa'n bang agen a? chi in na kidong ding uh. 36Toupa puakgik na lou kha nawn kei ding ua, mi kuapeuh amah mah thugen apuakgik ahi ding hi. Pathian hing, sepaihte' Toupa, i Pathian thu uh lah na lehbulh khinta ngal ua. 37Zawlnei kiang ah, “Toupa'n bangchi in nang ahon dawng a? Toupa'n bang ahia agen?” na chi ding. 38Huan “Toupa puakgik, na chih peuhmah uleh, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Toupa puakgik na chi ding uh ahi kei,” chi a ka hon sawl a, Toupa puakgik chi a thu na gen ziak in; 39huchi in ngai un, “Ka hon mangngilh keuhkeuh ding a, noute leh hiai khopi na kiang uleh na pate uh kiang a ka na piaksa toh ka hon paimang ding hi. 40Huan tangtawn demsiatna leh zahlak nilouhna mangngilh vual louh na tung uah ka hon tun ding hi.”

JEREMIAH 24: 1Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judahte kumpipa Jekoniah, Jehoiakim tapa leh Judah heutute, mikhutsiamte leh siksek mite toh Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon sal dia api nung in, Toupa'n hiai mengmuhna ahon ensak a, ngai dih, theipi bawm nih Toupa tempul ma ah akitung hi. 2Bawm khat ah theipi hoihtak, theipi min masa bangtak a-om a; bawm dang ah bel theipi hoih lou, nek tak louh khop a sia a-om hi. 3Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Bang ahia na muh, Jeremiah?” achi a. Ke'n, “Theipi, theipi hoih, hoih mahmah; leh ahoih lou, nek tak louh khop a sia,” ka chi hi. 4Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, 5Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Judah saltangte, Kaldaite gam a athahna ding ua ka sawlkhiakte, hiai theipi hoih bang in ka en ding hi. 6Ahoihna ding un atung uah ka mit ka tusak ding a, hiai gam ah ka pikik nawn ding; amau ka dingsak ding a, ka phel kei ding; ka suan ding a, ka botkhe kei ding. 7Huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na hon theihna ding in lungtang ka hon pe ding a; ka mite ahi ding ua, a Pathian uh ka hi ding; alungtang tengteng uh toh ka kiang ah ahong kik ding uhi.” 8 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Theipi sia, nek tak louh khop a sia bang in Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh aheutute uh leh Jerusalem a nituang hiai gam a omlaite leh Aigupta gam a tengte, ka lehngatsan ding hi. 9Haksatak a leitung gam teng lak ah sep leng ding in, ka delhmangnate gensiat leh tehpih leh tai leh hamsiatkhum hi ding in ka tawpsan ding. 10Amau leh apate uh kiang a ka piak gam a kipan valh khit ahih tanpha un alak uah namsau, kial leh hii ka sawl ding hi.” 24Theipi Bawm Nih Muhna

JEREMIAH 25: 1Judahte kumpipa, Jehoiakim, Josiah tapa kum lina a Judah mite tengteng tungtang a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung; huai hun bel Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kum khatna ahi a, 2huai thu zawlnei Jeremiah in Judah mi tengteng leh Jerusalem a om tengtengte kiang a agen ahi. 3Kum sawmnih-le-thum sung, Judahte kumpipa Josiah, Ammon tapa kum sawm-le-thumna a kipan tutan in, Toupa thu ahong tung zel a, phalvak a thou in na kiang uah ka gengen a, himahleh na ngaikhe kei uh. 4Toupa'n na kiang uah anasemmi zawlneite tengteng asawl a, phalvak a thou in asawl a, himahleh na ngaikhe kei ua, thei ding in na bil uh na doh sam kei uh. 5Huai, zawlneite'n, “Michih noumau lampi gilou a kipan hong kik unla, Toupa'n na kiang ua leh na pipute uh kiang a nidanglai a kipan tangtawn a ding a nou ahon piak gam ah teng un. 6Pathian dangte kiang ah a-nna uh sem ding leh amaute be ding leh na khut nasep ua kei hon lungkim lousak ding in hoh kei un; huchi in ka hon hihna kei ding hi,” achi uh. 7Himahleh nou ding a hoih lou ding a na khut nasep ua hon hehsak ding in na hon ngaikhe kei uh, Toupa'n achi. 8“Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ka thu na ngaihkhiak louh ziak un, ngai dih ua, 9mallam nam tengteng ka thukhak ding a, Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Ka nasempa Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leng ka thukhak ding a, amaute hiai gam leh asung a omte leh hiai kim a nam om tengteng sual ding in ka hon pi ding; ka hihmang sipsip ding a, lamdangsak ding leh enghou ding leh segawp nilouh ding in ka bawl ding.

JEREMIAH 25: 10Huan akiang ua kipan nopsakna husa leh kipahna husate, mouneipa aw leh mou awte, buhgawi husa ging leh khawnvak vakte ka lamang ding hi. 11Hiai avek in ase ding a, lamdangsak ahi ding a; hiai namte'n Babulon kumpipa nna kum sawmsagih asem ding uh. 12Huan kum sawmsagih aman hun chiang in Babulon kumpipa leh huai nam, Kaldaite gam, agitlouhna uh ziak in ka gawt ding a; tangtawn in ka segawpsak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 13Huai gam tung ah ka thu atung ua ka gen tengteng, Jeremiah in namte tung a agen, hiai laibu a gelhsa tengteng ka tungsak ding hi. 14Nam tuamtuam leh kumpipa thupitakte'n amaute'n nna akisep un, amau mahmah in leng amau nna ahon sepsak ding uhi.Namte Tung A Pathian Thukhenna 15 Toupa Israel' Pathian in ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Ka khut a hiai hehna uain nou la inla, ka hon sawlna ding nam chih dawnsak in. 16Adawn ding ua, ahoi dongdong ding ua, ahai ding ua, akiang ua ka sawl ding namsau ziak in,” chi in. 17Huchi in Toupa khut a kipan nou ka la a, Toupa'n hon sawlna nam chih ka dawnsak hi. 18Jerusalem leh Judah khopite, huai kumpipate leh heutute, siatgawpnate, lamdangsakte, enghou dingte, hamsiatte tang ding in, tua a-omdan bang uh; 19Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh leh asikhate,aheutute leh ami tengtengte; 20Amau lak a mikitokpolh tengteng;Uz gam a kumpipa teng;Philistia gam a kumpipa tengteng,Ashkelon leh Gaza leh Ekron lehAshdod khosuaksunte; 21Edom leh Moab leh Ammon suante; 22Tura kumpipa tengteng leh Sidonkumpipate leh tuipi gei kumpipate; 23Dedan leh Tema leh Buz lehabaksam uh met a omte tengteng; 24Arabia kumpipa tengteng,Gamdai a teng nam kihelte kumpipate; 25Mallam A Kipan A Melma 26Mallam kumpipa tengteng,agamla leh anai a mi akizom zel in;leitung a kumpi om tengteng in adawn khit chiang inSeshak kumpipa'n adawn ding hi.

JEREMIAH 25: 27Huan akiang uah sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Dawn unla, kham un, lau unla, kipuk in thoutou nawn kei un; na lak ua namsau ka sawl ding ziak in,” chi in. 28Huan na khut a nou pen dawn ding a alak nop kei uleh huchi in na chi ding; sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na dawn ngeingei ding uh ahi! 29Ka min tam khopi ah thil hoih lou ka hih pan a, noute gawt louh hial in na om ding uh maw? Gawt louh in na om kei ding ua; lei a teng tengteng tung ah namsau ka samkhe ding,” chih sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi. 30Huaiziak in atung ah hiaite gen inla, akiang uah huchi in chi in:“Toupa mun sang a kipan in athum ding,atenna siangthou a kipan a-aw asuah ding, ahuang tung ah nakpi inathum ding; grep suk mite bang in akikou ding, lei luahte teng tung ah. 31Lei tawp pha in husa athangkik ding a, Toupa'n namte alang a,sa tengteng tung ah vai ahawm ding,namsau kiang ah migilou ape ding,” Toupa thupawt in achi hi. 32Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, thil hoih lou in nam chih ahon nuai ding hi, huihpi hat mahmah lei mun tawp a kipan in ahong kuan ding hi. 33Huai ni chiang in Toupa thahte'n lei tawp a kipan in lei tawp pha in akhak ding ua; suun louh leh khop louh leh vui louh in a-om ding ua; leitung a eklei lel ahi maimah ding uh. 34“Belamching mite aw kikou tuaituai unla, kap un, nou belamhon lak a makaite aw, kitung buatbuat un, thah a na om ni uleh na dalhzak nite uh ahong tung petmahta hi. Bel deihhuai bang in na puk ding uh. 35Belamching mite'n taimangna lampi anei kei ding ua, belamhon lak a makaite'n leng pelhna lampi anei kei ding uh. 36Belamching mite kah husa, belamhon lak a makaite mau ging toh, Toupa'n atatna mun uh asuksiat lel ziak in. 37Huang muanhuaite daihsak sipsip in a-omta uh, Toupa heh mahmah ziak in. 38Abukna pawtsanta, humpinelkai bang in, nuaisiahna namsau lauhuai ziak leh aheh mahmah ziak in agam uh ase khinta hi.”

JEREMIAH 26: 1Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim in vaihawm apat tung in hiai thu Toupa kiang a kipan ahong tung hi: 2Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Toupa' inn huangsung ah dingh inla, Judah khopi tengteng Pathian be ding a Toupa' inn a hong paite kiang ah akiang ua gen ding a thu ka hon piak tengteng khat lel leng iim lou in gen vek in. 3Michih in a-omdan gilou uh paisan in angaikhe zenzen khamoh ding uhia, athilhih gilou uh ziak a atung ua thil hoih lou hih ka tup ka khektheihna ding in.” 4Nang akiang uah, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na hon ngaihkhiak louh ua, ka dan na ma ua ka koih na zuih louh ua, 5zingsangpi a thou a amau na kiang ua ka sawl ka nasemmi zawlnei thu na limsak kei uleh; 6hiai inn Shiloh bang in ka bawl ding a, leitung a nam tengtengte hamsia thuak ding in ka bawl ding,” na chi ding hi. 7Huan siampute, zawlneite leh mipi tengteng in Toupa' inn a Jeremiah in hiai thu agen angaikhia uhi. 8Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, mipi tengteng kiang a gen ding a Toupa'n apiak teng agen khit in, siampute, zawlneite leh mipi tengteng in amah amanta ua, “Si peuhmah niteh!” 9Bangziak a Toupa min lou a, “Hiai inn Shiloh bang ahi ding, hiai khopi luahmi om lou in asegawp ding, chi a gen na hia?” achi ua. Huchi in Toupa' inn a mipi tengteng in Jeremiah aboh lutlut uhi. 10Judah heutute'n hiai thu azak un, kumpipa' inn a kipan in Toupa' inn lutna Toupa' inn Kongpi Thak ah atu uhi. 11Huchi in siampute leh zawlneite'n heutute leh mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Hiai mi si tak ahi, khopi siat ding thu, na bil ua na zak bang un agenkhol ngal a,” achi uhi.

JEREMIAH 26: 12Huan heutute leh mipi tengteng kiang ah Jeremiah in, “Na thu ngaihkhiak khitsate uh bang in hiai inn leh hiai khopi siat ding thu gen ding in Toupa'n kei hon sawl ahi. 13Huaiziak in tu in na omdan uleh na gamtatdan uh bawlhoih unla, Toupa na Pathian uh thu mang un; huchi in Toupa'n na tung ua thil hoih lou tung ding aphuankhiaksa akikhelsak thei ding hi. 14Kei ka hihleh, na khut ua om ka hi. Dik leh hoih na chih bang un hon bawl un. 15Na hon thah uleh, noumau leh hiai khopi leh khua-le-tuite tung ah mihoih sisan na tungsak ding uh chih thei mai un; adiktak in na bil ua hiai thute gen dia Toupa'n na kiang ua hon sawl ka hi,” achi hi. 16Huchi in heutute leh mipite'n, siampute leh zawlneite kiang ah, “Hiai mi asih ding ahi kei, Toupa i Pathian min a i kiang ua thu gen ahi,” achi uhi. 17Huan huai gam Upa kuate hiam ahong dingh ua, mipi omkhawmte kiang ah, 18“Mikah, Moreseth mi'n Judah kumpipa Hezekiah vaihawm lai in thu agen a, Judah mi tengteng kiang ah, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Lou bang in Zion leh ahi ding a, Jerusalem thil se omkhawm asuak ding, tang a inn gammang mun sang bang ahi ding,” achi hi. 19Judah kumpipa Hezekiah leh Judahte tengteng in amah athat uhia? Toupa lau in Toupa deihsakna angen ua, Toupa'n atung ua thil hoih lou tung ding apuan akikhelsak ahi kei maw? E'n zaw i tung ua thil hoih lou tungsak ding i hi ve ua! achi hi. 20Huan midang, Toupa min a thugen Keriath-jearim mi Shemaiah tapa Uriah mah leng a-om a, Jeremiah thugen tengteng mah bang in hiai gam leh khopi siat ding thu agen hi.

JEREMIAH 26: 21Kumpipa Jehoiakim leh amithupite leh heutute'n azak un kumpipa'n hihlup atum a; himahleh Uriah in azak in alau a, ataimang a, Aigupta gam ah apaita hi. 22Kumpipa Jehoiakim in Akbor tapa Elnathan leh midangte toh Aigupta gam ah mi asawl hi. 23Huchi in Aigupta gam a kipan in Uriah apikhia ua, kumpipa Jehoiakim kiang ah ahon pi ua, huai in namsau in athat a, aluang vantang han ah apailut ua, achi uhi. 24Himahleh Shaphan tapa Ahikam in Jeremiah agum a, huchi in hihlup ding in mipite kiang ah piak ahita kei hi. 26Jeremiah Vau A Omna

JEREMIAH 27: 1Judah Kumpipa Josiah tapa Zedekiah, vaihawm apat tung lai in, Toupa kiang a kipan in hiai thu ahong tung hi. 2Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: Hakkolte leh akhaute bawl inla, na ngawng ah bat in. 3Huan Edom kumpipa, Moab kumpipa, Ammon mite kumpipa, Tura kumpipa, Sidon kumpipa kiang ah kumpipa Zedekiah kiang a amisawl, Jerusalem a hong paite khut ah khak in. 4Hiai thute apute uh kiang ah gensak in; hichi in Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: huchi in na pute uh kiang a na gen ding uh ahi: 5“Ka thilhihtheihna thupitak leh ka ban zak in leitung, mihingte leh leitung a sate toh ka bawl vek a, piak tuak ka chihte kiang ah ka pia hi. 6Tu in leng ka nasempa Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah hiai gam tengteng ka pe khinta hi, gamsate leng amah nna sem ding in ka pe lai hi. 7Amah gam huntak atun ma in nam tengteng in amah leh atapate leh atapa tate nna asem ding ua, huai nung in bel nam tampite leh kumpipa thupi mahmahte'n amah sikha ding in abawl ding uh.” 8Huan hichi ahi ding a, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hakkol po nuam lou leh a-nna sem nuam lou nam leh lalna gam namsau leh kial leh hipi a amah khut a ka hihman vek masiah amau ka gawt zel ding. 9Noute'n zaw na zawlneite uh, na aisan siamte uh; na mangte uh, na bumsiamte uh, na kiang ua, “Babilon kumpipa nna na sem kei ding uh,” chi a gen mite ngaikhe kei un. 10“Na gam ua kipan a gamlapi a pimang a na omtheihna ding un, na kiang uah zuauthu agenkhol uh ahi; ka hon delhkhiak a na manthatna ding un.

JEREMIAH 27: 11Himahleh Babulon kumpipa hakkol pua a, nna sem nuam namte bel agam ngei uah ka omsak ding a, lei alet ding uh, huai ah ateng gige ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 12Huan Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiang ah hiai thu tengteng bang zel in ka gen a, “Babilon kumpipa hakkol pua unla, amah leh amite nna sem unla, hing un! 13Babulon kumpipa nna sem nuam lou namte tungtang Toupa'n agensa bang in bangziak a namsaute, kialte, hipite a nang leh na mite si ding na hi ua? 14Zawlnei na kiang ua, Babulon kumpipa nna sem kei un, chite thu ngaikhe kei un; na kiang ua zuauthu gen lel ahi ngal ua. 15Ka sawl ahi kei ua, ka min sial in zuauthu agen nak ua, nou leh na kiang ua thugen zawlneite ka delhkhia a, na manthat theihna ding un,” Toupa'n achi. 16Siampute leh hiai mipite tengteng kiang ah leng ka gen sam a; Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na kiang ua zawlnei thugen, “Ngai un, Toupa' inn a belsuante Babulon a kipan inn hon tut ahi pah ding hi,” chi mite thu ngaikhe kei un, na kiang uah zuau agen uhi. 17Amaute ngaikhe het kei un; Babulon kumpipa nna sem unla, hing un; bang ding in hiai khopi akisegawp dia? 18Himahleh zawlnei ahih ua, Toupa thu akiang ua om mah ahihleh Toupa' inn leh Judah kumpipa' inn leh Jerusalem a belsuan nutsiat a omlaite Babulon a tut ahihlouhna ding in sepaihte' Toupa kiang ah ngen uhen. 19Sepaihte' Toupa'n, khuam sangte, dal tuipangte, kingaknate leh hiai khopi a belsuan nutsiat a omsunte, 20Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tapa, Jekoniah leh Judah leh Jerusalem a mihoih tengteng Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon sal a dia api lai a alak val tungtang thu huchi in agen hi. 21Ahi, sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in Toupa' inn leh Judah kumpipa' inn leh Jerusalem a belsuan nutsiat a om lai tungtang thu agen ahi; 22Babulon ah lakmang ahi ding ua, amaute ka hong veh masiah huai ah a-om nilouh ding uh; amau ka latou nawn ding a, hiai mun ah ka koih nawn ding a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 27Jeremiah In Hakkol Abat

JEREMIAH 28: 1Hichi ahong hi a, huai kum mah in, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah, vaihawm pat tunglam, akum lina, akha ngana ah zawlnei Hananiah, Azzur tapa Gibeon min siampute leh mipi tengteng ma ah, Toupa' inn ah hon houpih hi. 2Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Babilon kumpipa hakkol ka hihtanta. 3Kum nih sung vengveng in Toupa' inn a belsuan Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in hiai mun a kipan a alak a, Babulon tan a apaipih tengteng, hiai mun mahmah ah ka hon tun nawn vek ding. 4Hiai mun ah Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tapa, Jekoniah leh Babulon a hoh Judah saltang tengteng ka pikik nawn ding; Babulon kumpipa hakkol lah hihtan ding ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi,” chi in. 5Huan zawlnei Jeremiah in siampute leh Toupa' inn a ding mipi tengteng ma ah zawlnei Hananiah kiang ah, 6Zawlnei Jeremiah ngei in, “Amen, Toupa'n huchibang in hih ngei hen; Toupa' inn a belsuante leh saltanna a mi tengteng Babulon a kipan hiai mun a hon tun ding a na gen Toupa'n hih ngei hen. 7Himahleh mipi tengteng leh na bil a ka thugen ngaikhia in. 8Kei leh nang ma a nidang a zawlneite'n gam tampi tung ah leh lalna gam thupi pite tung ah kidounate, thil hoihloute leh hipi thute agen sek uh. 9Zawlnei muanna thugenmi thugen ahong tun hun chiang in, huai zawlnei pen Toupa'n asawl ngei ahi, chih akithei mai ding,” achi hi. 10Huan zawlnei Hananiah in hakkol, zawlnei Jeremiah puak ala a, ahihtan hi. 11Mipi tengteng ma ah Hananiah in, Hichi in Toupa'n achi: “Hichibang ngei in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hakkol kum nih sung vingveng in nam tengteng ngawng a kipan ka hihtan ding, achi hi.” Huchi in zawlnei Jeremiah in apaisanta hi.

JEREMIAH 28: 12Huan zawlnei Hananiah in zawlnei Jeremiah ngawng a kipan hakkol ahihtan nung in Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, 13Kuan inla, Hananiah kiang ah huchi in va chi in. Hichi in Toupa'n achi: “Sing hakkol na hihtan a, atang in sik hakkol na bawlsak zaw ahi. 14Hichi in Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi ngal a, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar nna aseptheihna ding un hiai nam tengteng sik hakkol ka posak ding ahi; amah nna asem ding uh; gamnuai a gamsate leng amah ka pe lai ahi,” chi in. 15Huan zawlnei Jeremiah in zawlnei Hananiah kiang ah, “Ngai in, Hananiah, Toupa'n nang ahon sawl peuhmah kei hi; hiai mite zuau na muangsak lel ahi zaw.” 16Huaiziak in huchi in Toupa'n achi: “Ngai dih, leitung a kipan ka hon hihmang vengveng ding; Toupa tung a helna thu na gen ziak in tukum mahmah in na si ding,” achi hi. 17Huchi in huai kum mah, akha sagihna ah zawlnei Hananiah asita hi. 28Jeremiah Leh Zawlnei Hananiah

JEREMIAH 29: 1Zawlnei Jeremiah in Jerusalem a kipan a saltang upate, siampute, zawlneite, midangte, Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon a api khit, akhosuaksunte kiang a alaikhak thu hiai ahi: 2Kumpipa Jekoniahte, kumpinute, michilgehte, Judah leh Jerusalem heutute, mikhutsiamte, siksek mite Jerusalem apaikhiak nung ua; 3Shaphan tapa, Elasah leh Hilkiah tapa, Gemariahte khut ah akhak hi; amaute bel Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in Babulon gam a Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang a asawlte ahi uh. 4Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n saltang tengteng, Jerusalem a kipan Babulon sal dia ka pisaksate kiang ah hichi in achi: 5Inn lam unla, huai ah teng un, huan bawl unla, agah ne un, zi nei unla, tanute tapate nei un. 6Na tapate uh zi neisak unla, na tanute uh pasal neisak unla, tanu tapa aneihtheihna ding un; huai ah va pung unla, kiam lam nawt kei un; 7sal dia ka hon tansakna khopi hoihna ding zong unla, Toupa kiang ah ngetsak un; ama hoihna ah nou leng hoihna na mu ding uhi. 8Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na lak ua zawlneite leh aisan siamte'n hon khem kei uhenla, amang mat uh leng ngaikhe sam kei un. 9Ka min sial in zuauthu na kiang ah agen uhi; kei sawl ahi kei uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 10 Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a, Babulon a ding in kum sawmsagih achin chiang in ka hong veh ding a, na kiang ua ka thuchiam hoihtak ka tungsak ding, hiai mun ah ka hon kiksak nawn ding. 11Nou lam a ka lungsim putdan ka kithei hi, na hun nanung tawp ua lametna leh tunung hon pe ding in thil hoih lou hilou in hoihna ngaihtuah ka hi. 12Huan na hon kan ding ua, ka kiang ah na hong thum ding ua, ka hon ngaikhe ding hi.

JEREMIAH 29: 13Na hon zong ding ua, na lungtang tengteng ua na hon zon hun chiang un na hon mu ding uh. 14Huchi in na hon muh un ka om ding, Toupa thupawt in achi, “Na vangphatnate uh ka tungding nawn ding a, nam tengteng lak a ka hon dalhsakna mun a kipan ka hon pikhawm nawn ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; sal dia ka hon matsakna mun ngei ah ka hon tungsak nawn ding,” chi in. 15“Toupa'n Babulon gam ah leng zawlnei ahon bawlsak,” na chi uhi. 16Toupa'n David tutphah ah kumpipa tungtang thu leh hiai khopi a teng mipi tengteng, sal dia pi tel louh, na unaute uh tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: 17Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, atung uah namsau, kial leh hipi in ka delhzui ding a, theipi hut, ahoih louh mahmah ziak a nek tuak het lou bang mai in ka bawl ding. 18Namsau, kial, hipi in ka delhzui ding a, leitung alalna gam tengteng thil mulkimhuaitak in ka bawl ding a, amau ka dalhsakna nam tengteng lak ah hamsethuak ding in, lamdangsak chiat ding in, hamsiatkhum, selphou leh gensiat hi ding in ka bawl ding hi. 19Phalvak a thou a ka nasem, zawlnei zang a ka thu na kiang ua ka hon tut khawk asak louh ziak un. Toupa thupawt in achi; na ngaikhe nuam ngal kei ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 20Huaiziak in nou Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon a ka sawl, saltang tengteng aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un. 21“Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n Kolaiah tapa, Ahab leh Maaseiah tapa, Zedekiah ka min sial a na kiang ua zuauthu gen mite tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: Ngai un, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah ka mansak ding hi; na mitmuh ngei un athat ding;

JEREMIAH 29: 22Amau thu ah Babulon gam a Judah saltang tengteng in, Babulon kumpipa'n mei a a-em Zedekiah leh Ahab bang mai in Toupa'n na tung ah hih hen, chih hamse lohna in aneihloh ding uh. 23Israel gam ah thil haihuaitak ahih ua, invengte uh zite ang a kawm ua, ka min sial in ka thupiak louh zuauthu agen ziak un; kei atheipa leh atheihpihpa ka hi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Shemaiah Kiang A Laikhak 24Nehelam mi, Shemaiah tungtang thu ah nang hichi a na gen ding ahi. 25Israel' Pathian, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi, Jerusalem mipi tengtengte kiang ah nangmah min mahmah in lai na khak hi. 26 Toupa'n siampu Jehoiada sik in siampu ding in nang ahon bawl a, Toupa inkemmi na hi ua, mihai, zawlnei kichi peuhte kemte, sikkolte na butsak ding ahi. 27Huchi in bangziak a Anathoth a mi Jeremiah, na kiang ua zawlnei kichi na taihilh louh uh? 28Babulon gam ah i kiang uah, “Saltanna ding asawt ding a, inn lam unla, hiai ah teng un, huan bawl unla, agah ne un, chih thu ahon khak hi,” chi in. 29Saltangte Kiang A Jeremiah Laikhak 30Huchi in Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tungta. 31Saltangte tengteng kiang ah, Nehelam mi Shemaiah tungtang thu ah Toupa'n huchi in achi: Ka sawl het louh in Shemaiah in na kiang uah thu agen a, zuauthu nou ahon gingtasak a, 32huaiziak in Toupa'nhichi in achi: Ngai un, Nehelam mi Shemaiah leh asuante ka gawt ding a, hiai mite lak ah mi khat lel leng anei kei ding, ka mite a ding a thil hoih ka hih ding amu kei ding; Toupa tung ah helna thu agen ziak in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in khak in achi hi.

JEREMIAH 30: 1Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa a kipan thu ahong tung a; 2Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na kiang a thu ka gen tengteng laibu ah gelh in,” chi in. 3Ngai in, Israel leh Judah, ka mite omdan ka kikhelsakna ding nite ahong tung lellel hi; gam, apipute uh kiang a ka piak ah ka pikik nawn ding a, aluahta ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in Toupa'n achi. 4Huan Judah leh Israel tungtang thu a Toupa thugen hiaite ahi: 5 Toupa'n hichi in achi:Lauhthawnna husa ka za uh,muanna hilou,launa kikou husa. 6Dong vialvial unla, en vialvial dih ua,pasal in nau avei thei hia?Bangziak a numei nauvei bang zen a,pasalte'n atai uh adep chiat ua,amelte uh ahong molh khit? 7Maizen aw! Huai ni thupi hinamai e, akibatpih mahmah a-om kei,Jakob mangbat ni ahi mah ngut hi,himahleh hotkhiak in a-om ding. 8Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, ahakkol puak ka hihtan ding a, akhau leng ka kitatsak ding; pau tuam mite'n amah nasempa ding in azang ngei nawn kei ding uh. 9Toupa a Pathian uh leh akumpipa uh hi ding a ka tunding ding David nna asem zaw ding uhi. 10Huaiziak in aw ka nasempaJakob aw, lau het ke'n aw,Israel aw, lunglel het ke'n,chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Ngai in, gamlapi a kipan in ka hong hunkhe ding a,asaltanna ua kipan na suante ngei,huan Jakob akik nawn ding a, kuamah in alausak ngei nawn kei ding uh. 11Nang hon hun ding in na kiang ah ka om gige ngal a,ka hon dalhsakna nam tengteng,ka beisak ding a, nang bel beisak lou in; ahun lel in ka hon gawt ding a,gawt louh in na pawt het kei ding,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 12 Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a,na liamna hihdam theih ahi kei a,na meima athupi hi.

JEREMIAH 30: 13Nang hon panpih ding a-om keiua, na damna ding damdawi a-om sam kei hi. 14Nang hon itte'n ahon mangngilhta ua,hon limsakta kei uh;melma liamna in ka hon liamsak a,dawm lou in ka hon gawt hi,na thulimlouhna athupi a,na thilhih giloute apun ziak in. 15Bangziak a na liam ziak a kap na hia?Na liamna hihdam theih ahi kei,na thulimlouhna athupi a,na thilhihkhelhte apun ziak in,hiai thilte na tung a hih ka hi. 16Himahleh nang hon negaite,nekgaih in a-om ding ua, namelmate michih, sal dia pi in a-om ding uh,nang hon lokte loh in a-om ding ua, gallak a hon late gallak in ka la ding hi. 17Ka hon damsak nawn ding a,na liamnate ka hihdam ding; Toupa thupawt in achi;delhkhiak, ahon chi ua,kuamah limsak louh Zion ahi,ahon chih ziak un. 18 Toupa'n hichi in achi,“Ngai in, Jakob puanin saltangte ka lehhei ding a,atenna munte ka zahngaihsak ding a, a-omna mual ngei ah akhopi lam ahi ding a, akumpipa' inn a-omdan ngei in adingh nawn ding. 19Kipahthu Genna leh nopsaknahusa, huaite a pan ahong pawtkhe ding a,Mite ka pungsak ding a,atawm kei ding uh,amau ka hih thupi ding a,aneu kei ding uh. 20Atate uh leng nidanglai bang in a-om ding ua,ka ma ah a-omkhopna uh akip ding a;amaute nuaisiah mite peuhmah ka gawt ding hi. 21Aheutupa uh amau mi mahahi ding a, avaihawmpa uhamau lak a hong pawt mah ahiding; ahon naih ding a, amah ka bawl dia, ama'n ahon naih ding;kua ahia amah thu a hon naih ngam ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 22Huan ka mite na hi ding ua,kei na Pathian uh ka hi ding.” 23Ngai un, Toupa huihpi, ahehna huihpi hat mahmah apawtkheta a; migiloute lu anuai ek ding hi. 24Alungtang tupnate tangtun a ahih khit masiah, Toupa hehna lauhuai mahmah akikhel kei ding; ni nanungte ah na hon theisiam ding uhi. 30Amite Kiang A Toupa Thuchiamte

JEREMIAH 31: 2Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Namsau thah valte, gamdai gam a ka khawl tawldamsak lai in hehpihna amu ua, Israel mahmah ka tawldamsak lai in. 3Nidang a ka kiang a Toupa hong kilang in, hichi in achi: Ahi, it tawp lou in ka hon it a, huaiziak in lainatna in ka hon kai hi. 4K'on dingh thaksak ding, nungak siangthou Israel aw, dingh in kipsak na hong hi ding a, na khuangte toh kizem in na om nawn ding a, nopsak lai lamna munte ah na tel ding hi. 5Samaria tang dung tawn in grephuante na bawl ding a, teng mite'n aching ding ua, agahte ane ding uhi. 6Ephraim tanggamte ah, ching mite kikou ni atung ding hi. Thou un, Zion ah i hoh ding uh, Toupa i Pathian uh kiang ah,” chi in. 7 Toupa'n hichi in achi,“Jakob a ding in nuam in la sa unla,nam thupipen a ding in kikoukhia un, puang unla,pahtawi unla,‘Toupa Israel khosuaksun,na mite hondam in,’ chi un. 8Ngai un, mal gam a kipan ka hon pi ding,kawlmong tawp a kipan ka kaikhawm ding,mittaw, khebai,numei naupaite,nauvei lelte toh, mipi tampitak ahong tungkhawm ding uh. 9Khitui toh ahong pai ding ua,khamuangtak in ka pi ding,tui luang lamte ah ka vaksak ding a, akisuihlouhnading uh lamtangte ah;Israel a ding in pa ka hi a,Ephraim bel ka tachil ahi. 10Aw namte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia unla, tui gei gam gamlapi ah puang unla,Israel dalhsakpa'n apikhawm nawn ding a,Belamchingpa'n abelamte akep bang in akem ding chi in. 11Jakob bel Toupa'n atankhia a,asang a hat a pan ahunkheta hi. 12Zion vum ah lasa in ahong pai ding ua, Toupa hoihna ah akipak ding ua, buhte, uainte, thaute,belam leh ganhon noute tungte ah akipak ding uh;ahinna uh tui avak huan bang ahi ding a,tangtawn in alungkham nawn kei ding uh.

JEREMIAH 31: 13Huan nungak siangthoute kipak a lamin anuam ding ua, tangvalteleng atek-akhang in anuamding ua, alusuunna uh kipahna ka suaksak in ka khamuan ding,adahna ua pan ka kipaksak ding. 14Siampute hinna thau in kataisak ding a, ka hoihna inka mite leng atai ding uh,”chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Israel Tung A Toupa Lainatna 15 Toupa'n hichi in achi:“Ramah ah husa aza ua,misi ngai a kap huphup,Rakil in atate akah a, atate a-om nawn louh ziak inakhamuan theih kei hi. 16 Toupa'n hichi in achi:Kap lou ding in na aw dek inla,na khitui hul hen, na thilhih inkipahman anei ding chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Gal gam a kipan inahong pai nawn ding uhi. 17Na hun tawp lam a ding inlametna a-om a, amau gam ahna tate ahong kik nawn ding uh,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 18Ephraim kah leh mauna kaza hi, nang na hon gawt a,bawngtaltuai sawi bang mai in sawi ka hi a,na kiang ah hon kiksak inla, ka kik ding hi, Toupa ka Pathian na hi ngal a. 19N'on kiksak khit nung in ka kisik a,na hon thuzoh nung in ka pheipi ka beng a, ka zum a,ahi, ka tuailai minsiat thuak in ka am ahai hi,” achi hi. 20Ephraim, ka tapa deihtak,ka nau deihtak ahih ziak hia amah ka thunun teng a ka lungtang a aten tinten nak?Huchi in ka lungtang in amahalainat sek a, atung ah zahka ngai ding,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 21Lampi chiamtehna kibawl inla,nang a ding in lampi kawkmuhna phut in, na va pawtna lam lampi,lampi pen lam ngei chiamteh tinten in; aw nungak siangthou Israel, hongkik nawn in, na khopi ngei ah. 22Aw, nang tanu nungtawn,bang tan ahia na vialvak vak ding?

JEREMIAH 31: Toupa'n lei ah thil thak asiamta a,numei in pasal ahum zawta hi.Hun Hong Tung Ding A Israel Lohchinna 23Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Asaltanna ua kipan ka pikik hun chiang in Judah gam leh akhopite ah hichibang paukam azang nawn ding uh;“Aw, diktatna tenna mun,Aw tang siangthou, Toupa'n hon vualzawl hen,” chih. 24Huai ah Judahte leh akhopi uah mi tengteng atengkhawm ding ua, lounei mite leh ganvul mite toh. 25Mibahte ka taisakta a, milungkham peuhmahte leng ka hihhalhta hi. 26Huchi in ka hong halh a, ka nga vialvial a, mang hoihtak ana hi. 27Ngai dih, nite ahong tung ding hi, Israel inkote leh Judah inkote ah mihing chi leh gan chi ka tuh ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 28Huan hichi ahi ding a, amau botkhia a, hihzan leh paikhia a, hihmang a, hihgim ding a ka tan bang in amau ding hoihsak ding leh tungding ding in ka enkhe nawn ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 29Huai nite in,“Pate'n grep thuk ane ua,atate uh ha azau a,achi nawn ngei kei ding uh.” 30Michih in amau gitlouhna asihpih zaw ding ua, grep thuk ne peuhmah ha azau ding hi. 31Israel Tunding Nawnna 1“Huai hun chiang in kei Israel inkuante Pathian ka hi ding a, amaute leng ka mite ahi ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 32Apipute uh Aigupta gam a kipan a pikhe ding a akhut uh ka let ni a ka thukhun bang hilou in, amaute a dia apasal uh ka hih in leng ka thukhun abohsia ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 33Huai ni khit chiang a Israel inkote kiang a ka thukhun ding bel hiai ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi;

JEREMIAH 31: asunggil uah ka dan ka koih ding a, alungtang uah ka gelh lai ding a, kei a Pathian uh ka hi ding a, amau ka mite ahi ding uh; 34Kuamah in, “Toupa thei in, chi in amau invengte leh amau unau ahilh kei ding ua; aneupen a kipan in alianpen tan in avek un ahon thei chiat ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi, “Abohsiatna uh ka ngaidam ding a, akhelhna uh leng ka theigige kei ding,” chi in. 35Hichi in Toupa,sun vaksak ding a ni pepa,kha leh aksite a dia dante sehsak a,zan vaksak ding a pepa,tuikihotte ging honhon ding a tuipi tokthoupa'n achi hi;amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi. 36“Hiai dansehte ka ma a kipanamanleh Israel suanteka ma a kipan in nam hihatawp den sam ding uh,”chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 37 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Tunglam van teh theih ahih a, lei kingaknate zonkhiak theih ahihleh Israel suante athilhihsate uhziak in ka paimang sam ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 38“Ngai in, nite ahong tung lellel hi, Hananel insung a kipan in kulh ning kongpi tan in Toupa a ding in khopi lamkhiak ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 39Atehna khau bel Gareb mual tan in tangtak in apai zinzen ding a, Goath lam ah akawi ding hi. 40Misi luang leh vut paihna phaizang pumpi leh gamlak tengteng, Kidron lui phaizang tan in, suahlam pang Sakol Kongpi ning tan Toupa ding a tan ding ahi; huai tuh chikchiang mah a hihzak leh phelsiat ahi nawn kei ding hi.”

JEREMIAH 32: 1Judah Kumpipa Zedekiah akum sawmna, huai tuh Nebukadnezzar akum sawm-le-giatna ahi, Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung. 2Huai in Babulon kumpipa sepaihhon in Jerusalem a-um ua; huan Judah kumpipa' inn ngakmi huangsung ah zawlnei Jeremiah atang hi. 3Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in, “Bangdia, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Ngai in, hiai khopi Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka pe ding a ala ding; 4Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leng Kaldai mite khut a kipan apawt kei ding, Babulon kumpipa khut a matsak in a-om zaw ding a, kimaituah in akihoupih ding ua, amit ngei in amel amu ding; 5Zedekiah bel Babulon gam ah api ding a, amah ka veh mateng huai ah a-om nilouh ding; Kaldaite dou mah le uchin na lohching kei ding uh?’ ” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 6Huan Jeremiah in, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: 7Ngai in, na paneu Shallum tapa Hanamel in Anathoth a ka lou nang a ding in lei in, “Gouluah thei na hih ziak in na hon leisak ding ahi chi in na kiang ah ahong pai ding,” chi in. 8Huchi in ka paneu tapa Hanamel in, “Anathoth a ka lou hon leisak tanla, gouluah thei na hih ziak in na tat ding ahi, nang a ding in lei mai in,” achi a. Huchi in hiai Toupa thu ahi chih ka theita hi. 9Huan ka paneu tapa Hanamel Anathoth a lou ka leita a, dangka ka buksak a, adangkasik shekel sawmsagih tak ahi. 10Huchi in lai ka gelh a, ka hilh a, theihpihmi ka sam a, dangka pen bukna ah ka khai a. 11Kileina lai akileidan leh a-omdan gelhna bilh leh bilhlouhte ka la a.

JEREMIAH 32: 12Huan ka paneu tapa Hanamel mitmuh in leh theihpihmi kileina amin tuang teite mitmuh in leh ngakmi huangsung a Juda tute tengteng ma ah Mahseiah tapa Neriah tapa Baruk ka pia hi. 13Baruk bel ama uah thu ka pia a, Israel' Pathian sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: 14“Hiai lai, kileina lai, bilhlouhte la inla, a-om sawttheihna ding in leibel ah koih in. 15Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a; hiai gam ah innte, loute, grephuante mite'n ahon lei nawn ding uh,” chi in.Jeremiah Thumna 16Huan Neriah tapa Baruk kiang ah aleina lai ka piak nung in Toupa kiang ah ka thum hi. 17Aw Toupa Pathian, ngai in, na thilhihtheihna thupi leh na khut zak in lei leh van na bawl a; nang a ding in thilhih haksa lua a-om het kei hi. 18Sang tampite kiang ah hehpihna na musak sek a, pate thulimlouhna anung ua atate uh tung ah na thuk a; aw Pathian thupi leh thilhihthei; amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi; 19thilgel siamtak, thilhihtheitak, mihing tate omdan tengteng muchianpa; 20michih a-omdan uleh athilhih uh bang a thukpa; Aigupta gam a chiamtehnate leh thillamdang hihpa, tuni tan a Israel leh midang lak a hih zelpa, tuni bang mahmah a min kibawlpa. 21Na mi Israelte, Aigupta gam a kipan chiamtehnate, thillamdangte, khut hat leh ban zak leh thil mulkimhuai thupitak in na pikhia hi. 22Hiai khuaizu leh nawitui a luang gam apipute uh kiang a kichiam a piak na chiam na peta a; 23ahong lut ua, aluah vek ua, himahleh na paukam taksang lou in, na dan azui kei uh; hih ding a na piakte ahih kei ua, huaiziak in hiai thil hoih lou tengteng atung uah na tungsak hi. 24En dih, khopi lakna ding a panmun leivupte ahong omta ve;

JEREMIAH 32: namsaute, kialte, hipite ziak in khopi leng asimmi Kaldaite khut ah piak ahita; na gensa ahong tungta; en dih, na muta hi. 25Ahi a lah, Aw Toupa Pathian, nang ka kiang ah, “Na sum in lou lei inla, thu thei mite sam in; khopi bel Kaldaite khut a piak ahita, na chi,” achi hi. 26Huan Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung hi: 27“Ngai in, kei Toupa sa nei tengteng Pathian ka hi, kei a ding in haksa lua a-om a hia? chi in. 28Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in hiai khopi Kaldaite khut ah leh Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah ka pe ding a, ala ding hi. 29Huchi in hiai khopi simmi Kaldaite ahong pai ding ua, hiai khopi ahal ding ua, akang ding, hon hehsak ding a Baal kiang a gimlim latna, pathian dangte kiang a dawn ding lat butkhiakna inn tung nei inn tengteng toh. 30Israel suante leh Judah tate'n atuailai chik ua kipan in ka mitmuh in thil hoih lou ngen ahih uh; Israel suante'n akhut nasepte un ahon hehsak phet uhi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 31Hiai a khopi alam tung ua kipan tutan in hon hehsaktu leh hon thangpaisaktu ahi nilouh ngal a; ka ma a kipan ka hihman vengveng theihna ding in; Israel suante leh Judah tate hon hehsak ding a athil hoih lou hihsate tengteng uh ziak in, 32amau, akumpipate uh, aheutute uh, asiampute uh, azawlneite uh, Judah mite Jerusalem luah mite tengteng toh. 32Jeremiah In Lou Alei 33Kei lam hong nga lou in adeksah uh ahon ngat ua, tawlnga lou hial in sinsakta mah leng, sinsakna lasawn ding in angeingaih kei uhi. 34Ka min tuanna inn hihthanghuai ding in akihhuainate uh akoih zaw uhi.

JEREMIAH 32: 35Ben Hinnom Phaizang a Baal biakna mun sangte alamkhia ua, atanute uh, atapate uh Molek kiang a mei a apaihna ding un, Judahte thil gilou hihsak ding a hiai kihhuai ahih uh ka thupiak ahi het kei hi, ka lungsim ah leng alut ngei kei hi.Lametna Thuchiam 36“Huaiziak in tu in zaw Toupa Israel' Pathian in, ‘Hiai khopi, namsau, kial leh hipi in Babulon kumpipa khut ah piak ahita, na chih nak uh thu ah hichi in achi’: 37Ngai dih, ka hehna, ka lung hihlouhna, ka thangpaihna thupi mahmahte a amau ka delh manna gam teng a kipan ka pikhawm ding a, hiai mun ka hon tun ding a, bittak in ka omsakta ding. 38Huchi in ka mite ahi ding ua, kei amaute Pathian ka hi ding. 39Tangtawn a ahon lauhdet theihna ding un lungtang kibang leh omdan kibang ka bawlsak ding; amau leh anung ua atate uh hoihna ding in. 40Akiang uah tangtawn thukhun ka bawl ding a, amau lehngatsan lou in, ahon launa ka hih gige ding; ahon kiheisanlouhna ding un alungtangte uah ahon lauhna uh ka koih ding. 41Ahi, ahoihna uh hih ka kipah lam ahi ding a, ka lungtang tengteng in hiai gam ah ka phut ngeingei ding. 42“Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai mite tung a thil hoih lou thupi mahmah ka tut bangtak in amaute kiang a thil hoih ka chiam tengtengte ka tungsak ngeingei ding. 43Gam kisegawp, Kaldaite khut a piaksa, mi leh sa om nawn lou, na chih gam uah loute akilei nawn ding uhi. 44Benjamin gamte ah, Jerusalem khopi kim munte ah, Judah gam khopite leh simlam khopite ah mite'n dangka in lou alei ding ua, leina lai agelh ding ua, abilh ding ua, theihpih mite asam ding uhi; a-omdan uh ka hei ding hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.”

JEREMIAH 33: 1Huan Jeremiah kiang ah, vengmi huangsung a khum a a-om lai in, anihveina ding in Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi. 2Lei bawlpa Toupa, kip ding a bawlpa Toupa'n, amin Toupa ahi, chi in achi: 3Hon sam lechin, ka hon dawng ding a, thil thupi leh thil kisel na theih ngei louh ka hon ensak ding. 4Israel' Pathian Toupa'n hiai khopi innte leh Judah kumpipa' inn te, namsau leh leivupte lak a venna bawl ding a aphelsiat uh tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: 5Kaldaite sual ding in amau ahong kuan ua, ka hehna leh thangpaihna a ka thah luangte in adimsak zaw ding uh, agitlouhna tengteng ziak un hiai khopi lak ah ka mel ka na sel hi. 6Ngai in, damna leh hihdamna ka hon tun ding a, ka hon damsak ding; muanna leh bitna kiptak ka hon musak ding. 7Judah omdan leh Israel omdan ka hei ding a, atung a ka dinsak bang in ka dingsak nawn ding. 8Huan athulimlouhna uh, ka tung a athilhihkhelhna lak ua kipan ka sawpsiang ding a, athulimlouhna uh, ka tung a athilhihkhelhna uleh ka tung a atatleknate tengteng uh ka ngaidam ding. 9Huchi in hiai khopi lei a nam tengteng, amau a dia ka hihhoih tengteng mu mite ma ah kei a ding in nopna, pahtawina leh thupina ahi ding a; hoihna muanna atung ua ka tut tengteng ziak in lau in aling ding uhi. 10 Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai mun, Judah khopi a mi leh sa om nawn lou a loihsa, Jerusalem kholak a mi leh sa leh tengmi om lou a loihsa, achih uah: 11“Sepaihte' Toupa kiang ah kipahthu gen un.

JEREMIAH 33: Toupa lah ahoih ngal a;azahngaihna lah tangtawn in a-om ding hi,chi mite aw leh Toupa' inn a kipahna kithoihna hon tawi lasa mite aw leh mou awte mouneipa awte ahon za nawn ding uh, atung a a-om bang in gam ka omsak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 12Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai mun, mi leh sa om lou khop a loihsa leh akhopi tengteng ah, belamchingmi abelamhon uh kualsak mite tenna mun ahong om nawn ding. 13Tanggam khopi ah, phaigam khopi ah, simlam khopi ah, Benjamin gam ah, Jerusalem kim munte ah, Judah khopi ah, amau simmi khut nuai ah belamte apai zungzung ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 14Ngai in, nite ahong tung lellel hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, Israel inkote tungtang ah leh Judah inkote tungtang a thuhoihtak ka na gen pen ka tangtungsak ding. 15Huai nite leh huai hun chiang in diktatna Hiang David kiang ah ka khangkhesak ding, huai gam ah diktak leh diktattak in vai ahawm ding. 16Huai nite in Judah humbit in a-om ding, Jerusalem bittak in a-om ding; huan, amin put ding hiai ahi ding, “Toupa i diktatna,” chih. 17Toupa'n hichi in achi: David in Israel inkote laltutphah a tu ding mi atasam ngei kei ding; 18Siampu Levi chite'n leng ka ma a halmang na lan ding leh buh-le-bal thil lan ding leh kithoih zel ding in mi atasam sam kei ding. 19Huan Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a, Toupa'n hichi in achi: 20Ka sun seh leh ka zan seh thu na phel theih ua, sun leh zan ahuntak ua om lou ding a na hihtheih uleh, 21ka nasempa David kiang a ka thukhun leng alaltutphah a tu ding tapa aneihlouhna ding a hihsiat ahi phet ding hi; Levi chite, siampute, ka nasem mite kiang ah leng.

JEREMIAH 33: 22Van a omte sim seng louh leh tuipi a piaunel sim seng louh bang mai in ka nasempa David suan leh Levi chi kei na hon sepsak mite ka pungsak ding. 23 Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a: 24“Inkuan nih Toupa'n atelte apaimangta,” chi a hiai mite'n agen uh na ngaihtuah ngei kei a hia? Amitmuh ua nam chih tham ahihlouhna ding un hichibang in ka mite amusit uhi. 25Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ka sun leh zan thuseh a-omdet louh a, lei leh van omdante ka seh louh ahihleh, 26Jakob suante leh ka nasempa David suante ka paimang ding, Abraham, Isak leh Jakob suante tung ah vaihawmmi asuan a kipan ka la kei ding; a-omdante uh ka kiheisak in atung uah zahngaihna nei ding ka hi ngal a. 33Tunding Nawnna Thuchiam

JEREMIAH 34: 1Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzarte, asepaihhon tengteng, amah thunuai a lei a vaihawmna gam tengteng leh mipi tengteng in Jerusalem leh akhopi tengteng asual lai ua Toupa kiang a kipan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung: 2Israel' Pathian, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Judah kumpipa Zedekiah va houpih in, hichi in achi: Ngai in, hiai khopi Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka pe ding a, mei in ahal ding; 3akhut a kipan na suakta het kei ding; mat na hi ding a, akhut ah ahon pe ding ua, na mit ngei in Babulon kumpipa na mu ding a, paukam ngei in na kihoupih ding ua, Babulon gam ah na hoh ding hi. 4Himahleh, aw Judah kumpipa, Zedekiah, Toupa thu ngaikhe zel dih; na tungtang thu ah Toupa'n hichi in achi: 5Namsau in na si kei ding a, muangtak in ahi na sih ding; na ma a kumpipa masa, na pipute gimlim ahalsak bang un, nang leng ahon halsak ding uh; ahon suun ding ua, “Ehe heh, ka pu,” chi in. Thu ka khahta hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in. 6Zawlnei Jeremiah in hiai thu tengteng Jerusalem a Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiang ah agen a; 7Babulon kumpipa sepaihhonte'n Jerusalem leh Judah khopi om lai tengteng, Lakish leh Azekah asual lai un; Judah khopi lak a kulh neite hiaite kia ahita uhi.Sikhate Zekhemna Nasep 8Kumpipa Zedekiah in Jerusalem a om mipi tengteng kiang ah, michih in asikhanu toh asikhapate uh, Hebru nu hiam Hebru pa hiam ahih uleh, akhah ding uh ahi; 9Michih in Hebru pasal hiam numei hiam sal a aneih peuhmah asuahtaksak ding ahi, kuamah in ama Juda sanggampih sal a aneihlouhna ding in.

JEREMIAH 34: 10Michih in nasemnu hiam nasempa hiam akhah ding ahi, amau nna sepsak in kuamah a-om ding uh ahi kei, chih thukhun pommi heutu tengteng leh mipi tengteng in thukhun amang ua, akhahta uhi. 11Himahleh huai nung in akihei ua, anasemnu uh leh anasempa uh akhahsate uh akaikik ua, athunuai uah nasemmi ding in akoih nawn uh. 12Huaiziak in Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: 13Aigupta gam, saltanna inn a kipan ka pikhiak ni in na pipute uh kiang ah thukhun ka bawl a, 14michih in a-unaupa, Hebru mi, akiang a zuaksa, kum guk a na nasemsa, akum sagihna tawp in akhah ding ahi, chi in; na pipute un bel ahon ngaikhe kei ua, abil uh adoh sam kei uh. 15Tu in noute'n, na hong kihei ua, michih in a-invengpa kiang a noplenna thu puang in ka mitmuh in thil dik na hon hihta ua; ka min tam inn ah ka ma ah thukhun na hong kibawlta ua; 16himahleh na kihei nawn ua, ka min na hihbuah un a-ut bangtak ua na khahsa nung uh, na sikhanu leh na sikhapa uh na pikik nawn ua, na thunuai uah nasemmi ding bang sikhanute ding bang in na koih nawn uh. 17“Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Michih ama unau leh ama invengte kiang a noplenna thu puang ding in ka thu na ngaikhe kei ua; ngai un, ke'n na kiang uah noplenna thu ka puang hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; namsaute, hipite, kialte in ahi ding; lei a kumpigamte tengteng lak a paihkhiak ding in ka hon bawl ding hi. 18Huan ka thukhun bohsete, ka ma a bawngnou atphel kikal a paisuak hial a thuchiam a tangtungsak lou mi.

JEREMIAH 34: 19Judah heutute leh Jerusalem heutute, michilgehte, siampute, mipi tengteng, bawngnou atphel kikal a paite; 20amelmate uleh ahinna zong mite khut ah ka pe ding a; huchi in aluangte uh tung a leng vasate leh lei a gamsate an ding lel ahi ding. 21Huan Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh alawite amelmate uleh ahinna zong mite leh Babulon kumpipa sepaihhon, nou hon paisansate khut ah ka pe ding hi. 22Ngai un, hiai khopi a hong kik nawn ding in thu ka pe ding a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, huchi in asual ding ua, ala ding ua, mei in ahal ding uh; luahmi om lou in Judah khopite ka hihgam vek ding,” chi in. 34Zedekiah Vauhilhna

JEREMIAH 35: 1Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm lai a Toupa kiang a kipan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung in: 2“Rekab inkote kiang ah hoh in va houpih inla, Toupa inn a dantan khat ah pilut inla, uain dawn ding pia in,” achi a. 3Huan Habazziniah tapa, Jeremiah tapa, Jaazaniah leh a-unaute, atapa tengteng Rekab inkote tengteng toh ka pi a; 4Pathian mipa Igdali tapa Hanan tate dantan, Toupa inn ah ka pilut a; huai dantan bel heutute dantan chin kongpi ngakmi Shallum tapa Maaseiah dantan tung a om ahi. 5Huchi in Rekab inkuante tapate ma ah belhbute, noute uain dim ka tung a, akiang uah, “Uain dawn un,” ka chi hi. 6Amau bel, “Uain ka dawn kei hial ding uh; kou hon suangpa Rekab tapa Jonadab in, ‘Noumau leh na suante un leng tangtawn a uain na dawn ding uh ahi kei; 7inn na lam un haichi na tuh un, grephuan leng na bawl un na nei ding uh ahi sam kei hi; na damsung nite un puanin a na ten zawk ding uh ahi, na omna gam ua na damsawt theihna ding un, chi in thu ahon pia hi.’ 8Huchi in kou hon suangpa Rekab tapa Jonadab in paukam a thu hon thukhah tengteng, ka damsung ua kou leh ka zite uh, ka tapate uleh ka tanute un uain dawn louh ding un, 9ka tenna inn uh lam louh ding, grephuan hiam lou hiam haichi hiam neih louh ding tan in ka zui uhi. 10Puaninte ah ka teng zaw ua, kou hon suangpa Jonadab thupiak tengteng mang in ka zui vek uhi.

JEREMIAH 35: 11Huan hichi ahong hi a, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in gam ahong sual lai in kou, ‘Kisa un, Kaldai sepaihhonte leh Siria sepaihhonte lau ziak in Jerusalem ah i hoh ding uh,’ ka chi ua, huchi in Jerusalem ah ka tengta uhi,” achi uhi. 12Huan Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ahong tung nawn a 13Israel' Pathian Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Judah gam a mite leh Jerusalem a mi tengte kiang ah va gen inla, “Ka thute ngaikhe ding in sinsakna na sang kei ding uh maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 14Rekab tapa Jonadab thu, atapate kiang a apiak, uain dawn louh ding pen azui ua, tuni tan in bangmah adawn kei ua, amau suangpa thupiak azui mahmah uh hi; ke'n bel phalvak a thou in na kiang uah thu ka gen a, himahleh na hon ngaikhe kei uh. 15Ka nasem zawlneite phalvak a thou in na kiang uah ka sawl a, michih na omdan gilou ua kipan hong kik vek unla, na thilhihte uh bawlhoih unla, pathian dangte zaw a-nna uh sem ding in zui kei unla; nou leh na pipute uh kiang a gam ka piak ah na teng ding uh chi in; himahleh na bil uh na doh kei ua, na hon ngaikhe sam kei uh. 16Rekab tapa Jonadab suante'n amau suangpa thupiak azui ua, hiai mite'n zaw ahon ngaikhe kei uh. 17Huaiziak Toupa Israel' Pathian sepaihte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, Judah leh Jerusalem a tengte tung ah thil hoih lou atung ua hong tung ding ka gen khiaksate ka hon tun ding; akiang uah thu ka gen a, angaikhe kei ua, amau ka sam a, ahon dawng sam kei uh,” chi in. 18Huchi in Jeremiah in Rekab suante kiang ah, Sepaihte' Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na pa Jonadab thupiak na zui ua, athupawt tengteng bang a na hih ziak un; 19Rekab tapa Jonadab in tangtawn in ka ma a dingh ding mi atasam ngei kei ding,” chi in Sepaihte' Toupa Israel' Pathian in achi hi. 35Jeremiah Leh Rekabte

JEREMIAH 36: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm akum lina ah hiai thu Toupa kiang a kipan Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung hi: 2“Laibuzial la inla, hiai ah na kiang a thu ka gen tengteng, Israel tungthu, Judah tungthu, nam tengteng tungthu, na kiang a thu ka gen ni a kipan, Josiah hun lai a kipan, tuni tanpha a thu gelh in. 3Judah inkote'n atung ua thil hoih lou hih ka tup tengteng, angaikhia un michih in a-omdan gilou uh ahei thei khamoh kei ding uh, athulimlouhna uh leh akhelhna uh ka ngaihdam theihna ding in,” achi hi. 4Huchi in Jeremiah in Neriah tapa Baruk asam a, huchi in Baruk in Toupa thu tengteng, akiang a agensa Jeremiah paukam a kipan laibuzial ah agelh hi. 5Huan Jeremiah in Baruk kiang ah, “Khakkhum ka hi a, Toupa' inn ah ka hoh thei kei, 6huaiziak in nang hoh inla, Toupa thu ka paukam a kipan laibuzial a na gelh an ngawl ni in, Toupa' inn a mipite bil a zak in va simkhia in; akhopi ua kipan a hong pawt Judahte tengteng bil a zak in leng na simkhiak ding ahi. 7Michih in a-omdan gilou uh hei in, Toupa ma a hehpihna angetna uh, atun thei kha zenzen ding uam, hiai mite tung a hehna leh thangpaihna Toupa'n agenkhiak lah athupi mahmah ngal a,” chi in thu apia hi. 8Huchi in Neriah tapa Baruk in zawlnei Jeremiah thupiak tengteng bang in Toupa' inn a Toupa thu laibu a om asimta hi. 9Huan hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm akum ngana, akha kuana ah Jerusalem mi tengteng leh Judah khopi a kipan a Jerusalem a hong pai tengteng in an ngawl thu apuangta uhi.

JEREMIAH 36: 10Huan Baruk in Toupa kongpi thak lutna ah, um sung tungnungzaw a laigelhmi Shaphan tapa Gemariah dantan, Toupa' inn a om ah Jeremiah thu laibu a om, mi tengteng bil azak in asim hi.Laibuzial Nasemte Kiang A Simna 11Huan Shaphan tapa Gemariah tapa Mikaiah in laibu a om Toupa thu tengteng ana zak in, 12Kumpipa' inn ah ahohsuk a, laigelhmi dantan ah alut a, huan, ngai dih, huai ah heutu tengteng ana tu ua, laigelhmi Elishamate, Shemaiah tapa Delaiah, Akbor tapa Elnathan, Shaphan tapa Gemariah, Hananiah tapa Zedekiah leh heutu tengteng. 13Huan Mikaiah in mite bil a zak in Baruk in laibu asim thu ana zak tengteng ahilh hi. 14Huan heutu tengteng in Kushi tapa, Shelemiah tapa Nethaniah tapa Jehudi Baruk kiang ah asawl ua, akiang ah, “Mite bil a zak a na sim laibu tawi in hong pai in,” chi ding in. Huchi in Neriah tapa Baruk bel laibuzial tawi in akiang uah ahong hi. 15Akiang ah, “Tu inla, ka bil ua ka zak ngei un sim dih ve leh,” achi ua, huchi in Baruk in abil ua azak un asimta hi. 16Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai thute azak uleh lau in aki-entuah chiat ua, Baruk kiang ah, “Hiai thu tengteng kumpipa ka hilh ngeingei ding uh,” achi uhi. 17Baruk kiang ah, “Hiai thu tengteng na kam a kipan bangchidan a gelh na hia, hon hilh in?” chi in adong uhi. 18Baruk in, “Hiai thu tengteng apaukam in ahon hilh a, laitui in laibu ah ka gelh mai ahi,” chi in adawng hi. 19Heutute'n Baruk kiang ah, “Kuan unla, Jeremiah toh kibu un; kuamah in na omna uh thei kei hen,” achi uhi.Kumpipa Jehoiakim In Laibuzial Ahalna 20Huchi in huangsung ah kumpipa kiang ah alut ua; laibuzial bel laigelhmi Elishama dantan ah akoih ua;

JEREMIAH 36: athu tengteng paukam in kumpipa ahilh uh. 21Huchi in kumpipa'n laibuzial la ding in Jehudi asawl a, laigelhmi Elishama dantan a kipan ala uhi. Huan Jehudi in kumpipa leh kumpipa kiang a dingh heutu tengteng bil a zak in asim hi. 22Akha kuana ahi a, kumpipa bel aphalbi inn ah atu a, ama a meihol thuk ah kuang a-om hi. 23Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jehudi in khep thum hiam khep li hiam a sim in kumpipa in atemta in alaibuzial a-attan a, meikhuk ah pum katmang vek ding in alawnlut zel hi. 24Kumpipa leh anasem mite'n hiai thu tengteng ngaikhe mite kuamah alau kei ua, apuansilh uh leng abotkek sam kei uh. 25Huai phet hilou in Elnathan leh Delaiah leh Gemariahte'n laibuzial hal lou ding in kumpipa kiang ah angen ua, himahleh angaikhe nuam kei. 26Huan kumpipa'n kumpipa tapa Jerahmeel leh Azriel tapa Seraiah leh Abdeel tapa Shelemiah Baruk laigelhmi leh zawlnei Jeremiah man ding in thu apia a; himahleh Toupa'n amau asel hi.Jeremiah In Laibuzial Dang Agelh 27Huan laibuzial leh Jeremiah kam a kipan Baruk in agelh tengteng thute kumpipa'n ahalmang khit in Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung hi. 28Laibuzial dang la inla, laibuzial masa a thu tengteng, Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in ahal mangsate gelh nawn vek in. 29Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tungtang thu ah huchi in na gen ding hi. Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Babilon kumpipa hong pai a, hiai gam hihsia in, hiai mi leh sa ahihmang vek ding chih, bangziak a huchibang thu gelh na hia? chi in laibuzial na halta hi. 30Huaiziak in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tungthu ah Toupa'n hichi in achi: David tutphah a tu ding mi anei kei ding; aluang leng sun nisa ah leh zan vuk nuai ah paihkhiak ahi ding.

JEREMIAH 36: 31Athulimlouhna uh ziak in amah leh asuante leh anasem mite ka gawt ding; amau leh Jerusalem a tengte leh Judah mite tung ah atung ua ka phuansa, angaihkhiak kei uleh thil hoih lou tengteng ka hon tun ding,” chi in. 32Huchi in Jeremiah in laibuzial dang ala a, Neriah tapa Baruk laigelhmi apia a, ama'n huai ah Jeremiah kam a kipan laibu gelhsa tengteng, Jehoiakim in mei a akhulmangsa thute agelh a; huai ban ah akibatpih thu tampi abehlap lai hi. 36Tempul Ah Baruk In Laibuzial Asim

JEREMIAH 37: 1Huan Josiah tapa Zedekiah, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in, Judah gam kumpipa ding a abawl Jehoiakim tapa Koniah sik in vai ahawmta hi. 2Himahleh amah leh anasem mite leh agam a mite'n Toupa thu zawlnei Jeremiah kam a gen angaikhe kei uh. 3Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Shelemiah tapa Jehukal leh Maaseiah tapa siampu Zephaniah bel zawlnei Jeremiah kiang ah, “Toupa ka Pathian kiang ah hon thumsak in,” chi ding in asawl hi. 4Jeremiah bel mipite lak ah a-utut in avak thei lai a; tanin ah lah akoih ngal kei ua. 5Pharaoh sepaihhonte Aigupta a kipan ahong pawtkheta ua; huchi in Kaldaite Jerusalem um mite'n atanchin azak un Jerusalem atawpsanta uhi. 6Huchi in Toupa thu zawlnei Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a, 7Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Judah kumpipa hon dong ding a nou hon sawl kiang ah, ‘Ngai in, Pharaoh sepaihhon, nou hon panpih ding a hong paite amau gam Aigupta ah akik nawn ding uh. 8Kaldaite hong pai in, hiai khopi asual ding ua, ala ding ua, mei in ahal ding uh. 9“Kaldaite'n ahon paisan ngei ding uh,” chi in nou kikhem kei un, ahon paisan kei ding uh. 10Noute hon sual Kaldai sepaihte bawl ek mah le uchin, alak ua miliam omsunte kia in leng amau puanin a kipan hong thou in hiai khopi mei in ahal thouthou ding uh, chi in na gen ding ahi,’ ” chi in.Suangkul Ah Jeremiah Khum In A-om 11Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pharaoh sepaihhonte lau ziak a Kaldai sepaihhonte'n Jerusalem apaisan lai un, 12Jeremiah in mite lak a atantuan la ding in Benjamin gam a lut ding in Jerusalem apawtsan hi. 13Benjamin kongpi atun in ngakmi heutu Hananiah tapa Shelemiah tapa amin Irijah ana om a;

JEREMIAH 37: huai in, “Kaldaite kiang a kipia na hi,” chi in zawlnei Jeremiah ana man hi. 14Jeremiah in, “Zuau ahi; Kaldaite kiang ah ka kipe kei,” achi a; himahleh angaikhe kei a, huchi in Irijah in Jeremiah ana man a, heutute kiang ah apia hi. 15Huan heutute Jeremiah tung ah aheh mahmah ua, asat ua, laigelhmi Jonathan inn ah akhum uh; huai tan inn ding a azat him uh ahi. 16Huchi in Jeremiah lei nuai kokhuk ah alut a, ni tampitak a-om nung in kumpipa Zedekiah in asamkhia hi. 17Huan kumpipa'n a-inn ah aguk in akiang ah, “Toupa kiang a kipan thu banghiam bek a-om hia?” chi in adong hi. Jeremiah in, “Om e,” achi hi. Akiang ah, “Babilon kumpipa khut ah matsak in na om ding,” achi lai hi. 18Jeremiah in kumpipa Zedekiah kiang ah, “Nang hiam na nasemmi hiam hiai mite tung ah bang thil ahia ka hihkhelh a na hon matsak? 19Nang kiang a ‘Babilon kumpipa nang leh hiai gam dou ding in ahong pai kei ding, chi a thugenmi na zawlneite koi a om ahita ua?’ 20Aw, ka pu, kumpipa ngaikhia in, ka hon ngen ahi, ka ngetna na sang in, ka hon ngen hi; laigelhmi Jonathan inn ah hon kiksak nawn ke'n, huai ah ka va si kha ding,” achi hi. 21Huchi in kumpipa Zedekiah in thu apia a, Jeremiah bel ngakmi huangsung ah atangsak a, tanghou bawl mite kongzing a kipan niteng in tanghou beu khat, khopi a tanghou a-om lai siah apia ua, huchibang in Jeremiah bel ngakmi huangsung ah a-om nilouh hi. 37Jeremiah Kiang A Zedekiah Ngetna

JEREMIAH 38: 1Huan Mattan tapa Shephatiah leh Pashur tapa Gedaliah leh Shelemiah tapa Jukal leh Malkijah tapa Pashurte'n, mipi tengteng kiang ah Jeremiah in, 2“Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai khopi a om nilouhte zaw namsau, kial leh hipi in asi ding ua, Kaldaite kiang a kipia bel ahing ding uh, ahinna akihumbit ding a ahing ding,” chi in. 3Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai khopi Babulon kumpipa sepaihhonte khut ah piak ahi ngei ding a, ala ding, chi a agen angaikhia uhi. 4Huchi in heutute'n kumpipa kiang ah, “Hiai mi hihlup hi hen, ka hon ngen uh; ama'n akiang ua hiai thute gen in hiai khopi a galkapmi omlaite leh mipi tengteng tha hat lousak in; hiai mi'n hiai mipite hoihna azong kei a, asiatna azong zaw,” achi uhi. 5Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in, “Ngai un, amah na khut ua om ahi; kumpipa'n na deih louh lam uh hihthei ahi sam a,” achi hi. 6Huchi in Jeremiah api ua, ngakmi huangsung a om kumpipa tapa Malkijah tuibem ah apailut ua; Jeremiah bel khau in akhesuk ua, huai tuibem ah buannawi kia lou ngal tui a-om kei a; buannawi ah Jeremiah akia hi.Ebed-melek In Jeremiah Ahunkhia 7Huan Ethiopia mi, michilgeh kumpipa' inn a om sek Ebed-melek in Jeremiah tuibem ah akoih uh chih ana za a; huchih lai in kumpipa bel Benjamin kongpi ah atu a; 8Ebed-melek bel kumpipa' inn a kipan apawt a, kumpipa kiang ah, 9“Ka pu, kumpipa, hiai mite'n zawlnei Jeremiah tuibem a ana paihkhiak uh thil gilou thupi mahmah hih ahi uh, gilkial ziak in a-omna mun ah si mai ding akei maw; khopi ah tanghou a-om nawn kei a,” achi a.

JEREMIAH 38: 10Huan kumpipa'n Ethiopia mi Ebed-melek thu apia a, “Hiai a kipan in mi sawmthum pi inla, tuibem a kipan in asih ma in zawlnei Jeremiah va lakhia un,” chi in. 11Huchi in Ebed-melek in mite api a, kumpipa dangka inn nuai ah alut ua, puanak lui paihte leh puansilh siate alakhia ua, tuibem ah Jeremiah kiang ah khau in akhaikhesuk uhi. 12Huan Ethiopia mi Ebed-melek in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Hiai puanak luite leh puansilh siate na lenuai ah khau in gakkhum in,” achi hi. Huan Jeremiah in huchibang in ahih hi. 13Huan Jeremiah bel tuibem a kipan khau in akaikhia ua; huchi in ngakmi huangsung ah Jeremiah a-om nilouh hi.Zedekiah In Jeremiah Thuhilhna Angen 14Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah asam a, Toupa' inn a lutna thumna ah akiang ah apilut a; huan, kumpipa'n Jeremiah kiang ah, “Thil ka hon dong ding; ka lak ah bangmah iim nei ke'n,” achi hi. 15Jeremiah in Zedekiah kiang ah, “Hon hilh leng na hon that mahmah kei dia hia? Thu hon hanthawn leng lah hon ngaikhe lou ding chin a,” achi hi. 16Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Toupa hiai ka hinna bawlpa ahin a ahin sung teng ka hon hihlum kei hial ding, na hinna zong mite khut ah leng nang ka hon pe sam kei ding,” chi in asim in akichiam hi. 17Huchi in Jeremiah in Zedekiah kiang ah, “Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi, ‘Babilon kumpipa heutute kiang ah na kipiak leh na hinna na bitsak ding a, hiai khopi leng mei in akang kei ding, nang leh na inkote leng na hing ding uh.’ 18Babulon kumpipa heutute kiang a na kipiak keileh bel hiai khopi Kaldaite khut a piak ahi ding a, ahal ding ua, akhut ua kipan na suakta het kei ding achi,” achi hi.

JEREMIAH 38: 19Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Kaldai mite kiang a kipia Judate khut ah ahon mansak in nuihzat in ahon bawl kha ding uh ka lau hi,” achi hi. 20Jeremiah in bel, “Ahon mansak kei ding uh; na kiang a ka gen Toupa aw mang mai in. Huchi in nang a ding in ahoih ding a, hin leng na hing ding. 21Kipiak na ut keileh bel Toupa'n hon thu kawkmuh hiai ahi: 22“Ngai in, Judah kumpipa' inn a numei omlaite tengtengBabulon kumpipa heutute kiang ah pi in a-om ding ua, huai numeite'n,na lawm hoihhoihte'n ahon khem ua, ahon zouta ua,na khe buannawi a atumtak in ahon lehngatsan ua,” achi ding uhi. 23“Na zite, na tanute Kaldai mite kiang ah api vek ding ua, akhut ua kipan na suakta kei ding a, Babulon kumpipa khut ah mat in na om zaw ding a, nang ziak in hiai khopi akang ding,” achi hi. 24Huan Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Hiai thute kuamah in thei kei uhen, huchi in na si kei ding. 25Himahleh heutute'n ka hon houpih azak ua, na kiang a ahong ua, na kiang a, ‘Kumpipa kiang a na gen hon hilh in; ka lak uah bangmah iim nei ke'nla, ka hon that kei ding uh; na kiang a kumpipa thugente leng, achih uleh,’ 26nang akiang uah, ‘Jonathan inn a hon kiksak lou a, huai a va si lou ding in kumpipa kiang ah ngetna ka pelut lel ahi, na chi ding hi,’ ” achi hi. 27Jeremiah kiang ah heutu tengteng hong pai in, adongta ngei ua, kumpipa'n thu apiak tengteng bang in amau ahilh hi. Huchi in akihoupih uh atawp ua; athu theih phak ahita kei hi. 28Huchi in Jeremiah bel Jerusalem lak ni tan in ngakmi huangsung ah a-om nilouh hi. 38Tuibem Sung Ah Jeremiah

JEREMIAH 39: 1Huan Judah vaihawm akum kuana akha sawmna ah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leh asepaihte'n Jerusalem asual ua, a-um uh. 2Zedekiah vaihawm kum sawm-le-khatna akha lina, ani kuana ah khopi kulh aphu pailet uh. 3Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem alak un Babulon kumpipa heutute a hong lut ua, kongpi laita ah atu ua, Nergal-shar-ezar, Samgar-nebo, Sarsekim, Rab-saris mi Nergal-shar-ezar, Rab-mag mi leh Babulon kumpipa heutu dangte toh. 4Huan hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh galkapmi tengteng in amau amuh un ataikek ua, khopi a kipan zan in kumpipa huai lampi lam ah kulhbaang nih kikal kongpi ah ataikhia ua, amah pen Arabah lampi lam ah apawt hi. 5Himahleh Kaldaite sepaihhon in amah adelh ua, Jeriko Phaizang ah Zedekiah apha ua; huchi in amat nung un Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah, Hamath gam a Riblah ah api ua, ama'n atungthu angaihtuah hi. 6Huchi in Babulon kumpipa'n Riblah ah amah mitmuh ngei in Zedekiah tapate athat a, Babulon kumpipa'n Judah mihoih teng leng athat lai hi. 7Huai lou leng Zedekiah mit akhelkhia a, kol abunsak a, Babulon ah apita hi. 8Kaldaite'n kumpipa' inn leh midang inn tengteng ahal ua, Jerusalem kulhbaangte leng ahihsia uh. 9Huan ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in khopi a mipi khosuaksun akiang a amau a kipiate leh mipi omlaite Babulon ah sal in api hi. 10Himahleh ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in Judah gam migenthei bangmah neiloute anusia a, grephuan leh loute ape pah ngal hi.Jeremiah Khahkhiakna 11Huan Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Jeremiah tungtang thu a ngakmi Nebuzaradan kiang ah, 12“Amah pi inla, hoihtak in bawl inla, hihna himhim ke'n, na kiang a agen bangbang in hih zel zaw in,” chi in thu apia hi.

JEREMIAH 39: 13Huan ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in Rab-saris mi Nebushazban, Rab-mag mi Nergal-shar-ezar leh Babulon kumpipa sepaih heutu deuhdeuhte athukhak vek a, amau Jeremiah ngakmi huangsung a kipan asamkhia ua, 14Shaphan tapa Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah a-inn a puak ding in akemsak ua, huchi in mite lak ah a-omta hi.Ebed-melek Dia Lametna 15Huan ngakmi huangsung a khakkhum a a-om lai in, Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. 16Ethiopia mi Ebed-melek kiang ah, “Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, ahoihna ding hilou in, hiai khopi siatna ding in ka thute ka hon tun ding a, huai ni mahmah in na ma ah tangtunsak ahi ding. 17Huai ni in nang bel ka hon hunkhe ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, na mi kihtakte khut ah piak na hi kei ding. 18Nang ka hon humbit ding a, namsau in na puk kei ding a, kei na hon muan ziak in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in va gen in,” achi hi. 39Jerusalem Pukna

JEREMIAH 40: 1Judah leh Jerusalem sal tengteng, Babulon sal a apite uh lak a Jeremiah khainiang len kawm a api lai a ngakmi apawtsak nung a Toupa a kipan Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung hi. 2Ngakmi heutu in Jeremiah api a, akiang ah, “Toupa i Pathian in hiai mun a thil hoih lou tung ding ana puang khin hi. 3Toupa'n ahon tungsakta ngei a, agen bangbang in ahihta hi; Toupa tung ah thil na hihkhial ua, apaukam na man louh ziak un hiai thil na tung ua ahong tung ahi. 4Tu in, ngai in, tuni in na khut a khainiang but ka hon phelsak hi. Babulon a ka kiang a hong na utleh hong inla, na ut keileh hong dah mai in; en dih, gam tengteng na ma ah a-om hi, hong hoh pha na sakleh hoih na sak bang in pai in. 5Akik ma in ama'n, Judah khopite tung a ukpi dia Babulon kumpipa'n abawl Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah kik inla, mite lak ah akiang ah om in, ahihkeileh hoh pha na sakna ah va hoh mai in,” achi hi. Huchi in ngakmi heutu in nek ding leh thilpiak apia a, apaisakta hi. 6Jeremiah bel Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah Mizpah ah ahoh a, akiang a gam a omsun mite lak ah a-om teita hi.Judah Gam Ukpipa Gedaliah(2 Kum 25.22-24) 7Huan sepaih pawl heutu tengteng gamlak a omte'n, amaute leh aheute uh Babulon kumpipa'n, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah huai gam a migenthei penpen, Babulon sal a pilouhte akemsak chih azak un Mizpah khua ah; 8Gedaliah kiang ah ahong pai ua, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael, Kareah tapate Johanan leh Jonathan, Tanhumet tapa Seraiah, Netophah a Ephai tate leh Maakath mi tapa Jezaniah, amau leh amite uh toh.

JEREMIAH 40: 9Huchi in Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah in amau leh aheute uh kiang ah, “Kaldaite nasep kihta kei un; gam ah om dinden unla, Babulon kumpipa na sem unla, noute a ding in ahoih mai ding hi. 10Kei zaw Mizpah ah ka om ding a, Kaldai mi ka kiang a hong dingte ma ah noute sik in ka dingh ding; noute'n ahihleh uainte, nipitheite, thaute lakhawm in na bel uah koih unla, na khopi laksate uah teng un,” chi in akichiam hi. 11Huchi mah bang in Juda mi tengteng, Moab gam a tengte, Ammon mite lak a tengte leh Edom gam a tengte leh gamdang a omte'n Babulon kumpipa'n Judah khosuaksunte nusia a, atung uah Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa, Gedaliah akoih chih azak un; 12Juda mi tengteng ahawlzakna gam tengteng ua kipan in ahong paikik ua, Judah gam a Mizpah ah Gedaliah kiang ah ahong tung ua, uain leh nipithei alakhawm uhi.Gedaliah Thahna(2 Kum 25.25-26) 13Huai lou leng Kareah tapa Johanan leh sepaih pawlte heutu, gamlak a om tengteng Mizpah ah Gedaliah kiang ah, 14“Ammon mite kumpipa Baalis in na hinna la ding in Nethaniah tapa Ishmael asawl chih na za hia?” achi uhi. 15Huan Kareah tapa Johanan in Mizpah a Gedaliah kiang ah, “Hon paisak dih ve, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael ka va that mai ding, kuamah in athei kei ding uh; Juda mi na kiang omkhawm tengteng adalh vek ua, Judah mi khosuaksunte manthatna hih ding in bangziak a na hinna la ding ahia?” chi in asimtham in agen hi. 16Ahikam tapa Gedaliah in bel Kareah tapa Johanan kiang ah, “Hiai thil na hih ding ahi kei; Ishmael na gendan adik kei hi,” achi hi. 40Gedaliah Kiang Ah Jeremiah A-om

JEREMIAH 41: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, akha sagihna ah Elishama tapa Nethaniah tapa Ishmael, kumpi chi a mi, kumpipa upate lak a khat, mi sawmkhat pi in Mizpah ah Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah ahong ua; Mizpah ah an anekhawm uhi. 2Huan Nethaniah tapa Ishmael bel amipi sawmkhatte toh adingh ua, namsau in Shaphan tapa Ahikam tapa, Babulon kumpipa'n gam ukpipa dia abawl Gedaliah athat uhi. 3Akiang a Juda mi om tengteng, Mizpah a Gedaliah kiang a omte leh Kaldai galkapmi om teite Ishmael in athat lai hi. 4Gedaliah athah nung ni nih in hichi ahong hi a, kuamah in atheih ma un, 5Shekem a kipan, Shiloh a kipan, Samaria a kipan in mi sawmgiat, akhamul uh met a, apuansilhte uh kek a, amau ki-atkeh in, tanghou latte leh gimlimte tawi in Toupa inn ah lan ding in ahong uhi. 6Amau dawn ding in Mizpah a kipan in Nethaniah tapa Ishmael apawtkhia a, lamtawn in akapkap a; huan, hichi ahong hi a, amaute amuh in akiang uah, “Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah hong pai un,” achi hi. 7Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, khopi sung atun uleh Nethaniah tapa Ishmael leh amipite'n amau ana that ua, kokhuk ah apai uhi. 8Alak ua mi sawmkhatte'n bel, “Hon that kei un, gam ah buh, buhman, sathau leh khuaizu tampi ka sel ngal ua,” achi uhi. Huchi in amau ahawi ua, a-unaute uh lak ah athat telta kei hi. 9Huan Ishmael in Gedaliah toh amithahte luang apaihna kokhuk bel kumpipa Asa in Israel kumpipa Baasha akihtak ziak a abawl ahi. Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in huai luangte in adimsak hi. 10Huchi in Ishmael in Mizpah a mihing a-omsun, kumpipa tanute, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang a ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in akepsak, Mizpah a om lai tengteng toh sal in api vek a;

JEREMIAH 41: Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in huaite sal dia pi in Ammon mite zuan in apawt hi. 11Himahleh, Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang a om sepaih pawl heutu tengteng in Nethaniah tapa Ishmael thil hoih lou hih tengteng ana zak un mi tengteng apikhia ua, 12Nethaniah tapa Ishmael sual ding in akuan ua, tui tampi omna mun Gibeon ah ava mu uh. 13Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ishmael kiang a mi tengteng in, Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang a sepaih heutu tengteng ava muh un ana kipak lo mahmah uhi. 14Huchi in Ishmael in Mizpah a kipan a sal a api tengteng akihei ua, akik nawn ua, Kareah tapa Johanan kiang ah apai diam uhi. 15Nethaniah tapa Ishmael bel mi giat toh Johanan a kipan ataikhe geigei ua, Ammon mite kiang ah apaita uhi. 16Huan Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang a sepaih pawl heutu tengteng in, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in Ahikam tapa Gedaliah athah nung a Mizpah a kipan Nethaniah tapa Ishmael lak a Johanan in ahutkhiaksa mi akhosuaksunte tengteng, kidou mite, numeite, naupangte, michilgehte, Gibeon a kipan a api nawnte api vek hi. 17Huchi in apawt ua, Kaldaite ziak a Aigupta gam a tailut tum in Bethlehem kho kiang ah Geruth Chimham ah akhawl uhi. 18Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah, Babulon kumpipa'n huai gam ukpipa dia abawl athah ziak in amau akihta mahmah uhi.

JEREMIAH 42: 1Huan sepaih pawl heutute leh Kareah tapa Johanan leh Hoshaiah tapa Jezaniah leh mipi tengteng, aneupen a kipan a alianpen tan in ahong nai ua, zawlnei Jeremiah kiang ah: 2“Na ma ah ka ngetna uh pom hi henla, hiai akhosuaksun mi tengteng a ding ngei in na Pathian kiang a hon thumsak ding in ka hon ngen uhi; na hon muh bang ngei in mi tampite lak a kipan tawmchik kia nutsiat in ka omta uh. 3Toupa na Pathian in ka paina ding thil uh hon kawkmuh theihna ding in,” achi uhi. 4Huchi in zawlnei Jeremiah in akiang uah, “Na thu uh ka za hi, ngai un, na thu uh bangbang in Toupa na Pathian kiang uah ka ngen ding hi; huan, hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n nou ahon dawn peuhmah ka hon hilh zel ding; na lak uah bangmah ka iim kei ding,” achi hi. 5Amau Jeremiah kiang ah, “Toupa na Pathian in ka kiang ua nang ahon sawlna thu tengteng bang zel a ka hih kei uleh ka lak uah Toupa thu theipa dik leh muanhuai hi hen. 6Asia hiam apha hiam ka hon sawlna uh Toupa ka Pathian uh paukam suak ka mang ngeingei ding uh; Toupa ka Pathian uh paukam suak ka man uleh kou hoihtheihna ding ahi,” achi uhi.Jeremiah Thumna Toupa'n Adawng 7Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, ani sawm nung in Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a.

JEREMIAH 42: 8Huchi in Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang asepaih heutu om tengteng leh sepaih tengteng, aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in asam a, akiang uah, 9Toupa na Pathian uh, ama a na ngetna uh tun dia na hon sawlna pa un hichi in achi: 10Hiai gam a na omdet uleh ka hon tungding ding a, ka hon phelzak kei ding, ka hon phutkip ding a, ka hon botkhe kei ding, na tung ua thil hoih lou ka tutte lah ka lungheita ngal a. 11Babulon kumpipa na lau sek uh lau nawn kei un, amah lau kei un chih Toupa thupawt ahi; akhut a kipan noute hondam ding leh hunkhe ding in na kiang uah ka om hi. 12Na tung ua zah angaihtheihna ding in zahngaihna nou ka hon phal ding a, na gam mah uah ka hon kiksak ding hi. 13Himahleh, hiai gam ah i om kei ding uh, chi a Toupa na Pathian uh aw na man louh ua, 14“Ahi het lou Aigupta gam ah i pai zaw ding ua, huai ah kidouna himhim i tuak kei ding a, pengkul ging leng i za kei ding a, an taksapna a-om sam kei ding, huai ah i teng zaw ding uh,” na chih uleh, 15Aw Judah khosuaksunte aw, Toupa thu ngai dih ua; sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: 16Aigupta gam a lut ding leh huai a teng ding a kihei teitei na hih uleh hichi ahong hi ding a, namsau na kihtak ngei un Aigupta gam ah hon pha ding a, kial na kihtak sek un leng Aigupta gam ah nou ahon delhzui ding a, huai ah na si ding uh.

JEREMIAH 42: 17Aigupta gam a teng ding a kihei teiteite tengteng huchibang in a-om ding ua, namsau, kial leh hipi in na si ding uh, thil hoih lou atung ua ka tut ding a kipan kuamah asuakta un abit kei ding uh. 18Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in huchi in achi hi, “Jerusalem a tengte tung a ka hehna ka sun mah bang in Aigupta gam na lut hun chiang un na tung uah ka hehna ka sung sam ding; hamsethuak leh lamdangsak chiat, mi kamse banna, gensiat na hi ding ua, hiai mun na mu nawn kei ding uh. 19“Aw Judah khosuaksunte aw, Toupa'n na tungtang uh agenta hi, Aigupta gam ah lut kei un, hiai ni in nou ka hon theichiansak ahi chih thei mahmah un. Na hinna uh, 20Toupa na Pathian uh kiang ah na hon sawl ua, Toupa ka Pathian uh kiang ah hon thumsak inla, Toupa ka Pathian un achihchih hon hilh inla, ka hih zel ding uhi na chi ngal ua. 21Tuni in na kiang uah ka puangta ahi; himahleh na kiang ua ahon sawlna bangmah in Toupa na Pathian uh paukam lah na mang ngal kei ua. 22Huaiziak in tu'n zaw theita un, tenna na lunggulhna mun ngei uah namsau, kial leh hipi in na si ngeingei ding uh,” chi in achi hi. 42Mipite'n Amau Thumsak Ding In Jeremiah Angen Uh

JEREMIAH 43: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem mipi tengteng kiang a Toupa a Pathian uh thu tengteng Toupa Pathian in gen ding a asawlna thu, huai thu tengteng agen khit in; 2Hoshaiah tapa Azariah leh Kareah tapa Johanan leh mikiphasak tengteng in, Jeremiah ahoupih ua, akiang ah, “Zuaugen na hi, Toupa ka Pathian un, ‘Aigupta gam a teng ding in na pai ding uh ahi kei, chi a gen ding in nang ahon sawl sam a;’ 3Kaldaite khut a matsak a ka om ua hon thahtheihna ding un leh Babulon sal dia hon pitheihna ding in Neriah tapa Baruk in kou hon sual ding a hon sawl ahi zaw ve,” achi uhi. 4Huchi in Kareah tapa Johanan leh sepaih pawl heutu teng leh mipi tengteng in Judah gam a teng ding in Toupa aw amang kei uh. 5Huchi in Kareah tapa Johanan leh sepaih pawl heutu tengteng in Judah khosuaksun tengteng, Judah gam a teng ding a hawlzak a a-omna namte uh lak a kipan a hong kik; 6pasalte, numeite, naupangte, kumpipa tanute leh michih ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah leh akiang a anutsiatte uh zawlnei Jeremiah leh Neriah tapa Baruk leng, apikhawm vek zawta uhi. 7Huchi in Aigupta gam atungta ua, Toupa aw amang kei ua, huchi in Tahpanhes khua ngei atung uhi. 8Tahpanhes ah Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, 9Suang lianpi la inla, Tahpanhes a Pharaoh inn lutna chin a teklei lep zutna ah Judah mite mitmuh ngei in phut in. 10Akiang uah, Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai un, ka nasempa Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar ka thukhak ding a, ama'n hiai ka suang phumguk tung ah alaltutphah atung ding; ama'n atung uah akumpi puanin akai ding hi.

JEREMIAH 43: 11“Huan ahong ding a, Aigupta gam ahong gawt ding a, sihna a si dingte, sihna ah; saltang dingte, saltanna ah, namsau thuak dingte namsau ah. 12Aigupta mite pathian innte ah meikuangte akhah ding a, akang ding, sal in api ding a; belamchingmi in puan asilh bang in Aigupta gam asilh ding, huai a kipan in galmuang in apawt ding. 13Aigupta gam a Beth-shemesh khuam zeknei sang pipite achimsak ding a, Aigupta pathian innte mei in ahal ding, achi, chi in,” achi hi. 43Aigupta Ah Jeremiah Tonpih In A-om
