JEREMIAH 44: 1Aigupta gam a Juda om tengteng, Migdol khua, Tahpanhes khua, Memphis khua leh Pathros gam a tengte tungtang a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung, 2Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Jerusalem leh Judah khopite tung a thil hoih lou ka hon tutte na muta uh; ngai dih ua, tu in ahong segawpta a, kuamah ateng kei uh, 3amau nou leh na pipute un pathian dangte atheih ngei nai louh uh na sem ding leh akiang ua gimlim hal in, kei hon hehsak ding uh; aginatlouhnate uh ahih khit tak ziak un. 4Huchi pipi in na kiang uah nasem zawlnei tengteng phalvak a thou in ka sawl a, akiang uah, “Aw, hiai thu kihhuai, ka huat lamtak hih kei un,” chi in. 5Himahleh angaikhe tuan kei ua, aginatlouhna uh pathian dangte kiang a gimlim hal louh ding pen angeingaih kei uh. 6Huaiziak in ka hehna leh ka thangpaihna Judah khopite leh Jerusalem kongzingte ah ka sung a akuangta a, tuni a a-om bang in asia a, asegawpta hi. 7Huaiziak in tu in zaw Toupa sepaihte' Pathian, Israel' Pathian in na lak ua kipan numei pasal, naungekte leh nawi ne laite Judah lak a kipan kuamah hawi lou a gawimang vek ding in bangziak a hiai thil hoih loutak na hinna uh tung a hih na hi ua? 8Na va tenna uh Aigupta gam pathiante kiang a gimlim hal in leitung gam teng a nam chih lak a hamsethuak leh gensiat na hihtheihna ding uh leh gawimang na hihtheihna ding ua na khut thilhih ngei ua hon hehsak na hi uh. 9Na pipute uh gitlouhnate, Judah kumpipate gitlouhnate leh na zite uh gitlouhna, Judah gam leh Jerusalem kongzing a ahih khitsate uh na mangngilhta ua hia?

JEREMIAH 44: 10Tuni tan in leng akisik tuan kei ua, na pipute uh leh noumau ma a ka taklat ka dan leh ka dan thusehte na zui kei ua, na lau sam kei uh. 11Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai un, na siatna ding un Judah tengteng gawimang vek ding in nou ka hon maituah ding hi. 12Huan Judah khosuaksun, Aigupta gam a ten tum a kihei teiteite ka man ding a, achimit vek ding uh; Aigupta gam ah apuk ding ua, namsau leh kialte a hihman in a-om ding uh; aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in namsau leh kial in asi ding uh. 13Jerusalem ka gawt bangmah in Aigupta gam a tengte namsaute, kialte leh hipite a gawt ding ka hi ngal a. 14Huchi in Aigupta gam a teng ding a kuan Judah khosuaksunte Judah gam, a-omna ding ua kik nawn a-utna mahmah gam uah kik ding in khat lel leng hingdam in asuakta kei ding uh, asim a taikhete kia lou ngal kuamah akik kei ding uh.” 15Huchi in mi tengteng, azite un pathian dang kiang a gimlim ahal chih theite leh numei huai a dinghte mipi tampi, Aigupta gam a teng mipi tengteng in, Pathros ah Jeremiah adawng ua, hichi in achi uh; 16“Toupa min a ka kiang ua na thugente zaw ka hon ngaihkhiaksak kei ding uh. 17Kou leh ka pipute uh, ka kumpipate uh leh ka heutute un Judah khopite ah leh Jerusalem kongzingte ah ana hih zel bang un van kumpinu kiang a gimlim halte leh akiang a dawn ding thillat butkhiakte, ka paukam suak peuhmah bang un ka hih ngeingei ding uh; huchih lai in ka lamzang ua, nek-le-dawn ding atam a, siatna himhim ka mu sam ua.

JEREMIAH 44: 18Van kumpinu kiang a thil hal leh akiang a dawn ding thillat butkhiakte ka tawp nungsiah uh bangpeuh ka tasam zawta ua, namsau leh kialte a hihman in ka omta uhi.” 19Huan numeite'n, “Van kumpinu kiang a gimlim ka hal lai uh leh akiang a dawn ding thillatte ka butkhiak uh?” achi uhi. 20Huchi in Jeremiah in mipi tengteng, numei pasal amah dawng mite tengteng kiang ah, 21“Judah khopite leh Jerusalem kongzingte ah, nou leh na pipute uh, na kumpipate uh leh na heutute uh leh gam a mipite'n gimlim ahalte uh Toupa'n atheigige in alungsim ah akhum kei maw? 22Na thil gilou hih ziak uleh na thilkihhuai hihte uh ziak in Toupa'n athuak ngap nawnta kei hi; huaiziak in, na gam uh tua a-om bang in asia a, lamdangsak chiat, hamsethuak, tengmi om lou, ahong hita hi. 23Gimlim na hal ua, Toupa tung ah na gilou ua, Toupa paukam suakte na mang kei ua, adan hiam adan thusehte hiam athu theihsakte hiam na zuih sam louh ziak un hiai thil hoih lou tua a-om bang in na tung uah ahong tungta hi,” achi a. 24Huai lou leng Jeremiah in mipi tengteng leh numeite kiang ah, “Aigupta gam a Judah tengteng aw, Toupa thu za un, sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: 25Nou leh na zite un, van kumpinu kiang a gimlim hal leh dawn ding thillat butkhiakte ka na chiamsa bang zel in ka hih ngeingei ding, chi in na kam un na genta ua, na khut un na pichingsak lai uhi.

JEREMIAH 44: ‘Na thuchiamte uh hihkip unla, na thu tupte uh tangtungsak vanglak un.’ 26Huaiziak in nou Judah, Aigupta gam a tengte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un: Ngai un, Toupa Pathian ahin bang in chi in Aigupta gam pumpi a teng, Judah mi kua kam mah ah ka min aging nawn ngei kei ding, chi in ka min thupi lou in ka kichiam ahi chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 27Ngai in, ahoihna ding uh hilou in asiatna ding un amau ka tang thek ahi; huchi in Judah mi, Aigupta gam a omte tengteng, namsau leh kialte ahihman in a-om ding uh, amanthat vek matan un. 28Namsau hihman val tawmchik Aigupta gam a kipan a pawt in Judah gam ah alut ding uh; huan, Judah mi khosuaksunte tengteng, Aigupta gam a teng ding a kuan mite'n kua thu ahia pai zaw ding, ka thu hia amau thu, athei ding uh. 29“Huan hiai nou a ding in chiamtehna ahi ding; na tung uah thil hoih lou lam in ka thu apai ngei ding chih na theihna ding un hiai mun ah nou ka hon gawt ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 30Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, Pharaoh Hophra, Aigupta kumpipa bel amelma, ahinna zong mite khut ah ka mangsak ding, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah, amelma, ahinna zongmi Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut a ka piak bangmah in,” achi hi. 44Milim Biakna Ziak A Siatna

JEREMIAH 45: 1Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim, Josiah tapa akum lina ah Jeremiah kam a kipan, hiai thute laibu a agelh lai a, Neriah tapa Baruk kiang a zawlnei Jeremiah thugen: 2Baruk aw, Toupa Israel' Pathian in, na kiang ah hichi in achi: 3Nang, “Ka tung gik hi na mai e, Toupa'n ka thuakna ah lungkhamna ahon behlapta ngal a; ka mauna ka bahpih a, tawldamna ka muzou kei,” na chi a. 4Akiang ah hichi in na gen ding ahi, “Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, ka lamsa ka phel nawn ding a, gam pumpi mahmah ah ka phuhsa ka botkhe nawn ding. 5Huan nang a ding in thil thupi na zong hia? Zong dah mai in; sa tengteng tung ah thil hoih lou ka hon tungsak ding a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; himahleh na hinna bel mun chih a na paina ah gallak ding in ka hon pe ding,” chi in. 45Baruk Kiang A Pathian Thuchiam

JEREMIAH 46: 1Namte tungtang a zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung; 2Aigupta thu, Euphrates Luipi gei a Karkhemish a om, Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim, akum lina a Nebukadnezzar in anuaisiah leh Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh Neko sepaihhonte tungtang thu: 3“Lum bemte, lum zawlte mansa in om unla, gal nawt un, 4Sakol van unla, sakol tuangmite aw, tuang un, dal lukhu khu in dingkip unla,tei tat-hiam in sik puanak silh un. 5Bangchidan a amaute lau-le-ling a taikek a mu ka hia!Agalkap mite uh avuallel uh,baksam leng zen in atai ua,nunglam nga het lou in,ning chih ah gal alang chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 6Mizuanzaang ataimang thei kei,galkapmi apawt tuan kei uh,huai a mi Euphrates Luipi gei ahahawi ua, apuk khinta uh. 7Nile lui bang a khang kua ahia?Luipi tuikihot kimvel bang in? 8Aigupta Nile lui bang in akhang a luipi tuikihot kimvel bang mai in,ka khang ding a,leitung ka luahsuak ding,khopi leh aluahte ka hihse ding,” achi hi. 9“Aw sakolte aw, nawk zel unla,aw kangtalai aw, nakpi in pang un;galdou mite'n ma phu uhenla,Ethiopia mi leh Put mi,lum tawi mite, Lud mithalpeu zang siamte toh. 10Huai ni ahi,Toupa sepaihte' Toupa ni, phulak ni,amelmate tung a phu alaktheihna, namsau in agai ding a,atai ding, asisan uh taitak in adawn ding;Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n mal gam ah Euphrates Luipi gei ah mi tampi agou phengphung mai ve. 11Aw, Aigupta tanu siangthou,Gilead ah hohtou inla,singnai nuhchi va la in,damdawi tampi athawn in na zangta,nang a ding in damna himhim a-om kei hi.

JEREMIAH 46: 12Namte'n na zahlakna aza ua,na kah in leitung pumpi adim hi, galhatmi leh galhatmi akiphu ua,lei ah apukkhawm uh,” chi in.Nebukadnezzar Hong Paina 13Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hong pai a, Aigupta gam ahong bawl ekdan ding thu Toupa'n zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a agen: 14“Aigupta gam ah gen unla,Migdol ah puang un;Memphis leh Tahpanhes ah puang unla;dingkip in kigalging un;na kim a mi namsau in agaita ngal a. 15Bangziak a na mihattephiatmang a om ahi ua?Adingh zou kei ua, Toupa'napaihkhiak ziak in. 16Mi tampi akisuisak a, ahi,akiphupuk lemlum ua,Nuaisiahna namsau taisan inkisa un, i kik ding uh,i pianna gam ah i mite kiang ah, achi uhi. 17Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh penhusa lian lel, ahun sehsa a paimangsak a om,chi in huai ah akikou uhi. 18Ahin a ka hin sung in chihKumpipa, amin Sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi hi,tangte lak a Tabor tang bang in tuipi chin aKarmel tang bang in ahong pai ngei ding. 19Aw nang, tanu,Aigupta gam a teng, saltang ding in kibawl mai in;Memphis akisegawp dek a,teng ding om lou in akangmang ding hi. 20Aigupta bel bawngla hoihtakahi, himahleh mal a kipan nasemmi ding hong kuan in ahong pai hi. 21Alak ua sepaih goihlaite bel bawngtuai vak thau bang mai ahi ua,adek uh angat ua,ataikek ua, khawl lou in,atung uah asiatna ni uh atungta,agawtna hun ding uh; 22Gulpi kitholh bang mai in husa anei a,amelmate kiton in ahong pai ua,singphuk mite bang in hei toh ahong sual uh. 23Agam gammang vaksuak zohlouh ahong hihse ding uh,khaukhup sang in atamzaw ua,sim seng louh ahi uh. 24Aigupta tanu azahlak ding,mallam a mi khut a matsak in a-om ding.” 25Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai un, Thebes khua a Ammon, leh Pharaoh leh Aigupta leh apathiante, akumpipate, Pharaoh ngei leh amah muang mite ka gawt ding.

JEREMIAH 46: 26Ahinna uh, zong mite khut ah leh Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leh anasem mite khut ah ka mansak ding; huai hun chiang in luah in a-om ding, nidanglai nite mah bang in,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa'n Amite Ahondam Ding 27“Jakob aw, ka nasempa,lau ke'nla, aw Israel,lunglel sam ke'n, ngai in,gamlapi a kipan nang ka hon hunkhe ding a,na suante leng asaltanna gam ua kipan,Jakob ahong kik ding a,muangtak in a-om hiathiat ding a,kuamah in alausak nawn kei ding uh. 28Jakob aw, ka nasempa, lau ke'n,ka hon ompih ahi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi;ka hon delhzakna nam tengteng ka beisak ding a,nang zaw ka hon beisak het kei ding;diktak in ka hon gawt ding a,gawt louh in ka hon khak kei ding hi. 46Karkhemish Ah Aigupta Zoh In A-om

JEREMIAH 47: 1Pharaoh in Gaza agawt ma a Philistia mite tungtang a zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung. 2Toupa'n hichi in achi:Ngai un, mal a kipan in tui ahong khang hi, akuang dim in aluanglet ding;gam atum ding a asung a om tengteng toh,khopi leh asung a tengte leng;mite akap ding ua,gam a mi tengteng amau tuaituai ding uh. 3Asakol hat chinte leitot ging in kidou kangtalai ging dopdop in,akangtalai ging in,pate alunglel ua,atate uh en lou zen in. 4Philistia mi tengteng lohna ni,Tura leh Sidon a kipan apanpih mi khosuaksunte sattanna ni ziak in, Toupa'n tuipi gei Kaphtor omlaite ahihse ding hi. 5Gaza mite lu ahong giauta,Ashkelon achimitta a,agam phaizang a teng khosuaksunte;bang tan kiat ding na hia? 6Aw Toupa namsau, na omkinken ma bang tan a sawt ahia?Na pai ah kikhum in;khawl inla om kinken ve. 7 Toupa'n Ashkelon leh tuipi gei tung a gamtang ding a,ahon seh a, hih ding ahon piak ngalleh bangchi in na om kinken thei dia? 47Philistia Tungtang A Toupa Thugen

JEREMIAH 48: 1Moab tungtang thu; sepaihte' ToupaPathian in hichi in achi:“Nebo tung agik hi;hihgawp in a-omta;Kiriathaim zahlaksak in a-omta, laksuan ahi.Misgab bel zahlak leh hihsiat in a-omta. 2Moab minthanna amangta;Heshbon ah asiatna ding gen in,‘Kisa un, nam ahihna kipan i hihmang ding uh,’ ” achi ua.Aw Madmen khua, nang leng daihsak sipsip na hi ding a,namsau in ahon delh ding. 3Horonaim a kipan akikou husa,lohna leh siatna thupi mahmah. 4Moab suksiat ahi a, atate kap ging zak in a-om hi, 5Luhith ah kap in apaitou ua,Horonaim sul ah manthatnakikou ging lunglelhhuai aza uh. 6Taimang unla, na hinna uh humbit un,gamdai gam sabiltung bang in om un. 7Na nasep leh na sum-le-pai na muan ziak in nang leng mat in na om ding hi,Khemosh sal a pi ahi ding;asiampute leh aheutute toh. 8Kho chih ah hihsemi ahong tung ding,kho khat lel in leng apel kei ding;phaizang gam leng amang ding;phaizang hihsiat ahi ding. Toupa'n achihsa bang in. 9Alenmang theihna ding inMoab kha pia un,tengmi om lou in,akhuate akisegawp ding. 10Limsak loutak a Pathian nna semmi hamsethuak in om henla, sisan suah ding a anamsau zang nuamloumi hamsethuak in om hen.Moab Khopite Siatna 11Atuailai a kipan Moab in nuam asa a, a-uain abohkhum a, bel dang a teituah leng atuak kei a, sal a pi in a-om ngei sam kei hi, alim ngeingei a lim gige in, agim leng alamdang tuan kei. 12“Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, abungkhe ding mi ka hon sawl ding a, huan amau abungkhe ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; abelte avuaksak ding ua, a-umte ahihkek ding uh. 13Israel inkote'n amuanpi pen uh Bethel azahpih bang un Moab in Khemosh azahpihta ding hi. 14Pasal hoih leh galdou mihangsan i hi ua,bangchidan a chi na hi ua?

JEREMIAH 48: 15Moab bel hihgawp in a-om a,akhopi meikhu in azam khinta,atangval hoih teng apuk khinta chih Kumpipa, amin Sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi. 16Moab siatna ahong tung lellel,athuakna ding akinoh hi. 17Nou akim a mi teng in amah suun in amin thei teng inchiangkhun khauh lehchiang thupi akitanta hi, chi un. 18Aw nang tanu, Dibon a teng,na thupina paisan inla,dangtak in tu in;Moab lokmi'n nang ahon sual a,na kulhte ahihseta hi. 19Aw Aroer a teng nu, kongbul ahdingh in, enkhia in, taikekpa,suaktanu dong inla,Bang amaizen a? chi in. 20Moab zahlaksak in a-omta,achimgawpta ngal a,mau tuaituai in kap un, Moab hihsiat ahita!chih Arnon ah puang un. 21Gam tampi tung ah; Holon, Zahjah, Mephaath, 22leh Dibon, Nebo, Beth-diblathaim, 23leh Keriathaim, Beth-gamul, Beth-menon, 24leh Kerioth, Bozrah leh Moab gam a khua tengteng, agamla leh anai ah vaihawmna ahong tungta hi. 25Moab ki-attan in a-om a, aban hihtan in a-omta, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Moab Hihniam Ahi Ding 26Amah dawnkhamsak un; Toupa tung ah akiliansak ngal a; huan, Moab bel amah luak ah akitholh ding a, nuihsan in a-om lai ding hi. 27Israel nang ding nuihza bawlna ahita kei maw? Gutate lak ah atel a hia? Amah tungtang na gen teng in na lu na sinkhum hilou hiam? 28Moab a tengte aw, khopite taisan unla, kawl kikal ah teng un, vakhu, kohawm gei a bu bawlsek bang in om un. 29Moab kisaktheihna ka zata ua, akisathei ngut ve, akikoih sandan, akisaktheihdan, aki-otsakdan leh alungtang kideihkhopdante. 30Ahehna bangmah ahi kei chih ka thei; aki-otsaknate'n bangmah ahih ko kei, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 31Huchi in Moab tung ah ka mau tuaituai ding a, ahi, Moab pumpi a ding in ka kap ding, Kir-hareseth mite suun ahi ding uh.

JEREMIAH 48: 32Jazer kap sang a thupi in ka hon kah ding a, aw Sibmah grep kung, na hiangte tuipi tung ah akiphalh a, Jazer tuipi leng atung hialta a, na nipithei leh grep gahte hihsemi in abawm hi. 33Nopna leh kipahna amang khin hi, theibil leh Moab gam a kipan; uain sukna khuk a ka uain ka beisakta a, kuamah in nuamsa a kikou in achil nawn kei ding uh. 34Heshbon leh Elealeh ah akikou ua, Jahaz tan in aw asuah ua, Zoar a kipan Horonaim tan, Eglath-shelishijah tan in leng, Nimrim tui kim adai ding hi. 35Huai lou in Moab mun sangte thil lanmi leh apathiante a dia gimlim halmi ka hihmang ding, Toupa thupawt in achi hi. 36Huchi in tamngai bang in ka lungtang Moab a ding in aging a, Kir-hareseth mite a ding in tumging bang in ka lungtang aging hi; huaiziak in niang-le-tai a thil amuhsate amangthang khinta hi. 37Lu chiteng metgiau ahi a, khamul chiteng met ahi; khut tengteng at ahi a; kongte ah sai-ip puan a-om chiat hi. 38Moab inn tung tengteng, kongzing leh mun chih ah kahna a-om a; Moab bel phatuam nawn lou bang in ka hihkham khinta hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 39Seta namai e! Segawp zou hi na tel e; Moab zahlak in alehngatta ve; huchi in Moab bel akimvel a mite tengteng a ding in nuihza bawlna leh mulkimhuai ahong hita hi.Moab Asuakta Kei Ding 40 Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, mu bang in aleng ding a, Moab tung ah akha azak ding. 41Kerioth lak ahi a, akulhte aphawng guih a, huai ni in Moab pasalphate lungtang numei nauvei lungtang bang mai ahi ding. 42Moab amangthang ding, nam aching nawn kei ding; Toupa anuaisiah zawk ziak in.

JEREMIAH 48: 43Launa, kokhuk leh tangte, aw Moab luahmi, na tung ah atung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 44Launa taisanmi kokhuk ah ake ding a, kokhuk a pawt thang ah a-awk ding, agawtna kum ka hon tun sin ngal a, atung ah, Moab tung ah ngei, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 45Heshbon lim ah taikekpawl bahgawp in akhawl ding ua, Heshbon a kipan in mei apawt a, Sihon lak a kipan in meikuang, chiak vengvung mite sip a sam toh Moab baksam akang khin hi. 46Na tung agik hi, aw Moab! Khemosh mite amangta ua; na tapate sal a pi in, na tanute sal in atangta uhi. 47Himahleh ni nanung chiang in Moab omdan ka hei ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Hichi tan Moab tungthu ahi. 48Moab Suksiatna

JEREMIAH 49: 1Ammon mite thu, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Israel in tate anei kei a hia? Gouluahmi nei lou hia? Bang achia ahia akumpipa'n Gad atantak a, khopite a amite aten uh? 2Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ammon tate Rabbah ah kidou husa ging ka kizasak ding, thil sia omkhawm lel ahong hi ding hi, atanute mei in akang ding a, huchi in Israel in amah neimi anei thuk ding, Toupa'n achi. 3Aw Heshbon, mau tuaituai inla, Ai alok khinta ua; Rabbah tate aw, kap un, kap unla, umna sungte ah vialtai un. Kumpipa, siampu leh amiliante toh sal a pi in a-om ding uhi. 4Bangziak a na phaizang hoihte suang na hia, aw muanhuailounu aneih hoihhoihte muang a, ‘Kua ahia hon sual ding?’ chichi nak mi. 5Ngai in, na tung ah launa ka hon tun ding a, na kim a mi tengteng a kipan, chih Toupa sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi; michih delhkhiak na hi vek ding uh, kuamah in taikekpawl akaikhawm kei ding uh. 6“Huai khit chiang in bel Ammon tate omdan ka kiheisak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Edom Tung A Toupa Thukhenna 7Edom thu, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Teman a pilna om nawn lou ahi maw? Lemthei lemtheihna amang khinta a hia? Apilna uh mang khin hia? 8Aw Dedan a tengte aw, taikek unla, lehngat unla, tummang vengveng un; amah ka gawt hun chiang in, Esau siatna atung ah ka hon tun ding hi. 9Grep lou mite na kiang a ahong pai un, maih anei kei ding ua hia? Zan a guta mite'n adeihzah uh angah masiah un alok zel kei ding ua hia? 10Esau ka vuaktang sakta a, agukkhuhte ka hongta, abu thei nawn kei ding. Asuante hihsiat ahi ua, a-unaute, a-invengte toh a-omta kei.

JEREMIAH 49: 11Na tagahte limsak ke'n, ke'n ka hum ding, na meithaite'n kei hon muang uhen.” 12 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Nou dawn lou dingte'n leng adawn mawk uleh, nang gawt louh hial in na suakta ding a hia? Gawt louh in na pawt kei ding, na dawn mahmah ding hi. 13Toupa'n keimah kilou in ka kichiamta ngal a, Bozrah lamdangsak chiat, gensiat, hihgawp, hamsethuak ahi ding, akhua tengteng leng asegawp tawntung ding,” achi hi. 14 Toupa kiang a kipan thupuan ka zata, namte kiang ah sawltak sawl ahita, “Kikaikhawm unla, amah sual unla, kidou ding in kuan un! 15Ngai in, mihingte muhsit in namte lak ah nang ka hon neusakta hi. 16Na kihih mulkimhuaina tak na lungtang kisathei in ahon khemna ahi, aw nang kawl suangkal a, mualvum a teng zel, mu bang in, sangpi ah bu sep mah lechin, huai a kipan in ka hon lakhesuk ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 17Huchi in Edom bel lamdang asak uh ahong hi ding a, mi vialvak peuh in lamdang asa ding ua, asiat luat ziak in atekkhum ding uh. 18Sodom leh Gomorrah leh akim a khopite hihsiat a om mah bang in, kuamah ateng nawn kei ding ua, mihing ta kuamah huai ah a-om ngei nawn kei ding uh. 19Ngai un, Jordan gam gammang a kipan a humpinelkai, gan khahna mun ah ahong tou ding a; amah a kipan amau ka taimangsak pah ding a, atung a thunei ding in ka ut-ut ka sep ding. Keimah bang kua ahia om? Kua'n ahia hunbi hon bikhiahsak ding? Belamchingmi kua ahia ka ma a dingh ding pen? 20Huaiziak in Edom tung a Toupa thuhilh leh Teman mite tung a athilseh, hih atuppente ngaikhia un; ganhon nou neute ngei kaihmang in a-om ding ua; atenna uh ahihgawp ding hi. 21Apuksiatna husa uah lei akising a;

JEREMIAH 49: akah husa uh Tuipi san ah leng zak ahi ding. 22Ngai un, muvanlai bang in ahong lengtou ding a; Bozrah tung ah kha azak ding; huai ni in Edom mihangsante lungtang numei nauvei lungtang bang lel ahi ding hi.Damaskas Tung A Toupa Thukhenna 23Damaskas thu: Hamath zumta, Arpad toh, thuhoih lou azata ngal ua, azulta uh; tuipi kihot om kinken thei lou bang in abuai uh. 24Damaskas athazaw, taikek atum a, linna in alap a, lungkhamna leh natna in numei nauvei bang mai in alenta hi. 25Ka nopsakna khopi, khopi minthang bangziak a nutsiat a om lou ahia? 26Huchi in huai ni in atangval honte kongtual ah apuk ding ua, galdoumi tengteng amangthang ding uh, chih sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi. 27Damaskas kulhbaang ah mei ka khah ding a, Ben-hadad kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding hi.Kedar Leh Hazor Tung A Toupa Thukhenna 28Kedar leh Hazor gamte Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in agawtna thu; Toupa'n hichi in achi: Thou unla, Kedar sual unla, suahlam tate bawl ek un. 29Apuaninte uh, aganhonte uh alaksak ding ua, apuanzakte uh, atui-um belsuan tengteng uh, asangawngsaute uh apaimangpih ding uh, ning chih ah launa a-om a, chi in mite'n akikoukhum ding uh. 30Taikek unla, vakmang vengveng un, tummang vengveng unla, Hazor a tengte aw, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in nang ahon sawm a, na tung ah hihtup aneita hi. 31Thou unla, lungmuangtak a om, amah a khosa, kulh kongkhak leng nei lou, kalhna siktawn leng nei lou nam sual un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 32Asangawngsaute uh gal in ala ding ua, abawnghonte uh alok ding uh. Baksam metgiau honte ning chih ah ka dalhsak ding, asiatna ding uh ning chih a kipan in ka hon tun ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

JEREMIAH 49: 33Huan Hazor bel sihna tenna mun ahi ding a, asegawp tawntung ding, huai ah kuamah ateng nawn kei ding uh, mihing tate a-omta kei ding uh.Elam Tung A Toupa Thukhenna 34Judah kumpipa Zedekiah vaihawm pat tungna Elam tungtang a Toupa thu, zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a hong tung; 35Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, Elam thalpeu, ahatna bulpi pen uh, ka kitansak ding; 36Kawlmong li a kipan in huih lite ka hon tun ding, Elam tung ah ka dalhsak ding, kawlmong chih ah, Elam delhkhiak mite phak louh nam a-om kei ding uh. 37Amelma uh, ahinna uh zong mite ma ah, Elamte ka lunglelsak ding, atung uah siatna ka hon tun ding, ka hehna thupitak, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Amau ka hihman vek masiah namsau ka delhsak ding hi. 38Akumpipate uleh aheutute uh hihmang in Elam ah ka laltutphah ka tung ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 39Himahleh ni nanungte ah hichi ahi ding, Elam omdan ka kiheisak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 49Ammon Tung A Toupa Thukhenna

JEREMIAH 50: 1Babulon tungtang, Kaldai mite gam tungtang a zawlnei Jeremiah kam a Toupa thugen: 2Namte lak ah gen unla,puang un, puanzak khai in,puang un, sel kei un,Babulon lak ahita.Bel azahlak a,Merodak mulkimna in adim a,milimte ase khinta. 3Mallam a kipan amah nam khat in ahon sual a, huai in agam ahihgawp ding a, huai ah kuamah ateng nawn kei ding ua; ataikek ua, mi leh sate leng amang khinta uhi.Saltanna A Pan Israel Kik Nawnna 4Huai nite in leh huai hun chiang in Israel suante ahong pai ding ua, amau leh Judah tate toh; kap kawm in ahong pai ding ua, Toupa a Pathian uh azong ding uh; chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 5Zion lam nga in akalsuanna ding uh adong ding ua, “Kisa un, tangtawn thukhun mangngilh nawn lou ding in Toupa hong len un,” achi ding uh. 6Ka mite zaw belam mang ahi ua; amau ching mite'n apimang ua, mualte ah apaimangsak ua, tang a pan mual dungte ah apai ua, ahuang uh amangngilh khinta uhi. 7Amu peuh in ane zel ua, amelmate un, i gilou kei, Toupa dikna omna apipute uh lamet Toupa hilhial tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak ahi, achi uhi. 8Babulon sung a kipan in taikhia unla, Kaldaite gam a kipan paikhia un, kelhon lak a keltalte bang in om un. 9Ngai dih ua, Babulon hong sual ding in mal gam a kipan nam honpi thupitak kikaikhawm ka tokthou ding a, amah dou ding in akisa ding ua; huai a kipan in lak ahi ding uh; athalte uh lah galbawl siamtak vuaksuak ngei lou bang ahi ding uh.

JEREMIAH 50: 10Huan Kaldai loh in a-om ding, alok mite atai ngial ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Babulon Pukna 11Kipak mah le uchin, nuamsa mah le uchin, aw ka goutan lok mite aw, lou lak a bawngla takhialkhial bang leh sakoltal ham ngekngek bang himah le uchin; 12Na nu uh ahong zum mahmah ding a, nou hon suangnu ahong zahlak ding hi. Ngai un, namte lak a nuainungpen, gamdai, gamkeu, gamvuak ahi ding. 13Toupa hehna ziak in luahmi a-om kei ding a, ase vek zaw ding hi, Babulon hoh peuhmah amulkimsak ding a, asiatna tengteng ziak in atek ding uhi. 14Thalpeu tawimi tengteng aw, Babulon umsuak in kivual unla, kap unla, thalte chil kei un, Toupa tung ah akhialta uhi. 15Akimvel in awng unla, amah-le-amah akipeta, akulhte apukta a, abaangte achimta, Toupa phulakna ahi ngal a, atung ah phu la unla, ahih bangbang in atung ah hih un. 16Babulon a kipan chi thehmi attan unla, buhlak lai a kawite tawimi toh, nuaisiahna namsau lau in amau mite lam azuan chiat ding ua, amau gam chiat ah atai ding uh.Saltanna A Pan Israel Kik Nawnna 17Israel bel belam dalhzak ahi a; humpinelkaite'n adelhmang ua; Assuria kumpipa'n amah ane phot a, atawp in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in aguhte ahaizanta hi. 18Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, Assuria kumpipa ka gawt bang in Babulon kumpipa leh agam ka gawt ding. 19Huan Israel agantatna ah ka pi nawn ding a, Karmel leh Bashan ah ata ding a, Ephraim tang ah leh Gilead ah amah ata ding hi. 20Huai nite leh huai hun chiang in Israel thulimlouhnate azong ding ua, muh ding a-om kei ding; Judah thilhihkhelhte leng muh ding a-om sam kei ding;

JEREMIAH 50: omsun ding a ka koihte ngaidam ding ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Babulon Tung A Toupa Thukhenna 21Merathim gam sual un, agam leh Pekod luah mite mahmah that unla, hihgam sipsip un, thu ka hon piak bangbang in hih un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 22Huai gam ah gal husa a-om, siatna thupi mahmah husa toh. 23Khovel pumpi sek kitam in, nak keknen hi na tel e; namte lak ah Babulon kinaksiat hi na mai e! 24Aw Babilon, nang ding in thang na kam a, thei lou a awk na hita ve; muhkhiak leh mat in na omta, Toupa na sual ziak in. 25Toupa'n agalvan bawm ahongta, ahehna vanzatte alakhia a, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n Kaldaite gam ah hih ding anei hi. 26Gamgi tawp pek a kipan in hon sual unla, athil koihkhawmna innte hong vek unla, paikhawm un, hihse vek unla, abangmah hawi kei un. 27Abawngtal tuaite that vek unla, goh in om uhen. Atung uh gik hi na tel e! Ani uh, amaute gawtna ni mahmah ahong tungta hi. 28 Toupa i Pathian phulak, atempul phulakna ngei Zion a gen ding a Babulon a kipan a taikhete leh taimangte husa ngei. 29Babulon sual ding in thalkap siam, thalpeu zangmi tengteng samkhawm un; akimvel in buk bawl unla, kuamah suakta kei uhen. Athilhih bangbang in thuk un, ahihsa bang tengteng amah tung ah hih un; Toupa, Israel Mi Siangthou lah achou ngam hi. 30Huaiziak in akholakte ah tangvalte apuk ding ua, galkapmi tengteng huai ni in amangthang ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 31Ngai in, nang mikisathei, ka hon dou ahi, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi hi. Na ni ahong tungta, na gawtna ding ni mah.

JEREMIAH 50: 32Huan mikisathei akisui in apuk ding a, kuamah in aphong kei ding ua, akhopite ah mei ka khah ding a, akimvel a om tengteng ka kangsiangsak vek ding. 33Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Israel suante leh Judah tate nuaisiah in a-om khawmta ua; sal a amaute pi mite tengteng in amau alen tinten ua, akhah nuam kei uhi. Amaute tanpa bel ahat a; amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi. 34Amah amau lam ah apang a, Babulon a tengte hihbuai in, leitung a khawlna atuttheihna ding in. 35Kaldai mite tung ah namsaualeng hi, Babulon a tengte,aheutute uh leh amipilte uh tung ah leng,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 36Mizuautheite tung ah namsau,mihai ahong suak ding uh;agalkapmi tung ah namsau,alunglel khin ding uh. 37Asakolte uh leh kangtalaite uh tung ah namsau,asung a mi kilak hel tengtengte tung ah leng,numei bang phet ahong hi ding uh;agou thil tung ah namsau lok in a-om maimai ding uhi. 38Atuite kang in akeu khin a,milimte gam lah ahi ngal a,milimte lah ahailoh uhi. 39Huaiziak in gamdai gam sahangte, ngiate toh huai ah ateng ding ua, ostrikte leng huai ah ateng ding uh; luah in a-om ngei nawn kei ding; suan tengteng pha in leng luah in a-om kei ding hi. 40Pathian in Sodom leh Gomorrah leh akho invengte ahihsiat bangbang in; huai ah kuamah atengta kei ding ua, mihing tapa kuamah in aveh nawnta kei ding uh, Toupa thupawt in achi hi. 41Ngai un, mallam gam a pan mite ahong ua,mun tawp a kipan nam thupitak leh kumpipa tampi ahong kuan uhi. 42Thalpeu leh tei atawi ua,hiamgamtak, zahngaihna nei lou ahi uh.Ahusa uh tuipi ging huhu bang ahi a, sakol tung ah atuang ua,michih galkapmi bang a kivan in,Babulon tanu aw,nang ahong sual ding uhi.

JEREMIAH 50: 43Ahusa uh za in Babulon kumpipa khut azawgawpta a,numei nauvei lai natna bang in,natna thupitak in amanta hi. 44Ngai un, Jordan gammang a kipan humpinelkai, kahna mun a ahong tou bang in ahong paitou ding a; amah a kipan in amaute ka taimangsak pah ding; atung a thunei ding ka ut-ut ka sep ding. Kei bang kua a-om a! Kua'n sep ding. Kei bang kuakua a-om a? Kua'n ahia hunbi hon sehsak ding? Belamchingmi kua ahia ka ma a dingh ding? 45Huaiziak in Babulon tung ah Toupa thuhilh, Kaldai mite tung a athilseh ngaikhia un. Ganhon noute ngei kaihmang in a-om ding ua, gan khahna mun a mite amulkimsak ding. 46Babulon lakna husa ah lei aling ding a, akahna husa namte lak a zak ahi ding hi. 50Babulon Luh A Omna

JEREMIAH 51: 1 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih, Babulon leh Kaldai mite tung ah, hihse ding huihpi ka sawl ding hi. 2Zapsiangmi ka sawl ding, Babulon tung ah, amah zap in agam azapsiang ding ua, siatna ni a um a sual ding ahi ngal ua. 3Thalpeu zangmi in thalpeu lai a, sik puanak silh in, dingh heh, tangvalhon khat leng hawi lou in, asepaih tengteng nuaimang un. 4Kaldai gam ah thah in apuk ding ua, akholakte uah sut pailet in a-om ding uhi. 5Israel leh Judah, agam uah Israel Mi Siangthou tung ah khelhna in adim na ua, a Pathian uh sepaihte' Toupa'n amangngilh kei hi. 6Taimang unla, Babulon khosung a kipan, michih in amah hinna humbit hen; athulimlouhna manloh kei un, Toupa phulak hun ahi ngal a, ama'n athuk ngeigngei ding hi. 7Babulon bel Toupa khut a dangka-eng nou, leitung pumpi hihkhamna ahi a, namte'n kham in alung uh amawl khinta hi. 8Babulon apuk guih a, amangta, amah kah ekek un, hihdam theihdan ding ahihleh singnai damdawi nuhchi laksak un. 9Babulon hihdam ka tum a, adam tuan kei, amah nusia in eimah gam chiat uah pai ni, amohna in van asun a, van dum pha a dopkang ahi. 10“Toupa'n ka dikna apuangta; kisa un, Toupa i Pathian thilhih, Zion ah i puang ding uh. 11“Thalte tat-hiam unla, lumte len un, Media kumpipate lungsim Toupa'n atokthouta a, athiltup Babulon hihsiat ahi. Huai Toupa'n atempul ziak a phulakna ahi. 12Babulon kulh bul ah kidouna puangzak thak un, venna hihhat in, galvilmi koih un, galbuknate bawl unla, Babulon mite tungtang thu ah Toupa'n agen tak, angaihtuah in ahih khinta hi. 13Aw nang, tui tamna mun a tengmi, sum-le-pai hau mahmah, na tawpna atungta, na hinna khau akitanta hi.

JEREMIAH 51: 14Sepaihte' Toupa amah kilou in achiamta hi, khaupete bang mai in mihing in ka hon dimsak ngeingei ding, nakpi in ahon otkhum ding uh.”Pathian Phatna La 15Athilhihtheihna in lei abawl a,apilna in khovel adingkhesak a,alemtheihna in van aphalhsak. 16A-aw asuah a, van a tui aging hawhaw a,kawlmong a kipan meipi apaitousak a, vuah zukna ding in khua aphesak a,agoubawm a kipan huih anungsak hi. 17Michih amual ua, theihna louin, dangka-eng sekmichih in alimsek pen azumpih ua,amilim sun lah zuau ngen ahi a,amau ah nakna a-om kei lai hi. 18Bangmah lou, khemna nasep lel ahi ua,agawt hun chiang in amang ding uh. 19Jakob tantuan bel hichibang ahi kei, thil tengteng bul ahi ngal a;Israel agouluah nam ahi a,amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi. Toupa Khetbuk 20Nang bel ka galdouna heipi lehvanzat na hi a,nang hon zang in namte kahihzan a, nang zang in lalnagamte ka hihmang hi. 21Nang hon zang in sakol lehatung a ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in kangtalaileh atung a tuang ka hihzan a; 22Nangmah zang in numei leh pasal ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in putek leh tuailai ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in nungak leh tangval ka hihzan hi. 23Nangmah zang in belamchingleh belamhon ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in louneimi leh bawngtal kop ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in gam ukpipate leh upate ka hihzan sek ahi.Babulon Tung A Gawtna 24Nang mitmuh ngei in Zion tung a athil hoih lou hih tengteng uh Babulon leh Kaldai mite tung ah ka thuk ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 25Ngai in, leitung pumpi hihsia, aw hihsetu tang lian, nang ka hon dou ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Na tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, kawl sang a kipan ka hon khukkhe ding, tang kang mit khinsa in ka hon bawl ding.

JEREMIAH 51: 26Nang a kipan suang ning ding leh suangphum ding lakkhiak ahi nawn kei ding; tangtawn in na segawp zaw ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 27“Huai gam ah kidou puanzak tak unla, namte lak ah pengkul mut un, amah dou ding namte kisasak unla, Araratte, Minnite, Ashkenaz gamte, amah sual ding sepaih sep unla, khaupe zuanzaang bang mai in sakolte kaikhawm un. 28Amah dou ding namte kisasak un; Media kumpipate, ukpipate leh upate, athuneihna gam tengteng toh. 29Huai gam nat thuak in aling a, Babulon gam, tengmi om lou a hihsiat ding in, Babulon tung a Toupa thiltup adingh gige hi. 30Babulon galdou mite'n galkap ding ngapta lou in, akulhpi uah aton maimah uh, apasalphatna uh akhing a, numei bang mai ahong hita ua, atenna munte akang khin a, adeidanna siktawn akitan hi. 31Thangkou tai in midang leng akituahpih a, misawl in leng midang atuak a, Babulon kumpipa kiang a akhopi ning chih ah amanta uh chih hilh ding in. 32Lui kannate aman ua, phailuangte ahal siang ua, kidou mite leng alunglelta uh. 33Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Babulon tanu phual sikngil lai bang ahi a, sawt lou nung in buhchil hun atung ah ahong tung ding hi.” 34“Hon negaita, Babulon kumpipaNebukadnezzar in, hon haizan a,bel vuak lel in ahon bawlta,gulpi bang in ahon nawmvalhta,ka thil limte'n agilpi adimsak a,ahon paikhe nawnta hi. 35Kei leh ka satung a hiamgam thilhih,Babulon tung ah om hen;ka sisan Kaldai mite tung ah om hen,Jerusalem in achi ding.” Toupa'n Israel Apanpih Ding 36Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, nang lam ah ka pang ding a, na phu ka hon laksak ding, atuipi ka kangsak ding a, atuikhuk leng ka keugawsak ding.

JEREMIAH 51: 37Huan Babulon bel hoih lou paihkhawm lel, sehal tenna mun, lamdangsak chiat leh enghou, tengmi om lou mun ahong hi ding. 38Akikou ton ding ua, humpinelkai lun lai bang in, angik tuaktuak ding uh; humpinelkai nou bang in. 39Akham mahmah lai un ankuang ka luisak dia, khothei het lou in ka khamsak dia, khanglou het lou ding a a-ihmut dettheihna ding un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 40Ka pikhe ding a, belam goh ding bang in, belamtalte leh keltalte bang mai in.”Babulon Tuah Ding 41Shesak lak ahita ve; leitung pumpi pahtawi zel mat in a-omta ve, namte lak ah Babulon asegawpta ve. 42Babulon tuipi in atumta, akihot thupi mahmah in akhuh khinta. 43Akhopi asegawpta a, gamkeu, gamdai, mihing tenlouhna mihing ta kuamah phak louh gam ahong suakta hi. 44Babulon bel ka gawt ding, avalhkhitsa akam a kipan asuahkhe ding, namte bel akiang ah aluangkhawm nawn kei ding uh, ahi Babulon kulhpi achim ding. 45Ka mite aw, asung a kipan hong pawt unla, Toupa hehna lauhuai mahmah a kipan, michih amau kihumbit chiat un. 46Na lungtang uh bah kei hen, huai gam a thuthang leng lau kei un; kum khat in thuthang ahong tung ding a, kum dang in thuthang ahong tung nawn ding ahi, kumpipa leh kumpipa kisual in gam ah hiamgamna a-om ding. 47Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi. Babulon milim sektawmte tung a vai ka hawm a, agam pumpi zumna ni ding; huan, asung ah amithahte apuk ding uh. 48Huchi in lei leh van leh asung a om tengteng in, Babulon tung a kipak in la asa ding uh; mallam a kipan sim mite akiang a tung ding uh ahi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

JEREMIAH 51: 49Babulon in Israel mithahte apuksak bang in Babulon ah gam chih a thah a omte apuk ding uh.Babulon A Israel Kiang A Toupa Thugen 50Nou namsau pel mite aw, kuan unla, dingh maimai kei un, gamlapi a kipan in Toupa theigige unla, na lungsim uah Jerusalem lut hen. 51Babulon A Dia Thukhenna 52Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, amilim sektawmte uh tung a ka vaihawmna ding leh agam pumpi tung a miliamte thumna ni ding ngei. 53Babulon bel van sun in sang mahleh, akulh sangte hihkip mahleh, atung ah ka kiang a kipan hihsemi ahong tung ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 54Babulon a kipan kah husa lehKaldai gam a kipansiatna thupitak husa; 55 Toupa'n Babulon asim a, ahusa uh thupitak ahih daihsak hi.Agamtat husa uh tui tampi ging hawhaw bang ahi, a-awng zuazua ua. 56Atung ah simmi ahong tung,Babulon tung ngei ah pang ni,amihatte mat in a-om ua,athalpeute uh akitangawpta, Toupa bel thukna Pathian ahi a,athuk ngeingei ding. 57Huan aheutute leh amipilte,a-ukpipate leh upate leh mihatte ka khamsak dia;alumden ding ua, akhanglou kei ding uh, chih, kumpipa,Sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi. 58Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:Babulon kumpipa kulhbaang sahtakte achim vek ding a,akongpi sangte akang vek ding;amite'n athawn in asem ua,namte'n meihal a ding lel a kihihgim uh ana hi.Jeremiah Thukhah Babulon Akhakna 59Judah kumpipa Zedekiah vaihawm akum lina a Babulon ahoh lai a akiang a hoh sam, Seraiah Neriah tapa, Maaseiah tapa kiang a zawlnei Jeremiah thupiak. 60Seraiah bel kumpipa insung heutupen ahi a, Jeremiah in Babulon tung a siatna hong tung ding tengteng, Babulon tungtang a hiai thu gelh tengteng laibu ah agelh hi.

JEREMIAH 51: 61Huan Jeremiah in Seraiah kiang ah, Babulon na tun hun chiang in hiai thu tengteng sim ngeingei inla, 62Aw Toupa hiai nam tungtang ah kuamah, mi leh sa leh tenlouhna ding suksiat a om in, tangtawn a kisegawp zaw ding in thu na genta a, na chi ding. 63Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, hiai laibu na sim khit chiang in suang toh gakkhawm in Euphrates Luipi ah pailut inla, 64Babulon hichibang mai in atum ding a, atung a siatna ka hon tut ding ziak in athounawn kei ding; abah mahmah ding uh, chi in na gen ding ahi, achi a. Hichi teng Jeremiah thu ahi.

JEREMIAH 52: 1Zedekiah in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih leh kum khat a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-khat vai ahawm a; anu min Hamutal ahi a, Libnah a Jeremiah tanu ahi. 2Jehoiakim hih bangbang in Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih hi. 3Toupa aheh mahmah ziak in Jerusalem leh Judah gam ah ama a kipan a paihkhiakna khop in thil ahong tungta a; huchi in Babulon kumpipa tung ah Zedekiah ahelta hi. 4Huan avaihawm akum kuana ah hichi ahong hi a, kha sawmna, huai kha ani sawm ni in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leh asepaihhonte Jerusalem dou ding in ahong kuan ua, buk abawlkhumta ua; akim ah kulh abawl uhi. 5Huchi in kumpipa Zedekiah kum sawm-le-khatna tan in khopi um in a-omta hi. 6Akha lina, huai kha ani kuana ah khopi ah kial ahong uang mahmah a, gam mipite a ding in nek ding a-omta kei hi. 7Huchi in khopi kulhbaang asunvang ua, kidoumi tengteng ataimang ua, kumpipa huan a baang nih kikal a kongpi a pawt in, zan in khopi a kipan ataikhia ua; Kaldai mite' khopi a om ahi uhi. 8Himahleh Kaldai sepaihte'n kumpipa adelh ua, Jeriko Phaizang ah Zedekiah apha ua, sepaihhonte akiang a kipan adalhzak uhi. 9Huchi in Zedekiah aman ua, Babulon kumpipa kiang ah Hamath gam a Riblah ah apaipih ua; ama'n atung ah vai ahawmkhum hi. 10Babulon kumpipa'n Zedekiah tapate amitmuh ngei in athat a; Riblah ah Judah heutu tengteng leng athat lai hi 11Zedekiah mit akhelkhia a, Babulon ah apaipih hi; asih ni tanpha in suangkul ah akoih hi.Jerusalem Tempul Hihsiatna(2 Kum 25.8-21; 12Huan kumpipa vengpa pawl heutu Nebuzaradan, amah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar ma a dingh sek, akum sawm-le-kuana, akha ngana, huai kha ani sawmna in Jerusalem ah ahong lut hi.

JEREMIAH 52: 13Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn ahal a, Jerusalem inn tengteng toh, inn thupi chitengte mei in ahal hi. 14Huan Kaldai sepaihhon tengteng, kumpipa vengpa pawl heutu kiang a omte'n Jerusalem kulhte akimvel in ahihchim vek uhi. 15Huchi in vengpa pawl heutu Nebuzaradan in mipi lak a genthei pawl khenkhat khopi a nutsiat a omte, Babulon kumpipa kiang a kipesate leh mikhutsiam omsun tengtengte toh sal in apivekta hi. 16Himahleh vengpa pawl heutu Nebuzaradan in gam a migenthei pen khenkhatte grephuan kemmi leh vengmi ding in anusia hi. 17 Toupa' inn a dalkhuamte leh akingaknate, dal maiphiat kuang lian Toupa' inn a omte Kaldai mite'n ahihtamgawp ua, dal tengteng Babulon ah ala uhi. 18Belte leng, vutluahte, khawnvak mihsaknate, maiphiat kuangte, sikkeute, dal tui-um belsuan tengteng a zat sekte uh ala vek uh. 19Noute leng, meivu koihnate, maiphiat kuangte, belte, khawnvak koihnate, sikkeute leh belhbute; dangka-eng a bawl huai dangkasik in vengmi pawl heutu in ala vek hi. 20Khuam nih, dal a bawl bawngtal sawm-le-nih, maiphiatna kuang kingakna, kumpipa Solomon in Toupa' inn a dia abawl, hiai tui-um belsuan tengteng dalte tamdan teh vual ahi kei hi. 21Huan khuamte khuam khat sandan, tong sawm-le-giat ahi a, tong sawm-le-nih in akimvel zou phet ahi; asahdan zung za delh ahi a, asung ahawm hi. 22Atung ah dal lubawk a-om a, alubawk sandan tong nga ahi a, alubawk kimvel leh theibuhfai, dal ngen a zep ahi a; khuam nih in leng hichi mah bang in theibuhfai a-om hi. 23Asik ah theibuhfai sawmkua-le-guk a-om a, akim a azepna theibuhfai tengteng zakhat ahi.Judah Mipite Babulon Ah Sal A Pi In A-om Uh(2 Kum 25.18-21,27-30) 24Huan vengpa pawl heutu in siampu lianpen Seraiah leh siampu nihna, Zephaniah leh kongkhak ngakmi thumte aman hi.

JEREMIAH 52: 25Kidou mite tung a heutu dia seh michilgeh leh mi sagih, kumpipa mel mu sekmi, khopi a omte leh sepaih heutu gelhmi, gam mite min kempa leh gam mipi lak a mi sawmguk, khopi a na omte khopi a kipan in apikhia hi. 26Nebuzaradan, vengpa pawl heutu in amaute api a, Babulon kumpipa kiang ah Riblah ah atun hi. 27Babulon kumpipa'n Hamath gam a Riblah ah atung ua khut kha in, athat vek hi. Huchi in Judah nam agam ua kipan in sal a pimang in a-omta. 28Hiaite Nebukadnezzar in mipi sal a apite ahi uh; akum sagihna ah Juda mite sangthum sawmnih-le-thum; 29Nebukadnezzar kum sawm-le-giatna ah Jerusalem a kipan in mi zagiat sawmthum-le-nih sal in api hi. 30Nebukadnezzar akum sawmnih-le-thumna ah Nebuzaradan vengtu pawl heutu in Juda saltang mi zasagih sawmli-le-nga api a, saltang tengteng avek un sangli-le-zaguk ahi uh. 31Kumpipa saltan kum sawmthum-le-sagihna, akha sawm-le-nihna, huai kha ani sawmnih-le-nga ni geih in hichi ahong hi a, Babulon kumpipa Evil-merodak in avaihawm akum khatna ah, Judah kumpipa Jehoiakin lutang adopkangsak a, suangkul a kipan apikhia hi. 32Akiang ah hoihtak in apau a, Babulon a akiang a om Kumpipate tutphah sang a sang in laltutphah atunsak hi. 33Asuangkul puansilhte akikhengsak a, adamsung teng ama ah an ane den hi. 34Huan amah vakna ding adamsung ni tengteng, asih ni tan in aniteng tantuan Babulon kumpipa'n ape gige hi. 52Jerusalem Siatna(2 Kum 24.18—25.7)

EZEKIEL 1: 1Ezekiel In Pathian Amuhna Masa(1.1—7.27)Pathian Laltutphah 2Huai kha ani ngana ah, huai tuh kumpipa Jehoiakin saltan akum ngana ahi, 3Kaldai gam a Kebar lui a Buzi tapa siampu Ezekiel kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: huai ah Toupa khut atung ah a-om hi. 4Huan ka en a, ngai in, mallam a kipan huihpi thupi mahmah ahong kuan a, meipi asah a sah, kuang zoizoi, akim tengteng tanvak puappuap asung mei laitak ah sik am bang a am a-om hi. 5Huchi in huai lai a kipan in thil hing li kibatpih ahong pawtkhia ua, akimuhdan uh hichibang ahi a: Mihing batna anei ua, 6mai li anei chiat ua, kha li anei chiat uhi. 7Akhete uh atang a; akhepek nuailam uh bawngnou khepek bang ahi a; huan dalte mahmah bang in avakkhe zualzual uhi. 8Apang lite ua akha nuai uah mihing khut bang anei ua; huchi in ali un amel uleh akhate uh hichibang in apu uhi: 9Akhate uh akizom a; apai un leng akihei ngei kei ua, amazawn uah apai chiat uhi. 10Amel un akibatpihte mihing mel bang ahi a, ali un ataklam pang uah humpinelkai mel apu ua, ali un aveilam pang uah bawngtal mel apu ua, ali un muvanlai mel apu nawn ua, amel uh huchibang ahi. 11Huan akhate uh azakkhia ua, akha nihte un akizak zom chiat ua, nih in apumpi uh akhuh uh. 12Malam ah apai chiat ua, kha paina lam ding ah apai ua, apai un leng akihei ngei kei uhi. 13Thil hingte lak ah suangkuangthei ampha bang, meisel bang mai asuk leh tou in apai a; meibel a-ampha mahmah a, mei a kipan khophia ahong suakkhe zualzual hi. 14Thil hingte khophe zualzual bang in avialtai uhi.

EZEKIEL 1: 15Huan thil hingte ka et lai in, ngai in, thil hingte zul ah amel lite uh a ding in lei ah kangtalai liim khat zel ka mu hi. 16Kangtalai khe leh atatdan beril suang zia bang mai in alang a, ali un latdan khat anei ua, alatdan uh leh atatdan uh kangtalai liim khat sung a kangtalai liim dang om bang ahi hi. 17Apai chiang un sik li in apai thei ua, apai un leng akihei ngei kei uh. 18Akangtalai liim kual sangtak leh mulkimhuaitak ahi a; ali un akual teng mit in adim uhi. 19Huchi in thil hingte apai chiang un azul uah kangtalai peite apai sam uhi; thil hingte lei a kipan dopkang a a-om uleh kangtalai liimte leng dopkang in a-om sam uhi. 20Kha apai utna lam peuhmah ah apai ua; huai lam a kha apai zel ziak in; huchi in kangtalai liimte azul uah dopkang in a-om ua, thil hing kha kangtalai liimte ah a-om hi. 21Huaite apai chiang un hiaite apai uhi; huaite adin chiang un hiaite adingh ua; huaite lei a kipan a dopkang a a-om chiang un kangtalai liimte amau zul ah dopkang in a-om ua, kangtalai liimte ah thil hingte kha a-om hi.Pathian Thupina Muhna 22Thil hingte lutung ah van kibatpih a-om a, kristal vak bang a te mulkimhuaitak alutung uah akiphalh zeizoi hi. 23Van dum nuai ah akha uh akop khat thil hing dangte sun in azak ua, akha uh kop khat in apumpi uh akhuh uhi. 24Huan alen chiang un akha ging uh tui tampi mahmah ging bang, bangkim hihtheipa aw bang mai, mipi ging vengvung husa, sepaihhon husa bang mai in ka za a; adin uleh akha uh akaisak uhi. 25Alutung ua vansin tung ah aw ahong om a, adin uleh akha uh akaisak uhi.

EZEKIEL 1: 26Huan alutung ua vansin tung ah laltutphah bang, sapphir suang bang mai a kimu a-om a; huai laltutphah batpih tung ah mihing bang a kilang a-om hi. 27Akawng chiang tunglam sik hal-ap bang mai in ka mu a, akawng hileh kilawm chiang nuailam mei bang mai hi in ka mu a, avak kimvel lelaw hi. 28Vuahzuk ni a meipi tung a sakhituihup latdan bang in akim vak alang hi. Hiai Toupa thupina latdan bang ahi. Huan ka muh in akhup in ka puk a, thugenpa aw ka za hi.

EZEKIEL 2: 1Huan ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na khe in dingh in, na kiang ah thu ka gen ding hi,” achi hi. 2Zawlnei Ding A Ezekiel Sapna 3Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Israel suante kiang ah, helhat nam, ka tung a helnakte kiang ah ka hon sawl hi; amau leh apipute leng hiai ni pha nangawn in ka tung ah atalek uhi.” 4Suan lungkhauh leh genhakte ahi ua, akiang uah nang ka hon sawl hi; akiang uah, “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi,” na chi ding ahi. 5Huchi in amau angaikhia uhiam, angaikhe kei uhiam, (amaute lah helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua), alak uah zawlnei a-om chih atheigige ding uhi. 6“Nang, mihing tapa, amaute kihta ke'nla, athu uah leng lunglel sam ke'n, na kiang ah khaulingnei leh louling neite om in, aikam lak a teng himah lechin; helhatmi himah le uh, athu uh kihta ke'nla, alatdan uah leng lunglel sam ke'n. 7Angaikhia uhiam, angaikhe kei uhiam, akiang uah ka thu na gen ding ahi; amaute lah helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua. 8“Himahleh nang mihing tapa, na kiang a ka gen ngaikhia in; mihelhat inkuan bang in helhat ke'nla; na kam ka inla, ka hon piak ne in,” achi hi. 9Huan ka en a ngai in, khut in ahon sawk a, ngai in huai ah laibuzial a-om hi. 10Ka ma ah aphalh a, asunglam leh apolam gelh ahi a; huai ah kahna, lusuunna leh tunggikna gelhna a-om hi.

EZEKIEL 3: 1Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na muh ne in; laibuzial ne inla, Israel inkote kiang ah thu va gen in,” achi hi. 2Huchi in ka kam ka ka a, laibuzial ahon nesakta hi. 3Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, ka hon piak hiai laibuzial in na gil ah vahsak inla, hiai in na gilsung hihdim in,” achi hi. Huchi in ka neta a, akhumdan ka kam ah khuaizu bang ahi hi. 4Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa kuan inla, Israel inkote kiang ah ka thute zang in va gen in. 5Pau tuam leh pau haksate kiang a sawl na hi kei a, Israel inkote kiang a sawl na hi zaw a; 6nam pau tuam leh pau haksa athu uh na theihtheihlouhte kiang a sawl na hi kei hi. Akiang ua nang ka hon sawl in pel lou in na thu angaikhe mahmah ding uh. 7Himahleh Israel inkote'n ahon ngaikhe kei ding ua, kei ahon ngaikhe kei ding uh, Israel inkote tengteng taltangtak leh lungtang genhak mahmah ahi uhi. 8Huan ngai in, na mai amau mai lak ah khauhsak in, na taltang leng amau taltang sang a takzaw in ka bawl hi. 9Suang tak mahmah, meisuang sang a takzaw in na tal ka bawl a, lau ke'nla, amit hah uah lunglel sam ke'n, helhat inkuan himah le uh,” achi hi. 10Huai lou leng ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na kiang a ka thugen ding tengteng na bil in ngaikhia inla, na lungtang ah khum in. 11Kuan inla, na chipih saltangte kiang va tung inla; angaikhia uhiam, angaikhe kei uhiam, ‘Hichibang Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,’ chi in gen inla, hilh in,” achi hi. 12Huchi in kha in ahon domkangta a, amun a kipan Toupa thupina adinkhiak lai in, ka nunglam ah zinling thawm ka za hi.

EZEKIEL 3: 13Huai tuh thil hingte kha kisukha leh akiang ua kangtalai peite, zinling thawm bang nei ahi uhi. 14Huchi in kha in hon domkang a, ahon lamangta a, heh mahmah leh ut lou pipi in ka kuanta hi; Toupa khut lah ka tung ah ahat ngal a. 15Huchi in Telabib a saltangte, Kebar lui a tengte kiang ka va tung a, atutna uah ka tu a; lamdang satak in huai ah ni sagih ka tuta hi.Amite Vengtu Ding In Toupa'n Ezekiel Asep(Eze 33.1-9) 16Huchi in ni sagih abei in hichi ahong hi a, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: 17“Mihing tapa, Israel inkote vilpa in nang ka hon sep hi; huchi in ka kam a thu na za ding a, kei sik in amaute vauna na pe ding hi.” 18Migilou kiang a ka thu, “Na si mahmah ding,” ka chih a, huai migilou ahinna hum ding a agitlouhna lampi paisan ding a vauna na neih louh a, vauna thu leng na hilh sam louh a, huai migilou agitlouhna a asihleh asisan moh nang lak ah ka hon sik ngeingei ding hi. 19Himahleh huai migilou na vau a, agitlouhna apaisan louh a, agitlouhna lampi alehngatsan sam keileh, agitlouhna ah asi ding a, nang bel na hinna na humbit ahi zaw ding hi. 20“Huan midiktat in adiktatna lehngatsan a gitlouhna ahih a, ama a pukna ka koihleh, asi ding; vauna na neih louh ziak in akhelhna ah asi ding a; athil diktat ahihsate theihgige ahi kei ding; asisan moh ahihleh na lak ah ka hon sik ding hi. 21Himahleh midiktat khial lou ding a na vauhilh a, akhelh keileh vauna akhawksak ziak in ahing ding;

EZEKIEL 3: nang leng na hinna na humbit ding hi,” achi hi.Ezekiel Apau Thei kei Ding 22Huan huai ah Toupa khut ka tung ah a-om a, ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, phaizang ah pai inla, huai ah ka hon houpih ding,” achi a. Huchi in ka thou a, phaizang ah ka paita hi. 23Ngai in, huai ah Toupa thupina, Kebar lui a ka muh thupina bang ahong dingh a, kei ka khuppukta hi. 24Huchi in kei ah kha ahong lut a, ka khe in ahon dingsak a, ahon houpih a, “Pai inla, na inn ah kikhakkhum in. 25Nang zaw, mihing tapa, khauhual in ahon khih ding ua, ahon gak ding ua, alak uah na pawtkhe nawn kei ding. 26Na dangtawng ah na lei ka belhsak ding a, na pau nawn kei ding a, amaute salpa na hi nawn kei ding; helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua.” 27Himahleh na kiang a thu ka gen hun chiang in na kam ka hon ka sak ding a, akiang uah, “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ‘Angaikhia in ngaikhia henla, angaikhe lou in ngaikhe kei hen, helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua, achi,’ ” chi in na gen ding hi.

EZEKIEL 4: 2Akim a um in kulh khohkhum inla, mual pawng bawlkhum in sepaih giahbukte bawlkhum inla, kulh suksiatnate akim in bawlkhum in. 3Sikpek la inla, nangmah leh khopi kikal ah sik baang ding in tung in; huai lam masuan inla, um in a-om ding a, nangmah in na um ding ahi. Hiai Israel inkote a dia etsak kholhna ahi ding. 4“Huan nang bel na veilam pang delh in lum inla, atung ah Israel inkote gitlouhna nga in; atung a na lup sung ani zah bang zel a agitlouhna uh na puak ding ahi. 4Jerusalem Luhna Ding Ezekiel In Aching 1“Nang mihing tapa, teklei pek la inla, na ma ah koih in, huai tung ah khopi Jerusalem khopi lim bawl in. 5Agitlouhna kumte uh nang a ding a nite hi ding in lah ka septa ngal a, ni zathum-leh-sawmkua; huchibang in Israel inkote gitlouhna na po ding ahi. 6Hiaite na khit hun chiang in na taklam pang delh in na lum leuleu ding a, Judah inkote gitlouhna na po ding, ni sawmli nang ding in ka sep hi; ni khat kum khat zel hi ding in. 7“Na ban khuh lou a zak in Jerusalem kiluhna lam nga inla, atungthu genkhia in. 8Ngai in, khauhual in ka hon hentom a, khopi kiluh sung nite abei masiah koilam ah leng na kihei ding ahi kei hi. 9“Buh, buhman, be, behiang, vai buhman la inla, bel khat ah koih in, huan tanghou in bawl in; na pang khat lam delh a na lup sung teng, ni zathum-le-sawmkua sung, huai na ne ding ahi. 10Na an nek ding teh vek ding ahi, ni khat in shekel sawmnih ahi ding ahi; hunbi neitak in na ne ding ahi.

EZEKIEL 4: 11Tuite leng teh vek in na dawn ding ahi, hin khat seh guk suah seh khat ahi ding ahi, hunbi neitak in na dawn ding ahi. 12Amitmuh un mihing ekgaw sing dia zang in na kang ding a, buhman tanghou nek in na ne ding,” achi hi. 13Huchi in Toupa'n, “Hichibang an thanghuai Israel suante'n ka delhmangna ding namte lak ah ane ding uh,” achi hi. 14Huan ke'n, “Eh! Toupa Pathian, Ngai dih, ka hinna hihnit ahi ngei kei a, ka tuailai a kipan tutan in leng, amah sih a si hiam, gamsa keih hiam ka ne ngei nai kei a, sa kihhuai ka kam ah alut ngei nai kei hi,” ka chi hi. 15Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “En in, mihing ek sik in bawng ek ka hon pia, huaite zang in nek dingte na bawl ding hi,” achi hi. 16Huai lou leng ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, ngai dih, Jerusalem ah, an hinna bul ka hihse ding a, a-an uh teh vek in lauthawngtak in ane ding uh; tui leng teh vek in, lungkhamtak in adawn ding uhi. 17An leh tui tasam a, lungkhamtak a ki-entuah a, agitlouhna ua athammang khitna ding un.”

EZEKIEL 5: 2Seh thum a khen seh khat sim a a-om sung nite abei hun chiang in khopi lai a mei ah na hal ding ahi; seh thum a khen seh khat nawn na la dia, akim ah namsau in na satnen ding ahi; huan, seh thum a khen seh khat nawn huih mutleng ding in na thehzak ding a, ke'n namsau in ka delhzui ding hi. 3Huan tawmchik na la ding a, na puanaktual mong ah na tun ding hi. 4Hiaite lak a tam lou na la ding a, mei ah na thehlut ding a, na hal ding ahi; huai a kipan in Israel inkote tengteng ah mei ahong pawt ding,” achi hi. 5Ezekiel Samtanna 1“Huan nang mihing tapa, namsau hiam mahmah la inla, na lu leh na khamul metna ding in sammetmi tem zang in; huan bukna la inla, sam khen in. 6Namte sang a nakpi a gitlouhna hih zaw in ka thugel tung ah ahel a, akim a gamte sang a thupizaw in ka dan bawl tung ah ahel uhi. Ka thugelte apaikhia ua, ka dan bawlte bang in a-om kei uhi.” 7Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na kim a namte sang a buai hatzaw in na om a, ka dan thusehte bawl bang in na om kei a, ka thukhennate leng na zui kei ua, namte a dia ka thukhendan a na hih louh ziak un, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: 8Ngai un, kei, kei nangawn in leng ka hon nang ahi, namte mitmuh ngei in na lak uah vaihawmna ka tangtungsak ding hi. 9Na kihhuaina tengteng uh ziak in thil ka hih ngei nai louh, hih leng ka hih ngei nawn louh ding na tung uah ka hih ding hi.

EZEKIEL 5: 10Huchi in pate'n na sung ah atate uh ane ding ua, tate'n leng apate uh ane ding uh; nang a mikhosuaksun tengteng ka dalhsak vek ding.” 11Huchi in hiai Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi: “Na nitna leh na kihhuainate a ka mun siangthou na hihnit ziak in, kei ka hin bang in, ka hon kiamsak ding a, ka mit in ahon maih het kei ding a, ka hon hehpih sam kei ding hi. 12Seh thum a khen seh khat hipi in hiam, kial in hiam na lak uah asi ding uh; seh thum a khen seh khat nawn ka hihdalh ding a, namsau in ka delhzui ding hi.” 13Hichibang in ka hehna ka tangtungsak ding a, atung uah ka hehna ka lungdamsak ding a, ka om anuamta ding hi; kei Toupa'n atung ua ka hehna ka lungdamsak hun chiang in phatuamngaitak in ka genta chih atheikhe ding uh. 14Huai lou in, na kim a namte lak ah leh vialvak tengtengte mitmuh in kho segawp leh simmohhuai in ka hon bawl ding hi. 15Huchi in thangpai leh heh mahmah a, nakpi a taihilh a, na tung a thugelte ka tunsak hun in na kim a namte mitmuh in nuihsan leh kouna leh hilhna leh mulkimhuai na hi ding; kei Toupa'n ka chita hi. 16Atung uah kialna thaltang hoih loutak manna ding, noumau manna ding ka hon kesak ding; na tung uah kialna ka uangsak ding a, na an uh, hinna bul ka hihse ding hi. 17Huchi in na tung uah kialna leh gamsa hangte ka hon sawl ding a, ta leh nau tan in ahon laksak ding uh; hipi leh sisan suahna na lak uah aleng ding a; na tung uah namsau ka hon sawl ding, kei Toupa'n ka chita hi, chi in.

EZEKIEL 6: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: 2“Mihing tapa, Israel tang lam nga inla, akiang uah thu gen inla, 3Israel tangte aw, Toupa Pathian thu ngaikhia un; Toupa Pathian in tangte leh mualte kiang ah, leh phaizangte leh kuamte kiang ah hichi in achi: Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in na tung uah namsau ka hon lik ding a, na mun sangte uh ka hihse vek ding. 4Na maitamte uh loihsan in a-om ding a, na ni pathian limte uh akitamzan ding; na mithah luangte uh na milimte uh ma ah ka pai ding hi. 5Amilimte uh ma ah Israel suante luang ka koihkhawm ding a, na guhte uh na maitam kim uah ka thehzak ding hi. 6Milim Biakna Mohpaihna 7Huan na lak uah mithahte apuk ding ua, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 8“Himahleh gam chih a na dalhzak hun chiang un namte lak ah namsau a suakta a-om ding ziak un akhen ka hon hawi ding. 9Huan na lak ua kipan a pawtte'n sal a apina namte uh lak ah kei ahon theigige ding ua, a-angkawmna lungtang uh ka lakmang sakleh amit uh, amilim lam ua angkawmte ka hihsiat sakdante athei ding uh; thil gilou a na hih ziak uleh akihhuai ziak un amau mitmuh ngei in leng kihhuai akisa ding uh. 10Huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding ua, hiai thil hoih lou akiang uah ka hih ding a, amawk in ka chi kei chih athei ding uh, chi in,” achi hi. 11Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na khut beng in na khe pek inla, Maizen! Israel inkote kihhuaina gitlouh ziak maw! Namsau in, kial in, hipi in apuk ding uhi.

EZEKIEL 6: 12Gamlapi a om hipi in asi ding ua, anai a om namsau in apuk ding ua, aval, um a omte kial in asi ding uh; hichibang in ka hehna mahmah atung uah ka bukimsak ding hi. 13Mual sang teng ah, tang vumte ah leh sing hing peuhmah nuai ah leh tosaw bawkpha chih nuai a amilimte uh kiang a gimlim alatna mun ua amaitam kim ua amilimte uh lak a amisi luangte uh a-om hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. 14Atung uah ka khut ka lik ding a, gamdai a kipan Diblah lam a atenna mun tengteng uh gamsia suaksak in ka loihsan vek ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.

EZEKIEL 7: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, 2“Nang mihing tapa, Toupa Pathian in Israel gam kiang ah hichi in achi: Tawpna, tawpna gam ning li ah ahong tung hi. 3“Tu nang a ding in tawpna ahi, na tung ah ka hehna ka hon tungsak ding a, na omdan bang zel in vai ka hon hawmsak ding a, na kihhuaina tengteng na tung ah ka hon tun ding hi. 4Ka mit in ahon maih kei dia, ka hon hehpih sam kei ding hi; na omdan bang in na tung ah ka hon tun zaw ding a, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.” 5Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Siatna, siatgawpna mah, ngai dih, ahong tung hi. 6Tawpna ahong tung hi, tawpna ahong tung hi, na tung ah ahong thouta, ngai in, ahong tung hi. 7Israelte Hun Tawp Naina 9Huan ka mit in ahon maih kei dia, ka hon hehpih sam kei ding; na omdan bang zel in na tung ah ka hon tun ding a, na kihhuaina leng na lak uah a-om ding; huchi in kei Toupa gawt theipa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 10“Ngai in, ani, ngai in, ahong tung hi, na siatna ding apawtta, satna chiang apakta, kisaktheihna apakmumta hi. 11Hiamgamna gitlouhna chiang asuakta ahi; kua mahmah a-omta kei ding a, ahusa uhiam, ahauhsakna uhiam leng; kuamah in a-it sam kei ding uh. 12“Hun ahong tungta, ani ahong naita; aleimi kipak kei henla, akhawngmi leng dah kei hen; thangpaihna avek ua tung ah a-omta hi. 13Azuakmi in, dam lai mahleh, athil zuak amu nawn kei ding; muhkholhna zaw avek ua tungthu ahi a, kuamah akik kei ding uh, kuamah ahinna thulimlouhna uah akhosa suak sam kei ding uh. 14Pengkul amut ua, bangkim akimanta; himahleh kidouna ah kuamah ahoh kei uh;

EZEKIEL 7: avek ua tung a ka hehna a-om ziak in.Israel Khelhna Ziak A Sawina 15“Inpua ah namsau, asung ah hipi leh kial; gam a om namsau in asi ding ua, khopi a om kial leh hipi in ane khin ding hi. 16Himahleh ataikhete, apawt ding ua, tangte ah phaizang gam vakhu bang in; avek un, lungzuangtak in amau thulimlouhna chiat ah a-om ding uh. 17Khut tengteng azaw ding a, khuk tengteng tui bang in anem ding. 18Sai-ip puan ateng ding ua, mulkimna in amau atuam ding a, mel chiteng ah zumna alang ding a, alutang tengteng uh agiau khin ding hi. 19Adangkasik uh leh adangka-engte un Toupa heh ni chiang in ahunkhe thei kei ding a, ahinna uh ataisak kei ding a, agil uh avahsak sam kei ding; athulimlouhna uh pukna ahih khit tak ziak in. 20Akizepna kilawmna uh akisaktheihpih ua, akihhuaina milim un leh anitna thil un asuaksak zaw lel uhi; huaiziak in amau a ding in thilkihhuai ding in ka na bawlta hi. 21“Huan gallak ding in namdang khut ah ka pe dia, lei a migiloute kiang ah gallak ding in ka pe ding a, amau ana hihnin ding uh. 22Amaute ka nungngatsan ding a, ka mun siang ahihnin ding uh; huan guta ahong lut dia, ahihnin ding uh. 23“Gamsung lah sisan suah hat vaihawmna a dim a, hiamgamna a khopi adim ziak in khainiang bawl un. 24Huchi in namdang giloupente ka hon pilut ding a a-innte uh aneihsak ding ua; ahatna otpih uh ka hihtawp ding a, amun siangte uh hihnit in a-om ding hi. 25Lungzinna ahong tung a, muanna azong ua, a-om het kei hi.

EZEKIEL 7: 26Siatna tung ah siatsemna, thuthang tung ah thuthang ahong om ding a, zawlnei lak ah kilakna azong ding ua, himahleh dante siampu lak ah amang ding a, upate lak ah thudot a-om kei ding hi. 27Kumpipa adah ding a, kumpi tapa lungdonna puansilh in akivan ding a, vantang khut leng aling ding. Akiang uah a-omdan bang un ka hih ding a, athilhih bang zel un vai ka hawmsak ding; huan Toupa ka hi chih atheita ding uh,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 8: 1Akum gukna, akha gukna, huai kha ani nga ni in hichi ahong hi a, ka inn a ka tut a, Judah upate ka ma a atut lai un Toupa Pathian khut ka tung ah ahong om hi. 2Huchi in ka en a, ngai in, mi meikuang bang a kimu ahong om a; akawng chiang nuailam hi dia kilawm meikuang bang ahi a; akawng chiang tunglam bel sik hal-ap bang a vaktak ahi. 3Huchi in khut melput ahon sawkkhia a, ka talsam a hon man in, kha in lei leh van kikal ah ahon domkang a, Pathian kilakna in Jerusalem ah ahon pi hi, Jerusalem mallam huang sungnung kongpi khakna kiang ahon tun a, huai ah mullitna lim tutna mun a-om a, huai in amullitsak hi. 4Huan ngai in, phaizang a ka muh bang mah in huai ah Israel' Pathian thupina a-om hi. 5Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, mallam nga in na mitsuan dih ve leh,” achi hi. Huchi in mallam nga in ka mit ka suan a, ngai in, maitam kongpi mallam lutna ah hiai mullitna lim ana om hi. 6Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, athilhih uh na mu hia? Israel inkote'n thilkihhuai mahmah, hiai a ahih ngei uh, ka inn siangthou a kipan a gamla a ka paimangna ding a ahih uh? Himahleh thil dang kihhuaizaw na mu nawn lai ding,” achi hi. 7Huan huangsung lutna ah ahon pi a; ka en a, baang ah vang ana om hi. 8Ezekiel In Pathian Amuh Nihveina(8.1—10.22)Jerusalem A Milim Biakna 9Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Lut inla, hiai a khelhna kihhuaitak ahih uh en dih,” achi hi. 10Huchi in ka lut a, ka mu a, ngai in, thil hing chi chih limte, gamsa kihhuai limte, Israel inkote milim tengteng baang ah akimvel in ana tuang hi.

EZEKIEL 8: 11Huan ama uah Israel inkuan, upate lak a mi sawmsagihte adingh ua, alaitak uah Sephan tapa Jaazaniah adingh a, michih in belhbu atawi chiat ua; huan gimlim khu gim azamtou ngoingoi hi. 12Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Israel inkuan upate mial nuai a thilhih na mu hia? Michih in milim dantan a ahih uh? Toupa'n ahon mu kei a, Toupa'n gam apaisanta aka,” achi uhi. 13Ka kiang ah, “Athilhih uh kihhuai sem dang leng na mu nawn lai ding,” achi lai hi. 14Huchi in Toupa' inn mallam panglutna kongkhak ah ahon pi a, ngai dih, huai ah numeite Tammuz ngai in kap in atu uhi. 15Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Aw mihing tapa, hiai na mu hia? Hiai sang a kihhuaizaw sem na mu nawn lai ding,” achi hi. 16Huan Toupa' inn um sungnungzaw ah ahon pilut a, ngai in, Toupa tempul lutna ah inliim leh maitam kikal ah mi sawmnih-le-nga, Toupa tempul lam anungngat a, amaite uh suahlam nga in ana om ua, suahlam ah ni ana bia uhi. 17Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai na mu hia, aw mihing tapa, athilkihhuai hih uh, hiai ahih uh Judah inkote a ding in thil neutham ahi hia? Gam hiamgamna in ahihdim ua, hon hehsak nawn sem ua, anak uah singhiang abat uhi. 18Huaiziak in ke'n leng hehtak in ka hih ding a; ka mit in amaih kei dia, ka hehpih sam kei ding; aw ngaihtak in ka bil ah hong kikou mah le uh ka ngaikhe kei ding,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 9: 1Huchi in bil a ka zak in, “Khopi kem mite michih hihmanna van tawi in hong nai uhen,” chi in ngaihtak in akikou hi. 2Huan ngai in, mallam kongpi tungnung paina a kipan in mi guk ahong pai ua, michih in hihlupna van atawi chiat ua; alai ua mi khat puanmalngat silh in laituibuk akuah hi. Alut ua, dal maitam kiang ah adingh uhi. 3Huan Israel' Pathian thupina a omna cherub a kipan in huai inn kongpi kiang ah apaitou a; puanmalngat silh, laituibuk kuahpa asam hi. 4Toupa'n akiang ah, “Khopi sung tawnsuak inla, Jerusalem tawnsuak in; asung a thilkihhuai hihsate ziak atunggik a kapte atal uah chiamteh in,” achi hi. 5Huan midangte kiang ah ka zak mahmah in, “Anung ah khopi tawnsuak unla, khut kha un, na mit un mumaih kei henla, hehpih sam kei un. 6Putekte, tangvalte, nungakte, naupangte leh nute that siang vek un. Chiamtehna neite bel hon naih kei un; ka Mun Siangthou ah pan un,” achi hi. Huchi in inn kong a upate ah apan uhi. 7Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Inn hihbuah unla, ahuangsungte mi luang in dimsak unla, pawt un,” achi hi. Huan apawtta ua, khopi ah agamtangta uhi. 8Huan hichi ahong hi a, khopi ah agamtat lai un kei bel nutsiat in ka na om a, akhup in ka puk hi. “Ah! Toupa Pathian, Jerusalem tung a na hehna na sunbuak ah Israel khosuaksunte leng hihman vek sawm na hi hiam?” chi in ka kikou hi. 9Jerusalem Sawi In A-om 10Kei toh kisai in leng, ka mit in amau ka mumaih kei ding a, ka hehpih sam kei ding hi; agitlouhna uh avekpi in amau ka khusak ding,” achi hi. 11Huchi in ngai in, puanmalngat silh a laituibuk kuahpa'n thu atun a, “N'on thupiak bang in ka hih khinta,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 10: 1Huchi in ka en a, ngai in, cherubte lutung a vansin om ah sapphir suang hileh kilawmtak, laltutphah bangtak a kimu ahong lang hi. 2Ama'n puanmalngat silhpa kiang ah, “Cherub nuai a kangtalai peite kikal ah va lut inla, cherubte kikal a meivu na khut langnih dim in va luak inla, khopi tung ah thehzak in,” achi hi. 3Ka mitmuh lai mahmah in akuanta hi. Huan mi ahoh lai in tempul taklam pang ah cherubte adingh ua; huang sungnungpen meipi in adimta hi. 4Toupa thupina cherubte a kipan apaitou a, inn kongpi tung ah ava dinghta a, huai inn meipi in adim a, Toupa thupina vak in huangsung adimta hi. 5Cherubte khazap gingte huangsung ponungzaw leng Pathian Bangkim hihthei in ahon houpih lai a a-om bang mai in akiza hi. 6Huan hichi ahong hi a, puanmalngat silhpa kiang ah, “Cherubte kikal a kangtalai pei kikal a kipan mei va la in,” chi a thu apiakleh, amah ava lut a, kangtalai liimte bul ah ava dinghta hi. 7Huan cherubim, cherubte kikal a kipan in, cherubte kikal a mei om sawk in, ala a, puanmalngat silhpa khut ah apia a, ama'n ana la a, apawtkheta hi. 8Huchi in cherubte bel akha nuai uah mihing khut bangtak ahong lang a. 9Huan ka en a, ngai in, cherubte sik ah kangtalai liim li, cherub khat kiang ah, kangtalai liim khat, cherub dang kiang ah kangtalai liim dang ka mu a; kangtalai liim latdan bel beril suang zia bang ahi. 10Pathian Thupina In Tempul Anusia 11Apai chiang un sik li in apai thei ua, apai un leng akihei ngei kei uh; himahleh amasa ngatna lam azui zel ua, apai un akihei tuan kei uh.

EZEKIEL 10: 12Huan apumpi uh apum in anungte uh, akhutte uh, akhate uleh kangtalai liimte leng akim in mit in adim a, ali ua kangtalai liimte leng. 13Akangtalai liimte bil a ka zak mahmah in, “Kangtalai liimte kipei,” chih ahi. 14Michih in mel li chiat anei ua, mel khat cherub mel ahi a, anihna mihing mel ahi a, athumna humpinelkai mel, alina muvanlai mel ahi. 15Huchi in cherubte apaitou ua; hiai bel Kebar lui gei a thil hing ka muh ahi. 16Huan cherubte apai uleh kangtalai liimte leng agei uah apai tei a, cherubte'n lei a kipan paitou ding a akhate uh azak uleh kangtalai liimte'n alehngatsan ngei kei uh. 17Adin uleh hiaite adingh tei ua, apaitouh uleh hiaite leng apai tei zel ua, thil hingte kha amau ah a-om hi. 18 Toupa thupina inpi kongpi tung a kipan apawtkhia a, cherubte tung ah adinghta hi. 19Huan cherubte'n akha uh azak ua, apawt un ka mitmuh mahmah in lei a kipan apaitou ua; kangtalai liimte akiang uah a-om zel a; huan Toupa Inn lutna suahlam kongkhak chin ah adinghta a; Israel' Pathian thupina atung uah a-om hi. 20Hiai bel Kebar lui a Israel' Pathian nuai a ka thil hing muh mah ahi; cherubte ahi uh chih ka thei hi. 21Avek un maitang li leh kha li anei chiat ua, akha nuai uah mihing khut bang mai a-om hi. 22Huan amel lam uh ahihleh Kebar lui a ka muh melte mah bang, alatdan uleh amau mahmah leng ahi uh; huan amazawn zel uah apai chiat uhi.

EZEKIEL 11: 1Huan kha in ahon domkang a, Toupa' inn suahlam lutna, suahlam muhna ahon tun a; ngai in, lutna kongkhak chin ah mi sawmnih-le-nga ana om ua; alak uah Azzur tapa Jaazaniah leh Benaiah tapa Pelatiah, mipi heutute ka mu hi. 2Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiaite gitlouhna sawmkhete ahi ua, hiai khopi a gitlouh sawmkhe mite ahi uh. 3Inn lam hun ahi nai kei; hiai khopi sa uina bel ahi a, eite asa i hi uh,” chite. 4“Huaiziak in thu gen inla, aw mihing tapa, atung uah thu gen in,” achi hi. 5Huan ka tung ah Toupa kha ahong tung a, ama'n ka kiang ah, “Gen in, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hichibang in na hihsek ua, aw Israel inkote aw, na lungsim ua thil hong tungte ka theisiang vek hi. 6Hiai khopi ah na mithahte uh na pungsak huthut ua, akongzingte na mithah un na dimsakta uhi.” 7Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na mithah uh alai a na koihte uh asa ahi ua; hiai khopi ahihleh sa uina bel ahi, himahleh alai a kipan suankhiak in na om ding uhi. 8Namsau na kihta ua, na tung uah namsau ka hon tun ding, Toupa Pathian in achi. 9“Alai a kipan ka hon pawtkhesak ding a, namdangte khut ah ka hon mansak ding a, na tungthu uh angaihtuah ding uh. 10Namsau in na si ding ua, Israel gamgi lam ah na tungthu uh ka ngaihtuah ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 11Jerusalem Mohpaih In A-om 12Huan Toupa ka hi chih na theita ding uh, ka dan bawl na zui kei ua, ka thupawt leng na zui sam kei ua; na kim ua namte hihdan na zui zawta uh, achi,” chi in.

EZEKIEL 11: 13Huan hichi ahong hi a, thu ka genleh Benaiah tapa Pelatiah ana sita mai a, huchi in ka khuppuk a, aw ngaihtak a kikou in, “Ah, Toupa Pathian, Israel khosuaksunte chimihna na bawl ding a hia?” ka chi hi.Saltangte Kiang A Pathian Thuchiam 14Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah, 15“Mihing tapa, na unaute, na chi-le-kuangte ngei leh Israel inkote tengteng, avek un, Jerusalem luah mite'n Toupa a kipan paimang un, hiai gam kou a dia piak ahita hi,” achihnate uh ahi uhi. 16Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Gamlapi ah namte lak ah ka suanmang a, gam tampi ah ka hihdalh na a, sawt lou kal in ava tunna gam uah amaute a ding in Mun Siangthou ka hi ding,” achi hi. 17Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Namdangte a kipan in ka hon pikhawm nawn ding a, na dalhna gam ua kipan ka hon kaikhawm nawn ding a, Israel gam ka hon pe ding hi. 18Huchi in huai ah ahong pai ding ua, thil huathuai tengteng leh thilkihhuaite a kipan alamang ding uhi. 19Lungtang khat ka pe ding a, na sung uah lungsim thak ka koih ding. Huan asa ua kipan lungtangsak ka lamang ding a, akiang uah lungtang nem ka pe ding hi. 20Ka dan thusehte azuih ua, ka thupiakte avom ua, ahihtheihna ding un, huchi in ka mite ahi ding ua, kei leng a Pathian uh ka hi ding. 21Ahuathuaina uleh akihhuaina laigil lungtang zuite bel akhelhna uh avek in amau ka khusak ding, Toupa Pathian in achi.Pathian Thupina In Jerusalem Anusia 22Huchi in cherubte'n akhate uh azak ua, akiang uah kangtalai liimte a-om a, atung uah Israel' Pathian thupina a-om hi. 23Khopi lai a kipan in Toupa thupina apaitou a, khopi suahlam pang a tang sang ah ava dinghta hi. 24Huan kha in ahon domkang a, kilakna ah Pathian kha in Kaldai gam a saltangte kiang ah ahon tun hi. Huchi in ka kilakna muh in ahon paitouhsanta hi. 25Huchi in saltangte kiang ah Toupa'n thil ahon etsak tengteng ka genta hi.

EZEKIEL 12: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, 2“Mihing tapa, helhat inkuan, muhna ding mit nei a mu lou, zakna ding bil nei a zaloute lak a om na hi; helhat inkuan ahih himhim ziak un. 3“Huaiziak in nang mihing tapa, saltanna a pai ding bang in na vante lomgak dimdiam inla, sun khovak ah amitmuh mahmah un paikhia in; amuh mahmah na mun ua kipan mun dang ah na paikhe ding ahi; helhat inkuan ahi ua, akingaihtuah loh kha mai ding uh. 4Huan na van sun khovak in amitmuh mahmah uah, saltang pai ding van lakkhiak in na lakhe ding a, nang mahmah leng amitmuh uah gamdang a khakmang ding pai in na pai ding ahi. 5Amitmuh mahmah uah kulhbaang vangsak inla, huai ah lakhia in. 6Amitmuh mahmah uah na po ding a, mial ah na paikhe ding a, lei na muhlouhna ding in na mai na khuh ding ahi; Israel inkote a ding in etsak kholhna ding in nang ka hon bawl ahi ngal a,” achi hi. 7Huchi in ahon thupiak bang in ka hihta a, ka van saltang ding van bang in sun khovak in ka lakhia a, ka khut in baang ka sunvang a, khomial lai in ka lakhia a, amitmuh mahmah uah ka pua hi. 8Huan zingsang in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. 9Mihing tapa, Israel inkuan, helhat inkuante'n na kiang ah, “Bang hih na hia?” ahon chi uh ahi kei maw? 10Akiang uah, “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Hiai thuphuan Jerusalem heutute leh Israel inkote pumpi, a-omna uh mite tungthu ding ahi. 11Nou a ding in etsak kholhna ka hi a, ka chih bang geih a atung ua hih ahi ding; khakmang in, saltang ding in apaimang ding uh,” chi in.

EZEKIEL 12: 12“Huan alak ua heutu omsun in mial nuai ah aliang in apo ding a, apaikhe ding; alakkhiakna ding un baang avangsak ua, amit in gam amuh nawn louh ziak in amai akhuh ding ahi. 12Galtai A Om Bang Limching Zawlnei 13Amah ka len in ka khuh ding a, ka thang a awk ahi ding; Kaldai gam a Babulon ah ka hon pi ding a, muh zaw amu kei ding; huai ah asi ding hi. 14Amah panpih dia akiang a omte leh asepaihte tengteng gam chih ah ka hihzak ding a, namsau dokkhia in ka delh ding hi. 15“Huan namte lak a ka delhzak a, gam chih a ka hihdalh hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. 16Himahleh namsau, kial, hipi a kipan mi tawmchik ka hawi ding; huaite'n ahong paina gam ua namte kiang ah akihhuaina tengteng aphuanna ding un; kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.Zawlnei Linna 17Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi. 18“Mihing tapa, na an ling vonvon kawm in ne inla, na tui lungzing a ling kawm in dawn in. 19Huan gam a mite kiang ah Toupa Pathian in Jerusalem a tengte tungtang ah leh Israel gam tungtang ah hichi in achi: Lau kawm in a-ante uh ane ding ua, lungzingtak in atui uh adawn ding ua, agamsung a tengte hiamgamna ziak in asung a thil om tengteng a kipan hihgawp in a-om ding hi. 20Huchi in mite tenna khopite loihsan in a-om ding a, agam hihsiat in a-om ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.Paunak Minthang Leh Limsak Louh Thugen 21Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi: 22“Mihing tapa, Israel gam a hiai paunak na neih uh bang chihna ahia?

EZEKIEL 12: Anite asawt chiang in kilakna peuhmah avuaksuak nawn zel,” na chih uh. 23Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Hiai paunak ka hihbei ding a, Israel gam ah azang nawn ngei kei ding uh; kilakna tundik ni ding anaita, chi in akiang uah gen zaw in. 24“Israel inkuante lak ah kilakna hong vuaksuak leh aisan hoih lam a maitang phatna a-omta kei ding. 25Toupa ka hi a, ka gen ding a, ka gen tangtun ahi ding a, sit ahi kei ding; Aw helhat inkuante aw, na dam lai mahmah un thu ka gen ding hi, ka tangtungsak pah ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” achi hi. 26 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, 27“Mihing tapa, ngai in, ‘Israel inkote a min kilakna amuhte bel ni tampi a ding ahi a, agenkholhte leng gamlapi a ding ahi,’ ” achi uhi. 28Huaiziak in akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ka thu bangmah sit ahi kei ding a, ka thugen peuhmah hihtangtun in a-om zaw ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in hilh in,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 13: 1Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, 2“Mihing tapa, Israel zawlnei, amah lungtang kia a kipan a gen chingte tung ah thu gen inla, ‘Toupa thu ngai un.’ ” 3Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, “Zawlnei hai, amau ngaihdan zui a, bangmah muloute tung agik hi! 4Aw Israel, na zawlneite khopi sesa a sehal om bang lel ahita uh. 5Toupa ni a kidouna a dingzou ding a kulhbaang dingkipsak ding leh Israel inkote hum ding a kulhbaang lam ding in na paitou kei uhi.” 6“Toupa thupawt ahi,” chi mite'n bangmah lou lel leh genkholhna lim lel atang ua, Toupa sawl ahi kei uh; athu uh hi ngei ding bang in mite agingtasak ua. 7Kilakna hong vuaksuak lel na mu un, thugenkholh diklou na gen uh ahi kei maw? “Toupa thupawt ahi,” na chi nawn ngal ua, ke'n ka gen a hia? 8Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Bangmah lou phet na gen ua zuau lel na muh ziak un, ngai un, ka hon nang ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. 9Huan ka khut in bangmah lou mute leh zuau genkhol mite anang ding a, ka mite kidotkhawmna ah atel kei ding ua, Israel inkuante min gelhna ah gelh in a-om sam kei ding uh; huchi in Toupa Pathian ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 10Galmuanna omloupi a, “Muanna,” chi a mite apimang ziak un leh mi baang bawl a, sunu nuh mite'n, 11“Ake nawn mai ding, vuahpi ahong zu ding a, nou gial lianpite aw, na hong ke ding ua, huih thupi in ahihse ding,” chi in.

EZEKIEL 13: 12Ngai un, baang achip khit chiang in, “Na sunu nuh uh koi ah, ahon chi kei ding ua hia?” 13“Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ka heh in huihpi thupi in ka hihse vek ding, ka heh in vuahpi ahong zu ding a, ka heh in gial thupitak hihmang ding in ahong ke ding. 13Zawlnei Taklou Pasalte Kalh A Thugen 14Huchi in sunu na nuhngou bang uh ka chimsak ding a, lei pha in achim dia, huchi in asuangphumte adawk hial ding hi; huan achim ding a, baang kichim ah hihmang in na om ding uh; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 15“Hichibang in baang tung ah leh sunu nuh mite tung ah ka hehna ka damsak ding; huan, baang a-om nawn kei a, abaang zutte leng a-om nawnta kei uh, ka hon chi ding hi. 16Huai bel Israel zawlnei Jerusalem tungthu gen a, galmuanna omloupi a galmuanna musak mite ngei, a-om nawn kei uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Numei Zawlnei Dikloute Kalh A Genkholhna 17“Nang mihing tapa, na mite tanute, alungtang lel ua gen mite masuan inla, amaute kalh in thu gen in, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: 18Numei, mite ban a sik bunsak leh mi hinnate mat belhna ding a miliante lukhuhna khui mite atung uh agik hi!
