Nou hinna ding in ka mite hinna na man ding uh maw? 19Buhman tawmchik leh tanghou them mu ding a si lou ding sisak ding leh hing lou ding hingsak ding in na zuaugen uh ka mite'n a-up ziak un ka mite lak ah ka min athanghuai ahi. 20“Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, mi hinna, vasa bang a man ding a na thil butsakte uh ka mudah ahi;

EZEKIEL 13: na bante uh ka bot ding a, na mimat dingte uh vasa bang a na mat dingte uh hinna ka pawtsak vek ding hi. 21Na lukhuhnate uh leng ka botkek ding a, ka mite na khut ua kipan ka suaktasak ding, na mat theih ding un na khut uah a-omta kei ding uh; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 22“Kei lungkhamsak hilou a, midiktatte lungtang zuau a na hihnat ziak un leh migilou hingdam a a-omna ding a akhelhna lampi a kipan akilehheilouhna ding in migilou khutte na hihhat uh ahi. 23Huaiziak in bangmah lou lel, thugenkholh diklou hiam zaw na mu nawn kei ding uh; huan na khut ua kipan ka mite ka hunkhe ding a, Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh, achi, chi in gen in,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 14: 1Huchi in Israel upa khenkhatte ka kiang ah ahong pai ua, ka ma ah atu ua. 2Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tungta, ka kiang ah; 3“Mihing tapa, hiai mite'n amilimte uh alungtang uah alalut ua, ama uah athulimlouhna pukna uh akoih uhi; kei ahon dong peuhmah ding ua hia?” 4Huaiziak in amau houpih inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Israel inkuan a michih alungtang ua milim lalut a, ama ua athulimlouhna pukna koih a, zawlnei kiang a hong pai peuhmah, kei Toupa'n amilim uh tamdan bang zel in ka dawng ding. 5Israel inkote amilim uh ziak a hon na omtuamsan ziak ua alungtang ua ka mattheihna ding in.” 6Huaiziak in Israel inkote kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Hong kik unla, na milimte ua kipan in hong kik un, na kihhuaina tengteng uh lehngatsan un. 7“Israel inkote lak a mi kuapeuh hiam, mikhual Israel gam a teng hiam, kei a kipan a kihihtuam, alungtang ua milim lalut a, ama ua thulimlouhna pukna koih kawm a, atungtang ua hon dong ding a zawlnei kiang a hoh kei leh Toupa ngei in ka dawng ding hi. 8Huai mi ka masuan ding a, mi'n lamdang asak ding in tangtawn tangtawn a gen ding in ka mite lak a kipan ka hihmang ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uhi. 9“Huan zawlnei khem a om in thu gen henla, kei Toupa'n zawlnei ka thuzoh ahi a, atung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, ka mi Israelte lak a kipan ka hihmang ding. 10Athulimlouhna uh apo ding ua; zawlnei thulimlouhna amah dong mite thulimlouhna bang mai ahi ding hi.

EZEKIEL 14: 11Israel inkote kei a kipan aman nawn louh ua, atatleknate tengteng ua akihihnit nawn samlouhna ding un, ka mite ahih zawk ua a Pathian uh ka hihtheihna ding in, Toupa Pathian in achi, chi in gen in,” achi hi.Noah, Daniel Leh Job 12 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: 13“Mihing tapa, gam mite'n tatlekna thilhih a, ka tung a thil hihkhial a, ke'n ka khut ka lik a, a-an uh, hinna bul ka hihsiat a, atung ua kial ka tunsak a, mi leh sate ka hon hihmanleh hiai mi thum, 14Pathian In Milim Biak Mohpaih 15Gam sahangte a gam uh ka tuansuaksak a, gam ahihsiat ua, ahong kigawp a, gamsa ziak a kuamah paisuak ding a-om kei uleh, 16hiai mi thumte om le uh, kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, atanute uh, atapate uh ahumbit tuan kei ding uh; amau kia hotdam in a-om ding ua, gam asegawp ding hi. 17Ahihkeileh huai gam ah namsau ka lik dia, “Namsau aw, gamsung teng tawnsuak in,” mi leh gamsa ka gawimang ding hi. 18Hiai mi thumte om le uh leng, kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, atanute uh, atapate uh ahumbit tuan kei ding ua, amau hinna kia humbit in a-om ding uh. 19Ahihkeileh, huai gam ah, hipi ka hon lensak a, mi leh sa hihmang ding a sisan suah a ka hehna huai gam tung a ka hon sunleh; 20Noah, Daniel leh Job hial leng na om le uh, kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, atanu uhiam, atapa uhiam ahumbit kei ding ua, adiktatna un amau hinna ngei ahumbit lel ding uhi.

EZEKIEL 14: 21Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a, “Jerusalem tung a ka vaihawmna na mahmah lite, namsaute, kialte, gam sahangte, hipite, mi leh sa gawimang vek ding a ka hon tut hun chiang in bangzah a thupi ahi diam aw? 22Himahleh ngai in, huai lai a akhosuaksun pikhiak dingte nutsiat in a-om ding ua, tanute leh tapate leng; ngai un, akiang uah ahong pawtkhe ding ua, a-omdan uh athilhihte na mu ding uh, Jerusalem tung a thil hoih lou ka hon tut thu ah lungmuan in na om ding ua, atung a ka hon tut tengteng thu ah leng. 23A-omdan uleh athilhihte uh na muh hun chiang un ahon lungmuan ding uh; atung a ka thilhih tengteng hihsan nei lou in ka hih kei chih na thei ding uh chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in.

EZEKIEL 15: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: 2“Mihing tapa, sing dang sang in gammang nuai a sing lak a grepgui bang ahi tuam a le? 3Thil bawlna dia asing zat ahi hia? Tui-um belsuan khaina ding in kua'n azang ngei a le? 4Ngai in, mei a paihlut ahi a, toh ding in mei in akangmang, among langnih, akang khin a alai ah phattuamna anei a hia? 5Ngai in, abit lai nangawn in aphatuam kei; akatmang khit nung in, phatuam sin kei na tel e!” 6Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Gamnuai sing lak a grep guite, toh ding in mei ah ka khul maimah bang in, Jerusalem luah mite ka bawl ding. 7Amau ka masuan ding a, pawt mah le uh, mei a kipan, akangbei ding, mei in, Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh; amaute ka masuan hun chiang in. 8Agam uh ka hihgawp ngei ding ahi, thulimlouhna ahih ziak un chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. 15Grepgui Tungthu Gentehna

EZEKIEL 16: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, 2“Mihing tapa, Jerusalem akihhuainate theikhesak inla, akiang ah, 3Toupa Pathian in Jerusalem kiang ah hichi in achi: Na pawtna gam leh na pianna gam Kanaan mite gam ahi a, na pa Amor mi ahi a, na nu Hit mi ahi. 4Huan na pianna thu bel na pian ni in na laigui at ahi kei a, nang hihsiang ding a tui a sil na hi sam kei, chi nuh na tuak kei a, tuamlum na hi kei. 5Lainat ding a na tung a hiaite hih ding in kuamah mit in nang ahon hehpih kei ua; gamlak a paihkhiak na hita, na pian ni a kipan kih a om na hi hi.” 6Huan na kiang a ka hong pai in sisan lak a kital in ka hon mu a, na kiang ah, “Sisan ah om lechin leng ‘hing in!’ ka hon chi a,” ahi, ka hon chi ahi, “Sisan ah om mah lechin ‘hing in!’ 7Gam thil pakmum bang in ka hon khangsak a, khanglian a piching in, na hong melhoih mahmah hi. Na nawite ahong kisa ua, na sam ahong hoih a; himahleh savuak leh vuaktang lel na hi lailai hi.” 8Huan na kiang a ka hong pai a ka hon et in, deihhuai tham na hong hita a, ka puan ka hon zawn a, na vuaktanna ka hon khuhta hi; ahi, na kiang ah ka kichiam a, thukhun ah ka hon lutpih a, kei a na hita hi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 9Huchi in tui in ka hon sil a, ahi, na sisan ka hon hihsiang sipsip a, sathau ka hon nuh hi. 10Puanzem in ka hon van a, saham vun khedap ka hon bunsak a, puanmalngat hoih in ka hon van a, silk puan ka hon khusak hi.

EZEKIEL 16: 11Kizepna hoih in ka hon zem a, na khut ah taute, na ngawng ah dangka-eng khainiangte. 12Na nak ah nakbulhte, na bil ah bilbahte, na lu ah lallukhu hoihtak in ka hon zem hi. 13Huchi in dangka-eng leh dangkasik a zephoih na hita a, na puansilhte puanmalngat hoihtak leh silk puan leh puankhui kilawm ahi ua; na nek tangbuang nel leh khuaizu leh sathau ahi, na kilawm mahmah a, kumpi chi leng na ching hi. 14Na kilawmna ziak in namte lak ah athangkhia a, ka thupina a kivan in na buchingta, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 15Himahleh na kilawmna na muang lua a, na minthanna na hukloh a, mi vialvak peuh leh na muh peuh na kithuahpih hi. 16Aginom Lou Jerusalem 17Ka dangka-eng leh ka dangkasik tui-um belsuan hoih taktak ka hon piakte na la a, pasal limbawlna ding in na zang, na hukpihta hi. 18Puansilh khui kilawmte na la a, amau na tuam a, ka sathaute leh ka gimlimte ama uah na tung hi. 19Ka hon tanghou piak leng ka tangbuang hoih leh sathau leh khuaizu ka hon vaknate gimlim ding in ama uah na lui a; hichi ahong hita, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 20Huai lou leng na tanu, na tapa, na hon suansakte akiang uah kithoihna ding in zatbei ding in na pia a; na hukna thil namai ahi a hia? 21Ka tate na thah a, meipi a pailut a akiang ua na latte? 22Na kihhuaina leh na hukna tengteng ah na naupan lai avuaktang a na omleh na sisan a na tal maimah hunlaite na thei nawnta kei hi.Kizuak Bang A Jerusalem Hinkhua 23Huan hiai na thulimlouhna tengteng khit in leng, hichi ahong hi a, na tung agik hi! Toupa Pathian in achi hi. 24Mun kiphoute na kibawlna, kongzing chiteng ah mun sangte na lam hi.

EZEKIEL 16: 25Lampi kipatna teng ah mun sang na lam a, na kilawmna kihhuai in na bawl a vialvak peuhmahte kiang ah na kilemdawk a, na hukna a-uang semsem hi. 26Aigupta mi, na inveng, sami mahmah toh kingaihna khelhna leng na hihta; hon hehsak ding in na hukna na uangsakta ahi. 27Huaiziak in ngai in, na tung ah ka khut ka lik a, na an nek ka kiamsak a, nang hon mudah Philistia tanute, na hukdan zumpih mahmah nute kiang ah ut-ut a ahon bawl ding un ka hon peta hi. 28Assuria mite kiang ah leng na kizuak a, huntawk chih lah nei tel lou; ahi, akiang uah kizuak in na pang a, na kham tuan sam kei hi. 29Kanaan gam ah, Kaldai mite kiang ah na hukna na uangsak lailai a, na kham tuan kei hi. 30Nang lungtang sia hina mai e, na tatdan numei genhak gilou mahmah mai thil na hih a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 31Lamka thuam teng a milim biakna inn na bawl a, kongzing chih a mun sang na bawlte loh na delh louh ziak in kizuak leng na bang kei hi. 32Zi angkawm, pasalte sang a mi tuam deihzaw nu! 33Kizuakte kiang ah thil apesek ua, nang bel na lehpiak a hon deihmi ang ah, gam chih a kipan ahong pai ua, ahon kithuahpih theihna ding un na nou zaw nak ahi. 34Huan na huk thu a kuamah in ahon zot louh midang toh na kibatlouhna uh ahi; nang aman na pe zosop a; kuamah in man ahon piak louh uh na lamdanna ahi.Jerusalem Tung A Pathian Thukhenna 35Huaiziak in aw mihuknu, Toupa thu ngai in;

EZEKIEL 16: 36Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na kihhuaina buakkhiak ahih a, na mingaihte toh na kithuahna lam ua na vuaktanna suklat ahih ziak leh na kihhuaina milim tengteng ziak leh akiang ua na piak na tate sisan ziak in; 37ngai in, nang hon ngaimi na nuamtatpihte tengteng leh na na ngaih khitsa tengteng leh na muhdahte tengteng ka samkhawm ding a, ahi, na kim ah ka pikhawm ding a, na vuaktanna tengteng amuhtheihna ding un akiang uah na vuaktanna ka hihlang ding hi. 38Huan numei pasal khen a, amah ta sisan suah tungthu a bang in ka hon vaihawmkhum ding; hehna leh mullitna sisan na tung ah ka tungsak ding. 39Akhut uah ka hon pe dia, na mun kidohte ahihpuk ding ua, na mun sangte achimsak ding ua; na puansilhte asuah ding ua, na suangmantamte ahon sut ding ua, savuak leh vuaktang in ahon nuse ding uh. 40Na tung ah mipi akaikhawm ding ua, suang in ahon deng ding ua, namsau in ahon kui pailet ding uhi. 41Na innte mei in ahal ding ua, numei tampi mitmuh in na tung ah vaihawmna atangtungsak ding ua; na hukna ka tawpsak ding a, loh leng na peta kei ding hi. 42Huchi in ka hehna na tung ah ka lungdamsak ding a, ka hon mullitna adaita ding, ka dai dide dia, ka heh ngei nawn kei ding hi. 43Na tuailai nite na theihgige louh a, hiai thilte a na hon vuisak zawk ziak in, ngai in, na tatdan dan, na tung ah ka tun ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huan na kihhuaina tengteng behlap in hiai hukna na hih nawn kei ding hi.Tanu In Anu Asuun 44“Ngai in, paunak zang peuhmah in hiai paunak azang ding uh, ‘Atanu in anu asuun,’ chih.

EZEKIEL 16: 45Na nu, amah pasal leh tate mudahnu tanu na hi a, kitanauna lam ah bel, ama pasal leh tate mudahnu tanau na hi; na nu Hit mi ahi a, na pa Amor mi ahi. 46“Huan na tanau, na u Samaria, na veilam a teng amah leh atanute toh ahi uh; na tanau, na nau, na taklam a teng Sodom leh atanute ahi uhi. 47Himahleh amau omdan na zui kei a, akihhuaina bang uh na hih kei na a, na omdan tengteng a na thulim louh zawkdan ngaihtuah in huaite bangmah tham ahi kei hi. 48“Kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, nang leh na tate'n ahih bang uh na tanau Sodom leh atanute'n leng ahih het kei uh. 49Na tanau Sodom thulimlouhna hiaite ahi: kisaktheihna, nekvah luatnate, amah leh atanute nuamtat mawkmawkte, migentheite leh tasamte apanpih tuan sam kei uh. 50Huan mi uang ahi ua, ka ma a thilkihhuai hihsa ahi uh; huchi in hoih ka sak bang in ka hihmangta ahi. 51“Samaria in na khelhna kimkhat leng ahih sam kei; amau sang a na kihhuainate na nak hih zawk ziak in na hihsa na kihhuaina tengteng in na sanggamnute siam na tangsak hi. 52Na sanggamnute dikzaw a na suklat ziak in nangmah in na zahlakna na puak ding ahi; amau sang in thilkihhuai uangzawte na hih a, na khelhnate ziak in amau nang sang in adiktatzaw uhi; ahi, na sanggamnute siam na tansakna ah nang anen-aham in zahlakna na tang ding ahi.Sodom Leh Samaria Tunding Nawn Ahi Ding Uh 53“Huan a-omdan uh, Sodom leh atanu omdante, Samaria leh atanu omdante, amaute toh ton in nang omdan mahmah ka hei ding. 54Amau a dia lungmuanna na na hih sekna a na thilhihsa tengteng ziak a na zumtheihna ding in.

EZEKIEL 16: 55Huan na sanggamnute, Sodom leh atanute, Samaria leh atanute a-omdan uh masa bang in a-om nawn ding ua; nang leh na tanu leng na omdan uh masa bang in na om nawn ding uh. 56Na thulimlouhna muhkhiak a hih ma a na kihih thupi nite in na sanggamnu Sodom na kamse khuahna ahi sek kei maw? 57Tu'n zaw Siria tanu leh akim a mi tengteng, Philistia tanute na kim a hon simmoh mite'n ahon genseta uhi. 58Na hukna leh na kihhuaina na po zel ahi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Tangtawn Daih Thukhun 59Huchi in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Thukhun bohsia in thuchiam na khawksak louhdan bang zel in na tung ah ka hih tei sin ahi. 60Himahleh na naupan lai a na kiang a ka thukhun ka theigige ding a, na kiang ah tangtawn thukhun ka bawl ding hi. 61Huchi in na sanggamnute ka pom hun chiang in na omdante na hon theikhe ding a, na kizumpih ding; amau lah na tanu ding in ka hon pia hi, na thukhun ziak bel hilou in. 62Na kiang a ka thukhun ka hihkip ding a, Toupa ka hi chih na theita ding uh. 63Na thilhih tengteng ka hon ngaihdam vek hun chiang in na theihgigena na zum ziak a na kam kat nawnlouhna ding in,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.

EZEKIEL 17: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah: 2“Mihing tapa, Israel inkote kiang ah thuhaksa bawlkhia inla, gentehna in gen in, 3Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, chi in; Muvanlai lianpi, kha zapi, khaveng saupi gial em-um, mul bittak Lebanon tang ah aleng a, sidar sing zik atuah hi. 4Ahiang ziknou pen akitan a, mi vialvakna gam ah alenpih a, sumsinna khopi ah aphut hi. 5Huai gam haichi leng atuah a, lei hoih ah apawipou a, tui tampi gei ah aphut a, muisum sing bang in aphut hi. 6Huan akhang a, grepgui niam bilbial ahong hi a, selnoute ahon suah a, ahiangte ahong dawn hi. 7“Muvanlai lianpi dang a-om nawn a, kha zapi leh mul bittak anei a, ngai in, hiai grep kung amah lam ah azung azam a; asuanna mun a kipan in amah lam ah hiangte apoukhia a, amah tui a avaktheihna ding in. 8Hiangte asuah a, grep hoihtak ahihtheihna ding in tui tampi gei a lei hoih aphuh ahi.” 9Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Apiching den dia hia? Avuai maimah theihna ding in anahte satkhia in, azung toh abotkhe kei dia hia? Anah sel thak tengteng in leng avuailoh ding; azung toh botkhe ding in thilhihtheihna thupitak hiam, muvanlai tampi akiphamoh tuan kei dia hia? 10“Ahi, ngai in, phuh hileh leng apiching den dia hia? Suahlam huih in ahon nuai hun chiang in avuai khin maimah kei dia hia? Apouna mun mah ah avuai maimah ding chi in,” achi a.Gentehna Hilhchetna 11 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah: 12“Helhat inkote kiang ah gen in, hiai thil omdan athei kei ua hia?

EZEKIEL 17: Hilh in, ngai un, Babulon kumpipa Jerusalem ah ahong pai a, 13akumpipa uleh aheutu uh aman a, amah kiang ah Babulon ah api a, akumpipa uh suan khat aman a, thukhun abawlpih a, thu achiam teitei a, gam a miliante apimang vek a, 14alalna gam akeniam a, amah a adinkhiak theih nawnlouhna ding in athukhun len kawm kia a adintheihna ding in. 15Himahleh sakolte leh mi tampi hon sawl ding a ngen ding in Aigupta gam a palai sawl in atung ah ahelta hi. Alohching ding hia? Hichibang hihmi asuakta ding hia? Thukhun hihse ngal in apawtkhe thou ding hia?” 16Kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi; kumpipa, kumpipa dia bawlpa tenna ngei ah akichiamnate musit leh athukhunte bohsia a, amah kiang mahmah ah Babulon ah asi ding hi. 17Muvanlaite Leh Grepgui Gentehna 18Thukhun bohsia in kichiamna amusitta ngal ua; thu akichiam nung in hiai thil tengteng ahih nawn a, asuakta peuhmah kei ding hi. 19Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ka kichiamna amusit a, ka thukhun abohsia a, kei ka hin bang in, ama tung ah ka bung ngeingei ding hi. 20Len in ka khuh ding a, ka thang ah a-awk ding a, Babulon ah ka hon pi ding a, huchi in abohsiatna, ka tung ngei a abohsiatnate ziak in amah ka sual ding. 21Huan apawl tengteng a taikekte tengteng namsau in asi ding ua, a-omlaite kawlmong chih ah adalh ding uh; huan kei Toupa'n ka genta chih atheikhe ding uh.Pathian Lametna Thuchiam 22Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi:“Sidar sang mahmah dawn ke'n ka la ding a, ka phut ding;azikpi pen aziknou ka khiak ding a,tang sang kidoh ah ka phut ding. 23Israel sanna tang ah ka phut ding a, hiangte ahong sel ding ua, ahong gah ding,sidar thupitak ahi ding;anuai ah tungleng vasa chi chih ateng ding ua,ahiang liimte ah a-om ding uh. 24Huan gam sing tengteng in kei Toupa'n sing sangte ka niamsak a,sing niamte ka sangsak a,sing hingte ka keusak a, sing keute ka hingphasak a,ka chi nalai hi,” achi hi.Kei Toupa'n ka genta a, ka gen bang in ka hih ding hi.

EZEKIEL 18: 1Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi. 2“Israel gam tungtang a hiai paunak azat uh bang chihna ahia,‘Pate'n grep thuk ane ua,atate uh ha azau hi, chih?’ 3“Kei ka hin bang in, Israel ah hiai paunak zat nawn chih na nei kei ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 4Ngai un, hinna tengteng kei a vek ahi, pa hinna kei a ahih bangmah in tapa hinna leng kei a ahi; kha khial peuhmah asi ding. 5“Himahleh mi adiktat a, siang leh dik ahih a, 6mun sangte a ne lou a, Israel inkote milim lam nga sam lou a, numei kizen lou leng naih lou a, kuamah tung a thil hihkhial lou a, 7leibami thil khamna koih pe kik zaw a, kuamah hiamgam a lok lou a, gilkial kiang a nek ding pia a, vuaktang puan silhsak a; 8apung delh ding a leitawisak lou a, asumpung leng la sam lou a, thil gilou hih dia akhut kidek a, mi leh mi kikal a diktak a vai hawmsak a; 9ka dan bawlte zui a, diktak a hih a, ka vaihawmnate azuihleh, amah midiktat ahi a, ahing ngei ding chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 10“Himahleh ama'n tapa guktak ching asuan a, sisan suahmi ahih a, hiai bang ahih a, 11ahih ding zaw pen ahih louh a, mun sangte a anek zawk a, invengte zi ahihbuah a, 12genthei leh tasamte asimmoh a, aloh a, akhamna koih apiak louh a, milimte lam nga, thilkihhuai ahih hi. 13Apung delh a apiak a, apung alakleh, ahing ding hia? Ahing het kei ding; hiai thilkihhuai tengteng ahihta a, asi ngeingei ding, amah sisan moh ama tung ah atu ding ahi.

EZEKIEL 18: 14“Huan ngai in, tapa na nei tei taleh, apa thil gilou hihsa tengteng amuh a, lau a, 15huchibang ahih teitei louh a, mun sang a anek louh a, Israel inkote milim lamte angat louh a, invengte zi ahihnit louh a, 16kuamah tung a thil ahihkhelh louh a, khamna koih bangmah la lou a, kuamah lok lou a, gilkialte nek ding pe zaw a, savuakte asilhsak a; 17genthei lak a akhut akideksak a, anou leh apung la lou a, ka thupiakte zang a ka dan bawlte zuimi ahihleh, apa thulimlouhna ziak in asi kei ding a, ahing zaw ngei ding hi. 18Mimalmal Mohpuakna 20Kha khial asi ding; tapa in apa thulimlouhna athuak kei ding a, pa in leng tapa thulimlouhna athuak sam kei ding; midiktat diktatna amah mah tung ah a-om ding, migilou gitlouhna amah mah tung ah a-om ding hi. 21“Himahleh, migilou in akhelhna hih tengteng alehngatsan a, ka dan bawlte azuih a, dan zui a thil diktat ahihleh ahing ngei ding a, asi kei ding. 22Tatlekna a na hihsa theihsak ahita kei ding; ana hihsa adiktatna ah ahing ding, 23Migilou sihna ah kipahna ka nei a hia? Alampite alehngatsan a, ahong hin ding chih louh ngal? chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 24“Himahleh midiktat in adiktatna lampi alehngatsan a, thulimlouhna ahih a, migiloute hih bang zel a thilkihhuaite ahih in ahing dia hia? Athil diktat hihsa bangpeuh leng theihgige ahi nawnta kei ding a, atatlekna hih ah leh akhelhna hih ah, huai mahmah ah asi ding hi. 25“Hinapi in, Toupa hihdan akibang gige kei hi, na chi sek uh. Israel inkote aw, ngai un; ka hihdan akibang gige kei maw? Na hihdan uh akibang kei gige zaw ahi kei maw? 26Midiktat in adiktatnate alehngatsan a, thulimlouhnate ahihleh huai ah asi ding a, thulimlouhna ahih ah asi ding.

EZEKIEL 18: 27Huai lou leng, migilou in akhelhna ahihsate lehngatsan a, dan azuih a, thil diktat ahihleh ahinna ahumbit ding. 28Akingaihtuah a, atatlekna a hihsa tengteng alehngatsan ziak in ahing ngei ding, asi kei ding hi. 29Hinapi in Israel inkote'n, Toupa hihdan akibang gige kei, achi uhi. Aw Israel inkote aw, ka hihdante kibang gige ahi zaw kei maw? 30“Huaiziak in aw Israel inkote aw, michih, noumau hihdan bang zel in vai ka hon hawmsak ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Kihei unla, na tatlekna tengtengte uh lehngatsan un; huchi in thulimlouhna na puksiatna uh ahi kei ding hi. 31Na tatlekna tengteng uh, na tatleksate uh paimang vek unla, lungtang thak leh lungsim thak kibawl un! Israel inkote aw, bangziak a si ding na hi ua? 32Mi sihna ah kipahna mahmah ka nei kei, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi; huaiziak in kihei unla, hing un.”

EZEKIEL 19: 1Huai lou in leng Israel heutute tungtang ah suunna la phuah ahi; 2Na nu bang ahia ahih?Humpinelkaipi ahi!Humpinelkaite lak ah akual a,humpinelkai lunlaite lak ah anoute avaklian hi. 3Huan anoute lak ah khat avaktei a;humpinelkai lun lai ahong hi; samat asiam a,mite anegai hi. 4Namte'n leng atanchin aza ua;akokhuk uah mat in a-om;huan Aigupta gam ah sikkawi in amah api uh. 5Huchi in angak a, alametnaavuaksuak chih atheih in,anoute lak ah khat ala a,humpinelkai lun lai in abawl hi. 6Humpinelkai lak ah apaisukpaitou a, humpinelkai lun laiahong hi a; samat asiam a,mite anegai hi. 7Ama'n a-inpi kisesate uh athei a,akhopite uh ahihgawp a,gam asegawp a, ahumhamhusa ziak in, huai a tengteng. 8Huchi in bialte a kipan inning chih a namte'n amah adou ua;atung ah alen uh azak ua;akokhuk uah mat in a-omta hi. 9Sikkawite in bawm sung ahakoih ua; Babulon kumpipa kiang ah api ua;kulh muanhuaite sung ah apilut uh;huchi a Israel tang sangte tung a aw akizak nawnlouhna ding in. 10Na nu na sisan a grepgui bangahi, tuite kiang a suan;tui tampite ziak ingahpha leh hiangte in adim. 11Huan vaihawmna potelalchiang sikchiang khauh anei in, nah bawkpha lak ah asandan uh hihsang in a-om hi,huchi in ahiang tampite uh tohsangpi amuh in a-om uhi. 12Himahleh thangpaihna abohkhiak in a-om a, lei ahpaihkhiak in a-om a,suahlam huih in agah amutkeu a;akung khauhte kitan in akeu a;mei in amaute akang beita. 13Huan tu in gamdai ah, gamkeuleh tui om lou ah phuh in a-om. 14Huchi in ahiang a sikchianga pan mei apaikhia, agahahulbei a, huchi in amah ahvaihawm ding in lalchiangding sikchiang khauha-om kei hi.Hiai kahla ahi, kahla a dia sak ahi ding hi. 19Dahla

EZEKIEL 20: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sagihna, akha ngana, huai kha ani sawm ni in Israel Upa kuate hiam Toupa thu dong ding in ahong pai ua, ka ma ah atu uhi. 2Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah, 3“Mihing tapa, Israel upate houpih inla, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Kei thudong dia hong pai na hi uh hia? Kei ka hin bang in, noute thudot in ka om kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. 4Amaute vai na hawmsak ding hia, mihing tapa, amaute vai na hawmsak ding hia? Apate uh kihhuainate thei uh hen. 5Huan akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Israelte ka tel ni a Jakob inkote telte kiang ah ban zak hial a Aigupta gam a akiang ua ka kitheihsak a, akiang ua ka khut ka zak a, Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, ka chih. 6Huai ni a Aigupta gam a kipan pikhia a, amah a dia gam kham, nawitui leh khuaizu a luang gam, gam tengteng a kilawmpen a pilut ding a ka khut ka zak ni in akiang uah: 7Michih in na mit ua muh thilkihhuai paimang unla, Aigupta gam a milimte in kihihnin kei un, kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, chi in ka gen hi. 8Himahleh, ka tung ah ahel ua, hon limsak kei ua, michih in amit ua muh thilkihhuaite leng apaimang kei ua, Aigupta milimte leng alehngatsan sam kei uh. Huai ah atung ua ka hehna lungdamsak ding in Aigupta gamsung ngei ah atung uah ka hehna ka leihbo kei na diam, ka chi hi. 9Himahleh, keimah min ziak in ka gamtang zawta a, a-omna namte uh mitmuh in Aigupta gam a kipan pikhia in akiang uah ka kitheisakta;

EZEKIEL 20: huai namte mitmuh a ka min gensiat a a-omlouhna ding in. 10Huchi in Aigupta gam pawtsan ding in ka chita a, gamdai ah ka hon pilut hi. 11Ka dan bawlte amaute ka pia a, ka dan thukhunte ka ensak a, huai tuh mi'n azuih ua ahinna ding un. 12Huai lou leng kei leh amaute kikal achiamtehna ding in ka Sabbathte amau ka pia a, kei Toupa, amaute koihtuampa ka hi chih atheihtheihna ding un. 13Himahleh Israel inkote gamdai ah ka tung ah ahel ua, ka dan bawlte azui kei ua, ka thugelte, mi'n ahih a ahinna ding tak uh apaikhia ua, nakpitak in ka Sabbath abohsia ua; huchi in gamdai ah amaute hihmang ding in atung uah ka hehna ka leih kei na diam aw, ka chi hi. 14Ka pikhiak lai in athei mite nam mahmah mitmuh a hihsiat a a-omlouhna ding un ka min ziak in ka gamtang zawta hi. 15Huai lou in huai gamdai ah ka gam piak, nawitui leh khuaizu a luang gam, gam tengteng a kilawmpen ah ka pilut kei ding, ban zak hial in ka chi hi. 16Ka thugelhte apaikhia ua, ka dan bawlte azui kei ua, ka Sabbathte abohsiat ziak un; alungtang un amilimte uh azui uhi. 17Himahleh hihmang lou ding in ka mit in amuh maihta a, gam ah leng ka hihmang vekta kei hi. 18Huan gamdai ah atate uh kiang ah: Na pipute uh dan bawl zui kei unla, athugelte uh zui kei unla, amilimte un kihihnin sam kei un; 19Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, ka dan bawlte zui unla, ka thugelte vom unla, zui un.

EZEKIEL 20: 20 Toupa Deihlam Leh Mite Simmohhuaina 21Himahleh atate uh ka tung ah ahel ua, ka dan thukhunte azui kei ua, ka thugelte, mi'n ahih a ahinna ding tak, zui ding in avom sam kei uh. Sabbath ni abohseta ua; gamdai ah ka hehna lungdamsak ding in atung uah ka hehna ka leih kei na hiam, ka chi hi. 22Himahleh ka khut ka kideksak a, ka pikhiak lai athei mite nam ngei mitmuh a hihsiat a a-omlouhna ding un ka min ziak in ka gamtang zawta ahi. 23Huai lou leng, namte lak ah amau ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka thelthangsak ding, gamdai ah ban zak hial in ka na chi hi. 24Ka thugelte zui lou a, ka dan bawlte paikhia a, ka Sabbath ni bohsia a, apipute uh milim lam angat ziak un. 25Huai lou leng, dan bawlhoih lou ka pia a, ahinlouhna ding ua thugelte toh; 26athiltan uh, sul hong tengtengte'n mei a apaihna uah amaute ka hihnin a, ka lungzuangsak a, atawp a Toupa ka hi chih atheihna ding un. 27Huaiziak in mihing tapa, akiang uah thu gen inla, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na pate un hiaite ah ahon gense lailai uhi, ka tung a tatlekna thil ahihte uah. 28Ban zak hial a amaute ka chiam gam ah ka hon pilut in, mual sang leh singbuk lian amuh peuhmah uah akithoihnate uh alan ua, athillat uh hehhuai mahmahte apia uh. Agimlimte uh abawl ua, adawn ding thillatte uh abungkhia uh,” chi in. 29Huchi in ke'n akiang uah, mun sang a na hoh nak uh bang na chihna uh ahia? ka chi a; huchi in amin a ding in tuni tan in, Bamah, chih ahita hi.

EZEKIEL 20: 30Huchi in Israel inkote kiang ah gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na pipute uh bang zel in noumau na kihihnin un akihhuaina bang un hupmang na hi ding uh maw? 31Na thil tan uh na lan un, na tate uh mei ah na pai ua, tuni tan in na milimte tengteng un na kihihnin uh ahi kei maw? Noute thudot ding ka hi a hia, aw Israel inkote aw? Kei ka hin bang in noute thudot in ka om kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 32I kim ua namdang pau tuam mite bang a singbul suangbul be ding i hi uh, na lungsim ua na chih uh, atangtung himhim kei ding.Pathian Gawtna Leh Ngaihdamna 33Kei ka hin bang in, khut thagui hattak in, ban zak kawm leh heh suah in na tung uah vai ka hawm ngeingei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 34Namte lak a kipan ka hon pikhe ding a, dalhsak a na omna gam ua kipan khut hattak leh ban zak leh heh suah in ka hon pikhawm ding. 35Pau tuam mite gamdai gam ah ka hon pilut ding a, kimaituah in i kisual ding uh. 36Aigupta gam gamdai a na pipute uh ka sual bangtak in nou leng ka hon sual ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 37Chiang nuai ah ka hon lutsak ding a, thukhun delhkhumna nuai ah ka hon pilut ding hi; 38Huan na lak ua kipan mihelte leh ka tung a talek mite ka khuahsiang ding a, a-omna gam ua kipan in ka pikhe ding a, himahleh Israel gam ah alut het kei ding uh; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.

EZEKIEL 20: 39Noute ahihleh, Aw Israel inkote aw, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ka thu na ngaihkhiak kei uleh tunung chiang in na milim nna uh sem chiat maita unla; himahleh ka min siangthou bel na thilpiakte uleh na milimte un na hihninta kei ding uhi. 40Ka tang siangthou, Israel sanna tang ah, huai ah Israel inkote tengteng in avek un, huai gam ah ka nna asem ding uh; huai ah amaute ka paktata dia, huai ah na thillatte uh na thilpiak hoih tatate uh, na thil tan tengteng uh ka deihta ding. 41Namte lak a kipan ka hon lakkhiak hun chiang in leh gam chih a na dalhna ua kipan ka hon pikhawm hun chiang in, gimlim ding in noute ka hon sangta ding a, namte mitmuh in noute ah ka sianthoudan alangta ding, Toupa Pathian in achi hi. 42Huan Israel gam, ban zak hial a na pipute uh piak ka chiam gam a noute ka hon pilut hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 43Huan huai ah na omdante uleh na thilhih uh, na kihihnitna tengteng uh na theita ding uh; huchi in na thil hoih lou hih tengtengte uh ziak in noute mitmuh ngei in na kihta ding uhi.

EZEKIEL 20: 44Na omdan hoihloute uh bang hilou a, na thilhih uh thulimloute bang leng hi sam lou a, ka min ziak a noute ka hon pichinsak hun chiang in, aw Israel inkote aw, Toupa ka hi chih na theita ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in.Simlam A Mei 45 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, 46“Mihing tapa, simlam masuan inla, simlam nga in na thu khah inla, simlam gammangpi lam ah thu gen inla, 47simlam gammangpi kiang ah, Toupa thu ngai in, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, nang ah mei ka toh ding a, nang ah sing hing tengteng akangbei ding a, sing keu peuhmah leng; meikuang luahluah adai kei ding, sim a kipan mal tanpha in, matuah teng akangvom ding hi. 48Huan mi tengteng in kei Toupa meikhahpa ka hi chih amu ding ua, amit kei ding, chi in,” achi hi. 49Huchi in ke'n, “Ah! Toupa Pathian, gentehna thugenmi lel ahi kei maw? ahon chi ding uh,” ka chi hi.

EZEKIEL 21: 1Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah, 2“Mihing tapa, Jerusalem maituah inla, amun siangthou lam nga in na thu gen inla, Israel gam tung ah thu gen in; 3Israel gam kiang ah, huchi in Toupa'n achi hi: Ngai in, ka hon dou ahi, ka namsau apai a kipan ka phawi ding a, na lak ua midiktat leh diktat lou kibang sap in ka phuk ding. 4Huchi in na lak ua midiktat leh diktat lou ka phuk ding ziak in ka namsau apai a kipan apawt ding a, simlam a kipan mallam pha in mihing tengteng aphuk ding hi. 5Huchi in mi tengteng in, kei Toupa'n ka namsau apai a kipan ka phawi ahi chih athei ding uh, akikhum ngei nawnta kei ding hi.” 6Huaiziak in nang mihing tapa, thum huthut inla khasetak in amitmuh un thum in. 7Huan “Bangziak a thum na hia?” ahon chih uleh, “Thuthang ziak in ahi, ahong tung sin ngal a, huai hun in lungtang chiteng azul ding a, khut tengteng azaw ding a, lungsim teng abah ding a, khuk tengteng tui bang in azaw ding a; ngai in, ahong tung hi, atangtun ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi. 8Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah, 9“Mihing tapa, thu gen inla, huchi in Toupa'n achi hi: 10“Namsau, namsau tat-hiam ahita, tetsak ahita,mi satna ding a tat-hiam ahita, tetsak ahi,khophia bang in!I nuamsa lailai ding maw?ka tapa, chiang na simmoh,sing a bawl peuhmah toh, 11tetsak ahi, khut a let ding in ahi namsau tat-hiam tetsak ahi,thatmi khut a tuang ding in. 12Mihing tapa, kikou inla;sehal ham in, ka mite tung ahi ngal a;Israel miliante teng tung mahmah;piak ahi ua, ka mite toh, namsau nuai ah;huaiziak in kikou inla, na pheipi beng in.

EZEKIEL 21: 13Hiai namsau midang tung achiamtehsa ahi ngal a,na ngaihsak kei hitaleh bang suak ding chihToupa Pathian thupawt ahi hi.” 14“Huaiziak in nang, mihing tapa,khut beng hial in thu gen in;thah a om dingte a ding namsau nihvei liksuk in om hen, ahi, thumvei;tampi thahna ding namsau ahi. 15Lungtang zul, apukna uh apunna ding in,namsaute kongbiang teng ah ka giaksak hi;Ah! Khophia bang inate zolzol, sihna namsau. 16Nakpi'n gamtang in, taklam ah,gamtang in veilam ah lengvan zel inla, na mazawnpeuhmah ah leng. 17Ke'n leng khut ka beng ding a,ka tangtun ngei ding,ka hehna, kei Toupa'n hiai ka genta hi, chi in,” achi hi.Babulon Kumpipa Namsau 18 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, 19“Mihing tapa, Babulon kumpipa namsau hong tuntheihna ding in lampi nih na bawl in; huai lampi nihte gam khat a kipan in ahong pawtkhe ding uh ahi; lampi kawkmuhna bawl inla, kho pilut na khomual ah bawl in. 20Ammon mite khua Rabbah a namsau ahong tuntheihna ding in lampi sep inla, Judah gam lai Jerusalem kulh ah leng. 21 Toupa Namsau 22A-aisanna ah akhut taklam ah Jerusalem ana tuang a, kulh suksiatnate galsual awng zuazuate, kongpi zawn a kulh suksiatnate, mual pawngsunte, kulh bawlte toh. 23Aisan vuaksuak lel bang ahi a, himahleh mat a a-omna ding ua athulimlouhna uh theihkhiakna lel ding ahi.” 24Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Theihgigena ding a na thulimlouhna uh na bawl ziak un na tatleknate uh ahong kilang, na thilhih tengteng uah na khelhnate uh akimu kilkel a, theihkhiak na hong hih tak ziak un khut a mat na hong hi ding uhi. 25Huan nang, Israel heutu, migilou si ding a liampa, na gitlouhna gawtna tawp ni ahong tung e;

EZEKIEL 21: 26Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Heutu lukhu paihsak unla, lallukhu suhsak un, hiai angei in a-om kei ding; mivuallelte tawisang unla, miliante vuallelsak un. 27Ka lumlet ding, ka lumlet ding, ka lumlet ding; hiai leng angei in a-om kei ding, aneimi diktak ahong pai mateng amah ka pe ding hi.”Namsau Leh Ammonte 28Huan nang mihing tapa, thu gen inla, hichi in chi in; Toupa Pathian in Ammon tate tungtang ah leh agensiatna thu uah hichi in achi:“Namsau, namsau phawi ahita,mithahna ding leh hihmanna ding khophia bang a tetsak ahita. 29“Kilakna taklou nang ahon musak ua, zuau in ai ahon sansak ua, namsau bel migilou si ding a liam, agitlouhna ni uh tawp hong tung dingte ngawng ah na golh ding, ahon chih un azuau uh ahi. 30Apai ah thun in. Na pianna siam a na omna gam ngei ah na thu ka ngaihtuah ding. 31Na tung ah ka hehna ka sung dia, ka thangpaihna mei na tung ah ka toh ding, minunsetak, hihman siamtak khut ah ka hon mansak ding. 32Mei a khul ding na hi ding a, gam lai ah na sisan abo ding a, theih mahmah na hita kei ding, kei Toupa'n ka genta ngal a, chi in,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 22: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, 2“Nang mihing tapa, sisan suah hat khopi na vaihawmkhum ding hia? Na vaihawmkhum ding hia? Akihhuaina tengteng theisak dih ve. 3Huan akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Khopi, ahun hong tunna ding a amah sung a sisan suah leh amah kihihnin ding a milim bawl! 4Na sisan suahna ah mohna na pua a, na milim bawl ah na kihihnin ahi; na hunte na naisak a, na kumte na tung phialphial a; huaiziak in namte kiang ah gensiat ding leh gam tengteng engbawl ding in ka hon bawl ahi. 5Nang naih a om mite leh gamla a om mite'n ahon simmoh ding ua, nang, minsiat pua leh buaina a dimmi; 6Ngai in, Israel heutute michih in athilhihtheihna bang zel ua sisan suah mai ding in nangmah ah a-om uhi. 7Nang ah mi'n nu leh pate amusit ua, nang ah mikhualte anuaisiah ua, nang ah tagahte leh meithaite amawkbawl uh. 8Ka thiltante na musit a, ka Sabbathte na bohsia hi. 9Nang ah sisan suah ding in mi hekhatte a-om ua, nang ah tang sang a nete a-om ua, nang ah hukna aching uh. 10Nang ah apate uh vuaktanna lemsak a-om ua, nang ah numei kizen louh lai kithuahpih a-om uh. 11Huan mi'n a-inveng' zi tung ah thilkihhuai ahih a, midang in huktak in amou ahihnin a, midang in nang ah asanggamnu, apa tanu ngei azahlaksak hi. 12Nang ah sisan suah ding in golhna ala ua, anou leh apung na la a; na inveng nuaisiah in huaihamtak in na lepguksak hi; kei mahmah leng na hon mangngilh a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 13“Huaiziak in ngai in, na lepgukna thu ah, nang a sisan pawt thu ah khut ka hon betkhum ding.

EZEKIEL 22: 14Nang ka hon sual ni chiang in na lungtang in athuakzou in na khut ahat thei diam maw? Kei Toupa ngei in ka genta a, ka hih lai ding. 15Huan namte lak ah ka hon hihdalh ding a, gam chih ah ka hon thehzak ding; nang a kipan in na nitnate ka hihmang vek ding. 16Namte mitmuh in nangmah kihihnin na hi ding, huan, Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding, chi in,” achi hi.Pathian Halsianna Mei 17 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, 18“Mihing tapa, Israel inkote ei a ding in eksia lel ahong hita ua; avek un haltuina mei lai ah dalte, langvate, sikte, suante ahi ua, dangkasik eksia lel ahita uh. 19Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Eksia lel na hong hih ziak un, ngai un, Jerusalem lai ah ka hon khawm ahi. 20Dangkasikte, dalte, sikte, suante, langvate haltuina mei a akoihkhawm ua, tuisak ding a atung a mei atoh bang un ka hehna leh ka thangpaihna ah nou ka hon khawm ding, huai ah ka hon koih ding a, ka hon tuisak ding. 21Ahi, ka hon khawm ding a, na tung uah ka hehna mei ka toh ding a, alai ah na tui khin ding uhi. 22Jerusalem Khelhna Huaisia 23 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, akiang ah gen inla, 24gam khuahsiang louh hehna ni chia vuahtui tang lou na hi. 25Humpinelkai in humham a samat azon bang mai in nang ah zawlnei sawmnate a-om ahi; mi hinnate ane khin ua, goute leh thil manphate alaksak ua, alai ah meithai tampi abawl uh.

EZEKIEL 22: 26Asiampute leng nakpitak in ka dan ah atalek ua, ka thil siangthoute ahihnin uh ahi, thiltante leh thil namai akhen kei ua, mite'n lah siangthou leh siangthou lou akhen tuan kei uh; ka Sabbathte akitheihmohbawl ua, alak uah hihminsiat in ka om hi. 27Alai a heutute lah nge duhgawl nek ding zong bang lel ahi ua, sisan suah a mi hinnate hihmang in ginom loutak a aleptheihna ding un. 28Huan azawlneite un sunu in baang anuh ua, kilakna bangmah lou lel amu ua, zuau in ai asan ua, Toupa'n bangmah a gen louh in leng, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi,” achi uh. 29“Gam a mipite'n nuaisiah aching ua, loh ahat ua, ahi, migenthei leh tasamte amawkbawl ua, dikloutak in mikhualte anuaisiah uhi. 30Gam ka hihsiatlouhna ding in alak ua dai kai ding leh gam hum a ka ma a pang ding mi ka zong a, ka mu kei hi. 31Huaiziak in atung uah ka hehna ka sungbota a, ka thangpaihna mei in ka halmangta ahi; a-omdan ngei uh atung uah ka tungsak ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 23: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, 2“Mihing tapa, numei nih, nu khat ta a-om uhi. 3Aigupta gam ah ahukmang ua, atuailai neu ua huk ahi ua, huai ah a-angnem uh azawtsak ua, atuailai nawi uh ameksak ek uhi. 4Khat, a-upapen min Oholah ahi a, asanggamnu bel Oholibah ahi; huan kei a ahong hita ua, tapate tanute asuang ua. Amin uh, Oholah pen Samaria ahi a; Oholibah bel Jerusalem ahi. 5Huan Oholah kei a ahih nung in ahukmang nawn a, adeihtak, a-invengte, Assuria anou a; 6ukpipate, vaihawm mite, tangval iplahhuai mahmah ngen, sakol tungtuangmi, puan sandup a kizemte. 7Hiai Assuria tangval hoihte tengteng lak ah akiphal vek ua, a-etlahte milim tengteng in akihihnin nawn behlap hi. 8Atuailai neu a kipan anawite ameksak uh leh akithuahpih ziak un Aigupta a kipan in ahukna atawp tuan kei a, amau leng ahukna uh atung uah ahih pichin uhi. 9Adeihtakte, Assuria, anouhnouhte khut ngei ah ka mansak ahi. 10Hiaite'n avuaktanna alemdawk ua, atanu leh atapate alaksak ua, amah leng namsau in athat ua, numeite lak ah akikhemlauna pen uh ahong hita a, ama tung a gel bang amualsuahta hi. 11“Huan asanggamnu Oholibah in hiai amu a, himahleh a-unu sang in adeihtak nouhnouhna ah a-uangzaw in, ahukna a-uang semsem lai hi. 12Assuria mi, invengte gam ukpipa leh vaihawmpa tangval etlahhuaitak ngen, sakol tungtuangmi, kilawmtak a kivante anounou hi. 13Hihnit in a-om chih ka mu a, anih un lam kibang atawn uhi. 14“Huchi in ahuknate a-uangsak sem a, baang a pasal lim tuang, Kaldai mite lim, san-au tak a kizem, 15akawng ah kawnggak agak a, dial kilawmtak khim in, avek ua milian bang in, Kaldai gam, apianna gam ua Babulon mite bangtakte amuh ziak in. 16Amau amuhtak in anounou a, akiang uah Kaldai pha in mi asawl hi.

EZEKIEL 23: 17Huchi in Babulon mite akiang ah, kingaihna lupna ah ahong pai ua, ahukna un ahihnin ua, akihihbuah khinta ua, amau amah anel mahmah uhi. 18Huchi in ahukna ahihlang a, avuaktanna alemsak a, asanggamnu a pan ka kiheisan bang in amah ka kiheisanta hi. 19Himahleh atuailai a Aigupta gam a ahuk lai atheihgige ziak in ahuk semsem hi. 20A-angkawmpihte van, sabiltung a bang mai ahi a, athilpawtte leng, sakolte a thilpawt bang mai ahi. 21Huchibang in na tuailai hukna Aigupta min na tuailai nawite ahon khoihsak lai na theikhe nawnta ahi.”Sanggamnu Nauzaw Tung A Pathian Thukhenna 22Huaiziak in aw Oholibah, hichibang in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Ngai in, nang hon it, na lungsim in anelsate ka tamsak ding a, kil chih a kipan ka pikhawm ding. 23Mikhial Unau Numeite 24Galvante, kidouna kangtalaite, kangtalaite leh mipi omkhawm in ahong sual ding ua; lum lian leh lum neu, dal lukhute toh na kim ah ahon um ding ua; akiang uah vaihawmna ka kemsak ding a, athugel bang zel un na tung ah ahihtangtung ding uhi. 25Huan na tung ah ka lung hihlouhna ka tungsak ding a, heh mahmah in nang ahon sual ding ua, na nakte leh na bilte asatkhe ding ua, akhosuaksunte namsau in asi ding uh, na tanu leh na tapate ahon laksak ding ua, akhosuaksunte mei in akanglum ding uh. 26Na puansilhte ahon hawksak lai ding ua, na kizepna kilawm taktakte alamang ding uh. 27Na hukna leh Aigupta gam a kipan a na kizuakna ahon tawpsak ding ua, huchi in amau lam ah na mit na lengsak nawn kei dia, Aigupta gam na theigige nawn kei ding hi.” 28Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a: “Ngai in, na huat mahmah, nang hon chimtakte khut mahmah ah ka hon mansak ding.

EZEKIEL 23: 29Huat petmah in ahon ho ding ua, na sepgim gah tengteng ahon laksak ding ua, vuaktang in kihawmkhai in ahon taisan ding uh; na kizuakna vuaktanna, na hukna leh na kizuakna ngei hihlat in a-om ding hi. 30Hiai thilte na tung ah ahong tung ding, namdangte delh in na hukmang ding a, amilimte ua na kihihnit ziak in. 31Na sanggamnu lampi na tawn sam a, huaiziak in amah nou na khut ah ka hon pe ding.” 32Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na sanggamnu nou thuk leh lian na dawn ding a,nuihsan leh simmoh in na om ding; 33Khamna leh lungkhamna inna dim dia, lamdangsakna leh siatna nou, na sanggamnuSamaria nou toh na dawn gai keuhkeuh ding hi. 34Na dawn ding a, anou leng natawpsiang vek ding;na sam na botkhe dia,na nawite na hamkek ding. Kei, Toupa Pathian in ka chita hi.” 35Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “N'on mangngilh a na hon na dal ziak in na hukna leh na kizuakna moh na po mai ding hi.”Sanggamnute Tung A Pathian Thukhenna 36Huai lou leng Toupa'n ka kiang ah agen nawn a, “Mihing tapa, Oholah leh Oholibah na langsin ahia? Akihhuaina uh akiang uah puang in. 37Ang akawmta ua, akhut uah sisan abang a, amilim kiang ah ang akawmta uhi; atapate uh kei a dia asuan uh akiang ua kangmang ding in mei ah apai uhi. 38Huai lou in leng, ka kiang ah hiai achi uhi; amau mah in ka Mun Siangthou ahihnin ua, ka Sabbathte leng abohsia uhi. 39Amilimte uh a dia atate uh athah nung un, amau mah in ka mun siangthou hihnin ding in alut ua; ngai in, hichibang in ka insung mahmah ah ahih uhi.

EZEKIEL 23: 40“Huai lou leng, gamlapi a pan mi hong pai ding in na thukhak ua, mi na sawl ua, ngai in, ahong ua, amau hel in na kisilsiang a, na mit na nuh a, kizephoihna dangte na silh a, lupna thupitak ah na tu hi. 41Ama ah dohkan na bawl a, ka gimlim leh ka sathaute huai ah na lui hi. 42Huai ah mipi noptal husa zak ahi a, mi namai kia lou leng gamdai a kipan in zukhamte ahon pi ua, anih un taute abun ua, lukhu kilawmte akhu uhi.” 43Huan ke'n, “Angkawmnu tek nung a kithuahpih nuam un, ama'n leng angap peuhmah diam maw?” ka chi hi. 44“Huchi in kizuak kiang a ahoh bang un akiang ah alutta thou ua; huchi in numei huk Oholah leh Oholibah kiang ah alutta uhi. 45Himahleh midiktatte'n angkawmnute leh sisan suah hat numeite vai ahawm bang un ahawmsak ding ua, angkawmnute ahih ua, akhut ua sisan aban ziak in.” 46Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na tung uah mipi ka kaikhawm ding a, ka hon loksak ding a, ka hon bawlsak ding hi. 47Mihonte'n suang in adeng ding ua, anamsau un asatlum ding ua, atanute uh, atapate uh athat ding ua, a-innte uh ahalsak ding uh. 48Hichibang in hukna gam a kipan ka hihmang ding a, numei tengteng in na hukna uh chin louh hial ding ahi chih na theihna ding un. 49Huchi in na tung uah na hukna uh ahon thuk ding ua, na milim khelhnate uh na thuak ding uh, kei Toupa Pathian ka hi chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 24: 1Akum kuana, akha sawmna, huai kha, ani sawm ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, 2“Mihing tapa, tuni ngei, hiai ni min ngei gelhkhia in. Hiai ni ngei in Babulon kumpipa'n Jerusalem ahong sual pan hi. 3Huan helhat Inkote kiang ah gentehna thu gen inla, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: 4“Sa uina bel suang inla, suangnilouh inla, asung ah tui sung in;sabakte kha inla,asa hoih tengteng,apheite, aliangte,aguhbawk hoih tata in hihdim in. 5Ganhonte lak a ahoih tata la inla,anuai ah singkhuah khul ek inla,sou bolhbolh hen;ahi, aguhbomte ki-ui hen.” 6Huchi in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sisan suah hat khopi, sa uina bel, asung kanggem, agem dai ngei nai lou tung agik hi! Tel tuan lou in, asa bak khatkhat in thuk in. 7Asisan suah amah tung ah a-om a, leivui vuhtheihna dia lei a sunbuak gen tak louh, suangpi keu tung ah asungbo zawta hi. 8Phu la ding a hehna ahong kisaktheihna ding in vuh louh in asisan suah suangpi keu tung ah ka sung ahi.” 9Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sisan suah hat khopi tung agik hi! Kei mahmah in ka vum venvon ding. 10Singtum sevum venvon unla, mei chihsa unla, sate ui min unla, satui chiktak in, aguhte leng kangmang hen. 11Huchi in bel avuak in meivu tung ah suan hi nilouh henla, ahong sa ding a, adal ahong am ding a, anitna ahong zulmang ding, akangkhem akatmang theihna ding in. 12Chimtak khop a sual in leng akangkhem asiang tuan kei a, mei in leng akangsiang sam kei hi.

EZEKIEL 24: 13Na nitna hukna ahi a, ka hon khuah a, na sian tuan louh ziak in na tung ah ka hehna ka lungdamsak mateng chik mah chiang in na nitna a kipan khuahsiang na hi nawnta kei ding hi. 14Kei Toupa'n ka chita ahi, ahong tung mahmah ding, ke'n ka hih ding, ka nungkin kei ding a, ka hawi sam kei ding a, ka lunghei sam kei ding; na omdante leh na thilhih bang zel in vai ahon hawmsak ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.Zawlneipa Zi Sihna 15 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, 16“Mihing tapa, ngai in, thakhat in na mittaina pen ka hon laksak ding a, na suun ding ahi kei dia, na kah ding leng ahi sam kei, na khitui leng akiak ding ahi kei hi. 17Asim in thum inla, misi suunna nei ke'n, na dial khim inla, na khedap bun inla, na muk hum ke'nla, mite an leng ne ke'n,” achi hi. 18Huchi in zingsang lam in mipite kiang ah thu ka gen a, nitaklam in ka zi asi maimah a; zingsang lam in ahon thupiak bang in ka hih hi. 19Mite'n ka kiang ah, hichibang na thilhihte kou ding in bang ahia ahih na hon hilh kei dia hia? achi uhi. 20Huchi in ke'n akiang uah, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a. 21Israel inkote kiang ah gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, ka mun siangthou, na hatna suan pen uh, na mittaina pen uh, na deihlam pen uh ka hihnin ding hi; na tanute uh; na tapate uh, nunglam a na nutsiatte uh namsau in apuk ding uh. 22Ka hih bang geih in na hih tei ding uhi;

EZEKIEL 24: na muk uh na hum kei ding ua, mite an leng na ne sam kei ding uh. 23Na dialte uh leng na khim ding ua, na khedap uh na bun ding ua; na suun kei ding ua, na kap sam kei ding ua, na thulimlouhnate uah na mangthang ding ua, na kikahtuah ding uhi. 24Sa Uina Bel 27Huai ni chiang in taikhemi kiang ah na kam na ka ding a, akiang ah thu na gen ding a, na dai maimah kei ding; huchi in amaute a ding in etsakna na hi ding a; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 25: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah; 2“Mihing tapa, Ammon tate masuan inla, atungtang thu uh gen in. 3Ammon tate kiang ah, Toupa Pathian thu ngaikhia unla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ka mun siangthou hihnit a om a, Israel gam hihgawp a a-om a, Judah Inkote sal a pi a a-om lai ua, ‘Awi ing e!’ na chih ziak in, 4ngai in, suahlam mite kiang ah ahon tan ding un ka hon pe ding ahi; nang ah buk akoih ding ua, nang ah tenna abawl ding uh; na theigahte ane ding ua, na nawitui adawn ding uh. 5Rabbah khua sangawngsau inn ding in ka bawl dia, Ammon tate mun ganhon kualna mun ding in ka bawl ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.” 6Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Israel gam tung a na khut na bet a, na khe na pek a, lungsim tengteng a asiatna tung a na kipah ziak in, 7ngai in, na tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, namte kiang ah gallak ding in ka hon mansak ding a; mite a kipan ka hon phuk ding a, huai gam a kipan in ka hon hihmang vengveng ding, ka hon hihse ding a, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding,” chi in.Moab Kalh A Genkholhna 8Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Moab leh Seir in, ngai in, Judah inkote namdang bang ahi uh, achih ziak un. 9Moab pang khat, khopite lam pang, gamgi zul a khopi, agam thupina pente, Beth-zeshimot, Baal-meon leh Kiriathaim lam pang ka hong ding a, 10suahlam tate tan ding in Ammon tate toh ka pe ding a, namte lak a Ammon tate theihgige ahih nawnlouhna ding un.

EZEKIEL 25: 11Moab gam tung ah thu gel ka tangtungsak ding a, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.Edom Kalh A Genkholhna 12Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Edom in Judah inkote tung a phuba la in nakpitak in thil ahihkhial hi, amah thu kia a atung ua phu alak ziak in. 13Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Edom tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, alak ua kipan mi leh sate ka phukmang vek ding; Teman a kipan in ka hihgawp ding a; Dedan pha in namsau in asi ding uh. 14Huchi in ka mi Israelte khut in ka phulakna ka tungsak ding a, Edom tung ah ka hehna bang zel leh ka thangpaihna bang zel in ahih ding ua, ka phulakna ana thei ding uh,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Philistia Kalh A Genkholhna 15Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Philistia mite'n phu la a, tangtawn kimelmakna a, mi hihman utna lungsim sia pu a phu alak ziak un. 16Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, ngai in, Philistia mite tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, Kareth khomite ka phuk vek ding a, tui gei a mi omsunte ka hihmang vek ding. 17Huan heh mahmah in sal in atung uah phu ka la ding a, huchi a atung ua ka phulakna ka tunsak hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih atheita ding uh,” achi hi. 25Ammon Kalh A Genkholhna

EZEKIEL 26: 1Akum sawm-le-khatna huai kha ani masapen in hichi ahong hi a, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: 2“Mihing tapa, Tura in Jerusalem tungthu a, ‘Nuam e! Namte kongkhak aseta, kei lam ah akihong, hihsiatgawp a a-om vek ziak in, ka tan hoih ding ahita,’ ” 3huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, “Ngai in, aw Tura, ka hon dou ahi, tuipi in tuihualte avoktouh bang mai in na tung a hong pai ding in nam tampi ka hon sawl ding. 4Huchi in Tura kulhte ahihse ding ua, a-insangte achimsak ding ua, amah a kipan aleivui tengteng ka kheuhsiang ding a, suangpi keu lel in ka bawl ding hi. 5Tui lai a len phoukeuna mun ahi mai ding, ke'n ka chita ngal a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huchi in namte a ding in gallak ahi mai ding. 6Huan atanu gam a omte namsau a hihlup ahih chiang un Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. 7“Ngai in, Tura tung ah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, Kumpipate' kumpipa mallam a kipan in, sakolte toh sakol tungtuang mite, apawl leh mipi tampi mahmah ka hon pi dek ahi. 8Gam ah namsau in na tanute athat ding; kulh abawl ding a, nang nanna ding in, nang douna ding in abawl ding, mual pawngte, nang douna kidalna abawlkhe ding hi. 9Kulhbaang suksiatna bawl in, na kulh phelna ding, heipi in na insangte achimsak ding hi. 10Asakol tam luat ding ziak in aleivuite un nang ahon tuam ding a, khopi akiphutvang nung a mite alut sek bang a, na kongpi a ahong lut hun chiang un, na kulhpi aling ding; sakol tungtuangte husa leh kidou kangtalai husa in. 11Sakol khechin in achilse ding, na kongzingte; na mite athat khin ding, namsau in; na hatna bangbang lei ah achim ding hi.

EZEKIEL 26: 12Na gou thil gallak in ala ding ua; na van tengteng agubei ding uh; lei ah na kulhbaang achimsak ding ua, na inpi nuam ahihse vek ding uh, na suangte, na singte, na leivuite tui lai ah apai ding uh. 13Ka khawlsak khin ding a, na lasak husate, na kaihging leng adai den ding hi. 14Suangpi keu lel in ka hon bawl ding a, len phoukeuna ding na hong hi ding hi, dinsak nawn na hi kei ding, kei Toupa'n ka chita ngal a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi hi. 15Toupa Pathian in Tura khua kiang ah hichi in achi, na sung a kithahnate a-om hun a, miliamte athum hun chiang in na puk ging in tuipi gei gamte aling kei ding ua hia? 16Tuipi tung a heutute tengteng atutphah ua kipan apaisuk ding ua, apuan thupite uh akoih ding ua, apuansilh zephoihte uh asuahkhe ding ua; linna in akivan zawta ding ua, lei ah atu ding ua, alingling ding ua, lamdang ahon sa ding uh. 17Huchi in nang suunna la aphuak ding ua, na kiang ah,Khopi minthang, tuipi tung a hat,tuisiammi tengteng tenna sek,amah leh asung a tengte tengteng,mivialvakte'n ahon lauhlauhuh toh, na siatna thupi hi na tel e; 18Na pukna ni in aling uh,tuikulh gamte; tuipi tuikulh alunglel ua, na man ni in,achi ding uh chi in. 19Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, khopi gam, kuamah luah louh khopi bang a ka hon bawl hun chiang in, tui thukpi ah ka hon tumsak ding a, tui thupi mahmah in ahon tum ding hi. 20Lei nuailam ah, nidang a segawpsa, khuk thuk a paisate kiang ah ka hon tengsak ding a, kuamah in ahon luahlouhna ding un leh mihingte lak a thupina na muh nawn hetlouhna ding in. 21Ka hon hihmang vengveng ding a, na om nawnta kei ding, mi'n hon zong mah le uh leng, ahon mu nawnta kei ding uh chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 26Tura Kalh A Genkholhna

EZEKIEL 27: 1Ka kiang ah Toupa thu hong tung a, ka kiang ah, 2“Nang, mihing tapa, Tura kho suunna la phuak inla, 3Tura khua kiang ah, Aw nang tuipi gei a teng sek, tuipi gei gam tampite kiang a sumsin, Toupa Pathian in huchi in ahon chi: Aw nang Tura, ka kilawm bukim na chi maw; 4“Na gam in tuipi lai asun hi,nang hon bawlte'n hon kilawmtungtuansak mah ve ua; 5Na singzat Senir meilah inabawl ua; na longpeu ding in,Lebanon a sidar in abawl uhi; 6Bashan tosaw na longzapnading in abawl ua;saiha suangphum na long pialkhang ding in,taksing tuipi gam Kupra a kipan in. 7Na long puanzak Aigupta puanmalngat gial,nang chiamtehna ding in ana tung hi,nang a dia limzak dumpuang,sandup, Elishah tui gei a kipan; 8Na longkalmi Sidon,Arvad mi ahi;na long hawl mite lengZemir misiamte ahi ua; 9Gebal upa leh mikhutsiam,na long bulhtuah mite ahi ua,tuipi long teng leh amite'n,nang hong dawr ding in ahong zuan uhi. 10“Na galdoumi, na sepaihhon, Persia, Lud, Put mite ahi ua, alum uh leh adal lukhu uh na baang ah akhai ua, nang kilawmsakte ahi uhi. 11Na sepaihhon leh Arvad mite'n na kulhpi kimvel in aveng ua, Gammadim mite'n na insang aveng ua, alum uh na kulhpi kimvel in akhai ua, nang kilawmsakte ahi uhi. 12Na hauh ziak in, sum-le-pai gou thil chiteng, Tarshish nang hon dawr mi ahong hi a, na van lei in ahon lam hi, dangkasik, sik, langva leh asuante leng. 13Zavan, Tubal, Meshek, nang hon dawrte'n sal leh dal tui-um belsuan in ahon dawr ua, na van neihna ding in. 14Togarmah a mite'n sakol, kidouna sakol leh sabiltung in na van alei uhi. 15Dedan mite nang hon dawr mite ahi ua, tui gei mun chih na sumsinna mun ahong hi a, saiha leh eboni ahon puak uhi.

EZEKIEL 27: 16Van na hauh ziak in, Edom nang hon dawr ahong hi a, emerald suang, puan sandup, puanzep, puanmalngat, khibah, agate suangte in nang ahon dawr uh. 17Judah leh Israel teng nang hon dawrte ahi ua, Minnith buh leh Pannag, khuaizu, sathau leh singnai in ahon dawr uh. 18Na hauh ziak in, sum-le-pai gou thil chiteng, Damaskas nang hon dawr ahong hi a, Helbon uain leh belam mulkaang in ahon dawr hi. 19Uzal uain hon tawi in alei ua, na vante, sikseksa, singguithak leh kawltute na sumsinna. 20Dedan in sakol tungphah puante in nang ahon dawr hi. 21Arabia leh Kedar kumpipate nang hon dawrte ahi vek uh, belamnoute, belamtalte, keltalte in ahon dawr uh. 22Sheba leh Raamah sumsin mite nang hon dawrte ahong hi ua, gimlim hoihpente, suangmantam chi chih leh dangka-engte in, nang ahon dawr uh. 23Haran, Kanneh leh Eden, Sheba, Assuria leh Kilmad sumsin mite nang hon dawrte ahi uh. 24Huaite ahi uh, nang hon dawr, puansilh hoih chi, puandum buang, puanzep, pialkhang phah ze kilawm toh, khauhual chiptak a hek in, hiaite in nang ahon dawr uh. 25“Tarshish longhon leh long lian vanpote ahi ua,na hong inbul in tuipi tung ah na hong thupita hi. 26Na long hawlpa'n tuipi kihotah ahon hawllut a,suahlam huih in nang ahon nuaimang, tuipi lai ah. 27Tura Vuina La 28Na long hawl mite kikou husain na kim a mite aling uhi. 29Longkalhna peu len mitetengteng, long mite leh,tuipi a hawl mite tengteng paisuk in,luipiau ah adingh uh. 30Na tungthu ah a-aw uh zak tham in asuah ding ua,khasetak in akap ding ua;alu ua leivuite buak in,vut lak ah akitholh ding uh. 31Nang ziak in kimetgiau in,sai-ip puan ateng ding ua;khase lua in nakpitak a kap in nang ahon suun ding uh.

EZEKIEL 27: 32Nang hon suun in kahla asamding ua, nang suun in Tura bang khopi kua a-om a,amah tuipi lai ah, adai sipsip hi. 33Na vante'n tuipi a pan pawt inmi tampi avak kham sek;na dangka leh na van in lei kumpipate na hausak hi. 34Tuipi thuk a na siat ni in,na sumsinna thil, na mite,nang toh athelthang uhi. 35“Tui gei a teng mi tengteng in mulkimhuai ahon sa ua; akumpipate uh lau in asibup ua, amel uh alamdang hial hi. 36Mite lak a sumsin mite'n nang ahon khoisatkhum ua, mite a ding in launa na hong suakta a, na kilang ngei nawn kei ding, chi in ahon kahkhum uhi.”

EZEKIEL 28: 1Toupa Pathian thu ka kiang ah ahong tung nawn a, 2“Mihing tapa, Tura heutupa kiang ah gen inla, Toupa Pathian in, hichi in achi: Na lungsim akisathei a, Pathian ka hi a, tuipi lai a Pathian tutmun ah ka tu, na chi a; himahleh mihing lel na hi a, pathian na hi kei a, pathian lungsim bang in kingaihtuah mah lechin; 3Daniel sang in na pilzaw a, na lak ah thuguk a-om thei kei a; 4na pilna leh na lemtheihna in na na kihihhau a; na goubawm ah dangka leh dangka-eng na khum hi. 5Na pilna thupi mahmah leh na sumsaina in sum na hihpung a; na hauhsak ziak in na lungsim ana kisatheita hi.” 6Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Pathian lungsim bang pu a na kingaihtuah ziak in, 7ngai in, na kiang ah gamdangmi, nam lauhuaitak ka hon pilut sin ahi; huan, na pilna gah kilawm tung ah anamsau uh alek ding ua, na thupina ahihse ding uh. 8Khuk thuk ah ahon sawllut ding ua, tuipi lai a athahte uh sih in na si ding. 9Nang hon thatmi ma ah, Pathian ka hi, na chi lailai dia hia? Nang hon liamsakmi khut ah pathian na hi kei a, mihing lel na hi zaw. 10Pau tuam mite khut ah, zeksum louh sih in na si ding; ka pauta ngal a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Tura Kumpipa Pukna 11Huai lou leng ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. 12“Mihing tapa, Tura kumpipa suunna la phuak inla, akiang ah, Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi: Hoih buchingtak, pilna a dim, kilawmna chiteng; 13Pathian huan, Eden ah na teng a; suangmantam chiteng in na kituam a, sardi, topaz leh diamond, beril, onik, jasper, sapphir, emerald, karbankul, aphumkipna leh agelh kilawmna dangka-eng a bawlte, nang siam ni a kisiamte.

EZEKIEL 28: 14Nang chingmi cherub sathau nilh na hi; Pathian tang siangthou ah ka hon omsak a, meisuangte lak ah na vak hi. 15Na hoih buching; siam a na om ni a kipan, nang a diktatlouhna a-om mateng in. 16Na sumsinna apun hulhul ziak in hiamgamna in na dim a, khelhna ah na pukta hi. Pathian tang a kipan in bangmah lou in ka hon paita a; chingmi cherub in meisuangte lak a kipan ahon delhkhia hi. 17Na kilawmna ziak a hong kisathei in, na thupina a na pilna hihsia in, lei ah ka hon pai a, etnop ding in kumpipate ma ah mual ah ka hon phou hi. 18Na sumsin diktatlouhnate ah, na siatna ziak in, na mun siangthoute na hihbuah a, huaiziak in mei ka khah a; na sung a kipan ahong kangbei a, ahon musekte tengteng muh in lei ah leivui ka hon suaksakta. 19Mite lak a ahon thei peuhmah lamdangsak, launa na hong suakta; na om ngei nawn kei ding,” chi in.Sidon Dem A Genlawkna 20Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: 21“Mihing tapa, Sidon masuan inla, atungthu gen in. 22Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi: Ka hon nang ahi, aw Sidon, ka hihlang ding, ka thupina; nang ah Toupa ka hihdan athei ding ua, amah ah vai ka hawm hun chiang in, ka sianthouna ka ensak mahmah ding. 23Akongzing ah sisan leh hipi ka tungsak ding, asung ah miliam apuk ding; mun kil chih a kipan namsau in. Huan Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.Israel Vualzawl In A-om Ding 24“Huchi in Israel inkote sun ding loulingnei a-om kei ding a, akim a amau musit mite lak ah hihna ding ling a-omta kei ding;

EZEKIEL 28: kei Toupa Pathian ka hi chih athei ding uh.” 25Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Israel inkote adalhna gam mite lak a kipan ka pikhawm nawn hun chiang in Jakob kiang a ka piak, agam mahmah uah atengta ding uh. 26Huchi in bittak in a-omta ding ua; ahi, innte alam ding ua; grephuante abawl ding uh. Bittak in a-om ding ua; akim ua musit mite tengteng tung a vai ka hawm chiang in kei Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in. 28Tura Kumpipa Kalh A Genkholhna

EZEKIEL 29: 1Akum sawmna, akha sawmna, huai kha ani sawmnihna ah ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: 2“Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh masuan inla, atung ah leh Aigupta mi tengteng tung ah thu gen in. 3Gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, Aigupta kumpipa, Pharaoh luipite lai ah Olepi thupitak, ‘Ka luipi kei a ahi, keimah ngei a dia ka bawl,’ chipa ka hon dou ahi. 4Na haizekte ah ngakuai in ka hon man ding a; luipi a ngasate na lip ding in ka belhsak ding a; luipi lai a kipan na lip ah ngasate tengteng toh ka hon botkhe ding. 5Huan gamdai ah ka hon pai ding a, nang leh na luipi a ngasa tengteng leng; gamlak ah na puk ding a; na luang kaihkhop ahi kei ding a, vui na hi sam kei ding; gam sahangte leh tungleng vasate kiang ah an ding in ka hon pia hi. 6Israel inkote a dia sialluang chiangkhun lel na hong hih ziak in Aigupta gam a teng tengteng in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. 7Khut a ahon let ua, aliangzang uh na tansak a, na satkhia; hon ngai ua, akongte uh kitan a tang lou in na omsak hi. 8Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, na tung ah namsau ka hon tun ding a, na lak a kipan mi leh sa ka phukmang ding. 9Huan Aigupta gam, gam segawp leh kho sia ahi mai ding a, kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. ‘Luipi kei a ahi a, ka bawl ahi,’ na chih ziak in.” 10Huaiziak in ka hon dou ahi, na luipi leng; Seveneh kulh a kipan in Ethiopia gamgi pha in Aigupta gam bel gam segawp leh kho sia in ka bawl ding.

EZEKIEL 29: 11Mihing khe in asik ngei kei ding a, sate leng apai ngei kei ding ua; kum sawmli sung luah in a-om kei ding hi. 12Aigupta gam segawpte lak a khat in ka bawl ding a, akhopite ka khopi siate lak ah kum sawmli akigawp ding; Aigupta mite namte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka dalhsak ding hi. 13Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Kum sawmli nung in adalhna munte ua kipan Aigupta mite ka lakhawm nawn ding a; 14Aigupta mite omdan ka hei ding a, apianna gam uh, Pathros gam ah ka kiksak ding; huchi in huai ah vualleltak in alal ding uh. 15Lalna gam a vuallel pen ahi ding, namte lak ah leng akilalsak nawn sam kei ding hi. Namdangte tung a thu aneih nawnlouhna ding un amau ka neusak ding hi. 16Amau lam nga peuhmah in athulimlouhna uh atheihkhiakpih ziak in Israelte muanpi ahi nawnta kei ding uh; huan Toupa Pathian ka hi chih athei ding uh, achi,” chi in.Kumpipa Nebukadnezzar In Aigupta Azou Ding 17Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawmnih-le-sagihna, akha khatna, huai kha ani khat ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi: 18“Mihing tapa, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Tura tung ah na thupitak sem ding in asepaihhon asawl a, michih lu agiauloh a, michih liangzang in adulhloh lai a; himahleh amah leh asepaihhonte'n anasepna uah Tura a kipan punna bangmah amu tuan kei uh. 19Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, Aigupta gam Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah ka pe ding a, athil hauh ziazuate alamang ding a, alok ding a, agallaksak ding; huai asepaihhonte loh ahi mai ding. 20Ka nna asep ziak un aloh ding un Aigupta gam ka pia hi,” Toupa Pathian in achi hi. 21Huai ni chiang in Israel inkote a ding in kii ka poukhesak ding a; alak uah na kam ka kasak ding hi; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh, chi in. 29Aigupta Tungtang Genkholhna

EZEKIEL 30: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, 2“Mihing tapa, thu gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi. 3“Kikou un, maizen! Maizen,tua ni tel; ni anai hi, Toupa ni anai hi, mei kai ni,pau tuam mite siatna ding. 4Ahong tung ding, namsau,Aigupta tung ah;sinlai natna, Ethiopia tung ah,Aigupta ah mithah apuk un;athil hauh ziazuate alamang ding ua, asuangphumte achimse ding.” 5“Ethiopia, Pud leh Lud, nam chih omkhawm, Kush leh gam tate tel teite tengteng, namsau in apuk ding uh.” 6“Toupa'n hichi in achi: Aigupta tungding mite leng apuk ding ua, ahatna suanpen uh leng avuallel ding;Migdol a kipan Suene pha in namsau in apuk ding uh,Toupa Pathian in achi hi. 7Gam hihgawpsate lak a khat ahi ding a, akhopite leng khopi gawpsate lak a ahi mai ding uh. 8Aigupta gam ah mei ka khah ding a, amau panpih mite tengteng ka hihsiat hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.” 9Huai ni chiang in Ethiopia mi kigingloute lunglelsak ding in ka kiang a kipan mi sawl long in apai ding ua; Aigupta ni mah bang in lungtang mangbatna mahmah atung uah atung sam ding hi; ngai in, ahong tung lellel hi. 10“Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut in Aigupta thil hauh ziazuate ka hihmang ding. 11Gam hihse ding in amah leh alawite, namte lak a kihtakte tunsak ahi ding uh; Aigupta tung ah anamsau uh alik ding ua, misi luang in gam adimsak ding uh. 12Huan luipite ka kangsak ding a, migiloute kiang ah gam ka khawng ding; agam leh asung a om tengteng pau tuam mite khut in ka hihgawp ding; kei Toupa'n ka chita ahi. 13“Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Milimte ka hihse ding a, Memphis a kipan milimte ka hihmang ding, Aigupta ah heutu a-omta kei ding uh;

EZEKIEL 30: huchi in Aigupta gam ah launa ka omsak ding. 14“Pathros ka hihgawp ding a, Zoan ah mei ka khah dia; Thebes ah ka tangtungsak ding. 15Huan Aigupta kulh Sin tung ah ka hehna ka lungdamsak ding a, Thebes a mipite ka phukmang ding. 16Huan Aigupta ah mei ka khah ding a, buaitak in Sin a-om ding a, Thebes leng achim vek ding; Memphis in sun chiang in melma anei nilouh ding hi. 17Aven leh Pibeseth kho tangvalte namsau in apuk ding ua, huai khuate sal a pi in a-om ding uh. 18Aigupta hakkol ka hihtan a, ahatna akisaktheihpih ka hihbei hun Tehphanhes ah ni amial ding; amah zaw meipi in aliah ding a, atanute sal a pi in a-om ding uh. 19Hichibang in Aigupta gam ah thu ka tangtungsak ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.Aigupta Kumpipa Thilhihtheihna Kisia 20Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawm-le-khatna, akha khatna, huai kha ani sagih ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, 21“Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh ban ka kitansak a, ngai in, namsau tawi ding ahat nawnna ding in damdawi nuh leh tuam aloh kei hi. 22Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh ka dou ahi, aban hoih lam leh akitansa nunglam leng ka kitansak ding a; huchi in akhut a kipan namsau ka kitansak ding hi. 23Aigupta mite namte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka thelthangsak ding. 24Babulon kumpipa bante ka hatsak ding a, akhut ah namsau ka tawisak ding a; Pharaoh bante ka kitansak ding a, ama ah sihpih khop liam mau in amau ding hi. 25Huchi in Babulon kumpipa bante ka hatsak ding a, Pharaoh bante bel aluaikhe ding; Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka namsau ka tawisak a, Aigupta kumpipa tung a alik hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. 26Aigupta mite namte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka thelthangsak vek ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in. 30Toupa'n Aigupta Gawt Ding

EZEKIEL 31: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawm-le-khatna, akha thumna, huai kha ani khat ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: 2“Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh leh akhua leh amite kiang ah gen inla: Na thupina ah kua toh na kibang a ahia? 3“Ngai in, Assuria tuh Lebanon a sidar ahi a, hiang kilawm leh bawkpha, lim sah,sang kilawm, mei lak ah adawn a-om hi. 4Tui in ahon vak a, tui thuk inakhangsak hulhul, aphuhna luite'n aluan kual ua, gam sing chih vakna ding in aluangsak hi. 5Huchi in gam sing teng zou in asang tuan a;tuite akidaih zoh ziak inakungpite khanglian in,ahiangte asau uaamengkhesak hi. 6Ahiang ah tungleng vasate'nbu abawl ua; ahiang nuai ahsa chiteng in nou anei ua;alimnuai ah nam thupi teng ateng uhi. 7Huchi in athupina ah akilawm a,ahiangte sauna bang zel in;azungte lah tui tampite kiang ah a-om ngal a, 8Pathian huan a sidar singte'naphazou kei ua; abawk,meilah sing in adem zou kei a;ahiang sesing in aphazou sam kei; akilawmna ah Pathian huan a sing abang zou kei hi. 9Ahiang tamsak in ka bawlhoiha, Pathian huan a Eden sing teng in ahaza uhi,” chi in. 10Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ahong san mahmah a, meipi lak a adawn alen a, alungtang a asandan akisaktheihpih ziak in, 11namte lak ah mihattak khut ah ka mansak ding a; athulimlouhdan bang in agawt ding a, ka delhkhe ding. 12Huchi in gamdangmi, namte lak a kihtakhuai mahmahte'n aphuk ding ua, anuse ding uh; tangte, phaizangte ah ahiangte ake lemlum ding a, huai gam tuiluanna phaizang tengteng ah ahiangte akitan lemlum ding; leitung a mi tengteng alimnuai a kipan apawtkhe ding ua, amah apaisan ding uh. 13Asiatna ah tungleng vasa tengteng ateng ding ua, abawk tung ah gamsate a-om ding uh.

EZEKIEL 31: 14Hiai bel tui a vak sing tengteng akisansak louh ua, adawn uh meipi kal a lengsak lou a, tui a vak sing in asandan uh asuan samlouhna ding uh ahi; lei mun nuainungpen a kokhuk a paisukta, mihing tate lak ah pai ding in, sihna a matsak ahi vekta ngal ua.” 15Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sheol a apaisuk ni in amah ka sunsak a, luitui thuktakte ka khawlsak a; huai ah tui tampi let dingte ka daltan a; Lebanon amah ka sunsak lai a; gam sing tengteng amah ziak in agim khin uhi. 16Namte leng apuk ging ah ka lingsak a, kokhuk a paisuksate kiang a Sheol a ka paihkhiak ni in; Eden sing tengteng, Lebanon sing hoih tata, tui a vak tengteng lei nuainungpen ah lungmuang in a-omta uhi. 17Namsau a thahte kiang ah Sheol ah apaisuk ua; ahi, namte lak a, alimnuai a tengte leh namte lak a akizoppihte toh hankhuk atungsuk uhi.” 18“Thupina leh letna ah Eden singte lak a kua ahia nang bang om? Himahleh Eden singte toh lei mun nuainungpen ah paihkhiak na hi ding; namsau a thah, zeksumlouhte lak ah na lum ding hi. Hiai bel Pharaoh leh akhua-le-tuite ahi uh,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 31Aigupta, Sidar Sing Toh Tehpih Ahi

EZEKIEL 32: 1Huan hiai ahi, akum sawm-le-nihna, akha sawm-le-nihna, huai kha ani khat ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi: 2Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh suunna la phuak inla, akiang ah, “Namte humpinelkai lun lai kibatpih; tuipi a olepi na bang zaw hi; na nak a tuite phuansak in, na khe in na toknin a, aluite uh na ninsak vekta. 3Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ka len in ka hon khuh ding a, mi tampi toh, ka len in nang ahon man ngeingei ding uh. 4Gamlak ah ka hon nuse ding a, gamlak ah ka hon pai ding; tung a leng tengteng ka samkhawm ding a, na tung ah; nang in leitung pumpi gamsa ka taisak ding hi. 5Tang chih ah na sa ka lui ding a; na luang in phaizangte ka dimsak ding. 6Na tenna gam tang tan in, na sisan in ka sil ding a, phaizang chih leng nangmah in adim ding hi. 7Ka hon chimihsak hun chiang in, van ka khuh in aksi ka mialsak ding a; meipi in nisa ka liahmang ding; huan kha in avakna asuah kei ding hi. 8Na tung ah van a vak tengteng ka mialsak ding a; na gam ah khomial ka lengsak ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. 9Na theih louh gam a namte lak a na siatna ka tunsak hun chiang in mi tampite lungtang ka lungzingsak ding. 10Ahi, mi tampi nangmah ah lamdang sa in ka bawl ding a, ama ua ka namsau ka leh hun chiang in nang ziak in akumpipate uh leng mulkimhuai asa un alau mahmah ding uh; na puk ni in michih in ahinna uh tan lau in alingling ding uhi. 11Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a; Babulon kumpipa namsau na tung ah ahong tung dek hi.

EZEKIEL 32: 12Na mite ka puksak ding, galhat mite namsau in, namte lak a kihtakhuai pente ahi ua, ahihse ding uh. Aigupta mite thupina, amipite tengteng ahihmang ding uh. 13Tui tampi gei gamsa teng ka hihmang ding a; mi khete'n angap ninta kei ding; gamsa khete'n leng angap nin sam kei ding hi. 14Huchi in tui ka chimsak ding a, ka luangsak ding, luite, sathau bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 15Aigupta gam ka hihsegawp ding a, ahauhna tengteng ah vuaktang in, asung a tengte ka phukmang hun in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ngei ding uh. 16Hiai akahla ding uh ahi; namte tanute'n hiai kah in Aigupta leh ami tengteng asuun ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Misite Khovel 17Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawm-le-nihna, huai kha ani sawm-le-nga ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: 18“Mihing tapa, Aigupta mipite kah ekek inla, amah leh nam minthangtak tanu kokhuk a paisuk khinte toh lei nuainung lam ah paikhia in. 19“Kilawmna ah kua akhup a?Paisuk inla zeksumlouhte lak ah lum in. 20“Namsau a thahsate lak ah apuk ding ua, namsau kiang a piak ahi khin ua, amah leh amite tengteng kaimang un. 21Sheol a om galhatmi mahmahte'n amah leh apanpih mite ahoupih ding ua; apaisuk ua, alum nilouh uh, namsau a thah, zeksumlouhte. 22“Huai ah Assuria leh aheute tengteng a-om ua; ahante uh amah kim ah a-om a; avek un thah, namsau a puk vek ahi uh. 23Ahante uh kokhuk thukpen ah a-om a, ahan kim ah aheute a-om uh; avek ua thah, namsau a puk vek, mihing gam galmuangsak lou mite ahi uh. 24“Huai ah Elam leh ahan kim ah aheute a-om ua;

EZEKIEL 32: avek ua, namsau a puk, lei nuainung a zeksum louh apaisuk ua, mihing gam galmuangsak lou mite, azahlakna uh kokhuk a paipih sukte ahi uhi. 25Mithahte lak ah amah leh aheute lupna abawlsak ua, ahante amah kim ah a-om a; avek un zeksum louh, namsau a thah ahi ua; akihtakhuaina uh mihing gam gallauna ahi nak a; kokhuk a paisuktate toh azahlakna uh apua ua, mithahte lak ah a-omsak uhi. 26“Huai ah Meshek leh Tubal, aheute uh toh a-om ua; ahante uh amau kim ah a-om a; avek un zeksum louh, namsau a thah ahi uh; akihtakhuaina un mihing gam ahihmang zel hi. 27Zeksum louh, mihat pukte, kidouna galvan toh Sheol a paisuktate, anamsau uh lukham a nei, aguhte uh tung a alum uh omte kiang ah alum kei uh; amau lah mihing gam a mihatte launa ahi. 28“Nang zaw zeksumlouhte lak ah kitan lemlum in na om ding a, namsau a site kiang ah na lum ding hi. 29“Huai ah Edom, akumpipate leh aheutute tengteng a-om ua; ahatna ua; namsau a thahte lak ah asial uh hi; zeksum louh, kokhuk a paisuksate kiang alum uhi. 30“Huai ah mallam heutute, avek un, Sidon mi tengteng, thahte lak a paisuksate a-om ua, ahatna un mi agallausak nak a, azum ua, zeksum louh in namsau a thahte lak ah alum ua; kokhuk a paisuk khinte toh azahlak khawmta uhi. 31“Pharaoh in amaute amu ding a, amite tengteng a lungmuan loh ding, Pharaoh leh asepaihhon tengteng, namsau a thahte ngei leng, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 32“Mihing gam ah gallauna alengsak a, zeksum louh, namsau a thahte lak ah alum ding uhi, Pharaoh leh ami tengteng ngei, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” achi hi. 32Aigupta Kumpipa Ole Toh Tehpih Ahi

EZEKIEL 33: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, 2“Mihing tapa, na nam tate kiang ah thu gen inla, akiang uah, gam tung a namsau ka hon tutleh gam mite'n alak ua pat mi khat atelkhiak ua, galvilmi dia akoih uleh, 3ama'n gam tung a namsau hong tung amuhleh pengkul amut ding a, mipite akigalgingsak ding hi. 4Huchi in pengkul ging za a poisaloumi kuapeuh, namsau hong tung in manloh tamahleh, asisan moh amah mah in apo ding ahi. 5Pengkul ging azak a apoisak louh ziak in asisan moh akipuak mai ding ahi; ana poisakleh bel ahinna ahumbit ding ahi. 6Himahleh galvilmi in namsau hong tung amuh a, apengkul amut louh a, mipite akigalgin louh ua, namsau ahong tun a, alak ua mi kuahiam in amanlohleh athulimlouhna in amangthang ding a, galvilmi khut ah asisan phu ka ngiat ding,” chi in. 7Huchibang in nang, mihing tapa, Israel inkote a dia galvilmi dia ka hon bawl na hi; huaiziak in ka kam a thupawt ngaikhia inla, ka kiang a kipan kigalginna ding thu akiang uah hilh in. 8Migilou kiang ah, “Aw migilou, si mahmah ding na hi,” ka chih a, migilou a-omdan paisan ding a na hilh keileh migilou agitlouhna ah asi ding a, asisan phu bel nang a kipan ka la ding. 9Himahleh migilou a-omdan paisan ding a na hilh a, a-omdan apaisan kei laileh, agitlouhna ah asi ding a, nang bel na hinna na humbit ding hi.Mimal Mohpuakna 10Huan mihing tapa, nang Israel inkote kiang ah thu gen inla, hichibang in na chi ua, “Ka tatleknate uh leh ka khelhnate un ahon delhkhum a, huaiziak in ka thanggawp uh ahi, bangchi in ka hing nilouh thei ding ua?” na chi uhi.

EZEKIEL 33: 11Kei ka hin bang in, migilou sihna ah kipahna ka nei kei a, migilou in a-omdan apaisan a ahin ka kipah lam ahi zaw. Na omdan hoih lou ua kipan kik un, kik un, Aw Israel inkote, bangziak a si ding na hi ua? chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in gen in. 12“Nang, mihing tapa, na nam tate kiang ah gen inla, midiktat diktanna in atatlekna ni in amah ahumbit kei ding a, migilou gitlouhna in leng athulimlouhna alehngatsan ni in apuksak kei ding a, midiktat lah akhelhna ni in adiktatna in ahing thei tuan sam kei ding. 13Midiktat kiang ah, na hing ngeingei ding, chih ka gen in, adiktatna muang a thil ahihkhelhleh athil dik hih khat leng theihgige ahi kei ding; athilhihkhelhsa ah asi zaw ding. 14Huan migilou kiang ah, ‘Na si ngeingei ding,’ ka chih nawn leuleu in, agitlouhnate alehngatsan a asiang leh adik ana hih a, 15migilou in mi koih khamnate pekik a, athilgukte apiak nawn a, hinna dante azuih a, thulimlouhna bangmah ahihkeileh ahing ngeingei ding a, asi kei ding hi. 16Khelhna ana hihsa bangmah theihgige ahita kei ding a, asiang leh adik ana hihta a, ahing ngeingei ding hi. 17“Himahleh na nam tate'n, ‘Toupa thilhihdan akikim kei,’ achih un amau hihdan adiktat kei zaw hi. 18Midiktat in adiktatna alehngatsan a, thil gilou ana hihleh huaiziak in asi mai ding. 19Huan migilou in agitlouhna alehngatsan a, asiang leh adik ahihleh huaiziak in ahing ding.
