EZEKIEL 33: 20Himahleh, ‘Toupa hihdan akikim kei,’ na chi ua, aw Israel inkote michih noumau hihdan bang in vai ka hon hawmsak ding hi,” achi hi.Jerusalem Pukna Thuthang 21Huan hichi ahong hi a, i saltan akum sawm-le-nihna, akha sawmna, huai kha ani nga ni in Jerusalem a kipan taikhia mi khat ka kiang ah ahong pai a, “Khopi zoh ahita,” ahong chi hi. 22Huai mi taikhia ahong tun ma nitaklam in Toupa'n ka tung ah akhut anga a; zinglam a ka kiang a hong pai in ka kam ahon kasak a, huchi in ka kam ka ka a, pau thei lou in ka om nawnta kei hi.Mipite Khelhnate 23 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, 24“Mihing tapa, Israel gam a mun segawpsa nung a omte'n, ‘Abraham khat ahi a, gam aluah a; eite bel tampi i hi ua, gam gouluah ding a piak hita ve hang,’ chi in agen uhi. 25Huaiziak in akiang uah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ‘Sa sisan na ne ua, na milimte uh lam ah na mitte uh na lengtousak ua; sisan na suah ua, noute'n gam na tang ding uh maw? 26Na namsau uh na muang ua; thilkihhuai na hih ua; michih in invengpa zi na hihbuah ua; noute'n gam na tang ding uh maw?’ 27Hichibang a akiang ua na gen ding ahi, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ‘Kei ka hin bang in, mun segawpsa nung a omte namsau in apuk ngeingei ding ua, gamlak a omte sahang kiang ah nek khit dia pe ding ka hi; kulh kip leh khuk a omte hipi in asi ding uh. 28Gam leng ka hihsia in, mulkimhuaitak in ka bawl ding a; athilhihtheihna, akisaktheihpih abeita ding; Israel tangte asegawp ding a, kuamah avialvak nawnta kei ding uh.

EZEKIEL 33: 29Thilkihhuai ahih ziak ua gam ka hihgawp a, mulkimhuaitak a ka bawl hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.’ ”Zawlnei Thugen Gahte 30Huan nang, mihing tapa, baang bul ah kongpite ah na nam tate'n ahon ngen susup ding ua, michih in a-unaute kiang ah, “Kisa dih ua, Toupa kiang a kipan thupawt i ngaikhe ding uh, akichi ding uh. 31Huchi in ahonhon in na kiang ah ahong pai ding ua, ka mite bang mai in na ma ah ahong tu ding ua, na thu ahong ngaikhe ding ua, himahleh azui tuan kei ding uh; akam un itna thupitak ahihlang ding ua, alungtang un bel punna lam azuan ding. 32Ngai in, nang bel amau a ding in itna la, kilawmtak a sak leh tum bang na hi ding; na thute angaikhia ua, himahleh azui tuan kei ding uh. 33Amite Vengtu Ding In Pathian In Ezekiel Asep(Eze 3.16-21)

EZEKIEL 34: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: 2“Mihing tapa, Israelte belamchingte tung ah thu gen in, thu gen inla, akiang uah, belamchingte kiang mahmah ah, huchi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: Israelte belamching, amau kivak maimahte tung agik hi; belamchingte'n belamte vak lou ding ahi uhia? 3Athaute na ne ua, amul in na kizem ua; athauthau na gou ua, belamte na vak kei uhi. 4Natna veite, avakmangte na hon pi kei ua; amangte na zong kei ua; khauhtak leh na mahmah in na thunun zaw uh. 5Belampute a-om louh ziak un dalhsak in ana omta ua; ana dalh ua, gam sahangte an lel ahong hita uhi. 6Ka belamte tang chih leh mual chih ah avakmang ua; ahi, ka belamte leitung tengteng ah ana dalh khin uh; limsakmi leh zongmi a-om kei uh, chi in gen in,” achi hi. 7Huaiziak in belamchingte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un; 8Kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, belamching a-om louh ua, belamchingte'n ka belamte azon louh ua, belamchingte'n ka belamte avak louh ua, amau akivak zawksop ziak un ka belamte gam sahangte an lel ahong hi ua; ka belamte samat lel ahong hi petmah uh. 9Huaiziak in nou belamchingte aw, Toupa thu za un. 10Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: Ngai un, belamchingte ka dou ahi; akhut ua kipan ka belamte ka sut ding a, ka belamte akepna uh ka tawpsak ding a, belamchingte leng amau akivakta kei ding uh; a-angsung ua kipan ka belamte ka lakhe ding a, amau dia nek ding ahih nawnlouhna ding un, chi in.Belamchingpa Hoih 11Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi ngal a: Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in ka zong ding a, ka zongkhe ding hi.

EZEKIEL 34: 12Belamching in abelam dalhte lak a abelamhonte azon lai bang in ka belamte ka zongkhe ding; khonim ni leh mial nuai a adalhna tengteng ua kipan ka zongkhe ding, 13Huan mite lak a kipan ka lakhe ding a; gam chih a kipan ka kaikhawm ding a; amau gam ngei ah ka pilut ding; Israel tangte ah, lui geite ah, mi tenna mun tengtengte ah ka tasak ding. 14Loupa hoihna munte ah ka tasak ding a; ahuangsung uh Israel tang sangte ah a-om ding; huang hoihtak sung ah leng a-om ding ua, Israel tang tung a loupa dawng munte ah ata ding uh. 15Kei mahmah in ka belamte ka vak ding a; ka kualsak kinken ding a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 16Amang ka zong ding a, delhmangte ka pikik nawn ding a, akhe kitante uh ka tuam ding a, ka hatsak ding; athau leh ahatte leng ka ching ding a; diktak in ka vak ding hi. 17Huan nou tungthu ahihleh, aw ka belamhonte, hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi: Ngai un, ka belamte kal thu ka gensak ding a, belamtalte, keltalte leng. 18Gantatna mun hoihtak tung a tat nou ding in thil bang tham lou bang alang in, na tatna neihsun na chilse zosop uh ahi maw? 19Huan tuichim mahmahte na dawn khit un na ngap nin mawkmawk uh ahi maw? Ka belamte'n na siksa uh ane un, na ngahsa uh adawn ding uh maw? 20Huaiziak in hichi in Toupa Pathian in akiang uah achi: Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in gan gawngte leh gan thaute kal thu ka ngaihtuah ding hi. 21Ahatloute na liang un leh na sikte un na phu ua, na khete un na pik ua, na dalhsak uhi. 22Huaiziak in ka belamte ka humbit ding;

EZEKIEL 34: samat lel ahi nawn kei ding ua, belamte kal thu ka gensak ding hi. 23Huan atung uah belamchingpa khat, ka sikhapa David ngei ka koih ding a; ama'n amaute avak ding a; amah amau chingpa ahi ding a, amaute avak ding hi. 24Huchi in kei a Toupa Pathian uh ka hi ding a, ka nasempa David atung ua heutu ahi ding; kei Toupa ngei in ka chita hi. 25Amau toh lemna thukhun ka bawl ding a, sahangte gam a kipan ka hihmang ding; gamdai ah leng bittak in ateng ding ua, gammang nuaite ah a-ihmu hithit ding uhi. 26Amau leh ka mual kim munte ka vualzawl ding a; ahun geihgeih in vuah ka zusak ding a, vualzawl vuahte azu ding hi. 27Huan gam a sing in gah asuah ding a, lei in apunna asuah ding a; agam uah bittak in a-om ding uh; ahakkolte uh ka kitansak a, sikha a bawl mite khut a kipan ka hutkhiak hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. 28Namdangte samat lel ahi nawnta kei ding ua, gam sahangte nekmang mai ahi nawn kei ding uh; bittak in a-om zawta ding ua, kuamah in alausak ngei nawn kei ding uh. 29Thilsuan minthang mahmah ka bawlsak ding a; huai gam ah kial in ahihmang nawn kei ding a, namdangte muhsitna leng athuak nawn kei ding uh. 30Huan kei Toupa a Pathian uh akiang uah ka om chih athei un, amau Israel inkote leng ka mite ahi uh chih athei ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 31Huan nou ka belamte, ka gantatna mun a belamte na hi ua; kei na Pathian uh ka hi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in. 34Israel Chingtu Kilembawlte

EZEKIEL 35: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, 2“Mihing tapa, Seir tang masuan inla, atung ah thu gen in. Akiang ah, 3Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi:Ngai in, Aw Seir tang, ka hon dou hi,na tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a,ka hon hihgawp in mulkimhuaitak in ka hon bawl ding. 4Na khopite ka hihse ding a,na kigawp ding;huan Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding.” 5Na nitna uh gawtna nanungpen a asiat ni ua Israel inkote namsau thilhihtheihna a na lat a, na kinakpih gige ziak in, 6kei ka hin bang in, sisan a ding in ka hon bawl ding a, sisan in ahon delh ding; sisan na huat louh ziak in sisan in ahon delh ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 7Hichi in Seir tang bel mulkimhuaitak a bawl in ka sugawp ding; atung a mi vialvakte ka tawpsak vek ding hi. 8Atangte amah mithahte in ka dimsak ding; na tangte ah, na phaizang leh na lui phaizang kuakte ah namsau a thahte apuk phengphung ding uh. 9Ka hon sugawp den ding a, na khopite luah in a-om kei ding; huan kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding hi. 10 Toupa zaw a-om gige na a, “Hiai nam nihte leh gam nihte kei a ahi ding a, ka tang mai ding uh,” na chih ziak in. 11Kei ka hin bang in chih, Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, na hehna bang zel leh na huatna ziak a hazatna na suklatdan bang zel in ka hih ding ahi; na tungthu ka ngaihtuah hun chiang in alak uah ka hihlang ding hi. 12“Hihgawp in a-omta ua, ka kiang ah piak in a-omta uh,” chi a Israel tangte na gensiatna tengteng kei Toupa'n ka za vek chih na thei ding hi.

EZEKIEL 35: 13Ka tung ah na kam in na kiliansak in ka tung ah thu na tamsak a, ka za vek hi. 14Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: Lei pumpi kipahna ding in ka hon sugawp ding hi. 15Israelte gouluah asiat ziak a na kipah mah bang in na tung ah ka hih ding; Aw Seir tang leh Edom tengteng, avek in akisegawp ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 35Edom Gawtna

EZEKIEL 36: 1Huan nang mihing tapa, Israel tangte kiang ah thu gen inla, “Nou Israel tangte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: 2Na tung ah na melmate'n, ‘Aha! Nidang mun sang tengtengte kei a ahita, achih ziak un,’ ” thu gen in. 3Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Nam omsunte a ding a kil chih a nang ahon nek ua, hon sukgawp ziak un leh mikamtamte houlimna leh gensiat a ahon omsak ziak un; 4Nou Israel tangte aw, Toupa Pathian thu ngaikhia un, Toupa Pathian in tangte, mualte, luiguamte, phaizangte leh mun sesate, khopi kigawpsa, akim a nam omsunte samat lel ding leh nuihsan dingte kiang ah hichi in achi. 5Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Nam omsun leh Edom tengteng lungsim kipaktak a ka gam na na kiseh tawm ua; na hon musit mahmah ua, gallak a bawl mite tung ah ka mullitna thangpaih mahmahna in thu ka gen ngei ahi. 6Huaiziak in Israel gam tungthu ah thu gen inla, tangte, mualte, luiguamte leh phaizangte kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, namdangte simmohna na thuak ziak un mullit mahmah leh thangpaitak in thu ka gen ahi. 7Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na kim a namte'n amau zahlakna apo ngei ding uh chi in ka khut ka zak hi. 8Nou bel, Aw Israel tangte aw, hiang na suah ding ua, ka mi Israelte a ding in gah na suah ding uh; ahong pai dek uhi. 9Ngai un, nou lam a pang ka hi ngal a, nou lam ka nga ding a, kalhnen in na om ding ua, chi tuh in na om lai ding uh. 10Na tung uah mihing ka pungsak ding a, Israel inkote tengteng, avek un;

EZEKIEL 36: mun sesate bawlphat in a-om ding a, khopite luah in a-om ding. 11Na tung uah mi leh sa ka pungsak ding a, apung un alamzang ding uh; na omdan masa bang in luah in ka hon omsak ding a, atung a na omdan sang ua hoihzaw in ka hon bawl ding hi; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 12Ahi, na tung uah mi ka vaksak ding a, ka mi Israelte ngei; ahon luah ding ua, agoutan uh na hi ding a, tuban siah atate uh na tansak ngei nawn kei ding hi. 13Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Nang mihingte nemang, na mite tansek na hi, ahon chih ziak un, 14mihingte na ne bei nawnta kei ding a, na mite leng na tan ngei na hon sam kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 15Pau tuam mite muhsitna ka hon thuaksak nawn kei ding a, mite gensiat na thuak ngei nawn kei ding; na mite na tan ngei nawn kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.Israel Hinkho Thak 16 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, 17“Mihing tapa, Israel inkote amau gam a aten lai un a-omdan uleh athilhihte un akihihnin ua; ka ma a a-omdan uh numei kizen louh lai a asianthoulouhna bang mai ahi. 18Huaiziak in gam tung ah sisan asuah ua, amilimte ua akihihnit ziak un atung uah ka hehna ka lungdamsak hi. 19Namte lak ah ka dalhsak a, gam chih ah athehthangta ua; a-omdan uleh athilhihte uh bang zel in atungthu uh ka gensak hi. 20Ava hohna namte kiang atun un ka min siangthou ahihbuah ua; mite'n, ‘Hiaite Toupa mite ahi ua, gam a kipan hong pawtkhete ahi uh,’ ” ana chih nakna uah.

EZEKIEL 36: 21Himahleh Israel inkote'n ava hohna namte lak a ahihbuah uh, ka min siangthou ka lainat ahi. 22Huaiziak in Israel inkote kiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, Israel inkote, noute ka hon lainat ziak hilou in, na va hohna namte lak a na hihbuah uh, ka min siangthou ka lainat ziak zaw in hiai ka hih ahi. 23Ka min thupitak, namte lak a buah, alak ua noumau ngei in na hihbuah uh ka siangthousak ding ahi; huchi in amitmuh ua noute a hihsiangthou a ka om hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 24Namte lak a kipan ka hon pikhe ding a, gam tengteng a kipan ka hon kaikhawm ding a, na gam mahmah uah ka hon pilut ding hi. 25Huan na tung uah tui siang ka theh ding a, na hong siangthou ding ua, na nitna tengteng uleh na milimte lak ua kipan ka hon khuahsiang ding. 26Lungtang thak ka hon pe ding a, na sung uah kha thak ka koih ding; na taksa ua kipan suang bang a sak lungtang ka lamang ding a, taksa bang a nip lungtang ka hon pe zaw ding hi. 27Na sung uah ka kha ka koih ding a, ka dan bawl ah ka hon vaksak ding a, ka thupiakte na kem ding ua, na zui ding uh. 28Na pipute uh kiang a ka piak gam ah na teng ding uh; nou ka mite na hi ding ua, kei na Pathian uh ka hi ding. 29Na nitna tengteng ua kipan ka hon hunkhe ding a, buh-le-bal ka sam ding a ka hon pungsak ding, na tung uah kial ake nawn kei ding hi.

EZEKIEL 36: 30Singgahte ka pungsak ding a, louma ka pungsak ding a, kial ziak in namte lak ah zahlakna na thuak kei ding uh. 31Huchi in na omdan giloute uh, na thil hihhoihloute uh na theigige ding ua, na kihhuaina uleh na thulimlouhna uh ziak in noumau mitmuh mahmah in na kihta ding uhi. 32Noute ziak a hiai hih ka hi kei chih na thei mai un, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Aw, Israel inkote aw, na omdan ziak un zum unla, lamdang sa un. 33Na thulimlouhna tengteng ua kipan ka hon khuahsiang ni chiang in, khopite ka hon luahsak nawn ding a, mun sesa ka bawl nawn ding. 34Huchi in gam sesa, tuma lam a mi vialvakte mitmuh a sesa nung himahleh lei leh in a-om ding hi. 35Hiai gam sesa nung Eden huan bang mai ahong hi nawnta, achi ding uh; khopi sia a, na kigawpsate luah leh um in a-om nawn ding hi. 36Israel Tung A Pathian Vualzawlna 37Huan Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Huai lou in hiai Israel inkote ka hon dingsak ding a; ganhon bang mai a amite uh hihpung ding in. 38Kithoihna ding ganhon, a-ankuanglui sehsa a Jerusalem ganhonte bang mai in; huchibang in khopi sesa nung mipi tampi in ahong dim ding ua; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.

EZEKIEL 37: 1 Toupa khut ka tung ah a-om a, Toupa kha in ahon pikhia a, phaizang laitak ah hon koih a; guh ngen in huai phaizang adim hi. 2Huan alak uah ahon pi vialvial a; phaizang ah guh tampi ana om lemlom a; ngai dih, akeu ngen ahi. 3Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai guhte ahing thei diam?” achi hi. Ke'n, “Aw, Toupa Pathian, nang na theizaw hi,” ka chi hi. 4Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Thu gen inla, akiang uah, ‘Aw, nou guh keute aw, Toupa thu ngai un. 5Hiai guhte kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, noute ah nakna ka lutsak ding a, na hing ding uh. 6Noute ah thagui ka koih ding a, sa in ka hon tuam ding a, vun in ka hon khuh ding; huan na sung uah nakna ka omsak ding a, na hing ding ua, kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh,’ chi in,” achi hi. 7Huchi in ahon thupiak bang in ka genta a; ka gen leh husa ahong om a, ngai in, aging luilui a, guhte amau kizoppih chiat ah akisutuah khawmta uh. 8Ka etleh ngai in, amau ah thagui ahong om a, sa in atuam a, vun in akhuhta a; nakna bel amau ah a-om nai kei hi. 9Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Huih kiang ah thu gen inla, mihing tapa, gen mahmah in, huih kiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, nakna, kawlmong li a kipan in hong pai inla, hiai mithahte tung ah nak in, ahintheihna ding un, chi in,” achi hi. 10Huchi in ahon thupiak bang in ka gen a, amau ah nakna ahong lut a, ahingta ua, amau khe chiat in ahong dingh ua, sepaihhon thupitak ahong hita hi.

EZEKIEL 37: 11Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai guhte Israel inkote pumpi ahi ua; ngai dih, amau, ‘Ka guhte uh akeu khin in, ka lamet uh abei khinta, phukmang in ka omta uh,’ achi uhi. 12Huaiziak in thu gen inla, akiang uah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, ahante uh ka hong ding a, aw, ka mite aw, na han ua kipan ka hon khah ding a; huchi in Israel gam ah ka hon pilut ding hi. 13Na hante uh ka hon a, na han ua kipan ka hon pawtsak hun chiang in, aw, ka mite aw, Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. 14Huan noumau ah ka Kha ka koih ding a, na hing ding uh, na gam ngei uah ka hon koih ding; kei Toupa'n ka chita a, ka hih lai ding ahi chih na thei ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi,” achi hi.Judah Leh Israel, Lalgam Khat Ah 15Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi. 16Nang, mihing tapa, chiang khat la inla, atung ah, “Judah leh akithuahpih Israel suante,” chih gelh in; chiang dang leng la inla, atung ah, “Joseph leh Ephraim chiang leh akithuahpih Israel inkote tengteng,” chih gelh in. 17Huan chiangte peh inla, na khut a khat ahihtheihna ding in. 18“Hiaite bang chihna ahi ua, na hon kawkmuh kei dia hia?” Na nam tate un na kiang ahon chih uleh, akiang uah, 19Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, Ephraim leh akithuahpih Israel chite khut a om Joseph chiang ka la ding a, huaite Judah chiang toh ka peh ding a, khat in ka bawl ding a, ka khut ah khat ahong hi ding, na chi ding hi. 20Chiang, atung a na gelhnate mahmah amitmuh ngei uah na khut ah a-om ding hi.

EZEKIEL 37: 21Huan akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, ava tunna gam ua namte lak a kipan Israel tate ka pikhe ding a, ning chih a kipan ka kaikhawm ding a, agam uah ka pikik ding hi. 22Huan huai gam, Israel tangte ah nam khat in ka bawl ding a, kumpipa khat avek ua kumpipa ahi dia; huan, nam nih ahi nawnta kei ding ua, vaihawmna gam nih in leng akikhen nawn sam kei ding hi. 23Amilimte uh, athilkihhuaite uh, atatleknate un leng akihihnin ngei nawnta kei ding ua; apuk ua akhelhna nak tengteng ua kipan ka hunkhe ding a, ka khuahsiang ding; huchi in ka mite ahi ding ua, kei a Pathian uh ka hi ding hi. 24Ka nasempa David atung ua kumpipa ahi ding a, avek ua tung ah belamchingtu khat a-om ding; ka thupiakte amang ding ua, ka dan bawlte azui ding ua, azang ding uh. 25Ka nasempa Jakob kiang a ka gam piak, na pipute uh na tenna sek ah ateng ding ua; huai ah tangtawn in ateng ding ua, amau leh atate uh, atate uh tate leng; ka nasempa David tangtawn in aheutu uh ahi ding hi. 26Huai lou leng amau kiang ah lemna thukhun ka bawl ding a, amau a ding in tangtawn thukhun ahi ding a, akiang uah ka pe ding a, amau ka pungsak ding a, alak uah tangtawn in ka biakbuk ka dingsak ding hi. 27Ka biakbuk leng akiang uah a-om ding a, a Pathian uh ka hi ding a, amau ka mite ahi ding uh. 28Huan alak ua tangtawn a ding a ka biakbuk adin hun chiang in kei Toupa, Israel hihsiangthoupa ka hi chih namte'n athei ding uh, achi, chi in. 37Guh Keu Phaizang

EZEKIEL 38: 1 Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: 2“Mihing tapa, Magog gam a mi, Rosh leh Meshek leh Tubal heutupen Gog masuan inla, atung ah thu gen in. 3Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, aw Gog, Rosh, Meshek leh Tubal heutupen, ka hon dou ahi. 4Ka hon lehngatsak ding a, na haizek ah ngakuai in ka hon kuai ding a, ka hon khaikhe ding; na sepaihhon tengteng, sakol leh atungtuang mite, galvan buching a kithuam tengteng, pawl thupitak, lum lian leh lum neu zang a namsau tawi chiatte toh in. 5Persia, Kush, Put toh, avek ua lum leh sik lukhu neite; 6Gomer leh asepaihhon tengteng; Togarmah inkote, mal tawp a mi leh asepaihhon tengteng; na kiang a mi tampite toh leng. 7Kigalgin inla, ahi, na man in, nang leh na kiang a omkhawm, na kithuahpih tengteng toh; huan amau vengpa na hi in. 8Ni tampi nung in sap na hi ding a, kum nanungte ah namsau a kipan hotkhiak, nam tampite lak a kipan lakkhawmte omna gam, Israel tanggam kise gigete na hon sual ding a; himahleh namte lak a kipan huai mite pikhiak ahi ua, tu in avek un lungmuangtak in akhosa ding uhi. 9Na kuantou ding a, huihpi bang mai in na hong tung ding a, meipi in gam atuam moimoi bang mai na hi ding, nang leh na kiang a sepaihhon tengteng leh na kiang a mi tampite.” 10Huan hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, na lungsim ah thil a hong lut ding a, thil hoih lou na suangtuah ding.

EZEKIEL 38: 11Huchi in kulh nei lou khuate gam ka sim ding a, mi bittak a om hiathiat, avek ua kulh lou a teng, kulh kongkhak leh akalhna sik neiloute ka sual ding, na chi sim ding hi. 12Gallak sum leh vante la ding leh mun sesa nung luah nawn mite leh namte lak a kipan pikhawmsa, ganhon leh vante hau a, lei laizang a tengte tung ah na khut lik na tum ding hi. 13Sheba leh Dedan leh Tarshish sumsin mite leh ahumpinelkai lun lai tengtengte'n na kiang ah, gallak la ding in na hong pai maw? Hon lok ding a na pawlte hon khawm na hi maw? Dangkasik, dangka-eng, ganhon leh van, thupitak suhsak a lamang ding na hi maw? ahon chi ding uh,” chi in. 14Huaiziak in mihing tapa, thu gen inla, Gog kiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Huai ni, ka mi Israelte bittak a a-om hun ding uh na thei kei maw? 15Mallam gam tawp pek, na mun a kipan in na hong pai ding a, nang leh na kiang a mi tampi sakol tungtuang chiat, pawl thupi mahmah, sepaihhon thupitak mai. 16Meipi in gam atuam lunglung bang in ka mi Israelte tung ah na hong pai ding a; huan hichi ahi ding a, ni nanungte ah ka gam dou ding in ka hon pi ding a, namte'n ahon thei ding ua, Aw, Gog, amitmuh ua nang a hihsiangthou a ka om hun chiang in. 17Huan Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Tuma lam a ka nasempa Israel zawlnei, huai lai kum tampi sung a thu na gente'n amaute sual ding a ka hon pi ding thu agen sekpa uh na hi hia?

EZEKIEL 38: chi in,” achi hi.Pathian In Gog Agawtna 18Huan huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Israel gam sual ding a Gog ahong kuan hun in ka mel ah ka thangpaihna akilang ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 19Ka mullit a ka thangpaih laitak in, huai ni in Israel gam ah zin nakpi in aling ngeingei ding hi. 20Huchi in tuipi ngate, tungleng vasate, gamsate, leitung a vak ganhing tengteng, leitung a mihing tengteng ka ma ah aling ding ua, tangte niamsak in a-om ding a, kawlte achim ding a, kulhbaang teng lei ah apuk ding, chi in ka gen hi. 21Ka tang tengteng ah amah sualna ding in namsau ka sam ding a; michih in namsau in a-unaupa adou ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 22Huan sisan pawt leh hipi in amah ka sual ding a; amah leh asepaihhonte leh akiang a mi tampite tung ah vuahpi leh gial thupi leh mei katte ka zusak ding. 23Huan ka thupidan leh ka sianthoudan ka hihlang ding a, nam tampite mitmuh in ka kihihlang ding, huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. 38Gog, Pathian Vanzat

EZEKIEL 39: 1Huan nang, mihing tapa, Gog tung ah thu gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai in, Aw Gog, Rosh, Meshek leh Tubal heutupen, ka hon dou ahi. 2Ka hon lehngatsak ding a, ka hon pi zel ding a, mal tawp pek a kipan ka hon pikhe ding a, Israel tangte ah ka hon tun ding hi. 3Na khut veilam a kipan na thalpeu ka kitansak ding a, na khut taklam a kipan na thalte ka kesak ding hi. 4Israel tangte ah na puk ding a, nang leh na sepaihhon tengteng leh na kiang a mipi omte toh, sasial ne vasa chitengte kiang leh gam sahangte kiang ah nekgaih ding in ka hon pe ding hi. 5Gamlak ah na puk ding a; ke'n ka chita a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. 6Magog leh tui gei gam a bittak a tengte tung ah mei ka khah ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. 7Huan ka mi Israelte lak ah ka min siangthou ka hihlang ding a, ka min siangthou hihbuah ka phal nawnta kei ding a; huchi in namte'n kei, Toupa Israel Mi Siangthoupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. 8Ngai un, ahong tung hi; hihtangtun in a-om ngei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi; hiai ni ahi ka na gen. 9Huan Israel khopi a tengte apawtkhe ding ua, meikuang ah galvante akhul ding ua, akangmang ding; lum lian leh lum neute, thal leh apeute, teipi leh chiangzumte kum sagih sung meikuang ah akhul ding uhi. 10Huchi in gam sing apo kei ding ua, gammang singte aphuk kei ding uh, galvante sing khul ding a zang ding uh ahi ngal a;

EZEKIEL 39: gallak la mite gallak in ala tei ding ua, lok mite alokthuk ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Gog Vuina 11Huan huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Gog a ding in Israel gam ah vuina mun ka pe ding a, tuipi suahlam, Abarim Phaizang ngei; huai in khualzinte adal ding a, Gog leh alawite avui ding ua; huchi in huai phaizang Hamongog Phaizang asa ding uhi. 12Huan Israel inkote'n agam uh khuahsiang in kha sagih sung avui ding uh. 13Ahi, agam ua mi tengteng in avui ding ua; pahtawi a ka om ni in ka minthanna ahi ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 14Agam uh khuahsianna ding in, luang vuilouhte teng zongkhia avui ding in nasep a nei ding mi aseptuam ding uh, kha sagih bei nung in azong pan ding uhi. 15Gam vel mite'n avel un, mihing guhte amuh uleh chiamtehna abawl ding ua, Hamongog Phaizang a vui mite'n avui ma uh. 16Huan Hamonah khopi min ahi ding. Huchibang in gam akhuahsiang ding uhi. 17Nang, mihing tapa, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Vasa chichihte leh sa chichihte kiang ah thu gen inla, pungkhawm unla, hong pai un, sa na nek ua sisan na dawntheihna ding un Israel tang a kithoihna thupitak, nou a dia ka bawl kim ah hong kikhawm un. 18Mithupi sate na ne ding ua, lei a heutute sisan na dawn ding ua; belamtalte, belamnoute, kelte, Bashan gam a bawngtal vak thau tengteng sisan toh. 19Nou a dia kithoihna ankuang ka lui thau, vah kikeih in na ne ding ua; asisan kham khop in na dawn ding uh.

EZEKIEL 39: 20Huchi in sakolte, kangtalai kai mite, mithupite leh galdoumi tengteng in ka ankuang ah na tai ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Israel Tunding Nawnna 21Huchi in namte lak ah ka thupina ka koih ding a, nam tengteng in athugel hihpuksate leh atung ua ka khut khakdante amu ding uh. 22Huai ni a kipan Israel inkote'n kei Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi chih atheita ding uh. 23Namte'n Israel inkote athulimlouhna ziak un sal in atang uh chih athei ding ua; ka tung a aginom louh mahmah ziak un amau tung ah ka mel ka sel a, huchi in amelmate uh khut ah ka pia a, namsau in apuk vek uhi. 24Asianthoulouhna bang zel uleh atatlekna bang zel un atung uah ka hih tei a; amau a kipan ka mel ka sel ahi. 25Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Tu'n zaw Jakobte omdan ka hei ding a, Israel inkuan pumpi tung ah zah ka ngai ding, ka min siangthou gum in ka thikthu ase ding hi. 26Kuamah lausakmi om lou a, agam ua bittak a aten hun un leng atatlekna tengteng uh, ka tung a atatlekna uh leh azahlakna uh apo ding uhi. 27Mite lak a kipan ka pikhiak nawn a, amelmate uh gam a kipan ka kaihkhawm a, amau nam tampi mitmuh a hihsiangthou a ka om hun chiang in. 28Huan namte lak a sal a ka tansak nawn a, agam ngei ua ka pikhawm nawndan ah kei Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi chih athei ding uh; huai ah alak ua khat lel leng ka nuse kei ding hi. 29Amau a kipan ka mel ka sel nawnta kei ding; Israel inkote tung ah ka kha ka sungta ngal a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. 39Gog Vuallehna

EZEKIEL 40: 1I saltan akum sawmnih-le-ngana, huai kum bul, huai kha ani sawmna, khopi siat nung akum sawm-le-lina, huai ni mahmah in Toupa khut ka tung ah ahong om a, huai ah ahon pi hi. 2Pathian mengmuhna ah Israel gam ah ahon pi a, tang sangtak ah ahon koih a, huai simlam ah khopi dinsaksa bangtak a-om hi. 3Huai ah ahon pi a, ngai dih, mi khat ana om a, amel latdan dal bang mai ahi a; khauzang leh tehna chiang atawi a, kongpi ah adingh hi. 4Huan huai mi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na mit in en inla, na bil in za in; ka hon etsak ding lam ah na lungsim nga tinten in; huai ka hon etsak ding ziak a hiai a ka hon pi na hi ngal a; na muh tengteng Israel inkote kiang ah puang in,” achi hi.Suahlam Kongpi 5Huan ngai dih, tempul kimvel ah kulhbaang ana om a, huai mi'n tehna chiang, tong guk a sau atawi a, atong khat bel tong khat leh khutpek bok chia ahi a; kulhbaang sahlam ateh a, chiang khep khat ahi a, asanlam leng chiang khep khat mah ahi. 6Huchi in suahlam chial kongpi ahong tung a, akalbi ah apaitou a; kongpi lutna dantan ateh a, chiang khep khat a za ahi. 7Huan vilna dantante adunglam chiang khep khat, availam chiang khep khat chiat ahi; vilna dantan kikal tong nga chiat ahi a; huan Inpi lam kongpi sumtawng kongpi lutna dantan chiang khep khat ahi. 8Inpi lam sumtawng leng ateh a, tong giat ahi. 9Abaangkate tong nih chiat ahi a, kongpi sumtawng inpi lam ah ahi. 10Huan suahlam kongpi vilna dantante alang tuak ah thum tuaktuak ahi a, athum un akikim vek uhi; huan, baangkate leng alang tuak ah akikim ahi.

EZEKIEL 40: 11Kongpi lutna vailam ateh a, tong sawm ahi a; kongpi paisuakna vailam tong sawmthum ahi. 12Huan vilna dantan ma ah deidanna langkhat ah tong khat a sah tuaktuak a-om a; huchi in vilna dantante lang tuak tong guk tuak ahi hi. 13Huan kongpi ateh a, vilna dantan khat tung a kipan alangkhat tung pha in tong sawmnih-le-nga a za ahi; kongkhak leh kongkhak kizom chiat in. 14Sumtawng leng ateh a, tong sawmnih ahi a; kongpi sumtawng pua bel huangsung ahi kei hi. 15Huan kongpi ponungpen a kipan kongpi sumtawng sunggilpen chiang tong sawmnga ahi. 16Huan kongpi sunglam ah akimvel in dantante ah tohlet hon theih louh a-om a, akikal a khuamte ah leng; asumtawngte ah leng, huchibang mah in asunglam ah leng akimvel in tohlet a-om a, akhuamte ah tum sing lim a-om chiat nawn hi.Huang Ponungzaw 17Huan huangsung ponungzaw ah ahon pi a; ngai dih, dantante a-om a, huangsung kimvel suanglep ahi a; huan, suanglep ah dantan sawmthum a-om hi. 18Huan suanglep bel kongpi a kipan a lep ahi a, kongpi tan ding mah a lep ahi, huai tuh suanglep nuainungzaw ahi. 19Huchi in kongpi nuaizaw pen zawn a kipan in huang sungnungzaw pen polam pha in ateh a, azatdan suahlam leh mallam tong zakhat ahi.Mallam Kongpi 20Huan huangsung ponungzaw pen kongpi mallam pang a adung leh avai leng ateh hi. 21Huan vilna dantante alang tuak ah thum tuaktuak a-om a, abaangkate leh akongpi sumtawngte leng amasa bang vek ahi; adung tong sawmnga ahi a, avai tong sawmnih-le-nga. 22Atohlette, asumtawngte, atum sing limte suahlam kongpi toh kikim vek ahi; kalbi sagih a-omtou a; asunglam ah asumtawng a-om hi. 23Huang sungnungzaw pen lutna ding kongpi bel kongpi dang zawn ah a-om zel a, mallam leh suahlam ah leng;

EZEKIEL 40: kongpi leh kongpi kikal ateh a, tong zakhat ahi.Simlam Kongpi 24Huan simlam ah ahon pi nawn a, ngai in, simlam kongpi ana om a; atehdan ngei in abaangkate leh asumtawng ateh hi. 25Huai ah adangte bangmah in akimvel in tohlette a-om a, asumtawng ah leng; adung tong sawmnga ahi a, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga ahi. 26Huan kalbi sagih a-omtou a, asunglam ah sumtawng a-om a; alang tuak abaangkate ah tum sing lim a-om zel hi. 27Simlam ah huang sungnung lutna ding kongpi a-om a, simlam kongpite kikal ateh a, tong zakhat ahi.Huang Sungnung: Simlam Kongpi 28Huan simlam kongpi ah huang sungnungzaw pen ah ahon pi a, tehna ngei in simlam kongpi ateh a; 29vilna dantante, abaangkate sumtawngte tehna mah in huai ah tohlette a-om a, sumtawng leng akimvel in; adunglam tong sawmnga, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga ahi. 30Huan akimvel ah sumtawngte a-om a, adunglam tong sawmnih-le-nga, availam tong nga ahi. 31Asumtawngte'n huangsung ponungzaw lam anga a; abaangkate ah tum sing lim a-om a; akahtouhna in kalbi giat anei hi.Huang Sungnung: Suahlam Kongpi 32Huan suahlam ah huang sungnungzaw pen ah ahon pi a, atehna ngei in kongpi ateh hi. 33Avilna dantante, abaangkate, asumtawngte tehna mah in; huai ah tohlette a-om a, sumtawng leng akimvel in; adunglam bel tong sawmnga, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga ahi. 34Asumtawngte'n huangsung ponungzaw pen lam anga a, abaangkate ah lang tuak ah tum sing lim a-om a; akahtouhna in kalbi giat anei hi.Huang Sungnung: Mallam Kongpi 35Huan mallam kongpi ah ahon pi nawn a; atehna ngei in ateh a; avilna dantante, abaangkate, asumtawngte; 36huai ah akimvel in tohlette a-om a; adunglam tong sawmnga ahi a, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga. 37Abaangkate huangsung ponungzaw pen lam ah a-om a; abaangkate ah alang tuak ah tum sing lim a-om hi;

EZEKIEL 40: akahtouhna in kalbi giat anei hi.Mallam Kongpi Kiang A Innte 38Kongpi sumtawng a kipan a lut theih in dantan a-om a, huai ah halmang kithoihna ding asil zel uhi. 39Kongpi sumtawng lang tuak ah; halmang kithoihnate, khelh ziak a kithoihnate, moh ziak a thillatte gohna ding dohkan nih tuak a-om hi. 40Tunung Tempul Ding Mengmuhna(40.1—48.35)Jerusalem Khopi Ah Ezekiel 41Huchi in kongpi sik langkhat ah dohkan li a-om a, alangkhat ah dohkan li a-om nawn a; kithoihna gan gohna dohkan giat ahi. 42Huan halmang kithoihna dia dohkan li, suangsek a bawl, adunglam tong khat-le-akim, availam tong khat-le-akim, asanlam tong khat a-om a; huai ah halmang kithoihna leh thillat gohna ding vanzatte akoih zel uhi. 43Huan asunglam ah akimvel in kuaika, khutpek khuh a sau abulh ua; dohkan tungte ah thil latsate a-om hi. 44Huan huang sungnungzaw pen ah ahon pilut a, ngai dih, huang sungnungzaw pen ah dantan nih ana om a; khat pen mallam kongpi chin ah, simlam nga in a-om a, khat pen simlam kongpi chin ah mallam nga in a-om hi. 45Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai dantan simlam nga, tempul kemtu siampute omna ahi a; 46dantan mallam nga maitam kem siampute omna ahi; hiaite Zadok tate, Levi tate lak a ama nna sem ding a Toupa hong naih sekte ahi uh,” achi hi.Huang Sungnungzaw Leh Tempul Inn 47Huan huangsung ateh a, adunglam tong zakhat, availam tong zakhat, kimvel ahi; maitam bel tempul maitak a om ahi. 48Tempul inlim ah ahon pi a, sumtawng baangkate ateh chiat a, alang tuak ah tong nga a sah tuaktuak a-om a, alutna tong sawm leh tong li a za ahi; asik tuak a kongpi baangkate tong thum tuaktuak ahi. 49Asumtawng adunglam tong sawmnih, availam tong sawm-le-nih ahi a; luttouhna ah kalbi sawm a-om a, baangka chin ah alang tuak ah khuam lian a-om hi.

EZEKIEL 41: 1Huan tempul ah ahon pilut a, abaangkate ateh a, asik tuak ah tong guk a sah tuaktuak a-om a, huai tuh biakbuk vailam chia ahi. 2Huan alutna tong sawm a za ahi a; asik tuak ah baangkate tong nga tuaktuak ahi; huan asunglam ateh a, adunglam tong sawmli leh availam tong sawmnih ahi. 3Dantan sungnung ah alut a, alutna baangkate tong nih a sah tuaktuak ahi a; alutna tong guk a za ahi a; alutna baangkate tong sagih tuaktuak ahi. 4Dantan sungnung ateh a, asungpi ban ah adunglam tong sawmnih ahi a; tempul kantan availam leng tong sawmnih ahi. Huan ka kiang ah, “Hiai Mun Siangthoupen ahi,” ahon chi hi.Tempul Baang Lam Doh A Pindan Lamte 5Huan atempul baang ateh a, tong guk a sah ahi; huan tempul sik chih ah dantan tong li a za chiat a-om hi. 6Huan chial thumte ah pang dantante a-om ua, huchi a huai lai a letkipna aneih theihlouhna ding un, tempul baang a letkipna nei lou in. 7Huchi in apang dantante hong san hiaihiai in aza semsem a; tempul azuih touh ziak in, akimvel in asungpi anaih hulhul hi. Huchi in dantan nuainungpen a kipan atungnungpen pha a pai ding in alai a kantan ding ahi. 8Huan tempul kim ah suanglep vum om in ka mu a; pang dantan suangphum tehna chiang, tong guk hial a sau tan a sang ahi. 9Pang dantan polam bang tong nga a sah ahi; tempul pang dantan polam baang ban ah tong nga a-awl lai hi. 10Inpi suanglep vum leh tempul huangsung dantante kikal akimvel in tong sawmnih a za ahi. 11Pang dantan kongkhakte mun awng lam a hon ahi a, khat in mallam, adang khat in simlam anga a;

EZEKIEL 41: akim a mun awng tong nga a za ahi.Tumlam A Inn 12Huan tumlam a phaitam khekhiakna lam nga inn tong sawmsagih a za ahi; huai inn baang akim in tong nga a sah vek ahi a, adung tong sawmkua ahi.Tempul Letdan Avek A Teh Sipsip Ahi 13Huan tempul ateh a tong za a sau ahi; inn phaitam mun awng leh huai tempul baang sahdan simtel in tong za ahi nawn hi. 14Tempul kongtual mun awng tong za a sau ahi. 15Huan aphaitam mun awng khen inn dunglam ateh a, apang tuak abaangte huap in tong zakhat ahi.Tempul Zatdan Tehna 16Huan asungpite, tohlet khuam neute, polam sumtawngte singpek in athuap ua; athum un akimvel in hon theih louh tohlet leh inchial anei a; inpi lutna kongpi tan in apialkhang a kipan tohlet pha a apum a singpek a thuap ahi, tohlet leng thuap ahi lai hi. 17Kongpi lutungte, dantan sungnung tanpha leh apolam toh, baang tengteng asunglam leh apolam tan in. 18Huaite cherub limte leh tum sing limte a zep ahi a, cherub leh cherub kikal ah tum sing a-om zel a; cherubte'n mai nih anei chiat uhi. 19Mihing mel bang in alangkhat in tum sing lam anga a, humpinelkai tuailai mel bang in alangkhat in tum sing lam anga nawn hi. Hiaite tempul kimvel vek in agelh uhi. 20Apialkhang a kipan in kongpi tung pha in cherub leh tum sing lim a zep vek ahi; tempul baang bel huchi vek ahi.Sing Maitam 21Tempul kongpi biang khuamte tuh asah azat kibang ahi. Mun Siangthou ma ah sing a bawl maitam bangtak a-om hi. 22Tong thum a sang, tong nih a za, aningte, atawte leh apangte sing a bawl vek ahi.

EZEKIEL 41: Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai Toupa ma a dohkan ahi,” achi hi.Kongkhakte 23Tempul leh Mun Siangthou in kongkhak nih tuaktuak anei hi. 24Kongkhak in phel nih anei tuaktuak a; aphel khat bel kheptheih chiat ahi; kongkhak khat ah phel nih, adang ah phel nih anei hi. 25Baang a agelh mah bang un tempul kongkhakte ah cherub leh tum sing lim agelh chiat lai ua; sumtawng pua ah singpek sah mahmah aphalh uhi. 26Huan sumtawng baang lang tuakte leh singpek phalhte ah tohlet hon theih louh leh tum sing lim a-om lai a; atempul pang dantan leh singpek phalh leng huchibang mah ahi.

EZEKIEL 42: 1Huan huang sungnungzaw malam pang ah ahon pikhia a; mun awng zawn mallam kulh khuam doh dantan ah hon pilut hi. 2Mallam pang a dantante tong za a sau tong sawmnga a za ahi. 3Huang sungnungzaw pen mun awng tong sawmnih lam nga leh huang ponungzaw suanglep lam doh inchial thum a-om tuaktuak hi. 4Dantante kikal ah tong sawm a za, tong za a sau paisuakna a-om a, akongkhakte'n mallam anga hi. 5Dantan tungnungte akochikzaw a; inchial nuainungzaw leh alaitate sang in a-inchialte'n mun lian aluah zaw uhi. 6Chial thum a lam ahi a, huangsung khuamte bang in khuam anei kei a; huchi in alaita sang in atungnungpen akochikzaw a, alaita leng anuainungpen sang in akochikzaw lai hi. 7Huan dantan pang polam ah huangsung ponungzaw pen lam doh baang tong sawmnga a sau a-om hi. 8Huangsung ponungzaw a dantante tong sawmnga a sau ahi ua; tempul zul a pen tong za a sau ahi. 9Huan huai dantante nuai ah suahlam pang ah huangsung ponungzaw a kipan polam ah alutna a-om hi. 10Simlam ah leng mun awng zawn a kulhbaang doh in dantante a-om nawn hi. 11Ama a paina leng mallam dantante paina mah bang ahi a; adung leh avai leng, apawtkhiaknate, alepkhawmdante, akongkhakte'n simlam anga chih kia lou ngal akibang vek ahi. 12Huai dantante lutna ding paisuakna tawp suahlam baangchin ah kongkhak a-om hi. 13Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Simlam leh mallam dantan, mun awl hon dohte dantan siangthoute ahi ua; thil siangthoute akoihkhawm ua; nek ding latnate, khelh ziak a kithoihnate, moh ziak a kithoihnate alatna ding uh ahi; amun lah asiangthou ngal a. 14Huai lai a siampute alut phot uleh, mun siangthou a kipan in huangsung ponungzaw ah apawtkhe ding uh ahi kei; huai ah anasepna puansilhte uh akoih zaw ding ua, puansilh siangthou ahi ngal ua;

EZEKIEL 42: puansilh dang silh kia in vantang lak ah agamtang thei ding uh,” achi hi.Tempul Huangsung Tehna 15Tempul sungnungzaw pen ateh khit in suahlam nga kongpi ah ahon pikhia a, tempul kimvel in ateh hi. 16Tehna chiang in suahlam pang ateh a, atehna chiang a teh in tong zanga ahi. 17Mallam pang ahon teh nawn leuleu a, atehna chiang a teh in tong zanga ahi. 18Simlam pang ateh nawn a, tehna chiang a teh in tong zanga mah ahi. 19Huan tumlam ahon teh nawn a, atehna chiang a teh in tong zanga mah ahi. 20Apang li in atehta a; adunglam tong zanga, availam tong zanga ahi; akim in kulhbaang nei ahi; huai mun siang leh siang lou deidanna ding a bawl ahi. 42Tempul Kiang A Inn Nih

EZEKIEL 43: 1Huchi in kongpi ah, suahlam kongpi ah ahon pi hi. 2Ngai dih, Israel' Pathian thupina suahlam a kipan in ahong tung a; ahusa tui tampi ging bang ahi a, athupina in leitung atanvak hi. 3Kilakna ka muh a alatdan, khopi hihse ding a hong pai leh Kebar lui gei a kilakna ka muh bangmah ahi a; huchi in bokkhup in ka pukta hi. 4Suahlam nga kongpi ah tempul sung ah Toupa thupina alut hi. 5Kha in ahon domkang a, huang sungnungzaw ah ahon pilut a; huan, ngai in, Toupa thupina in tempul aluahdim hi. 6Huan mi khat ka kiang a adin lai in mi kuahiam tempul polam a kipan hon houpih in ka za a, ka kiang ah, 7“Mihing tapa, hiai ka laltutphah omna mun, ka khepek ngakna, Israel suante lak a tangtawn a ka tenna ding mun ahi; ka min siangthou Israel inkote'n amau inn hiam, akumpipate uh hiam, ahukna uleh akumpipate uh luangvuina a zang in ahihthanghuai nawnta kei ding uh. 8Akongpi uh ka kongpi chin mahmah a bawl in, akongpi biang uh ka kongpi biang zul a koih in amau leh keimah kikal ah baang kia omsak in athilhih kihhuaite un ka min siangthou ahihthanghuai uhi; huaiziak in ka hehna in amau ka hihmangta hi. 9Tu a kipan in kizuaknate, akumpipa uh luangte kei a kipan gamlapi ah koihmang le uh; huchi in alak uah tangtawn in ka teng ding hi. 10“Nang mihing tapa, Israel inkote kiang ah tempul lim ensak in; athilhihkhelh uh azumpih theihna ding un, abawldan ding leng na teh uhen. 11Huan athilhih tengteng uh azumpih ua atempul omdante, apawtkhiaknate, alutnate, ageldante, azatdante, akepdante ensak inla, amitmuh mahmah uah gelh in; adan pumpi leh azatdan tengteng avom ua, azuihtheihna ding un. 12Hiai tempul a dia dan ding ahi;

EZEKIEL 43: tang vum tau kim tengteng mun siangthoupen ding ahi; ngai dih, hiai tempul a dia dan ding ahi.Maitam 13“Huan tong a teh in hiai maitam let lam ahi, tong khat chih tong khat leh khutpek tuam ahi a, akingakna tong khat a sang, tong khat a za, agei akim a khap khat a pawng zel ahi. 14Huan maitam sanlam hichibang ahi; lei a akingakna a kipan dohdan nuainungzaw pen tong nih ahi a, azatlam tong khat; adohdan neuzaw pen a kipan dohdan lianzaw pen tong li ahi a, tong khat a za ahi. 15Amaitam tau tong li a sang ahi nawn a, maitam tau a kipan leh atunglam kii li ding ahi. 16Maitam tau adung leh avai tong sawm-le-nih tuaktuak ahi; adung-avai kikim ahi. 17Dohdan dung leh vai tong sawm-le-li tuaktuak ahi; adung-avai kikim ahi; agei tong kimkhat ahi; akingakna akim in tong khat ahi; akalbi in suahlam angat ding ahi,” achi hi.Maitam Latna 18Huan ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Abawl khit chiang ua maitam zatdan ding hichibang ahi; halmang kithoihna dingte, sisan thehna dingte ahi. 19Levi chi siampu Zadok suan a mi, nna hon sepsak ding a hon naih sekpa kiang ah khelh ziak a kithoihna ding in ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai na piak ding ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 20Asisan na la ding a, maitam kii lite leh adohdan ning lite, agei kimvel in na luan ding a; huchibang in maitam na hihsiang in na siangsak ding hi. 21Khelh ziak a kithoihna bawngtaltuai na la ding a, huai ding a tempul aseh uh, mun siangthou polam ah hal ahih ding ahi. 22Huan ani nihna in keltal dembei, khelh ziak a kithoihna ding a lat ding ahi; huchi in maitam bel bawngtaltuai a ahihsiang mah bang un na siangsak ding hi.

EZEKIEL 43: 23Maitam hihsiang pen na hih khit chiang un ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai gensiatbei leh belamtal, gensiatbei, ahon lak a na lan ding hi. 24Toupa ma ah na lan ding a, siampu in chi asoh ding a, Toupa kiang ah halmang a ding in alan ding. 25Ni sagih sung niteng khelh ziak a kithoihna ding in keltal na zang ding ahi; ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai leh belamtal, ahon lak a, gensiatbei leng azat ding uh ahi. 26Maitam hihsiang leh siansakna in ni sagih ala ding a; huchi in maitam siangthou ahita ding hi. 27Huan huai nite ahihtangtun khit chiang un, ani giat ni a kipan in siampute'n na halmang kithoihnate uh leh lemna kithoihnate amaitam uah alan ding ua, huan ka hon na sang ding chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” achi hi. 43Tempul Ah Toupa Akik

EZEKIEL 44: 1Huan mun siangthou kongpi ponungzaw, suahlam nga ah hon pikik nawn a, kong khaksa ana hi. 2Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai kongpi akikhak gige ding a, akihong ngei kei ding a, kuamah alut sam kei ding uh; Toupa, Israel' Pathian ahong lut khit ziak in; akikhak gige ding ahi. 3Kumpi bel Toupa ma a an ne ding in huai ah atu phet ding; sumtawng kongkhak ah alut ding a, huai mah ah apawt nawn ding,” achi hi.Tempul Lut Phalna Dante 4Huan mallam nga kongpi ah tempul intual ah ahon pi a; ka en a ngai dih, Toupa thupina in Toupa tempul aluahdim vek a; huchi in bokkhup in ka pukta hi. 5Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Toupa tempul zatdan leh adan tengteng na kiang a ka gen tungtang ah na bildoh inla, na mitsuan inla, na lungsim ah chiamteh hoih dih; atempul a lutdante, amun siangthou a kipan pawtdante, na lungsim ah hoihtak in chiamteh in. 6“Huan helhat, Israel inkote ngei kiang ah huchi in na gen ding ahi; Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, nou Israel inkote aw, na thilhih kihhuai tengteng uh ahunta, 7lungtang leh sa zeksum louh, ka tanghoute, thaute na lat lai ua ka mun siangthou, ka tempul mahmah hihbuah ding a na pilut ua, ka thukhun a na tatlek uh, na kihhuaina tengtengte uh na tawpta hen.

EZEKIEL 44: 8Ka thil siangthoute nou na kem kei ua, hiai pau tuam mite ka mun siangthou ah nou sik a kemmi in na sep zaw uhi.” 9Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Gamdangmi kuamah, lungtang leh sa zeksum louh, Israel suante lak a gamdangmi kuamah ka mun siangthou ah alut ding uh ahi kei hi.”Siamputna Ah Levite Posiah Ahi Uh 10Levi chi, Israelte milim delh a avakmang lai ua kei a kipan a gamlapi a paisate'n bel athulimlouhna uh apo ding uh. 11Ka mun siangthou ah nasemmi in apang ding ua; tempul kongkhakte angak ding ua; tempul sung ah nna asem ding uh; halmang kithoihnate, mipi a dia kithoihnate agou ding ua; mipi nna sepsak ding in ama uah adingh ding uhi. 12Amilimte uh ma ah a-nna uh asepsak ding ua; Israelte inkote a ding in thulimlouhna a pukna ahih nak ziak un atung uah ka khut ka lik ding a; athulimlouhna uh apo ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 13Huchi in ka kiang ah siampu nna sem ding in ahon naih ngei kei ding ua; ka thil siangthoute, thil siangthoupente ahon naih ngei sam kei ding uh; azahlakna uleh athilkihhuai hihsate uh apo zaw ding uh. 14Tempul kem mite ding in ka bawl ding a, nasepna tengteng leh hih ding om peuhmahte hih ding in.Siampute 15Siampu Levi chi, Zadok ta, kei a kipan a Israel suante avakmang lai ua ka mun siangthou kem mite'n bel ka nna sem ding in ahong naih ding uh; thau leh sisan lan ding in ka ma ah adingh ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 16Ka mun siangthou ah alut ding ua, nna hon sepsak ding in ka dohkan ahong naih ding ua, kei hon kemmi in apang ding uh.

EZEKIEL 44: 17Huan huang sungnungzaw kongpite a alut un puanaktual malngat in akithuam ding ua, huang sungnungzaw leh insung lam a nna asep sung un samul puan asilh ding uh ahi kei hi. 18Dial malngat akhim ding ua, puanmalngat pheitom abun ding ua, kho-ulsak thei asilh ding uh ahi kei hi. 19Huan huangsung ponungzaw, vantang kiang a ahong pawtkhiak uleh anasepna puansilhte uh asuah ding ua, dantan siangthou ah akoih ding uh, puansilh dang asilh ding uh; mipite apuansilh ua misiangthou a abawl teilouhna ding un. 20Alute uh ametgiau ding uh ahi kei a; asam uh leng ahawisau ding uh ahi sam kei; amet lel ding uh ahi. 21Siampu kuapeuh huang sungnungzaw pen alut chiang un uain adawn ding uh ahi kei hi. 22Meithai hiam maksa nung hiam zi in anei ding uh ahi sam kei hi; Israel inkote, nungak siangthou hiam siampu sihsan meithai akitenpih zawk ding uh ahi. 23Ka mite thil siangthou leh thil nin kibatlouhdan ahilh ding ua; siang leh siang lou akhentuamsak ding uhi. 24Thubuaite leng angaihtuah ding uh ahi; ka ngaihtuah bang zel in angaihtuah ding uh; ka ankuanglui sehsa tengteng ah ka dante leh ka dan thuseh bawlsate azuih ding uh ahi; ka Sabbathte leng atan ding uh ahi. 25Amau kihihbuah ding in misi luang anaih ding uh ahi kei; himahleh nu hiam, pa hiam, tanu hiam, tapa hiam unaupa hiam sanggamnu pasal nei lou hiam a ding in bel akihihbuah thei ding uh. 26Huan akisiansak nung in amah a ding in ni sagih simsak nawn ding ahi. 27Huang sungnungzaw mun siangthou a nasem ding a alut ni in khelh ziak a kithoihna amah a ding in alan ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 28Goutan bangmah anei kei ding ua; agoutan uh kei ka hi ding.

EZEKIEL 44: Israel ah tan bangmah na pe ding uh ahi kei, atan uh keimah ka hi. 29Nek ding latte, khelh ziak a thillatte, moh ziak a thillatte ane ding ua; Israel lak a thil latsa peuhmah amau a ding ahi. 30Gah masate lak a ahoihpente, na thillat chiteng ua ahoihpen, na thillat tengteng ua siampute a ding ahi; na inn ua vualzawlna atamdet theihna ding in tangbuang meklom hoihpen siampu kiang ah na pe ding uh ahi. 31Siampute'n sapul anek louh ding uh ahi. Vasa hiam gamsa bohzan hiam, amah sih a si hiam anek ding uh ahi kei hi. 44Suahlam Kongpi Kizatna

EZEKIEL 45: 1Huai lou in leng goutan ding a gam na hawm hun chiang un gamseh siangthou, Toupa kiang ah thilpiak na bawl ding uhi. Adunglam tong singnih-le-sangnga, availam tong singnih, apum in gam siangthou ahi ding hi. 2Hiai ah mun siangthou a ding in adung leh avai tong zanga tuaktuak, kimvel ahi ding a, akimvel in tong zanga a za mun awng a-om ding ahi. 3Huan hiai tehsa a kipan in adung tong singnih-le-sangnga leh avai tong singkhat na tehkhe ding a, huai ah Mun Siangthoupen a-om ding ahi. 4Gamseh siangthou bel, mun siangthou a nasemmi, a-nna sem ding a Toupa hong naih siampute a ding ahi ding a, a-inn mun ding un leh mun siangthou ding in gam siangthou ahi ding hi. 5Mun dang adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singkhat, Levi chi tempul a nasem mite tuam ding in, atenna khopi ding in a-om ding ahi. 6Gamseh siangthou latsa zul ah khopi tan avai tong zanga leh adung tong singnih-le-sangnga na sep ding uhi, Israel inkote pumpi a ding ahi ding.Kumpi Tapa Gam Ding 7Huan kumpi tapa tan bel gam siangthou latsa leh khopi tan malam ah tumlam a tumlam nga in, suahlam a suahlam nga in a-om ding ahi. Adung bel tumlam gamgi a kipan a suahlam gamgi pha in, gamseh dang tan mah ahi. 8Huai bel Israel gam a amah tantuam ahi ding ahi; ka vaihawmte'n ka mite anuaisiah nawn kei ding ua, Israel inkote anam tuamdan bang zel un gam ape zaw ding uhi.Vaihawmtupa Dia Dan Khun 9Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, Israel vaihawmte aw, hunta hen, hiamgamna leh kigapna tawpsanta unla; diktattak a vaihawm leh diktak a hih chingta unla, ka mite delhkhiak nak pen tawpsanta un, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 10Bukna dik, ephah dik leh bath dik na zat ding uh ahi.

EZEKIEL 45: 11Ephah leh bath akikim ding uh ahi, bath homer seh sawm a khen seh khat ahi ding a, ephah leng homer seh sawm a khen seh khat ahi sam ding; homer a kipan a tehkhiak ding ahi ding. 12Huan shekel bel gerah sawmnih ahi ding a; shekel sawmnih toh shekel sawmnih-le-nga toh shekel sawm-le-nga gawmkhawm na mina uh khat toh kikim ahi ding hi. 13Huan hiai thillat na lat ding uh ahi ding; buh homer khat zel ah ephah seh guk a khen seh khat leh buh man homer khat zel ah ephah seh guk a khen seh khat na pe ding uhi. 14Huan sathau latdan ding kor khat zel ah bath seh sawm a khen seh khat; kor bel bath sawm ahi. 15Israel gantatna mun hoih a kipan belamhon lak a zanih zel ah anou khat, nek ding lat ding in, halmang kithoihna ding in lemna thillat ding in amaute hihsianna bawlna ding in alat ding uh ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 16Gam a mi tengteng in Israel vaihawmpa kiang ah hiai thillat ape ding uh. 17Ankuang luina ah, kha thak ah, Sabbath ni ah, Israel ankuanglui ni sehsa tengteng ah halmang kithoihna, nek ding lat, dawn ding latte lan in angaihtuah ding a; khelh ziak a kithoihna, nek ding lat, halmang kithoihna, lemna thillat Israel inkote kisiansakna ding in ama'n atumsak ding ahi.Nopbawl Nite 18Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Kha khatna, huai kha ani khat ni in ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai gensiatbei na la ding a, mun siangthou na siangsak ding ahi. 19Huan siampu in khelh ziak a kithoihna sisan ala ding a, tempul kongpi biang leh maitam dohdan ning lite leh huang sungnungzaw pen kongpi baangka ah atat ding hi.

EZEKIEL 45: 20Huai kha ani sagih ni in hihkhak hiam theih louh ziak hiam a thil hihkhialmite a ding in leng huchi mah bang in na hih ding a, huchibang in tempul hihsianna na bawl ding hi. 21“Akha khatna, huai kha ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuang na lui ding ua; huan, ni sagih sung tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding uh. 22Huai ni in vaihawmpa'n amah leh agam a mi tengteng a ding in, khelh ziak a kithoihna ding bawngtaltuai atum ding ahi. 23Ankuanglui hun ni sagih sung teng in bawngtaltuai gensiatbei sagih leh belamtal sagih zel Toupa a ding in halmang kithoihna ding in atum ding; huan khelh ziak a kithoihna ding in niteng in keltal khat toh. 24Huan tanghou lat ding in bawngtal khat zel ah ephah khat, belamtal khat zel ah ephah khat leh ephah khat zel ah sathau hin khat atum ding hi. 25“Akha sagihna, huai kha ani sawm leh ni nga ni a ankuangluina ah ni sagih sung huchibang mah in ahih ding a, khelh ziak a kithoihnate, halmang kithoihnate, tanghou latte leh sathau latte atum ding ahi,” achi hi. 45Gamsung A Toupa Tan

EZEKIEL 46: 1Huchi in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Huang sungnungzaw pen kongpi suahlam nga pen nasep ni, ni guk sung a kikhak ding a, Sabbath leh kha thak ni in akihong ding ahi. 2Huan vaihawmpa bel kongpi sumtawng ah alut ding a, kongpi baangka chin ah adingh ding a, siampute'n ahalmang kithoih leh lemna thillatte abawlsak ding ua, lutna kongpi dantan ah Pathian abe ding; huchi in apawtkhe ding a, nitaklam tan kong khak louh ahih ding ahi. 3Huan vantang in bel Sabbath leh kha thakte ah kongpi lutna chinte ah Toupa ma ah Pathian abe ding uhi. 4Sabbath ni in vaihawmpa'n Toupa kiang a halmang kithoihna a lat ding bel belamnou gensiatbei guk leh belamtal gensiatbei khat ahi ding. 5Belamtal khat zel ah tanghou lat ephah khat, belamnou pen ah bel apiak theih bangbang leh ephah khat ah sathau hin khat zel ahi ding hi.Kha Thak 6Kha thak ni in ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai gensiatbei khat, belamnou guk leh belamtal khat ahi ding a, gensiatbei ahih vek ding uh ahi. 7Huan tanghou lat abawl ding a, bawngtaltuai ah ephah khat, belamtal ah ephah khat, belamnou pen ah atheih bangbang leh ephah khat zel ah sathau hin khat ahi ding hi. 8Vaihawmpa alut chiang in kongpi sumtawng ah alut ding a, huai mah ah apawtkhe nawn ding hi. 9Vantangte bel ankuanglui ni sehsa a Toupa ma a ahong pai uleh Pathian be ding a mallam kongpi a hong lut simlam kongpi ah apawtkhe ding ua; simlam kongpi a hong lut mallam kongpi ah apawtkhe leuleu ding uh; alutna kongpi uah akik ding uh ahi kei a, amalam uah apai zaw ding uh ahi. 10Huan alut chiang un alak uah vaihawmpa alut ding a, apawt chiang un apawtkhe nawn ding hi.

EZEKIEL 46: 11Nopbawlna leh sehsa ankuanglui nite, tanghou lat bawngtaltuai khat ah ephah khat, belamtal khat ah ephah khat, belamnou pen ah apiak theih bangbang, ephah khat ah sathau hin khat zel ahi ding hi. 12Huan vaihawmpa'n ut thu a thillat alat dekleh halmang kithoihna hiam lemna thillat hiam Toupa kiang a ut thu a athillat bang a alat dekleh suahlam nga kong ahonsak ding a, Sabbath ni a hih bangmah in, halmang kithoihnate leh lemna thillatte abawl ding; huchi in apawtkhe ding a, apawtkhiak nung in kong akhak ding uhi.Niteng Thillat 13“Niteng a Toupa kiang a halmang kithoihna ding in belamnou kum khat a upa, gensiatbei na zang ding a, zingsang in na zat ding ahi. 14Zingsang teng in tanghou lat na bawl ding a, ephah seh guk a khen seh khat leh sathau hin khat seh thum a khen seh khat tangbuang nel mahmah anomsakna ding; huai tuh tangtawn a Toupa kiang a tanghou latdan ding ahi. 15Hichibang in halmang thillat gige ding in belamnou, tanghou latte, sathaute zingsang teng in na bawl ding ahi,” chi in.Kumpi Tapa Leh Gam 16Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Vaihawmpa'n atapate, kua kiang ah leng, goutan bangpeuh apiakleh atapate a ahi ding a, agou uh luah ahi mai hi. 17Himahleh agoutan a pen anasemmi kuahiam kiang a apiakleh sal pawtna kum tan in anei ding a, huai ah vaihawmpa kiang ah apekik nawn ding hi. Amah gou ngeingei bel atapate a ding ahi ding. 18Huai lou in vaihawmpa in mite goutan asuhsak ding ahi kei a, aneih-le-lam ua kipan adelhkhe ding ahi sam kei; amah a pen mah atapate kiang ah goutan in ape ding a; amau neih-le-lam a kipan mite avakzaklouhna ding un,” achi hi.Tempul Anhuan Innte 19Huan kongpi pang a siampute a dia dantan siangthou mallam nga ah ahon pilut a;

EZEKIEL 46: ngai dih, aphaitam tumlam pang ah mun ana om hi. 20Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai siampute'n moh ziak a thillat leh khelh ziak a thillat ahuanna mun uh, tanghou lat omna mun ahi; huangsung ponungzaw a atawikhiak ua mite hihsianna dia abawllouhna ding un,” achi hi. 21Huang ponungzaw ah ahon pikhia a, huangsung ningzul ah ahon paisak a; ngai dih, ahuangsung ning chiat ah huang ana om nawn hi. 22Huangsung ning li ah huang, bang nei, adung tong sawmli, avai tong sawmthum ana om a; huai aning ate ali un akikim vek uhi. 23Huai mun li sunglam ah akimvel in suang vual in alem ua, huai vual nuai ah akim in huanna ding thuk a-om hi. 24Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Hiai an huanna innte ahi, tempul nasem mite'n mite kithoihna sa ahuanna dingte uh,” achi hi. 46Sabbath

EZEKIEL 47: 1Huchi in tempul kongkhak ah ahon pikik a; ngai dih, tempul kongpi chin nuai a kipan, suahlam nga in tui ahong luangkhia a; tempul suahlam nga ahi a, huan tui maitam simlam tempul pang taklam nuai a kipan in ahong luangkhia hi. 2Huan mallam nga kongpi tawn in ahon pikhia a, inpua ah suahlam nga pawtkhiakna lampi ponungzaw tawn in ahon pi a; ngai dih, taklam pang ah tui ahong luangkhia hi. 3Huan huai mi'n tehna khau tawi kawm a suahlam nga a pai in tong sangkhat ateh a; tui ahon ngap galkahsak a, siakmit tan ahi. 4Huchi in tong sangkhat ateh nawn a; tui ahon ngap galkahsak nawn a, khuk tan ahi. Huan tong sangkhat ateh nawn a; hon ngap galkahsak nawn a, tui kawng tan ahi. 5Huan tong sangkhat ateh nawn a; ngah galkah vual louh luipi ahong hita a; tui ahong sang zel a, angah a ngah galkah vual louh, aleuh a leuh tham luipi ahong hita hi. 6Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai na mu hia?” achi hi.Huan lui gei a kik nawn ding in ahon pikikta hi. 7Huchi in ka kik a, ngai dih, lui gei tawn in, lui gei lang tuak in sing tampi ana om hi. 8Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai suahlam gam lam a tui luang Arabah gam a luanglut ding ahi; tuipi ah aluanglut ding a, tuipi tui al tui siangthou asuaksak ding. 9Huan hichi ahong hi ding a; luite aluanna peuh uah ganhing chiteng in ahinloh ding ua, ngasate a-om huthut ding uh; tuipi tui asianthouna ding leh aluanna peuh a ganhingte'n ahinlohna ding ua hiai lui hong luang ahi. 10Huan hichi ahong hi ding a; agei ah ngaman mite adingh ding ua; Engedi a kipan Eneglaim pha in lenpaihna mun ahi ding;

EZEKIEL 47: angasa pen achi bang zel un, tuipi lian ngasa bang mai in atam mahmah ding uh. 11Buannawi leh chiklakte bel asiangthou kei ding ua, chikhuk ding a nutsiat ahi ding hi. 12Alui gei ah agei langnih in theikung chi chih apou ding a, huaite anah avuai ngei kei in agah lou ngei sam kei ding, mun siangthou a kipan a lui hong luangkhia a vak ahih ziak in kha teng in agah ding; agah nek ding ahi ding a, anah bel hihdamna ding ahi ding,” achi hi.Gam Gamgite 13Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Hiai Israel nam sawm-le-nih lak a gam kihawmdan ding ahi hi; Joseph in tan nih atang ding. 14Kibang chiat in na tang ding uh ahi; na pipute uh kiang a piak ding a ka kichiamsa ahi; hiai gam na gam tan un apuk ding ahi. 15Hiai a gam pumpi gi ding ahi; mallam ah Tuipi Lian a kipan Hethlon a paisuak in Hamath lutna phaizang ah Zedad atung a; 16Berothah, Damaskas leh Hamath kigitna lai a om Sibraim, Hauran gamgi zul a om Hazor-hattikon pha in. 17Huchi in gamgi bel Tuipi Lian a kipan in Damaskas gamgi zul a Hazar-enan pha in ahi ding a; mallam ah Hamath gamgi ahi ding hi. Hiai mallam gamgi ahi. 18Huan suahlam ah Hauran leh Damaskas kikal ah Gilead leh Israel gam kikal a Jordan luidung azui ding; mallam gamgi a kipan in suahlam tuipi ah Tamar apha ding. Hiai suahlam gamgi ahi ding hi. 19Simlam ah Tamar a kipan in Meibothkadesh tuite pha in Aigupta lui zui in Tuipi Lian atung ding. Hiai simlam gamgi ding ahi. 20Tumlam ah Tuipi Lian in agi ding a, simlam gamgi a kipan in Hamath lutna phaizang zawn pha in. Hiai tumlam gamgi ahi ding hi.

EZEKIEL 47: 21Huchi in hiai gam Israel nam dungzui in na lak uah na hawm ding uh. 22Huan hichi ahi ding a, na gam tan ding uleh na lak ua namdang teng, zi leh ta neisate gam tan ding bel na hop ding uh ahi. Amau lah Israel ta ding a piang mawng ahi ding uh ahi; Israel namte lak ah noute bang in tan aneih ding uh ahi. 23Huan hichi ahong hi ding a; kua nam lak ah leng namdang ana teng taleh, huai lai a agam tan ding na sehsak ding uh ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. 47Tempul A Kipan Lui Hong Luangkhia

EZEKIEL 48: 1Hiaite anam minte uh ahi: Mallam gamgi Tuipi Lian a kipan a Hethlon paisuak in Hamath lutna phaizang ah Damaskas gamgi a Hamath kiang mallam pang Hazar-enan pha in, suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Dante tan ahi. 2Dante tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Asherte tan ahi. 3Asherte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Naphtalite tan ahi. 4Naphtalite tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Manassehte tan ahi. 5Manassehte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Ephraimte tan ahi. 6Ephraimte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Reubente tan ahi. 7Reubente tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Judahte tan ahi.Gam Lai A Mun Poimohte 8Judahte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah, thilpiak na lat ding uh avai tong singnih-le-sangnga ahi ding a; adung suahlam leh tumlam sang ah tan dang bangmah in ahi a, alai a mun siangthou om in. 9Thilpiak Toupa kiang a na lat ding uh adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singnih ahi ding ahi. 10Huan hiai ah siampute a ding in gam siangthou thilpiak ding ahi ding a; mallam ah adung tong singnih-le-sangnga leh tumlam ah avai tong singkhat leh suahlam ah avai tong singkhat, simlam ah adung tong singnih-le-sangnga ahi ding ahi. Alaizang ah Toupa mun siangthou a-om ding hi. 11Siampu siansaksa, Zadok tapate ka thu kem mite a ding ahi ding, amaute Israel suante avakmang lai ua Levi chite avakmang bang ua vakmangloute ahi uhi. 12Huan gam thilpiak pumpi a kipan amau a dia piak tuam, mun siangthoupen ahi ding; Levi chi tan toh akigi in. 13Siampu tan zulzul ah Levi chite'n tan anei ding ua, adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singkhat ahi ding hi.

EZEKIEL 48: 14Huan azuak ding uh ahi kei a, akhen ding uh leng ahi sam kei; agam hoihna tata leng midang kiang a piak ding ahi kei hi; Toupa a dia siangthou ahi ngal a. 15Huan avai tong singnih-le-sangnga ban ah tong sangnga vantang tan, khopi dinna ding, tenna inn dingte leh khopuate a ding ahi ding; khopi bel alaizang a a-om ding ahi. 16Huchi in ateh vialdan hichibang in ahi ding: Amallam pang tong sangli-le-zanga, asimlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga; asuahlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga, atumlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga. 17Akhopi in khopua anei ding a; mallam pang in tong zanih-le-sawmnga; simlam pang tong zanih-le-sawmnga, suahlam pang tong zanih-le-sawmnga, tumlam pang tong zanih-le-sawmnga ahi. 18Adunglam val lai, thilpiak siangthou zul a pen suahlam ah tong singkhat, tumlam ah tong singkhat ahi ding; thilpiak siangthousa zulzul ahi ding hi; huai a thilpawtte khopi a nasem mite nek ding ahi ding. 19Huchi in khopi a nasemmi Israel nam tengteng a mite'n alei alet ding uhi. 20Thilpiak pumpi adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singnih-le-sangnga ahi ding; thilpiak siangthousa, dung leh vai kikim khopi tan toh na lat ding uh ahi. 21Aval thilpiaksa siangthou leh khopi tan pang lang tuaktuak vaihawmpa tan ahi ding a, suahlam sang ah thilpiak tong singnih-le-sangnga ban, gamseh dangte zulzul vaihawmpa tan ahi ding; huchi in thilpiak siangthousa leh tempul mun siangthou bel alaizang ah a-om ding. 22Huan Levi chi tan leh khopi tan vaihawmpa tante kikal ah a-om ding a; vaihawmpa tan Judah tan leh Benjamin tan toh akigi ding. 23Huan nam omlaite tungthu ah, suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Benjaminte tan ahi ding. 24Benjaminte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam ah tan khat Simeonte tan ahi. 25Simeonte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam Issakarte tan ahi.

EZEKIEL 48: 26Issakarte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam tan khat Zebulunte tan ahi. 27Zebulunte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam tan khat Gadte tan ahi. 28Gadte tan simlam pang gamgi Tarmar a kipan in Meribah-kadesh tuite tan in Aigupta lui zui in Tuipi Lian atung ding hi. 29Hiai Israel namte goutan ding a gam kihawmdan ding leh agam sehtuamte ahi uh chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Jerusalem Kongpite 30Huan hiaite khopi a kipan pawtnate ahi uh; mallam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; 31khopi kongpite Israel nam min bang zel a sak ding ahi a; mallam kongpi thumte, Reuben kongpi khat, Judah kongpi khat, Levi kongpi khat; 32suahlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; Joseph kongpi khat, Benjamin kongpi khat, Dan kongpi khat ahi ding hi. 33Simlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; Simeon kongpi khat, Issakar kongpi khat, Zebulun kongpi khat ahi ding. 34Tumlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; Gad kongpi khat, Asher kongpi khat, Naphtali kongpi khat ahi ding hi. 35Akimvel in tong singkhat-le-sanggiat ahi ding a; huai ni a kipan in khopi min bel, “Toupa omna mun” chih ahi ding hi. 48Namte Lak A Gam Hawmna

DANIEL 1: 1Daniel Leh Alawmte Tangthu(1.1—6.28)Nebukadnezzar Vaihawmna Inpi A Judah Tuailaite 2Huan Toupa'n akhut ah Judah kumpipa Jehoakim apia a, Pathian in atui-um belsuan khenkhat toh; ama'n Shinar gam ah apathian inn ah huaite apua a; huchi in tui-um belsuante apathian sumkoihna inn ah alalutta hi. 3Kumpipa'n amichilgehte heutupa Ashpenaz, Israel suante lak a kuate hiam, kumpi chite a kipan leh miliante a kipan hon pi ding in akiang ah thu agen hi. 4Tuailaite amau a gensiatna om lou, himahleh hoihtak a deihsakna tang leh pilna tengteng a siamtheihna leh pilna theihsiamna lungpilte, kumpipa inpi a dingh thei ding, huchibang mite; huchi a Kaldai laisiamna leh pau amaute asinsak theihna ding in. 5Huchi in kumpipa'n amau niteng tantuan ding in kumpipa an leh adawn uain a kipan in asehsak a, huchi a kum thum sung a kisinsiamsak a; huchi a huai hun abei chiang a kumpipa ma a adintheihna ding un. 6Huchi in hiaite lak ah, Judah tate a kipan, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael leh Azariah a-om uhi. 7Michilgehte heutupa'n amaute min ding aphuahsak a; Daniel min ding in Belteshazzar; Hananiah min ding in Shadrak; Mishael min ding in Meshak leh Azariah min ding in Abednego aphuak hi. 8Himahleh Daniel in kumpipa an hiam adawn uain hiam a kihihnit louh alungtang in atum tinten hi. Huaiziak in michilgeh heutupa kiang ah akihih nitlouhna ding in angenta hi. 9Huchi in Pathian in Daniel michilgehte heutupa mitmuh in deihsakna leh lainatna amusak hi. 10Huan michilgehte heutupa'n Daniel kiang ah, “Ka toupa kumpipa na an uleh na dawn uh seppa ka lau; bang ding in na khanvualpih uh tuailaite sang a na mel uh hoih lou zaw a hon mu ding ahia oi? Huchi in kumpipa lak ah ka lutang na lauthawngsak dia hia?” achi hi.

DANIEL 1: 11Huchi in Daniel in sumkempa, michilgehte heutupa'n Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael leh Azariah tung a asehpa kiang ah, 12“Na sikhate ni sawm sung enkhia in, ka hon ngen ahi; nek ding in anteh-louhing leh dawn ding in tui hon pia uhen. 13Huai chiang in na ma ah ka mel uleh amau kumpipa an ne tuailaite mel et hi hen; na muh bang in, na sikhate tung ah hih in,” achi hi. 14Huchi in amau thu angaikhia a, ni sawm sung a-enkhia hi. 15Ni sawm abei in tuailai kumpipa an nete tengteng sang in amel uh hoihzaw in akilang a, asa uh leng athauzaw hi. 16Huchi in sumkempa'n a-an uleh adawn ding uh uain alamang a, amaute kiang ah anteh-louhing ape zawta hi. 17Hiai tuailai lite ahih uleh Pathian in amaute kiang ah laisiamna leh pilna tengteng atheihna leh kivakna apia a; huchi in Daniel in mengmuhna leh mang tengteng ah theihsiamna anei hi. 18Kumpipa'n amaute hon pilut ding achih nite abei in michilgehte heutupa'n amaute Nebukadnezzar ma ah ahon pi hi. 19Kumpipa'n amau ahoulimpih a; amau lak ah Daniel, Hananiah Mishael leh Azariah bang kuamah muh in a-omta kei hi; huaiziak in kumpipa ma ah adinghta uhi. 20Huchi in pilna leh theihsiamna thu chiteng, amaute kumpipa'n adotte ah agamsung a om mitkhialdawi tawi leh bummi tengteng sang in amun sawm a hoihzaw in amaute amu hi. 21Kumpipa Kura in kum khatna vai ahawm tanpha in Daniel apaisuaktou hi.

DANIEL 2: 1Nebukadnezzar vaihawm akum nih kum in Nebukadnezzar in mang anei a; alungsim abuai mahmah a, a-ihmutheita kei hi. 2Kumpipa Nebukadnezzar Mangneihna 3Huchi in kumpipa'n akiang uah, “Mang ka nei a, huai mang thei ding in ka lungsim abuai mahmah hi,” achi hi. 4Kaldai mite'n kumpipa kiang ah Siria pau in, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in dam in; na sikhate na mang hilh in, ahilhchetna ka ensak ding uh,” achi uhi. 5Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Kaldai mite kiang ah, hiai thil kei a kipan apaikheta; mang leh ahilhchetna ka kiang a na hon theihsak kei ualeh atnen in na om ding ua, na innte uh ekvum asuak ding. 6Himahleh mang leh ahilhchetna na hon theihsak ualeh kei a kipan in thilpiakte leh kipahman leh nakpitak a zahtakna na mu ding uh; huaiziak in mang leh ahilhchetna hon ensak un,” achi hi. 7Anihveina ding in amau adawng ua, “Kumpipa'n mang hon hilh henla, kou ahilhchetna ka ensak ding uh,” achi uhi. 8Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Kei a kipan hiai thil apaikheta chih na muh ziak un, hun hihsau tum na hi uh chih ka theitel hi. 9Himahleh mang ka kiang a na hon theihsak kei uleh, nou a ding in dan khat kia a-om; hun akikhen tan a, ka ma a thuzuau leh sia gelkhol na hih ziak un; huaiziak in mang hon hilh unla, ahilhchetna na hon ensak thei uh chih ka thei ding,” achi hi. 10Kaldai mite'n kumpipa adawng ua, “Kumpipa thudot ensak thei leitung ah kuamah a-om kei; kumpipa hiam, toupa hiam, vaihawmmi kuamah in mitkhialdawi tawi kuamah hiam, bummi kuamah hiam, Kaldai mi kuamah mah huchibang thu adot ngei louh ziak un.

DANIEL 2: 11Kumpipa thil deih vangtak ahi, mihingte lak a sa a om lou pathiante chih louh ngal, midang kuamah in kumpipa ma ah huai a-ensak thei kei ding uh,” achi uhi. 12Hiai ziak in kumpipa aheh mahmah a, athangpai tuntun a, Babulon mipil tengteng hihmang ding in thu apeta hi. 13Huchi in thupiak piakkhiak ahita a, mipilte thah ding ahong hita ua; Daniel leh alawmte thah ding in azong uhi.Pathian In Mangkhiakna Daniel Atheisak 14Huchi in Daniel in kumpipa veng sepaih zaheutu Ariok, Babulon mipilte that ding a kuankhe pa kiang ah thuhilhna leh thupil toh dawnna akiksak hi. 15Ariok kumpipa sepaih zaheutu adong a akiang ah, “Bangziak a kumpipa a kipan thupiak huchi tel a kin ahia?” achi hi. Huchi in Ariok in Daniel kiang ah athil omdan atheisak hi. 16Daniel alut a, amah a dia hun sehsak ding in kumpipa angen hi, huchi a ahilhchetna kumpipa a-etsak theihna ding in. 17Huchi in Daniel a-inn ah apai a, Hananiah, Mishael, Azariah, alawmte kiang ah huai thil atheisakta hi. 18Huchi a amaute'n hiai thuguk tanchin a van Pathian zahngaihnate angettheihna ding un; huchi a Daniel leh alawmte Babulon a mipilte alakte toh amanthatlouhna ding un. 19Huchi in zan mengmuhna ah Daniel kiang ah thuguk taklat in a-omta hi. Daniel in van Pathian aphat hi. 20Daniel in adawng a:Tangtawn tangtawn in Pathian min phat in om hen;pilna leh hatna amah a ahi. 21Ama'n hunte leh hunbite ahihlamdang a; kumpipate asuankhia a,kumpipate atungkhia a; mipilte kiang ah pilna apia a,theihsiamna theite kiang ah theihna apia hi. 22Thil thukte leh thil gukte ataklang a, mial a om bang ahia chih athei a,akiang ah khovak a-om hi.

DANIEL 2: 23Na tung ah ka kipak a, ka hon phat hi,Aw nang ka piputePathian, pilna leh hatna hon pepa,nang ka hon nget uh ka kiang ua hon theisakpa'n;kumpipa thu ka kiang uah na hon theisakta ngal a,chi in.Daniel In Kumpipa Mang Leh Hilhchetna Agen 24Huaiziak in kumpipa'n Babulon mipilte hihse dia asehpa Ariok kiang ah Daniel ava hoh a, akiang ah, “Babilon mipilte hihmang ke'n; kumpipa ma ah hon pilut inla, kumpipa kiang ah ahilhchetna ka ensak ding,” ava chi hi. 25Huchi in Ariok in kintak in kumpipa ma ah Daniel apilut a, akiang ah, “Judah saltangte lak ah mi khat ka mu a, ama'n kumpipa kiang ah ahilhchetna atheisak ding,” achi hi. 26Kumpipa, amin Belteshazzar in adawng a Daniel kiang ah, “Mang ka neih na hon theisak thei in, ahilhchetna na hon theisak thei ding maw?” achi hi. 27Daniel in kumpipa ma ah adawng a, “Thuguk kumpipa'n anget mipilte hi in, mitkhialdawi tawite hi in, bum mite hin in, aisan mite hitaleh, kumpipa kiang ah a-ensak thei kei ding uhi. 28Himahleh van ah Pathian a-om a, ama'n thugukte ataklang hi; ni nanung lam a bang om ding ahia chih, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah atheisak hi. Na lupna tung a na lutang mengmuhna leh na mang hiaite ahi. 29“Nang na hihleh aw kumpipa na lupna tung ah na lungsim sung ah na ngaihtuahnate ahong om ua; tunung chiang a bang ahia hong om ding thu; huan amah thugukte na kiang a taklangpa'n bang ahia hong om ding na kiang ah atheisakta hi. 30Himahleh kei bel pilna mihing dangte sang a pilna ka neih tam zawk ziak a hiai thuguk ka kiang a taklat ahi kei a; himahleh ahilhchetna kumpipa kiang a theihsak ahihtheihna ding leh nang na lungtang ngaihtuahte na theihna ding ahi zaw hi.

DANIEL 2: 31“Aw kumpipa, ngai in, nang milim thupitak na muta hi. Hiai milim hattak mai, avakna thupi mahmah, na ma ah adingh a; amel a kihtakhuai mahmah hi. 32Hiai milim ahihleh alutang dangka-eng hoih ahi a, a-awm leh abante dangka, agil leh apheipite dal, 33akhete sik, akhezungte sik leh tungman khenkhat kihel ahi. 34Suang khut a sek louh huai milim a khepek sik leh tungman deng a kitam nensak dimdem tan in na mu hi. 35“Huchi in sik, tungman, dal, dangkate leh dangka-eng toh akitam nenkhawm vek ua, nipi buhphual a buhsi bang mai ahong hi ua; huchi in huih in huaite amutmang a, huai milim dengzan suangpi pen tang thupitak ahong suak a, leitung pumpi adimta hi. 36Hiai mang ahi a; kumpipa ma ah ahilhchetna ka gen ding uhi. 37“Aw kumpipa, nang kumpipate' Kumpipa, van Pathian in akiang a gam leh thilhihtheihna, hatna leh thupinate a piakna na hi. 38Koipeuh a mite tate atenna uah, gam a sate leh van a vasate na khut ah ahon pia hi; amau tengteng tung a vaihawm ding a abawl dangka-eng lutang na hi. 39Nang nung in nang sang a niamzaw gamdang khat ahong dingkhe ding; huchi in lalgam thumna dang, leitung tengteng a thunei ding in. 40Huan gam lina sik bang in ahat ding a, sik in akeknensak a thil tengteng anuaisiah bang in sik in hiaite tengteng adelhzan bang in, akeknensak in, adelhzan ding hi. 41“Huan khepek leh khezung na muhte, akhen belvelmi tungman leh akhen sik ahihleh gam hawmzak ahi ding a; himahleh asung ah sik hatna a-om ding a, sik tungman toh helkhawm na muh bangtak in. 42Huan khepek khezungte, akhen sik leh akhen tungman pen ahihleh, huchibang in gam hatna chiang nei, kitapna chiang nei ahi ding hi.

DANIEL 2: 43Huan sik leh tungman kihel na muh pen ahihleh, mite chi toh amau akitok hel ding uh; himahleh sik leh tungman akigawm theih louh bang in akikawikip kei ding uhi. 44“Huai kumpipate dam lai in van Pathian in gam suksiat a om ngei lou ding, athuneihna midang kiang a nutsiat a om ngei sam lou ding, ahon dingkhesak ding a; himahleh hiai gam tengteng akitam nensak ding a, ahihse vek ding, amah bel tangtawn in adingh ding hi. 45“Huchi in tang a kipan khut a sek louh suangpi ahong omkhia a, sik, dal, tungman, dangka leh dangka-engte a kitamsak dimdem na muh pen ahihleh; tunung chiang a bang ahia hong om ding kumpipa kiang ah Pathian thupi in atheisakta hi; mang omzia theihsa ahi a, akhiakna akichian hi,” achi hi.Kumpipa'n Daniel Kipahman Apia 46Huaitak in Nebukadnezzar in amai a lei si in Daniel abia a, thillat leh gimnamtui akiang a lan ding in amaute thu apia hi. 47Kumpipa'n Daniel adawng a, “Chihtaktak in na Pathian, pathiante' Pathian leh kumpipate' Toupa leh thugukte taklangpa ahi; hiai thuguk taklang ding a hihtheihna na neih ziak in,” achi hi. 48Huchi in kumpipa'n Daniel aliansak a, thilpiak tampi apia hi, Babulon bial pumpi a heutu leh Babulon mipilte tengteng tung a ukpipapen ding in abawlta hi. 49Daniel in Shadrak, Meshak, Abednego, Babulon bial thu leh la tung a koih ding in kumpipa kiang ah angen hi; himahleh Daniel bel kumpipa kongpi ah a-om hi.

DANIEL 3: 3Kumpipa Dangka-eng Milim Biak Ding Thupiak 1kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in dangka-eng milim, tong sawmguk a sang, tong guk a lian abawl a; Babulon bial a Dura Phaizang ah adingsak hi. 2kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in bial heutute, vaihawm mite, ukpipate, thukhenmi, sumkemmi, thudotmi, dansiammi leh bial vaihawmmi tengteng akaikhawm a, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in adinkhiak milim kipahpihna bawlna a hong pai ding in mite asawlkhia hi. 4Huaitak in tangkou ngaihtak in akikou a, “Na kiang ua thupiak ahi, Aw mite, namte, paute, 5pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem, nawtging, tumging peng nih nei leh tumging chi chih ging na zak chiang un, puk unla, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in adinkhiaksak dangka-eng milim bia un. 6Huan kuapeuh puk lou a beloute meipi kuang zuazua sung ah huai hun mah a paihlut ding ahi,” achi hi. 7Huaiziak in huai lai a mi tengteng in pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem, nawtging leh tumging chi chih ging azak un, mi tengteng, namte, paute apuk ua, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in atunkhiak dangka-eng milim abia uhi.Daniel Lawm Thumte Heksiatna 8Huchih lai in Kaldai mi kuate hiam ahong pai nai ua, Juda tuailaite ahong hekta uhi. 9Adawng ua kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in dam in! 10Aw kumpipa, nang thupiak na bawl a, mi chiteng in pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem leh nawtging, tumging peng nih neite leh tumging chi chih azak chiang ua, apuk ding ua dangka-eng milim abiak ding uh chi in. 11Kuapeuh puk lou a beloute meipi kuang zuazua ah paihlut ahi ding, chi in 12Babulon bial a thu leh la tung a na sehsa Juda kuate hiam a-om ua, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego. Hiai mite'n, Aw kumpipa, nang ahon limsak kei ua; na pathiante nna asem kei ua na dinkhiaksak dangka-eng milim leng abe sam kei uh,” chi in.

DANIEL 3: 13Huchi in Nebukadnezzar heh leh thangpai in Shadrak, Meshak, Abednego hon pi ding in thu apia hi. 14Huchi in hiai mite kumpipa ma ah ahon pi ua, Nebukadnezzar in adong a, akiang uah, “Aw Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, ka pathian nna na sep louh ua, dangka-eng milim ka tunkhiak na biak louh uh, na tup mawng uh hia?” achi hi. 15Tu in na kimansak unla chik hun peuh a pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem, nawtging leh tumging peng nih nei leh tumging chi chih ging na zak chiang un puk unla milim ka tunkhiak bia un, hoihtak in; himahleh na biak kei ualeh meipi kuang zuazua sung ah huai hun mah in ahon paihlut ding uh; huchi in ka khut a kipan a nou hon hunkhe ding huai pathian kua hi ding ahia? 16Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego in adawng ua kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw Nebukadnezzar, hiai thu ah ka hon dawn uh akiphamoh kei hi. 17Huchibang ding ahihleh, Aw kumpipa, a-nna ka sep uh ka Pathian un meipi kuang zuazua a kipan koute ahon hunkhe thei hi, na khut a pan ahon hunkhe ding hi. 18Huchi ahihkeileh leng, na thei in, Aw kumpipa, na pathiante nna ka sem kei ding ua, na dinkhiak dangka-eng milim leng ka be sam kei ding uh,” achi uhi.Daniel Lawm Thumte Thah Dia Thutanna 19Huchi in Nebukadnezzar athangpai petmah a, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego tung ah amel putdan akikheng hial hi. Huaiziak in meipi asat ngeina sang a mun sagih a asatsak ding in thu apia hi. 20Huan asepaih pawl lak a om mihat kuate hiam Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego hen ding leh meipi kuang zuazua sung a paihlut ding in thu apia hi.

DANIEL 3: 21Huchi in hiai mite apuansilh lai uh, samul puanak toh, puanak kawnggak nei leh apuansilh dangte uh toh, meikuang zuazua lak ah apailutta uhi. 22Huchi in kumpipa thupiak akhawk mahmah ziak leh meipi asat mahmah ziak in huai mi Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego domte meikuang in ahul lumta hi. 23Hiai mi thumte, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednegote, meipi kuang zuazua lak ah hensa in apuk uhi. 24Huchih lai in Nebukadnezzar in lamdang asa mahmah a; kintak in athoukhia a; amah thudot mite kiang ah, “Mei lak ah mi thum hensa in i pailut uh ahi kei maw?” chi in agen hi.
