Amau adawng ua kumpipa kiang ah, “Dik mah e, kumpipa aw,” achi uhi. 25Ama'n adawng a, “Ngai un, mi li phelsa a om, mei lak a vak in ka mu a, bangmah achi kei uh, ami lina melputdan Pathian tapa abang,” achi hi.Daniel Lawm Thumte Hotkhiakna Leh Kaisanna 26Huchi in Nebukadnezzar meipi kuang zuazua gei chin ah ahong pai a; thu agen a, “Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, nou Pathian Tungnungpen sikhate, hong pawtkhia unla, hiai lam ah hong pai un,” achi hi. Huchi in Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, mei lak a kipan in ahong pawtkhia uhi. 27Huan bial heutute, vaihawm mite, ukpipate leh kumpipa dan thei mite, omkhawmte'n hiai mite, mei in apumpi tung uah hihtheihna anei kei a, aluzang ua sam leng akangdang kei a, apuansilh uh leng alamdang kei a, meigim leng anam kei uh chih amu uhi. 28Nebukadnezzar in thu agen a, “Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego Pathian in a-angel sawl a, amah muang asikhate hunkhia a, kumpipa thu hihlamdang a, amau Pathian lou ngal pathian nna asep louh ua abiaklouhna ding ua apumpite uh pepa phat in om hen. 29“Huaiziak in thupiak ka bawl hi, michih, nam chih, pau chih, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego Pathian gensiatna thil banghiam gente, atnen in a-om dia, a-innte uh ekvum a bawl ahi ding hi; hichibang a hunkhe thei pathian dang a-om louh ziak in,” achi hi. 30Huchi in kumpipa'n Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, Babulon bial ah akaisangsak hi.

DANIEL 4: 1Kumpipa, Nebukadnezzar mite tengteng, namte leh paute, leitung pumpi a tengte kiang ah, na kiang uah lemna hihpun in om hen. 2Tungnungpen Pathian in kei lam a abawl chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte etsak, kei a ding in hoih hi in ka ngaihtuah hi. 3Achiamtehnate thupi hi na mahmah e;athillamdangte thilhihthei hi na mahmah uh e;agam tangtawn gam ahi a,avaihawmna akhang-akhang in a-om hi. 4Nebukadnezzar Mang Nihna 5Hon lausak mang ka nei hi; ka lupna tung ah ngaihtuahnate leh ka lungtang mengmuhte'n hon hihbuai uhi. 6Huaiziak in hilhchetna ka kiang a akitheihsak ding un, Babulon mipil tengteng ka ma a pi ding thupiak ka bawlta hi. 7Huchi in mitkhialdawi tawite, bum mite, Kaldai mite leh aisan mite ahong pai ua; ama uah ka mang ka genta hi; himahleh ahilhchetna ka kiang ah ahon theisak thei kei uhi. 8Himahleh atawptawp in ka ma ah, Daniel amin ka pathian min dungzui a Belteshazzar hiven, amah a Pathian siangthoute kha a-omna ma ah mang ka genta hi. 9Aw Belteshazzar, mitkhialdawi tawite heutupa, nang ah, Pathian siangthoute kha a-om a, thuguk bangmah in nang ahon hihbuai kei chih ka theih ziak in ka mang a ka muh mengmuhte leh ahilhchetna hon hilh in, ka chi hi. 10Ka lupna tung a ka lutang mengmuhte hichibang ahiz: Ngai in, lei laizang ah sing khat ka mu a, huai sing sandan athupi mahmah hi. 11Huai sing akhangtou a, ahong hat a, asanna in van asuntou a, lei mong tengteng tanpha huai ah akimu hi. 12Anahte ahoih un, agah pha mahmah a; huai ah mi tengteng a ding in an a-om hi; anuailim ah gamsate a-om ua, ahiangte ah van a vasate ateng ua, sa tengteng huai a kipan in akivak uhi.

DANIEL 4: 13Ka lupna tung a ka lup in mengmuhte ka mu a, ngai in, van a kipan in vengmi siangthou khat ahong paisuk hi. 14Ngaihtak in akikou a, hichibang in achi a: “Sing phuk inla, ahiangte satkhia in, anahte singkhia inla, agah thehzak in; anuai a kipan gamsate leh ahiang a kipan vasate hawlmang in om uhen. 15Himahleh abulsum leh azungte zaw hawi in, sik leh dal gui a henkhawm in, gam a loupa nou lak ah nutsiat in om hen. Van daitui in kawt henla, atantuan lei a loupa lak a gamsate toh hi hen. 16Huan atung a hun sagih abei mateng mihing lungsim kikheng in akiang ah gamsa lungtang piak hi hen. 17Tungnungpen in mite gam ah vai ahawm a, a-utna peuh kiang ah apia a, miniampente adingkhesak chih mihingte'n atheihna ding un veng mite'n agenkhia ua, misiangthoute'n apuangkhia uhi. 18“Hiai mang kei kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in ka man hi. Huan nang, Aw Belteshazzar, ahilhchetna genkhia in, ka gam a mipilte tengteng in ka kiang ah ahilhchetna ahon theisak thei kei ua; himahleh nang na hihthei, nang a pathian siangthoute kha a-om ziak in,” achi hi.Daniel In Mang Ahilhchian 19Daniel, amin Belteshazzar in, sawt lou kal lamdang asa a, angaihtuahnate'n amah apatausak hi. Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Belteshazzar, mang hiam ahilhchetna hiam in nang hon patausak kei hen,” achi hi. Belteshazzar in adawng a, “Ka toupa, mang nang hon mudahte lam thu hi henla, ahilhchetna na galte lam thu hi zawleh maw. 20Na sing muh, hong khang a, hong hat a, asanna in van asuttouh a, hiai a kipan lei mong tengteng akimuhna; 21anahte hoih a, agah pha mahmah a, mi teng a dia an om a;

DANIEL 4: huai nuai a gamsate teng ua, ahiang a van a vasate atenna uh, 22Aw kumpipa, huai hong khang a, hong hat na muh, nangmah na hi; na thupina akhang in, van asun in, na vaihawmna lei mong tawp pha in ahi. 23Van a kipan a kumpipa'n vengmi siangthou hong paisuk amuh, Sing phuk inla, hihgawp in; himahleh abulsum leh azungte zaw hawi in, sik leh dal gui a henkhawm in gam a loupa nou lak ah van daitui in kawt henla, huan atantuan gamsate kiang ah hi in, atung a hun sagih abei matan, chih thu ahihleh; 24Aw kumpipa, ka toupa kumpipa tung a hong tung Tungnungpen thupiak ahilhchetna hiai ahi: 25Mite a kipan hawlkhiak in na om dia; gamsate kiang ah na khosa ding a, bawngtalte bang a loupa neksak in na om ding a; van daitui in na kawt ding a; na tung ah hun sagih abei ding; mite gam ah Tungnungpen in vai ahawm a; a-ututna kiang ah apia chih na theih matan. 26Huan sing bulsum leh azungte nutsiat ding a thupiak a om pen ahihleh; van Pathian in vaihawm petmah ahi chih na theih khit hun chiang in na gam nang kiang a piakkik ding genna ahi. 27Aw kumpipa, huaiziak in ka hon thuhilh nang a ding in pom tuak leh tagahte kiang a zahngaihna etsakna in na thulimlouhnate tawpsan in; na lamzanna suksau a a-om khak zenzenleh,” achi hi.Nebukadnezzar Hihniamna 28Hiai tengteng kumpipa Nebukadnezzar tung ah ahong tung hi. 29Kha sawm-le-nih abei in Babulon a kumpi Inpi sung ah avialvak hi. 30Kumpipa'n thu agen a, hiai Babulon thupi, kumpipa tenna mun ding a, ka thilhihtheihna hatna leh ka thuneihna thupina ding a ka lam ahi kei maw? chi in.

DANIEL 4: 31Kumpipa kam a thu a-om lai mahmah in, van a kipan aw ahong suakkhia a, “Aw kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, na kiang a thugen ahi; nang a kipan gam apaimangta hi. 32Tungnungpen in mite gam ah vai ahawm a, a-ututna kiang ah apia chih na theih matan, mihingte a kipan in hawlkhiak na hi ding a, na tenna gamsate kiang ah ahi ding; bawngtalte bang a loupa ne ding a bawl in na om dia; na tung ah hun sagih abei ding,” achi hi. 33Kintak in huai bang thil ahong tungta, mite a kipan hawlkhiak in a-om a; bawngtalte bang in loupa ane petmah hi; apumpi van daitui in akawt a; asam muvanlai multe ahong bang a, achinte vasate chinte ahong bangta hi.Nebukadnezzar In Pathian Aphat 34Huan nite abei in kei Nebukadnezzar in van lam ah ka mitte ka suantou a, ka theihtheihnate ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn a, huchi in Tungnungpen ka pahtawi hi; amah tangtawn a om gige phat in ka zahtak hi.Avaihawmna tangtawn vaihawmna ahi a, agam akhang-akhang in ahi, chi in; 35Huan leitung a teng tengtengbangmah lou bang a ngaih ahi ua;huan van sepaih pawl leh leitung a teng tengtengtelak ah adeihlam bang in ahih zel a;kuamah in akhut alen thei un,akiang ah, “Bangziak a hih na hia?”achi thei kei uhi. 36Huai lai mah in ka theihtheihna ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn a; ka gam thupina, ka lalna leh hoihna ka kiang ah ahong kik a; ka midotte leh ka toupate'n kei ahong zong ua; huchi in ka gam ah kiptak in ka dingh a, kei a ding in thupina lian mahmah behlap in a-omta hi. 37Huchi in kei Nebukadnezzar in van Kumpipa phat a pahtawi in ka zahtak a; athilhih tengteng thutak ahi a, alampite vaihawmna ahi a, kisatheitak a omte ahihniam thei hi.

DANIEL 5: 1Belshazzar kumpipa'n atoupate lak a mi sangkhat a ding in ankuang thupitak abawl a, sangkhatte ma ah uain adawn hi. 2Belshazzar in uain achep lai in, apa Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a om tempul a kipan a alak dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuante kumpipa leh atoupate, azite leh ameite'n huaite a adawntheihna ding un hon la ding in thu apia hi. 3Huchi in Jerusalem a om Pathian inn, tempul a kipan alakkhiak dangka-eng tui-um belsuante ahon la ua; kumpipa leh atoupate, azite leh ameite'n, huaite in adawn uhi. 4Uain adawn ua, dangka-eng, dangka, dalsik, sing leh suang pathiante aphat uhi. 5Belshazzar Ankuangluina 6Huai lai in kumpipa mel ahong lamdang a, angaihtuahnate'n amah apatausakta hi; akhut akhe akipzouta kei a, akhukte akisat tuah nomnom uhi. 7Bum mite, Kaldai mite leh aisan mite hon pi un chi in nakpitak in kumpipa akikou hi. Kumpipa'n thu agen a, Babulon mipilte kiang ah, “Kuapeuh in hiai laigelh sim a, ahilhchetna hon ensak, puan sandup silhsak ahi ding a; angawng kimvel in dangka-eng khainiang a-ok ding a; gamsung ah vaihawmmi thumna ahi ding,” achi hi. 8Huchi in kumpipa mipilte tengteng ahong lut ua; himahleh laigelh asim thei kei ua, ahilhchetna leng kumpipa atheisak thei kei uhi. 9Huchi in kumpipa Belshazzar apatau mahmah a; amah ah amel ahong lamdang a; akhawnbawlte alungzing uhi. 10Huchi in kumpipa leh khawnbawlte thu ziak in ankuangluina insung ah kumpinu ahong lut hi; kumpinu'n thu agen a, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in hing in, na ngaihtuahnate'n hon patausak kei henla, na mel leng lamdang kei hen. 11Na gamsung a mi khat, amah a pathian siangthoute kha omna a-om a; na pa dam lai in vakna leh theihtheihna leh pilna, pathiante pilna bang, amah ah muh in a-om;

DANIEL 5: kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, kumpipa, na pa'n, amah mitkhialdawi tawite leh bum mite, Kaldai mite leh aisan mite heutu in abawl hi. 12Lungsim hoihpen, theihna, theihtheihna, mangte hilhchetna, thugen haksa etsakna, ginlelhna hihvenna kumpipa'n Belteshazzar min asakpa, huai Daniel mah ah muh in a-om hi. Tu in Daniel sapsak in om henla, ama'n hilhchetna ensak hen,” achi hi.Daniel In Laigelh Ahilhchian 13Huan kumpipa ma ah Daniel ahon pi ua, Kumpipa'n thu agen a Daniel kiang ah, “Daniel, ka pa'n Judah gam a kipan Judah salmat hon pilut na hi hia? 14Nang ah pathian kha a-om a, vakna leh theihtheihna leh pilna hoihpen nang ah muh in a-om chih na tanchin ka za hi. 15Tu in ka ma ah mipilte, bum mite ahon pilut ua, hiai laigelh sim a, ahilhchetna ka kiang a theisak ding in; himahleh huai thil hilhchetna a-ensak thei kei uhi. 16Himahleh hilhchetnate na bawl thei a, ginlelhnate na bawlhoih thei chih na tanchin ka na za hi. Tu in laigelh na sim theih a, ahilhchetna na hon hilh theih leh puan sandup ka hon silhsak ding a; na ngawng kimvel in dangka-eng khi na ok ding a; gamsung ah vaihawmmi thumna na hi ding hi,” achi hi. 17Huchi in Daniel in adawng a kumpipa ma ah, “Na thilpiakte nangmah kiang ah hi zaw henla, na kipahmante midang kiang ah pe zaw in; ahi a, kumpipa kiang ah laigelh ka sim ding a, ahilhchetna amah ka theisak ding hi. 18Aw nang kumpipa, Tungnungpen Pathian in na pa Nebukadnezzar gam leh thupina, letna leh vaihawmna ahon pia hi. 19Huai amah apiak letna ziak in ama ah mi tengteng, namte, paute aling un alau ua; a-utut athat a, a-utut hinghawi in; a-utut akaithou a, a-utut asawnniam hi.

DANIEL 5: 20Himahleh alungtang ahong kisaktheih a, ki-uangsaktak a gamta a alungsim hihkhauh a a-om lai in, alaltutphah a kipan suan in a-om a, amah a kipan athupina alakheta hi. 21Huan mite tapate a kipan hawlkhiak in a-om a; huchi in alungtang gamsate a bang a bawl in a-om a; bawngtalte bang a loupa a vak in a-om a, apumpi van daitui in akawt a; Tungnungpen Pathian in mihing gam ah vai ahawm a, a-ututte atung ah adingkhesak chih ahon theih matan. 22“Huan nang atapa, Aw Belshazzar, hiai tengteng na theih in leng na lungtang na niamkhiak kei hi. 23Himahleh van Toupa dem in na kihihsang a; amau na ma ah toupa inn a tui-um belsuante na lasak a; nang leh na toupate, na zite leh na meite'n, huaite in uain na dawn uh a; bangmah mu thei lou, za thei lou, theithei lou dangka leh dangka-eng, dal, sik, sing leh suang pathiante bia in na phat a; Pathian akhut a na hatna omna leh na lampite tengteng neipa na pahtawi zaw kei hi. 24Huchi in amah a kipan huai khut banghiam tan sawl in ahong om a, hiai laigelh gelh in ahong omta hi.Baang A Thu Kigelh 25“Huan gelh a om laithu hiai ahi: MENE, MENE, TEKEL, UPHARSIN. 26Huai hilhchetna hiai ahi. MENE: Pathian in na gam asimta, abeisakta hi. 27TEKEL: bukna a buk in na om a, na chingzou kei hi. 28PERES: na gam hawm in a-om a, Mid mite leh Persia mite kiang ah piak ahita,” achi hi. 29Huchi in Belshazzar in thu apia a, dangka-eng khainiang angawng kimvel in a-oksak ua; gamsung a vaihawmmi athumna hi ding in amah tung ah thu apuang uhi. 30Huai zan mah in Kaldai kumpipa Belshazzar thah in a-om hi. 31Mid mi Darias, kum sawmguk-le-nih a upa in gam atangta hi.

DANIEL 6: 1Darias in agam pumpi bial za-le-sawmnih omsuak ding bial heutu za-le-sawmnih gam tung ah akoih hi. 2Huan amaute tung ah, heutu lian thum, huaite lak ah Daniel akhatna ahi a; huchi a hiai bial heutute'n huaite kiang a thu atut ua, kumpipa'n siatna aneihlouhna ding in. 3Huchi in hiai Daniel, amah a lungsim hoihpen a-om ziak in, heutu liante leh bial heutute tung ah akan-aval a bawl in a-om a; kumpipa'n gam pumpi tung ah amah koih ding angaihtuah hi. 4Huai lai in heutu liante leh bial heutute'n gam thu ah Daniel demna ding azong uhi; himahleh amah miginom ahih ziak in thupatna ding in adiklouhna amu kei ua, amah ah diklouhna leh khelhna muh in a-om kei hi. 5Huchi in hiai mite'n, “Hiai Daniel demna ding bangmah i mu kei ding; a Pathian dan toh kisai a amah demna ding i muh kei ngalleh,” akichi uhi. 6Humpinelkai Kul Ah Daniel 7Gam heutu lian tengteng, heutute leh bial heutute, dan thei mite leh ukpipate, kumpi dan thuseh bawlkhiak a, khamna khauhtak bawl ding in akikumkhawm uhi. Huchi in mi kuapeuh, nang chih louh, Aw kumpipa, ni sawmthum sung a pathian hiam mihing hiam lak a ngetna abawlleh, humpinelkai huangsung ah paihlut in a-om ding hi. 8Tu in, Aw kumpipa, khamna hihkip inla, laigelh ah na min gelh in; huchi a Mid mite leh Persia mite dan bang a akihih lamdanlouhna ding in,” achi uhi. 9Huchi in kumpipa Darias in laigelh leh khamna ah amin agelhta hi. 10Daniel in laigelh ah min akigelhta chih atheih in a-insung ah alut a; adantan sung a atawlette Jerusalem lam a hon hi ve un, akhukdin a, ni khat in thumvei, huchi in athum a, amalam a ahih bang in, a Pathian ma ah kipahthu agen hi.

DANIEL 6: 11Huchi in hiai mite akikhawm ua, Daniel a Pathian ma a thu ngen leh thum in amu uhi. 12Huchi in ahong pai nai ua, kumpipa khamna tungtang kumpipa ma ah ahong genta uhi, “Aw kumpipa, nang chih louh michih kuapeuh in ni sawmthum sung a pathian hiam mihing hiam kiang a ngetna abawlleh humpinelkai huangsung ah paihlut ahi ding chih khamna ah na gelh ahi kei maw,” achi uhi. Kumpipa'n, “Mid mite leh Persia mite dan lamdang thei lou bang in huai dan kip lai ahi,” achi hi. 13Huan amau adawng ua kumpipa ma ah, “Huai Daniel, Judah saltang tate lak a mi in nang leh na min gelhna khamna leng ahon limsak kei, Aw kumpipa, ni khat in thumvei ngetna abawl hi,” achi uhi. 14Hiai thute azak in, kumpipa alungkim het kei a, amah suaktasak ding in Daniel tung ah alungtang anga a; amah hutkhiak tum in nitum tan asemgim hi. 15Huchi in hiai mite kumpipa kiang ah ahong kikhawm ua, kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw kumpipa, khamna hiam dan thuseh hiam kumpipa'n ahihkipsa hihlamdan theih ahih louh Mid mite leh Persia mite dan ahi chih thei in,” achi uhi. 16Huchi in kumpipa'n thu apia a, Daniel ahon pi ua, humpinelkai huangsung ah apailut uhi. Huan kumpipa'n thu agen a, Daniel kiang ah, “A-nna na sep gige na Pathian in ahon suaktasak ding,” achi hi. 17Huan suang khat ahon la ua, huangsung gong ah akoih ua; kumpipa'n amah suaisawnna zungbuh leh atapate suaisawnna zungbuh in suai anamta hi; Daniel tungtang thu a bangmah hihlamdan theih ahihlouhna ding in. 18Huchi in kumpipa a-inpi ah apai a, an ngawl in, tumging leh nopbawlna khawlsak in azanhak a; amah lah a-ihmu thei kei hi. 19Huchi in zingsang beltak in kumpipa athou a, humpinelkaite huangsung lam ah kintak in ava hoh hi.

DANIEL 6: 20Huangsung lam a Daniel kiang a ahong pai nai lai in, kah aw in akikou a; kumpipa'n thu agen a, Daniel kiang ah, “Aw Daniel, Pathian hing sikha, a-nna na sep gige, na Pathian in humpinelkaite a kipan nang hon suaktasak thei hiam?” achi hi. 21Daniel in kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in hing in! 22Ka Pathian in a-angel hon sawl a, humpinelkaite kam ahong chihsak a, ahon hihna kei uh; amah ma a keimah a hoihna muh a a-om ziak leh Aw kumpipa nangmah ma a leng gilou ka hih louh ziak in,” achi hi. 23Huchi in nakpitak in kumpipa akipak a, huangsung a kipan Daniel lakhe tou ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in huangsung a kipan in Daniel alakhe tou ua, a Pathian amuan ziak in atung ah bangmah natna akimu kei hi. 24Huan kumpipa'n thu apia a, Daniel hekte huai mite ahon pi ua, humpinelkai huangsung ah apai ua, amau, azi leh tate uh; humpinelkaite'n amaute huangsung taw ahong tun ma un ana man ua, aguhte uh ahihnen vek uhi. 25Huchi in kumpipa Darias in mite tengteng, namte, paute leitung pumpi a tengte kiang ah lai agelh a, “Na kiang uah lemna hihpun in om hen! 26Ka gam seh thum tengteng ah Daniel Pathian ma ah mite aling un alau ding uh;Amah Pathian hing, tangtawn a omkip,agam hihsiat ahi ngei kei ding a;athuneihna a-omden ding hi, chi in thupiak ka bawl hi. 27Ama'n asuaktasak a, atankhia a,van leh lei ah chiamtehna leh thillamdangte ahih a;ama'n humpinelkaite thilhihtheihna a kipan in Daniel asuaktasak hi.” 28Huchibang in Darias vaihawm lai leh Persia mi Kura vaihawm lai in hiai Daniel alamzang mahmah hi.

DANIEL 7: 1Babulon kumpipa Belshazzar kum khatna kum in Daniel in alupna tung a alup lai in mang anei a, alungsim ah mengmuh ahong kilang a, mang agelh a athute akim in agen hi. 2Daniel in thu agen a, “Zan a ka mengmuhna ah, ngai in, van huih lite tuipi thupi tung a hong nungkhia un ka mu hi. 3Huan tuipi a kipan sa thupi li, kibang lou chiat ahong paitou ua, 4akhatna humpinelkai abang a, muvanlai kha anei hi; huchi a ka et lai in akhate bohkhiak in a-om ua; lei a kipan phottouh a mihing bang a khe nih a dinsak a om in; akiang ah mihing lungsim piak in a-om hi.” 5Huan ngai in, sa dang, anihna, vompi bang, apang langkhat tung ah photkang in a-om a; akamsung ah ahate kikal ah nakguh thum a-om a; hichibang in akiang ah hilh in a-om a, “Thou inla, sa tampi negai in,” chi in. 6Hiai khit in ka en a, huan ngai in, sa dang khat, gialbem bang, anungzang a vasa bang a kha li nei ka mu hi. Huai gamsa in lu li anei a; akiang ah thuneihna piak in a-om hi. 7Daniel Mengmuhnate(7.1—12.13)Daniel In Gamsa Lite Amuhna 8Kite ka ngaihtuah lai in, alak uah kii dang aneu khat hong poukhia a, huai ma ah huai kii masa thumte azung uah bohkhiak in a-om uh, hiai kineu ah mit, mihing mit bang leh kam thil thupite gen a-omta hi.Tanglai Mipa Muhna 9Huchi a ka et lai in, laltutphah akikoih a, Tanglai Mipa'n alaltutphah aluahta hi; apuansilh vuk bang in angou a, samul siang bang in alu a sam angou hi; huai alaltutphah meikuang zuazua ahi a, huai akangtalai khete meikuang lai bang ahi. 10Meikuang luipi hong pawt a ama a kipan ahong paikhia a, asang asangte'n amah nna asepsak uh;

DANIEL 7: ama ah singkhat mun singkhat adingh ua; vaihawmna atungkhia ua, laibute ahong uhi. 11Huai kii in athugen thupite ziak in ka en nilouh hi. Huchi a ka et lai in, huai gamsa thah in ahong om a; apumpi hihsiat in ahong om a; meikuang a apaih dong uh ka en gige hi. 12Huan sa dangte ahihleh athuneihna uh lakmang in a-om a; hun seh khat leh hun khat tan ahinna uh hihsau in a-om hi. 13Zan mengmuhna in ka mu a, ngai in, van meipite toh mi khat mihing tapa toh kibang ahong pai a, Tanglai Mipa kiang mahmah ah ahong a, amah ama chin ah ahon pi uhi. 14Huan thuneihna, thupina leh gam piak in a-om a; huchi a mi tengteng, namte leh paute'n amah nna asepsak theihna ding un; athuneihna tangtawn thuneihna ahi a, amang kei ding, agam hihsiat in a-om kei ding hi.Mengmuhnate Hilhchet Ahi Uh 15“Kei Daniel ahihleh ka sung ah ka lungsim adah a, ka lutang mengmuh in kei ahon patausak hi. 16Akiangnai a dinghte lak a khat kiang ka zuan a, hiai tengteng thu ah thutak amah ka dongta hi. Huchi in huai thilte hilhchetna ka kiang ah ahon theisakta hi. 17Hiai gamsa thupi lite etsak bel lei a hong dingkhe ding kumpipa lite ahi uhi. 18Himahleh Tungnungpen misiangthoute'n gam atang ding ua, tangtawn, tangtawn in, gam aneiden ding uhi,” achi hi. 19Huchi in sa lina, amaute tengteng toh kibang lou, kihtakhuai mahmah, ahate sik hi a, achinte dal, ne khin a, botnen a, a-omlaite akhepek a chil tungtang thutak theih ka ut hi. 20Huan kii sawmte aluzang a omte lak ah kii dang khat hong poukhia a, huai ma a kii thumte apukna;

DANIEL 7: huai kii mitte nei leh kam nei a thil thupite gen a, alatdan a lawite sang a hat tuakzaw pen tanchin ka thei nuam hi. 21Huchi a ka etleh huai kii in misiangthoute dou in, gal abawl a, 22Tanglai Mipa'n Tungnungpen misiangthoute gum in thu akhen a, amau lalgam aneih masiah ua ding in amaute azouta hi. 23Huchi in sa lina pen leitung ah gam lina ahi ding a, huai gam tengteng toh akibang kei ding a, leitung pumpi agai ding a, asikden dia, abotnen ding achi hi. 24Huan kii sawmte ahihleh, hiai gam a kipan in kumpipa sawm hong dingkhe dingte ahi ua; amau nung in adang khat; amasa toh akibang kei ding a, ama'n kumpipa thumte azou ding hi. 25Tungnungpen dem in agense ding a, misiangthoute anuaisiah ding hi; hunte leh dan khen ding angaihtuah dia; hun khat leh hunte leh hun kimkhat abei masiah misiangthoute akhut ah piak in a-om ding uhi. 26Huaite zoh in vaihawmna a-om ding a, athuneihna lakmang ahi ding a, atawp tan a hihgawp ding leh suksiat in a-om ding hi. 27Huan leitung gam leh thuneihna leh van nuai pumpi nuai a gamte thupina, Tungnungpen misiangthoute kiang ah piak in a-om ding; agam tangtawn gam ahi a, avaihawmnate'n amah nna asepsak un athu amang ding uhi. 28Hiai ah thu leh la tawpna a-om hi. Kei Daniel ahihleh ka ngaihtuahnate'n nakpi in hon hihbuai a, kei ah ka mel amual hi; himahleh ka lungtang in huai thu ka kem khinkhian hi.

DANIEL 8: 1Kumpipa Belshazzar vaihawm akum thumna kum in kei, Daniel kiang a amasa a kilang pen mah ahong kilat khit nung in mengmuhna ka kiang ah hong kilang nawn hi. 2Ka mengmuhna ah hichi ahong hi a, Elam bial a Susa inpi ah ka om a; huan mengmuhna in Ulai lui kiang ah om in ka mu hi. 3Huchi in ka dakleh ngai in, huai lui gei ah belamtal khat kii nih nei adingh a, akii nihte asau uhi. Himahleh khat sang in adang pen asauzaw a, asauzaw pen ahong pou nanung pen ahi. 4Huai belamtal in akii a si ding in tumlam, mallam leh simlam nawt in ka mu hi; ama ah sate adingh thei kei ua, akhut a kipan suaktasak thei leng kuamah a-om kei uh; himahleh ama deihlam in ahih a ahong thupi hi. 5Huchi a ka ngaihtuah lai in, ngai in, leitung pumpi tawnsuak in tumlam a kipan in keltal khat lei sukha lou in ahong pai a, huai kel in amitte kikal ah kii minthang khat anei hi. 6Belamtal kii nih nei lui malam a dingh ka muh kiang ah ahong pai a, athilhihtheihna toh heh in amah adelhta hi. 7Belamtal kiangchin ah ahong pai ka mu a, atung ah nakpitak in athangpaita a, belamtal aboh a, akii nihte ahihtan a; huchi in belamtal in amah adinna ding thahatna aneita kei hi. Lei ah asipuk a, amah achilzial a; akhut a kipan belamtal suaktasak ding kuamah a-om kei hi. 8Daniel In Belamtal Leh Keltal Muhna 9Huan huai kiite lak a kii neu thupi mahmah khat, simlam, suahlam leh gam kilawm lam nga in ahong khangkhia hi. 10Huchi in van sepaihte bang hial in ahong thupi mahmah a; aksihonte lak a khenkhatte lei ah apaikhesuk a, amau achil hi.

DANIEL 8: 11Ahi, van sepaihte' Toupa tung nangawn ah akiliansak a; amah a kipan in niteng halmang thillat alamang a, amun siangthou apaikhesuk hi. 12Huan tatlekna ziak in halmang thillatte toh van sepaihte amah kiang ah piak in a-om ua; huchi in lei ah thutak apaikhia a, asep leh bawlte ah alohching hi. 13Huchi in misiangthou khat in misiangthou dang khat kiang ah, “Hiai mengmuhna a kimu tatlekna mulkimhuai in niteng halmang thillat bang tan luahtou ding a, mun siangthoupen leh van sepaihte akhenuai a bang tan nuaisiah a omsak ding ahia,” achih ka za hi. 14Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Nitaklam leh zinglam sangnih-le-zathum sung tan in; huai chiang in mun siangthoupen silsiang ahi ding hi,” achi hi.Gabriel In Mengmuhte Ahilhchian 15Huan hichi ahong hi a, kei, Daniel in ka mengmuh lai in, theihchet ka na tum a; huchi in ka ma ah mihing kibatpih bang ahong dingh hi. 16Huan Ulai luipiau kikal ah, mihing aw kikou in, “Gabriel, hiai mipa mengmuhna theichiansak in,” achih ka za hi. 17Huchibang in ka dinna mun naih in ahong pai a; huchi a ahong pai lai in, ka lauta a, ka mai in lei ka si hi; himahleh ama'n ka kiang ah, “Aw mihing tapa, mengmuh lah hun tawp a ding ahi a, theisiam in,” achi hi. 18Huan kei ahon houpih lai in, lei lam nga in nakpitak in ka ihmuta a; himahleh ahon khoih a, ahon dingtangsak hi. 19Huan ama'n, “Ngai in, thangpaihna hun tawp lam a bang ahia hong om ding ka hon theisak ding; hun tawp sehsa a ding lah ahi ngal a,” achi hi. 20“Belamtal na muh kii nih nei, Media leh Persia kumpipate ahi uh. 21Huan huai keltal huham Grik kumpipa ahi; amitte kikal a om kii thupi kumpipa khatna ahi.

DANIEL 8: 22Huan akitan pen mun luah kii lite ahihleh, huai nam a kipan in gam li hong dingkhe dingte ahi ua; himahleh amau bang in thilhihtheihna anei kei ding uh. 23Huan agam vaihawm hun tawp na uah, talek mite ahong hat mahmah chiang un, kumpipa lauhuai melpu, zuau a khem siam khat adingkhe ding hi. 24Huchi in athilhihtheihna ahat dia, himahleh amah mah thilhihtheihna hilou in; siatna lamdangtak atun dia, athilhih khempeuh alohching ding hi; huchi in mihatte leh misiangthoute ahihsegawp ding hi. 25“Huan amah dan zui in khemna nasep ah alohching zel ding hi; huan alungtang akiliansak ding a, mi tampite bit akisak lai un ahihse ding a; kumpite Kumpi dou ding in akisa ding; himahleh mihing khut hilou in hihkhap in a-om ding hi. 26Huan nitak lamte leh zingsang lamte toh kisai mengmuhna kigen adik ahi; himahleh ahong tung ding ni tampi a ding ahih lai ziak in hiai mengmuhna khak bikbek in,” achi hi. 27Huchi in kei, Daniel ka sibup a; ni bangzah hiam ka china hi; ka thou a, kumpipa nna ka sem a hiai mengmuhna lamdang ka sa hi, himahleh kuamah in hiai atheisiam kei.

DANIEL 9: 1Media mi, Ahasueras tapa Darias, Kaldaite tung a kumpipa ding abawl, vaihawm akum khatna, 2avaihawm akum khatna kum in kei, Daniel in laibute a kipan Jerusalem hihsiatna in kum sawmsagih daih ding ahi chih zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung tanchin a kipan in ka theisiam hi. 3Huchi in Toupa Pathian lam ah ka mel ka koihkip a, thumna leh thilngette, an ngawlna leh sai-ip puan silh in, vut lak a tu in Toupa Pathian kiang ah ka ngen ngutngut hi. 4Huan Toupa ka Pathian kiang ah ka thum a, thupha ka tawi hi, “Aw Toupa, Pathian thupi leh mulkimhuai, nang hon it a na thupiakte zuite tung a thukhun leh zahngaihna vom; 5ka na khialta ua, hoih loutak in ka gamtang ua, giloutak in ka na hihta ua, ka hel ua, na thuseh leh na vaihawmte ka na lehngatsanta uhi. 6Ka kumpipate uh, ka vaihawmtute uleh ka pipute uh leh gam a mi tengteng kiang a na min a thugen, na sikha zawlneite thu leng ka na ngaikhe kei uhi. 7Aw Toupa, diktatna nang a ahi a, himahleh tuni bang in, kou a bel zahlakna leh buaina ahi; Judah a mite, Jerusalem a tengte, Israel tengteng, anai leh gamla a omte, na tung a atatlekna ziak un amaute gam tengteng ah delhzak in ka om uhi. 8“Aw Toupa, ka kumpipate, ka vaihawmte uh, ka pipute uh leh kou hon suangtute'n na tung a dikloutak a akhelh ziak un zahlakna in hon khuh hi. 9Daniel In Amite Athumsak 10Toupa ka Pathian uh aw leh adante a om ding a asikha zawlneite zang a ka ma ua hon na koihsakte ka na mangta kei uhi. 11Ahi, Israel tengteng in na dan atatleksan ua, ahilou lam ah apial ua, na aw amanlouhna ding un;

DANIEL 9: huaiziak in na tung a ka hihkhelhte ziak in Mosi, Pathian sikha dan sung a gelh a om kichiamna hamsia ka tung ah sunbuak in a-omta hi. 12“Huan koute demna leh ka tung ua vaihawmte demna thute leh ka tung ua siatna thupitak in ahihkip khinta hi; Jerusalem tung a kihih bang van nuai pumpi ah lah akihih ngei ngal kei a. 13Mosi Dan sung a gelh ahih bang in, hiai siatna tengteng ka tung uah ahong tung hi; huchipi in leng ka thulimlouhnate uh kiheisan a, na thutak a theihkhen theihna ka neihtheihna ding un Toupa ka Pathian uh deihsakna ka ngen nai kei lai uhi. 14Huaiziak in Toupa ka Pathian uh athilhihte tengteng a adiktat gige man in, Toupa'n thil hoih lou en gige in, ka tung uah ahon tungsakta hi; hinapi in kou lah a-aw ka na mangta kei uhi. 15Huan tu in, Aw Toupa ka Pathian uh, khut hattak a na mite Aigupta gam a kipan pikhepa leh tuni bang a minthanna kimuhpa, tuni bang in ka khialta ua, giloutak in ka na hihta uhi. 16“Aw Toupa, ka hon ngen ahi, na diktatna tengteng ziak in, na hehna leh thangpaihna, na khopi Jerusalem leh na tang siangthou a kipan kihei mangsak in; ka khelhnate uh ziak leh ka pipute uh thulimlouhna ziak in, Jerusalem leh na mite lah ka kim ka vel ua omte tengteng simmoh ahong hita uhi. 17Huaiziak in tu in, Aw ka Pathian uh, na sikha thumna leh athilngette ngaikhia inla, Toupa ziak in, asegawpsa na mun siangthou tung ah na mel vaksak in. 18Aw ka Pathian, na bil hon doh inla, za in; na mitte hak inla, na min a kilou na khopi siatgawpnate en in;

DANIEL 9: ka diktatna ziak un na ma a hiai ka thilngetnate uh lan ka hi ngal kei ua, na zahngaihna thupite ziak in ahi zaw hi. 19Aw Toupa, za in, Aw Toupa ngaidam in, Aw Toupa, ngaikhia inla hih in; hal ke'n; nangmah ziak mahmah in, Aw ka Pathian, na khopi leh na mite nang min pute ahi uhi,” achi hi.Gabriel In Genkholhna Ahilhchian 20Huchi a thu ka gen a, ka thum a, ka khelhna leh ka mi Israel khelhna thupha ka tawi a, Toupa ka Pathian ma a ka Pathian tang siangthou a dingh a thilngetna ka piak lai in; 21ahi, thumna a thu ka gen lai in, pasal Gabriel, achil a mengmuhna a ka muh pa, kintak a leng dia bawl a om in, nitaklam thillat hun ding in ahong khoih hi. 22Huan ahon thuhilh a, ahon houpih a, “Aw Daniel, theihsiamna a siam mahmah a hon bawl ding in tu in ka hong paikhia hi,” achi hi. 23Na thilngetna kipat phet in adawnna piak ahi; nang hilh ding a hong pai ka hi, nakpitak a it lah na hi ngal a; huaiziak in thu ngaihtuah inla, mengmuhte theisiam in. 24“Na mite leh na khopi siangthou a ding in tatlekna hihbeina ding, khelhnate tawpsakna ding leh thulimlouhna a dia kilemna bawlna ding, tangtawn diktatna laklutna ding leh mengmuhte leh genkholhnate khakkhum bikbekna ding leh asiangthoupen thaunilhna ding in na tung ah nipikal sawmsagih hun seh leh thu piak ahi. 25Huaiziak in thei inla, theisiam in, Jerusalem tungding nawn ding leh lam ding a thupiak apaikhiak a kipan sathau nilh a ompa, vaihawm tan in, nipikal sagih ahi ding; huan nipikal sawmguk-le-nih sung in hun haksa mahmahte akongzing leh bukna phaizang toh akilam nawn ding hi.

DANIEL 9: 26“Nipikal sawmguk-le-nih khit chiang in sathau nilh a ompa satkhiak in a-om ding a, bangmah anei kei ding hi; huchi in ahong om ding vaihawmpa leh mite'n khopi leh mun siangthou ahihse ding ua; hun tawpna tui khang bang in ahong tung ding, huan atawp dong kidouna leh siatgawpnate om ding a guankholhsa ahita hi. 27Huchi in nipikal khat a ding in tampi toh thukhun khauhtak abawl ding a; nipikal kimkhat a ding in kithoihna leh thillat atawpsak ding hi; mun siangthou ah mulkimhuai leh kihhuai atungkhe ding a; amah tung a tung dia guankholhsa hun tawp leh thangpaihna atung ah sunbuak ahih tan a-om ding hi,” achi hi.

DANIEL 10: 1Persia kumpipa Kura vaihawm kum thumna ah Daniel, amin Belteshazzar kiang ah thu khat ahong kihil hi; huan huai thu atak ahi a, kidouna thupi mahmah thu ahi; huchi in huai thu atheisiam a, mengmuhna theihsiamna anei hi. 2Huai lai in kei, Daniel in nipikal pumpi kal thum ka suun hi. 3Tanghou lim ka ne kei a; sa hi in uain hileh ka kam ah alut kei; nipikal thum tunkim masiah sathau ka kinilh kei himhim hi. 4Huan akha masapen ani sawmnih-le-li ni in, lui lian, Tigris pang ah ka dingh hi. 5Ka dak a, ngai in, mi khat puanmalngat silh, akawngte Uphaz dangka-eng siang a gak ka mu hi. 6Apumpi leng beril suang bang ahi a; amaitang khophia bang ahi; amitte meisel kuangpha abang a, abante leh akhepekte dal nawttet abang a; athugen ging mipi aw abang hi. 7Huchi in kei, Daniel kia in hiai mengmuhna ka mu a; ka kiang a om mite'n lah huai mengmuhna amu ngal kei ua; himahleh atung uah nakpi a linna ahong tung a, kibu ding in ataikek uhi. 8Huchi in kei kia a nutsiat in ka om a; hiai mengmuhna thupi ka muta hi; huchi in kei ah hatna a-om nawnta kei a; ka kilawmna kei ah siatna ahong suakta a; hatna ka neita kei hi. 9Hinapi in ka muh mipa aw ka za a; athute ka ngaihkhiak lai in, akhup in ka mai lei lam nga in nakpitak in ka ihmu hithit hi. 10Tigri Lui Gei A Daniel Mengmuhna 11Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Aw Daniel, nang nakpitak a-it a ompa, na kiang a ka thugente theisiam in dingtang in; na kiang a sawl a ompa ka hi,” achi a; hiai thu ka kiang a agen lai in, ling kawm in ka dinghta hi.

DANIEL 10: 12Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Lau ke'n, Daniel, theisiam ding leh na Pathian ma a kiniamkhiak ding a, na lungtang na koihkip ni masapen a kipan, na thugente zak a omta ahi; na thugente ziak a hong ka hi. 13Himahleh Persia gam kumpipa'n ni sawmnih-le-khat kei ahon dal hi; himahleh ngai in, Persia kumpipa kiang ah hentang a ka om nilouh ziak in Mikael, angel lianpen kei hon panpih ding in ahong pai hi. 14Huchi in ni nanung lam chiang a na mite tung a hong tung ding bang ahia chih nang hon theisiamsak dia hong pai ka hi; mengmuhna tunung ni tampi a hong tung ding ahi lai hi,” chi in. 15Huan hiai thute bang a ka kiang a ama'n thu agen khit in lei lam ah ka mai ka nga a, ka pau thei kei hi. 16Huan ngai in, mi khat mite tapate toh kibang in ka mukte ahon khoihsak a; ka kam ka a, thu ka gen a, ka ma a dingpa kiang ah, “Aw ka toupa, mengmuhna ziak in lungkhamnate ka tung ah hong kibung a, hatna ka neita kei. 17Bangchi in ahia ka toupa sikha in ka toupa ahoulimpih theih ding? Kei ah lah thahatna a-om kei a, nak leng nak lah sim ka hi,” ka chi hi. 18Huai lai in mi khat mihing toh kibang in ahon khoih nawn a, ahon hatsakta hi. 19Huan ama'n, “Aw nakpitak a it mipa, lau ke'n; na kiang ah muanna om hen, hattak in om in; ahi, hattak in om in,” achi hi. Ama'n ka kiang a thu agen khit in, ka hatta hi, “Ka Toupa thugen heh, ka chi a; nang na hon hatsakta ngal a,” chi in. 20Ama'n, “Na kiang a bang ding a hong pai ka hia chih na thei hia? Tu in Persia gam makaipa kidoupih ding in ka kik nawn ding; huchi a ka paikhiak chiang in, ngai in, Grik makaipa ahong pai ding hi,” achi hi. 21Himahleh thutak laibu sung a kigelh nang ka hon hilh ding; na makaipa Mikael chih louh kuamah hiaite kalh a kei hon doupih a-om kei.

DANIEL 11: 1Huan kei ka hihleh, Mid mi Darias akum khatna kum in, amah hihkip ding leh hihhat ding in ka dingh hi. 2Huchi in thutak ka hon ensak ding hi. “Ngai in, Persia ah kumpipa thum ahong dingkhe lai ding ua; alina pen amaute tengteng sang in nakpitak in ahausazaw ding hi. Huchi a ahauhna ziak a ahong hat mahmah chiang in, Grik dou ding in mi tengteng atokthou ding hi. 3Huan kumpipa hattak ahong dingkhe ding a, thuneihna thupi toh vaihawm ding leh adeihdan a hih ding in. 4Ahong dinkhiak chiang in agam akek ding a, van huih lite lam ah hawmzak ahi ding; amah suan hilou in vai ahawm ding a, himahleh ama'n thilhihtheihna anei kei ding; agam bohkhiak leh midangte kiang ah piak in a-om ding hi. 5“Huchi in simlam kumpipa ahat ding a, asepaih heutu khat amah sang in ahatzaw ding a, gam anei ding a; avaihawmna thupi ahi ding. 6Huan kum bangzah hiam nung in, akizomkhawm ding ua; simlam kumpipa tanu mallam kumpipa kiang ah kituahna bawl ding in ahong pai dia; himahleh hiai kizopna in hun sawt adaih kei ding; huai ni in amah veng mite leh apa leh amah kithuahpih pa leng piakkhiak in a-om ding hi. 7“Himahleh azung a kipan ahiang selnou mun ah mi khat ahong dingkhe ding a; huai tuh sepaih pawl kiang ah ahong pai dia; mallam kumpipa kulhpi sung ah alut dia; amaute dou in thil ahih ding a, avualzou ding hi. 8Huchi in apathiante u leng, amilim sunte uh toh, huan adangka leh dangka-eng tui-um belsuan hoihte uh toh, Aigupta ah ama'n asal in alakik ding a; huan mallam kumpipa a kipan kum bangzah hiam akidangkoih ding hi. 9Huan simlam kumpipa gam ah ahong pai dia, himahleh ama gam lam ah akik nawn ding hi.

DANIEL 11: 10Huchi in atapate'n adou ding ua; sepaih thupi tampi akaikhawm ding ua; huaite adimlet in ahong kuan ding ua, apaisuak ding uh; huan akik nawn ding ua, amah kulh tanpha hial in adou ding uhi. 11Aigupta Leh Siria Lalgam 12Huan mipite pimang in a-om ding ua, alungtang sansak in a-om ding a; huchi in sing tampite apuksak ding a, himahleh avualzou kei ding hi. 13“Huan mallam kumpipa ahong kik dia, ama sang a thupizaw mipi ahon tungkhe ding a; kum bangzah hiam nung in sepaihhon thupi leh van tampi toh ahong kuan ding hi. 14Huan huai hunte ah simlam kumpipa dou in mi tampi adingkhe ding uh; na mite lak a hiamgam tate leng mengmuhna hihkip ding in ahong kidomkang ding ua; himahleh apuk ding uhi. 15Huchibang in mallam kumpipa ahong kisa dia, panmun abawl dia, khopi kulh neite ala ding; simlam sepaihte leh amitelte'n leng anang kei ding ua, nanna ding in hatna leng a-om kei ding hi. 16Himahleh amah dou dia hong paipa'n ama deihlam bang in ahih ding a, ama ah kuamah adingh kei ding; gam thupi ah adingh dia, akhut ah siatna a-om ding hi. 17Agam pumpi thahatna toh hong pai atum tinten ding a, simlam kumpigam toh kizopna bawl ding in atanu akiang ah ape ding hi; himahleh athil sawm alohsam ding a, aphattuampih sam kei ding. 18“Hiai khit in tuikulh lam anga dia, gam tampite azou ding hi; himahleh gamdangmi sepaih heutu khat in amah azou dia, ami simmohna atawpsak ding; ahi, ami simmohna amah tung ah akibungsak ding hi. 19Huai hun chiang in ama gam kulhpi lam ah akik nawn dia; himahleh kisuipai in apuk dia, muh in a-om nawnta kei ding hi.

DANIEL 11: 20Huai hun chiang in ama mun ah mi khat ahong dingkhe dia, ama'n agamsung puahna ding in leiman khonpa gam thupi tan apalsuaksak dia; himahleh ni tam lou zoh in hehna leh kidouna hilou in hihsiat in a-om ding hi.Siria Kumpipa Hoih Lou 21“Huan amun ah mizahpihhuai khat ahong dingkhe ding a, huai lalgam in zahtakna apiaklouhna pa uh; himahleh mite bit akisak lai un ahong pai dia, maitang phatna in gam ala ding hi. 22Huan sepaihhonte ama ah taihmang in a-om ding uh, thukhun heutupa tanpha tel in. 23Huchi in amah toh pankhawmna kibawl nung in lepchiahtak in thil ahih ding a; ahong kuantou dia, nam neuchik toh hong hat ding ahi. 24Gam khen a hausa mahmah namte abit lai pen un dou ding in akuantou dia, apipute'n ahihzoh louh uh ahon hihzou ding a, apipute'n leng ahih ngei louh uh alak uah samat leh gallakte leh vante ahawmzak dia, ahi, kulh nei khopite dou ding in aguksawm ding hi, himahleh hun khat kia adaih ding hi. 25“Huan sepaih thupi toh simlam kumpipa dou ding in athilhihtheihna leh ahatna atokthou ding a; huchi in simlam kumpipa'n sepaih athupi a thupi leh hat in kidouna ah adouthuk ding hi. Himahleh ama siatna ding a aguk a thusawm ahih ziak in adingh zou kei ding hi. 26Ahi, a-an nete'n amah ahihmang ding ua, asepaihte phiatmang in a-om ding uhi; huchi in tampi thah in apuk ding uhi. 27Kumpipa nihte ahih uleh gilou lungtang pu kawm in dohkan khat ah atukhawm ding ua, zuau in akikhemtuah ding uh. Himahleh hun tawp atung ding a sehsa ahih ziak in alohching kei ding uhi. 28Huai hun chiang in simlam kumpipa tuh gallak thupi toh agam lam ah akik nawn dia; huchi in alungtang in thukhun siangthou adou ding;

DANIEL 11: a-utut ahih ding a ama gam ngei ah akik nawn ding hi. 29“Hun sehsa ah akik nawn dia, simlam ah ahong pai dia; himahleh hun masa hiam hun nanung bang ahi kei ding hi. 30Amah dou dia Kittim longte hong pai ding ahih ziak in; huaiziak in adah ding a, akik nawn dia; thukhun siangthou dou in ahehna asungbo ding a a-utut ahih ding a; ahong kik nawn ngeingei dia, thukhun siangthou nungngatsante deihsakna alak ding hi. 31Amah lam ah sepaihte apang ding ua, mun siangthou kulhpi mahmah abuahsak ding ua; halmang thillat gige ahihbei ding ua ahihgawp ding in kihhuai atungkhe ding uhi. 32Huan thukhun nungngatsante maitang phatna in giloutak in, ama'n ahekkawi dia; himahleh mi a Pathian uh theite bel ahat ding ua, thilhih minthangpente ahih ding uhi. 33Huchi in mite lak a theihsiamna neite, ni tampi sung, namsau leh meikuang, saltanna leh siatna ah puk mah le uh, mi tampi athuhilh ding uhi. 34Huan apuk chiang un, panpihna tawmchik angah ding ua, himahleh maitang phatnate toh mi tampi in amau apawlbawl ding uhi. 35Alak ua theihsiamna neite lak a mi khenkhatte, amaute bawlhoih ding leh siangthousak ding leh amaute ngousak ding in, apuk ding uhi. Hun tawp tanpha; hun sehsa a ding ahih lai ziak in. 36“Huan kumpipa'n adeihlam bang in ahih dia; akiliansak ding a, pathian chiteng tung ah akikoih lian dia, pathiante' Pathian dem in thillamdangte agen ding hi; thangpaihna apichin matan alohching ding; atup tintensa ahih ding hi. 37Apipute pathiante leh numeite lunggulh leng azahtak kei dia, pathian leng azahtak kei ding; mi tengteng tung ah akiliansak ding hi. 38Himahleh ama'n kulhpite pathian apahtawi dia; api-le-pute theih ngei louh dangka-eng leh dangka leh suangmantamte leh thilthawnpiak manphate in amah abe ding hi. 39Huan gamdang pathiante panpihna in kulh muanhuaipen pente asual ding a;

DANIEL 11: kuapeuh amah hihna pomte kiang ah zahna lianzaw ape ding a, tampi tung a vaihawm ding in abawl dia, man nei in gam ahawm ding hi. 40“Huan hun tawp chiang in simlam kumpipa'n amah akidoupih ding; mallam kumpipa amah dou ding in pingpei bang in, kangtalaite toh, sakol tungtuang mite toh, long tampi toh ahong kuan ding; huchi in gamte ah alut dia, adimlet dia apaisuak ding hi. 41Ama'n gam siangthoupen leng asim ding a, huchi in gam tampi zoh in a-om ding hi; himahleh Edom leh Moab leh Ammon tate hausapate akhut a kipan suahtaksak in a-om ding hi. 42Gam tampite tung ah akhut azan ding a; Aigupta gam asuakta kei ding hi. 43Himahleh dangka-eng leh dangka goute tung leh Aigupta thil manphate tengteng tung ah thilhihtheihna anei dia; huan Libia mite leh Ethiopia mite akalsuanna ah a-om ding uhi. 44“Himahleh suahlam a kipan leh mallam a kipan a thuthang in amah ahihlau dia; thangpaihna thupi a mi tampi hihse ding leh hihmang ding in akuankhe ding hi. 45Huan tuipi leh tang siangthou thupi kikal ah a-inpi puaninte akai ding a, himahleh amah abeina hong tung dia, kuamah in amah apanpih kei ding uh.”

DANIEL 12: 1Huai hun chiang in Mikael, heutu thupi na mite tapate vengbittu ahong dingkhe ding hi. Leitung pianchil a kipan tu hun tanpha a om ngei nai lou, mangbat hun ahong tung ding hi, huai hun chiang in laibu sung a gelh a om a, muhkhiak a om na mite hutkhiak in a-om ding uh. 2Huan alak ua mi tampi leitung a leivui a ihmute akhanglou ding ua, akhen tangtawn hinna tang ding in, akhen zumna leh tangtawn simmohna tang ding in. 3Apilte vansin vakna bang in avak ding ua; mi tampi diktatna lam a heite tangtawn tangtawn in aksite bang in atang ding uhi. 4Himahleh nang, Aw Daniel, hun tawp tan a ding in thute khakkhum bikbek inla, laibu bilh in; mi tampi avialtai ding ua, theihna apung ding. 5Huai lai in kei, Daniel in ka en a, ngai in, midang nih, lui gei hiai lam pang ah khat, lui gei lang lam pang ah khat adingh uhi. 6Huan khat in puanmalngat asilh a, luituite tung a ompa kiang ah, “Hiai thillamdangte tawpna ding bangchi a sawt hi ding ahia?” achi hi. 7“Puanmalngat silh a, luituite tung a ompa'n van lam a akhut taklam leh akhut veilam liktou in, amah tangtawn a hingpa min a kichiam in hun khat, hunte leh hun kimkhat ahi ding achih ka zata hi; misiangthoute thilhihtheihna asuknen dimdem khit chiang un, hiai thil tengteng zoh ahi ding,” chi in. 8Huai ka za a, himahleh ka theisiam kei. Ke'n, “Aw ka Toupa, hiai thilte tawpna bang hi ding ahia?” ka chi hi. 9Ama'n, “Pai in, Daniel; thute khakkhum bikbek ahita ua, hun tawp matan a bilh bikbek ahita hi,” achi hi. 10Mi tampi akihihsiangthou ding ua, angou ding ua, akibawlhoih ding uh; himahleh giloute agilou sem ding ua; giloute lak a kuamah in atheisiam kei ding uh; himahleh apilte'n atheisiam ding uh. 11Huchi in halmang thillat gige lakmang a om a, hihgawptu kihhuai tunkhiak a hong om ding hun a kipan, ni sangkhat zanih-le-sawmkua a-om ding hi. 12Hun Tawp Thugente 13Himahleh atawp matan nang zaw pai in; na khawl ding a, nang a dia piakna mun ah nite beina ah na goutan sang ding in na thoukhe ding hi.

JOEL 1: 1Khaupe In Gam Ahihsiatna 2Putekte aw, hiai za un;hiai, nou hun lai leh na pute uh hun lai in a-om kha ngeita a hia? 3Huai pen na tate uh hilh unla,na tate un amau tate hilh uhenla,ata nawnte un suan dang hilhsawn zel uhen. 4Singnget khaupe in anek bangteng khaukhuphon in ane a,khaukhuphon in anek bang teng khaupehon in ane a;khaupehon in anek bang teng khaupenouhon in ane khinta hi. 5Nou zukhamte aw, halh unla kap un;uain dawn tengteng aw, a-uain khum ziak in kap vongvong un;na kam ua kipan lah uain lakmang ahita ngal a. 6Nam hat mahmah,sim seng louh in ka gam ahong douta uh,ahate humpinelkai liante ha ahi a,humpinelkai pite hapak anei hi. 7Ka grepgui ahihsia a, katheipi sing hawng akheuh a,akheuhsiang vek a, apaimang a;ahiangte akiatngou vek hi. 8Nungak in, sai-ip puan teng a,atuailai pasal asuun bang in kap vongvong un. 9Tangbuang latte,dawn ding latte Toupa' inn a kipan hihman ahi a;siampu Toupa nasemte alungkham uhi. 10Lou hihsiat ahi a,gam alungkham a;buh hihsiat ahi a,uain thak akang a,sathau aginata kei hi. 11Aw, nou lounei mite aw, suununla; aw, nou grepguikem mite aw, huit buh leh barli buh ziak in dah in mau tuaituai un;lou a buhlak ding amangthang vekta hi. 12Grepgui avuai a, theipi kungavuai a; theibuhfai zung,tum leh epul theikung,lou a sing tengteng leng avulta hi;mihing tate lak a kipahna lah avuaimangta ngal a.Kisik Ding A Sapna 13Nou siampute aw, sai-ip puanteng unla kap un; nou maitam nasem mite aw, chiau vengvung un; nou ka Pathian nasem miteaw, hong pai unla, sai-ip puansilh in zankhua in hong lum un;na Pathian inn ua pan tangbuang lat leh dawn ding lat lah kham ahita ngal a.

JOEL 1: 14An ngawl hun tang siangthou in,khawmpi taksuak bawl unla, Toupa na Pathian inn ah putekte leh hiai gam a teng mi tengteng pikhawm unla, Toupa sam un. 15Huai ni atung agik hi; Toupani lah anai ngal a,Bangkim hihtheipa a kipan manthatna ahong tung ding hi. 16Ka mitmuh in nek ding hihman ahi kei a hia, ahi,i nopna leh i kipahna i Pathian inn a kipan hihman ahi kei a hia? 17Leikhal nuai ah haichitang amuat a;pangte lah akigawp a,buh innte phel in a-om a, abuhte avuaita uhi. 18Gante nak thum hi na tel uh e!Bawnghonte abuaizak ua,loupa hing mun aneih louh ziak un; ahi,belamhonte asegawp uhi. 19Aw, Toupa ka hon sam hi,mei in gamdai gam loupa mun akangsiangta a,meikuang in gam a sing tengteng akangsiangta hi. 20Ahi, gamsate nang hon ngaiin anak huhu ua;luitate akangtat a, mei in gamdai gam loupa mun akangsiangta hi.

JOEL 2: 1Zion ah pengkul mut unla, katang siangthou ah kigalginnapuang un; hiai gamsung a mi tengteng ling uhen; Toupa ni hong tung ding, anaita hi. 2Khaukhup A Gawtna Mulkimhuai 3Amaban uh mei in akangsiang a;anunglam uh meikuang in ahul a;ama ua gam lah Eden huan bang ahi, anunglam ua gamdai gamkeu ahi a; ahi,bangmah in huai apel kei uh. 4Alatdan uh sakol latdan bang ahi; sakol tungtuangmi bang in atai uhi. 5Kidouna kangtalai ging bang in tang tung ah akilek suausuau ua,buhpawl kang kuang luahluah leh kidouna a mipi hattak mansa abang uhi. 6Amaute mu mipite alau ua; amelte uh ahong mual khin uhi. 7Mihattak bang in atai ua;kidoumi bang in baang ah akah ua, amau zawn chiat ah apai ua,akivolhdan uh ahihbuai kei uhi. 8Akiphu kha tuan kei ua;amau lampi ah apai chiat ua;galvante anawk paisuak ua,apialzak kei uh. 9Khopi tung ah atawm ua;kulh tung ah atai ua;insungte ah akaltou ua;guta bang in tohlette ah alut uhi. 10Ama uah lei aling a;vante aling hi;ni leh kha amial a,aksite'n avak uh asel uhi; 11Huan Toupa'nasepaihhonte ma ah a-aw asuah a;agiahbukte lah athupi ngal a;athu tangtungsakpa ahat a, Toupa ni athupi in amulkimhuai ngal a,kua'n athuak thei mahmah dia?Kisik A An Ngawl Ding A Chialna 12 Toupa'n, huchipi in leng tu in na lungtang tengteng ua an ngawl a, kap a, lungkham in kei lam hong nga le uchin. 13Na puante uh hilou in na lungtang uh botkek unla, Toupa na Pathian lam nga un;amah hehpih theitak leh lainatna a dim, lungnel leh zahngaihna hau,thil hoih lou a kipan kik nawn sek ahi, achi hi. 14 Toupa na Pathian un lungsimkihei in tangbuang leh dawn ding thillat ah vualzawlna nutsiat in a-om kei ding chih kua'n athei a? 15Zion ah pengkul mut unla,an ngawl hun tang siangthou un,khawmpi taksuaktak bawl un.

JOEL 2: 16Mipi kaikhawm unla,omkhawmte hihsiangthou unla, putekte, naupangte,nawitui ne laite kaikhawm unla;mouneite adantan a kipan in hong pawt uhenla,mou leng adantan sunggil a kipan in hong pawt hen. 17Siampu, Toupa nasem miteinlim leh maitam kikal ah kap uhenla; Toupa aw, “Na mite hawi inla,na goutante gensiat a om namte'n atung ua vai ahawmsak ding un pe ke'n;‘A Pathian uh koi a om ahia,’chi in amipite lak ah bangziak a chi ding ahi ua?” chi uhen.Toupa'n Gam Avualzawl 18 Toupa'n agam thikthuse khop inadeihthoh a,amite ahehpih hi. 19 Toupa'n amite kiang ah,Ngai unla, na kiang uah buhte,uainte, sathaute ka hon tungsak ding a,huaite in na tai ding ua;namte lak ah gensiat in ka hon omsak nawn kei ding. 20Himahleh na kiang ua kipan inmallam sepaihhon ka suanmang ding a,gamkeu leh sia ah ka paisak ding, amasa pawl suahlamtuipi ah, ananung pawl tumlam tuipi ah; ahong uihkhe ding a,namsetak in ahong nam ding,thil thupitak ahih ziak in,chi in adawng hi. 21Aw gam, lau ke'n, nuam in kipak in; Toupa'n thil thupite ahihta hi. 22Gante aw, lau kei un, gamdai loupa mun ahong sel a,sing ahong gah a,theipi kung leh grepgui ahong selpha ding hi. 23Nou, Zion tate aw, kipak un, Toupa na Pathian uah nuamun; noute a ding in vuah azusak a,akha khatna a vuah masa leh vuah nanung ahun lel ahon pe ding hi. 24Pialkhangte buh in adim ding a,uain leh sathau belteadimlet ding uhi. 25Na lak ua ka sepaihhon tampika sawl, khaukhupte,singnget khaute, khauhonte,leh khaupete'n anek khit kumte nou ka hon din nawn ding hi. 26Tampi na ne ding ua, na tai ding ua, nou lamdangtak a hon ngaihtuah sekpa Toupa na Pathian min na phat ding uh;ka mite azahlak ngei kei uhi.

JOEL 2: 27Huan Israelte lak ah ka omchih leh Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi,kuamah dang a-om kei uh chih na thei ding uh;ka mite azahlak ngei nawn kei ding uhi. Toupa Kha Sunbuak Chiamna 28Huai nung chiang in hichi ahong hi ding a,mi tengteng tung ah ka kha ka sung ding;huchi in na tapate, na tanute un ka thu agen ding ua,na putekte un mang aman ding ua, na tangvalte un kilaknate amu ding uh; 29Huai ni chiang in sikhapate,sikhanute tung ah leng ka kha ka sungbo ding hi. 30Vante leh leitung ah thillamdangte,sisan, mei leh meikhu ding ka musak ding hi. 31Nisa mial asuak ding a, kha sisan asuak ding hi, Toupa ni thupitak leh mulkimhuai ahong tun ma in. 32Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, kuapeuh Toupa min lou peuhmah humbit in a-om ding; Toupa'n agen bang in,Zion tang ah leh Jerusalemkhua ah akhosuaksunte a-om ding uhi.

JOEL 3: 1Ngai dih ua, huai nite leh huai hun a,Judah leh Jerusalem saltangteka kaihkhop hun chiang in, 2nam chih ka kaikhawm ding a, amaute Jehoshaphat Phaizang ah ka pisuk ding hi.Huai ah, nam chih lak a athehdalh uh,ka mi, ka goutan Israelte tung a agamtatna uh leh,ka gam akihawmna ziak un, atung uah amaute toh thukhenna ka bawlpih ding; 3ka mite a ding in ai asan ua,kizuakna man ding in pasal naupang apia ua,uain adawntheihna ding un, aman ding in numei naupang azuak uhi. 4“Ahi, aw Tura leh Sidon leh Philistia gam tengteng aw, kei a ding in bang na hi ua le? Na thuk ding ua hia? N'on thuk uleh, hattak in, kintak in na thukna uh na lutung mahmah uah ka hon thuk sam ding hi. 3Namte Tung A Pathian Thukhenna 5Ka dangkasik leh adangka-eng na la ua, ka thil hoihtak deihhuaite na tempul sung uah na tawilut uhi; 6Judah tate leh Jerusalem tate leng agamgi ua kipan gamlapi a na suanmang theihna ding un, Grik tapate kiang ah na zuakta uhi. 7Ngai dih ua, na zuakna mun ua kipan in tokthou in ka pawtsak ding a, na thukna uh na lutung mahmah uah ka thuk sam ding hi. 8Judah tate khut ah na tapate uh leh na tanute uh ka zuak ding, amau gamlapi ah Sheba mite kiang ah azuak ding uhi,” Toupa'n achita hi. 9Namte lak ah hiai puang unla;kidou ding in kisa unla; mihat mahmahte tokthou un;kidoumi tengtengte hong nai uhenla, hong paitou uhen. 10Na leilehna mukzumte uhnamsau ding in sek unla, teipi ding in na theikung kuaika temtate uh sek un;mihat lou in leng ka hat chi hen. 11Akim a nam tengteng aw,kin unla, hong pai unla kikaikhawm un;Aw Toupa, huai ah na mihat mahmahte paisuksak in.

JOEL 3: 12Namte kitokthou uhenlaJehoshaphat Phaizang ah hong paitou uhen;huai ah akim a nam tengteng tung a vaihawm ding in ka tu ding hi. 13Na kawite uh suah un,buhlak ahun hi;hong pai unla, childen un;grep sukna khuk adim a, bel adimlet a;akhelhna uh athupi hi. 14Mipi tampite,thukhenna phaizang a mipi tampite!Thupukna Phaizang ah, Toupa ni anaita hi! 15Ni leh kha hihmial in om ding ua,aksite'n avakna uh asel ding uh.Pathian In Amite Avualzawl Ding 16 Toupa Zion tang a kipan in ahumham ding a, Jerusalem a kipan in a-aw asuah ding;leitung leh vante aling ding ua;himahleh Toupa zaw amite a ding in kihumbitna leh Israel suante a ding in insang ahi ding hi. 17Huchi in Toupa na Pathian uh ka tang siangthou Zion a teng ka hi chih na thei ding uh;huchi in Jerusalem asiangthou ding a,mikhual kuamah apaisuak nawn kei ding. 18Huai ni chiang in hichi ahiding a, tang sangte'n uain khumakaisak ding ua, nawitui in mualte aluang ding a; Toupa' inn a kipan in tuikhuk ahong kikhohkhe ding a,Shittim lui phaizang anomsak ding hi. 19Judah tate tung ah engbawltak a agam ua sisan asuah ziak un,Aigupta asegawp ding a,Edom gam gamdai gamkeu asuak ding hi. 20Judah gam tangtawn in luah in a-om gige ding a,Jerusalem khua suan a kipan suan zel tan in luah in a-om ding. 21Huan asisan suahna uh ka sawpsiang louh ka sawpsiang ding a, Zion ah Toupa ateng gige hi.

AMOS 1: 1Judah kumpipa Uzziah vaihawm lai leh Israel kumpipa Joas tapa Jeroboam vaihawm lai a zinling ma kum nih in, Tekoa mun ganhon veng mite lak a mi Amos thu Israel tungtang amuh: 2Huan ama'n,“Zion tang a kipan Toupa ahumham ding a,Jerusalem a kipan in a-aw asuah ding;belam veng mite gantatna munte alungkham ding ua,Karmel tang vum avuai ding,” achi hi.Namte Tung A Pathian ThukhennaSiria tung a thukhenna 3 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Damaskas kho tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Gilead gam buhgawina sikte a agawi ziak un. 4Himahleh Hazael inn ah mei ka sawl ding a, Ben-hadad kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding hi. 5Huan Damaskas kho kongkhak sik ka hihtan ding a, Aven Phaizang a kipan luah mite leh Eden inn a kipan kumpipa chiang tawipa ka mangsak ding a; Siria gam mite Kir gam ah sal in a-om ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.Philistia tung a thukhenna 6 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Gaza kho tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka hihtawp kei ding; Edom kiang a piak ding in mi tengteng sal a api ziak un. 7Himahleh Gaza kulh tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, akumpipa' inn te akang khin ding hi. 8Huan Ashdod a kipan luahmi leh Ashkelon a kipan kumpipa chiang tawimi ka hihmang ding a; huan, Ekron kho tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, Philistia mi khosuaksunte amang ding uh,” Toupa Pathian in achi hi.Tura tung a thukhenna 9 Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Tura kho tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Edom kiang a mi tengteng apiak ua, unau tung a athukhun atheihgige louh ziak un.

AMOS 1: 10Himahleh Tura khokulh tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, akumpipa' inn te akang khin ding,” achi hi.Edom tung a thukhenna 11 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Edom tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, gawtna ka daisak kei ding; a-unau namsau in adelh a, ahehpihna tengteng apaimang a, ahehna in abotkek gige a, tangtawn a ahehna avom nilouh ziak in. 12Himahleh Teman tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, Bozrah kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding,” achi hi.Ammon tung a thukhenna 13 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ammon tate tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; agam uh azatsak theihna ding un, Gilead kho numei naupaite akuihkek ziak un. 14Himahleh Rabbah khokulh tung ah mei ka mutkuang ding a, huan, kidouna ni a kikou toh, pingpei ni a huihpi toh, akumpipa' inn te akang khin ding. 15Akumpipa uh sal in aman ding ua, amiliante toh kiton in,” Toupa'n achi.

AMOS 2: 1 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Moab tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Edom kumpipa guhte sunu bang zen a ahal ziak in. 2Moab tung a thukhenna 3Huai lak a kipan vaihawmmi ka hihmang ding a, amiliante tengteng, amah toh ka that ding,” Toupa'n achi.Judah tung a thukhenna 4 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Judah tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Toupa dan adeih kei ua, athupiakte azui kei uh, apate uh chih sek azuaugente un amaute apimang ziak in. 5Himahleh Judah tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, Jerusalem kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding,” chi in.Israel tung thukhenna 6 Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Israel tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; dangkasik a midiktat azuak uleh khedap but khat a mitasam azuak ziak un. 7Gentheite leivui bang a sikden ut tuntun a, mizawngte vaihawmna akaikawi uhi; huan, mi khat leh apa nungak khat kiang ah ka min hihnin ding in ahoh zel uhi. 8Maitam tengteng kiangchin a khamna puanphah tung ah alum zel ua, a Pathian uh inn a mi aliausakna mante un uain adawn zel uh,” chi in. 9“Himahleh amau ma a Amorte, Sidar bang a sang leh tosaw bang a khauh hihmang a; tunglam a kipan agah leh nuailam a kipan azung leng hihmangpa ka hi. 10Huan Amorte gam nei ding in Aigupta gam a kipan in ka hon pikhia a, gamdai ah kum sawmli sung ka hon pi hi. 11Huan zawlnei hi ding in na tapate uh lak a mi leh Nazaritte hi ding in na tangvalte uh lak a mi ka bawl a, Aw Israel suante aw, huchibang in ahi kei a hia? Toupa'n achi.

AMOS 2: 12Himahleh Nazarit mite kiang ah uain dawn ding na pia ua, zawlneite kiang ah, thu gen kei un, chi in thu na pia uhi. 13Ngai dih ua, kangtalai a buhphal sawnsip bang in, na mun uah ka hon sawn ding hi. 14Huan mitaihatte hatna amang ding a, mihat in tha asuah thei sam kei ding hi; mihat mahmah leng akihumbit thei kei ding hi. 15Thalpeu zangmi leng adingh thei sam kei ding; paihat thei mi leng akihumbit thei kei ding, sakol tungtuangmi leng akihumbit thei kei ding hi. 16Huai ni chiang in mi thilhihthei mahmah lak a mihangsan leng vuaktang in ataimang ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.

AMOS 3: 1Aw, Israel suante aw, Aigupta gam a kipan a ka hon pikhiak inkote aw, Toupa'n hichibang a nou ahon demna thu ngaikhia un, 2“Noute kia leitung a inkuan tengteng a ka theih na hi ua; huaiziak in na thulimlouhna tengteng uah ka hon gawt ding,” achi hi.Zawlnei Nasep 3Israelte Thuhilhna 4Humpinelkai in gammang a sa amat lai louh ngal in, ahumham ngei a hia? Humpinelkai lun lai in bangmah amat keileh akohawm sung a kipan ahumham ngei a hia? 5Amah a dia tah a-om keileh, leitung a thang ah vasa a-awk thei a hia? Thang pen bangmah awk lou in lei a kipan in akisai dia hia? 6Khopi ah mi launa lou ah pengkul amut ding ua hia? Toupa hih louh in khopi ah hoihlouhna ahong om dia hia? 7Diktak in Toupa Pathian in anasemmi, azawlneite kiang ah athuguk hilh lou in bangmah ahih kei ding hi. 8Humpinelkai ahumham a, kua ahia lau lou ding? Toupa Pathian in thu agen a, kua'n ahia gen lou thei ding?Samaria Tunggikna 9Ashdod kumpipa' inn te leh Aigupta gam kumpipa' inn te ah gen unla, “Samaria tang tungte ah kikhawm unla, huai a buaina liantak omte leh huai lak a simmohna omte en un,” chi in. 10“Akumpipa uh innte a hiamgamna leh kisuamna koihkhawm mite'n lah hihdik dan asiam ngal kei ua,” Toupa'n achi. 11Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Gam kimvel in melma a-om lai ding a; na kiang a kipan na hatna alakhe ding a, na kumpipa' inn te ahihse ding uhi. 12 Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Belampu in humpinelkai kam a kipan akhe nih hiam, bil them hiam, ahonkhia bang in, huchibang in Samaria a teng Israelte lupna ning leh lupna maimom puanphan lukham them toh hutkhiak in a-om ding uhi. 13Ngai unla, Jakob inkote tung ah theisak un,” 14“Israel tatleknate amah tung ah ka gawtleh, huai ni chiang in, Bethel a maitamte leng ka gawt ngal dia; maitam kiite tankhiak in a-om ding ua, lei ah ake ding uh,” sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa Pathian in achi hi. 15“Huan phalbi leh nipi inn ka satse ding a; saiha innte amangthang ding a, inn thupite'n tawpna anei ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.

AMOS 4: 1Nou Bashan bawngpite, Samaria tang tung a om a, gentheite simmoh a, tasamte nuaisiah a, atoupate uh kiang a, “Hon la unla i dawn ding uh,” chite aw, hiai thu za un; 2Toupa Pathian in ama sianthouna in akichiam a, “Ngai dih ua, sikkuaika a nou ahon lakmang a, na lak ua omsun ngakuai a ahon lakmang ni ahong tung ding hi. 3Huan awngvang ah na paisuak ding ua, michih tangtak in apai ding uh; Harmon ah paih in na om ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.Israelte'n Biakna Limsak Lou 4“Bethel ah hong unla, talek un; Gilgal ah hong unla, tatlekna pungsak un; huan, na kithoihnate uh zingsang teng in hon la unla, ni khat hal zel in na sawm ua khatte uh hon la un. 4Israelte Tung A Vauhilhna 5Huan silngou pang kipahthu gen kithoihna lan unla, amau deihdan a lante hilh unla, puang un; Aw Israel suante aw, hiai lah na deih ngal ua,” Toupa Pathian in achi hi. 6“Huan ke'n leng na khopi tengteng uah hasianna leh na mun tengteng uah taksapna ka hon pia a; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. 7“Buh lak hun ding kha thum ahih lai in na tung ua vuah zu ding leng ka len a; khopi khat tung ah ka zusak in, khopi dang tung ah ka zusak kei hi; mun khat tung ah ka zusak sek a, azuklouhna mun akeu hi. 8Huchi in khopi nih leh thum ah tui dawn ding zong in khopi dang ah ataikhawm ua, adeihkhop kei uh; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. 9“Keuna leh apna in ka hon gawt a; na huante uh, na grephuante uh, na theipi kungte uh, na olive singkungte uh singnget lung in ane khin vekta hi;

AMOS 4: huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. 10“Aigupta gam bang in na lak uah huihpi ka sawl a; namsau in na tangvalte uh ka that a, na sakolte uh ka pimang a; na giahphualte uh gim namsia na nak ua nam khop in ka hon omsak a; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. 11“Pathian in Sodom leh Gomorrah khua achipsak lai bang in, na lak uah mi khenkhat ka hihchim a, singkang lakkhiak bang na hi ua; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. 12Huaiziak in “Aw Israel, na tung ah hichibang in ka hih ding; na tung a hiai ka hih ding ziak in, Aw Israel, na Pathian tuak ding in mansa in om in!” 13“Ngai in, tangte dingkhesak a,huih bawl a, mihing kiang a angaihtuahna bang ahia chih genkhesak a,zingsang mialsak, lei mun sangte chilpa amin Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian ahi!”

AMOS 5: 1Aw Israel inkote aw, hiai thu noute suunna ding ka gen za un. 2Nungak, Israel, apukta hi;adingh nawn kei ding;agam tung ah paihkhiak ahita;amah tungding ding kuamah a-om kei. 3Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Israel chite kiang ah, khopi sangkhat pawtna in zakhat anuse ding a, khopi zakhat pawtna in sawmkhat anuse ding hi.” 4 Toupa'n Israel inkote kiang ah hichi in achi: 5“Hon zong un, na hing ding uh; himahleh Bethel khua zong kei unla, Gilgal ah lut sam kei un, Beer-sheba ah galkah kei unla; pel lou in Gilgal khua sal in aman ding a, Bethel khua ahong vuaksuak ding hi.” 5Kisik Ding A Chialna 6 Toupa zong unla, na hing ding uh; huchi lou in zaw Joseph inn ah mei bang in apawt ding a, akang khin ding a, Bethel ah mitsak ding kuamah a-om kei ding uhi. 7Vaihawmna singkha suaksak a, diktatna lei a paikhete aw; 8siguk leh zuheisuktun bawlpa leh sihna limliap lak a tangsakpa leh sun zanmial a bawlpa,tuipi tuite sam a,leitung a luangsakpa, amah tak zong le uchin;amin Toupa ahi; 9kulh tung a manthatnahong tung guih zou hial a,mihatte tung a manthatna tungsakpa pen.Pathian Deih Louh Khohei Gamtat 10Kongpi ah taihilhmi amudah ua, thudiktak genmi akih uhi. 11Huaiziak in migentheite tuanden in buh na laksak ua; suangsek in innte na lam ua, himahleh asung ah na teng kei ding uh. Grephuan nuamte na bawl ua, himahleh uain na dawn kei ding uhi. 12Na tatleknate uh tamdan leh na khelhnate uh athupidan lah ka thei ngal a; midiktatte na simmoh ua, golhna la a, kongpi a tasamte ahih ding him ua pampaihte aw. 13Huchi in hun hoih lou ahih ziak in mipil zaw huai hun chiang in adai dide ding hi. 14Na hintheihna ding un hoihlouhna zong lou in, hoihna zong unla;

AMOS 5: huan na gen bang un, Toupa sepaihte' Pathian na kiang uah a-om ding hi. 15Khelhna hua unla, hoihna it un; kongpi ah vaihawmna kiptak in tungding un; Joseph inkuan akhosuaksunte tung ah Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian in hehpihna anei kha mai ding hi. 16Huaiziak in Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Kongzing teng ah nakpi a kahna a-om ding a, lamliante tengteng ah, khawk hi na mah e; achi ding uh; lungkham ding in lounei mite leh nakpi a kap ding in sisuun siamte asam ding uhi. 17Grephuan teng ah nakpi a kahna a-om ding a; na lak uah ka paisuak ding,” Toupa'n achi. 18 Toupa ni deihte aw, na tung uh agik hi! Bangziak a Toupa ni deih na hia ua? Vak hilou in mial ahi zaw hi. 19Humpinelkai taisan a, vompi tuak mi bang leh inn a lut a, baang tung a khut nga a gul in atuk bang ahi. 20Toupa ni vak hilou in mial ahi sin kei a hia? Mial sah leh vakna nei lou in? 21“Na ankuangluite uh ka hua in ka musit a, na kikhawmpi pisuakte uah leng ka kipak sam kei hi. 22Ahi, na thillat uleh na buh lat uh hon lan mah le uchin, ka sang kei ding, na gan thau uh lemna thillatte leng ka limsak sam kei ding hi. 23Na kaihging ging kilawm uh ka ngaikhe kei ding; huaiziak in kei a kipan bil aphuai na late uh lamang un. 24Himahleh vaihawmna bel tuite bang in leh diktatna lui lian bang in luang hen,” Toupa'n achi. 25“Aw Israel inkote aw, kum sawmli sung in gamdai ah kithoihnate leh thillatte ka kiang ah na hon lan ngei ua hia? 26Ahi, na milim uh Molok leh na milimte uh Kaiuan, na aksi pathian uh, noute ding in na tawisang zaw uhi. 27Toupa amin sepaihte' Pathian in, noute Damaskas kho khen ah sal in ka hon paisak ding,” Toupa'n achi.

AMOS 6: 2Kalneh ah hoh unla, en un; huai a kipan in Hamath kho thupi ah hoh un; Philistia gam Gath ah paisuk unla; hiai gamte sang in noute na hoihzaw uhia? Nou gam sang in agam uh azazaw a hia? 3Nou ni hoih lou gamlapi a koih leh hiamgam tunna naihsakte aw, 4saiha lupna a lum a, atutphah sau tungte ua kizia a, belamhon lak a belamnoute leh bawnghonte lak a kipan bawngtuaite ne a; 5David bang a kaihging tumtum a, lasak ding na bawlbawl uh; 6belhbu lian a uain dawn a, sathau hoihpen a kinuhte mah; himahleh Joseph haksatna ziak in alungkham kei uhi. 6Israel Hihsiatna 1“Zion tang a nuam lua a omte leh Samaria tang a bittak a omte leh Israel nam lian lak a inkuan mithupite tung agik hi! 7Huchi in tua sal dia pai masate toh sal in apai ding ua, nuam sa a kiziate nopsakna lakmang in a-om ding hi.” 8 Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa Pathian in amah-le-amah kilou in akichiam a, “Jakob kisaktheihna ka kih a, akumpipa' inn te ka mudah a; huaiziak in khua leh asung a om tengteng ka mansak sin ahi.” 9Hichi ahong hi ding a, inn khat a mi sawm a-omleh asi vek ding uhi. 10Huan vui ding a thaunilh, misite tanau, amaute halpa ngei in insung a kipan a aguh lakhe ding in, insung tawng pen a mi om kiang ah, “Na kiang ah kuahiam midang a-om lai uhia?” achih a, ama'n, “Om lou,” achihleh; ama'n, “Dai sipsip in! Toupa min i lou ding uh ahi ngal kei a,” achi ding hi. 11Ngai dih ua, Toupa'n thu apeta hi; inn lian achim lemlum ding a, inn neu leng akhangkham ik-iak ding hi. 12Sakolte suangpi tung ah atai ding ua hia? Huai ah mi'n bawng in lei alet ding ua hia? Noute'n vaihawmna lah gu na suaksak ua diktatna gah singkha na suaksak uh. 13Nou thil bangmah lou tung a kipak a, i hatna in ahi kei maw kiite i lak ua? chite aw. 14“En dih ua, Aw Israel inkote aw, nou hon dou ding in nam ka dingkhesak ding a; huan Hamath khomual a kipan in Arabah lui tan in nou ahon engbawl ding uh,” Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian in achita hi.

AMOS 7: 1Huchibang in Toupa Pathian in ahon ensak a; ngai dih ua, haichi poi nanungzaw pen adot pat tungna ah khaukhup abawl a; ngai dih ua, kumpipa tangseu khit a pou nanungzaw ahi. 2Huan huchi ahong hi a, huai gam a loupa anek khit nung un, “Aw Toupa Pathian, ngaidam in, ka hon ngen ahi; bangchi in Jakob adingh thei dia? Amah lah aneu ngal a,” ka chi hi. 3Hiai thu ah Toupa'n alung hei in, “Toupa'n, hiai hong tung nawn kei ding,” achi hi.Meikuang Muhna 4Huchibang in, Toupa Pathian in ahon ensak a; huan en dih ua, Toupa Pathian mei a dou ding in asam a; mei in tui thuk lian akang khin a, gam leng kat a-ut lai hi. 5Ke'n, “Aw Toupa Pathian, khawl in ka hon ngen ahi; bangchi in Jakob adingh thei dia? Amah lah aneu ngal a,” ka chi hi. 6Hiai thu ah Toupa'n alungsim hei in, “Toupa Pathian in, huai leng ahong tung nawn kei ding,” achi hi. 7Khaupehon Muhna 8Huan ka kiang ah Toupa'n, “Amos, bang na mu a?” achi a. Ke'n, “Ulum,” ka chi hi. Toupa'n, “Ngai in, ka mi, Israelte lak ah ulum ka koih ding a; amau ka paikheng nawnta kei ding; 9Isak mun sangte ahong segawp ding a, Israel mun siangthoute hihsiat ahi ding ua; Jeroboam inkote namsau in ka dou ding,” achi hi.Amos Leh Amaziah 10Huan Bethel kho siampu Amaziah in Israel kumpipa Jeroboam kiang ah, “Amos in Israel inkote lak ah nang hon kalh a; gam in athu tengteng athuak thei kei,” chi in. 11Amos in lah hichi in achi ngal a, “Jeroboam namsau in asi ding, pel lou in agam a kipan in Israel sal in apikhe ding,” chi in thu akhak hi.

AMOS 7: 12Huan Amos kiang ah Amaziah in, “Aw nang zawlnei, kuan inla, Judah gam ah taimang in, huai ah an ne inla, thu hilh in. 13Himahleh Bethel ah thu hilh nawn ke'n; kumpipa mun siangthou leh kumpipa' inn ahih ziak in,” achi lai hi. 14Huan Amaziah kiang ah Amos in, “Zawlnei ka hi kei a, zawlnei tapa leng ka hi sam kei; ganhon vengpa leh theipi sing kempa ka hi zaw hi. 15Toupa'n ka kiang ah, ‘Kuan inla, ka mi Israelte kiang ah thu gen in,’ hon chi hi. 16Huchi in tu in Toupa thu za in; nang Israel kalh in thu gen ke'nla, Isak inkote kalh in thu khak ke'n, na chih. 17Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi, ‘Khopi ah na zi kizuaknu ahi ding a, na tapate, na tanute namsau in apuk ding ua, tehna khau in na gam ahawm ding ua; nang leng siang lou mun ah na si ding a; pel lou in Israel a gam a kipan sal in apimang ding uh, achi,’ ” chi in adawng hi.

AMOS 8: 1Hichibang in Toupa Pathian in ahon ensak a; en dih ua, nipithei bawm na hi hi. 2Ama'n, “Amos, bang ahia na muh?” achi a. Ke'n, “Nipithei bawm,” ka chi hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Ka mi Israelte tung ah tawpna ahong tungta; amaute gawtna ding ah ka lungsim ka kheng nawn kei ding hi, chi in. 3Toupa Pathian in, huai ni chiang in tempul a lasakte dahna la ahi ding a; mun chih ah siluang tampi a-om ding a, dai dide in apaikhe ding uh,” achi hi.Israel Tunggikna 4Hiai ngaikhia in, aw tasamte ne bei nuam a; gam a migentheite hihmang nuamte aw, 5“Buh ka zuaktheihna ding un chikchiang a kha thak bei ding a, tangbuang buh ka zuaktheihna ding ua chikchiang a Sabbath ni bei ding ahia, chi in; Ephah hihneu a shekel hihlian, dikloupi a bukna khemna in na zang ua, 6huchi a dangkasik a migentheite lei a, tasamte khedap buh khat a i lei a, buhsi i zuaktheihna ding in,” chi in. 7 Toupa, Jakob thupina sial in akichiam a, “Pel lou in anasep himhim ka mangngilh het kei ding,” chi in. 8Nipithei Bawm Muhna 9Toupa Pathian in, huai ni chiang in, hichi ahong hi ding a, sun lai in ni ka tumsak ding a, nisat lai in lei ka mialsak ding hi. 10Na ankuangluite uh lungkhamna leh na la tengteng uh kahna ka suaksak ding a; kawng tengteng sai-ip puan ka tengsak ding a, lu chih sip ah giauna ka hon tungsak ding; tapa tang neih suunna ding in lungkhamna leh atawpna khatna ni bang in ka bawl ding hi. 11“Toupa Pathian in, ngai dih ua, nite ahong tung lellel;

AMOS 8: huai ni chiang in gam ah kial ka sawl ding a, an kialna hilou, tui a kialna hi sam lou, Toupa thu theihna kialna pen,” achi hi. 12Huan tuipi a kipan tuipi ah leh mal a kipan suahlam ah leng avakvai ding ua; Toupa thu zong ding in ning chih ah atai ding ua, amu kei ding uh. 13Huai ni chiang in nungak siangthou leh tangvalte dangtak in abah ding uhi. 14“Samaria khelhna sial a kichiam a, ‘Aw Dan, na Pathian ahin bang in’ leh ‘Beer-sheba Lampi ahin bang in’ chi, huai mite leng apuk ding ua, athounawn het kei ding uh,” achi hi.

AMOS 9: 1Maitam chin a Toupa dingh in ka mu a, ama'n, “Kongpi bulte alin theihna ding ua alu bawkte uh khen inla, avek ua lutung ah hihzan vek in; ke'n asibangte namsau in ka that ding a; khat lel leng ataimang kei ding uh, khat lel leng asuakta het kei ding uh,” achi hi. 2Misikhua pha in paisuak mah le uh, huai a kipan ka khut in ka lakhe ding a; van ah kaltou mah le uh huai a kipan ka kaikhe ding hi. 3Karmel mualvum ah bu mah le uh ka zong ding a, huai a kipan amau ka lasuk ding a, tuipi taw ah ka mitmuh louh in bu mah le uh, huai a kipan gulpi thu ka pe ding a, amau atu ding hi. 4Amelmate uh ma ah sal in pai mah le uh, huai a kipan namsau thu ka pe ding a, amau asatlum ding ua; hoihna hilou in, hoihlouhna ding in atung uah ka mit ka nga ding hi. 5Gam khoih a, zulsakpa Toupa,sepaihte' Pathian ahi ngal a;huai lai a omte tengteng alungkham ding ua;luipi bang in akhang ding ua,Aigupta lui bang in akiam nawn ding uh; 6van a adantante bawl a,leitung a adantan kual bawl a,tuipi tuite sam a, leitung a sungbopa,amin Toupa ahi. 7 Toupa'n “Aw Israel suante aw, ka tung ah Ethiopia tate bang in na om kei ding ua hia? Aigupta gam a kipan Israel leh Kaphtor gam a kipan Philistia mite leh Kir gam a kipan Siria mite ka pikhe kei a hia?” achi hi. 8Toupa'n, “Ngai dih ua, Toupa Pathian mit gam gilou tung ah atu a, leitung a kipan ka hihmang ding a; himahleh Jakob inkote ahihse vek kei ding,” achi hi. 9“Ngai dih ua, thu ka pe ding ahi;

AMOS 9: hakvang a buh ahaih bang un, nam tengteng lak ah Israel inkote ka haih ding a; himahleh tang neupen leng leitung ah ake kei ding hi. 10‘Ka mite mikhial tengteng, hoihlouhna in ahon delhpha kei ding a, hon pha sam kei ding,’ chite namsau in asi ding uh,” achi hi.Israel Tundingna Ding 9 Toupa Thukhenna 11 Toupa, hiai thilhihpa'n, “Huai ni chiang in David biakbuk chim ka tungding ding a, a-awngvangte ka hu ding a; asiate ka lemtou ding a, nidanglai a a-om bang in ka lam thak ding hi, chi in; 12Edom mun a khosuaksunte leh ka min a sap nam tengtengte aneihtheihna ding un,” achi hi. 13 Toupa'n, “Ngai dih ua,nite ahong tung lellel ahi,huai ni chiang in leiletmi in buh atmi adelhpha ding a,grep chil mi'n chi thehmi adelhpha ding a; tang sang in uain khum ataksak ding;mual tengteng azul ding uhi. 14Huan ka mi Israelte sal a kipanka pikik nawn ding a;khua kigawpsate abawl nawn ding ua,aluah ding uh;huan grephuante abawl ding ua,a-uain adawn ding uh;huante leng abawl ding ua,agah ane ding uhi. 15Agam uah amau ka phutkip ding a, akiang ua ka piak agam ua kipan bohkhiak in a-om nawnta kei ding,” Toupa na Pathian in achi hi.

OBADIAH 1: 1Obadiah Mengmuhna, Toupa'n Edom Agawt Ding 3Aw nang, suangpi kitam kal a teng, mun sang luah,kua'n ahia lei a hon kesak ding lungsim a chipa?Na lungtang kisaktheihna in nang ahon khemta hi. 4Muvanlai bang in sangpi ah lengtou mah lechin,na bu leng aksi lak ah seh in om mahleh,huai a kipan ka hon kaikhesuk ding,” Toupa'n achi. 5“Na kiang ah gutate, suamhatte zan in hong pai le uh,hihman nak hih na ni chia,adeihzah un agu kei ding ua hia?Na kiang ah grep lakhawm mite hong pai le uh,grep lak ding khenkhatte anuse kei ding ua hia? 6Esau thilte zonkhiak ahita a;agoubawm selgukte maikhiak ahita! 7Nang lawmte khem in na om a,gamgi pha in hon delhkhe ding ua;na kituahpihte'n nang ahon zouta ua;na tanghou nete'n na nuai ah thang akam ua;amah ah theihsiamna a-om kei hi. 8Huai ni chiang in Edom a kipan mipilte ka hihmang in,Esau tang a kipan theihsiamna ka hihmang kei dia hia?” Toupa'n achi hi. 9Aw Teman, Esau tang ah michih thahgam a a-om vekna ding ua,na mihatte nakpitak in alunglel ding uh.Edom Gawt A Om Ziak 10“Na unaupa Jakob tung a na hiamgamna ziak in zumnain nang ahon khuh ding,tangtawn in hihmanthat in na om ding hi. 11Langkhat a na din ni a,mikhualte'n asum alakmang ni ua,namdang mite akulh kongkhak a ahong lut ua,Jerusalem tung a ai asan lai un,nang leng amau lak atel bang in na om hi. 12Himahleh na unaupa asiat lai in awibawl ke'nla,Judah tate amanthat ni un kipak ke'n;ahaksat ni in kisatheitak in pau ke'n. 13Ka mite avangsiat ni un akulh kongpi uah lut ke'nla;avangsiat ni un athuakna uh en ke'n,avangsiat ni un asum-le-paite uh tung ah na khutte uh nga sam kei un.

OBADIAH 1: 14Ami khenkhat taikhete that ding in lamka thuam a dingh in, haksat ni in ami omsunte mansak ke'n.Namte Tung A Thukhenna 15Nam tengteng tung ah Toupa ni lah anai ngal a;na hihsiat mah bang in na tung ah hih ahi ding;na hihdan nangmah luzang ah hong kik ding hi. 16Ka tang siangthou a na dawn bang un, nam tengteng inadawn gige ding uh, ahi,adawn ding ua, avalh ding ua,piang lou bang in a-om ding uh.Israelte Vualzohna 17Zion tang ah bel suaktate a-om ding ua,asiangthou ding uh;Jakob inkote'n agoutante uh atang ding uhi. 18Jakob inkote mei ahi ding ua,Joseph inkote meikuang ahi ding,Esau inkote buhpawl ahi ding ua, amau lak ah akuang ding ua, akangmang ding uh;Esau inkote khosuak a-om kei ding uh; Toupa'n lah achita ngal hi. 19Simlam mite'n Esau mual atang ding a; phaizang mite'nPhilistia atang ding uh;amaute'n Ephraim leh Samaria lou atang ding uh;Benjamin inGilead gam atang ding hi. 20Kanaan mite lak a hiaiIsrael suan saltang mipite'nZarephath gam tan atang ding ua; Sepharad gam aJerusalem khomite saltang insimlam khopite atang ding uhi. 21Zion tang a pan Esau dou ding in akuantou ding ua,atung ah vai ahawm ding uhi;huan gam Toupa a ahi ding hi.”

JONAH 1: 1Nineveh A Jonah Sawlna 3Himahleh Jonah bel Toupa ma a kipan Tarshish ah taimang ding in athou a; Joppa ah ahohsuk hi. Tarshish zuan ding long amu a; huchi in atuanman pia in, Toupa ma a kipan Tarshish zuan dingte toh ton ding in long ah alutsuk hi. 4Himahleh Toupa'n huih hat mahmah tuipi ah anungsak a, tuipi ah huihpi hat mahmah anung hi, huchi in long tamzak ding bang in a-omta hi. 5Long mite'n lau in, amau pathian chiat asam ua; long zanna ding in long sung a vante tuipi ah apaikhia uhi. Jonah bel long sunggilpen ah na lutsuk pah a, huai ah lum in, ana ihmu hithit hi. 6Huchi in longheutu akiang ah ahong pai a, “Aw nang ihmu, bangchidan ahia? Thou inla, na Pathian sam in, Pathian in, i manlouhna ding in ahon ngaihtuah khamoh ding hiam,” achi hi. 7“Khai, hiai thil hoih lou i tung ua hong om kua ziak ahia chih i theihna ding in, ai i san ding uh,” chi in akihou uhi. Huchi in ai asan ua, aisan Jonah tung ah atuta hi. 8Huchi in akiang ah, “Hiai thil hoih lou i tung ua om kua ziak ahia, hon hilh in, ka hon ngen uh; na nasep bang ahia? Koi a kipan a hong na hia? Koi gammi na hia? Bang mi na hia?” achi uhi. 9Ama'n akiang uah, “Hebru mi ka hi; tuipi leh gam bawlpa Toupa, van Pathian ka lau ahi,” achi hi.
