JONAH 1: 10Huchi in mite'n akihta mahmah ua, akiang ah, “Bangziak a hiai bang hih na hia?” achi ua ahilhkhitsa ahih ziak in mite'n Toupa ma a kipan taimang ahi chih lah athei ngal ua.Long A Pan Jonah Paihkhiakna 11Huchi in akiang ah, “Kou a dia tuipi kihot adaihna ding in na tung ah bang ka hih ding ua?” achi ua; tuipi lah akihot sang hulhul ngal a. 12Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon domkang unla, tuipi ah hon lawnkhia un; huchi in nou a ding in tuipi akihot nawn kei ding; kei ziak in na tung uah hiai huihpi thupitak anung ahi chih ka thei hi,” achi hi. 13Himahleh mite'n gam a kik ding in nakpi in long akal ua; himahleh ahi thei kei; tuipi lah atung uah anak kihoh semsem ngal a. 14Huaiziak in Toupa asam ua, “Aw Toupa, hiai mipa hinna ziak in hon hihmang ke'nla, mihoih sisan moh ka tung uah nga mahmah lou ding in nakpitak in ka hon ngen uhi; Toupa, hiai lah nang na deih bang a na hih ahi ngal a,” achi uhi. 15Huchi in Jonah adomkang ua, tuipi ah alawnkheta ua; huchi in tuipi kihot phul vonvon adaita hi. 16Huchi in mite'n nakpitak in Toupa alau ua; Toupa kiang ah kithoihna alan ua, thu achiam uhi. 17 Toupa'n Jonah valh ding in nga liantak anasep khin a; huai ngapi gilsung ah Jonah, ni thum leh zan thum a-om hi.

JONAH 2: 1Huan ngapi gilsung a kipan in Toupa a Pathian kiang ah Jonah athum a, hichi in achi a; 2“Ka haksatna ziak in Toupa ka sam a,ama'n ahon dawng a;Sheol gilsung a kipan in ka kikou a, nang ka aw na zata hi. 2Jonah Thumna Leh Hotkhiakna 3Thukpi ah, tuipi sunggil ah na hon pailut a,tui tampi ka kimvel ah a-om a; na tuikihot leh na tuikisep tengteng in ahon tum zel hi. 4‘Huan na mitmuh a kipan paihkhiak ka hi a;himahleh na tempul siangthou lam ka nga nawn ding,’ka chi hi. 5Tuite'n ka hinna tan in ahon umkimvel ua; tui thuk ka kim ka vel ah a-om hi;louhingte'n ka lu atuamsuak hi. 6Tangte taw ah ka paisuk a;lei in tangtawn a ding in akalhnate'n ahon khakkhum a;himahleh nang Aw Toupa ka Pathian,kohawm a kipan ka hinna na lakhia hi. 7Ka sung a ka hinna abah lai in, Toupa ka theigige ding a;na tempul siangthou ah ka thumna na kiang ahong tung hi. 8Thil gina lou leh zuau leltaklimsak mite'n amau zahngaihna alehngatsan uh ahi. 9Ke'n zaw kipahthu genna aw toh na kiang ah kithoihna ka lan ding;ka chiamsa thu ka tangtun ding.Hotdamna Toupa a ahi.” 10Huan Toupa'n ngapi ahoupih a, gam ah Jonah alokheta hi.

JONAH 3: 1Huan Toupa thu Jonah kiang ah ahong tung nawn leuleu a, 2“Thou inla, Nineveh khua, khopi thupitak ah hoh inla, thu gen ding ka hon chih pen va tangkoupih in,” chi in. 3Jonah Sawl Nawnna Leh Mite Kisikna 4Jonah ni khat pai zoh chiang khopi sung ah ava pai phot a, “Ni sawmli in, Nineveh hihman ahi ding hi,” chi in akikou hi. 5Nineveh mite'n Pathian agingta ua; an ngawl apuang ua, alak ua alianpen a kipan aneupen tan in sai-ip puan asilh uhi. 6Huai thu Nineveh kumpipa bil ahong tungta a, alaltutphah a kipan athou a, akumpi puan asuah a, sai-ip puan silh in, vut ah atuta hi. 7Kumpipa leh amiliante thupiak in kumpipa'n Nineveh khosung ah thu apuang in apulakta hi. “Mihing hiam, ganta hiam, ganhon hiam, belamhon hiamte in bangmah chiam kei uhen; banghiam ne in tui leng dawn kei uhen; 8mihing leh ganhingte'n sai-ip puan silh uhenla, nakpitak in Pathian sam uhen; ahi, michih in amau lampi hoih lou leh akhut ua hiamgamna lehngatsan uhen. 9I manlouhna ding in, Pathian lunghei in lungsim kilehhei in, ahehna mahmah a kipan akilehhei kei ding chih kua'n ahia theithei?” achi hi. 10Huchi in Pathian in athilhihte uh en in, alampi hoih lou uh alehngatsan uh chih amu a; akiang ua achihsa, hih atup thil hoih lou Pathian in alehngatsan a; ahihta kei hi.

JONAH 4: 1Himahleh huai in Jonah alungkim het kei a, ahehta hi. 2Toupa kiang ah athum a, “Aw Toupa, ka hon ngen ahi, hiai ka gam ua ka om lai a ka gen hilou hia? Hiai ziak in Tarshish lam ah ka taimang pah a; hehpih thei Pathian, lainatna a dim, heh mengmeng lou, zahngaihna hau, thil hoih lou lehngatsan sek na hi chih ka thei hi. 3Huaiziak in Aw Toupa, tu in ka hinna hon laksak ding in ka hon ngen hi; kei a ding in hin sang in sih ahoihzaw hi,” achi hi. 4Pathian Itna Leh Jonah Hehna 5Huchi in khopi a kipan Jonah apaikhia a, khopi suahlam pang ah atu a, huai ah sawlbuk alam a, khopi tung a thil hong tung ding muh tum in anuailim ah atu nilouh hi.Umgui A Kipan Sinlai 6Toupa Pathian in umgui Jonah tung ah azamsak a, ahaksatna a kipan hunkhe ding a alu liah ding in ana sepkhol hi. Huchi in Jonah umgui ziak in akipak mahmah hi. 7Himahleh Pathian in, azingsang phalvak in, leikha ana sepkhol a, huai in umgui akeitan a, ahong vuaita hi. 8Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni ahong suah in Pathian in suahlam huih ana sepkhol a; ni in Jonah lu ahai a, asibup a, amah a ding in sih angen hi, “Kei a ding in hin sang in sih ahoihzaw,” achi hi. 9Pathian in Jonah kiang ah, “Umgui tungtang thu a na heh mawk, na hihdik hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sih ut hial a ka heh, ka hihdik hi,” achi hi. 10 Toupa'n, “Na gim pih louh, na khansak leng hi sam lou, zan khat thu a hong om a, zan khat thu a mang nawn umgui na hehpihleh; 11Nineveh khua, khopi thupitak, asung a mi nuaikhat-le-singnih sang a tam, ataklam uleh aveilam uh leng khen theiloute leh ganhon tampi omna, ka hehpih kei dia hia?” achi hi.

NAHUM 1: 1Nineveh Tung A Toupa Hehna 2 Toupa zaw mullit hat Pathianleh phulak ching ahi; Toupa'n phu ala a, hehna in adim hi; Toupa'namah dou mite tung ah phu ala a, amelmate a ding in hehna akholkhawm hi. 3 Toupa alungnel a,nakpi a thilhihthei ahi,mimohte siam atangsak mahmah kei ding; Toupa'n pingpei leh huihpi ah alampi anei a,meipite akhe a leivui ahi. 4Tuipi asal a, akangtatsak a,lui tengteng leng akangsak khin a;Bashan gam abah a,Karmel tang leh Lebanon tang paklunte avuai uhi. 5Amah ziak in tangte aling ua, mualte azulmang ua; ama ah lei avuak a,ahi leitung leh asung a om tengteng toh in. 6Alung hihlouhna mai ah kua ahia dingh thei a,ahehna thupitak ah kua ahia om thei ding?Ahehna mei bang a sunbuak ahi a,suangpite akekzaksak vek hi. 7 Toupa zaw ahoih a, mangbat ni a kulhkip ahi;amah a aginna uh koih mite athei hi. 8Himahleh tui khang luanglet zang in huai mun manthat vekna atungsak ding a, khomial a amelmate delhlut ding in. 9 Toupa kalh in bang na gel ua?Bei sipsipna atungsak ahi,haksa nihveina atung kei ding hi. 10Lingnok bang a om in a-uain dawn un diahkawt dimdem bang in om mahleh,buhpawl keu bang mai a hihman vek in a-om ding uhi.Nineveh Pukna 11Nang a pawt mi khat Toupa kalh a thil gilou ngaihtuahmi, gitlouhna thuhilhmi a-om hi. 12Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ahat theihtawp un hat mah le uh, tam leng tampi himah le uh, huchipi in leng vatpuk in a-om ding ua, amangthang ding uhi. Hon na hihgim khin mah leng ka hon hihgim nawnta kei ding hi. 13Tu'n zaw na kiang a kipan ahakkol ka kitansak ding a, nang gakna khaute ka kitatsak vek ding. 14“Toupa'n na tungtang thu ah thu apia hi, na min chi bang a tuh ahi nawnta kei ding a; na pathiante inn a kipan milim bawltawm leh milim sunte ka hihmangthang ding a; na han ka bawl ding; na gilou ngal a,” chi in. 15Tangte a tanchinhoih tun a, lemna thu tangkoupihte khe en dih; Aw Judah, na ankuang lui inla, na thuchiamte tangtun in; mi thugina lou in ahon pal paisuak nawn kei ding a; hihmanthat vek ahita hi.

NAHUM 2: 1Kitamgawpsakpa doutuna mai ah ahong pawt hi;kigalthuam inla, na lampi veng in,na kawng khauhsak inla na thilhihtheihna hattak in bawlhoih in. 2Nineveh Pukna Leh Siatgawpna 3Amihatte lum sansak ahi a,mihangsante asan-au in akivan ua;akisakna ni in kangtalaite kahpasik tet in ate kelkel ua,teipite mulkimhuaitak in aphe zolzol hi. 4Kangtalaite kongzing ah ataigomgom a; lamlian zate ah akiphu noknok ua;meisel bang in alang ua,khophia bang in atai zualzual uhi. 5Amiliante atheigige a;apai lai un akisuipai ua;baang lam zuan in akinoh ua,kihumbitna ding abawl uhi. 6Lui kongkhakte hon ahi a,kumpipa' inn hihsiat in a-om hi. 7Huan Huzzab salmat in apaimangpih ua,asikhanute'n a-awm uh tum in vakhu bang a ham in akah uhi. 8Nidanglai a kipan Nineveh khuazaw dil a tui luangkhia bang ahi;himahleh ami tampi ataikhe ding ua, khawl in, khawl in,chi in kikou mah le uh kuamah akihei kei ding uh. 9Dangkasik gallak in laksakunla, dangka-eng leng gallak in laksak un;gou manpha a dim ahih ziak in thil kisekkhawm leh vanhoihte tawi bei ni anei kei ding hi. 10Sukvuak in a-om a, avuak keuhkeuh a,asiang sipsip; lungtang azulmang a,khukte akihot ua,kawng tengteng ana tuntun a,amelte amual khin vek hi. 11Humpinelkai khosakna mun,humpinelkai pite leh anoute nek ding abalnenna leh alausak ding om lou ahumpinelkai leh humpinelkai tekte pai vialvialna koi mun hita ahia? 12Humpinelkai tal in anoute kham khop abotnen a,humpinelkai pite a ding in akeilum a, akokhukte uh sa keih in adimsak a,a-omna kokhuk samatte in adimsak hi. 13Sepaihte' Toupa'n, “Ngai dih, ka hon dou ahi, akangtalaite ka halkhu vungvung ding a, na humpinelkai noute namsau in ahihmang ding; lei a na sa keih ka sutawp ding a, na palaite aw zak ahi nawnta kei ding,” achi hi.

NAHUM 3: 1Sisan suah hat khopi tung agik hi!Zuau leh kilohna in adim khin a;asa keih uh tatlak lou ahi. 2Zepna ging, kangtalai khe ging,sakol tawmte, kangtalai tai gopgopte toh. 3Nineveh Siatna Thupi 4Huai kizuak melhoih, bumsiamnu,a-angkawmna ziak a nam zuak a,abumhatna ziak a inkuan zuaknu angkawmna thupi mahmah ziak a hon gawm ahi. 5Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:Ngai in, ka hon dou ahi;na mai ah na puan ka lem ding a;na vuaktanna namte kiang ah leh na zahlakna kumpipa gamte kiang ah ka ensak ding. 6Nin kihhuai mahmah in ka hon theh ding a,zumhuai mahmah in ka hon bawl dia,muhnop a ding in ka hon koih ding. 7Huan hichi ahi ding a, nang hon mu peuhmah nang a kipan ataimang ding ua,Nineveh khua ahong segawpta hi;kua'n amah suun dia, ahehnemtu ding koi a zong ding ka hia? 8Nile Luite kikal a om Thebes, akim a tui in a-um, akulh ding a tuipi zang a kulhbaang ding a tuipi nei sang in na hoihzaw a hia? 9Ethiopia leh Aigupta ahatna ahi a, huai tuh tawp hun nei lou ahi; Put leh Libiate ahihleh nang hon panpihte ahi uh. 10Huchipi in leng lakmang in a-om a, sal in atang a; kongzing teng tawp ah anaupang neute apaihnensak uh; amithahte uh a ding in ai asan ua, amiliante tengteng khainiang a gak ahi uh. 11Nang leng na kham sam ding a, sel in na om ding; melma ziak in kulh kip na zong lai ding hi. 12Na kulh tengteng theipi kung, gah min masa pulh bang ahi ding ua; alin peuhmah uleh nemi kam ah akelut zel uhi. 13Ngai in, na sung a na mipite numei ahi ua; na melmate a ding in na kongpi akihong heuhou a; na kikalhna siktawnte mei in akangtum hi.

NAHUM 3: 14Umkimvel a na om sung a ding in tui tawi inla, ka kulhte hihkip in; tungman omna ah hoh in, belhkipna chil in, lei haltakna thuk hihkip in. 15Huai ah mei in ahong kangtum ding a, namsau in ahon satlum ding a, singnget bang in ahon hihmangthang ding hi. Singnget bang in kipungsak inla, khaukhup bang in kihihpung in. 16Na sumsin mite van aksi sang a tam in na khangsak a; singnget in ahihsia a, alengmang mai uhi. 17Kumpi lukhu khu na mite lah khaukhup bang ahi ua, na sepaihte khovot ni a huandai a khaupehon bokkhawm bang ahi uh, himahleh ni ahong suak a, alengmang ua, a-omna mun uh theih ahi kei hi. 18Assuria kumpipa aw, na belamching mite alusu uhi; na miliante akhawl ua; na mipite tangte ah adalh ua, pikhawmmi kuamah a-om kei uhi. 19Na natna damna ding a-om kei; na liamna athupi mahmah hi; na husa za peuh in khut ahon betkhum ua; na gitlouhna thuak kha lou kua a-om a?

HABAKKUK 1: 1 Toupa Tung A Habakkuk Phunna 2Aw Toupa, kei bang tan kikou a, nang hon za lou ding na hia? Hiamgamna thu ah na kiang ah ka kikoukhia a, nang lah na hon dawng nuam kei hi. 3Bangziak a thulimlouhna hon musak a, ginatlouhna hon ensak na hia? Lohna leh hiamgamna lah ka ma ah a-om ngal ua; kilanna a-om a, kinakna a-om hi. 4Huaiziak in dan a ze-ol a, vaihawmna akuankhe ngei kei; giloute'n lah diktatte a-umsuak vek ua; huaiziak in vaihawmna pawtkhia hekkawi in a-om hi. Toupa Dawnna 5Namte lak en unla, thei un, lamdangtak in lamdang sa unla; noute hun sung in nna khat ka sem ding, huai hon hilh mah le uh na gingta nuam kei ding uhi. 6Ngai un, Kaldaite ka bawlkhia hi, huai nam hiamgam leh ngongtat; huaite'n amau tenna mun hilou tang ding in lei vailam khaktan in apai uh. 7Amulkimhuai un alauhuai ua; avaihawmna uh leh athuneihna uh amau ngei a kipan apawtkhia hi. 8Asakolte uh leng gialbemte sang in akinzaw ua, nitaklam ngiate sang in alauhuaizaw uh; asakol tungtuang mite uh akiphalh ua; ahi, gamlapi a kipan asakol tungtuang mite uh ahong pai ua; negai ding a kinoh muvanlai bang in aleng uhi. 9Hiamgam ding in avek un ahong ua; suahlam huih bang in kilawptak in amailam uh en in atai ua; piaunel bang in salte akaikhawm uhi. 10Ahi, amaute'n kumpipate anuihsan ua, amau a ding in thuneite nuihzatna ahi uhi; kulh muanhuai chiteng anuihsan ua; leivui a vum a, alak zel ziak un. 11Huai chiang in huih bang in apaisuak ding ua, mailam anawt zel ding ua, athahatna uh Pathian a neite gilou mohtansak ahi uhi.Habakkuk Phunna Nihna 12Aw Toupa ka Pathian, ka Mi Siangthou, tangtawn a kipan na hi kei a hia?

HABAKKUK 1: Ka si kei ding uh, Aw Toupa, vaihawm ding in amah na hihkipta hi. Nang, Aw suangpi, bawldik ding in amau na tungkheta hi. 13Gilou muhna ding a nang mit chiimzaw, hoihlouhna ensim thei lou, bang ding a lepchiahtak a thilbawlte mu a, gilou in ama sang a diktatzaw mi anawmvalh lai a dai maimah na hia? 14Mite tuipi ngasate bang, atung ua vaihawmtu nei lou leh bokvak ganhingte bang a bawl maimah na hi. 15Ngakuai in avek un akhaikhe tou a, alen in amau aman a, amaute alenpi a huaikhawm a om in nuamsa in akipak uhi. 16Huaiziak in len a ding in kithoihna alan ua, alenpi ua ding in gimlim ahal hi; amaute ziak a atan uh hoih a, asa uh atam ziak in. 17Huaiziak in amau lente hihvuak a, namte hihse gige tel ding ahi uh maw?

HABAKKUK 2: 1Ka galvenna ah ka dingh dia, insang ah ka pang ding a, ka kiang a bang ahia agen chih thei ding in leh ka phunna tungtang bangchi in ka dawng dia chih thei ding in ka ngak ding hi. 2 Toupa'n Habakkuk Adawnna 3Mengmuh lah hun sehsa a ding ahi lai a, atawplam ah akinoh a, azuau kei ding; om tadih mahleh, ngak in; ahong tun ding ziak in, azekai kei ding hi. 4Ngai in, akha kiliansak amah midiklou ahi, himahleh midiktat tuh ginna in ahing ding hi.Midiktatloute Tunggikna 5Ahi, uain in lepchiahtak in a-omsak a, miki-uangsak, om kinken lou ahi; gawtmun bang a adeih hihlian, sihna bang ahi a, suklungkim theih ahi kei, nam tengteng amah ah akaikhawm zaw a, atung ah mipite tengteng asekhawm hi. 6Hiaite tengteng in amah dem in gentehna agen un, amah demna paunak enghouna hiai bang a gen in, “Amah a lou hihpungpa tung agik!” Bang tan? chi in agen kei ding ua hia! Bang tan thil khamna zang a kihih inbulpa; 7na leibatnate thakhat a hong thoukhia a, nang hon hihbuai ding a hong khanglou lou ding uhia? Nang amaute a ding a gallak suak ding hilou na hi maw? 8Nam tampi na loh ziak in, mipi akhosuaksunte tengteng in nang ahon lok ding ua; mite sisan ziak in leh gam tung, khopi tung leh asung a teng tengteng tung a hiamgam na hihna ziak in. 9“Tunglam sang a abu asehtheihna ding leh gilou khut a kipan tatkhiak a-omtheihna ding a, a-inn a dia punna gilou mumi tung agik!” 10Mi tampi satkhia in, na hinna tung a khial in na inkote tung ah zumhuaina na zong ahi. 11Baang a kipan suang akikoukhe ding a, sing a kipan inkam in dawng ding ahih ziak in.

HABAKKUK 2: 12“Sisan a khua lam a, khopi gitlouhna a dingsakmi tung agik!” 13Ngai in, mite sepgimna mei a khul ding singkhuah bang leh namte kisukgimna uh bangmah lou a suah ding sepaihte' Toupa thilgelsa ahi kei maw? 14Tuite'n tuipi akhuh bang in, Toupa thupina theihna a leitung pumpi dim ding ahih ziak in. 15A-inveng dawn ding pia a, huai a gu hel a, avuaktanna uh a-ettheihna ding a, amah khamsak lai mi tung agik hi! 16Thupina deihna in zumhuaina in na dim a; nang leng dawn inla, zeksumloupa bang in om in; Toupa khut taklam nang lam ngatsak ahi ding a, na thupina tung ah zumhuaina hoih lou a-om ding hi. 17Lebanon tung a hiamgam hihna in nang ahon khuh ding a, gamsate siatna in nang ahon lausak ding; gam tung, khopi leh asung a teng tengteng tung a hiamgam a mite sisan na suah ziak in. 18A gelhmi in agelh, milim gelh; milim sun, zuaute sinsakpa, milim pau thei lou bawl ding a, huai a anasep bang phatuam ahia? 19Sing kiang a, Halh in; suang pau thei lou kiang a, Thou in, chimi tung agik hi! Ngai in dangka-eng leh dangka a luan milim, amah ah nakna om lou in asinsak thei diam? 20Himahleh Toupa atempul siangthou ah a-om a; ama ah leitung pumpi dai sipsip hen.

HABAKKUK 3: 1Zawlnei Habakkuk thumna, Sigionoth toh kituak a bawl. 2Aw Toupa, na tanchin agen uhka za a, ka lau hi.Aw Toupa, kumte lak ah nasep hihhalh in,kumte lak ah kitheisak in;thangpaihna zahngaihna theigige in. 3Habakkuk Thumna 4Amah thupina vak bang ahi a;akhut a pan nizung ahongsuakkhia hi;athilhihtheihna huai ah akhuh hi. 5Ama ah hipi apai a,akhepekte ah suangkuangthei kuang apaikheta hi. 6Adingh a, lei alingsak a;amu a, namte ahawlzak hi;tangtawn tangte hihdalh in a-omta ua,tangtawn mualte akun ua,apaina nidang a bang ahi. 7Kushan puaninte gimthuak in ka mu a;Midian gam mite alinggawp uhi. 8Luite tung a Toupa lungkim lou ahi diam aw?Luite tung a na hehna om hiaahihkeileh tuipi tung a na thangpaihna,na sakolte tung a na tuanna leh hotdamna na kangtalaite tung a na tuanna? 9Na thalpeu avuak petmah a bawl ahi;namte kiang ah kichiamnate thutak ahi uh, SelahLuite'n lei akhangkhamsak hi. 10Tangte'n nang ahon mu ua, alau uh;tui khang in akheng a,tui thuk in a-aw asuah a,tungsang ah khutte aliktou hi. 11A-omna uah ni leh khaadingh kinken ua;apai bang un na thalte vak ah,na teipi te zolzol in avak uhi. 12Heh in gam na palsuak petmah a,thangpai in namte na chil hi. 13Na mipite hondam ding inna kuankhia a,na thaunilh hotdamna ding in;giloute inn a kipan lutangna hihliam a;ngawng chiang pha hial in suangphum na hihse vek. Selah 14Agalhatte lutang amah chiangte ngei in na sun a;kei hon dalhsak ding in pingpei bang in ahong pai uhi;nuam asakna uh gentheite aguk a ne khin ding in ahi. 15Na sakolte in tuipi lehtui hatte sunvumte na chil hi.

HABAKKUK 3: 16Ka za a, ka gilpi akising a,ka kam a awte aling pupulh a;ka guhte ah muatna ahong lut a,ka mun ah ka linggawp hi;buai ni a amah sim dia hong kuan mite dou ding a ahong paitouh chiang a ka linlouhna ding in,dai dide in ka ngak ding hi. 17Theipi kung pak pha lou in,grep guite ah agah om lou in;olive sepgimna vuaksuak in,loute'n nek ding piangsak lou in;huang a pan ganhonte satkhiak a om in,huangsung ah ganta omta kei mahleh; 18huchipi in leng Toupa ahka kipak ding a,ka hotdamnaPathian ah ka nuam ding hi. 19Jehovah, Toupa, ka hatna ahi,ka khepekte zukpi khe bang in abawl a,ka mun sangte ah ahon vaksak ding hi.Lapu lian a ding,tumging guineite a sak ding.

ZEPHANIAH 1: 1Judah kumpipa, Ammon tapa Josiah dam lai a, Kushi tapa, Gedaliah tapa, Amariah tapa, Hezekiah tapa, Zephaniah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung. Toupa Vaihawmna Ni 2“Leitung a thil om tengteng ka hihbei sipsip ding,” Toupa'n achi. 3“Mihing leh sa ka hihbei ding; van a tungleng vasate, tuipi a ngasate, giloute toh kipalpuknate ka hihbei ding; leitung a pan mihing ka satkhe ding,” Toupa'n achi. 4“Judah tung leh Jerusalem a tengte tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a; hiai mun a kipan in Baal omlaite leh milim biak ching siampute min ka satkhe ding; 5Intung a van aksihon bia; Toupa kiang a kun a kichiam khin napi a, Milkom mai a kichiamte; 6Toupa zuihna a kipan kilehheite leh Toupa zong lou a, amah kanloute ka satkhe ding hi.” 7Toupa Pathian ma ah dai sipsip in, Toupa ni lah anaita ngal a; Toupa'n lah kithoihna abawlkhol khin a, amisapte ahihsiangthou khinta hi. 8Toupa kithoih ni in hichi ahi ding, heutute leh kumpipa tapate leh gamdang puan a kizem huchibang tengteng ka gawt ding hi. 9Huai ni chiang in, phual kan a tawmte, hiamgamna leh khemna a apu uh inn hihdimte, ka gawt ding hi. 10“Huai ni chiang in,” Toupa'n achi, Ngasa Kongpi a pan kah thawmging a-om dia, Kongpi Nihna a pan mauna leh mualte a kipan nakpitak a siatna husa a-om ding. 11Mau un, nou Maktes a tengte, na sumsin mite tengteng a-omta kei ua; dangka teh mite satkhiak ahita uhi. 12Huai hun chiang in hichi ahi ding hi, khawnvak tawi in Jerusalem zong ding ka hi; mi uain dawn a tengden, alungtang ua, Toupa'n thil hoih hi in thil gilou leng ahih sam kei ding chi mite ka gawt ding hi. 13Huchi in ahauhna uh gallak ahong hi dia, a-innte uh asegawp ding;

ZEPHANIAH 1: innte alam ding ua, himahleh aluah kei ding uh; grephuante abawl ding ua, himahleh huai a uain adawn kei ding uhi. 14 Toupa ni thupi anai a, anai a, akinoh mahmah, Toupa ni in kah aw athupi ding a; mi thilhihtheitakte huai ah akap loloih ding uhi. 15Huai ni thangpaihna ni ahi, lungzinna leh dahna ni, mialna leh lungkiakna ni, meipi leh khomial bikbek ahi; 16pengkul leh gallauna ni, khopi daikaih siatna, aning a insangte siat ni. 17Huan mite tung ah dahna ka tun ding a, mittawte bang in avak ding uh, Toupa tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak un; huchi in asisan uh leivui bang leh asa uh eklei bang in butkhiak in a-om ding hi. 18 Toupa thangpaihna ni chiang in adangka uhiam adangka-eng uhiam in amaute atan thei kei ding; himahleh amullitna mei in gam pumpi akangbei ding a; hihbei a om ding ahih ziak in, beina mulkimhuai, gamsung a tengte tengteng tung ah a-om ding hi.

ZEPHANIAH 2: 1Kikaikhawm un, ahi, kikaikhawm un, zumna nei lou namte aw; 2thupiak akuankhiak ma a, buhsi bang a hon mutmang ma in, na tung ua Toupa hehna kihtakhuai ahong tun ma in, na tung ua Toupa hehna ni ahong tun ma in kikaikhawm un. 2Kisik Ding A Ngetna 3Avaihawmna zui, nou lei a minunnem tengtengte aw, Toupa zong un; diktatna zong un, migitna zong un; Toupa hehna ni ah sel in na om kha thei uhi.Israel Kim A Namte Tunggikna 4Gaza lah nutsiat in a-om dia, Ashkelon hihgawp in; suntang lai in Ashdod ahawlkhe ding ua, Ekron akizungkalh ding hi. 5Tuipi piau a teng Kereth namte aw na tung uh agik hi! Toupa thu in noute ahon dem hi, Kanaan aw, Philistiate gam a teng om lou ding in ka hon hihgawp ding. 6Huchi in tuipi, piaute louhing nou mun ahi ding a, belamchingte innte leh belamhonte ahuangte ahi ding hi. 7Huai piau bel Judah inkuan khosuaksunte a ding ahi ding; huai ah abelamhonte uh avak ding uh; nitaklam in Ashkelon innte ah akual ding uh; Toupa a Pathian un amaute aveh in, sal a atang uh pikhe nawn ding ahih ziak in. 8Moab hon kouna leh Ammon tate gensiatna ka zata hi. Akigitpihte uh tung a kiliansak a, ka mite gam dou asawm uhi. 9Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian ka hin bang in, “Chihtaktak in Moab, Sodom bang ahi ding a, Ammon tate Gomorrah bang, lou bineite leh chikhukte mun sia asuakden ding a, ka mi omlaite'n alok ding ua, ka nam omlaite'n amaute aluah ding uhi.” 10Sepaihte' Toupa mite tung a akiletsak ua, akou ziak un, akisaktheihna ziak un sawi in a-om ding uhi. 11Amaute tung ah Toupa alauhuai ding a;

ZEPHANIAH 2: lei pathiante tengteng kial in ahihbei chiang in michih in amau mun chiat leh namte' tuikulh gam tengteng nangawn in amah abe ding uhi. 12Nou Ethiopiate leng, ka namsau a thah a om ding na hi uhi. 13Huan ama'n mallam dou in akhut alikkhe ding a, Assuria ahihse ding; Nineveh akisegawp ding a, huchi in gamdai bang in akeu ding uh. 14Alai ah belamte akual ding ua, namte ganta tengteng; vangawngsau leh sakuh achial tungnung ah agiak ding ua; tohlet ah a-aw in la asa ding uh; sangkilte ah siatgawpna a-om ding; sidar sing a nasepte ahihsiat ziak in. 15Hiai khopi nuamsa pilvang loutak a teng a, “Alungtang a keimah ka hi, kei lou kuamah dang a-om kei,” chi ahi; bangchidan a hong segawp a, gantate a dia kualna ding hi ahia; kuapeuh akiang a pai in anuihsan in, akhut alehkhum ding uhi.

ZEPHANIAH 3: 1Khopi helhat leh buah, nuaisiah ching tung agik hi! 2Kuamah thu angaikhe kei a, bawlhoihna leng asang thei kei. amuanna leng Toupa ah a-om kei a; a Pathian anaih sam kei hi. 3Jerusalem Khelhna Leh Tatna 4Azawlneite uh lah mizuauthei leh lepchiah ahi ua; asiampute un mun siangthou ahihbuah ua, dan tung ah ahiamgam uhi. 5Asung ua Toupa bel adiktat a; thil thulim lou ahih kei ding; zingsang teng in avaihawm khovak ah alak a, avuaksuak ngei kei a; himahleh midiktatloute'n zaw zumna athei kei uhi. 6Namte ka satkheta a, a-insangte uh akisegawp hi; akongzingte uh ka susia a, kuamah apai kei uhi; akhopite uh hihsiat in a-om a, huchi a mi kuamah om lou in, ateng leng a-om kei uhi. 7Chihtaktak in kei na hon kihta ding ua, bawlhoihna na kipahpih ding, ka chi a; huchi in atenna satkhiak in a-om kei dia, amah tungtang a sehsa tengteng bang in; himahleh beltak in athou ua, ahih tengteng uh asesak uhi. 8“Huaiziak in mat ding zuan a ka thoh ni atun masiah hon na ngak un,” Toupa'n achi. Namte kaihkhawm ka tup ahi ngal a, lalgamte ka suktuah a atung ua ka hehna ka sunbuak theihna ding in, ka thangpaihna lauhuai tengteng; ka mullitna mei a leitung pumpi nekgaih a om ding lah ahi ngal a. 9Huai hun chiang a mite'n Toupa min aloh ua, thukhat sat a amah nna aseptheihna ding un, akiang uah muk siangthou ka pe ding hi. 10Ethiopia luite khen lam a kipan gimlim hal mite, dalhsa ka mite tanu mahmah in ka thillat ahon tawi ding hi. 11Huai ni chiang in ka tung a na tatlekna, na thilhihte tengteng ziak in na zahlak kei ding;

ZEPHANIAH 3: huai hun chiang a na lak a na mikisathei leh ki-uangsakte lakhe ding ka hih ziak in, huchi in ka tang siangthou ah na ki-uangsak nawnta kei ding uhi. 12Himahleh na lak ah mi gimthuak leh genthei ka nuse ding a, Toupa ah amuang ding uhi. 13Israel khosuaksunte'n gilou ahih kei ding ua, zuau agen sam kei ding uh; akam uah leng lei khemhat akimu kei ding hi; ne a, lum a, amaute kuamah in ahihlau louh ding ziak un.Kipahna La 14La sa in, Aw Zion tanu;kikou in, aw Israel!Jerusalem tanu aw,na lungtang tengteng toh kipak inla, nuamsa in! 15 Toupa'n na vaihawmnate alamangta a,na melma adelhkhia a, na lak ah Israel kumpipa, Toupa a-om hi;gilou na lau nawn kei ding hi. 16Huai ni chiang in, Jerusalemkiang ah, “Lau ke'n,” chih ahi ding;Aw Zion, na khutte ze-olsak ke'n. 17Na lak ah Toupa na Pathian a-om hi,hondam ding mihat; na itna ah akhawl ding,la sa in na tung ah anuam ding hi. 18Khawmpi kulmut ziak a dahnate,noute a dia puakgik leh gensiatna hiite ka lamang ding hi. 19Ngai in, huai hun chiang in,nang hihgimte tengteng ka bawl ding a,panpih kiphamohnu ka hondam ding a, hawlmang a omnu ka lakhawm ding;huchi in leitung pumpi a azahlakna uh ana omkhitnate ah, phatna lehminthanna amaute ka pe ding hi. 20Huai hun chiang in ka hon la nawn ding a,huai hun chiang in nou ka hon kaikhawm ding hi;na mitmuh ua na saltanna ua kipan ka hon pi nawn hun chiang in,lei a mi tengteng lak ah min lehphatna in nou ka hon bawl ding, Toupa'n achita hi.

HAGGAI 1: 1Tempul Lam Thak Ding A Toupa Thupiak 2Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n thu agen, “Hiai mite'n, eite i kisak a Toupa' inn lam hun ahi kei,” achi uh. 3Huchi in zawlnei Haggai a kipan in Toupa thu ahong tung a, 4“Hiai inn kigawpsa a om a, nou a dia na intung dalneite ua na ten hun uh ahi maw?” chi in. 5Huaiziak in tu in sepaihte' Toupa'n, “Na lampite uh ngaihtuah un,” achi hi. 6Tampi na tuh ua, tawmchik na la uh; na ne ua, himahleh na vah kei uh; na dawn ua, himahleh na dawnkham zou kei uh; na kisilh ua, himahleh kuamah na lum kei uh; loh mu in iptaw vangsa a koih ding in loh amu hi, chi in. 7Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na lampite uh ngaihtuah un. 8Tang ah hohtou unla, sing va la un, inn lam unla; huai ah ka kipak ding a, hih thupi in ka om ding,” Toupa'n achi. 9Tampi na lamen ua, ngai un, tawmchik ahong hi hi; inn na hon tut chiang un, ka na mutmang hi. Bangziak in? Sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Michih noumau inn tuam ah na tai chiat ua, kei inn pen kisegawp a a-om ziak in. 10Huaiziak in noute ziak in van in adaitui akhou a, lei in agah akhou hi. 11Huchi in gam, tang, buh leh uain, sathau leh lei a pan piangkhia thil peuhmah, mi, ganhon leh khut nasep tengteng tung ah keuna ka samta hi.Zerubbabel Leh Joshua In Tempul Lam Pan Nawn 12Huchi in Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh siampu lianpen Jehozadak tapa Joshua in mikhosuaksunte tengteng toh Toupa a Pathian uh aw leh Toupa a Pathian un asawl, zawlnei Haggai thute amang ua; huan mite'n Toupa alau taktak uhi. 13Toupa thukhah in Toupa sawltak Haggai in mite kiang ah thu agen a, Toupa'n, “Na kiang uah ka om, achi,” chi in. 14Judah ukpipa Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel kha leh siampu lian, Jehozadak tapa Joshua kha leh mikhosuaksunte tengteng kha Toupa'n atokthou a; akuan ua sepaihte' Toupa, a Pathian uh inn ah nna asemta uh; 15huai kha ani sawmnih-le-li ni, akha gukna, kumpipa Darias vaihawm kum nihna in.

HAGGAI 2: 1Akha sagihna, huai kha ani sawmnih-le-khatna in, zawlnei Haggai a kipan Toupa thu ahong tung hi: 2“Judah ukpipa Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel kiang ah leh siampu lian, Jehozadak tapa Joshua kiang leh mikhosuaksunte kiang ah tu'n thu gen in,” chi in. 2Tempul Thak Thupina 3Tuma a athupina a hiai inn mu, na lak uah kua na om lai ua? Huan tu in bangchibang in na mu ua? Na mitmuh un bangmah lou bang ahi maw? chi in. 4Himahleh, Zerubbabel aw, hattak in om in, Toupa'n achi, Joshua, siampu lian, Jehozadak tapa aw, hattak in om in; nou gam a mite tengteng aw, hattak in om unla, nna sem un, Toupa'n achi; na kiang ua ka om ziak in, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. 5Aigupta gam a kipan a na hong paikhiak lai ua na kiang ua thu ka khun a, na lak ua ka kha a-om gige dan theigige un; lau kei un. 6 Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a: Khatvei lai, sawt lou kal in, vante, leitung leh tuipi, gamhulte tan in ka sing ding hi. 7Nam tengteng ka sing ding a, huchi in nam tengteng thil deihte ahong tung ding, huchi in thupina in hiai inn ka dimsak ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. 8Dangka kei a ahi, dangka-eng kei a ahi, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. 9Hiai inn thupina nanung, amasa sang in athupizaw ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: hiai lai mun ah muanna ka pe ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.Ginomlouhna Gawtnate 10Darias akum nihna, akha kuana ani sawmnih-le-lina in, zawlnei Haggai a kipan in Toupa thu ahong tung hi. 11Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Tu in dan lam thu a siampute dong un; 12mi'n apuansilh puanten ah sa siangthou lou leh apuanten in tanghou hiam, meh hiam, uain hiam, sa hiam sukha taleh, siangthou ahi lai diam?” chi in. Siampute'n, “Ii” chi in adawng uhi.

HAGGAI 2: 13Haggai in, “Misi luang ziak a minin in hiaite abangpeuh khoih kha taleh siang in a-om diam?” achi hi. Siampute'n adawng ua, “Siang lou in a-om ding,” achi uhi. 14Haggai in adawng a, “Toupa'n, huchibang in hiai mite leh huchibang in hiai nam ka ma ah ahi uh; huchibang in akhutte uh nasep chiteng; leh huai lai a athillat uh asiang kei, achi,” chi in. Toupa'n Vualzawlna Achiam 15Huchi in tu in, ka hon ngen ahi, tuni a kipan leh abanban in, Toupa tempul a suang akichian ma in ngaihtuah un; 16mi'n tehna sawmnih kivum ahong muh lai, huai nite a-om nungsiah, sawmkhat kia a-om hi; bawm sawmnga a dimkhe ding a mi'n uain thau ahon muh lai in, sawmnih kia a-om hi. 17Na khut nasepte tengteng uah keuna leh kawt luatna leh gial in ka hon gawt a; huchipi in leng kei lam na hong nga kei uh, Toupa'n achi. 18Tuni a kipan leh abanban in ngaihtuah un, Toupa tempul suangphum akiphum ni a kipan, akha kuana ani sawmnih-le-li ni a kipan, ngaihtuah un. 19Buhpang ah haichi a-om lai hia? Ahi, grepgui, theipi kung, theibuhfai, olive sing ahong suak kei lai a; tuni a kipan in ka hon vualzawl ding hi.Zerubbabel Kiang A Toupa Thuchiam 20Huai kha ani sawmnih-le-li ni in Haggai kiang ah anihveina in Toupa thu ahong tung hi: 21Judah ukpipa Zerubbabel kiang ah, “Van leh lei ka sing ding a, 22lalgam leh laltutphahte ka lumlet ding a, namte, lalgamte hatna ka hihse ding a, kangtalaite leh huai a tuangte ka pai ding; huchi in sakolte leh atung ua tuang mite ahong kum ding uh, michih a-unau namsau in satlum ding achi, chi in thu gen in. 23Huai ni chiang in, Aw Zerubbabel, ka sikha, Shealtiel tapa, ka hon la ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi, suainamna in ka hon bawl ding, Toupa'n, achi; nang ka hon telta ngal a,” sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.

NASEPTE 1: 1Thumakai 2Kha Siangthou tawn a asawltak telte kiang a thupiak tampi apiak khit a van a pitouh a a-om ni tan a thute ahi. 3Huai sawltakte kiang ah gimna athuak nung in theihna zuau lou tampi in ahing in akimusak a, ni sawmli hial akiang uah akilak a, Pathian lalgam thu agen hi. 4Huan a-omkhawm uh akithuahpih a, “Jerusalem khua paisan kei un, Pa thilchiam ka gen na zak uh ngak un, achi tinten hi. 5Johan in tui in abaptis zel a, himahleh, ni sawt lou nung in Kha Siangthou a baptis in na om ding uh,” achi hi.Jesu Vankahna(Mar 16.19-20; Luk 24.50-53) 6Huan amaute ahong kikhop un akiang ah, “Toupa, tu in hia Israelte kiang a lalgam na piak nawn ding?” chi in adong uhi. 7Ama'n akiang uah, “Pa in ahun leh ani amah thuthu a om dia aseh, nou theih ding ahi kei hi. 8Himahleh, Kha Siangthou na tung ua ahong tun chiang in thilhihtheihna na nei ding uh; huchi in Jerusalem ah, leh Judia gamsung pumpi ah, leh Samaria leh kawlmong pha in ka theihpihte na hi ding uh,” achi hi. 9Huai thu agen khit in amuh laipi un, van a pitouh in a-omta a, meipi in amuh phak louh uah apitouta hi. 10Huan apaitouh lai a van lam a-et nilouh lai un, ngai in, mi nih, puanngou silh in, akiang uah ahong dingh uhi. 11Huai mite'n, “Galili gam a mite aw, bangziak a van lam en a dingh na hi ua? Hiai Jesu na kiang ua kipan a van apitouh a om, van a paitou na muh bang un amah mah ahong kik nawn ding,” achi uhi.Nungzuite Kithuahkhawmna 12Huan Olive tang achih ua kipat Jerusalem ah akik nawnta uhi. Huai tang Jerusalem kho kiang ahi a, Sabbath ni a hohna hun lel ahi.

NASEPTE 1: 13Huan alut un, a-omna dantan tungnung uah apaitou ua, Peter leh Johan, Jakob leh Andru, Philip leh Thomas, Bartholomai leh Matthai, Alphai tapa Jakob, Simon Zealot Pawl a leh Jakob tapa Judas toh ahi uh. 14Huai tengteng numei kuate hiam leh Jesu nu Mari toh, Jesu unaute toh, lungsim mun khat a, phatuamngaitak a thum in a-om nilouh uhi.Mathia Sehna(Mat 27.7-8) 15Huan huai ni in unaute lak ah Peter adingh a, avek un za-le-sawmnih ahi uhi. 16“Unaute aw, Kha Siangthou in, David kam a, Jesu mante makai Judas thu agenkholh Laisiangthou thu ahong tung ding him ahi.” 17Amah zaw i lak ua simtel ahi a, hiai nasepna ah tan leng anei sam hi. 18Himahleh huai mi'n akhelhna man in mun khat alei a, akhuplam in akia a, alai ah apuakkham a, agil tengteng alawt vek hi. 19Huai thu Jerusalem a omte tengteng in ana za uhi; huchi in huai mun amau pau in, Akeldama, achi ua, huai tuh Sisan Mun, chihna ahi. 20“Sam Laibu ah hiai thu gelh ahi.‘A-omna mun hihgam in om hen,asung ah kuamah om kei hen,’‘huan aheutu hihnamidang in tang hen,’ chih ahi. 21“Huchi in Toupa Jesu i lak ua lut zel pawt zel a a-om sung teng a, 22Johan baptisma nungsiah, i lak ua kipan van a pitouh a a-om ni tan hiai hon kithuahpihte lak a mi khat athohnawnna theihpih ding in a-om ding ahi,” achi hi. 23Huan mi nih asepkhia ua, khat Joseph Barsabbas kichi ahi a, aminkhem Justas leh midang khat Mathias ahi. 24Huan athum ua, “Toupa, Nang, mihing tengteng lungtang thei, hiai nihte akua zaw pen ahia na tel hon hilh in, 25Judas in amah omna a pai ding in hiai nasepna leh sawltakna akiaksan sik a ding in,” achi uhi. 26Huan ai asan ua, a-aisan uh Matthias tung ah atu a; huchi in amah sawltak sawm-le-khatte lak a simtel ahita hi.

NASEPTE 2: 1Pentikost ni ahong tun in, avek un mun khat ah a-omkhawm uhi. 2Kha Siangthou Tunna(Joe 2.28-32) 4Huchi in avek un Kha Siangthou in aluahdimta a, Kha in hihtheihna apiak a apausak bang zel in pau dangte in apauta uhi. 5Huan van nuai nam chih lak a kipan Pathian limsak Juda kulmutte Jerusalem ah a-om uhi. 6Huan ging husa azaktak un mipi ahong kikhawm ua, michih in apau uh amau pau chiat a azak ziak un alungsim uh ahong buai hi. 7Huan avek un amangbang ua, lamdang asa mahmah uhi, “En dih uh, hiai a pau tengteng Galili gam a mi ahi kei ua hia? 8Bangchi in ahia i vek ua pianpih pau chiat a i zak uh? 9Eite Parthai nam, Medes nam, Elam nam; khenkhat Mesopotamia gam a om, Judia gam a om, Kappadosia gam a om, Pontas gam a om, Asia gam a om, 10Phrigia gam a om, Pamphilia gam a om, Aigupta gam a om, Kurini kho kiang a Libia gam a om i hi ua; khenkhat Rome a pan mikhualte, Judate leh aphungkaite uh toh i hi ngal ua, 11khenkhat Krit tuikulh leh Arab gam a mite i hi ngal ua; himahleh, Pathian thilhih thupite agen uh eimau pau chiat in i za ngal ua!” achi uhi. 12Huan avek un lamdang asa mahmah ua, akhiakna dan thei lou in, “Hiai bangchidan ahia?” akichi uhi. 13Khenkhat in, “Uain thak akham ua ahi,” chi in anuihsan uhi.Peter Thugen 14Himahleh Peter in sawm-le-khatte toh dingkhawm in, aw ngaihtak in akiang uah agen a, nou Judia gam a mite aw, nou Jerusalem a om tengteng aw, hiai thei unla, ka thu leng ngaikhia un. 15Hiaite na gin bang un akham kei uh, dak thumna hun ahi.

NASEPTE 2: 16Hiaite zawlnei Joel in agen ahi zaw: 17“Pathian in, ni nanungte ahhichi ahi ding,mi tengteng tung ah ka kha ka sungbo ding a;na tapa leh na tanute'n ka thu ahilh ding uh;na tangvalte un kilaknate amu ding ua, na putekte un mang anei ding uh. 18Ahi, huai ni in ka sikhapate,ka sikhanute tung ah leng ka Kha ka sungbo ding a,ka thu agen ding uhi. 19Huan tunglam van ah thillamdang nuailam lei ah chiamtehna ka musak ding a;sisan, mei, meikhu hu toh, 20Nisa mial asuak ding a,kha sisan asuak ding,Toupa ni thupitak leh lauhuaitak ahong tun ma in. 21Huan hichi ahi ding a,Toupa min lou peuhmah hotdam in a-om ding hi. 22“Nou Israel mite aw, hiai thu za un: Nazaret Jesu, Pathian in amah zang in na lak uah thil thupite, thillamdangte, chiamtehnate ahih in ahon theichiansak hi; nou ngei in tuate na theichian uhi. 23Huai mi Pathian' tupkholhsa leh theihkholh bang in na mansak ua, nou migiloute khut a kilhden in na hihlumta uhi. 24Amah, Pathian in sihna thuaknatna phelsak in, akaithouta a; ama sihna letdet vual ahih louh ziak in. 25Huan David in athu agen a,‘Ka ma ah chik lai peuh inToupa ka mu gige hi.Ka mangbatlouhna ding in ka taklam ah a-om hi. 26Huaiziak in ka lungtang anuam a, ka lei leng akipak a,ka sa lamentak in a-om behlap lai hi. 27Misikhua ah ka kha na nuse kei ding a,muatna na Mi Siangthou na musak sam kei ding hi. 28Nangma'n hinna lampite na hon theisak a;nangma'n na mel in kipak in na hon hihdim ding,’ ” chi in. 29“Unaute aw, chikhahpa David thu lau lou in na kiang uah ka gen thei hi; amah zaw asi a, vui leng avui khinta ua, ahan leng tutan in i kiang ah a-om lai hi.

NASEPTE 2: 30Amah tuh zawlnei ahi a, Pathian in akhal a mi kuahiam sadan a achite lak a mi khat Khrist laltutphah a tu ding in akaithou ding chih kichiam in agen chih athei hi. 31Huchi in huai tuh atheihkholh him ziak in Khrist thohnawn ding thu agen hi,‘Misikhua a nutsiat in a-om kei a,aluang leng amuat sam kei hi,’ ” chi in. 32“Pathian in Jesu akaithouta chih theihpihte i vek un i hi uhi. 33Pathian khut taklam ah pahtawi in a-om a, Kha Siangthou chiam Pa kiang a kipan in amu a, na muh uh leh na zakte uh ahon sunbuak ahi uhi. 34David zaw van ah akahtou kei, amah ngei in,Jehovah in ka Toupa kiang ah, 35‘Na melmate na khepek ngakna dia ka bawl masiah,Ka taklam ah tu kinken in,’ ” achi, ana chi hi. 36“Huchi in Jesu, na kilhden uh, Pathian in Toupa leh Khrist hikhawm in abawlta chih Israel inkuan chih in kichiantak in thei uhen,” achi hi.Piangthak Masate 37Huan huai thu azak un alungtang ua sut bang ahong hi ua, Peter leh sawltak dangte kiang ah, “Unaute aw, bangchi in ka hihta ding ua?” achi ua. 38Peter in akiang uah, “Na khelhnate uh ngaihdamna ding in lungsim khek unla, Jesu Khrist min in baptisma tang chiat un; huchi in Kha Siangthou thawnpiak na tang ding uhi. 39Achiam nou a ding, na tate uh a ding, gamlapi a mi tengteng a ding leh Toupa i Pathian in akiang a asap peuhmahte a ding ahi,” achi hi. 40Huan thudang tampi in ahilhchian a; hiai khang thulimloute lak ah kihumbit un, chi in ahanthawn hi. 41Huan athu zui peuhmah in baptisma atang ua, huai ni in mi sangthum vel behlap in a-om uhi.

NASEPTE 2: 42Huan sawltakte thusinsakte sin in, kithuah in, tanghou balkham in, thum in, phatuamngaitak in a-omkhawm uhi.Saptuam Masate Hihna 43Huan michih in alauta ua; sawltakte'n thillamdang leh chiamtehna tampi ahih uhi. 44Agingta peuhmah in bangkim akikopkhawm uhi. 45Agoute uh, athil neihte uh azuak ua, adeihdong ching lel chiat in avek ua kiang ah ahawm zel uhi. 46Huan niteng in, lungsim mun khat in, tempul ah phatuamngaitak in a-om zelzel ua, a-innte uah leng tanghou balkham in, nuam leh lungkim in, a-an uh ane zel uhi. 47Pathian aphat ua, mi tengteng deihsak in a-om uhi. Huan ahotdam lel peuhmah Toupa'n niteng in akiang uah abehlapsak zel hi.

NASEPTE 3: 1Huan Peter leh Johan, dak kuana ah thum hun lai in tempul a lut ding in ahohtou uhi. 2Piching kuahiam apian tung a pan khebai ahon zawng ua, tempul a lutte kiang a khutdoh ding in, tempul Kongkhak Kilawm kichi bul ah niteng in alumsak uhi. 3Khebai Hihdamna 4Peter in amah a-en gegu a, Johan in leng; huan Peter in, “Hon en in,” achi hi. 5Ama'n amau a pan banghiam muh akilamen a, a-en pah hi. 6Himahleh Peter in, “Dangka leh dangka-eng bangmah ka nei kei; himahleh ka neihsun ka hon pe ding, ‘Nazaret Jesu Khrist min in khe in paita in,’ ” achi hi. 7Huan akhut taklam alen a, akaithouta a; huchi in thakhat in akhete leh asiakmit guhte ahong hat pah hi. 8Amah atawmtou a, adingh a, khe in apai pah hi. Khe a paipai, diangdiang leh Pathian phat kawm in tempul ah alut hi. 9Huan khe a pai leh mi tengteng in Pathian aphat lai amuh un; 10Tempul Kongkhak Kilawm bul a khutdoh a tupa ahi chih athei ua; atung a thil tunglamdang asa mahmah ua, abuaipih uhi. 11Huan ama'n Peter leh Johan alet lai in, mi tengteng in lamdang asa mahmah ua, inlim Solomon a achih uah akiang uah ahong taikhawm uhi.Tempul A Peter Thugen 12Peter in huai amuh in, mite ahoupih a, “Nou Israel mite aw, hiaite bangziak a lamdang sa? Koumau thilhihtheihna leh Pathian ka limsak ziak ua amah ka paisak bang zen ua bang achia hon en gige? 13Abraham, Isak leh Jakob' Pathian, i pipute Pathian in, asikha Jesu apahtawita ahi; amah na mansak ua, Pilat in khah atup hun in leng ama ah na ut kei uhi. 14Mi Siangthou leh Dik na deih kei ua, tualthatpa na kiang ua piak na ngen zawta uhi. 15Hinna Siampa na that ua;

NASEPTE 3: himahleh Pathian in amah misi lak a pan akaithou nawn a; huai theihpihte ka hi uhi. 16Ama min gintak ziak in amin in hiai mi na muh uh leh na theih un ahihhatta hi. Amah ziak a ginna ahong om in na vek ua mitmuh in ahihdam vilvelta hi. 17“Himahleh unaute aw, na heutute un atheih louh ziak ua ahih bang un, na theih louh ziak un hiaite na hih uh ahi, chih ka thei uhi. 18Himahleh Pathian in zawlnei tengteng kam in, Khrist in gim athuak ding thu atheikholsak hi, huchibang in atungsak zawta hi. 19Huaiziak in na khelhnate uh thaimanna ding in kisik unla, kihei nawn un, huchi in Toupa a pan halh hun ahong tung ding hi. 20Khrist Jesu nou a dia aseh mah leng, ahon sawl ding hi. 21Himahleh Pathian in thil bangkim abawlhoih hun ahong tun masiah amah van a a-om ding him ahi; huai bawlhoih ding thu Pathian in leilung pian tung a kipan azawlnei siangthoute kam a agen khit ahi. 22Mosi ngei in ‘Toupa Pathian in keimah ahon bawl bang in na unaute lak ah zawlnei khat ahon bawlsak ding; ama'n thu tengteng na kiang ua agen peuh na ngaihkhiaksak ding uhi. 23Huan mi kuapeuh huai zawlnei thu ngaihkhiaksak lou tuh, mi lak a kipan hihmangthang ahi ding,’ achi hi. 24Ahi, Samuel om a kipan zawlnei tengteng, anung ua mite toh, thugen peuhte'n, tulai tanchin agenkhol uhi. 25Noute zawlneite leh thukhun tate na hi ve ua; Pathian in Abraham kiang ah, ‘Na suante ziak in khovel a nam chih avualzawl ding uh, chi in na pipute uh kiang ah achiam hi. 26Pathian in a Tapa Jesu, misi lak a kipan kaithou in, na khelhnate uh kiheisanna ding leh kisik mite vualzawl ding in noumau kiang ah ahon sawl masapen hi,’ ” achi hi.

NASEPTE 4: 1Huan Peter leh Johan in mite kiang a thu agen lai un, siampute, tempul heutute leh Saddukaite akiang uh ahong tung guih ua; 2mite asinsak uh leh Jesu ziak a misi lak a kipan thohnawnna thu ahilh ziak un alungkim kei hial uhi. 3Huan amaute aman ua nitaklam ahih ziak in azingsang pha in suangkul ah akhumta uhi. 4Upate Mai Ah Peter Leh Johan 5Azing in aheutute uh, upate, laigelhmi te, 6siampu lianpen Annas leh Kaiapha, Johan, Alexander, siampu lianpen tanau tengtengte leng Jerusalem ah a-omkhawm uhi. 7Peter leh Johan alai ah adingsak ua, “Bang thilhihtheihna in ahia, kua min in ahia hiai na hih uh?” chi in adong uhi. 8Huchi in Peter Kha Siangthou in adim a, akiang uah, “Nou mipite vaihawmte leh Israel upate aw, 9hiai mi damlou tung a nna hoih ka sep thu uah, hiai mi bangziak in ahia ahong dam tak chi in tu in salh leh dot a om ka hi uh maw; 10nou tengteng leh Israel mi teng in leng thei hen, kros a Nazaret Jesu Khrist na kilhden uh, Pathian in misi lak a kipan in akaithou nawn a, amah min ngei in hiai mi hiai ah na ma uah dam in adinghta ahi. 11“Nou inn lam mite aw,na suangpaih uh, aning a,suang phatuampen ahong hita,huai amah ahi achi uhi.” 12“Midang kuamah kiang ah hotdamna a-om kei, van nuai a mihing min sak lak ah, hon hondam ding min dang a-om kei,” achi hi. 13Peter leh Johan hansandan amuh un, milaisiam lou leh minautang maimai ahi uh chih atheih un lamdang asa mahmah uhi; huchi in Jesu kiang ah a-om khinta uh chih athei uhi. 14Huan mi ahihdam uh akiang ua dingh amuh un, bangmah agense thei tuan kei uhi.

NASEPTE 4: 15Huchi in avaihawmna ua pat a apaituamsak nung un, akihou ua, 16“Hiai mite bangchi in i hih dia? Thillamdang chiamteh tham ahih uh Jerusalem a om tengteng in teltak in atheita uh; en leng i sel thei tuan kei hi. 17Himahleh midang kiang a athan semsemlouhna ding in tunung siah kuamah kiang ah hiai min a thu agenlouhna ding un i vau ding uh,” achi uhi. 18Huchi in amau asam ua, Jesu min a thu gen het lou ding leh hilh het lou ding in achi tinten uhi. 19Himahleh Peter leh Johan in akiang uah, “Pathian mitmuh in Pathian thuman sang in noumau thuman adikzaw hia ngaihtuah un. 20Kou zaw ka thil muh uh leh ka zakte uh gen lou in ka om thei kei uh,” achi uhi. 21Huan amau avau semsem ua, akhahta uh, mipi ziak in gawtna lemtang amu kei uh; athilhih ziak un mi tengteng in Pathian apahtawi uhi. 22Hiai ahihdamna chiamtehna uh kum sawmli sang a tamzaw ahi.Nungzuite'n Hansanna Angen Uh 23Huan Peter leh Johan apawt un amau lawmte kiang ah ava hoh ua, siampu liante leh upate'n akiang ua agen peuh uh ahilh vek uhi. 24Huchi in angaikhete'n akituak in aw ngaihtak in Pathian kiang ah, “Toupa, nang tuh van leh lei, tuipi leh asung a omte tengteng bawlpa na hi; 25Nang Kha Siangthou in, ka pu uh na sikha David kam in, hiai thu na gen ahi:‘Zentelte bangchi in ahita aheh uh?Mite'n bangchi in ahia thil phatuam lou angaihtuah uh? 26Khovel kumpipate adingh ua,heutute leng akikhawm ua,Toupa leh ama Khrist kalh in,’ chi in. 27“Hiai khua ah na sikha siangthou, na thaunilh Jesu tung ah, Herod leh Pontias Pilat toh, Zentelte leh Israel mite toh akikhawmta uh; 28na khut leh na lungsim a hong tung ding a na sehkholh peuh hih ding in.

NASEPTE 4: 29Huchi in tu'n ah, Toupa, ahon vaudan uh ngai in; na sikhate kiang ah na thu hangsantak a gentheihna pia in. 30Damsak ding a na khut na zak a, na sikha Jesu min a chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte hih ahih lai in,” achi uhi. 31Huan athum khit un a-omkhawmna mun uh ahong ling a, avek un Kha Siangthou in adim ua, hangsantak in Pathian thu ahilhta uhi.Thilneihte Kikopna 32Huan agingta mipite lungsim mun khat leh ngaihtuah mun khat in a-om ua; alak ua kuamah in athil neihte, kei a tuam ahi, achi kei ua, thil tengteng akikop uhi. 33Sawltakte'n thilhihtheihna thupitak in Toupa Jesu thohnawn thu ahilhhilh ua; avek ua tung ah hehpihna thupitak a-om hi. 34Huan alak uah leng tasam kuamah a-om kei uh; gam leh inn nei peuh in azuak ua, athil khotte uh aman ahon tawi uhi. 35Huan sawltakte khebul ah akoih zel ua, amau deihdong ching hun chiat in ahawm chiat zel uhi. 36Huan Levi chi a mi khat, Kupra tuikulh a kipan, Joses kichi, sawltakte'n Barnabas achih uh, (huai min omdan, “Hanthawnna Tapa,” chihna ahi), 37hiai mi in agam neih azuak a, aman ahon tawi a, sawltakte khebul ah akoih hi.

NASEPTE 5: 1Himahleh mi khat amin Ananias in azi Sapphira toh athil neih uh azuak hi. 2Huan azi theih in ama'n akhen a-iim a, akhen hon tawi in sawltakte khebul ah ahong koih hi. 3Himahleh Peter in, “Kha Siangthou khem ding leh gam man akhen iim ding in bangziak a Setan in na lungtang hihkhauh ahia? 4A-om lai teng leng nang a ahi gige kei a hia? Na zuak nung in leng na thuthu in a-om kei a hia? Bang achia hiai thute na lungtang a ngaihtuah? Mihing khem na hi kei a, Pathian khem na hi zaw,” achi hi. 5Ananias Leh Sapphira 6Tangvalte athou ua, tuam in azawngkhia ua, avuita uhi. 7Dakkal thum ding hiam nung in, thil omdan thei lou in azi ahong lut hi. 8Peter in akiang ah, “Hon hilh in, hiai zah phet in maw gam na zuak uh?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hi, hiai zah phet in ahi,” achi hi. 9Huan Peter in akiang ah, “Bang achia Toupa Kha ze-et ding a kithutuak na hi ua? Ngai in, kongkhak bul ah na pasal vuite khepek ahong omta, nang leng ahon zawngkhe ding uh,” achi hi. 10Huchi in thakhat in akhebul ah apuk pah a, asi hi; tangvalte ahong lut ua, amah si in ahong mu ua, azawngkhia ua, apasal kiang ah avuita uhi. 11Huan saptuamte leh huai thu za peuhmahte'n alau mahmah uhi.Chiamtehna Leh Thillamdangte 12Huan mi lak ah Pathian in sawltakte khut in chiamtehna leh thillamdang tampi ahih zel hi. Huan amaute avek un lungsim mun khat in Solomon inlim ah akikhawm zel uhi. 13Midang bel kuamah alak uah apang ngamta kei uhi; himahleh mi'n amaute angaisang uhi. 14Huan Toupa lam ah numei leh pasal gingthak tampi behlap semsem in a-om uhi.

NASEPTE 5: 15Huchi in mi damloute kongzing ah alumsak ua, Peter pai kawm a alim bek in alak ua khat bek aliahtheihna ding in, achi uhi. 16Jerusalem kho kim a kipan mipite leng huai damloute dawi nin hihgimte hon pi in ahong paikhawm ua; huaite leng ahong dam chiat uhi.Vaihawm Upate Ma Ah Peter Leh Johan Adingh Nawn Uh 17Huan siampu lianpen akisa a, akiang a omte tengteng toh, alawmte tuh Saddukai pawl ahi ua; amau hazatna in adim uhi. 18Sawltakte aman ua, vantang khumna ah akhumta uhi. 19Zankim in Toupa angel khat in kongkhakte hong in, apikhia hi. 20“Tempul ah pai unla, va dingh in mite kiang ah hiai hinna thu va gen un,” achi hi. 21Huan huai thu azak un, khua hong vak phet in tempul ah ava lut ua, thu ava gen uhi. Himahleh, siampu Lian leh alawmte ahong ua, vaihawmte leh Israel suante upate tengteng asamkhawm ua, sawltakte va pi ding in suangkul ah mi asawl uhi. 22Suangkul ah heutute va hoh mah le uh, amau ava mu kei ua; huchi in akik nawn uhi. 23“Suangkul bittak a kikhak in, avengte leng kongkhak bul a dingh amu uhi, himahleh ka hong ua, asung ah kuamah ka mu kei uh,” chi in agen uhi. 24Huan tempul upa leh siampu liante'n huai thute azak un, hiai bangchi phet in athang diam aw? chi in athu ah amangbang petpet uhi. 25Huan mi khat ahong pai a akiang uah, “Ngai un, suangkul a na mikhumte un tempul a dingh in thu agen uh,” chi in ahong gen hi. 26Huchi in sepaih heutupa toh heutu liante ava kuan ua, vantang akihtak ziak un hiamgamna om lou in sawltakte ahon pi ua, huchi hi keileh suang a den ahi kha ding uhi. 27Huan apitung un, vaihawmte ma ah adingsak uhi.

NASEPTE 5: Siampu lianpen in akiang uah, 28“Huai min in thu hilh louh ding ka hon chita ua; thei un na thuhilh un Jerusalem ahihdim vekta hi, hiai mipa sisan hon khuksak tum na hi ve ua,” chi in asal hi. 29Himahleh Peter leh sawltakte'n, “Mihing thu sang in Pathian thu i man zawk ding ahi,” achi uhi. 30“Nou sing ah Jesu khaikang in na that ua, i pipute Pathian in akaithou nawnta hi. 31Amah mah Pathian in Kumpipa leh Hondampa a om ding in ataklam ah ahihlianta hi. Israelte khelhna a pan kiheisak ding leh ngaidam ding in. 32Huai thute kou atheihpihte ka hi ua; Kha Siangthou, Pathian in athu zui peuhte kiang a apiak tak, atheipa ahi nawn lai,” chi in adawng uhi. 33Amau huai thu azak un asin uh athak mahmah a, hihlup atumta uhi. 34Himahleh vaihawmte lak ah, amin Gamaliel, Pharisai, dan sinsakmi, mi tengteng lak a minthangpi khat adingtou a, huai mite inn polam a omsak takdih ding thu apia hi. 35Huan vaihawmte kiang ah, “Nou Israel mite aw, hiai mite tung a na thilhih tup uah pilvang un. 36Tuma lam in Theuda kichi, mi khat ahong om a, huai mipa kiang ah mi tampi, zali phial, a-awn uhi, amah tuh hihlup in a-omta a; athu zui peuhmah avek un adalhzakta ua bangmah ahita kei uhi. 37Huai mi om nung in kisimpi lai in, Galili gam ah mi khat Judas kichi ahong om nawn hi; alam ah mi khenkhat ahip nawn hi; himahleh amah leng asita a, athu zui peuhmah avek un adalhzakta uhi. 38Huaiziak in tu in ka hon hilh ahi, hiai mite khoih kei unla, amau om-om in omsak un; hiai athiltup uh leh athilhih uh mihing a kipan ahihleh amang ding hi. 39Himahleh Pathian a kipan ahihleh amau na hihmang thei kei ding uh;

NASEPTE 5: huchi lou in zaw Pathian dou na hi zaw kha ding uh,” achi hi. 40Huan agen lem asata ua; huchi in sawltakte asam ua, avua ua; avuak khit un, Jesu min a thu gen lou ding chi bikbek in akhahta uhi. 41Huchi in vaihawmte lak a kipan apawtkhia ua, Khrist min ziak a daina thuak tak a seh ahih ziak un akipak mahmah uhi. 42Huan niteng in tempul leh amaute inn ah, Jesu Khrist ahi, chi in thuhilh leh sinsak atawp kei uhi.

NASEPTE 6: 1Huai lai a, nungzuite apunpun lai un, aniteng thilhawm uah Grik pau zang Juda meithaite limsak lou chi in Hebru pau zang Judate tung ah Grik Judate aphun uhi. 2Huan sawm-le-nihte'n nungzui mipite asamkhawm ua, “Pathian thugen tawpsan a dohkan a nek-tak ka bawl uh ahoih kei. 3Huaiziak in unaute aw, na lak uah Kha leh pilna a dim mi minhoih ngen sagih tel un, amau hiai thil gel ding in ka bawl ding ua; 4kou ahihleh thum leh thu nasem in ka om gige zaw ding uh,” achi uhi. 5Huai thu in mi tengteng akipaksak a; huchi in ginna leh Kha Siangthou a dim ngen, Stephen, Philip, Prokoras leh Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas leh Judate phungkai Antiok a mi Nikolas atel uhi. 6Sagih Sehna 7Huchi in Pathian thu ahong dalh zom zel a; Jerusalem ah nungzuite apungta mahmah ua; siampute lak ah leng mi tampi'n ginna lam ahong ngata uhi.Stephen Matna 8Huan Stephen, hehpihna leh thilhihtheihna in adim in, mi lak ah thillamdang leh chiamtehna thupite ahih zom zel hi. 9Himahleh Kurini, Aleksandria leh Silisia gam leh Asia gam a kipan Juda pawl khat Salsuakte sinagog kichite leh mi khenkhat ahong kisa ua, Stephen hong kiselpih uhi. 10Himahleh apilna leh agenpihpa Kha aselkhe thei kei uhi. 11Huan mi khenkhat aguai ua; huai mite'n, “Mosi leh Pathian agensiat ka za uh,” achi uhi. 12Huan mite, upate leh laigelhmite atokthou ua, Stephen asual ua, aman ua, vaihawmte kiang ah api uhi. 13Theihpih zuauthei bawlkhia in, amaute'n, “Hiai mi'n hiai mun siangthou leh Dan agense gige, 14Nazaret Jesu'n hiai mun ahihse dia, Mosi in hon piak dante ahihlamdang ding chih, agen ka za uh,” achi uhi. 15Huan vaihawmte tengteng in Stephen a-ensal chiat ua, amel angel mel bang in amu uhi.

NASEPTE 7: 1Huan siampu lianpen in, “Hiai thute adik ahi na hia?” achi hi. 2Stephen in, “Unaute aw, pate aw, ngai un. I pu Abraham, Haran a a-om ma, Mesopotamia gam a a-om lai a, thupina Pathian akiang a hong kilak in akiang ah, 3‘Na kholam leh na chite lak a kipan pawt inla, gam ka hon etsak ding lam ah pai in,’ ” achi hi. 4Huan amah tuh Kaldaite gam a kipan apaikhia a, Haran ah ava om a; huan apa sih nung in huai a kipan in tua na omna kholam uah Pathian in apemlutsak hi. 5Huan hiai ah zaw mun luah ding, khe ngakna tham bangmah ape kei. Himahleh tapa aneih ma nangawn in ama gou ding leh anung a asuante gouluah ding in gam piak achiam hi. 6Pathian in hichibang in agen, asuante mi kholam ah kum zali ataam ding ua mi'n sikha in abawl ding ua, asawi behlap ding uh. 7Stephen Thugen 8Pathian in akiang ah tua zeksum thu akhung a; huchi in Abraham in Isak asuang a, ani giat ni in azek asum a, huan Isak in Jakob asuang a; Jakob in suangtubul ding sawm-le-nihte ahon nei hi. 9“Huai suangtubul dingte'n Joseph ahaza ua, Aigupta gam ah azuak ua; himahleh akiang ah Pathian a-om hi. 10Agimthuak tengteng ah ahunkhe zel a, Aigupta gam kumpipa Pharaoh deihsakna angahsak a, mipiltak ahi chih atheisak behlap hi; huchi in ama'n Aigupta gam leh a-inn a mi tengteng tung ah gam-ukpa in abawlta hi. 11Aigupta leh Kanaan gam tengteng ah kial ahong tung a, gimthuakna thupitak ahong tungta hi; i pipute'n lah nek ding himhim amuta kei ua. 12Himahleh Jakob in Aigupta gam ah buh a-om chih azaktak in i pipute asawlkhia a; huai tuh ahoh pat tungna pen uh ahi.

NASEPTE 7: 13Huan anihvei hohna uah, a-unaute kiang ah Joseph kitheisakta a, huchi in Joseph chite tuh Pharaoh kiang ah akitheisakta uhi. 14Huan Joseph in apa Jakob leh a-unau tengteng mi sawmsagih leh nga asamsak hi. 15Huchi in Aigupta gam ah Jakob ahohsuk a; huai ah amah leh i pipute asita uhi. 16Shekem ah apotung ua, Abraham in Shekem a Emmor tapate lak a dangka sum a alei han ah avuita uhi. 17“Pathian in Abraham kiang a athuchiam ahong tun ding in Aigupta gam ah mite ahong pung ua, ahong tam deuhdeuh uhi. 18Huan Aigupta gam ah Joseph thei lou kumpi dang khat ahong lal hi. 19Huai mi in i chipihte akhem a, i pipute asawi a, anaungekte uh hing lou ding in apaikhesak hi. 20Huai lai in Mosi ahong piang a, Pathian muh in melhoih mahmah ahi; apa inn ah kha thum akem uhi. 21Akoihkhiak un Pharaoh tanu in ama tapa ding a la in akem hi. 22Huan Aigupta gam a pilna tengteng Mosi ahilh ua, thu ah leh athilhih ah athupi mahmah hi. 23“Huan amah kum sawmli achin kuan in, a-unau, Israel suante aveh hi. 24Huan alak ua mi khat gimthuak lai amu a, apanpih a, ahihgimpa Aigupta mi athat a, aphu alaksakta hi. 25Mosi in ama khut in Pathian in amaute ahondam chih a-unaute'n thei na uhiam asa a, himahleh athei kei uh. 26Huan azing in alak ua mi nih akilai un akiang uh ava naih a, ‘Pute aw, unau nei ve ua; bangziak a dikloutak a kibawl na hi ua?’ chi in lep atum hi. 27Himahleh a-invengpa tung a thugilou bawl zaw pen in Mosi tuh asawnhang a, koute tung a heutu leh vaihawm ding a kua'n hon bawl ahia? 28Zan a Aigupta mi na thah bang a hon thah tum na hi maw? achi hi.

NASEPTE 7: 29Huai thu ziak in Mosi ataimangta a, Midian gam ah ataam nilouh a, huai ah tapa nih ava nei hi. 30“Huan kum sawmli nung in Sinai Tang gamdai ah; loubuk ah meikuang lak ah angel khat akiang ah ahong kilak hi. 31Mosi in amuh in, athil muh tuh lamdang asa mahmah a; huan en ding a apai lai in, Toupa aw in: 32‘Kei na pipute Pathian, Abraham' Pathian, Isak' Pathian, Jakob' Pathian, ka hi,’ ana chi hi. Huchi in Mosi aling a a-en ngamta kei hi. 33Huan Toupa'n akiang ah, ‘Na khepek a kipan na khetuam suah in; na dinna Mun Siangthou ahi,’ achi hi. 34Aigupta gam a om ka mite gimdan ka mu gige hi, athum uh leng ka za gige, amau hunkhe ding in ka hong suk hi. Hong in, Aigupta gam ah ka hon sawl ding,” achi hi. 35“Kou tung a heutu leh vaihawm ding a kua'n hon bawl ahia, chi a adeih louh uh, Mosi, loubuk a angel kilak tungtawn in, Pathian in amah mah heutu leh hunkhepa hikhawm ding in asawlta hi. 36Ama'n Aigupta gam ah Tuipi San leh gamdai mun ah, kum sawmli sung in thillamdang leh chiamtehnate amusak phot a, amaute apikheta ahi. 37Israel suante kiang ah, ‘Pathian in keimah bang in, na unaute lak a mi zawlnei khat, athu na ngaihkhiak ding uh ahon bawlsak ding chipa Mosi ahi. 38Hiai mi ahi gamdai a omkhawmte lak a ompa, Sinai Tang a angel in ahoupihpa leh i pipute kiang a ompa; huai mi eite hon piaksawn ding a thuhingte lasawnpa mah ahi. 39“I pipute'n amah thu amang kei ua, ahua ua, Aaron kiang ah, 40‘I makai ding in pathiante hon bawlsak in;

NASEPTE 7: Aigupta gam a kipan a hon pikhepa Mosi lah atanchin ka thei nawnta kei uhi,’ chi in alungtang uh Aigupta gam lam ah anga nawnta uhi. 41Huai lai in bawngnou lim abawl ua, amai a kithoihna alan ua amau khutsuak milim tung ah akipak uhi. 42Huchi in Pathian in alehngatsan a, van a aksi abiak theihna ding un amaute akilehngat santa hi. Zawlnei laibu a,‘Aw nou Israel inkote aw,gamdai ah kum sawmli sung in gan sisan a kithoih in thillat toh in kei na hon bia ua eita? 43Molok biakna maitam leh na pathian uh, Remphan aksi leh,na milim bawltawmte uh,vialpuak in biak ding in na zong ua, huaiziak in Babulon kho khen lam ah sal in ka hon pomang ding,’chih gelh bang in. 44“I pi-le-pute'n gamdai ah theihpihna biakbuk, Mosi kiang a theihsak a a-om bang leh alim amuhsak bang in ana bawl uhi. 45Huai biakbuk mah i pipute suansawnte'n leng aneisawn zel ua, Pathian in i pipute ma a Zentel adelhkhiakte gam aluah lai un, Joshua makaih in biakbuk alutpih uhi. David hong om tan in huai ah a-om gige a, 46amah Pathian mitmuh a deihsakna tang, Jakob' Pathian a ding in inn bawlsak angen hi. 47Himahleh Solomon in huai inn alamsak zawta hi. 48“Himahleh zawlnei gen bang in khut a bawl innte ah Tungnungpen a-om kei; 49“Toupa'n van ka tutphah ahi a,lei ka khepek ngakna ahi; inn bangchibang na hon lamsak ding ua?Ka khawlna mun ding koi mun ahia? 50Hiai thilte keimah khut in ka bawl kei a hia?” chi a, agen bang in. 51“Migenhakte, lungtang leh bil a zeksumlouhte aw, chik lai peuh in Kha Siangthou na dal gige uh; na pipute uh hih bang in na hih nilouh uhi. 52Na pipute un zawlneite lak ah kua ahia asawi louh uh?

NASEPTE 7: Mi Diktak hong ding thu genkholte athat ua; huai midiktak mansakte leh thatte noumau na hi uhi. 53Dan angelte piaksawn mu masa a zuiloute aw,” achi hi.Jesu Muhna leh Stephen Sihna 54Huan huai thu azak un asin uh athakta a, Stephen tung ah aha uh agawita uhi. 55Himahleh amah Kha Siangthou in adim a, van lam a-en a, Pathian thupina leh Pathian taklam a Jesu dingh amu hi. 56“Ngai un, van kihong ka mu a, Pathian taklam a Mihing Tapa dingh leng ka mu,” achi hi. 57Huchi in amau aw ngaihtak in akikou ua, abil uh ahum ua, 58kituaktak in apang ua, khua a kipan adelhkhia ua, suang in adeng ua, atheihpihte'n tangval khat amin Saul khebul ah apuante uh akoihkhawm chiat uhi. 59Amaute'n Stephen suang in adengta ua; ama'n Pathian sam in, “Toupa Jesu, ka kha la in,” achi hi. 60Huan khukdin in aw ngaihtak in akikou a, “Toupa, hiai akhelhna tung uah moh posak ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in huai agen zoh in, a-ihmuta hi.

NASEPTE 8: 1Saul in leng asih hoih asa hi. Huai ni in Jerusalem a saptuam omte tung ah nakpitak in sawina atung a; sawltakte kia lou ngal Judia leh Samaria bial teng ah adalhzak vekta uhi. 2Huan Pathian limsak kuate hiam in Stephen avui ua, nakpitak in asuun uhi. 3Saul in bel saptuam pawlte asawi a, inn teng a lut in, numei pasal akaikhia a, suangkul ah akhum hi.Samaria Ah Philip 4Huan adalhzakte kho teng ah apaita ua, thu agen zel uhi. 5Samaria ah Philip ahohsuk a, akiang uah Khrist thu atangkoupih hi. 6Huan athillamdang hihte azak ua, amuh un, mipite'n lungsim mun khat in, Philip thugente alimsakta uhi. 7Dawi nin paimi tampi amatte uh sung a kipan in aw ngaihtak a kikou a pawt leh mizaw leh khebai tampi hihdam a a-om ziak un. 8Saptuamte Sawina Leh Dalhzakna 9Huan mi khat amin Simon a-om a; ama'n mithupi ka hi, chi in tuma lam in huai khua ah mitkhialdawi in Samaria khomite lamdang satak in abawl nilouh hi. 10Mi tengteng, aneupen a pan alianpen tan in, “Hiai mi Pathian thilhihtheihna thupi achih uh ahi,” chi in athu alimsak chiat uhi. 11Amitkhialdawi in sawtpi lamdang satak a abawl nak ziak in athu alimsak uhi. 12Himahleh Philip in Pathian lalgam tanchinhoih leh Jesu Khrist min agen pen agintak tak un, numei leh pasalte'n baptisma atangta uhi. 13Huan Simon nangawn in leng agingta a, baptisma atan zoh in Philip kiang ah a-om gige a, chiamtehna leh thillamdang thupite amu a, lamdang asa thei mahmah hi.Samaria Gam A Peter Leh Johan Zinna 14Huan sawltak Jerusalem a omte'n Samaria mite'n Pathian thu agingtata uh chih azak un, akiang uah Peter leh Johan asawl uhi. 15Huai mite ava tunsuk uleh Kha Siangthou atantheihna ding un athumsak uhi.

NASEPTE 8: 16Huai ma in alak uah kuamah tung ah atung nai kei a; Toupa Jesu min in baptisma atang phet uhi. 17Huan sawltakte'n atung uah akhut uh akoih ua, Kha Siangthou atangta uhi. 18Huan sawltakte khut ngakna ziak a Kha Siangthou piak ahi chih Simon in amuh in; dangka piak asawm hi. 19“Hichibang thuneihna hon pe sam un, kuapeuh tung a leng khut ka koihna in Kha Siangthou atan samna ding in,” achi hi. 20Himahleh Peter in akiang ah, “Na dangka nang toh mangkhawm hen, Pathian thilpiak dangka sum a lei na tup ziak in. 21Hiai thu ah nang zaw na pang kei, tan leng na nei kei hi; Pathian ngaih in na lungtang adik kei hi. 22Huaiziak in hiai na gitlouhna tawpsan inla, Toupa kiang ah thum in, huchi in na lungtang a na ngaihtuah ahon ngaidam khamoh ding hiam. 23Thil khakna sinkha ah leh gitlouh gaklopna ah na om chih ka thei hi,” achi hi. 24Huan Simon in, “Na thil gen uh bangmah ka tung a hong tunlouhna ding in noumau in Toupa kiang ah hon thumsak un,” chi in adawng hi. 25Huchi in amau Toupa thu atheihsak ua, agen zoh nung un, Jerusalem a kik nawn in, Samari mite tenna khua tampi ah tanchinhoih agen zel uhi.Philip Leh Ethiopia Michilgeh 26Huan Toupa angel khat in Philip ahoupih a, “Thou inla, simlam a Jerusalem a kipan Gaza kho sunsuk lampi huai gamdai ah hoh in,” achi hi. 27Huchi in athou a, apaita hi; huan ngai in, Ethiopia gam a mi khat, Ethiopia kumpinu Kandas gou tengteng kempa, michilgeh thuneitak, Jerusalem ah Pathian be ding in ahohtou hi. 28Apaikik lam kangtalai a tu in zawlnei Isai laibu asim hi. 29Huchi in Kha in Philip kiang ah, “Huai kangtalai va naih inla, va kithuahpih in,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 8: 30Michilgeh kiang ah Philip ava tai a, zawlnei Isai laibu asim aza a, “Na laibu sim na theisiam hia?” achi hi. 31Ama'n, “Kuamah hon hilhchet louh in bangchi in ka theisiam dia?” chi in akiang a kaltou a tutpih ding in Philip achialta hi. 32Laisiangthou asim lai tuh hiai ahi:“Goh ding belam bang in amah api ua;belamnou amulmetpa ma a adaih dide bang in ama'n leng akam aka kei; 33avuallelh lai in atung ah thugen aphal kei ua;asuante tanchin kua'n ahon gen ding ua?Khovel a kipan in ahinna alaksak ngal ua,” chi in. 34Michilgeh in Philip ahoupih a akiang ah, “Zawlnei in hiai thu kua thu ahia agen, amah thu hia, midang thu? Ka hon dong hi,” achi hi. 35Huan Philip in adawng a, Laisiangthou thu abul a pan in, akiang ah Jesu thu ahilhta hi. 36Huan lampi a apai kawm un koi mun hiam tui omna khat atung ua; huan michilgeh in, “En dih, hiai ah tui a-om, baptisma ka tan ding bang in hon dal ahia?” achi hi. 37Philip in, “Na lungtang tengteng a na gintakleh na hi thei,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Jesu Khrist, Pathian Tapa ahi chih ka gingta,” chi in adawng hi. 38Huchi in kangtalai akhawlsak ua, anih un, Philip leh michilgeh, tui ah ahohkhawmsuk ua; huchi in ama'n abaptista hi. 39Huan tui a pan apaitouh un Toupa Kha in Philip alamangta a; huan michilgeh in amah amu nawnta kei, nuamsatak in apai zel hi. 40Himahleh Azotas ah Philip muh in a-om nawn hi; huan apaisuak kawm in Kaisaria atun masiah kho teng ah tanchinhoih agen zel hi.

NASEPTE 9: 1Saul in Toupa nungzuite vau leh thah atup thu agen lailai man in siampu lianpen kiang ah ava hoh hi. 2Damaskas a sinagog tengteng amite kiang a piak ding in lai angen a, hiai Lampi zui mi kuapeuh amuhleh, numei leh pasal leng, hen a Jerusalem a hon pitheihna ding in. 3Huan apai lai in, Damaskas atun kuan in, thakhat in van a kipan vak akim ah ahong vak puap hi. 4Huan lei ah apuk a, akiang ah, “Saul, Saul, bang achia nang hon sawi na hia?” chi in aw aza hi. 5Huan ama'n, “Toupa, kua na hia?” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na sawi Jesu ka hi; kilhna sikzum na tot nang ding in ahaksa hi,” achi hi. 6Huan ling leh lamdang sa kawm in, “Toupa bang sem ding a hon deih na hiam?” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Thou inla, khopi ah lut in, huchi in na hih ding hilh in na om ding hi,” achi hi. 7Atonpihte gen ding thei lou in adingh ua, aw zaw aza ua, himahleh kuamah amu kei uh. 8Huan lei a kipan in Saul athou a; ahong hak a kuamah amutheita kei hi; huchi in akhut in akai ua, Damaskas ah apilut uhi. 9Saul Pianthakna 10Huan Damaskas ah amin Ananias nungzui khat a-om hi. Toupa'n mengmu bang in akiang ah, “Ananias,” achi hi. 11Huan ama'n, “En in, Toupa, hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Thou inla, Kongzing Tang achih uah hoh inla, Judas inn ah, Tarsas khomi, amin Saul kichi kankhia in. Ngai in, athum laitak ahi. 12Ama'n mengmuhna in mi khat amin Ananias akiang ava lut a, amit hihvakna ding a atung akhut nga in amuta hi,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 9: 13Ananias in, “Toupa huai mi Jerusalem a na misiangthoute tung a atatsiat thu mi tampi kam ah ka za hi. 14Huan hiai ah na min lou peuhmah hen ding in siampu liante a kipan thuneihna toh hong pai ahi,” chi in adawng hi. 15Himahleh Toupa'n akiang ah, “Hoh mai in; Zentelte, kumpipate leh Israel suante kiang a ka min polut ding a ka belseh ahi. 16Ka min ziak in gimna bangchi a thupi ahia athuak ding akiang ah ka theisak ding,” achi hi. 17Huan Ananias ava hoh a, inn ah alut a, huan atung ah akhut anga a, “Unau Saul, na mitvakna ding leh Kha Siangthou dim a na omtheihna ding in, Toupa, na hong paina lampi a na kiang a kilak Jesu'n hon sawl ahi,” achi hi. 18Huan thakhat in amit a kipan lip bang aketa a, amit avak nawnta a; athou a, huan baptisma atangta hi. 19Huan an ane a, ahalhta hi. Huan Damaskas a nungzui omte kiang ah ni bangzah hiam ataam hi.Paul In Damaskas Ah Thu Agen 20Huan Sinagog ah, “Jesu, Pathian Tapa” ahihdan thu atangkoupih zui ngal hi. 21Huan athu zate tengteng in lamdang asa ua, “Hiai mipa Jerusalem a hiai minloute sawi zelpa ahi kei a hia? Huai mite siampu liante kiang a hensa a piak sawm a hong hohpa hilou hia?” achi uhi. 22Saul bel ahong hattuam a, huai mi Khrist ahi taktak chih ahilhchian a, Damaskas a Juda omte gen ding bei in akoih hilhial hi. 23Huan ni sawttak nung in Saul that ding in Judate akihou uhi. 24Himahleh ama'n athiltup uh ana thei hi. Huan amah thah tum in kulh kong teng ah sun leh zan in atang uhi.

NASEPTE 9: 25Himahleh anungzuite'n zan in api ua, kulh tohlet ah bawm in akhaikheta uhi.Jerusalem Leh Tarsas Khua Ah Saul 26Huan Jerusalem a Saul atuntak in nungzuite kithuahpih atum a; amau bel avek un amah akihta ua, nungzui ahih sam agingta kei uhi. 27Barnabas in amah api a, sawltakte kiang ah apaipih a, lampi a Toupa amuh a, ahoupihdan bang, Damaskas a Jesu min a hangtak a thu ahilhdan khawng leng akiang uah agenta hi. 28Huchi in Jerusalem ah Saul tuh akiang uah lut zel pawt zel in a-omta a, Toupa min in hangsantak in thu agen zel hi. 29Huan Grik pau zang Judate kiang ah thu agen a, asel a; amau bel amah hihlup atum uhi. 30Huan unaute'n huai atheihtak un, Kaisaria ah apisuk ua, Tarsas ah asawlmangta uhi. 31Huchi in saptuamte Judia, Galili leh Samaria gam kimvel ah akip deuhdeuh ua, muangtak in a-omta ua; huan Toupa laudan siam kawm in, Kha Siangthou khamuan in a-om ua, ahong pung deuhdeuh uhi.Lidda Khua A Peter In Ahihdamna 32Huan Peter in kho kim atot vialvial kawm in, Lidda a Mi Siangthou omte kiang ah leng ahohsuk hi. 33Huai ah mi khat amin Ainias, azawt ziak a kum giat lupna a lumden amu hi. 34Huan Peter in akiang ah, “Ainias aw, Jesu Khrist in ahon hihdam, thou inla, na awngphah zial in,” achi hi. Huchi in athou pahta hi. 35Huan Lidda khua leh Sharon phai a omte tengteng in Ainias amu ua, Toupa lam anga duam uhi.Dorka 36Huan Joppa ah amin Tabitha nungzui khat a-om a, Tabitha minkhiakna tuh Dorkas ahi, huai numei in thil hihhoih leh thilpiak ahau mahmah hi. 37Huai lai in, achi ana a, asi hi; huchi in asilsiang ua, indan tungnung ah asial uhi.

NASEPTE 9: 38Huan Lidda khua tuh Joppa kho kiang ahih ziak in, nungzuite'n Peter huai ah a-om chih aza ua, “Sawt hal lou in ka kiang uah hong pai in,” chi a va thum ding in akiang ah mi nih asawl uhi. 39Huan Peter athou a akiang uah apaita hi. Huan atuntak in indan tungnung ah api ua; meithai tengteng dingh in, akiang ua Dorkas a-om lai a apuanak bawlte, apuan bawlte lak kawm in akap chiat uhi. 40Himahleh Peter in avek un apawtsak a, akhukdin a, athumta hi; huan luanglam anga a, “Tabitha, thou in,” achi hi. Huchi in amit ahong hak a, Peter amuhtak in atutou hi. 41Huan Peter in akhut apia a, akaithou hi, misiangthoute leh meithaite asam a, hingdam in apeta hi. 42Huan huai Joppa kho tengteng in athei vek ua; mi tampi in Toupa agingta uhi. 43Huan Joppa ah savunbawlpa Simon inn ah ni tampitak Peter ataam nilouh hi.

NASEPTE 10: 1Kaisaria ah mi khat amin Kornelia a-om a; amah Itali pawl achih uh, huai pawl a sepaih zaheutupa ahi. 2Amah Pathian limsakmi ahi a, a-inkuanpihte tengteng toh Pathian laudan asiam uhi, mite kiang ah thilthawnpiak tampi ape zel a, Pathian kiang ah leng athum gige hi. 3Hiai mi'n sun dak kuana ding khawng in mengmuhna in Pathian angel khat akiang ah alut a, “Kornelia” chi a asap lai chiangtak in amu hi. 4Huan Kornelia in lau in amah ana en kilkel a, “Toupa, bang ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Na thumnate leh na thilpiakte theihgigena ding in Pathian ma ah atungtouta hi. 5Tu'n ah Joppa khua ah mi sawl inla, mi khat Simon Peter achih uh va pisak in; 6amah huai tuipi gei a om, savunbawlpa Simon inn a tung ahi a, ama'n na hih ding hon na hilh ding hi,” achi hi. 7Ahoupihpa angel apaitak in, Kornelia in asikhate lak a mi nih leh anek bawl gigete lak a Pathian limsak sepaih khat asam hi. 8Thu tengteng akiang ua ahilh khit in Joppa khua ah asawlta hi.Peter Mengmuhna 9Huan azing nawn in, khopi zuan a pai, khua atun kuan un, thum ding in dak gukna vel in intung ah Peter akaltou hi. 10Peter Leh Kornelia 11Van kihong in, banghiam bawm, puan liantak bang, ning li a khih, lei a luai a khaikhiak a om in amu hi. 12Huai sung ah leitung a khe li nei ganhing chi chih leh gamsa leh ganhing bokvak, tungleng vasa chichihte a-om uhi. 13Huan akiang ah aw in, “Peter, thou in gou inla, ne in,” achi hi. 14Himahleh Peter in, “Toupa hilou e; siang lou leh nin bangmah himhim ka ne ngei kei,” achi hi. 15Aw in, anihveina in, “Pathian in ahihsiangthousa nang siang lou chi ke'n,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 10: 16Huchibang ngen in thumvei ahong om a; huan van ah bawm khaitouh in a-om nawnta hi. 17Huan Peter in mengmu bang a amuh theisiam lou a, abuai lai in, Kornelia mi sawlte'n Simon inn ana kankhia ua, 18kongkhak bul ah ana dingh ua asam ua, “Simon, Peter achih uh, huai a atun leh tun louh,” ana dong uhi. 19Peter in mengmu bang a amuh angaihtuah lai inla, Kha in akiang ah, “Ngai in, mi thum in ahong zong uh. 20Huaiziak in thou inla, kumsuk in, bangmah ginglel lou in amaute zui in; amau ka sawl ahi uh,” achi hi. 21Huchi in Peter huai mite kiang ah ahohsukta a, akiang uah, “Ngai un na mizon uh ka hi; bang ahia na hong nasan uh?” achi hi. 22Amau, “Angel siangthou khat in, Kornelia, sepaih zaheutupa, midiktak, Pathian laudan siam, Juda nam tengteng lak a mihoih kiang ah, na thugen azakna ding in, a-inn ah nangmah sam ding in ahilh hi,” achi uhi. 23Huchi in mite asamlut a, agiaksakta hi. Huan azing in Peter athou a, akiang uah apai a, Joppa khomi unau kuate hiam leng akiang uah apai sam uhi.Kornelia Inn Ah Peter 24Huan azing nawn in Kaisaria ah alutta uhi. Kornelia in, asanggamte leh alawm deihpente samkhawm in, amau ana ngak nilouh hi. 25Peter ahong lut dek laitak in Kornelia in ana dawn a, akhebul a bokkhup in, abia hi. 26Himahleh Peter in amah akaithou a, dingh in, “Kei leng mihing mai ka hi,” achi hi. 27Amah toh kihou kawm in alut a, mi tampi omkhawm amu hi. 28Akiang uah, “Juda mi namdang toh kithuah leh pai asianlouhdan noumau mah in na thei uhi; himahleh kuamah siang lou leh nin ka chih ding ahi kei chih Pathian in ahon theisak hi.

NASEPTE 10: 29Huaiziak in na hong saptak in sel lou in ka hong pai hi. Huchi in ka hon dong ahi, bangziak a hon sam na hi ua le?” achi hi. 30Huan Kornelia in, “Ni li ahita, tu hun bang tan in, ka inn ah, dak kuana hun thumna ah ka thum a; ngai in, ka ma ah puan vaktak silh mi khat ahong dingh a, 31‘Kornelia, na thumna zak in a-omta, mi kiang a na thilthawnpiakte leng Pathian in atheigige hi. 32Huaiziak in Joppa ah Simon, Peter achih uh, sam ding in mi sawl inla, na kiang ah sam in; amah tuipi gei ah savunbawlpa Simon inn a tung ahi, amah ahong tun chiang in na kiang ah thu agen ding hi,’ achi hi. 33Huaiziak in na kiang ah mi ka hon sawl pah hi; na hong pai ahoih ahi. Huchi in Toupa'n thu ahon piak peuhmah thei ding in tu'n ah Pathian mitmuh in i vek un hiai ah i om uhi,” achi hi.Kornelia Inn A Peter Thugen 34Huan Peter in agen a, “Pathian in mi deihsak tuam anei kei chih, diktak in ka thei hi. 35Himahleh nam chih lak ah kuapeuh amah kihtakdan siam a, diktak a gamta peuhmah, apahtak mi ahi naknak uhi. 36Ama'n khamuanna tanchinhoih, Jesu Khrist tungtawn in Israel suante kiang ah agen a (amah mi tengteng Toupa ahi), 37Johan in atangkou pihpih baptisma nung in, hiai tanchinhoih, Galili gam a kipan ahong thang pan a, Judia gam tengteng ah athangsuak a, noumau leng na thei uhi. 38Nazaret Jesu tungtang thu, huchi a Pathian in amah Kha Siangthou leh thilhihtheihna a athaunilhdan, Pathian akiang a a-om ziak in amah mi tung a thil hoih hih leh diabol gawt tengteng hihdam in avialvak vak hi.

NASEPTE 10: 39Judate gam ah leh Jerusalem a athilhih tengteng theihpihte ka hi uh, amah sing dawn ah khai in athat uhi. 40Amah Pathian in ani thum ni in akaithou nawn a, chiantak in akitheisak hi. 41Himahleh mi tengteng kiang ah ahi kei, Pathian in theihpih dia asehkholhte kiang kia ah ahi koute, misi lak a kipan athohnawn nung a akiang a ne a dawnte kiang ah. 42Amah misi leh mihingte tung a Vaihawmpa dia Pathian seh ahi chih, mi kiang a tangkoupih leh theisak ding in Pathian in thu ahon pia hi. 43Kuapeuh amah gingta amin ziak in khelhnate ngaihdam in a-om ding uh chih hiai a tanchin zawlnei tengteng in ana theihsak det uh ahi,” achi hi.Zentelte Tung A Kha Siangthou Tunna 44Peter in huai thu agen laitak in thuzate tengteng tung ah Kha Siangthou ahong tung hi. 45Zeksumte lak a agingtate Peter hon zui peuhmah in Kha Siangthou thawnpiak Zentelte tung ah leng sunbuak ahih ziak in lamdang asa mahmah uhi. 46Paute a thu gen in Pathian phat in aza uhi. 47Huan Peter in apuang a, “Hiai mite, eimah bang a Kha Siangthou tang sam, baptisma ding in tui zat kuama'n akham thei dia hia?” achi hi. 48Huchi in Toupa min a baptisma tan ding thu apia hi. Huai khit in ni bangzah hiam taam ding in akhou uhi.

NASEPTE 11: 1Huan Judia gam a sawltak leh unau omte'n Zentelte'n leng Pathian thu agingta uh chih azata uhi. 2Huchi in Peter, Jerusalem atuntouhtak in, zeksumte'n akiang ah, 3“Zeksumloute inn ah lut in, akiang uah na ne,” chi in akalhta uhi. 4Himahleh Peter in abul a kipan in kizom zel in akiang uah ahilhchian hi. 5“Joppa ah thum in ka om a, huan ihmu bang in ka om a, banghiam bawm, puan liantak bang aning li a kikhih, van a kipan khiaksuk bang in ka mu a; ka kiang ngeingei ahong tung hi. 6Huai tuh ka en kilkel a, ka ngaihtuah a, ‘Lei a ganhing khe li nei leh gamsate chi chih, awm a kitholh ganhingte leh tungleng vasate ka mu hi.’ 7Huan aw in, ‘Peter, thou in; gou inla, ne in, hon chi in’ ka za hi. 8Himahleh ke'n, ‘Toupa, hilou e, siang lou leh nin bangmah ka kam ah alut ngei kei,’ ka chi hi. 9Himahleh van a kipan aw in, anihveina in, ‘Pathian in ahihsiangthousa nang siang lou chi ke'n,’ chi in ahon dawng hi. 10Huchibang ngen in thumvei ahong om a; huan bangkim van ah khaitouh in a-om nawnta hi. 11Peter In Athilhih Agum 12Huan Kha in kuamah khentuam nei lou a amau zui ding in ahon sawl hi. Hiai unau guk in leng ahon zui sam ua, huai mi inn ah ka lutta uhi. 13Huan ama'n ka kiang uah, a-inn a angel kilak amuhdan leh angel in akiang a, Joppa ah mi sawl a, Simon Peter achih uh, pisak ding leh; 14‘Ama'n thu ahon hilh ding a, huai mi thu in nang leh na inkuanpihte hotdam in na om ding uh’ achihdan leng ahon hilh hi.
