NASEPTE 11: 15Huan thu ka gen patleh, achil a eite tung a ahong tun bang mah in, atung uah Kha Siangthou ahong tungta hi. 16Toupa thu, Johan in tui in abaptis zel; himahleh nou zaw Kha Siangthou a baptis in na om ding uh achih ka hon theikhe nawn uhi. 17Huchi in Toupa Jesu Khrist i gintak ua, Pathian in thilthawnpiak ahon piak amaute kiang a apiak sam, kei Pathian sel vual ka hi a hia?” achi hi. 18Huai thu azak un adaita ua, huchi ahihleh, “Pathian in Zentelte leng hing ding a kisik phalta ahi ve maw,” chi in Pathian aphat uhi.Antiok Khua A Saptuamte 19Huan Stephen ziak a sawina thuak dalhzakte, Phoinisia gam, Kupra tuikulh leh Antiok khua pha in apai ua, Judate kiang kia ah lou ngal kuamah kiang ah thu agen kei uhi. 20Himahleh alak ua akhen tuh Kupra tuikulh leh Kurini a mite ahi ua, huai mite'n Antiok khua atun un Grikte leng ahoupih ua, Toupa Jesu tanchinhoih ahilh samta uhi. 21Huan Toupa khut in amaute apanpih a; mi tampi in agingta ua, Toupa lam ahong nga chiatta uhi. 22Huan atanchin thu uh Jerusalem a saptuam omte bil ah alutta a; huchi in Antiok kho pha in Barnabas asawlkhia uhi. 23Amah ava tung a, Pathian hehpihdan amuh in akipak a, phatuamngaitak in Toupa len gige ding in avek un ahanthawn hi. 24Barnabas mihoihtak ahi a, Kha Siangthou leh ginna a dim ahi. Huan Toupa kiang ah mi tampi a behlap in a-omta uhi. 25Huan Saul zong ding in Tarsas ah Barnabas ahoh hi. 26Amuh in Antiok ah ahon pi hi. Huan kum khat hilhial saptuamte kikhopna ah apang zel ua, mi tampi leng thu ahilh uhi. Antiok ah ahi nungzuite, “Khristian,” achih masakpen uh. 27Huai lai in zawlnei kuahiam Jerusalem a kipan in Antiok ah ahohsuk hi. 28Alak ua mi khat amin Agabas kichi adingh a, khovel tengteng ah kial thupitak atung dek chih Kha hilh in atheisak a; huai kial tuh Klaudias vaihawm lai in ahong tungta hi. 29Huchi in nungzuite'n atheihdan chiat un Judia gam a unau omte kiang ah panpihna khak atum uhi. 30Huai tuh ahihta ngei uhi, Barnabas leh Saul khut ah upate kiang ah akhak uhi.

NASEPTE 12: 1Huai lai in Kumpipa Herod in saptuamte lak a kuate hiam hihgim tum in akhut alikta hi. 2Huan Jakob, Johan unau, namsau in asatlum hi. 3Huai in Judate akipaksak chih atheih in, Peter leng mat atum zel hi. Huai ni tuh Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ni ahi.Peter Suangkul Tanna 4Huan amat nung in suangkul ah akhum a, sepaih pawl li, li chiat zel in, akivenkhelsak hi; Paikan Ankuanglui nung in mi tengteng kiang ah pikhiak atum hi. 5Huaiziak in suangkul ah Peter a-omsak tadih hi; himahleh, saptuamte'n amah a ding in phatuamngaitak in Pathian kiang ah athumsak uhi. 6Herod in apikhiak ding zan in sepaih nih kikal ah khainiang nih bun in Peter a-ihmu a; avengte kongkhak bul a om in suangkul aveng uhi. 7Ngai in, Toupa angel khat akiang ah ahong dingh a, suangkul sung ah vak ahong tang hi; huan Peter nak ah abenghalh a, “Thou meng in,” achi hi. Huan akhut a kipan khainiangte atolhkhesuk hi.Peter Hutkhiakna 8Huan angel in akiang ah, “Na puan silh inla, na khetuam bun in,” achi hi. Huan ama'n huchibang in ahih hi. Angel in akiang ah, “Na puan silhhoih inla, hon zui in,” achi hi. 9Huan Peter apawt a azuita hi, angel tatdan atak hia ahih athei kei, mengmu bang a amuh hiam akisa hi. 10Huan chingmi masa leh azom akhen nung un, khopi lutna sik kongpi ava tung ua, huai tuh amau a ding in akihong tawmta hi; huan apawt ua, kongzing khat akheng ua; huai a kipan angel in amah paisanta hi. 11Huan Peter ahalhtak in, “Herod khut leh Juda mite lametna tengteng a kipan a hunkhe ding a Toupa'n a-angel hon sawlkhia ahi chih tu in diktak in ka theita,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 12: 12Martar Jakob 13Kongpi kongkhak a kiuhtak in, nungak khat amin Rhoda, adawng ding in ava hoh hi. 14Peter aw azaktak in akipah ziak in kong hon lou in atailut nawn a, kongkhak bul ah Peter adingh chih ava gen hi. 15Himahleh amau akiang ah, “Ahai na hita ve,” ana chi uhi. Ama'n bel, “Hi petmah ahi,” chi in apang teitei hi. Amau, “A-angel hi in teh,” achi lai uhi. 16Himahleh Peter in kongkhak akiukiu a; ahon ualeh amah amu ua, lamdang asa uhi. 17Huchi in ama'n amaute dai ding in akhutvan a, Pathian in suangkul a kipan amah apikhiakdan ahilhta hi. “Hiai thute Jakob leh unaute kiang ah va hilh un,” achi hi. Huan apawt a mun dang ah ava pai hi. 18Ni ahong suahtak in, Peter tung a bang thil tung hiam, chi in buai chihtak in sepaihte abuai uhi. 19Huan Herod in amah azong a amu kei, avengtute a-enchian a, thah ding in thu apeta hi. Huan Judia gam a kipan Kaisaria ah ahohsuk a, huai ah a-om nilouh hi.Herod Sihna 20Huan Tura leh Sidon a mite tung ah Herod alung hi kei mahmah hi; amau thukhat sat in Blastas, kumpipa lupna ngakpa, alawm in abawl ua, kumpipa kiang ah hong pai ua, amah a kipan nek-le-dawn ngah zel ahih ziak un akholamte uh toh kilemna angen uhi. 21Huan ani chiam ni in kumpipa Herod in kumpi puan asilh a, alaltutphah a tu in akiang uah thu agen hi. 22Mi tengteng in, “Hiai pathian aw ahi, mihing aw ahi kei,” achi ua, akikou zuazua uhi. 23Ama'n Pathian kiang a thupina apiak louh ziak in Toupa Angel in amah aman pah a, hut in ane a, asita hi. 24Pathian thu bel adalh a, apung zel hi. 25Barnabas leh Saul in nna asep khit un, Jerusalem a kipan akik nawnta ua, Johan, amin dang Marka achih uh leng atonpih uhi.

NASEPTE 13: 1Antiok a saptuam omte lak ah zawlnei leh thuhilhmi kuate hiam a-om ua; huaite Barnabas, Niger achih uh Simeon, Kurini khomi Lusias, kumpipa Herod toh khangkhawm Manaen leh Saul ahi uhi. 2Huan Toupa nna sem a an angolh lai un, Kha Siangthou in, “Barnabas leh Saul ka sapna nna sem ding in kei a ding in hon koihtuamsak un,” achi hi. 3Huchi in an angawl ua, athum khit un atung uah akhut uh akoih ua, apaisakta uhi.Kupra Tuikulh Ah Paul Leh Barnabas 4Huchi in Kha Siangthou sawlkhiak in apai ua, Seliusia ah ahohsuk ua, huai a kipan in Kupra tuikulh ah long in apai uhi. 5Salamis a a-om lai un Judate sinagog ah Pathian thu agen ua; Johan leng amaute panpih ding in atonpih uhi. 6Huan tuikulh gam Paphos kho pha in anawksuak ua, bumsiam, zawlnei tak lou, Juda mi khat amu ua, amin tuh Bar Jesu ahi. 7Huai mi gam-ukpa Serjia Paulus, mipiltak kiang a om ahi. Huai gam-ukpa'n Barnabas leh Saul asam a, Pathian thu zak atum hi. 8Himahleh bumsiam Elimas, (huai tuh ama minkhiakna ahi a), amau nasep dal in ginna a kipan gam-ukpa heimang atum hi. 9Huchi in Saul, Paul leng kichi; Kha Siangthou in adim a, amah a-ensal hi. 10“Nang, mi khem leh huathuai chiteng a dim diabol tapa, diktatna tengteng melmapa aw, Toupa lam diktatte hihsiat na tawp kei ding maw? 11Thei in, tu in Toupa khut na tung ah atu hi, na mit ahong taw ding a, bang tan hiam khovak na mu kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in khomui leh mial in amah akhuh pah a, khut a kai ding mi zong in amai puampuam hi.

NASEPTE 13: 12Huan gam-ukpa'n huai thilhih amu a, Toupa sinsakna lamdang asa mahmah a, agingtata hi.Pisidia Antiok A Paul Thugen 13Paul Leh Barnabas Sawlkhiakna 14Himahleh amau Perga a kipan apai zel ua, Pisidia gam a Antiok khua atung uhi; huan Sabbath ni in sinagog ah alut ua, atu uhi. 15Dan leh zawlneite laibu asim khit un, sinagog upate'n akiang uah mi asawl ua, “Unaute aw, mite hanthawnna thu banghiam na neih uleh gen un,” achi uhi. 16Huan Paul adingh a, akhut a zap in agen a, “Israel mite leh Pathian laudan siamte aw, ngai un. 17Hiai Israel chite Pathian in i pipute atel a, Aigupta gam a ataam lai un ahih thupi mahmah a, ban thahat in amaute huai a kipan in apikheta hi. 18Huan kum sawmli gamdai ah athilhihte uh athuak teitei hi. 19Kanaan gam a nam sagihte ahihsiat khit in, agam uh aisan a hawm in, aluah ding un apia hi. 20Huaite nung kum zali-le-sawmnga sung teng, zawlnei Samuel hun tan in vaihawmte ape zel hi. 21Huan huai nung in kumpipa angen ua; Pathian in, Saul kichi, Benjamin nam a Kish tapa, kum sawmli sung amau apia hi. 22Amah asuanmang nung in akumpipa ding un David abawlta hi; Pathian in huai thu theisak in, David, Jesse tapa, ka lungtang bang pumi ka mukheta, ama'n ka deihlam ahih ding,” achi hi. 23Hiai mi suan a kipan in Pathian in athuchiam bang in Israelte kiang ah Hondampa, Jesu kichi ahon dinkhia hi. 24Amah ahong pai ma in Johan in kisikna baptisma thu Israel mi tengteng kiang ah ana hilh masa hi. 25Huan Johan in asep ding azoh kuan in, “Noute'n kei kua na hon sa ua? Amah zaw ka hi kei hi.

NASEPTE 13: Himahleh ngai un, ka nung ah mi khat ahong pai dek, kei zaw akhepek a khetuam phel tak leng ka hi kei,” achi hi. 26“Mite leh unaute, Abraham suante leh Pathian laudan siam Zentelte tengteng aw, noute kiang ah hiai hotdamna thu piak in a-omta hi. 27Jerusalem a omte leh amakaite un, amah atheih louh ziak ua siam louh atansak lai un, zawlneite thute Sabbath teng a asimte uh tangtungsak ana hi uhi. 28Asihna ding khop atung a bangmah amuh louh nung un leng, Pilat kiang ah hihlup ding in angen uhi. 29Huan athu zawlneite'n agelhkholh tengteng uh ahihtangtun khit un, sing a kipan in alakhia ua, han ah asialta uhi. 30Himahleh Pathian in misi lak a kipan akaithou nawnta hi. 31Huchi in Galili gam a kipan Jerusalem a amah toh hohtoute kiang ah ni sawtpi akilak a; huai mite mah mi kiang a athu theihpihte ahi uhi. 32Kou leng pipute kiang ah huai thuchiam a Tanchin kipahhuai ka hon puangzak uhi. 33Huchi a Pathian in Jesu akaihthoh, ei atate kiang ah huai thuchiam tuh ahihtangtung hi. Sam nihna ah, ‘Nang zaw ka tapa na hi a, tuni in ka hon neikhia hi,’ chih gelh bang in. 34Muatna mun a pai nawn lou ding in Pathian in amah misi lak a kipan akaihthohdan ding hiai bang in agen hi, David kiang a hehpihna ka chiamte nangmah ka hon pe ding,” chi in. 35“Huaiziak in Sam dang ah, ‘Na Mi Siangthou muatmang na phal kei ding,’ achi behlap hi. 36David zaw, Pathian vai hawmsak bang in ama khang hun a nna asep khit in, a-ihmu a, apipute kiang ah asial ua, amuatmangta hi. 37Himahleh Pathian kaihthoh pen in zaw muatna amu kei hi. 38Huchi in unaute aw thei un; amah ziak in khelhna ngaihdamna thu na kiang ua gen ahi.

NASEPTE 13: 39Kuapeuh agingta tuh bangkim ah amah siamtansak in a-om, huai lah Mosi Dan in siamtansak in na om thei kei uhi. 40Huaiziak in pilvang un, huchi lou in zaw zawlneite a agen uh na tung uah ahong tung kha ding hi.” 41“Musitte aw, en un,lamdang sa unla, mangthang un;na damsung un nna khat ka sem hi,huai nna mi'n hon hilh mah le uh,na gingta kei hial ding uhi, chih,” achi hi. 42Huan apawt un, Sabbath nawn chiang a huai thute gen nawn ding in angen uhi. 43Huan omkhawmte akikhentak un, Judate leh phungkaite Pathian limsak lak a mi tampi in Paul leh Barnabas azui zel ua; amau ana houpih ua, Pathian hehpihna a om gige ding in ahanthawn uhi.Zentelte Kiang Lam Ngatna 44Huan Sabbath nawn in akhozang phial un Pathian thu ngaikhe ding in ahong kikhawm uhi. 45Himahleh Judate'n mipite amuhtak un ahaza mahmah ua; Paul thugente kalh in agensia uhi. 46Huchi in Paul leh Barnabas in hangsantak in adawng ua, “Pathian thu noumau kiang ah gen masak ding him ahi; himahleh na nial ua, tangtawn a hing tak lou a na kiseh nung un, thei un, Zentelte lam ka ngata uh,” achi uhi. 47Huchibang in Toupa'n thu ahon pia hi, “Zentelte hihvakpa ding in ka hon sep a, kawlmong pha a Hondampa dia na omtheihna ding in, chih gelh bang in,” achi hi. 48Zentelte'n huai thu azak un, akipak ua, Toupa thu apahtawi ua, tangtawn a hing ding a sehkholh peuhmah in agingta uhi. 49Toupa thu huai gam kimvel ah adalhta hi. 50Himahleh Judate'n numei zahtakhuai Pathian limsakte leh kho upate hanthawn in, Paul leh Barnabas soisasak in, agam ua kipan adelhkhia uhi. 51Amau leng atung uah akhepek ua leivui asingkhia ua, Ikoniam ah apaita uhi. 52Huan nungzuite kipahna leh Kha Siangthou in adim chiat uhi.

NASEPTE 14: 1Ikoniam ah Judate sinagog ah alutkhawm ua, thu agen zel uhi, huchi in Judate leh Grik mipi tampi in leng agingtata uhi. 2Himahleh agingta nuam lou Judate'n Zentelte lungsim atokthou ua, unaute ahosak uhi. 3Huaiziak in Toupa ah hangtak a thu gen in huai ah sawt sim a-om uhi. Ama'n chiamtehna leh thillamdangte akhut ua hihsak in, ahehpihna thu atheisak zel hi. 4Himahleh khua a mipite akilangta ua, akhen in Judate agum ua, akhen in sawltakte agum uhi. 5Zentelte leh Judate aheutute uh toh pangkhawm in sawltakte simmohhuaitak a bawl a suang a den atup lai un, 6amau ana thei ua, Likonia gam mah, Listra leh Darbi ah leh akim gam ah ataimang uhi. 7Huai ah tanchinhoih agen zom zel uhi.Listra Ah Paul Leh Barnabas 8Listra ah khezaw kuahiam atu a, apian tung a pan khebai him ahi a, khe in apai ngei kei hi. 9Huai mi'n Paul thugen angaikhia a; huan Paul in a-en gegu a, damna ding in ginna anei chih athei a, aw ngaihtak in, “Na khe in dingtang in,” achi hi. 10Huan amah atawm a, khe in apaita hi. 11Mipite'n Paul thilhih amuh un, Likonia pau in aw ngaihtak in, “Mihing melpu in i kiang uah pathiante ahong sukta uh e!” achi uhi. 12Amaute'n Barnabas pen, “Jupiter” achi ua, Paul bel thugenpi pen ahih ziak in, “Hermes” achi uhi. 13Huan Jupiter siampu, khopi lutna a atempul om in, bawngtalte leh pakkhigui limte kongpi ah ahon tawi a, mipite toh biakna ding in lat atum uhi. 14Paul Leh Barnabas Ikoniam Ah 16Pathian in nidanglai in nam chih amau lampi chiat zuih aphal hi.

NASEPTE 14: 17Himahleh amah theihsakna om lou in akibawl kei, huchi in thil ahihhoih zel a, van a kipan in vuahtui ahon pia a, na lungtang uh nek ding leh kipahna a hihdim gige akei hiam,” achi uhi. 18Huchi in huai thu in mipite'n amaute biakna dia gan agoh ding uh akhamzou teitei hi. 19Himahleh Antiok leh Ikoniam ah Juda mi kuate hiam ahong ua, mipite akhempukta uhi; huchi in suang in Paul adeng ua, si hi a agintak ziak un khua a kipan akaikhia uhi. 20Himahleh nungzuite akim a adin lai un, ahong thou a, khua ah alut nawnta hi. Huan azing in Barnabas toh Darbi ah apaita uhi.Siria Antiok A Kik Nawnna 21Huan huai khuate kiang ah tanchinhoih ahilh ua, nungzui tampi abawl nung un Listra, Ikoniam leh Antiok khua ah akik nawn uhi. 22Gim tampi thuak in Pathian lalgam i lut ding ahi him ahi, chi in nungzuite lungsim ahihkip ua, ginna a om gige ding in ahanthawn uhi. 23Huan saptuam pawl teng ah upate asehsak ua, an ngawl kawm a athum khit un, agin uh Toupa kiang ah akemsak zelzel uhi. 24Pisidia gam atawnsuak ua, Pamphilia gam atung uhi. 25Perga a thu agen khit un Attalia ah ahohsuk uhi. 26Huai a kipan in long in apawt ua, Antiok khua ahong tung nawnta uhi. Huai mun ahi tua athilhih khitsa uh hih ding a unaute'n Pathian hehpihna a kemsak a asawlkhiakna uh. 27Huan a tun nung un asaptuamte asamkhawm ua, Pathian in, amaute zang a athilhihte leh Zentelte a dia ginna kongkhak ahonsakdan ahilh uhi. 28Huan nungzuite kiang ah sawt sim a-om uhi.

NASEPTE 15: 1Mi kuate hiam Judia gam a kipan in ahong suk ua unaute kiang ah, “Mosi Dan bang a zek na sum kei uleh hotdam na hi thei kei ding uh,” chi in ahong gen uhi. 2Huchi in Paul leh Barnabas in amaute kalh in nakpitak a kisel a akilan ziak un, huai thubuai tungtang a Jerusalem a sawltakliante leh upate va mu ding in Paul leh Barnabas, leh alak ua kuate hiam asep uhi. 3Huchi in saptuamte'n ava kha ua, amau Zentelte hong kikhekdan thu gen zel in, Phoinisia gam leh Samaria gam atawnsuakta uh; huchi in unaute tengteng akipaksak mahmah uhi. 4Jerusalem atuntouh un saptuam pawlte, sawltakte, upate'n ana kipahpih ua; Pathian in amau zang a athilhihte apuangkhe zelzel uhi. 5Himahleh Pharisai pawl a mi gingta kuate hiam akisa ua, “Zentelte zeksum ding leh Mosi Dan azuih chiat ding uh ahi,” achi uhi.Jerusalem A Saptuam Khawmpi 6Huan sawltakliante leh upate, huai thu ngaihtuah ding in akikhawm uhi. 7Nakpi a akisel nung un Peter adingtou a, akiang uah, “Mite leh unaute aw, Zentelte'n keimah kam a tanchinhoih thu za a gingta ding a, Pathian in nidanglai a na lak ua kipan ahon sehdan na thei uhi. 8Lungsim theipa Pathian in eite hon piak bang mah in Kha Siangthou akiang ua pe sam in atung uah akipak chih atheisak hi. 9Huan eite leh amau khentuam nei lou in ginna in alungsim uh ahihsiangthou hi. 10Huchi in i pipute leh eite'n i zuih zoh louhsa hakkol, tu'n ah nungzuite tung a ngak tum a bangziak a Pathian kalh na hi ua? 11Amau gintak bang mah in eite'n leng Toupa Jesu hehpihna ziak a hotdam ding hi in i kigingta ngal ua,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 15: 12Barnabas leh Paul in, amaute zang a Pathian in Zentelte lak a chiamtehna leh thillamdang ahih thu agen lai un mipite'n ngaikhia in adai sipsip uhi. 13Huchi a mipite adaih sipsip zoh un Jakob in adawng a, “Unaute aw, ka thu ngaikhia un, chi in agen sam hi. 14Simeon in, Pathian in amah min pu ding leh alak ua kipan mite lakhe ding in Zentelte aveh tungthu agenta hi. 15Zentel Gingtute Leh Mosi Dan 16Huai khit chiang in ka kik nawn ding a, David biakbuk chimsia ka bawl nawn ding a, asiatna lai ka puah ding a, ka tungding nawn ding. 17Midang akhosuaksunte leh ka min pu Zentelte ka min kikoppihte'n, Toupa azonna ding un huai thilte tengteng ahihta hi,” chi in. 18“Khovel siamchil a kipan hiai thu theisakpa Toupa'n achi,” chih gelh ahi. 19“Huaiziak in Zentelte lak a Pathian lam ngate hihgim kei ni chih ka thusawm ahi. 20Milim biakna in abuahsak thilsiang lou, kingaihna nin, sa heklup leh sisan nek atawpsanna ding un akiang uah laigelh zaw lehang, ka chi pen hi. 21Mosi Dan lah nidanglai a kipan kho teng ah athu tangkoupih ahih ban ah sinagog peuh ah Sabbath niteng in athu sim ahi,” achi hi.Jerusalem Khawmpi Thutanna 22Huan sawltakte, upate, saptuam tengteng toh, apawl ua mitel, Paul leh Barnabas kiang ah Antiok a hohsak hoih asa ua; atelte uh min Judas, Barnabas achih uh leh Silas ahi ua, huai mite unaute lak a heutu deuhte ahi uhi. 23Hichibang in agelh ua, akhut uah akhak uh:“Sawltakte leh unaute lak a upate'n Antiok khua, Siria gam leh Silisia gam a Zentel unaute chibai abuk uhi.

NASEPTE 15: 24Ka pawl lak ua mi kuate hiam in noute kiang a thu gen in, zeksum ding leh Mosi Dan zui ding in ahon hihbuai ua, na lungsim uh ahon mangbangsak uh chih ka za ua, amaute hiai thu gen ding in ka sawl kei uhi. 25Huaiziak in thukhat sat a ka kikhop un, ka deihtak uh Barnabas leh Paul, 26Toupa Jesu Khrist min ziak a sih khawk saloute toh, mitelte na kiang ua hon sawl hoih ka sa uhi. 27Huchi in Judas leh Silas ka hon sawl uhi, amau leng hiai thu mah kam in ahon hilh ding uhi. 28Hiai thu poimohte ka gelhte uh chih louh ngal Kha Siangthou leh koute'n puakgik tuan na tung uah bangmah nga kei le ung hoih ka sa uhi. 29Milim biakna sa nek, sa sisan nek leh kingaih tawpsan le uchin ka chi uhi; hiaite na tawp uleh nou a ding in ahoih ding hi. Damtak in om un,” chi in.Zentel Gingtute Kiang A Laikhak 30Huchi in asawl un akuan ua, Antiok khua atungsuk ua; mipi asamkhawm ua, lai apia uhi. 31Huan asim khit un lungmuanna thu ziak in akipak mahmahta uhi. 32Judas leh Silas in, zawlnei leng ahi ua, thu tampi in unaute akhamuan ua, ahihkip uhi. 33Huan huai a sawt khop a-om nung un amau sawltakte kiang apai nawn ding in, unaute'n khamuangtak in apawtsak nawnta uhi. 34Bang teng hileh Silas in bel akiang ua om takdih hoih asa hi. 35Paul leh Barnabas bel midang tampite toh Antiok ah Toupa thuhilh leh gen in a-om nilouh uhi.Paul Leh Barnabas Kikhenna 36Huan ni bangzah hiam nung in Paul in Barnabas kiang ah, “Kho teng a Toupa thu i genna peuh a unau omte va veh nawn in, a-omdan uh va en lehang,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 15: 37Barnabas in Johan, Marka achih uh, akiang ua tonpih atum hi. 38Himahleh Paul in bel, ama'n Pamphilia gam a amaute kiksan a, nasepna a akiang ua ahoh louh ziak in tonpih hoih asa kei hi. 39Huchi in nakpi in akiselta ua, huan akikhen ua Barnabas in Marka atonpih a, Kupra tuikulh lam ah long in apaita hi. 40Paul in Silas atel a, unaute'n Toupa hehpihna akepsak nung un apaikheta uhi. 41Huan saptuam pawlte hihkip zel in Siria leh Silisia gam atawnsuak uhi.

NASEPTE 16: 1Huchi in Darbi khua leh Listra ah leng ahoh a; huai ah nungzui khat amin Timothi a-om hi. Amah gingta Juda numei tapa, apa bel Grik ahi; 2Listra leh Ikoniam khua a unau omte'n amah aphat mahmah uhi. 3Paul in akiang a hoh sam ding in adeih a; huchi in huai a Juda omte ziak in zek asumsak a, apa Grik ahi chih lah athei vek ngal ua. 4Kho teng a apai kawm un Jerusalem a sawltak leh Upa omte vaihawm zui ding in unaute kiang ah thupiak zuih ding ape zel uhi. 5Huchi in ginna ah saptuam pawlte akipta ua, niteng in akhang deuhdeuh uhi.Masidonia Sapna 6Huan Kha Siangthou in Asia gam a thugen akham ziak in Phrigia leh Galatia gam a tawnsuakta uhi. 7Misia gam ahong tun nung un, Bithinia gam lut atum ua; himahleh Jesu Kha in aphal kei hi. 8Huchi in Misia gam tawn in Troas ah ahohsukta uhi. 9Zan in Paul in mengmu bang in Masidonia gam a mi khat dingh a, “Masidonia gam ah hong galkai inla, hong huh in,” chi a thumthum in amu hi. 10Huan huai mengmuhna aneih khit in akiang ua tanchinhoih gen ding in Pathian in hon sam ahi, chih kichiantak a thei in, Masidonia gam ah hoh ka tum pah uhi.Philippi A Lidia Pianthakna 11Huan Troas a kipan long in ka pawt ua, tangtak in Samothrasi ah ka pai ua, azing in Neapoli ah ka pai nawn uh; 12huai a kipan in Phillippi ah ka pai ua, huai khua tuh Masidonia gam a khua khat Rome a mipemte khua ahi a, huai uk a kho poimohpen ahi. Huai khua ah ni tamsim ka tamta uhi. 13Huan Sabbath ni in kulh kongpi polam lui gei ah, thumna mun hi a ka gintakna uah ka hoh ua;

NASEPTE 16: huan ka tu ua, numei hong paikhawmte kiang ah thu ka gen uhi. 14Huan amin Lidia, puan sandup zuak, Thiatira khomi, Pathian bia numei khat in ka thu uh aza a; huan Paul thugen zui ding in Toupa'n alungtang ahonsak hi. 15Amah leh a-inkuanpihte'n baptisma atan khit un, “Toupa a ginom a na hon seh uleh ka inn ah hong tung un,” chi in ahon ngen a, ahon khou hi.Philippi Suangkul Sung Ah 16Timothi In Paul Leh Silas Azui 17Huai mi in Paul leh kou ahon zui a, “Hiai mite, hotdamna lampi nou hon hilhte, tungnungpen Pathian sikha ahi uh,” chi in akikou hi. 18Huchibang in ni tampi ahih hi. Huchi in Paul alungkimta kei a, akihei a dawi kiang ah, “Jesu Khrist min in asung a kipan pawt thu ka hon pia,” achi hi. Huchi in ahong pawtkhe pah hi. 19Huan apute'n asummuhna uh amang chih atheihtak un, Paul leh Silas aman ua, heutute ma ah dawr mun ah akailut uhi. 20Huchi in vaihawmte kiang ah api ua, “Hiai mite Judate ahi uh, ka khua uh ahihbuai mahmah uhi. 21Rome mite a dia kipahpih huai lou leh zuih siangloute chindan agengen uh,” achi uhi. 22Huchi in mipite sawltakte sual ding in ahong dingkhia ua, vaihawmte'n apuan uh asahkeksak ua, chiang a sat ding in thu apia uhi. 23Huan tamveipi asat khit un suangkul ah akhum ua, avengpa kiang ah bittak a ven ding, achi bikbek uhi. 24Huchi tel a thu apiak ziak un ama'n tanna sungnung ah akhum a, akhe uh singkol abunsak hi. 25Himahleh zan lai in, Pathian kiang ah Paul leh Silas athum ua, la asa ua, hentate'n angaikhia uhi. 26Thakhat in zin nakpitak in ahong ling a, huchi in suangkul suangphumte tan in alingsak a, kongkhak tengteng akihong pah a, saltang chih kolbutte akiphel vekta hi.

NASEPTE 16: 27Huan asuangkul vengpa ihmu ahong halh a, suangkul kongkhakte kihong in amu a, hentate taimang uh asa a, anamsau adokkhia a, kithah atum hi. 28Himahleh aw ngaihtak in Paul akikou a, “Bangmah kichih ke'n, ka vek un hiai ah ka om lai uh,” achi hi. 29Huan suangkul vengpa'n khawnvakte azong a, asung a tawmlut in, ling kawm in Paul leh Silas ma ah abokkhup hi. 30Amaute apikhia a, “Pute aw, hotdam a ka omna ding in bang ahia ka hih ding?” achi hi. 31Huan amau, “Toupa Jesu ging inla, huchi in hotdam in na om ding, nang leh na inkuanpihte toh,” achi uhi. 32Amah leh a-inn a om teng kiang ah Toupa thu agen uhi. 33Huai zan lai mah in apikhia a, asatna golhte uh asilsiangsak a; amah leh a-inkuanpihte tengteng in baptisma atang uhi. 34A-inn ah apitou a nek ding alui a, Pathian agintak ziak un, amah leh a-inkuanpihte, akipak mahmah uhi. 35Khua ahong vak in vaihawmte'n, mimante sawl in, “Huai mite khah in,” achi uhi. 36Suangkul vengpa'n, Paul kiang ah athu uh ahilh a, “Vaihawmte'n nou khah ding in mi ahon sawl uh; huaiziak in tu'n hong pawt unla, khamuangtak in paita un,” achi hi. 37Himahleh Paul in akiang uah, “Rome khomi ka hi ngal ua, ka siamna uleh siamlouhna uh thei lou in vantang mitmuh in na hon sat ua, suangkul ah na hon khum ua; tua aguk a hon khah maw na hon sawm uh? Hilou! Amau mahmah hong uhenla, hong pikhia uhen,” achi hi. 38Huchi in mimante'n huai thute vaihawmte kiang ah ahilh uhi. Rome mi ahi uh chih azak un alauta mahmah uhi. 39Va hoh in thupha ava tawi ua, huan apikhia ua, khua pawtsan ding in angen uhi. 40Huan suangkul a kipan apawt ua, Lidia inn ah alut uhi. Unaute amuh un, akhamuan ua, apawtta uhi.

NASEPTE 17: 1Amphipolis khua leh Appolonia khua tawn in, Thessalonika khua atungta ua, huai ah Judate sinagog a-om hi. 2Paul, adan ngeina bang in, akiang uah alut a, Sabbath ni thumvei Laisiangthou a kipan in teltak in asutpih hi. 3Khrist in gimthuak ding him ahihdan leh misi lak a kipan a thounawn ding ahihdan hilhchian in, ahihlang zel hi. “Hiai Jesu, athu ka hon hilh, amah Khrist ahi,” chi in agen behlap hi. 4Huchi in alak ua khenkhat in agingta ua, Pathian limsak Grik mipi tampitak leh numei makai tampi toh Paul leh Silas akithuahpihta uhi. 5Himahleh gingta lou Judate'n ahaza ua; dawr mun a migilou thadah kuate hiam akiang uah atonpih ua, mipi samkhawm in kho pumpi atokbuai ua, Jason inn aluh ua, vantang kiang a pikhiak atum uhi. 6Amau amuh louhtak un Jason leh unau dang kuate hiam kho heutute kiang ah akailut ua, akikou ua, “Khovel tokbuai a lumlette hiai ah ahong uh, 7Jason in ana zintun a; hiai mite'n Kaisar vaihawmna kalh in kumpipa dang khat, amin Jesu a-om,” achi uhi. 8Huan mipi leh kho heutute'n huai thu azak un abuaita uhi. 9Jason leh midangte tatkhiakna ding banghiam ala ua, amau tuh akhahta uhi.Beriah Khua Ah Paul 10Huan unaute'n azanzan in Beriah ah Paul leh Silas apaisak pah ua; huai lai ava tun un Judate sinagog ah alut uhi. 11Huai mite Thessalonika khote sang in ana hoihzaw ua, huchi in lungsim kipaktak in thu apom ua, athugen uh adik leh diklouh theihna ding in niteng in Laisiangthou azong zel uhi. 12Huchi in huaite mi tampi in agingtata ua; Grik numei zahtakhuai leh pasalte leng tampi mahmah in agingtata uhi. 13Himahleh Thessalonika a Judate'n, Paul in Beriah ah Pathian thu agen chih azaktak un, huai ah leng ava hoh ua, mipite hanthawn in, ahihbuai nawn uhi.

NASEPTE 17: 14Huchi in unaute'n tuipi tan a pai ding in Paul asawlkhia ua, Silas leh Timothi bel huai ah a-om tadih uhi. 15Paul pitute'n Athen khua tan in api ua; Silas leh Timothi kintak a akiang a hong pai ding thupiak toh apaikikta uhi.Athen Khua Ah Paul 16Huan Paul in Athen a amau ana ngak lai in, huai khua milimte a dim in amu a, alungtang in na asa mahmah hi. 17Thessalonika Khua Ah Paul 18Huan Epikuria mi leh Stoik mi lak a mipil kuate hiam in leng amah ahong kiselpih uhi. “Hiai mi kamtam in bang ahia gen atup?” achi ua, akhen in, “Jesu thu leh thohnawnna thu agen ziak in gamdang pathiante thugenpa ahih tuak e,” achi uhi. 19Amah alen ua, Areopagus ah api ua, akiang ah, “Hiai sinsakna thak na gengen na hon theisak thei diam? 20Thillamdang banghiam ka bil uah na hon tun ahi; huchi in hiai thil omdan theih ka ut uh,” achi uhi. 21Athen khomi tengteng, huai amikhualte toh, aman peuh ualeh thu thak photphot gen hiam, angaikhe ding in ahunte uh azang zel uhi.Areopagus A Paul Thugen 22Huchi in Areopagus laitak ah Paul adingh a, “Nou Athen a mite aw, bangkim ah sabiak limsakmi na hi uh chih ka thei hi. 23Ka vak kawm a, na biaknate uh ka et lai in, maitam khat, atung a, ‘Theih louh pathian' a ding,’ chi a kigelh ka mu ahi. Huchi in thei lou a na biak uh, huai thu ka hon hilh ahi zaw hi,” achi hi. 24Pathian, khovel leh asung a thil tengteng siampa, lei leh van Toupa ahih ziak in khut a lam inn peuh ah a-om kei hi.

NASEPTE 17: 25Thil tasam bang in mihing khut a nna sepsak in leng a-om kei, amah mah bangkim kiang a hinna, hatna leh thil tengteng pepa ahi zaw hi. 26Huan leitung maikaih teng a om ding in bul mun khat vek in nam chih asiam a, amau a ding in hunbi asehsak a, tenna ding gamgi akhunsak hi. 27Ama'n hon gamlat kei mahleh mi tengteng in Pathian azon ua, amai amai ua, amuh teiteina ding ua alemgel ahi. 28Noumau laphuahsiam kuate hiam in leng, “Eite leng asuante i hi uh, chi a agen bang un. Amah vang in i hing in i tang in, i om uhi.” 29Huchi in “Pathian suante i hih nung, Pathian zaw dangka-eng hiam, dangka hiam, suang hiam, mihing khutsiam leh suktuah sekte bang ahi chih i gingta ding uh ahi kei. 30Huchi in Pathian in i theih louh hun lai khawng akitheihmohbawl a; himahleh, tu'n ah zaw gam chih a mi tengteng kisik ding thu apeta, 31Pathian in amiseh zang a dikna a khovel vai ahawm ni ding achiam ziak in; amiseh tungthu amah misi lak a kipan a kaithou in, mi tengteng kiang ah atheisakta hi,” achi hi. 32Huan misi thohnawnna thu azaktak un, akhen in anuihsan ua; akhen in, “Hiai thu na kiang ah ka ngaikhe nawn ding uh,” achi uhi. 33Huchi in Paul tuh alak ua kipan apawtta hi. 34Himahleh mi kuate hiam amah lam ah apang tinten ua, agingtata ua, huaite lak a khenkhat Areopagus mi Dionisias leh numei khat amin Damaris leh akiang ua midangte toh ahi uhi.

NASEPTE 18: 1Huai thilte zoh in Athen a kipan Paul apawt a, Korinth ah ahohta hi. 2Huan amin Akuila, Juda khat amu a, huai mi Pontus gam a piang ahi a, Klaudias in Judate tengteng Rome a kipan pawt thu apiak ziak a azi Priscilla toh Itali gam a kipan hong tung phet ahi uhi. Huai mite kiang ah Paul atungta hi. 3Anasep uh kibang ahih ziak in amau akikoppih in nna asemkhawm ua; anasep uh puanin bawl ahi. 4Sabbath teng in sinagog ah chitaktak in thu agen zel a, Judate leh Grikte thuzoh atum hi. 5Masidonia gam a kipan Silas leh Timothi ahong tun un, Paul tuh kha phutluih in thu nasem in a-om a, tua Jesu zaw Khrist ahi chih Juda mite kiang ah atheihpih zel hi. 6Himahleh akalh un agensia ua, Paul in apuan asing a, akiang uah, “Na sisan moh uh noumau lutung ah om hen; kei zaw ka hul ahi; tuban Zentelte kiang ah ka paita ding,” achi hi. 7Huan huai a kipan apai a, amin Titas Justas mi khat inn ah alut a, huai mi'n Pathian abe zel hi, a-inn leng sinagog toh kizom ahi. 8Huan Krispus pa sinagog heutu in a-inkuanpihte tengteng toh Toupa agingta a, Korinth a mi tampi'n leng za in agingta ua, baptisma atang uhi. 9Zan in Toupa'n Paul kiang ah mengmu bang in, “Lau ke'nla, dai lou in thu gen zel in; 10kei na kiang ah ka om akei hiam, sihna ding in kuamah in na tung ah khut akha kei ding uhi; hiai khua ah mi tampi ka nei ngal a,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 18: 11Huan huai ah alak uah Pathian thu hilh in kum khat leh kha guk a-omta hi.Gallio Leh Paul 12Huan Akaia gam-ukpa Gallio ahih lai in Judate'n kituak in Paul kalh in buaina abawl ua, vaihawmna tutphah ma ah api uhi. 13“Huai mi'n dan lou bang in a Pathian be ding in mi athuzoh,” achi uhi. 14Paul in adawn dekleh Gallio in, Judate kiang ah, “Judate aw, hiai thil diklou thu hiam, thilhihkhelh thu hiam bek hileh, pel lou in ka hon awlmoh ding hi. 15Himahleh thumalte leh minte, noumau dan thu lel zaw noumau kingaihtuah zaw un; ke'n zaw huchibang thu ngaihtuah ka ut kei,” achi hi. 16Huan vaihawmna tutphah a kipan in amau adelhkheta hi. 17Huan Grik mi tengteng in sinagog heutu Sostheni aman ua, vaihawmna tutphah ma ah avua uhi. Gallio in athilhih uh khawk asa kei hi.Siria Antiok A Kik Nawnna 18Korinth Khua Ah Paul 19Huan Ephesa atung ua, huai ah amau anusia a; himahleh amah kia sinagog ah alut a, Judate kiang ah chitaktak in thu asutpih hi. 20Huan sawt deuh taam ding in akhou ua, himahleh ama'n lem asa kei a, 21“Pathian in aphalleh na kiang uah ka hong nawn ding,” chi in kampha in akhen a, Ephesa a kipan long in apaita hi. 22Huan Kaisaria ah ahong kai a, Jerusalem ah ahohtou a, saptuamte chibai buk in, Antiok ah ahohsukta hi. 23Huan huai a sawt kuam a-om nung in apai nawn a, nungzuite tengteng hihhat in Galatia gam leh Phrigia gam atawnsuak vek hi.Ephesa Ah Apollos 24Huan Juda mi khat, amin Apollos, Aleksandria a piang, mipiltak, Ephesa ah ahohsuk a; ama'n Laisiangthou anak theih mahmah hi. 25Hiai mi'n Toupa Lampi thu zilsa ahi a, lungsim a phatuamngaitak ahih ziak in Toupa thu ahilh zel hi, Johan baptisma thu kia athei hi.

NASEPTE 18: 26Sinagog ah hangsantak in thu agen hi. Huchi in Priscilla leh Akuila in athugen azak un, a-inn uah leh akiang ah Pathian Lampi thu kichian sem in ahilhchianta uhi. 27Ama'n Akhaia gam a paikai atuptak in unaute'n ahanthawn ua, amah ana kipahpihna ding un nungzuite kiang ah lai agelhsak uhi. Huan atun in, Pathian hehpihna ziak a gingtate nakpitak in apanpih hi. 28Vantang theih in Judate nakpitak in aseldong a, Laisiangthou zang in tua Jesu zaw Khrist ahi ngei chih atheisak hi.

NASEPTE 19: 1Korinth a Apollos a-om kal in Paul in saklam gamte tawnsuak masa kawm in, Ephesa khua atung a, huai ah nungzui kuate hiam amu hi. 2Ama'n akiang uah, “Na gintak chil ua pan Kha Siangthou na tang uhia?” achi hi. Amaute'n akiang ah, “Tang lou, Kha Siangthou a-om chih zak leng ka za kei uh,” achi uhi. 3Ama'n, “Bang baptisma ahia na tan uh?” achi hi. Amau, “Johan baptisma,” achi uhi. 4Huan Paul in, “Johan in zaw anung a hong paipa Jesu gingta ding a mite hilh in kisikna baptisma in abaptis zel ahi,” achi hi. 5Huan huai thu azaktak un Toupa Jesu min in baptisma atang uhi. 6Paul in atung uah akhut akoih a, Kha Siangthou atung uah ahong tungta hi. Huchi in pautuamte in thu agen ua; Pathian thu leng ahilhta uhi. 7Avek un piching sawm-le-nih vel ahi uhi.Ephesa Khua A Paul Nasep 8Huan sinagog ah Paul alut zel a, kha thum phial hangsantak in thu agen a, Pathian lalgam thu ahihna sutpih in, mi athuzoh zel hi. 9Himahleh akhen achihhak ua, agingta nuam kei uh, mipi ma a Lampi agensiattak un, ama'n amaute apaisan a, nungzuite apituam a, niteng in kisinsakna mun Tairanas ah thu hilh in asutpih zel hi. 10Huchibang ngen in kum nih phial ahih a; huchi in Asia gam a om tengteng, Judate leh Grikte'n leng Toupa thu azata uhi. 11Pathian in Paul khut in thillamdang taktak ahihsak hi. 12Huchi in ataksa sukha kinulna puan neu, puan tungsilh damloute kiang ah ahon tawi ua, anatnate uh adam zel hi, asung ua kipan dawite leng apawt uhi.

NASEPTE 19: 13Huan Juda mi dawi hawlkhia chi a vakvai dawithu thei kuate hiam in, “Paul in athu tangkoupih Jesu Khrist min in ka hon vau hi, chi in dawimatte tung ah Toupa Jesu min alou uhi.”Skeva Tate 14Juda mi siampu lianpen khat Skeva in huchibang hih tapa sagih anei hi. 15Himahleh dawi in akiang uah, “Jesu ka gingta, Paul leng ka thei, nou kuate na hi ua?” chi in adawng hi. 16Huan dawipai in aboh a, avek un azou a, anuaisiahta hi; huchi in huai mipa inn a kipan vuaktang leh liam in ataikheta uhi. 17Huchi in Ephesa a om tengteng, Judate leh Grikte kiang ah huai mi thu athangta hi. Huan avek un alau ua, Toupa Jesu min alianta hi. 18Huan agingtate leng akhen tampi ahong ua, athilhihkhelhte uh thupha atawi ua, akipulak uhi. 19Ephesa Khua A Johan Nungzuite 20Huchi lawmlawm a thupi in Toupa thu adalh a, azou zel hi.Ephesa Khua A Buaina 21Huan huai khit in, Paul in Masidonia gam leh Akhaia gam tawtsuak takdih a, Jerusalem a hoh atum hi. “Huai a ka hoh khit chiang in Rome khua ka sik sam ding,” achi hi. 22Huchi in amah nasepsakte nih Timothi leh Erastas, Masidonia gam ah apaisak phot a, amah bel Asia gam ah ataam tadih hi. 23Huai lai in Lampi ziak in mi buai petmah in abuaita uhi. 24Mi khat amin Demetrias, dangkasik sek a Diana milim bawlpa a-om a, khutsiamte a ding in kilohna tampi apia hi. 25Hiai mi in amaute asamkhawm a, anasep bang uh semte toh; huan akiang uah, “Pute aw, hiai nasepna i hauhna uh ahi chih na thei uhi.

NASEPTE 19: 26Hiai Ephesa khua kia hilou in, Asia gam kho kim teng phial ah leng, Paul in khut a bawl pathiante, Pathian ahi kei uh chi in mi tampi thuzoh in, akiheisak khinta chih noumau ngei in na mu un na za uhi. 27Huchi in i nekzonna un athuak ding chih alauhuai kia hilou in, pathiannu thupitak Diana tempul leng ahon ngaineu ding uh. Asia gam a mi tengteng leh khovel a mi'n abiak zel uh, athupipi toh, ahong neu ding chih alauhuai hi,” achi hi. 28Huai thu azaktak un, aheh mahmah ua, “Ephesa a Diana thupitak ahi,” chi in akikou uhi. 29Huchi in akhua in apumbuai vekta ua, Gaias leh Aristarkhas, Masidonia gam a mi, Paul nungzuite, aman ua, kituaktak in etnop inn ah ataipih kheukhou uhi. 30Paul in mipi lak a lut atupleh nungzuite'n aphal kei uhi. 31Asia gam a heutupente lak a khenkhat kuate hiam Paul lawmte ahi ua, akiang ah mi asawl ua, etnop inn ah lut teitei lou ding in akun uhi. 32Omkhawmte abuai ua, mi tamzaw in akikhopna san uh leng athei kei uh, khenkhat thukhat in akikou ua, khenkhat thudang in akikou uhi. 33Mipi lak a mi khenkhat in Alexander, asiamna thu gendan ding ahilhta ua, Judate'n amah malam ah asawnphei uhi. Huan Alexander in akhut in azap a, mi tengteng kiang ah asiamna thu gen atum hi. 34Himahleh amah Juda mi ahi chih atheihtak un, dakkal nih sung aw kituaktak in, “Ephesate Diana athupi hi,” chi ngen in akikou uhi. 35Huan khosung laigelhpa'n mipi asukdaih khit in, “Ephesa a mite aw, Diana thupitak tempul kemtu leh van a kipan a milim kia, Ephesa khuate a kem na hi uh chih, kua ahia thei lou om?

NASEPTE 19: 36Huchi in hiai thu sel vual ahih louh nung in, na dai dide ding uh ahi, thunung veng lou in bangmah na hih ding uh ahi kei hi. 37Hiai mi hiai mun a na hon pite uh, tempul lokmi ahi kei ua, i pathiannu gensete leng ahi kei uh. 38Huchi in Demetrias leh alawm khutsiamte'n leng kua lak ah leng thubuai aneih uleh, thubuai genna innte honsa in a-om vele, gam ukpate leng a-om uhi; kihektuah uhen. 39Thil dang buaina nei him na hih uleh, kikhopna ngeina ah alem ding uh. 40Tuni a thu vengvung ziak in salh lauhuai in i omta uh, athu om ngel lou buaina bawl a ngoh theih i hi ngal ua, hiai kikhopna san bangmah gen ding thei lou ding i kei uhiam,” achi hi. 41Huan huchibang thu agen khit in omkhawm heutute akikhenzak sakta hi.

NASEPTE 20: 1Buaina aven nung in, Paul in nungzuite asamsak a, ahanthawn a, kampha in akha a, Masidonia gam a pai ding in apawtta hi. 2Thu tampi anungzuite hanthawn in huai gam atawnsuak a, Grikte gam atungta hi. 3Huan huai ah kha thum ataam hi. Siria gam a long a azin dek kuan in, Judate'n amah thah asawm ziak un, Masidonia gam tawn a kilehkik atum zawta hi. 4Asia gam tan a amah zuite, Beriah khomi Pirhas tapa Sopater, Thessalonika a pan Aristarkhas leh Sekundas, Darbe khomi, Gaias, Timothi leh Asia gam a Taikikas leh Trophimaste ahi uh. 5Huaite'n ka ma uh akai ua, Troas ah hon na ngak uhi. 6Kou bel Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh ni abei in Philippi a kipan long in ka pawt ua, ni nga nung in Troas ah akiang uh ka tung uhi; huai ah ni sagih ka taam uhi.Tangval Eutikas Hihdamna 7Huan nipikal a ani masapen in, tanghou balkham ding a ka kikhop lai un, Paul in akiang uah thu agen hi; ama'n azingchiang a pai atup ziak in zankim tan hial thu agen hi. 8Huan indan tungnung, ka omkhawmna uah khawnvak tampi a-om hi. 9Huan amin Eutikas tangval khat tohlet ah atu a, nakpitak in ana ihmu hi. Huan Paul in thu agen sawt tak ziak in ama'n a-ihmut suak a thuakzou nawnta kei a, insawng thumna a kipan in aketa a, asisa in aphong uhi. 10Himahleh Paul akumsuk a, bohkhum in a-angpom a, “Lunglau kei un, alaitat kei lai hi,” achi hi. 11Huan Paul akahtou nawn a, tanghou balkham in an ane a, khovak pha in akiang uah thu agen a, huai nung in apaita hi.

NASEPTE 20: 12Huan valnoupa dam in api ua, akhamuang petmah uhi.Miletas A Zinna 13Huan koute Assos khua zuan in long in ka na pai masa ua, long ah Paul tuansak ka tum uhi; ama'n khe a paina lam tot atup ziak in huchibang tuh amah geldan ahi. 14Huan Assos a ahon tuah chiang in, long ah ka tuangsakta ua, Mitilini khua ka tung uhi. 15Huan huai a kipan in long in ka pai nawn ua, azing in Khios tuikulh gal ka tung ua; huan azing nawn in Samo tuikulh ka tung ua, Troguliam ah ka giak uhi. Azing nawn in Miletas khua ka tung nawn uhi. 16Huan Paul in Asia gam a om sawt lou a, long a Ephesa khua khen atupsa him ahi a, ahihtheihleh Jerusalem a Pentikost ni huam tum in akinpai hi.Ephesa Saptuam Upate Kiang A Paul Thu Nanung 17Huan Miletas a kipan in Ephesa ah mi asawl a, akiang ah saptuam upate asamsak hi. 18Huan akiang ahong tun un, ama'n akiang uah, Asia gam ka tot chil ni a kipan na kiang ua ka om sung teng in ka omdan na thei uhi. 19Thunuailutpen kawm leh Judate'n hon thah asawm ziak ua khitui kai leh thil haksa ka tung a tungte thuak kawm in Toupa nna ka sem hi. 20Masidonia Leh Grik Gam Zinna 21Judate leh Grikte kiang ah leng Pathian lam a kisikna thu leh i Toupa Jesu Khrist lam a ginna thu ka theisak zel hi. 22Ngai un, tu in Kha in hon sawl teitei a ka theih ziak in, Jerusalem a hoh dia kisa ka hi, huai ah ka tung a thil hong tung ding bangmah ka thei kei; 23Kha Siangthou in, henna leh haksatna in nang ahon dawn hi, chi in kho teng ah ahon hilh zel hi, tuate kia ka theih ahi.

NASEPTE 20: 24Himahleh ka kitaitehna lam ka maban tun ding leh Pathian hehpihna tanchinhoih a dia theihpihtu a pang ding a Toupa Jesu kiang a huai nasepna ka muh pen sem khin phot leng, ka hinna leng khiaklah tham in ka sep kei hi. 25“Huan thei un, noute tengteng, Pathian lalgam thu tangkoupih a ka vakvaknate'n ka mel na mu nawnta kei ding uh chih ka thei hi. 26Huaiziak in mi tengteng sisan ah ka hul ahi chih tuni in ka hon theisak hi. 27Pathian vaihawm tengteng avek in na kiang uah iim ka nei kei hi. 28Pathian saptuamte, ama sisan a aleite, vak ding in noumau leh na heute tengteng uh tung ah pilvang un, Kha Siangthou in atung uah nou heutu in ahon bawl hi. 29Ka pai nung in na lak uah ngehangte ahong lut ding ua, pawlte ahawi kei ding uh chih ka thei hi. 30Noumau lak a mi nangawn, nungzui pawlte amau lam a kaimang ding in thu tuam gen na hong om ding uh. 31Huaiziak in limsak unla; kum thum hilhial khitui ke kawm a, sun leh zan a michih taihilh ka tawplouhdan, theigige un. 32“Tu in noute Pathian leh ahehpihna ah ka hon kemsak hi, huai in noute ahon bawllian thei a, mi lungsim siangthoute kiang ah goutan ahon neisak thei lai hi. 33Kuamah dangka, dangka-eng leh puansilh ka eng ngei kei. 34Hiai khutte'n keimah leh ka lawmte taksap asepkhiak zeldan, noumau ngei in na thei uhi. 35Bangkim ka hih peuhmah na chin ding ua ka hih ahi, huchibang a semgim leh Toupa Jesu thu theigige kawm in mihatloute na panpih ding uh ahi; amah mah in, ‘Lak sang in piak in lukhawng anei zaw’ achih,” achi hi. 36Huai thu agen khit in akhukdin a, avek un athum uhi. 37Huan avek un akap huphup ua, Paul ngawng ah kawi in atawp uhi. 38Amel amuh nawn tak louh ding thu agen alungkhamna pen uh ahi. Huan long pha in amah ava kha uhi.

NASEPTE 21: 1Huan hichi ahong hi a, amaute toh ka kikhen ua, long in ka pawt ua, huai khit in tangtak in Kos tuikulh ka tung ua, azing in Rhodes tuikulh ka tung nawn ua, huai a kipan in ka pai zel ua, Patara khua ka tung uhi. 2Phoinisia gam pai ding long khat ka mu ua, ka tuang ua, ka pai zel uhi. 3Huan Kupra tuikulh ka mu ua, veilam pang ah ka kheng ua, Siria gam ah ka pai zel ua, Tair ah long van nawnkhiak ding a-om man in ka kum phot uhi. 4Nungzuite ka zongkhia ua, huai ah ni sagih ka taam uhi; huan Kha theihsak in Paul kiang ah, Jerusalem a hohtou lou ding in achi uhi. 5Himahleh huai nite khit in ka pawt ua ka paita ua, unaute'n avek un, azi atate uh toh khopi pua dong ahong kha ua; tuipi piau ah ka khukdin ua, ka thum uhi. 6Huan mangpha ka kikhak zoh un, long ah ka tuang ua, amau bel a-inn uah apai nawnta uhi.Kaisaria Ah 7Tair a kipan long a ka pai khit un Ptolemais khua ka tung ua, unaute chibai ka buk uhi, akiang uah ni khat ka nituang uhi. 8Huan azing in ka pawt ua Kaisaria khua ka tung ua huai ah tanchinhoih genpa, Philip inn ah ka lut ua, amah ahihleh sagihte lak a khat ahi a, akiang ah ka taam uhi. 9Huai mi'n, amau zawlnei bang a thu agen zel nungak siangthou ngen, tanu li anei hi. 10Huai ah ni tampi ka taam ua, huai lai in Judia gam a kipan amin Agabas kichi zawlnei khat ahong suk hi.

NASEPTE 21: 11Ka kiang uah ahong a, Paul kawnggak ala a, akhete, akhutte amah in akigak a, “Jerusalem a Judate'n hichibang in hiai kawnggak neipa agak ding ua, Zentelte khut ah ape lai ding uh, Kha Siangthou in achi,” achi hi. 12Huan huai thu ka zaktak un, kou leh huai khua a mite'n Jerusalem a Paul hoh lou ding in ka khou chiat uhi. 13Himahleh Paul in adawng a, “Bangchi na hi ua, na kahkah ua, na hon khasiatsak uh? Toupa Jesu min ziak in Jerusalem a hen kia hilou in, sih leng ngap ka hi,” achi hi. 14Huan khouhzoh vual ahih louhtak in, ka tawpta ua, “Toupa thuthu hi hen aw,” ka chi uhi.Jerusalem Ah Paul 15Huai nung in ka van uh ka bawl ua, Jerusalem ah ka hohtou uhi. 16Kaisaria a mi nungzuite kuate hiam, ka kiang uah apai ua, amau, amin Mnason inn, nungzui masa pawl Kupra tuikulh a mi khat ka tunna dingpa uh api sam uhi. 17Huan Jerusalem khua ka tun un unaute'n nuamtak in hon na kipahpih uhi. 18Azing in Paul toh Jakob kiang ah ka lut ua; huai ah saptuam upate tengteng leng a-om uhi. 19Paul in amau chibai abuk khit in, anasepna zang a Pathian in Zentelte lak a thil ahihsak peuhmah avek in agen hi. 20Unaute'n huai thu azak un Pathian apahtawi uh; huan Paul kiang ah, “Unaupa, Judate lak a gingtami tamdan na mu a; avek un dan lam ah phatuam angai lai uhi. 21Miletas A Kipan Tair Zinna 23Huaiziak in na kiang a ka gen bang un hih in; thuchiam nei pasal li ka kiang uah a-om uhi. 24Huai mite pi in la, akiang uah kisiangsak sam inla, asam uh amettheihna ding un amau a ding in sum seng in;

NASEPTE 21: huchi in mi tengteng in mi kam a na thu azak teng uh gen tham ahi kei chih athei ding ua, nangmah mah dan zui in kichiantak in na om zaw chih athei ding uhi. 25Zentelte lak a gingtate thu zaw, milim biakna thil nek lam ah, sa sisan nek thu ah, sa heklup nek lam ah, kingaih lam a kipan in akihulsak ding uh ahi, chi in ka gen ua, ka gelhta uhi,” achi uhi. 26Huan azing in Paul in pasalte atonpih a, amau toh akisiangsak a, tempul ah alut a, amaute a ding a kithoihna apiaksak chiat masiah kisiansakna ni anei phot ding uh chih, siampu kiang ah ahilh hi.Tempul Ah Paul Mat In A-om 27Kisiansuahna ni sagih achin dektak in Asia gam a Judate'n tempul ah Paul amu ua, mipi tengteng atokthou ua, amah aman ua, kikou in, 28“Israel mite aw, hong huh un! Hiai mi, gam teng a mi tengteng kiang a Juda mite dante, hiai mun siangthou gensepa ahi; huai lou leng, tempul ah Grik mite alutpih a, hiai in siangthou ahihbuah khin,” achi uhi. 29Huai ma in khua ah Ephesa a mi Trophimas akiang ah amu ua, Paul in huai mi tempul ah alutpih agingta uhi. 30Huan akhua in akising kheukhou ua, mite ataikhawm ua; Paul aman ua, tempul a kipan akaikhia ua; kongkhakte akhak pah ngal uhi. 31Amah hihlup atup laitak un Jerusalem a mi tengteng abuai uh chih sepaih pawl heutu lianpen kiang atungtou hi. 32Ama'n sepaihte leh sepaih za heutute api pah a, akiang uah ataisuk uhi; heutu lianpen leh sepaihte amuhtak un Paul vuak atawpta uhi. 33Sepaih heutu lianpen in ahong naih a, Paul alen a, khainiang nih butsak ding thu apia a; kua ahia ahih a, bang ahia ahih adong hi.

NASEPTE 21: 34Mipite akhen thu khat in akikou ua, akhen thudang a akikou ziak un, buaina ziak diktak athei kei a, sepaihte giahbuk a pilut thu apia hi. 35Paul kalbi atun lai in mipi ahiamgam ziak un sepaihte'n amah apumzawn uhi. 36Mi tengteng in, “Hihmangthang un,” chi akikou in, azui uhi.Paul In Asiamna Thu Agen 37Sepaihte giahbuk sung a apilut dek lai un Paul in, sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah, “Na kiang ah thu kam khat ka gen thei diam?” achi hi. 38Huan ama'n, “Grik pau na thei maw? Tuma a mite hanthawn a, gamdai mun a mihing sangli suam a thatte heutupa Aigupta mi na hi kei maw?” achi hi. 39Paul in, “Silisia gam a Tarsas a om Juda mi ka hi, khopi neu liai lou khat khua-le-tui ka hi; hon hehpih inla, mi tengteng kiang ah thu hon gensak in,” achi hi. 40Huan alemsaktak in kalbi ah Paul adingh a, mi tengteng daihna ding in akhut avan a; huan adaih duamtak un Hebru pau in akiang uah thu agen hi.

NASEPTE 22: 22 1“Unaute aw, pate aw, tu'n ah na kiang uah ka siamna thu ka hon hilh ding hi, ngaikhia un,” achi hi. 2Huan Hebru pau in akiang uah thu agen chih azaktak un, adai nawn sem ua; huan ama'n, 3“Juda mi ka hi a, Silisia gam a Tarsas a piang ka hi. Himahleh hiai khua ah Gamaliel khebul a zil a khanglian ka hi, i pipute Dan omdan kimtak zil zel a om ka hi a, tuni a noumau tengteng bang in Pathian a ding a phatuam na ngai sam ka hi. 4Hiai Lampi a mite that hial khop in ka sawi zel a, numei pasal ka hen a, suangkul ah ka khumsak hi. 5Siampu lianpen leh upate tengteng in leng huai thu hon theihpih ua, amau a kipan in leng unaute piak ding in lai ka mu hi, huan Damaskas a omte sawi ding leh hensa a Jerusalem a pi ding in ka hoh hi.Paul Pianthakna Thu(Nas 9.1-19; 26.12-18) 6“Huan hichi ahong hi a, ka pai a Damaskas kho kiang ka tun in, sun lai in, thakhat in van a kipan vak thupitak ka kim ah ahong vak hi. 7Huan lei ah ka puk a, ka kiang ah, ‘Saul, Saul, nang bang achia hon sawi?’ chi in aw ka zata hi. 8Huan ke'n, ‘Toupa kua na hia?’ chi in ka dong a. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, Nazaret Jesu na sawi ka hi,” achi hi. 9Ka lawmte'n vak amu ua, hon houpihpa aw aza kei uhi. 10Ke'n, “Toupa, bang ka hih dia?” ka chi a. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, Damaskas ah lut in, thil tengteng na hih ding achih peuhmah ahon hilh ding uh,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 22: 11Huan huai vak thupi ziak in khua ka mutheita kei a, ka lawmte'n khut in ahon kai ua, Damaskas ah ka lutta uhi. 12“Huan mi khat, Ananias Dan lam a Pathian limsak leh huai a Judate tengteng lak a minhoih, 13amah ahong a ka kiang ah ahong dingh a, ‘Unau Saul, mitvakna nei in,’ ahon chi hi. Huaitak in amah ka mutheita hi. 14Ama'n, ‘I pipute Pathian in adeihlam thei ding in ahon deih a, Diktatpa mu a, akamsuak za ding a hon sep ahi, achi hi. 15Na muh leh na zak thu ah mi tengteng kiang ah amah thu theihpihpa na hi ding. 16Huan bangziak a om maimai na hia? Thou inla, Toupa min sam in, baptisma tang inla, na khelhna hihsiang tanla,’ ahon chi hi. 17“Jerusalem a ka pai nawn nung, tempul a ka thum lai in, mengmu bang in ka om hi. 18‘Kin inla, Jerusalem a kipan pawt in; ka tanchin na gen ding apom tuak kei uh,’ ahon chih lai ka mu hi. 19Huan ke'n, ‘Toupa sinagog teng a nang gingta peuhmah hentasak a, ka vuak zeldan athei uhi. 20Huan na thu theihpihpa Stephen sisan asuah lai un kei leng akiang uah ka dingh a, asih ding lem ka na sa a, ahihlumte puante leng ka na kem hi,’ ka chi hi. 21Huan ama'n, ‘Pai in, hiai a kipan in gamlatak a Zentelte kiang ah ka hon sawl ding ahi,’ ahon chita hi,” achi hi.Paul, Rome Mi Ahihna 22Huan huai thutan in angaikhia ua; aw ngaihtak in akikou ua, “Mi hichibang hing tak ahi kei, khovel a kipan hihmangthang un,” achi uhi.

NASEPTE 22: 23Akikou ua apuan uh alem ua, apai ua, leivui avik uhi, 24huchi in sepaih heutu lianpen in Paul sepaihte giahbuk sung a pilut thu apia a, atung ah huchi tel a akikouna uh atheihna ding a soisak kawm a dottel ding in, achi hi. 25Savun khau a alehhensawm khit un, Paul in akiang a dingh sepaih zaheutu kiang ah, “Siam louh tansak louh Rome mi vuak ding chih nang a ding in dan toh kituak ahi hia?” achi hi. 26Sepaih zaheutu in huai azaktak in, sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah ahoh a, “Na thilhih ding ah pilvang dih aw; hiai mi Rome mi ana hi,” achi a, ahilh hi. 27Sepaih heutu lianpen ahong a, akiang ah, “Rome mi na hi maw? Hon hilh in,” achi hi. 28Ama'n, “Hi e,” achi hi. Sepaih heutu lianpen in, “Ke'n hiai khomi hihna sum tampi a ka lei ei ve,” chi in adawng hi. Paul in, “Kei zaw Rome mi a piang him ka hi,” achi hi. 29Huchi in amah dottel tumte'n apaisan pah ngal ua; sepaih heutu lianpen in Rome mi ahi chih atheih in akihta a, ahen ziak in alau hi.Sanhedrin Ma A Paul Thugen 30Azing in Judate'n bangziak a Paul hek ahi uhiam chih theihtel tum in, sepaih heutu lianpen in amah aphel a, siampu liante leh vaihawm tengteng kikhop ding thu apia a, Paul pisuk in, ama uah adingsak hi.

NASEPTE 23: 1Paul in vaihawmte a-en kilkel a, “Unaute aw, tuni tan in Pathian mitmuh a ahoih lam hi a ka theih peuhmah hih in ka om hi,” achi hi. 2Huan siampu lianpen Ananias in, Paul kiang a dinghte kiang ah, akam betsak ding thu apia hi. 3Paul in akiang ah, “Nang baang nuhngou bang lelpa, Pathian in ahon beng zaw ding, nang dan bang a vaihawm ding a tu a, dan lou bang a mi bet ding na chi vial maw?” achi hi. 4Huan akiang a dinghte'n, “Bangziak a Pathian siampu lianpen tai?” achi uhi. 5Paul in, “Unaute aw, siampu lianpen ahi chih ka thei kei a ahi; na chipihte vaihawmte tung ah thuhoih lou gen ke'n, chih gelh ahi ngal a,” achi hi. 6Paul in akhen Saddukaite, akhen Pharisaite ahi uh chih atheih in vaihawmte lak ah akikou a, “Unaute aw, Pharisai ka hi, Pharisai tapa leng ka hi; misi lametna leh thohnawnna thu ah vaihawmte mai a dinsak a om ka hi,” achi hi. 7Huai agentak in, Pharisaite leh Saddukaite ana kisel ua, vaihawmte akilangkhenta uhi. 8Saddukaite'n, misi thohnawnna a-om kei, angelte, khate leng a-om tuan kei, achi ua; Pharisaite'n huaite teng a-om vek chih agen uhi. 9Huai thu in nakpitak in abuaita ua; Pharisaite lam a mi laigelhmite khenkhat adingh ua; asel ua, “Hiai mi bangmah agitlouhna i mu kei uh; kha hiam angel hiam in akiang a thu gen hileh, eite Pathian dou suak ding i hi uh,” achi uhi. 10Huan kituahlouhna lianpi ahong omtak in, sepaih heutu lianpen in Paul abohzan khak uh alau a, sepaihte kiang ah, ava hohsuk a, alak ua kipan giahbuk a va pitouh teitei ding achi hi.

NASEPTE 23: 11Huan azan in, Paul kiang ah Toupa adingh a, “Khamuangtak in om in, Jerusalem a ka thu na theihsak bang in Rome ah leng na theisak ding hi,” achi hi.Paul Thah Sawmna 12Huan khua ahong vaktak in Judate apanghuan ua, Paul athah masiah uh bangmah ne lou dawn lou ding in akichiamta uhi. 13Huai thubawlte sawmli sang a tamzaw ahi uh. 14Amau siampu liante leh upate kiang ah ahoh ua, “Paul ka thah masiah uh bangmah chiam lou ding in ka kichiam uh achi uhi. 15Huaiziak in nou vaihawmte toh athu kichian nawn sem a ngaihtuah tum bang in, na kiang ua pekhe ding in sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah ahem deuh in va gentou un; kou bel na kiangnai uh ahong tun ma a amah that dia mansa ka hi uh,” achi uhi. 16Himahleh Paul sanggamnu tapa in athusawm uh ana za a, giahbuk ah ava lut a, Paul ava hilhta hi. 17Paul in sepaih zaheutu khat asam a, “Hiai tangval sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah pi in, akiang ah thu banghiam gen ding nei ahih tuak,” achi hi. 18Huchi in sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah api a, “Paul, hentapa'n ahon sam a, hiai tangval na kiang a hon pi ding in ahon sawl a, na kiang ah thu banghiam gen ding nei ahih tuak,” achi hi. 19Sepaih heutu lianpen in akhut in alen a, asim in atuam paipih a, “Bang ahia hon hilh ding na neih?” chi in adong hi. 20Ama'n, “Paul tungtang kichian nawn sem a na ngaihtuah ding mah bang in, zingchiah vaihawmte kiang ah pisuk ding in Judate'n hon nget hoih asa chiat uh. 21Himahleh athu uh na gingta ke'n;

NASEPTE 23: alak ua mi sawmli sang a tamzaw in thah asawm ua, huai mite'n amah athah masiah uh bangmah ne lou dawn lou ding in akichiam uh; tu in na thu ngak in mansa in a-om uhi,” achi hi. 22Sepaih lianpen in tangval apaisak a, “Hiai thute na hon theisak chih kuamah hilh ke'n,” achi bikbek hi.Kaisaria Ah Paul Sawl In A-om 23Huan sepaih zaheutu nih asam a, “Zan ihsip hun in Kaisaria kho pha a pai ding in sepaih zanih, sakol tungtuangmi sawmsagih, tei tawimi zanih mansa in koih un, achi hi. 24Huan Paul tuanna ding sakol leng na ngaihtuahsak unla, gam-ukpa Felik kiang ah bittak in tun un,” achi hi. 25Huan hichibang in lai agelh hi. 26“Klaudias Lisias in Felik gam-ukpa hoihpa chibai abuk hi. 27Hiai mi Judate'n amu ua, athah dek lai un akiang uah sepaihte pi in ka hoh a, Rome mi ahi chih ka theih in ka hunkheta hi. 28Huan ahekna uh theih ut in, vaihawmte kiang ah ka pisuk a, 29huchi in adan uh banghiam a hek a om ahi chih ka thei a, himahleh ahekna thu uah sihna leh henna ding bangmah ka thei kei hi. 30Huan Judate'n amah tang uh ahi chih theihsak a ka omtak in, na kiang ah amah ka hon sawl ngal a, amah hekte leng atung a thubuai aneih peuh uh na ma a gen ding in thu leng ka pia hi,” achi hi. 31Huchi in sepaihte'n athupiak bang in Paul azanzan in api ua, Antipatris atunpih uhi. 32Huan azing in sakol tungtuang mite akiang a pai zel ding in anusia ua, amau giahbuk ah akik nawnta uhi. 33Huan amau Kaisaria khua atung ua, gam-ukpa kiang ah lai apia ua, Paul leng ama ah adingsak uhi.Felix Ma Ah Paul 34Gam-ukpa'n asim khit in, Paul omna gam adong hi. Huan Silisia gam a pan ahi chih atheih in, 35“Nang hon hekte ahong tun chiang un na thubuai ka ngaihtuah ding,” achi hi. Herod thukhenna inn a ven ding thu apia hi.

NASEPTE 24: 1Huan ni nga nung in siampu lianpen Ananias ahong tungsuk a, upa kuate hiam toh, amin Tertullas thugen siam khat toh; Paul tung a thubuai gam-ukpa kiang ah agen uhi. 2Paul asapkhiak nung un Tertullas in amah ahek pan a, “Felik hoihpen, nangmah vang a khamuang petpet a ka om ziak un leh na hon kepna ziak a hiai namte a ding a kipuahthakna a-om zel ziak in, 3chik lai peuh in koipeuh ah leng lungkimtak in ka pom gige uhi. 4Akoi abang hitaleh, nang a dia chimtakhuai hih ka ut kei hi, na migitna in thu kam khat ahihleh hon ngaihkhiaksak ding in ka hon ngen hi. 5Hiai mihuathuaipi, khovel a Judate tengteng tokbuaipa leh Nazarit mite pawl a amakaipen khat uh ahih ka thei uhi. 6Tempul hihbuah leng atum a; huaiziak in ka man uhi. 7Ka dan bang ua atung a vaihawm tum zaw hi ung a, himahleh sepaih heutu lianpen Lisias ahong kuan a, thagum suah in ka khut ua kipan alakhia a, atung a thubuai neite na kiang a hong pai ding in thu apia hi. 8Nangmah ngei in amah dongtel in ka hekna tengteng uh na theithei ding hi,” achi hi. 9Huan Judate'n leng huai thu huchibang ahi, chi in apanpih uhi.Felix Leh Drusilla Ma A Paul Thugen 10Huan gam-ukpa'n thugen ding a Paul akhutvantak in, hichi in adawng a, “Ama'n nang kum tampi hiai namte vai hawmsakpa na hi chih ka theih ziak in kipaktak in ka siamna thu ka gen ding ahi. 11Jerusalem a Pathian be ding a ka hohtouh nung ni sawm-le-nih aval nai kei ding chih na na thei ding hi. 12Tempul ah hiam sinagog ah hiam, khua ah leng mi kuahiam ka sel leh mipi ka hanthawn lam amau zong ahon mu kei uh.

NASEPTE 24: 13Tu'n ah leng ahon hekna thu uh na theih in abul asuikhe thei kei ding uh. 14Himahleh hiai thu na kiang ah ka genkhe ding, Dan leh zawlneite thugelh tengteng gingta in, pawl tuam achihte uh Lampi dan bang in ka pipute uh Pathian ka be zel hi. 15Pathian ah lametna nei in, hiai mite'n leng huai agintak sam uh, midiktatte leh diktatloute thohnawnna a-om ding hi. 16Huchi ahih ziak in Pathian leh mihing tung a hihkhial lou ding in sia-le-pha siangtak nei ding in ka kibawl gige hi. 17“Huan kum tampi nung in ka chipihte kiang ah thilpiak ding leh thillat ding hon tawi in ka hong hi. 18Huai thil ka piak lai in, Asia gam a kipan Juda mi khenkhatte'n mipi pang lou leh buaina om lou in, tempul ah kisiangsak in ahon mu uhi. 19Hiai mite'n ka tung a thubuai nei hi le uh na ma ah hong pai in ahong hek khinta ding uhi. 20Ahihkeileh hiai mite ngei in vaihawmte ma a ka din lai in, ka hihkhelh bang ahia amuh uh, gen uhen. 21Alak ua dingh a, ‘Misi thohnawnna thu ah tuni in na ma uah salh in ka om ahi,’ ka chih a hiai thu kam khat ziak houh ahih kei ngalleh, chi in adawng hi.” 22Huan Felik hiai thilte azak a, Lampi thu atheihchet ziak in, “Sepaih heutu lianpen Lisias ahong tunsuk hun chiah na thu uh ka lem ding,” chi in akoih tadih hi. 23Sepaih zaheutu kiang ah, Paul zalentak leh alawmte amah hong veh leh nek-tak abawlsak utte kham lou a, vensak ding in thu apia hi.

NASEPTE 24: 24Judate'n Paul Ahekna Uh 25Paul in diktatna thu, kidek thu, thukhen vaihawmna hong tung dingte asuipih detdet lai in, Felik in lauhuai asa mahmah a, “Pai nawn phot inla, hunlem ka neih hun chiang in ka hon sam ding,” achi hi. 26Paul in dangka apiak peuh alamen a, huaiziak in asam mun hial a, ahoupih zihzeh hi. 27Himahleh kum nih akivei sung in Porsias Festas in Felik mun ahon kheng a; Felik in Judate deihsakna ngah a-ut ziak in, hensa in Paul anuseta hi.

NASEPTE 25: 1Huchi in Festas in gamukna alak nung ni thum zoh in Kaisaria a kipan Jerusalem ah ahohtou hi. 2Siampu liante leh Juda makaite'n akiang ah Paul tungtang thu aselam in ana theisak uhi. 3Jerusalem khua a pitouhsak ding in adeihsakna leng ana ngen ua; lampi a na lamtan a thah ding atum uhi. 4Himahleh Festas in, “Kaisaria a Paul kep ding leh amah leng huai lam a hoh pah ding,” achi hi. 5Huaiziak in “Huai mi'n gitlouhna nei ahihleh na lak ua thunei peuhmah in hon zuisuk in hong hek uhen,” chi in adawng hi. 6Alak ua ni sawm val ataam nung in, Kaisaria ah apaisuk a; azing in thukhenna tutphah a tu in, Paul hon pi ding in thu apia hi. 7Paul ahong tun phet in, Jerusalem khua a kipan Juda hong sukte akim ah adingh ua, suikhiak vual louh ding thubuai tampi giktak tak agen uhi. 8Paul in asiamna thu agen a, “Judate dan hi in tempul thu hitaleh, Kaisar tung ah leng bangmah hihkhelh ka nei kei,” achi hi. 9Himahleh Festas in Judate deihsakna ngah a-ut ziak in Paul kiang ah, “Jerusalem a hohtouh a, huai lai a ka ma a hiai thute lepsak na deih hia?” chi in adong hi. 10Paul in, “Kaisar thukhenna tutphah ma a, vai hawmsak a om ding in ka dingh hi. Judate tung ah thil bangmah ka hihkhial kei chih nangmah in leng na theichian mahmah hi. 11Migilou ka hih a, sihna khop hial khelhna ka hihleh, sih leng ka nial kei; himahleh hiaite hon hekna abul bangmah a-om keileh kuamah in akiang uah hon pekhe thei kei ding. Kaisar kiang ah ka tun ding,” achi hi. 12Huan Festas in avaihawmpihte ahoulimpih kimvel nung in, “Kaisar kiang a thu tut ding na ngen maw?

NASEPTE 25: Kaisar kiang ah na pai mahmah ding,” chi in adawng hi.Agrippa Leh Barnisi Ma Ah Paul 13Ni bangzah hiam nung in kumpipa Agrippa leh Barnis, Kaisaria khua ahong tung ua, Festas chibai abuk uhi. 14Huai a ni tampi ataam ziak un Festas in Paul thubuai kumpipa kiang ah aluikhia a, “Felik in mitang kuahiam anusia hi 15Jerusalem a ka om lai in siampu liante leh Juda upate'n atungtang thu ahon hilh ua, siam louh tansak ahon ngen uhi. 16Ke'n amaute kiang ah, ahekpa uleh amah hekte akimaituah ua, ahekna thu ua asiamna thu genna hunlem aneih ma in, mi kuahiam thah ding a piakkhiak Rome mite dan ahi kei, chi in ka dawng hi. 17Huchi in hiai lai ka hong tun un, sawt hal lou in azing in thukhenna tutphah ah ka tu a, huai mipa hon pi ding in thu ka pia hi. 18Ahekte adin lai un, ka muanmohdan ngohna atung ah gitlouhna thubuai agen kei uhi. 19Asabiak thu ua, Jesu, mi khat sisa, Paul in ahing nawn ahi, chi a agup ziak in atung ah thubuai anei uh ana hi zaw hi. 20Ke'n huai thute ngaihtuahdan ding ka thei kei a, Jerusalem a hoh a, huai lai a huai thu lepsak a-utleh ut louh ka dong hi. 21Himahleh Paul in Kumpipa lep dia sit angen zawta hi. Huaiziak in Kaisar kiang a ka sawl theih masiah veng ding in thu ka pia hi,” achi hi. 22Huan Agrippa in Festas kiang ah, “Hiai mi thu kei mahmah in zak ka ut gige ahi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Zingchiah athugen na ngaikhe ding,” achi hi. 23Huchi in azing in Agrippa leh Barnis thupitak in ahong ua, thugenna inn ah alut ua, sepaih heutu liante toh, khua a milian deuhte toh; huan Festas thu in Paul apilutsak uhi.

NASEPTE 25: 24Huan Festas in, “Kumpipa Agrippa leh hiai lai a om tengtengte aw, hiai mi na muh uh ahi, atungtang thu a Judate tengteng in, hing tak nawn lou ding chi a kikou a, Jerusalem khua leh hiai lai a ka kiang a ahek uh ahi. 25Festas Mai Ah Paul 26Himahleh ka toupa kiang ah atungthu ginatak in bangmah gelh ding ka thei kei hi. Huaiziak in na ma uah ka hon pikhia hi, Kumpipa Agrippa nangmah ma a hon pi tuanse ka hi a, etchet nung a banghiam bek gelh ding ka muhtheihna ding in. 27Hekna kiteltak omloupi a henta kuahiam Kumpipa kiang a sawl thil haihuai hi in ka thei hi,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 26: 1Huai zoh in Agrippa in Paul kiang ah, “Na siamna thu na gen thei,” achi hi. Huan Paul in akhut avan a, asiamna thu agen hi. 2“Kumpipa Agrippa, Judate'n ahon hekna tengteng uah ka siamna thu gen ding a tuni a na ma a ka din theih hampha ka kisa hi. 3Judate tawndan leh pupa ngeinate theisiam leh pil mahmah na hih ziak in ka kipak tuanse hi. Huaiziak in thuakzoutak in ka thugen hon ngaihkhiaksak ding in ka hon ngen hi. 4“Ka tuailai hun a kipan ka chipihte lak leh Jerusalem a ka omdan Judate tengteng in athei uhi. 5Atung a kipan a ka tanchin theite ahi ua, huchi a ka sabiakdan ua ngentelpen a khosa Pharisai ka hihdan a-ut ualeh ahon genpih thei uhi. 6Pathian in ka pipute uh kiang a thu achiam lametna ziak in tu in hiai ah vai hawmsak in ka dingh hi. 7Huai thuchiam lametna ziak in ka nam uh sawm-le-nih in, sun leh zan in Pathian nna phatuamngaitak a sem in muh alamen uhi. Kumpipa aw, huai lametna tungthu ah Judate'n ahon hek uhi. 8Pathian in misite akaithou ding chih bangchidan a thil hi thei lou a ngaihtuah na hi ua? 9“Kei mahmah in Nazaret Jesu min kalh a hihtheih teng hih thil hoih hi in ka na ngaihtuah hi. 10Huai bang Jerusalem ah leng ka hih zel hi; siampu liante kiang a thu mu in, misiangthoute lak a mi tampi suangkul ah ka khum zel hi; ahihlup lai un lemsa lam ah leng ka na pang zel hi. 11Huan sinagog teng ah ka sawi gige a, Jesu thu gensiatsak ka tum teitei hi. Huan atung uah ka gilou mahmah a, gamdang khuate tanpha in leng ka sawi zel hi.Paul in Apianthak Thu Agen(Nas 9.1-19;

NASEPTE 26: 26.12-18) 12“Huchibang a hih ding in siampu liante thu mu in leh asawlna lai uh tawi in Damaskas ah ka hoh hi. 13Kumpipa aw, huchi a ka pai lai in sun laitak in, nisa vak sang a vakphazaw van a kipan in keimah leh ka paipihte kim ah hong vak ka mu hi. 14Ka vek un lei ah ka puk ua, Hebru pau in, ‘Saul, Saul, nang bang achia hon sawi? Sutna chiangzum tot nang dia na ahi,’ hon chi in ka za hi. 15Ke'n, ‘Toupa, kua na hia?’ ka chi hi. Toupa'n, ‘Na sawi, Jesu ka hi,’ achi hi. 16Himahleh thou inla dingh in; hiai na thil muhte leh na kiang a ka hon lah lai dingte sem ding leh theihpih dia sikha a nang hon bawl ding in na kiang ah ka hong kilak ahi. 17Mi tengteng leh ka hon sawlna mite, Zentelte khut a kipan ka hon humhing ding; 18amit uh hihvak ding in akiang uah ka hon sawl ahi, huchi in mial a pan vak lam anga ding ua, Setan thuneihna Pathian lam angatsan ding uhi, khelhna ngaihdamna amuhna ding uleh ahon gintak ziak ua sehtuam siangthoute lak a goutan aneihna ding un,” achi hi.Paul In Anasep Thugen 19“Huaiziak in kumpipa Agrippa aw, van a kilakna ka sel kei hi. 20Atung in Damaskas a mite kiang ah, huan Jerusalem ah, Judia leh gam chih a mite kiang leh Zentelte kiang ah leng athilhih uh kisik a, Pathian lam angatna ding un ka hilh zaw hi. 21Hiaite ziak in Judate'n tempul ah ahon man ua, hon hihlup atum uhi. 22Himahleh Pathian kiang a kipan a panpihna ka muh ziak in tuni tan in mineute leh miliante kiang a thu theisak in ka om lai hi;

NASEPTE 26: zawlneite leh Mosi in hong tung ding achih thu kia uh lou ngal thudang gen lou in. 23Huchi a, Khrist in gim athuak ding a, misi lak a kipan athohnawn ziak a mi tengteng kiang leh Zentelte kiang a vak musakpa masapen ahi ding achih thu uh,” achi hi. 24Huchibang a asiamna thu agen lai in, Festas in, aw ngaihtak in, “Paul, hai na hi; na theih tamna in nang hon haisak ahi,” achi hi. 25Himahleh Paul in, Festas hoihpen, “Hai kei veng e; thu diktak leh thu piltak ka gen zaw ahi. 26Agrippa Ma A Paul Thugen 27Kumpipa Agrippa, zawlneite na gingta hia? Na gingta chih ka thei,” achi hi. 28Agrippa in Paul kiang ah, “Sawt louchik sung in Khristian na hon suaksak zou dek,” achi hi. 29Paul in, “Sawt in tom taleh, nang kia ka chi kei, tuni a ka thu za tengteng leng keimah bang a om ding in Pathian kiang ah ka ngen ahi, hiai kolbutte chih louh ngal,” achita hi. 30Huan thu agen zoh in kumpipa adingtou a, gam-ukpa, Barnis leh akiang ua tute leng adingh chiat uhi. 31Apaituam ua akihou ua, “Hiai mi'n sihna leh kolbutna khop hial thil bangmah ahih kei,” achi uhi. 32Agrippa in Festas kiang ah, “Hiai mi'n Kaisar kiang a tut ding na ngen lou hileh pawt mai ding hiven,” achi hi.

NASEPTE 27: 1Itali gam a long a pai ding thu ahihpuktak un, Paul leh henta dang kuate hiam Augusta pawl a sepaih zaheutu, amin Julias akemsak uhi. 2Huan Adramittium kho long, Asia gam tuipi piau a kho omte tawn ding ah ka tuang ua, tuipi ah ka paita uhi. Ka kiang uah Masidonia gam a mi Aristarkhas, Thessalonika khomi a-om hi. 3Azing in Sidon khua ka tawn uhi. Julias in Paul alimbawl ngial a, kihihhalh ding in alawmte kiang ah apawtsak hi. 4Huai a kipan in tuipi ah ka pai nawn ua, huih in ahi lou lam a hon mut ziak in Kupra tuikulh zul huih hatlouhna lam ah ka tai uhi. 5Silisia gam leh Pamphilia gamzul tuipi ka khen nung un, Lisia gam a Mira khua ka tung uhi. 6Huai ah sepaih zaheutupa'n Aleksandria kho long Itali gam tawn ding amu a; huai ah hon tuangsak hi. 7Ni tampi, awlawl in ka pai ua, Knidas kho zawn haksapi in ka tung teitei ua, huih in hon sawnkik ziak in Salmoni zuan in Krit tuikulh zul huih hatlouhna lam ah ka tai uhi. 8Haksatak in tui geigei ah ka pai ua, Longkhawlna Kilawm achih mun uh ka tungta ua; huai kiang ah Lasea khua a-om hi.Paul In Long Siat Ding Agenkhol 9Huan ni tampi abei tak ziak in leh long a pai alauhuai ziak in, An Ngawl ni akhengta ngal a, Paul in amau athuhilh a, akiang uah, 10“Pute aw, tua long a tuangte siatna leh manthatna thupitak i tung ua tung ding ahi chih ka thei a, avante leh long tung ah kia ka chi kei a, eimah tung ah leng ka chi ahi,” achi hi. 11Himahleh sepaih zaheutu in Paul thugen sang in longpu leh long neipa thu agingta zaw hi.

NASEPTE 27: 12Phalbi douna ding in longkhawlna aginat louh ziak in atamzaw in huai a kipan a tuipi a paikhiak a, bangchi hiam bek a Phoenik khua tun teitei a, huai lai a phalbi dou asawmpih ua; Phoenik ahihleh Krit tuikulh a longkhawlna khat ahi a, simtum leh maltum lam doh ahi.Tui Tung Ah Huihpi 13Sim huih awlawl a ahong nuntak in adeihlam uh mu akisa ua, sikkip akhaikhia ua, Krit tuikulh zulzul ah apai uhi. 14Himahleh sawt lou nung in huih hattak, Euroklidon kichi, gam lam a kipan in ahong nung hi. 15Long ahon mutkhata a, huihlam angat theih louhtak in ka khahta ua, hon mutleng hon mutlengta hi. 16Kauda tuikulh neuchik petmah pansan in huih hatlouhna lam ah ka tai ua, haksatak in long neu ka bitsak thei ham uhi. 17Akaihkhiak nung un panpihna khaute khawng azang ua, long nuailam ah vial kawm in akhih uhi. Puanzakna bangkim apuksak ua, huchi lou in zaw Sirtis piaunel kip lou a lenlut alau ua, huchi in huih mutdan dungzui in apai uhi. 18Tuikihot in hon sep ek ziak in, azing in tui lak ah long a vante apaikheta uhi. 19Huan ani thum ni in, amau khut in long vante apaikhe nawnta uhi. 20Huan ni tampi nisa leh aksi leng akimu kei a, huihpi hat petmah in hon nuai a, hin himhim ka lamen nawn kei uhi. 21Huan an ne lou a sawttak a-om nung un, alak uah Paul adingh a, “Pute aw, Krit tuikulh a kiphel lou dia, ka thu ngaikhia hi le uchin hiai siatna leh manthatna tuah louh ding hi zen a. 22Himahleh tu'n ah leng khamuangtak a om ding in ka hon hanthawn lai hi. Na lak uah kuamah in hinna na mangsak kei ding uh, long zaw amangthang ding.

NASEPTE 27: 23Amah Pathian a ka hih a, a-nna leng ka sep, amah angel tuzan in ka kiang ah ahong dingh a, ka kiang ah, 24‘Paul, lau ke'n, Kaisar ma ah na dingh ding. Ngai in, long a na kiang a zin tengteng leng Pathian in ahon pia hi,’ ahon chi hi. 25Huaiziak in Pute aw, khamuangtak in om un, Pathian ka gingta hi, hon hilh bang in a-om ding hi. 26Himahleh bang tuikulh hiam ah zaw ahon lenkhe ding,” achi hi.Long Siatna 27Rome Zuan A Paul Zinna 28Huchi in tui thukdan ateh ua, laam sawmnih hi in athei ua, huan sawt louchik in ateh nawn ua, laam sawm-le-nga hi in athei uhi. 29Huan longmei lam ah sikkip li akhia ua, huchi lou in zaw suang se mun ah hon lenkhe zenzen kha ding chih alau ua; huan khovak kal angaklahtak in a-om uhi. 30Huan long mite'n long malam a sikkipte khiak ding bawl a kineih in tuipi ah long neu akhia ua, long taisan atum uhi. 31Hiai lai in Paul in, sepaih zaheutu leh sepaihte kiang ah, “Hiaite long a a-om gige kei uleh abit kei ding uh,” achi hi. 32Huchi in sepaihte'n long neu khaute a-attat ua, akhahta uhi. 33Khovak kuan in, Paul in an ne ding in mi tengteng asawl a, “Tuni bangmah ne lou a na om ua, an na ngawlna uh ani sawm-le-li ni ahita. 34Huaiziak in an ne ding in ka hon sawl chiat ahi; na damna ding uh; na lak uah kuamah asamzang khat leng amangthang kei ding,” achi hi. 35Huai thu agen khit in tanghou ala a, Pathian kiang ah kipahthu agen khit in, mi tengteng ma ah abalkham a, ane panta hi. 36Amau leng khamuangtak in a-om ua, an ane samta uhi. 37Long a mite ka vek un zanih sawmsagih-le-guk ka hi uhi.

NASEPTE 27: 38An anek kham khit un, tuipi ah buh apai ua, long ahihzang deuh uhi. 39Huan ni asuah in, koi lai gam ahia chih athei kei ua; himahleh, koi lai longkhawlna hiam piautak nei khat amu ua, huai tung ah ahihtheih uleh long taikhiaksak atum uhi. 40Huan sikkip khihnate a-attat ua, tuipi ah anusia ua; huchih lai mah in kaihheina khihnate aphel ua, huih mut ding in malam puanzak akaitou ua; piautak azuanta uhi. 41Himahleh tuikihot khauh nih kituahna mun ah ka lutkha zenzen ua, long in lei hetkha in, huan, long mailam atang bikbekta a, hihtat zoh louh in a-omta a, tuikihot ahat ziak in longmei lam akekgawpta hi. 42Huan hentate, tui liau galkai khattou a om kha ding ua, ataimang kha ding uh chih alauh man un sepaihte'n amaute hihlup mai asawm uhi. 43Himahleh sepaih zaheutu in Paul humhing a-ut a, athiltup uh akham a; tuileuh siam peuhmah tuipi a tawmkhiak a gam na kai masa ding leh, 44midang akhen singpek tung leh akhen long van tung a kitholh galkai ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in avek un gam ah bittak in agalkai vek uhi.

NASEPTE 28: 1Huan gam a ka suahtak un, tuikulh min tuh Malta ahi chih ka theita uhi. 2Tuikulh gam mite'n asiam theihtawp uh suah in hon na hehpih ua; vuah ahong zuk ziak leh khovot ziak in mei atoh ua, ka vek un hon na kipahpih uhi. 3Paul in singlom khat atom a mei ah achih a, asat ziak in gul ahong vakkhia a, akhut a tu in atangden hi. 4Tuikulh gam mite'n ganhing akhut a kikhaiden amuh un, “Hiai mi tualthat ahi ding, tuipi a kipan taikhe mahleh diktatna in ahin phalta lou ahi,” achi uhi. 5Himahleh ama'n mei ah gul asingkhia a, bangmah achi kei hi. 6Amau bel abawk hiam, thakhat a puk pah a si ding in agingta uh; hun sawtpi angak nilouh ua, bangmah achi kei chih atheih un alungsim uh akheng ua, Pathian ahi achi zaw uhi.Publias Hihdamna 7Huai mun kiang ah huai tuikulh a hausapa, amin Publias a-om a, huai mi in ahon na kipahpih a, ni thum siamtak in ahon tungsak hi. 8Publias pa khosik leh santen vei in ana lum a; akiang ah Paul alut a, athum a, atung ah akhut koih in ahihdamta hi. 9Huai ahihdam khit in tuikulh a midang natna nei peuhmah ahong ua; adam chiatta uhi. 10Huai mite'n nakpitak in ahon na pahtawi ua; ka pai ding un long ah ka vante uh ahong koih uhi.Rome Zuan A Zin Zelna 11Huan kha thum nung in, Aleksandria kho long, phalbi a tuikulh a omsa, unau phik, Kastor leh Pollux lutang kisuanna long ah ka pai uhi. 12Sairakus khua ka tawn ua huai ah ni thum ka taam uhi. 13Huai a kipan ka paikawi ua, Rejiam khua ka tung ua; ni khat nung in sim huih ahong nung a, azing nawn in Puteoli khua ka tung nawn uhi.

NASEPTE 28: 14Huai ah unaute ka mu ua, akiang uah ni sagih taam ding in ahon khou ua; huchibang in Rome kholam ah ka pai zelta uhi. 15Huan unaute'n ka Tanchin uh azaktak un huai a kipan in Appii dawr leh Khualbuk thumte omna chiang ah hong dawn ding in ahong kuan ua; Paul in huai mite amuh in Pathian kiang ah kipahthu agen a, alungmuang mahmahta hi.Rome Khopi Ah Paul 16Rome a ka lut un Paul bel avengpa sepaih kiang a amah kia a om aphal uhi. 17Ni thum nung in, Paul in Juda heutute asamkhawm a; akihoukhawm ua, akiang uah, “Unaute leh mite aw, i pipute dan tung ah bangmah ka hihkhelh louh in leng Jerusalem a kipan in Rome a mite kiang ah ahon hentasak uhi. 18Amau ahon etchet khit un, sihna khop hial ka tung ah bangmah amuh louh ziak un khah ahon tum uhi. 19Himahleh Judate'n huai asel ziak un Kaisar kiang tun lou thei ka hita kei a; himahleh ka chipihte hekna nei a hih bel ka hi kei hi. 20Huai lam thu a noumau hon mu a hon houpih ding in ka hon sam ahi; Israelte lamet thilte toh kisai a khainiang bun ka hi ngal a,” achi hi. 21Amau akiang ah, “Na tanchin Judia gam a kipan lai in ka mu kei ua, unau hiai a hong omte kuamah in na tungtang thubuai bangmah apulak kei ua, gen leng agen ngei kei uhi. 22Himahleh hiai pawl zaw gam teng ah gensiat ahi ngal ua, nang bangchi in ahia na ngaih chih theih ka utzaw uhi,” achi uhi. 23Huan ni achiam ua, huai atunna ah akiang ah mi tampi ahong ua;

NASEPTE 28: zing a kipan nitaklam pha in akiang uah huai thu ahilhchian a, Pathian lalgam thu atheisak a, Mosi Dan laibu thu leh zawlneite laibu thu in Jesu lam ah amaute athuzoh zel hi. 24Khenkhat in athugen agingta ua, akhen in agingta kei uh. 25Huan akituakta kei ua, Paul in thu agen khit in apaikheta uhi. Athugen tuh hiai ahi: Kha Siangthou in zawlnei Isai kam a na pipute uh kiang a athugen adik mahmah ahi chi in: 26“Hiai chite kiang ah va gen in,bil in zaw na za na ding ua,angaihna ahihleh na thei kei hial ding uh; muh zaw na mu ding ua,theih ahihleh na thei kei hial ding uh. 27Hiai chite lungtang atakta a,abilte uh ana ngong deuh a,amit uh leng asi ua,huchi lou in zaw amit un amu ding ua, abil un aza ding ua,alungtang un leng athei ding uh, akiheikik ding ua,ke'n ka hihdam kha ding hi,” achi, achih pen ahi. 28“Huaiziak in Pathian hotdamna thu Zentelte kiang a khakkhiak ahi chih thei un, amau bel ngaih leng angaikhe ding uh,” achi hi. 28Malta Ah Paul Gul In Atu 29Huchi a hiai thute agen khit nung in, Judate apawtkheta ua, alak uah nakpitak in kiselna apiang hi. 30Huchi in kum nih vengveng ama inn luahna mun ah Paul a-om a, akiang a hoh peuhmah ana kipahpih hi. 31Pathian lalgam thu ahilh a, hangsantak in Toupa Jesu Khrist thu agen zel a, kuamah in amah akham kei uhi.

PHILEMON 1: 1Chibai Bukna 3Pathian i Pa leh Toupa Jesu Khrist kiang a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.Philemon Itna leh Ginna 4Ka thumnate ah na min lou gige in, ka Pathian kiang ah kipahthu ka gen hi. 5Toupa Jesu lam leh misiangthou tengteng lam a itna leh ginna na neih za in. 6Na ginna kikoppihna, noumau a om thil hoih chiteng theihkimna lam ah Khrist lam a ahong phattuam theihna ding in. 7Unaupa aw, nangmah ziak a misiangthoute lungtang ahong halh tak ziak in na itna ah ka kipak in ka kha amuang mahmah hi.Onesimas A Dia Ngetsakna 8Huaiziak in akilawm hun hih ding in nang thu hon piak Khrist ah kingap mah leng, 9itna ziak in, Paul putek hial hita leh, tu a Khrist Jesu hentapa hita in, anget in ka hon ngen zaw hi. 10Ka ta Onesimas, kolbun kawm a ka neihkhiak, amah a ding in na kiang ah ka ngetsak hi. 11Tuma lam in nang a ding in aphatuam kei a, tu'n zaw kei leh nang a ding in aphatuamta hi. 12Amah, ka lungtang mahmah na kiang ah ka hon sawlkik nawn hi. 13Amah tanchinhoih a ka kolbutna a nangmah sik a nna ahon sepsak theihna ding in ka kiang a omsak nilouh ka ut mahmah hi. 14Himahleh na hehpihna hehpihsak teitei bang hilou in, na thu bang ahihtheih zawkna ding in, na thu lou in bangmah hih ka ut kei hi. 15Sawt lou kal nang ahon khen tangtawn a amah na neih tawntungna ding ziak ahi kha mai ding hi, 16himahleh sikha bang hi nawn lou a, sikha sang a hoih unau deihtak bang zaw in; kei a ding in deihtak ahi diak a, nang a ding ngial in sa leh Toupa ah nak hihna in chia!

PHILEMON 1: 17Huchi in lawm a na hon simleh keimah bang in amah na kipahpih in. 18Huan na tung a banghiam ahihkhelh a, na thil banghiam abatleh keimah bat in bawl in. 19Kei Paul in, keimah khut ngei a ka gelh ahi. Keimah in ka ditsak ding hi; ka kiang a nangma'n leng bat na neih sam dan hon hilh bel ka hi kei hi. 20Ahi, unaupa aw, nangmah ziak in Toupa ah kipahna hon neisak inla, Khrist ah leng ka lungtang hihhalh in. 21Ka gen sang a thupizaw tham in na hih ding chih ka theih ziak in, na hon thuman ding chih muang in na kiang ah ka gelh ahi. 22Akoi abang hitaleh, huai kia hih lou in, tunna ding hon na suktuahsak in; na thumnate uh ziak in na kiang ua piak ka hi ding chih ka kigingta hi.Chibai Bukna Nanung 23Epaphras, Khrist Jesu a ka hentakpihpa'n chibai ahon buk hi; 24huchi mah bang in ka seppih Marka, Aristarkhas, Demas leh Lukate'n leng chibai ahon buk uhi. 25I Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna na kha uah om hen, Amen.

1 PETER 1: 1Chibai Bukna 2Pa Pathian theihkholh bang a Jesu Khrist thumanna leh sisan theh tang ding a Kha hihtuamna tungtawn a tel a omte kiang ah hehpihna leh khamuanna hihkhan in om hen.Lametna Hing 3I Toupa Jesu Khrist leh Pa Pathian phat in om hen!
