Ama'n azahngaihna thupitak bang zel in, misi lak a kipan Jesu Khrist thohnawnna ziak in lametna hing mu ding in ahon piang thaksak nawn hi; 4goutan setheilou, nin baang lou, tul thei lou, van a nou a ding a sit muhna ding in; 5hotdamna, hun nanung a lang ding a zohsa mu ding in, ginna ziak in Pathian thilhihtheihna a ven na hi uhi. 6Tu in ze-etna chiteng ziak in hun sawt lou lungkham tadih mah le uchin, huai ah nakpitak in na kipak uhi. 7Na ginna uh ze-etna, dangka-eng mei a ze-et nung nangawn a mangthang zel sang a manphazaw, Jesu Khrist kilak chiang a phatna leh pahtawina leh thupina ding ahong hihtheihna ding in. 8Mu ngei lou napi in amah na it ua, tu in mu tadih kei mah le uchin, amah na gingta ua, kipahna gen vual louh leh thupina a dim in na kipak mahmah uhi. 9Na ginna un atup pen na kha uh hotdamna na mu uhi. 10Huai hotdamna thu zawlneite hehpihna na kiang ua hong tung ding thugenkholte'n akankan ua, siamneltak in azongkhia uhi. 11Khrist kha amau a om in Khrist thuakna ding leh thupina hon zui dingte atheihkholhsak lai in, bang hun a bangchi a hong tung ding ahia chih zonkhiak atum uhi.

1 PETER 1: 12Huai thu in amau nasep kisep lou in, noumau nasep asem zaw uh chih akiang uah theihsak ahita, huai thute van a kipan a sawlkhiak Kha Siangthou panpih in tanchinhoih nou hon hilhte'n tu in ahon hilh ua, huai thilte angelte'n leng vel a-ut uhi.Khristian Omdan Siangthou 13Huaiziak in na lungsim puan uh teng in pilvang unla, Jesu Khrist kilak chiang a hehpihna nou ahon puak ding lungke lou in lamen un. 14Ta thumangte bang in, na theih louh lai ua na nidanglai duhgawlna uh bang a om lou in; 15nou hon sampa asiangthou bang in nou leng na tatdan tengteng uah hong siangthou un; 16“Noute na siangthou ding uh ahi, kei ka siangthou ngal a,” chih gelh ahi. 17Huan khentuam nei lou a michih nasep bang chiat a vaihawmpa Pa bang a na loh uleh, hiai lai a na taam lai teng un laudan siam in om un. 18Na pipute uh piaksawn, na omdan uh bangmah hilou a kipan, thil se thei, dangka leh dangka-eng a tat na hi kei ua, 19belamnou gensiatbei leh nin baang lou sisan bang a, Khrist sisan pha a tat na hi zaw uh chih na thei uhi. 20Amah leilung pian ma in sehkholh in a-om ngeitak a, himahleh hun nanung ah noumau ziak in kilak in a-om hi. 21Amah ziak in misi lak a kipan kaithoupa leh athupina pepa Pathian gingtate na hi uh, na ginna uh leh na lametna uh Pathian a a-omtheihna ding in. 22Unaute it taktak ding a thutak zui a na kha uh na hihsiangthou tak ziak un lungtang a phatuamngaitak in ki-ittuah chiat un. 23Chi se thei lak ah hilou in, Pathian Thu hing gige leh om gige chi setheilou lak a piangthak na hi zaw uhi. 24“Mi tengteng loupa bangahi ua, athupina uh lengloupa pak bang ahi.Loupa avuai a,apak apulh hi. 25Toupa bel tangtawn ina-om gige hi,” chih ahi ngal a.Hiai ahi tanchinhoih nou ahon hilh pen uh.

1 PETER 2: 1Huchi in gitlouhna tengteng, khemna tengteng, lepchiahna tengteng, hazatna tengteng, gensiatna tengteng tawpsan unla, 2naungek suak thakte bang in khalam nawitui, bangmah hel louh lunggulh un; huai a na khantheihna ding un: 3Toupa mihehpih theitak ahi chih na chep tak ngal uleh.Suang Hing Leh Nam Siangthou 4Amah suang hing, mihingte deih louh, Pathian theih a bel tel leh manpha ahi. 5Amah kiang a hong pai in, noute ngei leng suang hingte bang in Jesu Khrist ziak a Pathian kipah lam kithoihna lan ding a siampu siangthou hi ding in khalam inn ah leptouh in na om uhi. 6Huaiziak in Laisiangthou ah:“Ngai un, Zion ah aning a suang kiphamohpen tel a om leh manphatak ka lem hi;amah gingtate azahlak kei ding uh,” chih atuang hi. 7Nou agingtate a ding in huai manphapi ahi,agingtaloute a ding in bel;“Inn lamte suang deih louhpen,huai mah aning a suang phatuampen ahong hita hi.” 8Huan “Pukna suang lehdalna suangpi ahi.Thu kigente azuih louh ziak un akisuipuk ua;huchibang ding a sehsa ahi him uhi.” 9Himahleh mial a kipan pawt a, vak lamdangtak a lut ding a nou hon sampa hoihna na muhsak theihna ding un, nou zaw chitel, kumpi siampu, nam siangthou, Pathian mite na hi uhi; 10Nidanglai in nam himhim na hi kei ua; tu in zawPathian namte na hita uh;nidanglai in zahngaihna na mu kei ua, tu in zaw zahngaihna na muta uhi.Pathian Sikhate Thunuailutna 11Deihtakte aw, mikhual leh khualzin na hih ziak un kha dou nakpa taksa utnate tawpsan ding in nou ka hon ngen hi. 12Zentelte lak a na tatdan uh kilawmtak hi hen, huchi in thil hihkhial a, ahon gensiat chiang un leng na thil hoih hih amuhte uh ziak in veh a a-om chiang un Pathian apahtawi thei ding uhi. 13Toupa ziak in mihing dan bawl peuhmah ah lut un;

1 PETER 2: thuneihna tawi kumpipa kiang ah hiam, 14thil hihkhialte tung a thuk ding leh thil hoih hihte phat ding a kumpipa'n aseh gam ukpate thunuai ah lut un. 15Hiai Pathian deihlam ahi, mihaite haina thil hoih hih in na hihdai thei ding uhi. 16Noplen na hi ua, himahleh na noplenna uh khelhna khuhna ding a zang lou in Pathian sikha a omna ding in zang zaw un. 17Mi tengteng zahtak un. Ki-unauna it un. Pathian laudan siam un. Kumpipa pahtawi un.Sikhate'n Khrist Etton Ding 18Sikhate aw, mihoih leh minunnemte lak kia hilou in migiloute lak ah leng laudan siam in nou hon heute thuthu in om un. 19Mi'n Pathian theihna ziak in thuak louh ding thuak a lungkhamna athuak teiteileh huai pen Pathian pahtak lam ahi. 20Nou na thilhihkhelh ziak ua vuak na thuak un, kuhkaltak in thuak mah le uchin phatna bang na loh ua? Himahleh na thil hoih hih ziak ua na thuak ua, kuhkaltak a na thuak teitei ualeh, hiai pen Pathian kipah lam ahi. 21Khrist in leng nou ahon thuaksak ziak in, huai bang hih ding a sap na hi uhi; akhap a na zuihna ding un zuih ding ahon nutsiat ahi. 22“Ama'n thil ahihkhial kei a, akam ah khemna leng a-om sam kei.” 23Enghou a a-om lai in, a-enghou thuk kei a, athuak lai in avau kei hi; diktattak a ngaihtuahpa kiang ah akipe zaw hi. 24Khelhna lam a si khin, adiktatna lam a i hintheihna ding in amah mah in tua sing ah asa in i khelhnate apua hi; avuakna golhte ah hihdam in na omta uhi. 25Belam mang bang in na mang ua, tu'n zaw nou hon chingpa leh heutupa kiang ah na kik nawnta uhi.

1 PETER 3: 1Huchibang in, nou zite aw, noumau pasalte thuthu in om un, huchi in alak ua khenkhat in Pathian thu zui kei mah le uh na tatdan uh zoh in a-om ding uhi. 2Laudan siam kawm a na tatdan siangthou uh en in. 3Pasalte Leh Zite Zuih Ding 5Huchibang in tuma lam a numei siangthou Pathian gingtate'n leng amau pasalte thuthu a om in akivan uhi. 6Sarah in Abraham, toupa chi a athuthu a a-om bang in; thil hoih hih a, khemlauna himhim lau lou a na om uleh Sarah tate na hi ding uhi. 7Huchi mah bang in, nou pasalte aw, numei zaw bel kitambaihzaw ahih bang un leh hehpihna hinna tanpihte ahih bang un, theihsiamna toh pahtawidan siam kawm in theihna bang zel in na zite uh kem un, na thumna uh dal a a-omlouhna ding in.Khristian Lungsim Putdan 8Atawp pen in, na vek un lungsim mun khat in om unla, kilainattuah unla, thunuailut in om un. 9Khelhna, khelhna in thuk kei unla, salhna, salhna a thuk sam lou in, vualzawl zaw un. Hiai vualzawlna tang ding a sap na hi uhi. 10“Hinna it a nihoihte muh ut in khelhna lak ah alei venghoih henla,amuk leng khemna thu gen lou ding in venghoih hen. 11Gilou nungngatsan in thil hoih hih henla;kituahna zong in delh zel hen. 12Midiktatte tung ah Toupa mit atu a,abil in leng athumna lam uah adoh zel hi,himahleh Toupa mel in thil hihkhialte adou nak,” chih gelh ahi.Engbawlna A Khrist Etton Ding 13Thil hoih lam a phatuam na ngaih uleh na poikhoih ding uh kua a-om dia? 14Himahleh diktatna ziak a na thuakta bang na hih uleh, na hampha ding uhi. Akihtakhuaina uh kihta kei un. 15Himahleh na lungtang uah Toupa in Khrist bawl un;

1 PETER 3: noumau a om, na lametpen uh hon dong peuhmah dawng ding in mansa gige in thunuailuttak leh laudan siam kawm in om un; 16sia-le-pha theihna siangtak nei un, huchi in nou ahon gensiatna lam uah, Khrist a na omdan hoih uh gen thanghuaite hih zahlak in a-om ding uhi. 17Thil gilou hih ziak a thuak sang in Pathian hoihsak lam ahihleh thil hoih hih ziak a thuak ahoihzaw hi. 18Pathian kiang a hon pitheihna ding in Khrist in leng khelhnate a ding in khatvei athuakta hi, midiktat in midiktatloute sik in athuak a; sa ah sihsak in a-om a, Kha ah hinsak in a-omta hi. 19Huai kha in suangkul a kha omte kiang ah thu ava tangkoupih hi. 20Huai mite'n nidanglai a Noah dam lai a long bawl sung teng a, Pathian thuakzohna in angak lai in thu amang kei ua; huai long ah mi tawmchik, mi giat lel tui a pan humbit in a-om uhi. 21Huan huai tui in Jesu Khrist thohnawnna ziak a hotdamna baptisma lim hon ensak a, huai tuh pumpi nitna siansakna dan hilou in, sia-le-pha theihna siansakna ziak a Pathian kiang naihna ahi zaw hi. 22Amah van a pai in Pathian taklam ah a-om a; angelte, thuneihnate, thilhihtheihnate amah thuthu a omsak in a-omta hi.

1 PETER 4: 1Huchi in Khrist in taksa a athuak ziak in nou leng huchibang lungsim in kivan un; sa a thuak khinsa in gilou atawpsanta hi. 2Huchi in tunung sa a om lai teng mihing duhgawlna lam bang a om lou in, Pathian deihlam in a-omta hi. 3Zentelte ut lam hihna, huknate, tak taksa utnate, uain hainate, zu khamnate, milim biakna kihhuaitakte tuma lam a hihsa teng i na zang khin ngal a. 4Pathian A Ding A Hinna 5Amau mihing leh misite ngaihtuah ding a mansa kiang ah atanchin uh agen ding uhi. 6Hiai ziak in ahi, misite kiang a leng tanchinhoih gen a hih, sa a om mihingte bang a ngaihtuah in om mah le uh, kha a bel Pathian bang a ahintheihna ding un. 7Himahleh thil tengteng tawpna anaita, huaiziak in na thumtheihna ding un lungsim diktak pu in pilvang un. 8Bangdang teng sang in phatuamngaitak in ki-ittuah chiat unla; itna in gilou tampi akhuh zel hi. 9Phun lou in kizintun tuah unla; 10michih in thilpiak na muh bang zel un, Pathian hehpihna chiteng kemhoihte bang in huaite in nna kisepsaktuah chiat un. 11Mi kuapeuh in thu agenleh Pathian thute bang in gen hen; mi kuapeuh in nna asepleh Pathian in hatna apiak bang in sem hen; huchi in Jesu Khrist ziak in thil bangkim ah Pathian pahtawi in a-om thei ding, thupina leh vaihawmna tangtawn in amah a ahi, Amen.Khrist Min A Thuak Hamphatna 12Deihtakte aw, na lak ua ze-etna thupitak hong om, noumau ze-etna ding a na tung ua hong tung, thillamdang na tung ua tung bang in lamdang sa kei un. 13Khrist thuaknate thuakpihte na hihdan bang zel un kipak zaw un; huchi in athupina a ahong kilak chiang in noumau leng nuamtak in na kipak thei ding uhi.

1 PETER 4: 14Khrist min ziak a tai na hih uleh, na hampha uhi; na tung uah thupina kha leh Pathian kha a-om gige hi. 15Himahleh na lak uah kuamah in tualthatmi ahih ziak hiam, midangte thilhih gensakmi ahih ziak hiam in thuak kei hen. 16Himahleh, Khristian ahih ziak a athuakleh zum kei hen; huai min pu ahih ziak in Pathian pahtawi zaw hen. 17Pathian inkuanpihte ah vaihawmna pat ahunta hi; huan eite ngei a apan masakleh Pathian tanchinhoih thumangloute tawpna bangchi phet ahi diam aw? 18Huan,“Midiktat nangawn hotdam liailiai ahih in,Pathian limsak lou leh migiloute koi ah bang asuak ding ua?” 19Huaiziak in Pathian hoihsak bang a thuakte'n thil hoih hih in akhate uh Siampa muanhuaitak kiang ah kemsak hen.

1 PETER 5: 1Huchi in na lak ua saptuam upate kei na upatpih uh, Khrist thuaknate theipa leh thupina hong lang ding tang sam ding in hiai bang in ka hon hanthawn hi: 2Na lak ua Pathian belamhonte ching unla, enkol un, sawl teitei ziak hilou in, Pathian hon deihna bang hi zaw in, punna thanghuai deih ziak hilou in, kithalawptak zaw in, 3na tante uh tung ah kiliansak tuan lou in belamhonte zuih ding a kibawl zaw in, kem un. 4Huchi in Belamchingpa lianpen ahong lat chiang in, Thupina Lallukhu tul thei lou na mu ding uhi. 5Upate Leh Tuailaite 6Huaiziak in ahuntak a nou ahon pahtawi theihna ding in, Pathian khut hattak nuai ah kihihniam un; 7ama'n ahon limsak gige ziak in na mangbatna tengteng uh amah tung ah nga vek un. 8Pilvang unla, limsak un; na melma uh diabol, humpinelkai humham bang in anawmvalh ding zong in avialvak hi. 9Na unau uh khovel a omte tung ah huchibang thuaknate atung sam chih thei in gingkiptak a om in, amah dou un. 10Huan hehpihna tengteng Pathian, atangtawn thupina tang ding a Khrist a nou hon sampa ngei in, sawt lou kal na thuak nung un ahoih bukim a hon bawl in, hon hihkip in, ahon hihhat ding hi. 11Amah kiang ah vaihawmna tangtawn in om hen, Amen. 12Ka unaupa muanhuaitak Silvanas khut in, noumau hanthawn leh huai Pathian hehpihna taktak ahi chih thei in, tomchik in na kiang uah ka gelh ahi; huaite ah dingkip un. 13Babulon a om noumau bang a telnu'n chibai ahon buk hi; huchibang in ka tapa Marka in leng chibai ahon buk ahi. 14Itna kitawpna a tawp in chibai kibuk un, na lak ua Khrist a om peuhmahte kiang ah khamuanna om hen, Amen.

2 PETER 1: 1Chibai Bukna 2Pathian leh Jesu i Toupa theihna ah hehpihna leh khamuanna noute ah hihkhan in om hen.Pathian Sapna Leh Telna 3Ama thupina leh hoihna ziak a hon sampa, atanchin theih ziak in ama Pathianna thilhihtheihna in hinna leh Pathian limsakna lam thu ah thil tengteng ahon peta hi. 4Huaite ziak in athuchiam manphatak leh thupi mahmahte ahon pia hi; huchi in utna ziak a khovel a siatna hong om taikhiaksan in; huai thuchiam manphatak leh thupi mahmahte ziak in Pathian omdan na kikoppih thei sam ding uhi.Khristian Omdan Kilawm 5Ahi, huaiziak tak in, thanop himhim suah in, na ginna uah hoihna hel unla, na hoihna uah theihna hel unla, 6na theihna uah kidekna hel unla, na kidekna uah kuhkalna hel unla, na kuhkalna uah Pathian limsakna hel unla, 7na Pathian limsakna uah unaute itna hel unla, na unaute itna ah itna hel un. 8Hiai hoihnate nou a ahih a, akhan zelleh i Toupa Jesu Khrist theihna lam ah thadah lou leh gah lou lou in nou ahon bawl ding hi. 9Kuapeuh huai thilte nei lou mittaw, naichikte kia mu thei, anidanglai khelhnate siansakna mangngilhte ahi uhi. 10Huaiziak in unaute aw, nou ahon sapna leh ahon telna hihkip ding in thanop suah semsem un; huaite na hih uleh chik lai mah in na puk kei ding uhi. 11Huchi in Jesu Khrist i Toupa leh Hondampa'n tangtawn gam a lutna ahon musak lo mahmah ding hi.Thutak A Kiphuhkipna 12Huaiziak in huai thilte nei in na kiang ua om thutak a phuhkip hita mah le uchin, huai thutak mah ka hon theisak nawn ding hi. 13Huan hiai pumpi a ka om lai teng noumau hon theihpih in hon tohhalh gige hoih ka sa hi.

2 PETER 1: 14I Toupa Jesu Khrist in hon theihsak bang in ka pumpi puanin koihkhiak hun ding hong tung pah ding chih ka thei hi. 15Ahi ka paikhiak nung in huai thilte na theihgigena ding un ka kisuk ding hi.Zawlneite Leh Peter Theihpihna(Mat 17.5; Mar 9.7; Luk 9.52) 16I Toupa Jesu Khrist thilhihtheihna leh ahong paina thu ka hon theihsak lai un, tangthu piltak a ngaihtuahkhiak phet zui ka hi kei ua, athupina mute ka hi zaw uhi. 17Ama'n Pa Pathian kiang a kipan in pahtawina leh thupina amu a, huchih lai in thupina thupitak a kipan in hichibang aw akiang ahong tung hi, “Hiai ka Tapa deihtak, ka kipahna mahmah ahi,” chi in. 18Huan tang siangthou a akiang a ka om ziak un huai aw van a kipan a hong suak koumau ngei in ka za uhi. 19Huchi in genkholhna thu kip nawn sem i nei uhi. Khua ahong vak a, zingsol aksi na lungtang ua ahong suah masiah hiai thu khawnvak mun mial a vak alimsak bang ua, na limsak uleh na hihhoih ding uhi. 20Laisiangthou a thugenkholh himhim eimah kihilhchet ding ahi kei chih thei masa un. 21Thugenkholh himhim mihing thu a pawt ahi ngei kei a, mite'n Kha Siangthou sawl in, Pathian a kipan agen zaw uhi.

2 PETER 2: 1Himahleh mite lak ah zawlnei takloute leng ahong pawt ua, huchi mah bang in na lak uah heutu takloute ahong om ding uhi, amaute leipa Toupa hilhial tawpsan in mi hihse thei ginna tuam, aguk in ahon lutpih ding ua, amau tung ah thakhat in manthatna atungsak ding uhi. 2Sinsakmi Takloute 3Sum deihna ziak in zuauthu in sumsinna ding in nou ahon zang ding uh, himahleh nidanglai a omsa amohtanna ding uh akhawl kei a, amanthatna uh leng a-ihmu kei hi. 4Angelte'n thil ahihkhelh un Pathian in ahawi kei a, gawtmun ah apai a, vaihawm ding in phaizang khuk thuk mial ah akhum hi. 5Amah limsakloute omna khovel ah tuichim tungsak in, nidanglai khovel ahawi kei a, himahleh Noah, diktatna thugenpa midang sagih toh ahondamta hi. 6Sodom leh Gomorrah khuate amah limsak lou hong om dingte etsakna ding in azang a, vut suaksak in hihmangthang in siam louh atangsakta hi; 7huan midiktat Lot, migiloute omdan huktak ziak a lungkham mahmah pa ahondamta hi. 8Huai midiktatpa alak ua a-om in, amit in amu a, abil in aza a, dan lou bang a athilhihte un alungsim diktat niteng in ahih na mahmah hi. 9Toupa'n amah limsak mite khemna a pan hotkhiakdan leh diktatloute vaihawm ni a ding a gawt kawm a hawidan athei hi. 10Utna thanghuai lam a sa bang a om leh vai hawmsakna musit mite ngial houh vaihawm ni a ding a gawt kawm a hawidan atheisem hi. Haihan leh chihhak ahi ua, amithupite agensiat un leng aling kei uhi. 11Angel hatna leh thilhihtheihna neite'n amaute dem in Toupa ma ah agense ngei kei uhi. 12Himahleh hiaite'n bel ganhing ngaihtuahna nei lou, mat a hihman dingte bang in, thil atheihlouhte uh agensia uhi.

2 PETER 2: 13Amau diktatlouhna gah lou in asegawp ding ua, suntang lai a zu leh sa kham a buai nuamsami ahi uh. Na kiang ua ankuang alui un, amau kikhemna ankuanglui ahih ziak un, thanghuaina gensiatna ahi uhi. 14Mit angkawmna a dim, khelhna tawpsan theiloute anei ua; mikiploute akhempuk ua; en hat lungsim apu ua; hamsethuak tate ahi uhi. 15Beor tapa Balaam, thilhihkhelhna, loh deihpa lampi atot ziak un lam dik paisan in avakmang uhi. 16Himahleh amah atatlekna ziak in taihilh in a-omta a; sabiltung pau thei lou mihing pau in ahong pau a, zawlnei haina akham hi. 17Hiaite tuikhuk tui om lou leh tuimei huihpi mutleng ahi ua; amaute a ding in nuailam mial sah meuhmouh sit ahita hi. 18Thugina lou chiak zen a gen in gitlouhna lak a kipan a taikhete, taksa utna ah hukna in akhempuk nak uhi. 19Amau siatna sikha hi kawmpi in mite sikha suahtakna thu achiam nak uhi; mite'n zohsa achihte mah in amau sikha in abawl nak hi. 20Toupa leh Hondampa Jesu Khrist atheih ziak ua khovel thanghuainate ataikhiaksan nung ua, huai mah a apuk nawn ua, zoh a a-om nawn ualeh zaw, amasa sang in a-omdan nanung uh ahong hoih keizaw hi. 21Diktatna lampi pen theih nung a, thupiak siangthou akiang ua kepsak nungngatsan sang in, diktatna lampi thei lou hi le uh amau a ding in ahoihzaw ding hi. 22“Ui ama luak ah akik nawn a,vokpi kisilsiangsa leng buannawi ah kisil ding in akik nawn chih paunak diktak amaute tung ah atungta hi.”

2 PETER 3: 1Deihtakte aw, tua na kiang ua ka gelh laikhak nihna ahi. Hiaite gel ah theih thak nawnna in na lungsim siang uh ka tokthou hi. 2Zawlnei siangthoute thugenkholh leh na sawltakte uh kam a Toupa leh Hondampa thupiak na theihgigena ding un. 3Toupa Hong Paina Ding Thuchiam 4Ahong pai nawnna thuchiam koi ah? Siam tung a kipan bangkim a-om ngeingei bang in pi-le-pute ihmut ni a kipan in a-om zel ngal a! ahon chi ding uhi. 5Pathian thu in nidanglai pek in vante ahong om achih akitheihmohbawl ua, tui a kipan leh tui zang a leitung kibawl ahi a, 6huai tui mah in atum a, amangthangta hi. 7Himahleh tua vante leh lei omte huai thu mah in Pathian limsak lou mite vaihawm leh manthat ni a ding a sit in mei hihsiat ding a kholkhawm ahita hi. 8Himahleh deihtakte aw, hiai thu kam khat pen mangngilh kei un, Toupa ngaih in ni khat tuh kum sangkhat bang ahi a, huan kum sangkhat leng ni khat bang ahi, chih. 9Mi khenkhat in zekai asak bang un Toupa zaw athuchiam ah azekai kei hi; kuamah manthat deih lou a, mi tengteng hong kisik deih in noumau lam ah adohzou zaw ahi.Mansa A Om Poimohna 10Himahleh Toupa ni zaw guta bang in ahong tung ding; huai ni chiang in nakpitak a ging in vante amangthang ding, thilbulte mei a haitui in a-om ding a, lei leh asung a nasep omte, akangtum ding hi. 11Huai thilte huchibang a mangthang vek ding uh ahi chih na theih un, omdan siangthou leh Pathian limsakna lam ah mi bangchibang hi ding na hi ua. 12Pathian' Ni ahong tun baihna ding lamen leh phatuamngaitak a ngak in; huai ni atun ziak in vante hong kang in amangthang dia, thilbulte leng mei a haltui in a-omta ding hi.

2 PETER 3: 13Himahleh athuchiam bang in van thak leh lei thak, asung a diktatna omte i lamen hi. 14Huaiziak in deihtakte aw, huai bang thilte na lamet ziak un nin baang lou leh gensiatbei in, khamuangtak a na om uh ahon muhtheihna ding in thanop suah un. 15Huan i unaupa deihtak Paul in leng akiang a pilna piak bang zel a na kiang ua agelh bang in Toupa dohzohna hotdamna in sim un. 16Alaikhak tengteng ah huai thute gen in, huai mah bang in agelh hi. Huai ah thu theihhak thu thukte a-om a, huaite mipil lou leh mikiploute'n Laisiangthou dang angaihkawi bang un angaikawi ua, amau leh amau siatna ding in azang uhi. 17Huchi in deihtakte aw, noute'n tua thute na theihkholh ziak un pilvang un, huchi lou in zaw migiloute diklouhna a pimang a om in, na kipna ua kipan na pukkha ding uhi. 18Himahleh i Toupa leh Hondampa Jesu Khrist hehpihna leh theihna ah hong khang un. Tu leh tangtawn in amah kiang ah thupina om hen, Amen.

KILAKNA 1: 1Thumasa 2Johan in Pathian thu leh Jesu Khrist tungtang a athil muhte tengteng atheisakta hi. 3Hiai genkholhna thute sim a, athute za a, huai a thil kigelhte zuite ahampha uhi; ahun anai tak ziak in.Chibai Bukna Leh Phatna 4Johan in Asia gam a om saptuam sagihte kiang ah, amah omlel, omsa leh hong pai ngei dingpa a kipan leh alaltutphah ma a om, Kha sagihte a kipan in hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen; 5huan Jesu Khrist, theihpihpa ginom, misite lak a piang masapen leh leitung a kumpipate vaihawmpa a kipan. Eite hon it a i khelhna a kipan a asisan a hon sawppa amah kiang ngei ah; 6leh lalgam hi ding a hon bawl, Pathian leh a Pa kiang a siampute hi ding a hon bawl, amah kiang ah thupina leh vaihawmna, tangtawn tangtawn in om hen, Amen. 7Ngai in, meipi toh ahong pai hi;mit teng in amah amu ding ua,amah sunte'n leng;leitung a nam tengteng in amah asuun ding uh, huai bang hi hen, Amen. 8“Kei Alpha leh Omega, abul leh atawp,” Toupa Pathian, omsa, omlel leh hong pai ding Bangkim hihthei in achi hi.Khrist Muhna 9Kei, Johan, na unau uleh Jesu a om haksa thuakna leh lalgam leh kuhkalna a na tanpihpa uh, Pathian thu ziak leh Jesu theihpihna ziak in tuikulh gam Patmos kichi ah ka om hi. 10Toupa ni in Kha in ka om a, ka nunglam ah aw ngaihtak in pengkul ging bang mai ka za hi. 11Aw in, “Kei Alpha leh Omega, abul leh atawp ka hi, na thil muhte laibu ah gelh inla, Asia gam a saptuam sagih, Ephesa, Smarna, Pergamos, Thiatira, Sardis, Philadelphia leh Laodisia kiang ah khak in,” achih ka za hi. 12Huan kei hon houpih huai aw muh tum in ka kihei hi.

KILAKNA 1: Huchi a ka kiheileh dangka-eng khawnvak koihna sagih ka mu hi. 13Huai khawnvak koihna lai ah kuahiam Mihing Tapa toh kibang, akhepek tuampha puansilh, a-awm kimvel dangka-eng gakna a kigak ka mu hi. 14Alu leh asamte samul ngou leh vuk bang in angou a; amitte meikuang bang ahi. 15Akhepekte sumsan nawttet meipi a halsiangsa abang a, huan a-aw tui tampi ging bang ahi. 16Huan akhut taklam in aksi sagih atawi a; akam a kipan in namsau hiamtuah asuakkhia a; huan amel nisa asat san lai bang ahi. 17Huchi a amah ka muhtak in, misi bang in akhebul ah ka puk hi. Huan ama'n ka tung a akhut taklam koih in, “Lau ke'n, amasapen leh ananungpen ka hi. 18Huai ahingpa ka hi; ka sita a, ngai in tangtawn in ka hing hi, sihna leh misi kho chabi ka nei hi. 19Huaiziak in na thil muhsate, thil omlelte leh tunung a thil hong om dingte gelh in. 20Ka khut taklam a aksi sagih na muhte leh dangka-eng khawnvak koihna sagihte thuguk hiai ahi: Aksi sagihte saptuam sagihte angelte ahi ua; khawnvak koihna sagihte saptuam sagihte ahi uh,” achi hi.

KILAKNA 2: 2Ephesa Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak 1“Ephesa saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Akhut taklam a aksi sagih tawi dangka-eng khawnvak koihna sagih lai a vialvakpa'n hiai thilte agen hi. 2“Na thilhihte, na sepgimdan leh na kuhkaldan, migiloute na ngaihmohdan leh hiloupi a amau sawltak kichite na ze-et a, amaute zuauthei ahi uh chih na muhkhiakdan ka thei hi. 3Huan thuakzohna na nei a, ka min ziak in na thuak teitei a, huchi in leng na bah kei hi. 4Himahleh na hon itna masapen na tawpsan thu ah ka hon dem hi. 5Huaiziak in na pukna laitak theigige inla, kisik in, na thilhih masapente hih nawn in; huchi lou in zaw na kiang ah ka hong pai dia, na kisik keileh a-omna a kipan in na khawnvak koihna ka suan ding hi. 6Himahleh hiai thu ah na hoih, Nikol pawlte thilhihte na hua a, ke'n leng huaite ka hua hi. 7“Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen. Avualzoupa kiang ah Pathian Paradis a om, anek ding in hinna sing ka pe ding achi,” chi in.Smarna Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak 8“Huan Smarna a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Amasapen leh ananungpen, huai si a hing nawnta in hiai thilte agen hi. 9“Na thilhihte, na gimthuakdan leh na zawndan, himahleh na hau hi, Judate hilou napi, ahi a kigen Setan sinagogte Pathian gensiatna ka thei hi. 10Na thuak pah ding thilte kihta ke'n; ngai in, ze-et a na omtheihna ding un diabol in na lak ua akhente suangkul ah ahon khum pah ding; ni sawm sung gimthuakna na nei ding uhi. Sihpha in ginom in om in, huchi in hinna lallukhu ka hon pe ding hi. 11“Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen.

KILAKNA 2: Avualzoupa sih nihna hihnat in a-om kei ding achi,” chi in.Pergamos Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak 12“Huan Pergamom a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Namsau hiamtak hiamtuah nei in hiai thilte agen hi. 13“Na tenna leh Setan laltutphah omna leng ka thei; ka min kiptak in na lenden a, Setan tenna mun a ka palai ginom, Antipas thah a a-om lai in leng na ginna na tawpsan tuan kei hi. 14Himahleh demna zek ka hon nei, huai lai a mi khenkhat Balaam sinsakna zuite na ompih ziak in, Israel suante ma a kipukna koih ding leh milimte kiang a kithoihna thilte ne ding leh kingaihna khelhna hih ding in ama'n tuh Balak athuhilh hi. 15Huchibang mah in Nikol pawlte sinsakna zui, mi khenkhat mah na ompih hi. 16Huaiziak in kisik in; huchi lou in zaw na kiang ah ka hong pai pah dia, amau ka kam a namsau in ka dou ding hi. 17“Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen. Avualzoupa kiang ah manna selguk ka pe ding, huan suangpek ka pe dia, huai suang tung ah min thak, aneipa lou ngal kuamah in atheih louh a kigelh achi,” chi in.Thiatira Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak 18“Huan Thiatira a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Pathian Tapa, meikuang bang mit nei a, sumsan nawttet bang khe neipa'n, hiai thilte agen hi. 19Na thilhihte leh na itna leh na ginna leh na nasepna leh na thuakzohna ka thei hi, amasapen sang in na thilhih nanungte atamzaw hi. 20Himahleh hiai thu ah demna ka hon nei hi, huai numei Jezebel, zawlnei kichinu khawk na sak louh ziak in; ama'n ka sikhate kingaihna khelhna hih ding leh milimte kiang a kithoihna thilte ne ding a khem in ahilh hi.

KILAKNA 2: 21Huchi in amah akisikna ding in hun ka pia hi; huan amingaihna khelhna ah akisik tuan kei hi. 22Ngai in, amah damlou lupna ah ka pai ding a, athilhihte akisik tuan keileh amah angkawm teng leng gimthuakna thupi ah ka pai ding hi. 23Huan hipi in atate ka that dia; saptuamte tengteng in lungsim kiheinate leh lungtang theipa kei ka hi chih athei ding uh; na thilhihte bangbang un na lak ua mi tengteng ka pe ding hi. 24“Himahleh, nou, Thiatira a om midangte hiai thuhilh nei lou a, ‘Setan thil thukte’ thei lou tengteng kiang ah tunggikna dang na tung uah ka hon behlap kei ding, ka chi hi. 25Himahleh ka hong mateng na neih pen uh lenkip un. 26Huan avualzoupa leh atawp pha a ka nnate kempa kiang ah, namte tung a thuneihna ka pe ding hi; 27ama'n sikchiang in amau tung ah vai ahawm ding a, leibel bang in amaute akhentam ding hi, hiai thuneihna ka Pa a pan ka muh ahi. 28Huan amah zingsol aksi ka pe ding hi. 29Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen achi,” chi in.

KILAKNA 3: 2Kiveng in, thil omsunte, si dia kisate, tungding nawn in; ka Pathian ma ah na thilhih zohsa set theih ka mu kei hi. 3Sardis Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak 1“Huan Sardis a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Pathian Kha sagih leh aksi sagih neipa'n hiai thilte agen hi.“Na thilhihte ka thei, si napi in hingmin na pu hi. 4Himahleh Sardis ah min tawmchik apuante uh hihnit louh na nei hi; amaute puanngou silh a kei toh tonkhawm ding a kilawm him ahi uhi. 5Avualzoupa huchibang in puanngou in akizem dia, bangchi mah in hinna laibu a kipat amin ka hihmang kei ding, ka Pa ma leh a-angelte ma ah amin ka gum ding hi. 6“Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen achi, chi in.Philadelphia Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak 7“Philadelphia a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Huai siangthoupa, dikpa leh David chabi neipa, amah hon kuamah in akhak theih louh leh amah khak kuamah in ahon theih louhpa'n hiai thilte agen hi. 8“Na thilhihte ka thei, ngai in, na ma ah kuamah khak theih louh kong honsa ka koih hi; thilhihtheihna neuchik na nei a, ka thu na kem a, ka min na pai kei hi. 9Ngai in, zuau lel gen a Judate hilou napi, ahi a kigen Setan sinagogte ka hon pia hi; ngai in, amau ka hon paisak dia, na khebul ah ka kunsak ding; nang ka hon itdan atheihna ding un. 10Ka dohzohna thu na kep ziak in, ze-et a na om chiang in ke'n leng ka hon kem ding, huai hun khovel pumpi tung a hong tung ding ahi; leitung a om tengteng leng ze-et ding in. 11Ka hong pai pah ding. Kuamah in na lallukhu alaklouhna ding in, na neih pen kem kinken in.

KILAKNA 3: 12Avualzoupa ka tempul ah khuam in ka pangsak dia, huai a kipan in apaikhe nawn kei ding, amah tung ah ka Pathian min leh ka Pathian khopi Jerusalem thak, ka Pathian a kipan van a hong paikhesuk min leh keimah min thak ka gelh ding hi. 13“Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen achi,” chi in.Laodisia Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak 14“Huan Laodisia a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Theihpihpa ginom leh dik, Pathian thilsiam bul Amen in hiai thilte agen hi. 15“Na thilhihte ka thei, lum lah lum lou, vot lah vot lou in na om a; na lumleh lum inla na votleh vot vanglak in! 16Lum lah lum lou, vot lah vot lou a na om pelhpulh ziak in, ka kam a kipan in ka hon sekhe ding hi. 17Migenthei nuamsa lou, zawng, mitdel leh vuaktang na hih lam kithei lou a, ‘ka hausa, hauhsaknate ka neita, bangmah ka kitasam kei,’ na chih ziak in. 18Kei a kipan in dangka-eng mei a hihsiangthousa lei ding in ka hon thuhilh ahi, na hong hauhsak theihna ding in; puanngoute na hon silh a, na vuaktang zumhuaina adawklouhna ding in; huan na muhtheihna ding in na mit a nuh ding mitlou lei in. 19Ka itte ka thuhilh in ka sawi a; huaiziak in phatuamngai inla, kisik in. 20Ngai in kongkhak a dingh in ka kiu hi; mi kuapeuh in ka aw azak a kong ahonleh akiang ah ka lut dia amah toh nitak an ka ne dia, ama'n leng kei toh ane ding hi. 21Avualzoupa ka laltutphah tung ah ka kiang ah ka tusak ding, kei leng ka vualzou a, laltutphah tung a ka Pa toh ka tut bang in. 22“Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen achi,” chi in achi hi.

KILAKNA 4: 1Hiai thilte nung a ka etleh, ngai in, van ah kongkhak akihong a; ka aw zak masakpen pengkul aw ging bang in kei ahon houpih hi, “Hiai ah hong paitou in, huan tunung chiang a thil hong om dingte ka hon musak ding,” achi hi. 2Thakhat in Kha in ka om pah ngal a; ngai in, van ah laltutphah ahong kitungta a, laltutphah tung ah mi khat atu hi. 3Huai mi jasper leh karnelia suang bang in akimu a; huai laltutphah kimvel ah sakhituihup, emerald suang bang mai a kimu in azam hi. 4Van Muhna 5Huai laltutphah a kipan in khophiate, awte leh vanpigingte ahong suakkhia hi. Huan mei khawnvak sagih, laltutphah ma ah akuang a, huaite Pathian Kha sagihte ahi uhi. 6Huai laltutphah ma ah kristal bang a siang limlang tuipi a-om hi. Huai laltutphah kimvel ah thil hing nunglam leh malam mit a dim a-om uhi. 7Thil hing khatna humpinelkai bang ahi a, thil hing nihna bawngnou bang ahi a, thil hing thumna in mihing mai bang anei hi, thil hing lina muvanlai leng lai bang ahi. 8Huai thil hing lite'n kha guk anei chiat ua, akimvel leh asunglam mit ngen a dim ahi a; amaute'n sun leh zan khawl lou in:“Siangthou, Siangthou, Siangthou,Toupa Pathian,Bangkim hihthei,omsa leh omlel leh hong om ding,” achi uhi. 9Huan huai amah laltutphah tung a tupa leh huai amah tangtawn tangtawn a hingpa kiang a thil hingte'n, thupina leh zahhuaina leh kipahna thu apiak chiang un, 10amah laltutphah tung a tupa ma ah upa sawmnih-le-lite abokkhup uhi, huai laltutphah ma a alallukhute uh koih in, amah tangtawn tangtawn a hingpa abia uhi. 11“Nang ka Toupa leh kaPathian uh,thupina, zahhuaina,thilhihtheihna mu tak na hi;thil tengteng nang na siam a,nang thu ziak a om leh siam ahi uhi,” achi uhi.

KILAKNA 5: 1Huai laltutphah tung a tupa khut taklam ah laibuzial, asunglam leh apolam kigelh chiamtehna sagih a kichiamteh ka mu hi. 2Angel hat khat in aw ngaihtak in, “Kua ahia laibuzial hong a, huai a chiamtehnate phel tham?” chi a puangkhia ka mu hi. 3Huan van tung hi in, leitung hiam, ahihkeileh lei nuai ah leng huai laibuzial hong thei hiam, ahihkeileh atung en thei kuamah a-om kei hi. 4Huchi in huai laibuzial hong a sim tak hiam, ahihkeileh atung en tak kuamah a-om louh ziak in ka kapkap hi. 5Laibuzial Leh Belamnou 6Huan huai laltutphah leh huai thil hing lite leh huai upate lai ah thahsa hileh kilawm, Belamnou, kii sagih leh mit sagih nei dingh ka mu a, huai mit sagihte Pathian kha sagih leitung tengteng a sawlkhiakte ahi uhi. 7Amah ahong pai a, laltutphah tung a tupa khut taklam a kipan laibuzial ala hi. 8Huai laibuzial alaktak in, thil hing lite leh upa sawmnih-le-lite, gosem khat chiat leh dangka-eng belhbute gimnamtui a dim chiat tawi in, Belamnou ma ah abokkhup ua, huaite gimnamtui misiangthoute thumna ahi. 9Huan la thak khat asa uhi:“Laibuzial la a, huai a chiamtehnate phel tham na hi;thah in na omta a,chi chih leh pau chih leh michih leh nam chih a mitePathian a ding a na sisan a na lei tak ziak in. 10Ka Pathian kiang uah amaulalgam leh siampute hi ding in na bawl a;amaute'n leitung ah vai ahawm ding uh,” chi in. 11Huan ka etleh, laltutphah leh thil hingte leh upate kimvel ah, angel tampi aw ka za hi. Atamdan uh singkhat mun singkhat leh asang mun sang tampi ahi uh; 12Amau aw ngaihtak in:“Thah a om,Belamnou in hatnate,leh hauhsaknate, leh thilhihtheihnate, leh zahtakhuainate, leh thupinate,leh vualzawlnate mu tham na hi,”chi in akikou uhi. 13Huan thilsiam khempeuh van a omte, leitung a omte, lei nuai a omte, tuipi tung a omte leh amau a thil omte tengteng in,“Laltutphah tung a tupa lehBelamnou kiang ah;Vualzawlnate, zahtakhuainate,thupinate leh vaihawmnate,tangtawn tangtawn in om hen,”achih uh ka za hi. 14Huan thil hing lite'n, “Amen!” achi ua, huan upate abokkhup ua, abia uhi.

KILAKNA 6: 1Belamnou in chiamtehna sagihte lak a khat aphel lai ka mu a, thil hing lite lak a khat aw in, vanpiging bang mai in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi. 2Huan ka etleh ngai in, sakol kang leh atung a tupa thalpeu tawi ka mu a; amah kiang ah lallukhu piak in a-om a; amah vualzou a vualzou zou zel ding in ahong paikhia hi. 3Huan chiamtehna nihna aphel lai in, thil hing nihna in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi. 4Sakol dang asan khat ahong paikhia a; huai tung a tupa kiang ah leitung a kipan lemna lakhe ding a thupiak ahi a, huchi a amau akithahtuahna ding un; amah kiang a namsau thupi piak ahita hi. 5Huan chiamtehna thumna aphel lai in thil hing thumna in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi. Ka etleh ngai in, sakol vom ka mu hi; atung a tupa'n akhut in bukna atawi hi. 6Chiamtehna Honna 7Chiamtehna lina aphel lai in, thil hing lina aw in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi. 8Ka etleh ngai in, sakol daang ka mu hi; atung a tupa min Sihna ahi a, Misikhua toh akizui uhi. Namsau, kial leh sihna leh leitung a gam sahangte thah ding in amau kiang ah leitung seh li suah seh khat tung a thuneihna piak ahita hi. 9Chiamtehna ngana aphel lai in, Pathian thu ziak leh azuih uh theihsakna ziak a amau thah a omte maitam nuai ah ka mu hi. 10Amaute aw ngaihtak a kikou in, “Toupa Tungnungpen aw, siangthou leh dik bang tan ka sisan man uh amau leitung a tengte tung a thuk lou leh vaihawm lou ding na hia?” achi uhi. 11Amaute kiang ah puanngou thupi piak in a-om chiat ua;

KILAKNA 6: amau asikha hihpihte uleh a-unaute uh amau bang a thah a om dingte akim mateng uh na khawl tadih un chi a hilh in a-om uhi. 12Chiamtehna gukna aphel lai ka mu a, zinling thupitak a-om hi. Nisa tuh samul sai-ip puan bang in ahong vom a, kha leng apum in sisan bang in asan hi. 13Van aksite theipi kung huihpi in amutling a, ahutte apulh bang in leitung ah apulh uhi. 14Van laibuzial bang a kizial zou in suanmang in a-omta; tang sangte leh tuikulh gam teng amun ua pat suanmang in a-omta uhi. 15Huchi in leitung kumpipate, miliante, heutute leh ahat leh ahaute, salte leh sal lou teng leng tang sangte leh suangpi heng leh kokhukte ah akisel uhi. 16Tang sangte kiang leh suangpite kiang ah, “Hon delhlum unla, amah laltutphah tung a tupa leh Belamnou thangpaihna mai a kipan hon sel un; 17athangpaihna ni thupi hong tung hi; kua adingh zou dia?” achi uhi.

KILAKNA 7: 1Hiai thilte zoh in angel li, lei kil li a dinghte'n leitung a huih lite leitung a nung lou ding leh tuipi tung hiam, ahihkeileh sing tung hiam a nung lou ding in akhawlsak uhi. 2Huan amau chiamtehna a pan angel dang kuantou ka mu hi, Pathian hing chiamtehna anei ua; ama'n huai angel lite leitung leh tuipi hihse ding a piak a omte kiang ah aw ngaihtak a kikou in. 3“Pathian sikhate atal ua i chiamteh zoh ma in leitung leh tuipi leh singte hihse kei un,” achi hi. 4Huai chiamteh a omte lak a tampi, nuaikhat singli-le-sangli, Israel suan chiteng a kipan chiamteh zah ka za hi. 5Judah chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih chiamteh in a-om ua.Reuben chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih;Gad chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih; 6Asher chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih;Naphtali chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih;Manasseh chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih; 7Israel Mi Nuaikhat Singli-le-sangli Chiamtehna 8Zebulun chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih,Joseph chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih,Benjamin chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih.Mipi Tampi Muhna 9Hiai thil teng zoh in ka etleh ngai in, mipi tampi kuamah sim seng louh, nam chih leh chi chih leh mi tengteng leh pau tengteng a kipan laltutphah leh Belamnou ma a dingh a, puanngou thupi a kizem a tumnah tawi ka mu a, 10huan amau aw ngaihtak in,“Laltutphah a tu i Pathian lehBelamnou kiang ah hotdamna,”chi in akikou uhi. 11Angel tengteng laltutphah leh upate leh thil hing lite kimvel in adingh ua; laltutphah ma a bokkhup in, Pathian abia uhi: 12“Amen! Vualzawlnate,leh thupinate, leh pilnate,leh zahtakhuainate,leh thilhihtheihnate, leh hatnate,tangtawn tangtawn in i Pathiankiang ah om hen,” achi uhi.

KILAKNA 7: 13Huan upate lak a khat in ka kiang ah, “Hiai puanngou thupi a kizemte kuate ahi ua, koi a kipan a hong pai ahi ua?” chi in ahon houpih a, 14ke'n akiang ah, “Ka Toupa, nang na thei hi,” ka chi hi. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai mite gimthuakna thupi a kipan hong paite ahi ua, apuan thupi uh sawp in, Belamnou sisan in ahihngou uhi.” 15“Huaiziak in Pathian laltutphah ma ah a-om ua, sun leh zan inatempul uah amah asepsak uhi;amah laltutphah tung a tupa'n amau tung ahapuanin azak ding hi. 16Agil uh kial nawn ke'n chin,adang uh tak nawn himhim ke'n teh,amau ni in kang ke'n chin, satna in leng ahihgim kei ding hi. 17Belamnou huai laltutphahlak a om abelamchingpa uh ahih ding ziak in,amau hinna tuikhuk ah api ding a;Pathian in amit ua kipan khitui anulhul ding,” achi hi.

KILAKNA 8: 1Chiamtehna sagihna aphel lai in dakkal kimkhat sung van adai sipsip hi. 2Huchi in Pathian ma a angel sagih dinghte ka mu a, amaute kiang ah pengkul sagih piak in a-om hi. 3Huan angel dang khat ahong pai a, gimnamtui halna dangka-eng bel tawi in, maitam kiang ah adingh hi, akiang ah gimnamtui tampi laltutphah ma a om dangka-eng maitam teng a misiangthou tengteng thumna toh hel ding in, piak in a-om hi. 4Huai gimnamtui khu leh misiangthoute thumna angel khut a kipan Pathian ma ah azamtou hi. 5Angel in gimnamtui halna dangka-eng bel ala a; huai maitam amei in ahihdim a, leitung ah apaikhia a; huan awgingte, van-gingte leh khophiate leh zinlingte ahong om hi.Pengkulte 6Huan angel sagih pengkul sagih tawite mut ding in ahong kisa uhi. 7Angel masapen in amut a, sisan toh kihel gial leh mei ahong om hi, huaite leitung a paihkhiak in a-om ua; leitung mun thum a khen mun khat akangbei hi, huan sing mun thum a khen mun khat akangbei a; loupa hing tengteng akangbei hi. 8Chiamtehna Sagihna 9Huai tuipi a thil hingte hinna neite mun thum a khen mun khat asi ua; long mun thum a khen mun khat hihsiat in a-om hi. 10Huan angel thumna in amut a, van a kipan in aksi lianpi, meisel bang a kuang ahong kesuk a, lui mun thum a khen mun khat leh tui tuikhukte tung adeng hi. 11Huai aksi min Gamsai ahi; tui mun thum a khen mun khat gamsai asuak hi; tuite hihkhaat a a-om ziak un mi tampi asi uhi. 12Huan angel lina in amut a, huan ni mun thum a khen mun khat leh kha mun thum a khen mun khat leh aksi mun thum a khen mun khat hihsiat ahong hi a; huchi in avaknate uh mun thum a khen mun khat hihmial in a-om a; sun hun seh thum suah seh khat leh zan hun seh thum suah seh khat beisak in a-om hi. 13Huan ka etleh, angel khat van laizawl a leng in aw ngaihtak in, “Tunggik, tunggik, angel thum pengkul mut lai dingte leh huai ging hong om lai dingte ziak in leitung a omte tung agik,” achih ka za hi.

KILAKNA 9: 1Angel ngana in amut a, van a kipan leitung a aksi kia ka mu a; amah kiang ah kokhuk taw nei lou honna chabi piak in a-om hi. 2Ama'n kokhuk taw nei lou ahong a; huai kokhuk a kipan in meikhu, meipi khu bang mai ahong pawttou a, huai kokhuk a meikhu ziak in ni leh huihkhua hihmial in a-omta hi. 3Huan meikhu a kipan in leitung ah khaupete ahong suak ua; aikamte'n thilhihtheihna aneih bang un amau thilhihtheihna piak in a-om uhi. 4Amau leitung a loupate, thil hing himhimte leh sing peuhmahte, hihse lou a, mi kuapeuh atal ua Pathian chiamtehna neiloute kia hihse dia hilh in a-om uhi. 5Amau that lou ding a, kha nga sung amau hihgenthei zaw ding a hilh in a-om ua; huai a hihgentheihna tuh aikam in mi kuahiam ateh a ahihgentheih bang ahi. 6Huai ni chiang in mi'n sihna azong ding ua, bangchi mah in amu kei ding uh; sih a-ut ding ua, himahleh sihna in amau ataimangsan ding hi. 7Huan khaupete kilatdan sakol kidouna a pang dia bawl bang ahi ua; alutung uah dangka-eng lallukhu hileh kilawm a-om a, amai uh mihingte mai bang ahi. 8Numei sam bang sam anei ua, aha uh humpinelkai ha bang ahi. 9Pengkul Ngana Leh Gukna Mutna 10Huan aikam bang in meigu nei anei ua, mihingte kha nga sung hihnatna ding in amei uah thilhihtheihna anei uhi. 11Amaute'n kokhuk taw nei lou neitu angel atung ua kumpipa in anei uhi; ama min Hebru pau in Abaddon ahi a, Grik pau in Appolion ahi. 12Tunggikna masapen abeita a, ngai in, tunggikna nih tunung chiang in ahong tung lai ding hi. 13Huan angel gukna in amut a, Pathian ma a om dangka-eng maitam kii a kipan in aw ka za a;

KILAKNA 9: 14huai aw in angel gukna pengkul nei kiang ah, “Euphrates luipi lianpi a angel li hen a omte phel in,” achi hi. 15Huan mi mun thum a khen mun khat athahtheihna ding ua dak khat, ni khat, kha khat leh kum khat sung kisa a na om, angel lite phel in a-om uhi. 16Huan sakol tungtuang sepaih atamdan uh sing ngen mun singnih ahi chi a atamdan uh kigen ka za hi. 17Huchibang in kilakna in sakolte leh atung ua tuangte, mei bang a san, engdup leh kaat bang a eng, awmphaw neite ka mu hi; sakolte lu humpinelkai lu bang ahi ua; akam ua kipan in mei leh meikhu leh kaat asuakkhia hi. 18Huan akamsung ua kipan a hong pawtkhia huai hipi thum, mei, meikhu leh kaat in mihing mun thum a khen mun khat thah in a-om uhi. 19Huai sakolte thilhihtheihna akam uh leh amei ua om ahi a; amei uh gulpi mei toh akibang ua, lu leng anei ua, huaite in mi ahih na uhi. 20Huan midang huai gawtna a siloute akhut ua sepkhiakte ah akisik tuan kei ua; dawite, dangka-engte, milimte, dangka milimte, suang milimte leh sing milimte; mu theiloute, za thei lou leh tang theiloute be nawn lou ding in akisik tuan kei uhi. 21Huan atualthahna uh, ami bumna uh leh akingaihna khelhna uh leh aguktakna uh akisik tuan kei uhi.

KILAKNA 10: 1Huan meipi puansilh a kizem van a kipan angel hat dang hong paikhesuk ka mu hi; alutung ah sakhituihup a-om a, amai nisa mah abang a, akhete mei khuamte bang mai ahi. 2Akhut a laibuzial neuchik honsa atawi a; akhe taklam a tuipi tung sik in akhe veilam leitung ah anga hi. 3Humpinelkai humham bang in aw ngaihtak in akikou a; akikou khit in vanpiging sagihte'n a-aw uh asuah uhi. 4Huan vanpiging sagihte'n a-aw uh asuahtak un gelh ding in ka kisa hi; van a kipan aw in, “Vanpiging sagihte' thugen iim bikbek inla gelhkhe ke'n,” achih ka za hi. 5Huan tuipi tung leh leitung a angel dingh ka muh in van lam ah akhut taklam aliktou a; 6huchi in huai tangtawn a hing van leh leitung leh asung a om tengteng leh tuipi leh asung a om tengteng siampa min lou in azekai nawnlouhna ding chi in akichiam hi. 7Himahleh angel sagihna in amut ding pengkulpi agin chiang in, huai hun chiang in, “Pathian thuguk, asikha zawlneite kiang a agenkhiak tak hihkim in a-omta ding,” chi in. 8Van a kipan a ka aw zak in kei hon houpih a, “Kuan inla, tuipi tung leh leitung a angel dingh khut a laibuzial neuchik honsa va la in,” achih ka za nawn hi. 9Kei, angel kiang ah ka va hoh a, laibuzial neu hon pe ding in akiang ah ka va gen hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “La inla, ne zou vek in; huai in na gil hihkha in chin himahleh na kam ah khuaizu bang in akhum ding,” achi hi. 10Angel Hat Leh Laibu 11Huan ka kiang ah, “Mi tampite leh namte leh paute leh kumpipate kiang ah Pathian thusuak na genkholh nawn ngeingei ding ahi,” ahon chi hi.

KILAKNA 11: 1Huan sialluang chiang bang tehna chiang khat piak in ka om a; angel in, “Thou inla, Pathian tempul leh maitam leh huai a bete teh in; 2tempul huangsung polam ahihleh nusia inla, teh ke'n; Zentelte kiang a piaksa ahih tak ziak in; huan kho siangthou akhenuai un kha sawmli-le-nih sung asikden ding uhi. 3Huan ka theihpihtu nihte kiang ah thilhihtheihna ka pe dia, amau sai-ip puan silh in ni sangkhat zanih-le-sawmguk thu agenkhol ding uh achi hi.” 4Hiaite olive sing nihte leh khawnvak koihna nihte, leitung a Toupa ma a dinghte ahi uhi. 5Mi kuapeuh in amau suknat atup ualeh, akam ua kipan a mei hong suakkhia in amelmate akangtum vek dia; kuapeuh in amau hihnat atup ualeh huchibang a thah in a-om ding uhi. 6Hiai mite'n athugenkholh sung ua vuah azuklouhna ding in, van khaktheihna anei ua; huan a-ut hunhun ua sisan suaksak ding in tuite tung ah thu anei ua, leitung leng gawtna chiteng a gawt ding in thu anei uhi. 7Huan atheihpihna nasep uh azoh chiang un, kokhuk taw nei lou a kipan a hong pawtkhia huai gamsa in amau akidoupih ding a, amau azou dia, athat ding hi. 8Asiluang uh khopi thupi kongzing ah akisial a, huai khalam thu ah Sodom leh Aigupta kichi, kros a Toupa kilhlup a a-omna mah ahi. 9Mite leh chite leh paute leh namte lak a kipan mite aluang uh ni thum-le-akim a-en ua, aluang uh han a vui aphal kei uhi. 10Huchi in leitung a tengte amaute tung a kisial in akipak ua, kipahna abawl ua; thilpiakte akikhaktuah ua; hiai zawlnei nihte'n amau leitung a tengte athuakgimsak khit tak ziak un. 11Theihpihtu Nihte 12Van a kipan in aw thupitak aza ua, “Hiai ah hong paitou un,” chi in. Huan amau meipi lak ah van ah apaitou uhi;

KILAKNA 11: amelmate un amau amu chiat uhi. 13Huai dak in zinling thupitak ahong om a, khopi mun sawm a khen mun khat achim hi. Huai zinling ah mi sangsagih thah in a-om ua; adangte'n alau ua, van a Pathian kiang ah thupina apia uhi. 14Tunggikna nihna abeita a; ngai in, tunggikna thumna ahong tung pah ding hi.Pengkul Sagihte 15Huan angel sagihna in apengkul amut a; van ah aw thupitak in, “Khovel lalgam tuh i Toupa leh a Khrist a ahong hita hi; ama'n tangtawn in vai ahawm ding,” achi uhi. 16Upa sawmnih-le-li, laltutphah tung a Pathian ma a tute'n amai ua lei si in Pathian abia uhi. 17“Na tung ah ka kipak uhi,Toupa PathianBangkim hihthei, omlel leh omsa leh hong om ding;na thilhihtheihna thupi na lak tak ziak in lehvai na hawm tak ziak in, 18Namte aheh ua,tu in nang thangpaihna ni ahong tung hi,misite vai na hawmsak hun leh na sikha zawlneite leh misiangthoute kiang lehna min kihtate milian leh mineute kiang a kipahmanna piakna hun leh leitung hihsete hihsiat a a-om samhun uh ahong tungta hi,” achi uhi. 19Huan van a om Pathian tempul hon in a-om a; atempul sung ah thukhun bawm ahong kimu hi; huchi in khophiate, awte, van-gingte, zinlingte leh gial thupitak in azui ngal hi.

KILAKNA 12: 1Van ah chiamtehna thupi leh lamdangtak; numei khat ni a kizem, akhenuai a khapi sikden leh alutung a lallukhu aksi sawm-le-nih khu hong kimu hi. 2Ama'n nau apai a, nauvei leh suakkhe ding natna in akapkhia hi. 3Huan van ah chiamtehna dang khat ahong kilang a; ngai in, dragon san lianpi, lu sagih leh kii sawm nei, alutung a lallukhu sagih khu hong kilang hi. 4Amei in van a aksite mun thum a khen mun khat akaikhia a, leitung ah apaikhia a; dragon in huai numei nau nei ding a kisa, aneih chiang a anau nek zoh tum in ama ah adingh hi. 5Ta pasal naupang, sikchiang a nam tengteng tung a vaihawm ding anei a; atapa pen Pathian leh alaltutphah ah laktouh in a-om a, 6numei pen gamdai ah, Pathian in amah a dia amun bawlsak ah, huai ah ni sangkhat zanih-le-sawmguk khoi a om ding in atai hi.Van Kidouna 7Huan van ah kidouna a-om a; Mikael leh a-angelte dragon toh kidou ding in akuankhia ua; dragon leh a-angelte'n leng adouthuk uhi. 8Huan azou kei ua, van ah amun himhim uh muh in a-omta kei hi. 9Dragon lian, gulpi tek, diabol leh Setan chih a ompa, khovel pumpi khempa leh amah nasem angelte toh van a kipan paihkhiaksuk in a-om uhi. 10Huan van ah aw ngaihtak mai ka za hi, “Tu'n ah i Pathian hotdamna ahong tungta, thilhihtheihna leh Khrist thuneihna; i unaute hekpa, i Pathian ma a sun leh zan a amau hekpa, paihkhiaksuk a a-om ziak in. 11Belamnou sisan ziak leh atheihpih uh thu ziak in amah tung ah avualzouta ua; sih tanpha in leng ahinna uh a-it kei uhi. 12Numei Leh Dragon Muhna 13Leitung a dragon paihkhiak ahita chih akitheihtak in, huai numei nau pasal neinu agawt hi.

KILAKNA 12: 14Himahleh huai numei kiang ah muvanlai thupitak kha nih piak in a-om a, gulpi mai a kipan gamdai mun a alenlut theihna ding in, huai ah hun khat sung leh hunte leh hun kimkhat sung vak in a-om hi. 15Gulpi in akam a kipan in tuipi bang tui luang a numei ataihmangsak theihna ding in numei nung ah asekhia hi. 16Lei in numei apanpih a, lei in akam aka a, dragon in akam a kipan a atui siatkhiak ana valhzohsak vekta hi. 17Numei tung ah dragon aheh mahmah a, asuan omsun, Pathian thupiak zuite leh Jesu thu theihpihte kidoupih ding in akuankhia hi. 18Huan tuipiau ah dragon adingh hi.

KILAKNA 13: 1Tuipi piau a ka dinleh tuipi a kipan gamsa khat, kii sawm leh lu sagih nei, akiite tung a lallukhu sawm om chiat, alutungte a Pathian gensiatna om, hong paikhetou ka mu hi. 2Ka gamsa muh gialbem abang a, akhe vompi khe abang a, akam humpinelkai kam abang hi; dragon in athuneihna thupi leh alaltutphah leh athilhihtheihnate amah apia hi. 3Alute lak a khat sihpih khop hial dia liam hileh kilawm in ka mu hi; sihpih khop hial dia liam pen hihdam in a-om a; huchi in leitung pumpi in huai gamsa lamdang sa in azuita uhi. 4Dragon, gamsa kiang a athuneihna petu abia ua; huchi in hiai gamsa abiak kawm in, “Hiai gamsa bang kua a-om a, amah kidoupih thei kua om ahia?” achi uhi. 5Huan gamsa kiang ah thil thupite leh Pathian gensiatnate genna ding kam piak in a-om a, huan akiang ah thuneihna piak in a-om hi; kha sawmli-le-nih thilhihtheihna piak ahi. 6Pathian gensiatna ding, amin gense ding leh a-omna, van a tengte ngei gensia in akamkata hi. 7Huan dragon in gamsa kiang ah misiangthoute kidoupih ding leh amaute zou ding in phalna apia a; chi chih, pau chih leh nam chih tung a thuneihna leng apia hi. 8Huan khovel om tung a pan thahsa Belamnou' hinna laibu a amin tuangloute tengteng leh leitung a teng tengteng in amah abe ding uhi. 9“Kuapeuh zakna ding bil nei in, za hen!” 10Kuapeuh sal a pi dingte sal a pi in a-om ding; kuapeuh namsau a thah dingte namsau a thah in a-om ding. Hiai ah misiangthoute kuhkalna leh ginna nei ding a chial ahi uh. 11Huan gamsa dang khat leitung a kipat a hong pawtkhetou ka mu a; belamnou bang in kii nih anei a, dragon bang in thu agen hi.

KILAKNA 13: 12Gamsa masapen thuneihna tengteng amitmuh in azang hi. Leitung leh asung a teng tengteng gamsa masapen, si khop hial a liam hihdam a om, be ding in asawl hi. 13Gam Sahangte Muhna 14Huan gamsa sik leh amitmuh a thillamdang hihtheihna piak a a-omna in ama'n leitung a tengte akhem a; huai gamsa namsau a satliam leh dam nawn lim bawl ding in lei a tengte thu apia hi. 15Gamsa masa lim a nakna pe ding leh tua gamsa apau theihna ding in dragon in amah kiang ah thilhihtheihna apia a, huchi a gamsa lim be nuam lou tengteng leng athahsak theihna ding in. 16Mi tengteng, aneu leh alian, azawng ahau, sikha leh sikha lou, akhut taklam uh hiam, atal uh hiam ah chiamtehna piak in a-om chiat uhi; 17huchi a kuamah in huai chiamtehna hiam, gamsa min hiam, ahihkeileh amin nambat neiloute'n lei thei lou hiam, zuak thei lou a a-omna ding in. 18Hiai ah pilna a-om hi. Kuapeuh theihsiamna nei in, gamsa nambat sutkhia hen; huai lah mihing nambat ahi ngal a; huan ama nambat tuh zaguk sawmguk-le-guk ahi.

KILAKNA 14: 1Huai nung in ka etleh ngai in, Zion tang tung a Belamnou dingh ka mu a, akiang ah mipi nuaikhat singli-le-sangli, atal ua a Pa min kigelh chiatte toh adingkhawm uhi. 2Tui tampi leh vanpiging bang a ging van a kipan in aw ka za a; ka aw zak gosem tumte'n agosem uh atumging uh abang a; 3laltutphah leh thil hing lite ma leh upate ma ah la thak hileh kilawm khat asa ua; leitung a kipat a huai leikhiaksate, nuaikhat singli-le-sanglite lou ngal kuamah in huai la atheithei kei uhi. 4Hiaite numei lak a kihihninloute ahi ua; nungak siangthou bang ahi uhi. Hiaite apaina lamlam ua Belamnou zuite ahi uhi. Pathian a ding leh Belamnou a ding a gah masapen hi ding a mite lak a kipan a leisate ahi uhi. 5Huan akam uah zuau a-om kei a; amaute lah Pathian laltutphah ma ah gensiatbei ahi ngal ua.Angel Thum Muhna 6Huan angel dang van laizawl a leng ka mu a, ama'n tangtawn tanchinhoih, leitung a tengte kiang leh nam chih leh chi chih leh pau chih leh michihte kiang a genkhiak ding anei hi. 7Aw ngaihtak in, “Pathian kihta unla, amah thupina pia un; avaihawmna hun ahong tungta ngal a; van leh lei leh tuipi leh tuikhukte siampa amah bia un,” achi hi. 8Huan angel nihna in ahon zui a, “Pukta, pukta Babulon kho thupi, nam tengteng a mingaihhatna, hehna uain dawnsaknu,” achi hi. 9Angel thumna in amau ahon zui a, aw ngaihtak in, “Kuapeuh gamsa leh alim bia, atal hiam akhut hiam a chiamtehna neite'n 10Pathian thangpaihna uain adawn ding ua, huai uain thangpaihna nou, bangmah toh hel louh hial a bawl ahi; angel siangthoute leh Belamnou muh in amah mei leh kaat in hihnat in om in teh. 11Huan ahihnatna meikhu uh tangtawn tangtawn in azamtou dia;

KILAKNA 14: huai gamsa leh alim bete leh kuapeuh amin chiamtehna nei taphot in sun leh zan in tawlngakna anei kei ding uh,” achi hi. 12Hiai ah misiangthou, Pathian thupiakte leh Jesu ginna zuite kuhkalna nei ding a chialna a-om hi. 13Huan van a kipan aw in hichibang in, “Gelh in, tua kipan in misite, Toupa a site ahampha uh,” Kha in, “Ahi, asepgimna uh akhawlsanta ding ua, athilhihte un hon zui ding ahih ziak in,” achih uh ka za hi.Leitung Buh Lak Hun 14Belamnou Leh Mipi Nuaikhat Singli-le-sangli muhna 15Angel dang tempul a kipan ahong paikhia a, meipi tung a tupa kiang ah ngaihtak in, “Na kawite lik inla, at in; at hun atungta; leitung buh amingawpta,” chi in akikou hi. 16Huai mei tung a tupa'n leitung ah akawite alik a; leitung at in a-omta hi. 17Huan van a om tempul a kipan in angel dang ahong paikhia a, ama'n leng kawite hiamtak atawi hi. 18Huan meikuang tung a thilhihtheihna nei, angel dang maitam ma a kipan in ahong paikhia a; ama'n aw ngaihtak in, huai kawite tawipa sam in, “Na kawite hiamtak lik inla, leitung a grep gahbomte lakhawm in; grepte amin mahmahta hi,” achi hi. 19Huai angel in leitung ah akawite alik a, leitung a grep gahte alakhawm a, Pathian thangpaihna, uain sukna thupi, uain sukna ah apailut hi. 20Kho polam ah uain sukna chil in a-om a, uain sukna a kipan sakol kamkaihna tanpha louching sangkhat-le-zaguk pha in sisan aluangkhia hi.

KILAKNA 15: 1Huan chiamtehna thupi leh lamdang, angel sagih, hii nanung sagih, ananungpente, Pathian hehna toh kidim tawi, van ah ka mu hi. 2Huan limlang tuipi hileh kilawm, mei toh kihel leh gamsa leh alim leh amin nambat tung a vualzoute, akhut ua Pathian gosem tawi a, limlang tuipi kiang a dingh ka mu a, 3amau Pathian sikha, Mosi la leh Belamnou la asa uhi.“Na thilhihte thupi in alamdang hi.Aw Toupa Pathian,Bangkim hihthei!Na lampite adik in atang uhi,Misiangthoute Kumpipa, chi in. 4Toupa aw, kua'n ahia na min hih thupi a lau lou ding?Nang kia lah siangthou na hi ngal a.Namte tengteng hong pai in na ma ah ahong be ding uh,na thilhih diktatte lah hihlat in omta ngal ua,” achi uhi. 5Hiai thilte ka muh nung in, van a theihsakna biakbuk dantan sungnung hon in a-om a; 6huan hiai dantan sungnung a kipan in angel sagih, gawtna sagih nei, puanmalngat siangthou leh vak a kizem a, dangka-eng kawnggak a a-awm ua kigakte ahong paikhia uhi. 7Thil hing lite lak a khat in angel sagihte kiang ah tangtawn tangtawn a hing Pathian hehna a dim dangka-eng belhbu sagihte apia hi. 8Huchi in Pathian thupina athilhihtheihna a kipan meikhu in tempul hihdim in a-om hi; angel sagihte gawtna sagihte atunkim masiah asung ah kuamah alut theita kei uhi. 15Angel Sagih Leh Gimna Sagihte

KILAKNA 16: 1Huan tempul dantan sungnung a kipan hong suak aw thupi in, angel sagihte kiang ah, “Kuan unla, leitung ah Pathian thangpaihna belhbu sagihte va sungkhia un,” achih ka za hi. 2Amasapen akuan a, leitung ah abelhbu asungkhia a, huai gamsa chiamtehna nei, alim bemite tung ah meima sia leh nai in ahong suak hi. 3Anihna in tuipi tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; misite si bang in sisan ahong suak a; tuipi sung a thil omte tanpha in hinna nei peuhmah asita uhi. 4Athumna pen in luite leh tui nakte tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; sisan ahong suak uhi. 5Tuite angel in, “Nang omsa leh omlel, nang Siangthoupa aw, hichibang a vai na hawm tak ziak in na diktat hi. 6Amau misiangthoute leh zawlneite sisan asuah ua, nang adawn ding ua sisan na piak, aphu tawk him uh ahi,” achih ka za hi. 7Huan maitam in, “Ahi, Toupa Pathian aw, Bangkim hihthei, na vaihawmte adik in adiktathuai hi!” achih ka za hi. 8Alina pen in nisa tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; amah kiang ah mite meikuang a hainat theihna piak in a-om hi. 9Asat a sa a mite hainat in a-om ua; hichibang natnate tung a thilhihtheihna nei, Pathian min agensia ua; Pathian kiang a thupina pe ding in akisik tuan kei uhi. 10Angana in gamsa tutphah tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; huan alalgam hihmial in a-om a; amau na sa in alei uh akei ua, 11anatna uh leh ameimate uh ziak in amau tuh van a Pathian agensia ua; athilhihte uah akisik tuan kei uhi. 12Agukna in Euphrates Luipi thupi tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; huai tui akang vek hi, huchi a suahlam a kipan kumpipate lampi ding bawlsa a a-omtheihna ding in.

KILAKNA 16: 13Dragon kam a kipan leh gamsa kam a kipan leh zawlnei taklou kam a kipan in kha nin thum, ukeng bang mai hong paikhia ka mu hi. 14Amaute ahih uleh dawite kha, thillamdang hihte; khovel pumpi leh lei kumpipate kiang a hong a, Pathian Bangkim hihtheipa Ni thupi a kidouna a dia amaute pikhawmte ahi uhi. 15“Ngai in, guta bang in ka hong pai hi! Kiveng leh puan tengsa a ommi ahampha hi, huchi lou in zaw vuaktang in a-om dia; azumhuaina amu kha ding uhi.” 16Pathian Hehna Belhbu Sagih Muhna 17Asagihna in huihkhua tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; huan laltutphah a kipan in dantan sungnung ah aw ngaihtak ahong suakkhia a, “Zoh ahita!” achi hi. 18Huchi in khophiate, awte, van-gingte, leh zinling thupi ahong om a, huchibang a thupi leh hat leitung a mihing om nungsiah om ngei nai lou zinling thupi ahi. 19Khopi thupi mun thum in akikhen a, namte' khopite achim ua; Babulon khopi thupi Pathian mitmuh in theihgige in a-om a, adawn ding in ahehna kihtakhuai uain nou piak in a-om hi. 20Tuikulh gam chiteng ataimang ua, tang sangte muh phak in a-omta kei hi. 21Huan van a kipan in gial lian pipi, talent khat a gik mite tung ah ahong kesuk hi; mite'n huai gial a gawtna ziak in Pathian agensia ua; huai gawtna athupi mahmah hi.

KILAKNA 17: 1Huai thil nung in belhbu sagih tawi angel sagihte lak a khat hong pai in kei ahong houpih a, “Hong pai in, tui tampite tung a tu kizuaknu thupi tung a vaihawmna ka hon ensak ding. 2Leitung kumpipate amah toh akingai ua, huan amingaihna uain in leitung a tengte khamsak in a-om uh,” achi hi. 3Ama'n Kha in gamdai ah hon pomang a; huan gamsa san-au, Pathian gensiatna min a pumdim, lu sagih leh kii sawm nei tung a numei khat tu ka mu hi. 4Huai numei in puan sandup leh puan sandang asilh a, dangka-eng leh suangmantam leh tuikepsuang in akizem hi; akhut in dangka-eng nou, thilkihhuaite leh angkawm nitna a dim atawi hi. 5Huan ataltang ah, “Babilon thupi, kizuakte leh leitung a kihhuaite nu,” chih min khat akigelh hi. 6Huan huai numei, misiangthoute sisan leh Jesu martarte sisan dawnkham in ka mu hi.Huai minu ka muhtak in lamdang ka sa mahmah hi. 7Huan angel in ka kiang ah, “Bangziak a lamdang sa na hia? Huai numei leh amah pua gamsa, lu sagih leh kii sawm nei, thuguk ka hon hilh ding, achi hi. 8Huai na gamsa muh a-om khin a, huan a-om kei a; kokhuk taw nei lou a kipan a hong paikhe ding ahi, manthatna a pai ding ahi. Huan leitung a tengte, khovel siam tung a kipan a hinna laibu a min gelhlouhte'n tua gamsa om khin a, om lou leh hong om ding ahihdan amuh chiang un lamdang asa ding uhi. 9“Hiai ah pilna lungsim neih akul hi. Lu sagihte numei tutna tang sang sagihte ahi uhi. 10Huan kumpipa sagihte a-om ua; nga apuk khin ua, khat a-om lel a, khat ahong tung nai kei hi. Ahong tun chiang in, hun tomchik sung a-om ding hi.

KILAKNA 17: 11Huai gamsa na om khinsa, tua om lou pen kumpi giatna ahi. Amah sagihte lak a tel ahi; huan manthatna ah apai ding hi. 12“Huan kii sawm na muhte, lalgam nei nai lou, kumpipa sawmte ahi ua; himahleh dakkal khat lel, huai gamsa toh amau kumpipate bang in thuneihna anei ding uhi. 13Hiaite'n lungsim khat nei in, gamsa kiang ah athilhihtheihna leh athuneihna uh apia uhi. 14Hiaite'n Belamnou akidoupih ding ua, Belamnou in amau azou dia, amah toupate' Toupa leh kumpipate' Kumpipa ahih ziak in; amah toh omkhawmte bel sapte, telte leh muanhuaite ahi uhi.” 15Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Kizuaknu tutna tui na muhte mite leh mipite leh namte leh paute ahi uhi. 16Kii sawm na muhte leh na gamsa muhte'n kizuaknu amudah ding ua, suanbei leh vuaktang asuaksak ding uhi, asa ane ding ua, amah mei in ahaltum vek ding uhi. 17Kizuaknu Leh Gamsa Muhna

KILAKNA 18: 1Hiai thil nung in van a kipan angel dang, thuneihna liantak nei, van a kipan hong paikhesuk ka mu a; athupina in leitung avaksak hi. 2Aw ngaihtak in akikou a, “Chimta, chimta Babulon khopi thupi, dawite omna leh kha nin tengteng kulh leh vasa nin leh huathuai teng kulh ahong hita hi. 3Nam tengteng in amingaihna hehna uain a nam tengteng dawnkhamsak a-om ua, leitung Kumpipate'n amah akingaihpih ua, leitung sumsinte noptal luatna a ahong hauh tak ziak un,” achi hi. 4Huan van a kipan in aw dang in hichibang in agen hi:“Ka mite akhelhna ua na pan khaklouhna ding uh leh ahii na kailouhna ding un,amah a kipan in hong paikhia un,achih ka za hi. 5Akhelhna van atungta a,Pathian in akhelhnate atheigige hi. 6Ama'n hon piak bangmah akiang ah pia unla,amah gamtatna aleh nih in thukkik un;ahelna nou ah amah a ding in aleh nih in helsak un, 7Akithupisakna zahzah leh anoptalna zah in amah bawlgim un,hihlungkham un; ama'n alungsim a,‘Kumpinu in ka tu a, meithai ka hi kei, bangchi mah in kalungkham ngei kei ding,’ achih ziak in. 8Huaiziak in ni khat sung inhipi a gawtna, sihna, lungkhamna leh kialna ahong tung ding hi;huan amah mei in halmang vek in om in teh;atung a vaihawm ToupaPathian ahat ziak in.” 9Huan leitung a kumpipate amah kingaihpih leh nuamtat a omte'n, amah haltumna meikhu amuh chiang un, amah kah in amau ding uhi. 10Athuakna a hihnat a om ding lau in gamlapi a dingh in,“Maizen! Maizen!Khopi thupi Babilon!Dakkal khat sung a na tung a vaihawmna ahong tung ngal a,” achi ding uhi. 11Huan leitung a sumsinte'n, asumsinna van uh kuamah in alei louh ziak un, kap in asuun ding uhi.

KILAKNA 18: 12Huan asumsinna vante uh dangka-eng leh dangka a sumsinna van, suangmantam, tuikepsuang, puanmalngat hoih, puansan, maimom puan, puan eng, singnamtui, saiha a bawl van, sing mantampen chi a van bawl tengteng, sumsan leh sik leh marbul suang a belsuan bawl tengteng; 13leh singguithak, namtui, namtui haichi, thaunamtui, chim, uain, thau, buhnel, buh, belam, huan sakol kangtalai leh sal, huai tuh mite hinna ahi. 14“Huan na lungsim a na deih gahte'n nang hon taimangsan ua, thil limchi leh hoih teng in nang ahon manthatsan ua, muh nawn ahi ngei kei ding,” achi uhi. 15Hiai thilte a sumsinte, amah ziak a hau a bawlte'n, amah hihnat a a-omna lau in gamlapi a dingh in, kap in asuun ding uhi. 16“Maizen! Maizen! Khopi thupi, puanmalngat hoih, asan leh a-eng a kizem a, dangka-eng, suangmantam leh tuikepsuang a kivannu! 17Dakkal khat in hichi tel a hauhna thupi bangmah lou a bawl a a-om ziak in,” achi ding uhi. Huan longpute leh akoilam lam a long a hong tungte leh long mite leh tuipi a nek zong tengteng gamlapi ah adingh uhi. 18Babulon Pukna 19Huan alutung ua leivui kibuak in akikou ua, kap leh suun in, “Maizen! Maizen! Kho thupi huai a tuipi a mi longnei tengteng ama hauhsakna ziak a hauhsak in a-om uhi! Dakkal khat sung a amah bangmah lou ahong hih tak mai, achi ding uhi. 20“Aw nang van, amah tung ah kipak unla, Aw nou misiangthoute leh nou sawltakte leh nou zawlneite; na tung ua avaihawmna Pathian in ama tung a vai ahawm tak ziak in kipak un!” achi uhi. 21Huan angel hat khat in buhgawina suang lianpi hileh kilawm suang khat adom a, tuipi ah apailut a, “Hichibang in khopi thupi, Babulon nakpi a hihchip in om in chin, muhkhiak nawn louh hial in a-om ding.

KILAKNA 18: 22Gosem tumte leh lasiamte leh tamngai tumte leh pengkul tumte, na sung ah akiza nawn kei hial ding hi. Khutsiam siamna nei himhim, na sung ah muhkhiak in om nawn kei hial un chin; na sung ah khawl ging akiza nawn sam kei ding hi. 23Na sung ah meivak avak nawn kei ding a; mouneipa aw leh mou aw na sung ah akiza nawn kei ding; na sumsinte lah leitung kumpipate ahi ngal ua; na bumsiamna in nam tengteng khem in a-omta uhi! 24“Amah sung ah zawlneite sisan leh misiangthoute sisan leh leitung a thah a omte tengteng sisan akimukhia hi,” achi hi.

KILAKNA 19: 1Hiai thilte nung in van ah mipi aw hileh kilawm in, “Hallelujah! Hotdamna leh thupina leh thilhihtheihna i Pathian a ahi; 2avaihawmna adik in akizen hi; kizuaknu thupi leitung a, amingaihna a hihsenu tung a vai ahawm tak ziak in, ama'n asikhate sisan ama tung ah athukta,” achih ka za hi. 3“Hallelujah! Huai khopi halna meikhu tangtawn tangtawn in azamtou hi,” chi in akikou nawn uhi. 4Upa sawmnih-le-lite leh thil hing lite abokkhup ua, Pathian laltutphah a tupa, “Amen, Hallelujah!” chi in abia uhi. 5Huan laltutphah a kipan in aw ahong pawtkhia a, “Nou asikhate aw, na vek un, aneu leh alian, nou amah laute, Pathian phatna pia un,” chi in. 6Mipi tampi aw hileh kilawm tui tampi ging bang leh vanpiging bang aw in, “Hallelujah! Toupa i Pathian Bangkim hihthei in vai ahawm ziak in, 7nuam ni, nakpitak in kipak ni, amah kiang ah thupina pia in; Belamnou zineih hun ahong tungta hi. Azi leng akisak khit tak ziak in; 8amah puanmalngat hoih leh siangthou a kizepna ding in piak in a-omta, achih ka za hi, tua puanmalngat hoih misiangthoute nasep diktatte ahi.” 9Huan angel in ka kiang ah, “Gelh in, Belamnou zineihna nitak ankuang um ding a chial a omte ahampha uhi,” achi hi. 10Huan amah be ding in akhebul ah ka puk hi. Huan ka kiang ah, “Hon be kei hial in; Jesu thu theihpihna kem nangmah unau leh sikha hihpih ka hi; Pathian be zaw in, Jesu thu theihpihna genkholhna kha ahih ziak in,” achi hi.Vualzou Khrist 11Huan van kihong ka mu a; ngai in, sakol kang leh atung a tuang Ginom leh Dik kichi leng ka mu hi; ama'n dikna a vaihawm in kidouna abawl hi.

KILAKNA 19: 12Amit meikuang bang ahi a, alutung ah lallukhu tampi a-om a, min khat amah lou ngal kuamah theih louh kigelh anei hi. 13Amah puan sisan a diah in akizem a; amin, “Pathian Thu,” chih ahi. 14Amah van a om sepaihhon puanmalngat hoih, ngou leh siangthou silh a sakol kang tung a tuang in ahon zui uhi. 15Akam a kipan in namte asatna ding, namsau hiam khat ahong suakkhia a; amau tung ah sikchiang in vai ahawm dia; Pathian Bangkim hihthei hehna lauhuaina uain sukna achil hi. 16Apuan tung leh aphei tung ah min, “KUMPIPATE' KUMPIPA, LEH ToupaTE' Toupa,” chih akigelh hi. 17Huan angel khat ni a dingh ka mu a; amah aw ngaihtak a kikou in, van laizawl a vasa leng tengteng kiang ah, “Hong unla, Pathian nitak an thupi ah hong kikhawm vek un; 18Kumpipate sa, sepaih heutute sa, mihatte sa, sakolte sa, atung a tute sa, mi tengteng sa, sikha leh sikhaloute sa leh milian leh mineu sa na nektheihna ding un,” achi hi. 19Belamnou Zineihna Hallelujah 20Gamsa mat in a-om a, zawlnei tak lou, ama a chiamtehna hih a gamsa chiamtehna neite leh amah limbete akhempa toh amankhawm a; anih tuak un ahing in meidil, kaat a kang sung ah paihlut in a-om uhi. 21Huan adangte huai sakol tung a tupa kam a kipan a hong suak namsau a thah in a-om uhi; vasa tengteng amau sa in gilvah in a-om uhi.

KILAKNA 20: 1Huan angel khat van a kipan a hong paikhesuk, akhut a kokhuk taw nei lou honna chabi leh khainiang lianpi tawi ka mu hi. 2Ama'n dragon, gulpi tek, diabol leh Setan aman a, kum sangkhat sung a ding in amah ahen hi. 3Kum sangkhat achin ma a namte akhem nawnlouhna ding in amah kokhuk taw nei lou ah paihlut in a-om a, akhakkhum a, amah akilhkhum hi; tunung in sawt lou kal amah khah nawn a om ding ahi. 4Huan laltutphahte leh atung a tute ka mu a, amaute kiang ah vaihawmna piak in a-om hi; Jesu thu theihsakna ziak leh Pathian thu ziak a angawng uh sattan a omte kha ka mu a, huaite gamsa leh alim beloute, atal ua leh akhut ua achiamtehna neiloute ahi ua; amaute ahong hing ua, Khrist toh kum sangkhat vai ahawm uhi. 5Hiai pen thohnawnna masapen ahi. Misi dangte bel kum sangkhat abei mateng ahingkik kei uhi. 6Thohnawnna masapen a pangte ahampha un asiangthou uhi; amaute tung a sih nihna in hihtheih aneih louh ziak in; himahleh amau Pathian leh Khrist siampute ahong hi ding ua, kum sangkhat sung amah toh vai ahawm ding uhi.Setan Khah Nawnna Leh Kidouna Nanung 7Huan kum sangkhat abei chiang in, atanna suangkul a kipan Setan khahkhiak in a-om dia, 8leitung kil li a om namte, Gog leh Magog khem a amau kidouna mun a pikhawm ding in amah ahong paikhe pah dia; atamdan uh tuipi piaunel bang ahi uhi. 9Huan amau leitung vailam khaksuak in apaitou ua, misiangthoute giahphual leh khopi it, akimvel in a-um uhi. Huan van a kipan in mei ahong kesuk a, amaute akangtum vek hi. 10Huan amaute khempa diabol gamsa leh zawlnei taklou omna, mei leh kaat dil ah paihlut in a-om uhi;

KILAKNA 20: tangtawn tangtawn in sun leh zan in hihnat in a-omta ding uhi.Vaihawmna Nanungpen 11Huan laltutphah ngou thupi leh atung a tu ka mu a; amai a kipan lei leh van ataimang a, amaute a ding in mun himhim a-om kei hi. 12Misite, aneu leh alian, huai laltutphah ma a dinghte ka mu a; laibute akihong a; laibu dang, hinna laibu leng akihong a; misite huai laibute a thil kigelhte a kipan in athilhih bang ua vai hawmsak in a-om uhi. 13Tuipi in asung a om misite ahon pawtsak a; sihna leh misikhua in asung ua misi omte ahon pawtsak ua; mi chiteng athilhih bangbang ua vai hawmsak in a-om uhi. 14Sihna leh misikhua meidil ah paihlut in a-om uhi. Hiai meidil pen sih nihna ahi. 15Kuapeuh hinna laibu a kigelh amuh louh uh, meidil ah paihlut in a-om uhi. 20Kum Sangkhat Sung Setan Henna

KILAKNA 21: 1Huan van masapen leh lei masapen abei tak ziak un van thak leh lei thak ka mu a; tuipi leng a-om nawnta kei hi. 2Khopi siangthou, Jerusalem thak, mou apasal a ding a kizem bang a bawlzohsa a om, Pathian a kipan van ahong paikhesuk ka mu hi. 3Huan laltutphah a kipan aw thupitak ka zak in, “Ngai in, mihingte lak ah Pathian biakbuk a-om a, amau lak ah ateng dia amau amite ahi ding ua, Pathian mahmah in amaute a-ompih dia, a Pathian uh ahi ding hi. 4Huan amit ua kipan in khitui tengteng anulhul dia; sihna a-om nawn kei dia; lusuun leh kah leh natna himhim leng a-om nawn kei ding hi,” achi hi. 5Huan laltutphah tung a tupa'n, “Ngai in, thil tengteng ka siam thakta,” achi hi. “Gelh in, hiai thute amuanhuai in adik uhi,” achi hi. 6Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Sep zoh ahita. Kei Alpha leh Omega, abul leh atawp ka hi. Dangtakte kiang ah aman bei in hinna tuikhuk a tui amau ka pe ding hi. 7Kuapeuh avualzoupa'n hiai thilte aluah ding; a Pathian ka hi dia, amah ka tapa ahi ding hi. 8Himahleh dawilokte leh gingtaloute leh kihhuaite leh tualthatte leh mingaihhatte leh bumhatte leh milim bete leh zuautheite tengteng tan tuh dil, mei leh kaat a kang, sih nihna ahi,” achi hi.Jerusalem Thak 9Huan angel sagih belhbu sagih leh gawtna sagih nanungpen tawite lak a khat ahong pai a; kei ahon houpih a, “Hiai ah hong pai in, mou, Belamnou zi ka hon ensak ding,” achi hi. 10Ama'n Kha in tang lian leh sangpi ah ahon pomang a, huchi in khopi siangthou Jerusalem, Pathian a kipan a van a hong paikhesuk ahon ensak a, 11Pathian thupina anei a; avakna suangmantam pen, jasper suang, kristal bang in asiang hi.

KILAKNA 21: 12Kulhbaang thupi leh sangpi anei a; kong sawm-le-nih anei a, huai kongte ah angel sawm-le-nih a-om ua; huai kongtungte ah Israel suan nam sawm-le-nihte min akigelh hi: 13asuahlam ah kongpi thum a-om a; amallam ah kongpi thum, asimlam ah kongpi thum; atumlam ah kongpi thum a-om hi. 14Huan khopi kulhbaang in nuaiphah sawm-le-nih anei a, huaite tung ah Belamnou sawltak sawm-le-nihte minte atuang hi. 15Huan kei hon houpihpa'n khopi leh kongpite leh kulhbaangte tehna ding in tehna dangka-eng sialluang atawi hi. 16Huai khua in ning li anei a, adunglam availam chiachia in alian a; asialluang in khopi ateh a, lou chiing singkhat-le-sangnih ahi a, dunglam leh vailam leh asanlam akikim uhi. 17Huan angel in huai kulhbaang mihing tehna dan in ateh a, tong za-le-sawmli-le-li a sah ahi. 18Huan akhopi kulhbaang jasper suang a kibawl ahi a; huan akhopi dangka-eng siang, limlang siang bang ahi. 19Huai khopi kulhbaang suangphum suangmantam chiteng a zep ahi. Asuangphum khatna jasper suang ahi a; anihna sapphir suang, athumna kalsedoni suang; alina emerald suang; 20angana sardonik suang; agukna sardi suang; asagihna kristolait suang; agiatna beril suang; akuana topaz suang; asawmna krisopras suang; asawm-le-khatna zasinth suang; asawm-le-nihna amethis suang ahi uhi. 21Van Thak Leh Lei Thak 22Toupa Pathian Bangkim hihthei leh Belamnou atempul ahih ziak in, huai khopi ah tempul ka mu kei hi. 23Huan atung a tanvak ding in huai khopi in ni hiam, kha hiam leng apoimoh kei a, Pathian thupina in atanvak a, Belamnou ameivak uh ahi. 24Huai vak ah hotdam namte akhosa ding ua; leitung kumpipate athupina uh toh ahong lut ding uhi. 25Bangchi mah in huai kongpite sun a khak in a-om kei ding hi, huai lai a zan a-om louh ding ziak in. 26Huai mun ah namte thupina leh zahtakhuaina laklut ahi ding hi. 27Bangchi mah in huai ah thilnin hiam, ahihkeileh kihhuai leh zuaubawl himhim leng alut kei ding a; himahleh Belamnou hinna laibu a min gelhte kia alut ding uhi.

KILAKNA 22: 1Huan hinna tui siang luanna lui ahon ensak a, huai lui bel kristal bang a siang, Pathian leh Belamnou laltutphah a pan hong luangkhia ahi. 2Huai a kongzing lai, alui lang tuaktuak ah hinna singgah chi sawm-le-nih nei, kha teng a gah a-om a; huai singnahte namte hihdamna ding ahi. 3Huan hamsia himhim a-om nawnta kei dia; huai ah Pathian leh Belamnou laltutphah a-omta ding hi; asikhate'n a-nna asem ding uhi. 4Amaute'n amel amu ding ua; atal uah ama min a-om ding hi. 5Huan zan himhim a-om nawn kei dia; khawnvak vak leh nisa vak hiam leng apoimoh nawn kei ding uh; Toupa Pathian in amau vakna apiak ding ziak in; amau tangtawn tangtawn in vai ahawmta ding uhi.Jesu Hong Paina 6Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, hiai thute amuanhuai un adik uhi; Toupa zawlnei siangthoute Pathian in thil hong om pah mahmah dingte asikhate kiang ah musak ding in a-angel asawl hi. 7“Ngai in, Ka hong pai pah ding. Hiai laibu a genkholhna thute zui peuhmah ahampha hi,” achi hi. 8Huan kei Johan, hiai thilte zapa leh mupa ka hi. Huchi a ka zak leh ka muhtak in, hiai thilte hon musakpa angel khebul ah be ding in ka puk hi. 9Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hon be kei hial in, hiai laibu thute kem, na unau zawlneite leh nang sikha hihpih ka hi; Pathian be zaw in,” achi hi. 10Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai laibu a genkholhnate bilhkhum ke'n, ahun anai tak ziak in. 11Kuapeuh midiklou in diklouhna hih nalai henla, kuapeuh minin, nin nalai hen; kuapeuh midiktat, diktat nalai henla; kuapeuh Mi Siangthou, siangthou nalai hen,” achi hi. 12“Ngai in, ka hong pai pah ding hi; michih athilhih bang zel ua piak ding in ka kiang ah ka kipahman a-om hi.

KILAKNA 22: 13Kei Alpha leh Omega, amasapen leh ananungpen, abul leh atawp ka hi.” 14Hinna sing ahon zottheihna ding uleh, khopi kongpi a aluttheihna ding ua apuan uh sawpsiangte ahampha uhi. 15Apolam ah uite, bumhatte, mingaihhatte, tualthatte, milim bete leh kuapeuh zuauthu deih a, zuauthu bawlte a-om uhi. 16“Kei, Jesu in saptuamte a ding a hiai thilte na kiang ua hon theisak ding in ka angel ka hon sawl hi. David zung leh asuan zingsol aksi vak ka hi,” achi hi. 17Kha leh Mou in, “Hong pai in,” achi uhi. Aza peuh in, “Hong pai in,” chi hen. Kuapeuh a-ut in hinna tui aman bei in dawn hen.Thukhitna 18Hiai laibu a genkholhna thute za peuh kiang ah ka theisak hi: Mi kuapeuh in hiai thute abehlapleh Pathian in ama tung ah hiai laibu a kigelh gawtnate abehlap ding hi; 19huan kuapeuh in hiai genkholhna laibu a thute lakmang aneihleh Pathian in atan ding hiai laibu a kigelh, hinna sing leh khopi siangthou a kipan alamang ding hi. 20Hiai thilte theisakpa'n, “Ahi, ka hong pai pah ding hi,” achi hi. Amen! Hong pai in, Toupa Jesu. 21Toupa Jesu hehpihna noute tengteng tung ah om hen, Amen. 22Hinna Tuilui

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - PULAKNA: I pi-le-pute uh khandan laia kigelh a tam het kei. A khandan uh leh tawndan - tatdan (culture) suikik theihna khat tuh a late uh ahi Huan, pau luite leng ahi nawn. I late sakkhel khel dinga zat ding hilouim, I sin ding him uh ahi. Hiai labu leng tuabang dinga zat dingin a hoih. Literature a I dinmun asan dungjuiin hiaia tuang I late leh adang I ngaihnatnaa sang ding. Hiai labu gelh pa kuhkalna leh phatuamngaihna phattak ahi. A sungate leng simtak ahi. T. Jam Khothang The Chairman Paite Textbook Committee Mission Compound March 23 1960

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - THUMAKAI: Leitunggam lim en lehang, manohnalam neia luang luite i mu hi. Tuate koia hongkipan ahi uhiam chih i theih kei a leh pen, i theihna a buching zoulou suak hi. Lamkim-mualsanga akuapeuh toh i kituah chiangin, Koia hongkipan na hi hiam? chiin i kikan hi. Tua mahbangin, la khenkhat telkhawm PAITE LA GOUSIAH chia minvoh - a pianjiate atomlamin kisut hi. Unau tangthu theihdan zong kibanglou chih ahih chiangin, khenkhatte theihdan toh a kibang kholkei kha ding chih ka nial kei. Ahitazongin, athei ngeilou khargthakte adingin sui louh sangin mantakna bangtan hiam bek a neih ka lamen-na hi. Lapau haksate zong a khiaknate kipia hi. Hiaia tuang late akhen a nei-tuam bang a oma, huan kibatlouhna khat bang a om khak aleh bonna ngaisiam ding un ka ngen hi. Nidanglai peka khangluite tulai khangthakte banga laithei a nahi kei uhi. Lai a natheihlouh uh bangin a hat mahmah lungsim toh a teng uhi. Gen-le-sak a neih ua leh laia gelh louin, amahtuh lungsimin a vomthoh uhi. A dahnate uh, nuam a saknate uh leh, huan a hatzohdante uh abitazongin, la ngenta a natangsak zou uhi. Huaijiakin ahi upaten, Thu i chih la, la i chih thu, a nachih uh.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - THUMAKAI: Adiakdiakin, nungak leh tangval kalah la a leng petmah hi. Kampaua genkhiak dinga kilawmlou pi thute la a tansak chiang un a gen nemtuan huaia, huan ngaihtuan kholin leh lungkhoih jawin a kithei hi.
