I pileputen a honnutsiat uh tuabang gou hcihtakte laiah gelhlut leng a kepna hoihpen hi ding chiin leh, i Paite Textbook Committee deihin, i mailam skul a Varnacular a zat theih bun bang a hongom khak aleh chia ngimin, hiai ka honkaikhawm nimnem hi. -T. Lian Khohau Mission Compound February 13 1960

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - LIMLANG POIMOH: LA i chiih hinna ze tuamtuam etchiaana dinga limlang poimoh ahi. Paite la gousiah itahpite kem hoih kei Tekhiag Khangthak om jel dingten thonmohsak hun uh thiingeingei ting hi. Tbu a genchian thelhlouh ban lain le genetian thei chih hiai bu atuahg ilaten a diksakthna. Hiai laten thugih leh tangthua poimoh pipi - mihing hinna ze tuamtuam a om kiitna leh kikuatna, gentheihna leh lehsapna, lungkhamnaleh taipahna, lungjuanin leh lungnopna, lungkiakna leh lametnaiten thupiin nei uhi. Tunang zek chiangin skul leh tsinnai sangjawte ah hiai latersinina om ngei ding. Hiai la gousiahte Paite Literature manpha ahi uhi. Lawm Lianin PAITE LA GOUSIAH tamilou a abu a honbawl hi poimoh tenten na semkha ahi. A hongpianjiate tomkim, chien leh ngaihnophuai leh, huan lapau mal haksai khiaknate a gelhelten bil vaksak mahmah. Hiai labu neuchik a lianzo sem hongpianma dinga bulsit patna poimoh ahi jawl La a lunglutna-nei-mii tak bawl labu ahibjiakin a manpha tuanse hi. - H. Jel Shyam, I.A.S. Longding, NEFA October 15 1968

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - KHUPCHING LA: 1 A tuiin hal e, chiau a tuiin hal, Hal zoulou e, Jawl-Ching ngai ing e. 2 A mualin hal e, kamkei mualin hal, Hal zoulou e, Jawl-Ching ngai ing e. 3 Ka tun vabia aw, ka jua vabia aw, Khokhal tui bang kei hongla ve aw. 4 Na tun lah bia'ng e, na jua lah bia'ng e, Khokhal tui bang lakna nai lou e. 5 A sing jing nuaiah, tangnah lam nuaiah, Jawl-Ching sial bang giahpih nuam ing e. 6 Thangvan ging dimdim, laikhun thawn chiai e, Gama tangnah silhpuanin nei e. 7 Khupching' nu tongsuah, siahkuna ka ngaih, Ka luanli'n tui bang ei tum hi e. 8 Laukha se lou aw, omlai tang thei leng, Na tun sungnek in nei nuam ing e. 9 Ching aw na tunin, sanggah lua honchi, Sanggah muantui ah valual leng e. 10 Ka silhpuan tang aw, ka khaupuan tang aw, Kei Sialching toh laitawi ton ve aw. 11 Silhpuan sia non chih, kaihdial sia non chih, Nang Sialching toh laitawi ton lou leng. 12 A u lah ngai ing, a nau lah ngai ing, A milai pen ka ngaih tungnung e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - KHUPCHING LA: 13 Ching aw na tunin, na tun lungmawlin, Laltang pengju hai bang ngak aw, chi. 14 Laltang pengju hai bang ngak lou leng aw, Chingta vang khuang bang kulpih nuam jaw'ng. 15 Khupching khimin jing, honzil khawm ve ua, Banjal nang bang honhek khawm ve ua. 16 Khupching ka ngaih aw, tuana ka ngaih aw, Khupching ka ngaih kulsin tangta e. 17 Ka siallum panta'ng, ka kawlchiang panta'ng, Ching sesul sa bang ka jui moh e. 18 A tui sukin luang, damdiaiin luang e, Ching aw vai bang na thamna hi e. 19 Khupching leh Ngambawm, liangvai lua sa'ng e, Tuah ding simthu kilel lah hial hi. 20 Ching aw na malnua'n, na tun lungmawlin, Pamlou sang sing khia'n honsawl hi e. 21 Ka semgua panta'ng, kawl-hei liangbatin, Sang singlel ah khua vadon ing e. 22 Ching aw na laukha, thangvan kim chiangah, Mel muh dingin khaimu'n hongleng aw. 23 Khaimu'n hongleng e. Ching aw na laukha, Khaubang chiahna luogin gelmaw'ng e. 24 Ching aw na laukha, tangbang ka kholhin, Tung sunni vai bang tham sawt hen aw. 25 Ching aw na heina, melin nu nuam veng, Khattang koiah sawi bang na hei hiam? 26 Ching aw na laukha, nau bang hongnuiin, Kei ka lungjuan mual sing bang sang hi. 27 Khupching ka ngaih man, tuanglam i tungah, Khokhal phaikhi'n sema vuang ngelngel.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - LIANDOU LA: Seh I 1 Liandou a nu'n kuangpi khuhkhum, A nuaiah siatlei a suak hi; Siatlei suak albang a dah manin, Geltui ah ni bang a lun hi. 2 Geltui ah ni bang a lun hi, Kho-khang phaipipak a bang: Dohsuanga umbang ka tou leh, Nuhtunin ka mel hongma hi. 3 Nuhtunin ka mel hongma, Janggam ah puvon hongsa; Janggam ah puvon hongsa, Ka dawn ding kain ka zak. 4 Ka sial aw na pai na paiin, Ka khua Geltui lam na tawnin; Geltui suak mualphei a pha hi, Sang leh lai lapna'n a pha. 5 Nuhtunin saulam a theita jaw maw, Sawmsialin saulam a theita jaw maw; Sawmsialin saulam a theita jaw e, Nuhtunin kankong a belta jaw hi. Seh II 6 Inkhang mual ah um bang touta'ng, Ka lenlual toh umi lunsial vamu'ng e; Umi lamsial ka tan ni'n aw, Kho tuanglam ah ka thai aw ni bang lun e. 7 Lamli leh lamtual jawl ah, Setang pal dialdial leng e; A sa nekim ton leng e, Guhsa nekin ton leng e. 8 Thei ka sena ka mel non mak, Thaitong siangah buh ju non ngen e;

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - LIANDOU LA: Buh non piaka buhsi non piak, Sa non piaka a guhbawk non piak; A guhbawk tuh ka duh lou e, A tak nemnem peve aw Thaitong aw e. 9 A mi kilel kilela e, Michih laish hau-i-ta mah tungnung e; A va kilel kilela e, Vachih laish jangphualva mah tungnung e. 10 Ningju duh leng phualvan tang toh, Aisa duh leng ka laknuai en veng; Ka laknuai ka vaet leh aw, Ka lulvok aw luaisa tai bang e. 11 Ka kuanlamin pal siausiau tang, Ka chiahlamin Guntui a lian e; Guntui tunga sawnbana kai; Ka Thaitong aw na pam lua hi e. 12 Ka kianga thumthumte aw, Nemnem tamtam peve aw Thai tong aw e; Thai aw thou aw, ningju lup aw, I sumtual ah lenlual kawlva lam bang e. 13 Thai ka lakin phualtaug hontawi, Mineh laiah sunnipi honsing hi e; Ka Thai pha phung sam bang tulta, Ngou sai melpuah ka enchimlou lai hi e. 14 Tuipi uang luan-ni janin aw, Chiaua limnga sepsiau a ki sepsiau e; Tulvuah nang luan-ni janin aw, Mim leh sawmtang jua siangah honglawi-na e. 15 Pamlou nawla khuvate aw, Awnsing lel ah lamdal bang ki sai u'ai ve; Kei zong ngabang ka lenlaiin, Jawl-luite toh ka vahuchi sek u'ai ve. 16 A mi zong nunin nuam e, Laikhun tungah sawnban khamluin nei e; A va zong nunin nuam e, Awnsing lelah a kha silhpuanin nei e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A PA SAL-MAT DEIHTA LA: 1 Ka jua laihen jingdam sol- nou suak bang, Ka kawi louh ding ka sinlai a honlun e. 2 Na kawi louh dia na sinlai ka honlut leh, Henkol ka buh luainam bang hongsutim aw. 3 Tun dong lou jua dong loua sa bang i tai, Khang dampiau ah na besam jun veni e; Khang dampiau ah na besam jun veni, Na jua thulsiah khang dumpuan toh lawm sa'ng e. 4 Ka von simsal tangsa aw, kum sawtsa aw, Thai lungdeih toh tun siang lam bang zong hi e; Thai lungdeih jangsesum sengin pua, Kotkawl nenah tunin nau bang sang ing e. 5 Ka tun ka ngai chia nau bang na kah, Kamkei chiam v'aw, na tun siang zong veni e; Kamkei chiam v'aw na tun siang zong veni, A khua chih ah tahpuan bang bang veni; A khua chih ah tahpuan bang bang veni, A mual chih ah khaimu bang lam veni e. 6 Kijun lou aw, jang simsal kijun lou aw, Ka von zoujam nang kawi ding'n ka phal lou e. 7 Na von zoujam kei kawi dia na phal louh leh, Muikho jinin na siang'h hual- khauin khit aw.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A PA SAL-MAT DEIHTA LA: 8 Ka jua phuigua leldawna dit sumlu aw, Hongtualkum aw, na namtem hongjunin aw; Hongtualkum aw, na namtem hongjunin, Ka jua sumlu tangjik bang hongbanin aw. 9 Alvanu lamkhuang kaih ding ka dah manin, Phualngou sumlu khang dumpuan in jial ing e; Phualngou sumlu khang dumpuan in jial ing, Khang damtui ah ngaih aw tum ton ta ni. 10 Ka chin simthu hi chi aw, tuai lianu aw, Simlei tungah huantu bang na chingin aw. 11 Zaila ngaih sang'n simthu deih ching nuam jaw'ng, Chin lungching aw guikhauin khit nuam ing e. 12 A tui luang dimdim tungah lumsuang tungah, Tuai toh zai-deih khiak ung e, kei tum ing. 13 A va hongleng diaidiai e, liap ah tu, Lungjuang lianu leng leh damdiai ah tu e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - KHUAI LA: 1 Vahkhuaiin ka bang chi e, Tullel vangkhuain nei e; Tullel vangkhuain nei e, Sau ka sak kansang chi e. 2 Pama vahkhuai phungching kisa, Kumkhua khenna'n vala'ng e; Kumkhua khenna'n vala'ng e, Saumang toh etlawm sa'ng e. 3 Vahkhuai a hangta jaw maw, Momnou a hangta jaw maw; Momnoute hanlung chiamna aw, Vahkhuai bel bang suang ing e. 4 Vahkhuai a hang kemsang daw'ng, Mang tunnu'n ningbel vual e; Mang tunnu'n ningbel vual e, Lengkel tangkhauin khih e. 5 A kum china vahkhuai lapna, Chin pahtang ging dimdim e; Chin lentawm leh chin chiandal, Kum chin tuibang luang aw e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - SANNEM LA: Gal La 1 Pupa vual-gen Tuizum Lunmang, Phualngou tulpal kawm bang e ngaih aw; Phualngou tulpal a kawm lou buang, Lun aw na siam dang sa'ng e Lun aw. 2 Kangtui vontawi lentang phaingek, Doulai kulluh ding aw juang nang e; Lungdeih kawlchiang paibang pom toh, Thangvan-jawl juite aw muang nang e. 3 Tun simthu lou vaimang simthu, Doulai kulluh ding aw juang nang e; Kei aw juang nang nahsing nuaiah, Limlian gam mawngsing aw hongsel aw. 4 Theihlouh singta hammawl laish, Nichin jang kawlva bang lam ing e; Mel ka theihlouh hammawl vontawi, Zata libang ching e, ching aw e. 5 Vaimang simthu'n dougam manaw'ng, Gunpi tung kawlva bang lam ing e; Va bang lamtang nutsiah tuai teng, Siansiam zou tangbang na dam ve aw. 6 Leidou Japan palbang nang ding, Ka banjal aw giabang hawmthaw'ng e; Ka banjal aw giabang hawmthaw'ng e, Luntawi phualngcute aw muang nang e. 7 Dougal palbang nang leng ding, Ngaih aw dou lunlaipi manaw'ng e; Ngaih aw dou lunlaipi manaw'ng, Tuilim nga bang kullai manaw'ng e. 8 Vaimang tuanglam damtui zilja, Sausuah toh luitum ing e ngaih aw; A lelah va bang tuang ing e, Lungjuan zatam sial lah bang maw'ng e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - SANNEM LA: Lunglen La 9 Pham masa ding mel kitheilou, Maimit kisuan suan ni e ngaih aw; Maimit suan et lung chimlouh aw, Mel kimuh lai chi ni e ngaih aw. 10 Vual kawia lou bang na tul sang'n, Masuan sing heisa'n na pal aw lawm; Masuan sing heisa'n na pal aw, Loh louhin gam bang na mang ve aw. 11 Jing ka zinna malgam leiah, Sunni tum ding tulin sung diai e; Sunni tum ding tulin sung diai, Tang kei lailung juan kitawi sawn e. 12 Gam kimchiang pan kidon ni e, Tuahnading lunglai ah lel leng e; Gamkuam thuk leh zou-jinglai ah, Ngaihnou jang vaiva'n honglam ve aw. 13 I kikalah vualhek simthu, Zatam e lawm, ngaih na sang lou aw; Khang huantu bang a khum zongin, Ka san tongnem heilai na chi aw. 14 Kei ngaih banga vual non ngaih leh, Simthu phuh banga khauh hi ning e; Phuh bang khauh ning na kungtungah, Simthu khau bang sutsa hi ning e. 15 Sunkim lawk bang tauna dinga, Kawi-louh-ding lia tongsuah nem aw e; Vual ang munmuang ngaihnou tongdam, Pianna tun tongsuah sang'n nemjaw e. 16 Hialnen lawkta taua kai dang, Singhem tongdam sangkha adiam aw;

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - SANNEM LA: Singhem simthu'n vual tongdam chi, Hemlam luainau bang ken vei veng e. 17 A gamkuam thuk ngaihnou heina, Koi pan don lang mel ka mu diam aw; Tulkung tungah ka tuang zongin, Ngaih mel mulou kei aw juang nang e. 18 Na jua pahtang i tutkhawlna, Ka sial chiangin ka duangtham zen e; Nang na simthu lungtak hileh, I pal zou heisa'n kai ding hi e. 19 Kei ka lungjuan tulin pou leh, A deldawn kuitung ding ngaih aw e; Hon dawng cih aw sen ka vualngaih, Kumsawt lailufig kong ngilhzou diam aw. 20 Heina duangzen singlel heisa, Ngaihnou sanmun muangta ding aw e; Ngaihnou sanmun muangta ding aw, Jingdam lawk bang kei tau ding aw e. Na-minte 21 Heina penh ah mualchin sangah, Vangngaih nang gimsi aw theng moh e; Vangngaih nang gimsi aw theng moh, Duangzen nang tongdam aw saug maw'ng e. 22 Singtawi ommuang na khavang ngai, Mual tumtai bang vul ngiingei ing e; Mual tumtai bang vul ngiingei ing, Duangzen nang tongdam aw sang maw'ng e. 23 Simlei kilpi'n heihei ding a, Lungjuan leakum ka vei zou diam aw; Kilpi simlei heihei ve aw, Ngaihnou toh tui bang hon gawm ve aw.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - SANNEM LA: 24 Va bang pil aw, u leh nau aw, Siamsinpawl pak bang na tawi ve aw; Sing gamlei leh jang gamlei zong, Zatam tong kaitui bang hongluang e. 25 Lungjuan khang lanbang ka ngakna; Khua vannuai siam Tung Pathian aw; Ka kungtunga omlai lang ding, Nang na kham aw Tung Pathian aw. 26 Banjal laileng ommuan munah, Na sang aw chin lungta ngaih aw e; Na sang aw chin lungta ngaih aw, Lungjuan simthu kong sutna hi e. 27 Mantung luaikun pigozung suih, Pehsik themnou toh sum bang tuah e; Lianem banjal jangleng-buktui, Ka sanna hi lingliang nou aw e. 28 Tongdam luansiam duanglai tulnah, Sialtam toh taikhua na val hiam aw; Sunkim lungjuan tam na sialua, Vualin jin sumtual hi hong chi e. 29 Lungdeiha khak von lianu aw, Thulsiah patpuan kiang jawnpih ve aw; Kawi toh mun-in muangta ve aw, Lungdeih von zatam tayvita ve aw. 30 Puvon banjal tulta lailak, Pahtang ah sun nau bang hongkap e; Sunni hamtang kai hiihiai, Momnou nau-oih zaikhian toh lawm e. 31 Lemnang dit leh pehsik themnou, Tulta junsiam toh sum bang tuah e; Lianem banjal tawnpat peina, Palvanou khawidimbuk nou bang e. 32 Pigo liang leh tulkai junsiam, Mimkhau jialna piana dang aw e; Banjala kaih gawm siam sa'ng, Pupa banjal gia bang tang sa'ng e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JANGTA LA: Gal La 1 Mualpi ka vangkhua aw, Zin leh leng banna hi; Zin leh leng banna hi, Ngousai tuangtunna hi. 2 Sangkap laihen mabang a pan, Tuana ei pupa hi; Tuana pupa mabang patsa, Puan bang i tan nuam diam. 3 Vangkho suan ding mualchin ah, Jangta kaihmin luang bang; Sumlu tangjik bang la ding, Kumchin sevaupak bang. 4 Janglei dona hawmsiam Banjal, Tuktang bang hongtung tah; Gamchih sehsa bang hawm tah, Suihlung i kim chiat hiam. 5 Tuana pianna phungmin loh nang, Kei hileng, chi chiat hang; Tuana namchih zatam pianna, Chimnuai-Geltui khua hi. Sa La 6 Ka jalmangin nuaijin tunnu'n, Von leh sang tel aw chi; Von lah ngai sang lah ngai ing, Von momnou mah tel ing. 7 Ka von suangmual kal aw e, Sangsawlkhai ni hal lou; Von momnou tangbang khang aw e, Sang phungia lou bang lel. 8 Kawlchiang aw khua na ngai nam aw, Sangphung na khen nuam nam aw; Nahnuaia ta sanglian phungching, Tun toh gi bang khen ing. 9 Simlei tual tuan sang a namchih, Nuhsawl bang bangkim ing, Lal leidou leh janga vuisai, Phaksap ah jalzou tah. Dah La 10 Tong sanlouh jin-tunnu aw, Selung khuai bang hang aw;

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JANGTA LA: Von nih-thum hambang huai ding aw, Sawndawng lentualah khia'ng. 11 Simthu lunmei jin laitaka, Chin lunglian zenzen aw; Khuakim vualgen Kawlkei lunglian, Sunni hawmching manlou. 12 Vaimang ah Kamkei bang gial e, Zatam dot lunmang hi; Khan gui lohna chi bang na tel, Na Banjal dawnsuang hen. Ngeina 13 Ka jua sangkap jang vuisaiin, Kulnu dawng hon ding hi; Khaimu lenglai tual na khiakiti, Vaimang tual tuan ding aw. 14 Tangnisa lumbang honsung ding, Tunga leng tualah khia'ng; Lengvan vai thou na honpih ding, Sangmanga phungching aw. 15 Nahsing tuai sang tel kihawma, Senninu din huai ing; Ninghai lian leh phunglai telsa, Laichin dingin khiing siang. 16 Tungleng nuaileng ka sialma aw, Phualmul jang niliap bang; Kelsawn-gia leh buhi-al inelsai, Tulkung luaileng pal bang. Lunglen La 17 Theisen jua ngaih na malnua in, Salimlian ngoubang la'ng; Ka jua banjal ka chih dingin, Simsingin ka pousak. 18 Sumtual simsinggil i phuh aw, Vual tung i tuanna hi, Vual tungtuanna ningbel zatam, Saumang toh etlawm sa'ng. 19 Tuntom aw e, tuntom aw e, Tuntom sangluang ka kaihna; Lai ka henna jangkhen kawlchiang, Tuntom sangluang ka kaihna. 20 Ommuan muna vai-tunnu aw, Paivaleng tongdam kha'ng;

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JANGTA LA: Paivaleng tongdam ki khak aw, Chin munah vahil ve aw. 21 Jingzin tuanglam ngoutui tungah, Pehsik khau bang khung aw; Machiang hei leng nungchiang hei leng, Jingzin hawlsuang vum bang. 22 Vaimang tuanglam sausuan piandang, Pehsik sau pheiin gan; Heksiam banjal jang leia ta; A va lensiam zil aw. 23 Pheiphung khai lou, kuizil jap lou, Ngoutui vangkhua in nei; A lelah va bang tuang ing e, Ngoutui ah khaubang chia'ng. 24 Gawmsiam pehsik khaimu'n leng e, Jingzin ka tuanglam aw; Khodon mualchin nim dildial, Singgam jang tam diudeu. 25 Omlai minthang zata vual-gen, I tungah khuai bang tu; I tungah khuai bang tu e, Vonteng suan gua bang mun.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - VUALNGAIH LA: 1 Vual ngaih a natajaw maw e, Tun ngaih a natajaw maw; Tun ngaih gimsi a theng thei e, Vual ngaih laiah na sa'ng. 2 Vual ngai ing e, duang vul ing e, Damtui bang ching kiam ing; Damtui bang ching kiam ing e, Tung thelnah bang kiak law'ng. 3 Ka ngaih aw vual lianu aw, Sing duangah na bang lou aw; Sing duangah na bang lou aw, Pelmoha chiamsa hi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JAWL LA: Gal La 1 Vaimang gam palva len zil van laijawl ah, I dou veita lummei bang kitawi aw: Lummei bang kitawi e i dou veita, Khua phaksap ah lamdal bang kisai aw. 2 I khang vaimang hongkithang khua killam ah, Na tawi kawlchiang damtui ah pai ding chi; Na tawi kawlchiang lah damtui ah a pai lou, Vaimang na pal nuai silkia bang tom ing. Dah La 3 Sang ka gah aw lenpuan bang jak thei bileng, Zatam nuhsawl bang ka bang kim ding hi e; Ngoumei bileng khua chipeuh jel ding hi'ng, Guikhau hileng phaksapa jam ding hi'ng e. 4 Dah kho-lelliang tulsinga pou thei hileh, Hawkguama pon mualchin sang khup ding hi e; Hawkguama pon mualchin sang a khup zongin, A va lengin tuannan lung sit ding hi e. 5 Tun aw honchi chi veng aw honlou lou veng, Lengvan kaisa na min lou kha nak ing e; Tun aw honchi chi lou aw honlou lou ken, Kei non loh leh ma na jam lah ding hi e. 6 Tuanglam ka sikkhelha bawn tun min ka loh, Chikleh tun min loh ka bang thei ding hiam aw.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JAWL LA: 7 A va lengin sing chipeuh tuannan nei, Gahliang kei kawmding bei ven khua ngai ing e; Nunnuam dingin tung thangvan mau dimdim e, Gahliang dingin nuai simlei gial bang kia e. 8 Theibang ka senlai lima jua pham hi, Nunkhum ka loihlai lima tun pham hi e; Mom milmialin nunkhum loih tualah khe veng, Dah luat zatam kei kana niang omlou e. 9 Lungjuan sialin ka zaila vuiching tah, Sena vualin lungah tubang ching un aw; Sanggah'n naihtam ka sial toh lawnvual ngaih toh, Heina peuh ab lungjuan sial zaila hi e. 10 A si ngai veng thangvan kanin sang hi, A hing ngai veng mual vih-thum in hal hi e; A si ka ngaihna leh aw a hing ngaihna, Tulvum nahneu khawlmun ah hilin pha e. 11 Tunsung mimbang ka piana sanggah hi'ng, Ka kuah tun tong sang loua laileng hi'ng e; Tun tong sang lou bansam sawlbang heu ing, Si leh hing vang ngaia kumvei ding hi'ng e. 12 Ning i nek ni'n sauah hul liiliai hang, Kha i kiak ni'n i laizom tuam om hi e; Kha i kiak ni'n i laizom tuam om hi, Naubang kah tangbang honhuan tuam om hi e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JAWL LA: 13 Ka seui toh lulvok toh gil buh-al toh, Tong kum thei leng lungjuan sial chiat ding aw e; Ka seui vual ngai aw e, lulvok tun ngai, Keiin kawi ngai, gil buh-al von ngai aw e. 14 Ka tun sunga damtuia ka vunlaiin, Sanggah ding melin ka thei lou hial hi e; Sanggah ding melin thei leng ka tunnu aw, Hawldam siktuiin ka luangmang ding hi e. 15 Ka tun pianna sial ing e, ka jua pianna, Simlei ngaih khua tangbang khanpih zou ing; Simlei ngaih khua tangbang khanpih zou ing, Jua mel mulou lena kumkhua vei hi'ng e. 16 Sung gilkial laiah na e, u leh nau aw, Vonteng khuatuah sakluang tulta'n pou ing e; Vonteng khuatuah sakluang tulta'n pou ing, Va jingthou leh lun-tan tong chiamnan nei e. 17 Von aw lam gial na kiak ni'n hau sumtual ah Bahkhi pha bang zatan lambang vel hi e; Na tun ka zebzum aw e ka lelliang aw, Anglai ka henkolin zong liah zoulou e. Lunglen La 18 A singin ka pal chi e sing chih pal e, Pal chiat na ven bengbah nop tuam om hi e;

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JAWL LA: A miin ka pal chi e nam chih pal e, Pal chiat naven tongsan nop tuam om hi e. 19 Ngaih aw na tun pauin e na jua pauin, Killam lumsuang a sel leh tuah ni chi e; Killam lumsuang thik kuma sel lou ding aw, Lailung kuai ma'n ngaih aw gibang khen ni e. 20 Tun masa bang omlou e jua masa bang, Lenchil tongsan ngaih masak bang omlou e; Lenchil tongsan lenheisa tualah khe leng, Kumsawt gamgua bang ka hingzou ding hiam aw. 21 A sing hileng tulnam khat a pou ding aw, A leljang phaikhi'n sema semkhen hi e; A tui bileng hawkguam khat a luang ding aw, Chiaua lumsuangin hal e, luan khen bang e. 22 Hialnen tulta kai nena zou lawkta aw, Nang na san ding na tunin a nial hiam aw; Lawkta na tau bang dih aw tul-i-lel ah, Kei zong vual ngaih ka hemloh bang ta ning e. 23 Taka na simtho hiam aw hembiak na tong, Tuibang luang e laish gibang khen maw'ng e; Hembiak simthu takin naubang sangkha leng, Lungtuak vual siangah non lel limn ding hi e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JAWL LA: 24 Khuva juanglam leng tutkhawl tong na dawng ken, Nahkha luansiam buktuiin na hquin aw; Zatam simthu zonjam tong na dawng ken aw, Vuallel lui khau aw kiman nawn ve ni e. 25 Tuibang luangin na chih leh luang ve ning; Zoulei tangbang na kuai leh kuaj ve ning e; Zoulei tangbang na kuai leh kuai ve ning, Lemnang diah bang na duai leh duai ve ning e. 26 Deih zonjam lah kaitui bang jawl ngam la'ng, Lungsim kullaiah non zenta lua hi e; Chihtak luat lah selungmawl tanna hi, Kaibangzak luat tahpnam bang banna hi e. 27 Na tun simthu hondong aw na jua simthu, Pianna ten tong a nem leh tuahi ve hi e; Khimjin deih-ang zong ding leh sawgpal lou ding'n, Tun simthu tubang ka dhing lou ding hi e. 28 Tun-nial jua-nial ngaih aw heisa suak thei leng, Tulkung tungah nun khatin luai ton leng e; Tulkung tungah nun khatin luai ton leng, Vual-i-loh sawn om louin kansang leng e. 29 Mal-juang huiva sun chianga honglailen leh, Ka sansa lia hounem aw na juang lou aw; Tulkai suka zou lawkta a hongtau leh, Sannem toh tuahding ka chiamzou hi chi aw.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JAWL LA: 30 Tangleng lungjuang janggam ah ka hei zongin, Singdang tongsuah luai naubang na sang lou aw; Singdang tongsuah luai naubang ra sang ken, Tangleng lungjuang mel na muh na chiam in aw. 31 Lenkhang kawlni suah sima mabang ka pat, Vaimang siamsil guikhau bang jamsau sa'ng e; Jamsau naven a hiang kim kawia ka zuih, Juikim la'ng e selung ngoumei jing bang e. 32 Vaitunnu siamsil bawl leh pigo lailak, Guijam gahlang a tong kaitui luang bang; Guijam gahlang a tong kaitui luang bang e, Tuana pupa sumbang tuah lungpil sa'ng e. 33 Sang aw nang sinlai leh aw daiteng pigua, Tum khaua loih tang banjal nou agai ing e; Kamkhen lengthe nleuh tau lai nou bang, Killam jawl ah khimjin huiva mau bang e. 34 Vaimang siansil tangin koulianga ka bat, Lentukuam uap sangmang naubang sial ing e; Leidou lengkel bang nohna vangkho suanna, Zatam vualgen tung khopi bang ging aw e. 35 Ommuan muna vai-tunnu tongdam sanna, A lam nunnuam tungah aw jam jiijiai e; Sing bang a hiang chik kum a sel lou ding, Guikhau lelah tongdam naubang sang aw e. 36 Vaimang banjal jang pehsik lihtui jawl ah, Pheiphung neilou limnga lensiam zil aw e;

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - JAWL LA: Tangbang dama tun sianglam zon na halin, Lawm aw lunglaia i ngilh louh ding hi e. 37 Tuizum ngalliam minthang tan lal a nohna, Khodon gamleinou tungah mau dimdim e; Huihkhi dam lan kalnouin suangmual khum, Leidou gamlei jing daibang lap ding aw e. 38 Tunnem phamsa siatlei suak ta ding sa'ng, Sau limliap ah voasen hambang huai hi e; Tongdam sanlouh sauneu haibang ngak hi, Sunkim lungjuan vonin lambang vel ing e. 39 Phamsa vaivut suaksa leh buh-al nelkai, Jang pehsik pat bang sai e, ni bang lun e; Simtung gepkhuai bang mat leh tulta lailak, Zatam banjal pamchiang huihkhi lang bang e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: KHUPCHING LA Nidanglai pekin Manipur khanglama tua Palkhuang gam ah Mualkawi kichi khua khat a om hi. Tua khua ah akithuahthei mahmah nupi nih a om ua. I pi-le-puten, Khupching leh Ngambawm, chia a nagen gen uh tua nupi nihte tate a nahi nilouh uhi. Tua nupite gelin akitonin nau honpai tuak ua. Alam dangin, a gil uh nat bang a kiton se hi. A gil uh a nat chiangin a sutuah ua, a dam jel uh hi. Gil sunga a om tuak lai un a nute tuak un a naupai uh numei leh pasal hongbih leh kitensak din ki thukim uhi. Hun hongpai jela, ta a honneita ua, khat pasal, khat numei, a hongbia; pasal pen a min dingin Ngambawm a sa ua, numei min dingin ahihleh Khupching. A don chiang un nauluai tuam ah a sial tuak ua, nauoih la sain a khim ihmu sek ubi. A mohlouhkal un Ngambawm pen Khupching sikah a nalum jel hi. Lamdangsain a chiamteh kik ua, ahitazongin a nalum khawm hilhel jel uhi. Valnou a honghibtak un kiitdan a honthei panta uhi. Tuachi lai, Nahjual khua ah Ngambawm-te nuta a pem ubi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Nahjual leh Mualkawi tuh kigamla lou, kigal muh ahia, a kal uah Ngajam Lui a luang hi. Ngambawmin khualgam ah Khupching a vahel sek hi: tang 1 leh 2. Khupching leh Ngambawm tuh khenzohvuallouh dingin a hongkiitta ua. Ngambawmin, Kiteng nihang, a chihleh Khupchingin, Ka nuepa vadong phot in, chun a sang hi: tang 3. Ngambawm pen tagah-genthei mi hia, a vadot leh Khupching nu a naut deksuaikeia. Ngambawmin a lemlouhdan Khupching a hilh hi: tang 4. Kikben ding ngaingamlou ahihman un gamlak ah a taita ua. Sihleten ding gina nei louin gamnuai ah a giak uhi. Vanpi ging honhonin khopi ynah a hongju a, huihpi nung huhu a, nahtang nah a kikawm nipniap uhi: tang 5 leh 6. Atawpin in a honjuanta uh. Ngambawmin bikha nuaiah Khupching nu a vangaigu hi. Khupching nu'n, Sihleten nangawn nei lou Ngambawm atheihsa, ka khan a kilumlet tazongin, makpain nei ngeikei ning, chia bang hakbakin a tanu thuhilhna'n a nei hi. Ngambawm tuh a khitui a luang zungzunga: tang 7. Ngambawmin a jakte Khupching a hilha, Ching, khase ken aw; dawi suak thei hileng na nu ka nawmvalh nuam, a chi hi: tang 8 leh 9.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Ngambawmin Khupching samzang khat a botkbia a, a paipih hi. Tuachiangin Khupching a hongchinata. Khupching nu'n a tanuin Ngambawm a deih man hilhiala china mah ahi chih a theikhia hi. Tua ahihmanin Ngambawm sam ding a sawl hi. Ngambawm a vatun chiangin, Khupching nu'n, Khupching nat hibdam ngeingei leh kiteng nu teh, a chi hi. Ngambawmin a tawi samzang Khupching lu a bohkhiakna munah a siata, a hongdamta hi. Hmapin Khupching nu'n a phal samsom keia anau jawk Sialching adingin a kun hi. Sialching toh kiteng unla, neih-le-lam buchingin ka hon guan ding, a chi hi: tang 10 leh 11. Tuachiangin Ngambawmin, A u hiin anan hitaleh ka ngai, ahihhangin a milaipen mah ka ngai pen hi, a chi hi: tang 12. Bangteng hileh, ui-hou jawng-houa na hon hou ngalin Sialching toh jaw teng kei nung, a chi. Tuachiangin Khupching nu'n beltung khat Ngambawm a lup a, ahihhangin a tep nuam keia, Khupching vang tulpih zomai ta ning, a chi hi: tang 13 leh 14. Huan, Ngambawmin Khupching samzang khat a botkhe kika, a pai nawrta. Tungmanin Khupching lim a meka, a samzang tawi me beihin Ngajam Lui piau ah a nusia hi. Huaitakin Khupching a china ngalmai jela.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Ngambawm sam ding a sawl nawn leulen uhi. Ngambawm a vahoh nawnta. Tua janin vuah chin a, Ngajam Lui khanga, milim pen tuiin nataimang zou hi. Ngambawmin Khupching tuh si ahi chih a thei hi. A galvana kivan, kitomin a kisial a, sak-akhang a zong behu a, ahihhangin a mu zou nawnta kei, tang 15-19. Khupching vui dingin a kisota uhi. A banknanga a sial sin ua leh a ta kei hi. Huaiin Ngambawm a sam ua, aman, Ching aw, thawl maiin, a chia, a thawlta. Ahia, khul ah a bankuang a thawl kei leuleua; Ngambawm a sam kik uhi. Ngambawmin jawl-ching aw, thawl nawn jel mai inla, mangpha aw; tu pen atunpna dinga i kimvhua hi kei ken a chihleh a thawl nawn jela, huan a vuita. Antazongin Khupching pen khaa om, a khohei leh gonotat toh Ngambawm kimillon ahihmanin, a kithuah theikei uhi. Khupechingin, I hedan leh tatdan kibangloua kithuah thei nai tadih lou bi hang. Inlam ah vapai phot ini, koute banga na hongsih chiangin hiaisanah na hongpai ding a, tuachiangin atawntungin i kithuah ta ding hi, chiin Ngambawm a sawl kikta hi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Ngambawm zong a hongsitaa, a kha tuh misi khua ah a paia, khalam ah a it leh ngaih tawotung Khupching toh khohei gantat kibangin a beikhawmta hi. AKHIAKNATE Bia - dong; ahia amaimaia dong hilouin, a kut a kun lamdeuh hi. Luikhun - giahna. Tongnah - nahtang nah. Sungnekin ... ing e - haigawp ahihke leh nawmvalh nuam ing. Laitawi ton - k teng. Laltang pengju - enghouna ahihkeileh selphouna ju. Khuang bung kulhpih - tulpih. Khimin jing - lunghamrain tuam. Vaibang tham - sihna. Sesul - sulnung; gamtatna. Malnuan - sih nung. Tung ... hen ov - ni tum ngeikei hen. Phaikhi'n sem - huihzamin mut hiauhiau. LIANDOU LA (Hiai late Liandou zi-neih nunga kiphuak ngen hiin a lang. Tua ahihmania la khat sungah a tagah lui uh leh a hauhsak nung uh a tuangkhawm nilouh a, athu toh ela a tonkhawm theikei. Dah late a dah lai ua phuah hilouin, a nopsak nung ua kiphualkhia hiin a lang.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: A nop la uh zong a noplaitak ua phuahkhink om mung lou, a ji-sih nunga a ton ua kiphualthe deuh ngen hiin a lang.) Nidanglai pekin Chin Hills a Chimnuai - Geltui kichi khua khat ah unau pasal nih a om ua. A ujawk Liandou ahia, a naujaw Thanghou Neuchik a hib lai un a pa un sihsana, a nu uh toh tagahin a om uhi. Pasal neih kik a ut manin a nu un Liandou leh Thanghou tuh kuangpi a khuhkhuma, pasal nei dingin a kuan san hi. Tuabanga omlai a ni un vahongkhiaa, unauten a nu uh nungdelh uh: tang 1. A vadelhpha ua, a nu'n a kikpih hi. Khatvei mah, a nu un Thanghou tuium a taw vuhvangsakin, a nih un tui vatawi dingin a sawl hi. Tua kalin a nataisanta Vasa khatin, Liandou - Thanghou, pasal nei dingin na nu kuan e, a chia. Liandouin, Ka nau tuium dim lou lai, a chi jela. Lamdangsea a et ua leh, a taw nakivutvang bi. A bubit ua, in ah a paita uhi. A nu uh a nungdelh chitchit uhi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: A galmuh ua, Nu, honnangakin, a chih chiang un aman, Liandou, lamsak leh lamkhang ah na nau leh na uital honsawnkhia inla, nang kiain hondelhin, a chi a. Liandouin, Nu, nang sangin ka nau leh ka uital it jaw ing, a chi hi. A nu'n lah a nangak tuankeia, pha zoulouin a pute uh mimphual ah a giak uhi. A nu'n gal tuakn, a mat dek na leh, Kei honman kei unla, paina mimphuale giak Liandou-te unau vamin un, a chia. Tuichin galten a khah ua, Liandou-te unau min dingin kuan uhi. Galten teiin mimphual lak a sun ua. Thanghou khe sunkha uhi Thanghouin U, a na lua, kap ding ka hi hiam? a chihleh Liandou-in. Galte hi uh, kapkenla, sazu hamin, bawi, a chi hi. Thanghou a sazu ham leh galten sazu spin phual bel uhi. Tua phual hal-khu juiin Liandou-te unau kigelkhia na vompi kua kawl hawm a bel uhi. A dang uh tak mahmah ahihumanin tui zong dingin Liandou a kuan hi. Tuakalin vompi valut a, a mulin Thanghou naksung sunkhaa, jau saa a hehthai leh lau in vompi tawmdoka, a khang kenlakab a tuk vatvut hi. Liandou hongtungta hi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: A va-et na leh vompi na si zoua, a semna ding temta khel dingin Liandouin a nau sawl hi. Neu i pute temta vukhel inla, thangpeu satna ding vachiin, a chia. Thanghou vakuana, a pu'n a nadot leh imtheilou a, genkheta hi. Husitakin a pu'n a tangkonpihta. A khojang un vompi sa po dingin a kuan uhi. A satak tengteng po bei keuhkeuh ua, Liandou-te unau tanding a gil kia nutsiat uhi. Liandou khasia kisaiu a kap hi. A nauin, U, kapkap ken, a ging lengleng banghiam khat om hi, chiin sem sawmin sa-gilpi a kai chit chit hi. Tualaitakin vasa khatin. A khangah li pha zo lailai, a nachia; lui tolahna kisuan sukiu a li khat ah a sem uhi. A atkek ua leh dakbu leh khivui tampi a om hi. Tuate puain in ah a pai uhi. In ah amau kiain a om ua, nekding zong nei louin jantang khat na-ngawn a kiphelbawm chipchip uhi. Tagah - genthei mahmah ahihhang un tuabang donga kiit unau ahi uhi. A invengte un nekding a vakhol ua, ahihhangin buhvai lom leh sazu ek toh kihel peuh pia uhi. Sa a kholh chiarg un lah apuhbawk tata a khol, se uhi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Tagah leh jawng mahmah ahihman un a invengte un a simmoh petmah uhi: tang 8. Atawpin a ni-te un a in nah a pi ua, a gang un a sepding uh na a guan hi. Tang kiphou Thanghou a hongsaka, Liandou pen sial chinesak hi. Ak hon kawmin Thanghouin sailim hualhuahm tang tang ton a hualkhawm jel hi. Lou-hal zohin gophelin sailim tuh loulaia singbul khempeuh kapnain a neia, tua tang chite hongpoua, hoih mahmah hi. Ni khat Liandou-te unauin lon a khohlai un movanlai in gul a hontuaha, a loulai uah a khia a, teksia khat unau a hehpih mahmah a, a nekding uh a nahuansak sek hi. Liandouin, ni khat, a etguk leh a pi'n a puankawm panin tung tang a singkhe zungzunga, tuate huan hi. A kiit mahmah Liandou-te unauin in ah a dakbu uh tum na, ngaih mahmah hi. Mi'n a vangaihguk ch'ang un a sel ua, a sikin um-hawm khat a khengeng uhi. Bang ahichiam na tum uh? chia a dot chiang un amau, bang mah hi kei e, um-hawm maimai hi, a chi uhi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Tua umhawm tuh hausapa'n a siala lei a tumta Hongpuak un, a chia, a vapuak ua, teksia khat in ah zintung uhi. Tua hausapa'n sial hau lua ahihmanin Liandou-te unauin a telding pen uh a thei theikei ua. Tua teksia a dot uh leh aman, Sial hon laka a neupen pen kelpi chiah phet tel un, chin a nathubihih hi. Ni khat Liandou-te unauin sa a ai ua, puandum toh nungak - tangval a lam ua, zumang - samang nein tangpi - tangta a niang uhi. (Tua i Paite puandum Liandou-Thanghou apana i luahtouh ahi.) Nidanglaia amau na simmohte zong meikhelian bawk a hongtam mahmah uhi: tang 6, 7. Liandou-te unau hauhdan kilchiha kithang venuvung a nu'n najaa, a veh dingin kuankhia hi. Liandou pen sial zongin suangdoh ah natu a, a nu'n haih a, Pu Liandou omna na thei hiam? a chi hi: tang 2 leh 3. Liandouin, Thei e. Gal-ai tang-aiin ju-le-sa nein lun duldul uhi. Hiai sial juipeuh leteh a in uah hontun ding hi, a chi hi. A nu'n sial a nungzuiha, a pai nawnta hi: tang 4. Liandouin lamnai lamah namakhelha, in a natunsan hi. Adenmah chiangin a nu hongtung petmah hi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Lut ngamlouin kongpi bulah ding nilouh a, huan a samiat uhi: tang 5. A giaka; tua janin innuaia kisi sial honte ki a ging bualbual hi. Liandou nu a ihmu theikeia, Liandou - Thanghou sawmsial, api-atal kisita bualbual; hanktuam ah sevaupak bang hen, chiin a hamsiat hi. Ajing khua a vakin a seng pua a, in kimvela akbubah a aktui khat jela a donkhawmsak ua leh a seng dim zou hi. Tuate puain paikhia hi. A pai dingkuanin Liandouin, Nu, hongtunghei hetkenia, na sih chiangin ju hiam va hiam khatin hongkihilin aw, chiin a vaikhak hi. A nu a pai nungin Liandouin a goute a phoukhe zengzung hi. Liandou vaikhaknain a nu lung a khoiha, a nunghei leh Liandouin a phonkhiak gouten a tan hi. In a tunin a pasaiin, Aktui hiaizahta, na lu na tawa na lei hiam? a nacaia. Huan a ji tuh khakham veiin a puklumta. Adenchiangin vasa khatin, Liandou - Thanghou, na nu si si, vachi hi. A nu uh luang la dingin Liandou te kuan uhi. Gun a palkai siausiau ua. A hongpailam un Liandouin a ji a bana lena tui a paipih leh a khahsuaha, tuiin a taihmangsak hi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Liandou tuh ji-louin in a tungkik hi. Bem sungah a nu uh luang a koih uh a, a si-tui liak dingin uital khat a koih ua, a thante tu dingin aktal khat. Bangtan hiam nungin Liandou sial a sun hi. A lam juajua, ahihhangin Liandou pen khasiatna toh dim hi. A ji toh a kiten-ni ua tangpi-tangtain ju-le-sa a niandante uh a ngaihsutkik chiangin, Liandouin a ji a ngai lua hi: tang 11, 12 leh 16. Liandou-te a hauh mahmah hang un a mangbei pah uhi. Khangluiten, A nu a lak nawn jiaka mangmoh a, mangbei ahi, a chi uhi. (Huaijiakin ahi, tuni tana tate taisana pasal nei nu, taisana omten a lakkik noplouh uh; i lak leh a zek a chi uhi. AKHIAKNATE Siatlei suak-lei suak; tagah genthei. Umbang tou-suang tunga tu. Nuhtun - nu. Mel hongma-haih. Puvon - pu. Kaiin zak- zakta. Sang leh lai - gamsa leh gal. Kankong - kong; khomual. Lenlual - lawmte. Umi - unaute. Lamsia! - sasial ne. Tan - a mat uh. Thai - ji. Khua lun e - a kidawn ua a sih uh genna. Lamli - lamnalak.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Tang 7 leh 9 - buh-le-bal, mim le-tang a ai ua, sial a sun ua, nek-le-tak ah tangpi - tangta'a niang uhi. Bangteng hileh milrausa mahmah leitungdamsungin thupipeh e, chiin zukhamin a lamlam uhi. Setang - neih-le-lam. Tang 10 - Liandou tuh ju duh lelah tui zata zang thei, sa duh lelah leitang laka la thei; a sial lah a kullsung dim, innuaia a vok lah ngalhon bang mai ahi. Tuabang zahtaa kiningching ahihmanin a utlehdah un a ta uni. Laknuai - innuai. Lualsu - ngalhon. Sumtual - huangsong. Kaylon - vasa. Thai ka lakin - ka mou piin. Phualtang hontawi - vaphual mul tot lawm-le-vual hau. Mineh laish - mi zohna ah. Sunni pi, honsing hi - honglun; hongiungtuang. Samhang tultn - sita. Ngoumei meinnah - saihapak bang. Sep siuu a kisep sidu - a kipek siausiau. Ldindal - dakbu tumgingte. Kisdi - kithoh. Saumban ... nei e - nuamsaa awldan genna. tang 6: Tuaitong toh a kiten tunglai hi, sialsut ni a. tang 7-10: Tuaitong toh a lamsa ua sialsutna. tang 11-13: Tuaitong sih nunga sialsutna a. Chd - Burma Khangthuin Liandou pusa tuh A.D. 387 velah a suilut hi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: A PA SAL-MAT DEIHTA LA Nidanglai pekin khanglui i pi-le-pute a ki-elna pen uh sa-mat leh gal-mat ahi hi. Ni khat papi khatin sal mana, sawtpi a hentasak hi. A tanuin tua hentapa a deihtaa, suahtaksaka kitenpih dinguan lunggelta hi: tang 1. Hentapa'n, A honit takpi nahihleh ka buhlai kol hongsutkhia inla, kitennading ngaihsun ni, chi hi: tang 2. Tuachiangin nungakin tangval buhlai kol a vasattan hi. Sengin puandum leh mal-am, sun-le-paite a podoka, tangvalpa toh taita uhi. Ahia, nu-le-pa theihlouha tuabanga gamta pen a gau om nuam hi chiin tuia kisila, puante sawpsianga, kijun thak lungsim neiin a kijun thak uhi: tang 3. A mansiang tak un a pasal khua lamah paita uhi. In a tun un a nu-le-pa'n, Hichitan kumpi sala tang, tuiin ji toh gou tampi toh hongtungta, chiin kongkhak ah mou sengpuak na sang uhi: tang 4. Hun bangtan hiam nungin a ji'n a nolam veh ding a sawma, ahihhangin a pasalin manglou hi. Ahitazongin phu teiteia, atawrah a pasalin. Ahihleh ka honkhem peuhmah leh chiin sahangba petin kichiamin, mualchih kana khochiha giak ding i hi ngala, chi hi: tang 5. Tuachin a nih un a kuankheta uh. A pa inpi a vatung uhi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: A nu-le-pa navaipautkhia ua; tawldam kawmin inkasang ah a nupa un sam nakihiahsak uhj. A pa-te a hongtun tak un, Ka salpa aw, kijun soplai ken; kei ta-nu nanga dingin phal ngei peuhmah lou ding hang, chi hi: tang 6. Huaitakin tangvalpa'n, Tu donga phallou ladai nahihleh ni-tum chiangin na tanu, gan-khih bangin na huangsung ah khaujenin khit inla, belh maiin, a chi hi: tang 7. Tuachiangin a numei pa'n temsauin tangval ngawng a bantana, a inkonga go lekah a lu a tak hi. Numeinu'n a pasal lu kitak a muhin kapa, hiai chi hi: tang 8. A pasal lu thousi leh khuaipi'n a vel luailuai hi. Atawpah thuakzoulouin, a pa-te theihlouhkalin valakhia a, puanduma tunin taimangpih hi. Lui khat a tunga tua tawmlutpih tumin a geia suangpi ah a ding hi: tang 9. Tualaitakin amah honnungdelh a sanggamnu'n valap a, bohin a pom hi. A u'n, I nu-le-pa'n hichibang zahtaa a honbawl ub kei adingin nuntak man omlou hi. Ka u tanchin, chin na damsungin nagen genin, chiin vaikhak hi: tang 10. A nagnu'n, U aw, zenzen! La ngaih sangin nangmahngei ka hondeih jaw. Khihtheih hilechin, ka honkhit nuam hi, chiin a pom hi: tang 11.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: Ni a tum dekta hi. Nuaneinu'n a awmah a pasal lubuk pom lilea, hiai chiin suang tung apanin tuili ah a tawnlutpihta: tang 12. Tuachiangin inah a naunu taikik a, a kap lut hi. A nu-le-pate kisik lua ua, lah bawlthak theih hi nawnlou hi. Khua a hongmuia, nuai-leng hong tualsuak ua, tunglengte nangmah chiangin lenkahna hongpihna a geia suangpi ah a ding hi: tang 13. JANGTA LA Jangta La kichi zupinekna a jangta-lamna peuh ah a kisa; sa aihna, khodou (saumzunek) leh khuai-aihna khawng ah. GAL LA: tang 1 - Mangkangten khamtunggam a honluah (A.D. 1862 vel) ma ua I pi-le-pute khopi fun phuahna. A lufdan tuh tulaia U.N. khukpi New York, U.S.A. a khovel namchih palaite paikhawm bangmai ahi. tang 2 - Sa leh gal-mata makai leh minthang i pi-le-pute ahi uh. Enleng i enton ding uh. tang 3 - Zou Gala Metei Gal (A.D. 1871 vel) phuahna. tang 4 - India Independence, August 15 1947 phuahna. tang 5 - I pi-le-pute pianna Chimnuai Geltui ahi. SA LA: tang 6 - Sa mat utdan genna. tang 7 - Sa manthei genna. tang 8 - Gamsa aneu-alian ka thahna ka meithal aw, sa na kap nuam nawnta ding e.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: tang 9 - Gol leh saipi chihlouh siah sa chikim ka manta. DAH LA: tang 10 - Houpih theihlouh dawi a khel lua. Tate kaihuai dinglai nauzum khabsuah ing. tang 11, 12 - Thu-le-la buai laitaka si zenzen! Si baih lua! Solkala dot leh tuitum pasalpha, na sep piching ben (P.N.C. mukhia Pu Thangkhai, 1907-'53). NGEINA: tang 13 - Hanken: Saiin sahnu kong a hon dia, muin a kha jakin a pi nilouh ding. tang 14 - Si-khak lungmuan. Na nilim ding tunglengte ka mana, vana na tutpih ding sapi-samang tam ka that hi. Thawmhau kisa ken. tang 15 - Sa-zek phuahna. tang 16 - Hanken: puanlap, akngesawm, salu leh vaphuallu. tang 17 - Pa sih nunga sa-tut a aih ua song a phuh uh phuahna. NA-MINTE: tang 18 - Sial-song phuahna. tang 19 - Meithal phuahna. tang 20 - Kihouna sikkhau sat phuahna. tang 21 - Sik leipite phuahna. tang 22 - Lel phuahna. tang 23 - Meilong phuahna. tang 24 - Longleng phuahna. tang 25 - Kumjawa (T.S.) phuahna. VUALNGAIH LA tang 1 - Nu-te ngaih sanga vual ngaih na a sak jawkdan genna. tang 2 - Vualngaih a kiakloh hi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A HONGPIANJIATE: tang 3 - I kichiamsa ahih chian mi toh na teng het ken. JAWL LA GAL LA: tang 1 - Kidou laia galkap dinga lenna a lengte. tang 2 - Zou Gal (1840-'94), 1856 vel. tang 10 - Kialpia a tate toh bakai toulai hakai khuk ah a sia, a taten a pawi a tep uh; a tate nekdinga theipia pou. tang 17 - A bawi-mat nh mipi laia puanbeia a nau suak phuahna. NA-MINTE: tang 32 - Gosem phuahna. tang 33 - Chingtang phuahna. tang 34 - Meithal phuahna. tang 35 - Sikguia kihouna (telephone) phuahna. tang 36 - Meilong phuahna. tang 37 - Kidou laia longleng phuahna. tang 38 - A sisa nu lim-et phuahna. tang 39 - Thauvui phuahna.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A KHIAKNATE (SANNEM LA): tang 29 - Tanu khak puanpi got. Tanu khakin puanpi a kenga, a nu-le-paten, Tanu-tapa na tawipihin chin a kha uhi. tang 30 - Helhhawt phuahna. Suna a hek-ham uh nau-oih la toh a kilawm. tang 31 - Mui phuahna. Nang, sikkawi leh sing toh kilemkhawm nungakte khaukhekna ahi. tang 32 - Sutlam phuahna. Gokang leh sing suktuah, khanjialna ahi.

PAITE LA GOUSIAH - A KHIAKNATE (KHUAI LA): Nidanglai khanglai khovel-miten khuai a khol sek uhi. Gamiaka singa kaite a la ua, intung khawng leh inkim khavngah a tak uhi. Tuate pavoltak kuan chiangin a hali ua, kel khavingin a ai sek uhi. Nophaelna khata a neih uh ahi a, nungak - tangval a lam uhi. Khuai kichi tuh khuaibel, khuaithum, khuaisunmu, tunpi, tunpizadem, khuailaikang, leh adangdang ahi: Tuate lakah tunpi leh khuailaikang tuh leia kua ahi a, adangte singa kuithoh ahi uhi. Saunang - in. Kumbhua khenna'n - tuk leh khai, nipi leh phalbi; hiai hun lte lakah phalbi hun kuan leh a khuaite nuntak tawpna nekding, takding; ain ding chihna. Momnou - tunailai. Hanlung chiamna - ki-elna. Bel bang suang - tak diuden. Kemsing daw'ng - inkasang, ahia hiaiah ahihleh bepilang doh hi. Lengkel ... khih e - kelkhaua khuai aihha ding kel khit. Lapna - aihna. Chin - sanggamnu. Pahtang - inka. Lentawm - khuang. Chiandal - dak.
